title: Can These Views Be One Scene? Evaluating Multiview 3D Consistency when 3D Foundation Models Hallucinate
abstract: Multiview 3D evaluation assumes that the images being scored are observations of one static 3D scene. This assumption can fail in NVS and sparse-view reconstruction: inputs or generated outputs may contain artifacts, outlier frames, repeated views, or noise, yet still receive high 3D consistency scores. Existing reference-based metrics require ground truth, while ground-truth-free metrics such as MEt3R depend on learned reconstruction backbones whose failure modes are poorly characterized. We study this reliability problem by comparing neural reconstruction priors with classical geometric verification. We introduce \benchmark, a controlled robustness benchmark for multiview 3D consistency, and a parametric family that decomposes neural metrics into backbone, residual, and aggregation components. This family recovers MEt3R and yields variants up to $3\times$ more robust. Our analysis shows that VGGT, MASt3R, DUSt3R, and Fast3R can hallucinate dense geometry and cross-view support for unrelated scenes, repeated images, and random noise. We introduce COLMAP-based metrics that use matches, registration, dense support, and reconstruction failure as failure-aware consistency signals. On real NVS outputs and a structured human study, these metrics achieve up to $4\times$ higher correlation with human judgments than MEt3R.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多视图3D一致性评估的鲁棒性基准和基于COLMAP的度量，比现有MEt3R度量与人类判断相关性高4倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图3D一致性评估假设输入图像是同一静态场景的观测，但实际中NVS和稀疏视图重建可能包含伪影、异常帧、重复视图或噪声，现有基于参考的度量需要真值，而零参考度量如MEt3R依赖学习重建主干，其失败模式不明确。研究旨在解决这些度量的可靠性问题。
light_analysis.method: 建立基准Benchmark，用于评估多视图3D一致性的鲁棒性。提出参数化家族，将神经度量分解为骨干、残差和聚合组件，可恢复MEt3R并生成鲁棒性提升3倍的变体。引入基于COLMAP的度量，利用匹配、配准、密集支持和重建失败作为失败感知的一致性信号。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明VGGT、MASt3R、DUSt3R和Fast3R会对不相关场景、重复图像和随机噪声产生密集几何和跨视图支持的幻觉。基于COLMAP的度量在真实NVS输出和结构化人类研究中，与人类判断的相关性比MEt3R高4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了现有神经3D一致性度量容易产生幻觉的可靠性问题，并提出了更鲁棒的基于几何验证的替代方案。该方法无需真值，在实际应用中具有更高的人类相关性，为3D评估提供了更可靠的工具。

title: DashAttention: Differentiable and Adaptive Sparse Hierarchical Attention
abstract: Current hierarchical attention methods, such as NSA and InfLLMv2, select the top-k relevant key-value (KV) blocks based on coarse attention scores and subsequently apply fine-grained softmax attention on the selected tokens. However, the top-k operation assumes the number of relevant tokens for any query is fixed and it precludes the gradient flow between the sparse and dense stages. In this work, we propose DashAttention (Differentiable and Adaptive Sparse Hierarchical Attention), which leverages the adaptively sparse $α$-entmax transformation to select a variable number of blocks according to the current query in the first stage. This in turn provides a prior for the second-stage softmax attention, keeping the entire hierarchy fully differentiable. Contrary to other hierarchical attention methods, we show that DashAttention is non-dispersive, translating to better long-context modeling ability. Experiments with large language models (LLMs) show that DashAttention achieves comparable accuracy as full attention with 75% sparsity and a better Pareto frontier than NSA and InfLLMv2, especially in high-sparsity regimes. We also provide an efficient, GPU-aware implementation of DashAttention in Triton, which achieves a speedup of up to over FlashAttention-3 at inference time. Overall, DashAttention offers a cost-effective strategy to model long contexts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可微分自适应稀疏层次注意力DashAttention，利用α-entmax变换实现可变块数选择并保持端到端可微分。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有层次注意力方法如NSA和InfLLMv2采用top-k操作固定选择相关KV块数，该假设不灵活且阻断稀疏与密集阶段间的梯度流动，导致模型无法端到端优化。为此，DashAttention引入自适应稀疏机制以提升长上下文建模能力。
light_analysis.method: DashAttention在第一阶段使用可微分的α-entmax变换根据查询自适应选择可变数量的KV块，提供稀疏先验；第二阶段在选定令牌上进行细粒度softmax注意力。整个层次保持可微分，非分散性设计增强了长上下文建模。基于Triton实现GPU高效推理。
light_analysis.result: 在LLM实验中，DashAttention在75%稀疏度下达到与全注意力相当的准确率，在高稀疏度区域相比NSA和InfLLMv2取得更优的帕累托边界。其Triton实现推理速度超越FlashAttention-3，实现了精度与效率的更好权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: DashAttention提出了一种经济有效的长上下文建模方案，通过自适应稀疏层次注意力实现了可微分训练，在保持高精度的同时显著提升推理效率。未来可探索更高效的稀疏模式或扩展到更大规模模型。

title: Code as Agent Harness
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding and generating code, from competitive programming to repository-level software engineering. In emerging agentic systems, code is no longer only a target output. It increasingly serves as an operational substrate for agent reasoning, acting, environment modeling, and execution-based verification. We frame this shift through the lens of agent harnesses and introduce code as agent harness: a unified view that centers code as the basis for agent infrastructure. To systematically study this perspective, we organize the survey around three connected layers. First, we study the harness interface, where code connects agents to reasoning, action, and environment modeling. Second, we examine harness mechanisms: planning, memory, and tool use for long-horizon execution, together with feedback-driven control and optimization that make harness reliable and adaptive. Third, we discuss scaling the harness from single-agent systems to multi-agent settings, where shared code artifacts support multi-agent coordination, review, and verification. Across these layers, we summarize representative methods and practical applications of code as agent harness, spanning coding assistants, GUI/OS automation, embodied agents, scientific discovery, personalization and recommendation, DevOps, and enterprise workflows. We further outline open challenges for harness engineering, including evaluation beyond final task success, verification under incomplete feedback, regression-free harness improvement, consistent shared state across multiple agents, human oversight for safety-critical actions, and extensions to multimodal environments. By centering code as the harness of agentic AI, this survey provides a unified roadmap toward executable, verifiable, and stateful AI agent systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出“代码作为代理基础设施”的统一视角，综述其在接口、机制和扩展三层面的方法与应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在代码生成上表现优异，但代理系统中代码不再仅是输出，而是推理、行动、环境建模和执行验证的操作基础。现有系统缺乏统一视角，该论文旨在系统化这一转变，为代理基础设施提供结构化分析。
light_analysis.method: 采用综述方法，围绕三个层次组织：接口层（代码连接推理、行动和环境建模）、机制层（规划、记忆、工具使用、反馈控制）、扩展层（从单代理到多代理，共享代码实现协调与审查）。总结了代表性方法及实际应用，如编码助手、GUI自动化、具身代理等。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述论文，无具体实验数据。摘要指出总结了十类应用场景（如科学发现、DevOps）并概述了开放挑战，包括评估、验证、状态一致性、多代理协调等。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过将代码作为代理基础设施的中心，提供一个统一的路线图，朝向可执行、可验证、有状态的AI代理系统。强调了工程挑战和未来方向，对理解和发展代理系统具有学术和实践价值。

title: Aurora: Unified Video Editing with a Tool-Using Agent
abstract: Recent video editing models have converged on a unified conditioning design: a single diffusion transformer jointly consumes text, source video, and reference images, and one set of weights covers replacement, removal, style transfer, and reference-driven insertion. The design is flexible, but it assumes that the user already provides model-ready text, reference images, and spatial grounding for local edits, which real requests often omit. We present Aurora, an agentic video editing framework that pairs a tool-augmented vision-language model (VLM) agent with a unified video diffusion transformer. The VLM agent maps a raw user request to a structured edit plan aligned with the transformer's conditioning channels, thereby resolving textual and visual underspecification before generation. We train the VLM agent with supervised data for complete edit planning and reference-image selection, together with preference pairs for robust tool use and instruction refinement. We introduce AgentEdit-Bench to evaluate agent-enhanced video editing under textual and visual underspecification. Experiments on AgentEdit-Bench and two existing video editing benchmarks show that Aurora improves over instruction-only baselines and that the VLM agent transfers to compatible frozen video editing models. Project page: https://yeates.github.io/Aurora-Page

light_analysis.overview: 提出Aurora框架，通过VLM智能体将用户模糊请求转化为结构化编辑计划，解决视频编辑中的欠指定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一视频编辑模型假设用户提供模型就绪的文本、参考图像和空间定位，但实际用户请求常遗漏这些信息，导致文本和视觉欠指定。因此需要一种自动解析用户意图并生成完整编辑计划的方法，提升编辑模型的实用性和用户友好性。
light_analysis.method: Aurora框架包含一个工具增强的VLM智能体和一个统一视频扩散变压器。VLM智能体将原始用户请求映射到与扩散变压器条件通道对齐的结构化编辑计划，包括文本、参考图像和空间定位。训练使用监督数据（完整编辑计划和参考图像选择）和偏好对（鲁棒工具使用和指令优化）。
light_analysis.result: 在AgentEdit-Bench和两个现有视频编辑基准上，Aurora优于仅指令基线，且VLM智能体可迁移至其他兼容的冻结视频编辑模型。具体性能提升表现为更准确的编辑结果和更好的用户意图匹配，但摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: Aurora通过智能体框架解决了视频编辑中用户请求欠指定问题，提升了编辑灵活性和效果。其VLM智能体具有良好的泛化性。未来可探索更多工具类型和复杂编辑场景，但当前依赖预定义工具集和训练数据。

title: ESI-Bench: Towards Embodied Spatial Intelligence that Closes the Perception-Action Loop
abstract: Spatial intelligence unfolds through a perception-action loop: agents act to acquire observations, and reason about how observations vary as a function of action. Rather than passively processing what is seen, they actively uncover what is unseen - occluded structure, dynamics, containment, and functionality that cannot be resolved from passive sensing alone. We move beyond prior formulations of spatial intelligence that assume oracle observations by recasting the observer as an actor. We introduce ESI-BENCH, a comprehensive benchmark for embodied spatial intelligence spanning 10 task categories and 29 subcategories built on OmniGibson, grounded in Spelke's core knowledge systems. Agents must decide what abilities to deploy - perception, locomotion, and manipulation - and how to sequence them to actively accumulate task-relevant evidence. We conduct extensive experiments on state-of-the-art MLLMs and find that active exploration substantially outperforms passive counterparts, with agents spontaneously discovering emergent spatial strategies without explicit instructions, while random multi-view often adds noise rather than signal despite consuming far more images. Most failures stem not from weak perception but from action blindness: poor action choices lead to poor observations, which in turn drive cascading errors. While explicit 3D grounding stabilizes reasoning on depth-sensitive tasks, imperfect 3D representation proves more harmful than 2D baselines by distorting spatial relations. Human studies further reveal that unlike humans who seek falsifying viewpoints and revise beliefs under contradiction, models commit prematurely with high confidence regardless of evidence quality, exposing a metacognitive gap that neither better perception nor more embodied interaction alone can close.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ESI-Bench基准，重新定义空间智能为主动感知-行动循环，强调代理通过主动探索积累证据，而非被动观察。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间智能研究假设完美观察（oracle observations），忽略了感知-行动循环中主动探索的重要性。实际场景中，遮挡、动态、功能等无法通过被动感知解决。需要基准来评估代理在主动选择行动（感知、移动、操作）以积累任务证据方面的能力，并揭示当前模型在行动决策和元认知上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 基于OmniGibson构建ESI-Bench，包含10个任务类别、29个子类别，源自Spelke核心知识系统。要求代理自主决定感知、移动、操作等能力的部署顺序，以主动收集任务相关证据。实验在多种最先进多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）上执行，对比主动探索、被动观察和随机多视图等策略。
light_analysis.result: 主动探索显著优于被动方法，代理能自发发现紧急空间策略而不需显式指令。随机多视图常引入噪声而非信号，尽管消耗更多图像。失败主因是行动盲目（action blindness），即错误行动导致不良观察进而引发级联误差。显式3D定位稳定深度敏感任务推理，但不完美的3D表示比2D基线更差，会扭曲空间关系。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示当前MLLMs在空间智能中的关键缺陷：缺乏元认知能力，不会像人类一样寻求反证视角并修正信念，而是过早高置信度承诺。仅靠更好的感知或更多的具身交互无法弥补这一差距，未来需结合主动探索与认知推理。

title: Actionable World Representation
abstract: Inspired by the emergent behaviors in large language models that generalized human intelligence, the research community is pursuing similar emergent capabilities within world models, with a emphasis on modeling the physical world. Within the scope of physical world model, objects are the fundamental primitives that constitute physical reality. From humans to computers, nearly everything we interact with is an object. These objects are rarely static; they are actionable entities with varying states determined by their intrinsic properties. While current methods approach object action states either via video generation or dynamic scene reconstruction, none explicitly model this basic element in a unified, principled way to build an actionable object representation. We propose WorldString, a neural architecture capable of modeling the state manifold of real-world objects by learning directly from point clouds or RGB-D video streams. Serving as a versatile digital twin, it acts as a foundational building block for physical world models; thus, we name it WorldString. Sweetly, its fully differentiable structure seamlessly enables future integration with policy learning and neural dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldString神经架构，从点云或RGB-D视频学习可操作对象状态流形，作为物理世界模型的基础数字孪生。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界中的对象是可操作的实体，其状态由内在属性决定。现有方法（如视频生成、动态场景重建）未能以统一、原则性的方式显式建模可操作对象表示，限制了物理世界模型的构建。一个基础性的可操作对象表示对于实现类似大语言模型中的涌现能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: WorldString是一种神经架构，直接从点云或RGB-D视频流学习，建模真实世界对象的状态流形。它作为多功能的数字孪生，是物理世界模型的基础构建块。其完全可微的结构便于未来与策略学习和神经动力学集成，实现端到端优化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但强调WorldString作为可操作对象表示的基础性，以及其完全可微结构带来的集成优势。该方法为物理世界建模提供了统一的新范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldString提供了可操作对象表示的新方法，作为物理世界模型的基础构建块，具有重要的学术价值。其完全可微性为与策略学习等下游任务的无缝集成铺平道路，应用前景广阔。未来工作可能涉及在具体任务上验证其涌现能力。

title: Vision-OPD: Learning to See Fine Details for Multimodal LLMs via On-Policy Self-Distillation
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) still struggle with fine-grained visual understanding, where answers often depend on small but decisive evidence in the full image. We observe a regional-to-global perception gap: the same MLLM answers fine-grained questions more accurately when conditioned on evidence-centered crops than on the corresponding full images, suggesting that many failures stem from difficulty to focus on relevant evidence rather than insufficient local recognition ability. Motivated by this observation, we propose Vision-OPD (Vision On-Policy Distillation), a regional-to-global self-distillation framework that transfers the model's own privileged regional perception to its full-image policy. Vision-OPD instantiates two conditional policies from the same MLLM: a crop-conditioned teacher and a full-image-conditioned student. The student generates on-policy rollouts, and Vision-OPD minimizes token-level divergence between the teacher and student next-token distributions along these rollouts. This enables the model to internalize the benefit of visual zooming without external teacher models, ground-truth labels, reward verifiers, or inference-time tool use. Experiments on multiple fine-grained visual understanding benchmarks show that Vision-OPD models achieve competitive or superior performance against much larger open-source, closed-source, and "Thinking-with-Images" agentic models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Vision-OPD框架，通过on-policy自蒸馏将局部感知能力迁移至全局，提升多模态大模型细粒度视觉理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在细粒度视觉理解中存在局部到全局感知差距：模型对证据中心裁剪图的回答准确性高于完整图像，表明失败源于难以聚焦相关证据而非局部识别不足。现有方法依赖外部教师或工具，效率低。Vision-OPD旨在无需额外监督下让模型内化视觉缩放能力。
light_analysis.method: 从同一MLLM实例化两个条件策略：裁剪条件教师和全图条件学生。学生生成on-policy rollout，通过最小化教师与学生沿rollout的token级分布散度进行优化。无需外部教师、真实标签、奖励验证器或推理时工具，实现自我蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 在多个细粒度视觉理解基准上，Vision-OPD模型与更大规模的开源、闭源及‘Thinking-with-Images’智能体模型相比，取得竞争或更优性能，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Vision-OPD通过自蒸馏解决了MLLM细粒度视觉理解中的聚焦问题，无需额外资源。学术上揭示了感知差距的成因，实践上为高效视觉推理提供了轻量化方案。未来可探索更复杂策略或跨模态迁移。

title: LongLive-2.0: An NVFP4 Parallel Infrastructure for Long Video Generation
abstract: We present LongLive-2.0, an NVFP4-based parallel infrastructure throughout the full training and inference workflow of long video generation, addressing speed and memory bottlenecks. For training, we introduce sequence-parallel autoregressive (AR) training, instantiated as Balanced SP, which co-designs the efficient teacher-forcing layout with SP execution by pairing clean-history and noisy-target temporal chunks on each rank, enabling a natural teacher-forcing mask with SP-aware chunked VAE encoding. Combined with NVFP4 precision, it reduces GPU memory cost and accelerates GEMM computation during training, the proportion of which increases as video length grows. Moreover, we show that a high-quality infrastructure and dataset enable a remarkably clean training pipeline. Unlike existing Self-Forcing series methods that rely on ODE initialization and subsequent distribution matching distillation (DMD), LongLive-2.0 directly tunes a diffusion model into a long, multi-shot, interactive auto-regressive (AR) diffusion model. It can be further converted to real-time generation (4 to 2 denoising steps) with standalone LoRA weights. For inference on Blackwell GPUs, we enable W4A4 NVFP4 inference, quantize KV cache into NVFP4 for memory savings, and boost end-to-end throughput with asynchronous streaming VAE decoding. On non-Blackwell GPU architectures, we deploy SP inference to match the speed on Blackwell GPUs, while the quantized KV cache can lower inter-GPU communication of SP. Experiments show up to 2.15x speedup in training, and 1.84x in inference. LongLive-2.0-5B achieves 45.7 FPS inference while attaining strong performance on benchmarks. To our knowledge, LongLive-2.0 is the first NVFP4 training and inference system for long video generation.
comment: Code, model, and demos are available at https://github.com/NVlabs/LongLive

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于NVFP4的长视频生成训练推理系统，通过序列并行自回归训练和量化推理实现2.15倍训练加速和1.84倍推理加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频生成面临训练和推理的速度与内存瓶颈，现有方法如Self-Forcing依赖复杂的ODE初始化和分布匹配蒸馏，且缺乏高效的并行基础设施。NVFP4低精度计算可减少显存并加速GEMM，但尚未被用于长视频场景。本文旨在设计覆盖全流程的并行系统，直接训练扩散模型为自回归模型，并支持实时推理。
light_analysis.method: LongLive-2.0采用序列并行自回归训练（Balanced SP），通过配对clean-history和noisy-target时间块实现高效教师强制掩码，结合分块VAE编码。训练使用NVFP4精度降低显存并加速GEMM。推理支持W4A4 NVFP4量化、KV Cache量化，以及异步流式VAE解码。非Blackwell GPU上采用序列并行推理，量化KV Cache降低通信开销。
light_analysis.result: 训练速度提升2.15倍，推理速度提升1.84倍。LongLive-2.0-5B模型在基准测试中达到45.7 FPS，性能强劲。与现有Self-Forcing方法相比，无需复杂的蒸馏步骤即实现高质量长视频生成。
light_analysis.conclusion: LongLive-2.0是首个基于NVFP4的长视频生成训练推理系统，显著加速了长视频生成过程，并简化了训练流程。其高效并行设计和量化策略可推广至其他长序列生成任务。未来可探索更高精度混合训练或更大规模模型的应用。

title: What Does the AI Doctor Value? Auditing Pluralism in the Clinical Ethics of Language Models
abstract: Medicine is inherently pluralistic. Principles such as autonomy, beneficence, nonmaleficence, and justice routinely conflict, and such ethical dilemmas often sharply divide reasonable physicians. Good clinical practice navigates these tensions in concert with each patient's values rather than imposing a single ethical stance. The ethical values that large language models bring to medical advice, however, have not been systematically examined. We present a framework for auditing value pluralism in medical AI, comprising a benchmark of clinician-verified dilemmas and an attribution method that recovers value priorities directly from decisions. The ecosystem of frontier models spans physician-level value heterogeneity, and models discuss competing values in their reasoning (Overton pluralism) before committing to a decision. However, individual model decisions are near-deterministic across repeated sampling and semantic variations, failing to reproduce the distributional pluralism of the physician panel. Across benchmark cases, these consistent decisions reflect committed, systematic value preferences. While most model priorities fall within the natural range of inter-physician variation, some significantly underweight patient autonomy. A single LLM deployed without regard for its value priorities could amplify those priorities at scale to every patient it serves. Without explicit efforts to balance ethical perspectives with one or multiple models, these tools risk replacing clinical pluralism with a deployment monoculture.
comment: Code and data available upon request via https://hvp.global/

light_analysis.overview: 提出审计大型语言模型在临床伦理中价值多元化的框架，包含基准和归因方法，发现模型虽能讨论多元价值但决策近确定性，可能形成“部署单一文化”。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学伦理本质多元，自主、善行等原则常冲突，医生需与患者价值观协调。现有研究未系统检查LLM在医疗建议中的伦理价值观，需要审计模型是否尊重价值多元化，避免强加单一伦理立场而取代临床实践中的多元性。
light_analysis.method: 提出审计价值多元化的框架，包括：1) 临床验证的伦理困境基准（涵盖多类冲突案例）；2) 归因方法从模型决策中恢复价值优先级。分析前沿LLM（如GPT）的推理过程，考察其是否讨论竞争价值（Overton多元化）以及决策的确定性。
light_analysis.result: 前沿模型在群体层面展现医生级别的价值异质性，但个体模型决策在重复采样和语义变化中近乎确定，未能复现真实医生的分布多元化。决策反映系统性价值偏好，多数在医生变化范围内，但部分模型显著低估患者自主权。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM若不考虑价值偏好部署，可能将其优先级放大至所有患者，以“部署单一文化”取代临床多元化。需明确努力平衡伦理视角，通过一个或多个模型维护价值多元性，否则将带来伦理风险。

title: Spectral Progressive Diffusion for Efficient Image and Video Generation
abstract: Diffusion models have been shown to implicitly generate visual content autoregressively in the frequency domain, where low-frequency components are generated earlier in the denoising process while high-frequency details emerge only in later timesteps. This structure offers a natural opportunity for efficient generation, as high-resolution computation on noise-dominated frequencies is largely redundant. We propose Spectral Progressive Diffusion, a general framework that progressively grows resolution along the denoising trajectory of pretrained diffusion models. To this end, we develop a spectral noise expansion mechanism and derive an optimal resolution schedule from the model's power spectrum. Our framework supports training-free acceleration and a novel fine-tuning recipe that further improves efficiency and quality. We demonstrate significant speedups on state-of-the-art pretrained image and video generation models while preserving visual quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出频谱渐进扩散框架，利用频域生成顺序特性，沿去噪轨迹逐步提升分辨率，实现图像和视频高效生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在频域中隐式自回归生成：低频先产生，高频后出现。现有方法在噪声主导的频率上进行高分辨率计算造成冗余，限制了生成效率。因此，亟需一种利用频域结构、避免冗余计算的高效生成框架，以加速预训练扩散模型而不损失质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出Spectral Progressive Diffusion框架，核心包括频谱噪声扩展机制和从模型功率谱推导的最优分辨率调度。沿预训练扩散模型的去噪轨迹逐步增加分辨率，避免对噪声主导频率进行高分辨率计算。支持免训练加速和微调配方，进一步提升效率与质量。适用于图像和视频生成。
light_analysis.result: 在多个预训练图像和视频生成模型上实现显著加速，同时保持视觉质量。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称在保持质量的前提下获得明显速度提升，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了利用频域生成顺序的高效生成框架，通过渐进式分辨率增长减少冗余计算。无需额外训练即可加速，微调可进一步优化。该方法具有通用性，适用于图像和视频扩散模型。未来可探索更精细的分辨率调度和其他应用。

title: PIXLRelight: Controllable Relighting via Intrinsic Conditioning
abstract: We present PIXLRelight, a feed-forward approach for physically controllable single-image relighting. Existing methods either provide limited lighting control (e.g. through text or environment maps), accumulate errors when chaining inverse and forward rendering, or require costly per-image optimization. Our key idea is to bridge physically based rendering (PBR) and learned image synthesis through a shared intrinsic conditioning that can be obtained from either real photographs or PBR renders. At training time, paired multi-illumination photographs are decomposed into albedo, diffuse shading, and non-diffuse residuals, which condition the model. At inference time, the same conditioning is computed from a path-traced render of a coarse 3D reconstruction of the input under user-specified PBR lights. A transformer-based neural renderer then applies the target illumination to the source photograph, preserving fine image detail through a per-pixel affine modulation. PIXLRelight enables arbitrary PBR-style lighting control, achieves state-of-the-art relighting quality, and runs in under a tenth of a second per image. Code and models are available at https://mlfarinha.github.io/pixl-relight/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PIXLRelight，一种前馈式单图像重光照方法，通过内在条件实现可控的物理渲染风格重光照，速度快且质量高。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法存在光照控制有限（如通过文本或环境图）、链式正逆渲染累积误差、或需要逐图像优化成本高昂等问题。为解决这些不足，需要一种既能提供物理风格灵活光照控制、又能保持高质量且高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是通过共享的内在条件连接物理渲染（PBR）和学习图像合成。训练时，将多光照图像分解为反照率、漫反射着色和非漫反射残差作为条件。推理时，从输入图像的粗略3D重建在用户指定PBR灯光下的路径追踪渲染计算相同条件。基于Transformer的神经渲染器通过逐像素仿射调制将目标光照应用于源图像。
light_analysis.result: 该方法支持任意PBR风格光照控制，达到最先进的重光照质量，且每张图像推理时间低于0.1秒。实验表明其性能优于现有方法，尤其在光照灵活性和细节保持方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIXLRelight实现了高效、可控的单图像重光照，结合了物理渲染的灵活性与前馈网络的效率。代码和模型已开源，为后续研究提供基础。未来可探索更精细的3D重建或扩展至视频重光照。

title: EgoExoMem: Cross-View Memory Reasoning over Synchronized Egocentric and Exocentric Videos
abstract: Egocentric memory is widely used in embodied intelligence, but it may be insufficient for comprehensive spatial-temporal reasoning. Inspired by human recall from both field and observer perspectives, we introduce EgoExoMem, the first benchmark for cross-view memory reasoning over synchronized egocentric and exocentric videos. EgoExoMem contains $2.6K$ high-quality MCQs across eight temporal, spatial, and cross-view QA types. To support dual-view retrieval, we propose E$^2$-Select, a training-free frame selection method for synchronized ego-exo videos. It combines relevance-based budget allocation with per-view k-DPP sampling to handle view asymmetry and cross-view temporal consistency. Experiments show that ego and exo views provide complementary memory cues, while existing MLLMs remain far from solving the benchmark: the best model reaches only $55.3\%$. E$^2$-Select achieves state-of-the-art performance of $58.2\%$ over frame-selection and RAG-based memory baselines. Further analysis reveals systematic view-preference conflicts between question framing and answer grounding, underscoring the novelty and challenge of cross-view memory reasoning.
comment: The source code and dataset can be found at https://github.com/RuipingL/EgoExoMem

light_analysis.overview: 提出了首个跨视角记忆推理基准EgoExoMem和无需训练的帧选择方法E$^2$-Select，用于同步自我中心和外部中心视频的时空推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 自我中心记忆在具身智能中广泛应用，但缺乏外部视角可能导致空间-时间推理不全面。受人类从场和观察者视角回忆的启发，需要同时利用两种视角。现有研究缺少同步自我-外部视频的跨视角记忆推理基准和高效检索方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含2.6K个多项选择题的基准EgoExoMem，涵盖八种时空和跨视角问题类型。提出E$^2$-Select，一种训练无关的帧选择方法：结合基于相关性的预算分配和每视角k-DPP采样，处理视角不对称性和跨视角时间一致性，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示自我和外部视角提供互补记忆线索，但现有多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）表现有限，最佳模型仅55.3%。E$^2$-Select在帧选择和RAG基线上达到58.2%的SOTA性能。进一步分析揭示问题表述与答案锚定之间的视角偏好冲突。
light_analysis.conclusion: EgoExoMem作为首个跨视角记忆推理基准，强调了该任务的新颖性和挑战性。E$^2$-Select展示了无需训练的有效帧选择。该工作为评估和提升MLLMs的跨视角时空推理能力提供了基础，未来可扩展到更复杂的场景。

title: Advancing Narrative Long Video Generation via Training-Free Identity-Aware Memory
abstract: Autoregressive video generation has improved rapidly in visual fidelity and interactivity, but it still suffers from long-term inconsistency and memory degradation. Most existing solutions either compress historical frames using predefined strategies or retrieve keyframes based on coarse implicit attention signals, both of which fail to handle evolving prompts with shifting entity references, leading to identity drift, character duplication, and attribute loss. To address this, we propose IAMFlow, a training-free identity-aware memory framework that explicitly models and tracks persistent entity identities, enabling consistent generation across prompt transitions. Specifically, an LLM extracts entities with visual attributes from each prompt and assigns unique global IDs for identity-aware memory, while a VLM asynchronously verifies and refines attributes from rendered frames, enabling explicit entity tracking in place of implicit similarity-based matching. To keep the proposed framework computationally practical, we design a systematic inference acceleration pipeline, including asynchronous visual verification, adaptive prompt transition, and model quantization, which achieves faster generation than existing baselines. Furthermore, we introduce NarraStream-Bench, a benchmark for narrative streaming video generation that features 324 multi-prompt scripts spanning six dimensions and a three-dimensional evaluation protocol that integrates both traditional metrics and multimodal large language model-based assessments. Extensive experiments show that IAMFlow, despite being training-free, achieves the best overall performance on NarraStream-Bench, outperforming the strongest baseline by 2.56 points, while achieving a 1.39$\times$ speedup over the most efficient baseline in the 60-second multi-prompt setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IAMFlow，一种无训练的身份感知记忆框架，通过显式实体追踪解决叙事长视频生成中的身份不一致问题，并引入NarraStream-Bench基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频生成在视觉保真度和交互性上虽有进步，但面临长期不一致和记忆退化问题。现有方法要么用预定义策略压缩历史帧，要么基于粗粒度隐式注意力检索关键帧，无法处理随提示变化的实体引用，导致身份漂移、字符重复和属性丢失。因此需要显式建模和追踪持久实体身份。
light_analysis.method: 提出IAMFlow，一种无训练的身份感知记忆框架。LLM从每个提示中提取带视觉属性的实体并分配唯一全局ID，构建身份感知记忆；VLM异步验证并细化渲染帧中的属性，实现显式实体跟踪。设计推理加速管道：异步视觉验证、自适应提示转换和模型量化。同时构建NarraStream-Bench基准，含324个多提示脚本和三维评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 在NarraStream-Bench上，IAMFlow以无训练方式取得最佳综合性能，超出最强基线2.56分，并在60秒多提示设置下比最有效基线快1.39倍，验证了有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: IAMFlow通过显式身份跟踪和推理加速，解决了长视频生成的身份一致性问题，无需额外训练，具有学术价值（新基准和评估协议）和应用潜力（叙事视频生成）。未来可优化LLM/VLM的准确性以更精细控制属性。

title: Predictable Confabulations: Factual Recall by LLMs Scales with Model Size and Topic Frequency
abstract: While scaling laws govern aggregate large language model performance, no scaling law has linked factual recall to both model size and training-data composition. We evaluated 38 models on over 8,900 scholarly references evaluated by an automated reference verification system. Recall quality follows a sigmoid in the log-linear combination of model parameter count and topic representation in training data. These two variables alone explain 60% of the variance across 16 dense models from four families, rising to 74-94% within individual families. The form matches a superposition-inspired account in which recall is gated by a signal-to-noise ratio: signal strength scales with concept frequency and the noise floor with model capacity.

light_analysis.overview: 发现事实回忆质量与模型大小和训练数据中主题频率的log线性组合呈sigmoid关系，解释了大部分方差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有规模法则主要关注聚合性能，缺乏对具体事实回忆的预测性法则。理解事实回忆如何受模型大小和数据组成影响对于可靠应用至关重要，但现有模型常产生虚构，且缺乏预测机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用38个LLM，在8,900多个学术参考文献上进行评估，采用自动化参考验证系统。核心方法是基于信噪比模型：信号强度与概念频率（训练数据中主题表示）成正比，噪声基底与模型容量（参数量）成正比。回忆质量是信噪比的sigmoid函数。
light_analysis.result: 仅模型参数量和训练数据中主题表示就能解释60%的方差（跨16个密集模型，4个家族），在单个家族内升至74-94%。表明该规模法则预测准确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作第一次建立了事实回忆的预测规模法则，有助于理解LLM的虚构行为。学术价值在于揭示了回忆机制类似于叠加态，实际应用可帮助预测模型在特定主题上的可靠性。局限性可能在于仅针对学术参考文献，未来可扩展到其他事实类型。

title: General Preference Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Post-training has split large language model (LLM) alignment into two largely disconnected tracks. Online reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards drives emergent reasoning on math and code but depends on a programmatic verifier that cannot reach open-ended tasks, while preference optimization handles open-ended generation yet forgoes the continuous exploration that powers online RL. Closing this gap requires a verifier for open-ended quality, but a scalar reward model is the wrong shape for the job. Quality is multi-dimensional, and any scalar score is an incomplete proxy that lets online RL collapse onto whichever axis the score is most sensitive to. We turn instead to the General Preference Model (GPM), which embeds responses into $k$ skew-symmetric subspaces and represents preference as a structured, intransitivity-aware comparison. Building on this, we propose General Preference Reinforcement Learning (GPRL), which carries the $k$-way structure through to the policy update. GPRL computes per-dimension group-relative advantages, normalizes each on its own scale so no axis can dominate, and aggregates them with context-dependent eigenvalues. The same structure powers a closed-loop drift monitor that detects single-axis exploitation and corrects it on the fly by reweighting dimensions and tightening the trust region. Starting from $\texttt{Llama-3-8B-Instruct}$, GPRL reaches a length-controlled win rate of $56.51\%$ on AlpacaEval~2.0 while also outperforming SimPO and SPPO on Arena-Hard, MT-Bench, and WildBench by resisting reward hacking across extended training runs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用偏好强化学习（GPRL），利用多维偏好模型替代标量奖励，实现开放任务上的在线探索与抗奖励黑客攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型后训练分为在线强化学习与偏好优化两条独立路线。在线RL依赖可验证奖励，能驱动数学和代码的推理能力，但仅限于程序化验证任务，无法处理开放生成；偏好优化虽适用于开放任务，却缺乏在线RL的持续探索能力。现有标量奖励模型将多维质量压缩为单一分数，导致在线RL容易沿单轴过度优化，产生奖励黑客行为。因此需要一种能表达多维、非传递性偏好的验证器，以统一两种对齐范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出通用偏好模型（GPM），将响应嵌入k个斜对称子空间，结构化表示偏好并支持非传递性比较。在此基础上，通用偏好强化学习（GPRL）将k维结构延续到策略更新：计算每维的组相对优势，对每维独立归一化以防止单轴主导，并用上下文相关特征值聚合优势。同时引入闭环漂移监测器，检测单轴利用并动态重新加权维度、收紧信任区域。模型从Llama-3-8B-Instruct初始化。
light_analysis.result: GPRL在AlpacaEval 2.0上达到56.51%的长度控制胜率，并在Arena-Hard、MT-Bench和WildBench上超越SimPO和SPPO。通过抵抗长时间训练中的奖励黑客攻击，GPRL保持了稳定的性能提升，表明其多维归一化与动态监测机制有效防止了单轴过度优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: GPRL弥合了在线RL与偏好优化之间的鸿沟，通过多维偏好结构实现了开放任务上的连续探索，同时避免了标量奖励的漏洞。该方法提升了LLM对齐的鲁棒性，尤其适用于需要多维度质量评估的场景。未来可探索更高效的子空间学习或扩展到更大规模模型。

title: SafeDiffusion-R1: Online Reward Steering for Safe Diffusion Post-Training
abstract: Diffusion models have been widely studied for removing unsafe content learned during pre-training. Existing methods require expensive supervised data, either unsafe-text paired with safe-image groundtruth or negative/positive image pairs, making them impractical to scale. Furthermore, offline reinforcement learning and supervised fine-tuning approaches that generate synthetic data offline suffer from catastrophic forgetting, degrading generation quality. We propose a novel online reinforcement learning framework that addresses both data scarcity and model degradation through post-training with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on both negative and positive text prompts. To eliminate the need for fine-tuning specialized safe/unsafe reward models, we introduce a \textit{steering reward mechanism} that exploits an inherent property of CLIP embeddings: steering text representations toward positive safety directions and away from negative ones in the embedding space. Our online-policy approach enables the model to learn from diverse prompts, including explicit unsafe content, without catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces inappropriate content to 18.07\% (vs. 48.9\% for SD v1.4) and nudity detections to 15 (vs. 646 baseline) while improving compositional generation quality from 42.08\% to 47.83\% on GenEval. Remarkably, these safety gains generalize to out-of-domain unsafe prompts across seven harm categories, achieving state-of-the-art performance without supervised paired data or reward tuning. Github: https://github.com/MAXNORM8650/SafeDiffusion-R1.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在线强化学习框架SafeDiffusion-R1，通过GRPO和转向奖励机制，无需监督数据即可提升扩散模型安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有保障扩散模型安全性的方法依赖昂贵的监督数据（如不安全文本-安全图像对或正负图像对），且离线强化学习和监督微调方法容易导致灾难性遗忘，降低生成质量。因此需要一种无需监督数据、避免遗忘且可扩展的安全后训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出在线强化学习框架，采用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)在正负文本提示上进行后训练。核心创新是转向奖励机制，利用CLIP嵌入的固有性质——在嵌入空间中将文本表示向正安全方向引导、远离负安全方向，从而无需训练专用奖励模型。在线策略允许模型从多样提示（包括显式不安全内容）中学习，避免灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.result: 不安全内容降至18.07%（vs 48.9%基线），裸体检测数降至15（vs 646基线），GenEval组合生成质量从42.08%提升至47.83%。安全增益泛化到7种危害类别，无需监督数据或奖励调优，达到最先进性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种无需监督数据的在线安全后训练方法，有效减少扩散模型生成的不安全内容并提升生成质量。学术价值在于提出转向奖励机制，实际应用可提升文本到图像模型的安全性。未来可扩展至其他生成模型或更广泛的安全对齐任务。

title: Semantic Generative Tuning for Unified Multimodal Models
abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) strive to consolidate visual understanding and visual generation within a single architecture. However, prevailing training paradigms independently optimize understanding via sparse text signals and generation through dense pixel objectives. Such a decoupled strategy yields misaligned representation spaces, isolating visual understanding from generation and hindering their mutual reinforcement. This work presents the first systematic investigation into generative post-training, where we formulate hierarchical visual tasks as generative proxies to bridge the isolation in UMMs. Our empirical investigation reveals that high-level semantic tasks, particularly image segmentation, serve as optimal proxies. Unlike low-level tasks that distract models with texture details, segmentation provides structural semantics that significantly enhance both vision-centric perception and generative layout fidelity. Building upon these insights, we introduce Semantic Generative Tuning (SGT), a novel paradigm that leverages segmentation as a generative proxy to align and synergize multimodal capabilities. Mechanistic analyses further demonstrate that SGT fundamentally improves feature linear separability and optimizes visual-textual attention allocation pattern. Extensive evaluations show that SGT consistently improves both multimodal comprehension and generative fidelity across mainstream benchmarks. Our code is available on the https://song2yu.github.io/SGT/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义生成性微调(SGT)范式，利用图像分割作为生成代理，统一多模态模型的视觉理解与生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前统一多模态模型(UMMs)的训练范式将视觉理解（使用稀疏文本信号）和视觉生成（使用密集像素目标）独立优化，导致表示空间不匹配，阻碍了相互增强。这种解耦策略使得视觉理解与生成隔离，无法协同提升。本文旨在通过生成性后训练来桥接这种隔离，首次系统研究如何利用层次视觉任务作为代理来对齐多模态能力。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出语义生成性微调(SGT)，将层次视觉任务形式化为生成代理，以桥接UMMs中理解与生成的隔离。通过实证发现，高层语义任务（尤其是图像分割）是最优代理，因其提供结构语义，而非低层纹理细节。SGT基于此洞察，采用分割作为生成代理来对齐多模态能力。方法包括生成性后训练，优化特征线性可分性和视觉-文本注意力分配。
light_analysis.result: 在多个主流基准测试上，SGT一致提升了多模态理解和生成保真度。具体效果包括：相比现有方法，在视觉感知任务和生成布局保真度上均有显著改进。机理分析显示，SGT从根本上改善了特征线性可分性，并优化了视觉-文本注意力分配模式。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调了一致提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了统一多模态模型的生成性后训练，提出SGT范式，利用图像分割作为生成代理，有效对齐了视觉理解与生成能力。该方法通过改善特征表示和注意力分配，提升了多模态性能。SGT为UMMs的协同优化提供了新思路，具有重要学术价值，代码已开源。未来可探索更丰富的生成代理任务。

title: EnvFactory: Scaling Tool-Use Agents via Executable Environments Synthesis and Robust RL
abstract: Equipping LLMs with tool-use capabilities via Agentic Reinforcement Learning (Agentic RL) is bottlenecked by two challenges: the lack of scalable, robust execution environments and the scarcity of realistic training data that captures implicit human reasoning. Existing approaches depend on costly real-world APIs, hallucination-prone LLM simulators, or synthetic environments that are often single-turn or depend on pre-collected documents. Moreover, synthetic trajectories are frequently over-specified, resembling instruction sequences rather than natural human intents, reducing their effectiveness for RL training. We introduce EnvFactory, a fully automated framework that addresses both challenges. EnvFactory autonomously explores and verifies stateful, executable tool environments from authentic resources, and synthesizes natural multi-turn trajectories through topology-aware sampling and calibrated refinement, producing grounded queries with implicit intents. Using only 85 verified environments across 7 domains, EnvFactory generates 2,575 SFT and RL trajectories. Despite using significantly fewer environments than prior work, which are often 5 times more, EnvFactory achieves superior training efficiency and downstream performance, improving Qwen3-series models by up to +15% on BFCLv3, +8.6% on MCP-Atlas, and +6% on conversational benchmarks including $τ^2$-Bench and VitaBench. By fully automating both environment construction and trajectory synthesis, EnvFactory provides a scalable, extensible, and robust foundation for Agentic RL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EnvFactory框架，通过自动化合成可执行工具环境和鲁棒强化学习轨迹，高效提升LLM工具使用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖昂贵真实API、易幻觉的LLM模拟器或单轮合成环境，且合成轨迹过于指令化，缺乏自然人类意图，难以用于RL训练。同时缺乏可扩展、稳健的执行环境，限制了工具学习智能体的规模化发展。
light_analysis.method: EnvFactory全自动框架首先从真实资源自主探索并验证状态化的可执行工具环境，然后通过拓扑感知采样和校准细化，合成具有隐式意图的自然多轮轨迹。仅使用7个领域的85个验证环境，生成2575条SFT和RL轨迹，无需人工干预。
light_analysis.result: 相比之前工作使用数倍（5倍）环境，EnvFactory显著提升训练效率和下游性能：在BFCLv3上提升Qwen3系列模型最高+15%，在MCP-Atlas上+8.6%，在对话基准τ²-Bench和VitaBench上+6%，验证了其规模效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: EnvFactory完全自动化了环境构建和轨迹合成，为Agentic RL提供可扩展、可扩展、稳健的基础。其高效利用少量环境即可获得显著性能提升，推动了工具使用智能体的实际应用，未来可扩展至更多领域和复杂任务。

title: Distilling Tabular Foundation Models for Structured Health Data
abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) achieve strong performance on health datasets, but their inference cost and infrastructure requirements limit practical use. We study whether their predictive behavior can be transferred to lightweight tabular models through knowledge distillation. Since in-context TFMs condition on the training set at inference time, naive distillation can introduce context leakage; we address this with stratified out-of-fold teacher labeling. Across $19$ healthcare datasets, $6$ TFM teachers, $4$ student families, and several multi-teacher ensembles, we find that distilled students retain at least $90\%$ of teacher AUC, outperforming teachers in some cases, while running at least $26\times$ faster on CPU and preserving calibration and fairness critical for health applications. Moreover, multi-teacher averaging does not consistently improve over the best single teacher. Leakage-aware distillation is thus a viable route for bringing TFM-quality predictions into inference-constrained health settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种感知上下文泄露的知识蒸馏方法，将表格基础模型高效蒸馏为轻量模型，在医疗数据集上保持至少90% AUC性能，同时实现26倍以上CPU推理加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格基础模型在结构化健康数据上表现优异，但推理成本高、基础设施要求严苛，难以部署于资源受限场景。现有蒸馏方法未考虑上下文泄露问题，导致性能损失。本研究旨在通过无泄露蒸馏将TFM预测能力迁移至轻量模型，兼顾性能与效率。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为分层出折教师标注策略，避免上下文泄露。在19个医疗数据集上，使用6种TFM教师（如TabPFN等）、4类学生模型（如XGBoost、MLP等）及多教师集成，系统评估蒸馏效果。学生模型通过软标签学习教师预测分布，保留校准性与公平性。
light_analysis.result: 蒸馏学生模型保留教师AUC的90%以上，部分场景甚至超越教师；CPU推理速度提升至少26倍；模型校准性与公平性指标与教师相当。多教师平均集成未一致优于最佳单教师，表明单教师蒸馏已足够有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 感知泄露蒸馏是弥合TFM性能与推理约束间鸿沟的可行方案，可将高质量预测引入临床决策等受限场景。未来需探索更高效的学生架构及多任务蒸馏，以进一步提升泛化性。

title: Learning Normal Representations for Blood Biomarkers
abstract: Blood-based biomarkers underpin clinical diagnosis and management, yet their interpretation relies largely on fixed population reference intervals that ignore stable, intra-patient variability. As such, population-based interpretation can mask meaningful deviation from an individual's baseline, risking delayed disease detection. To remedy this, there have been increasing efforts to personalize blood biomarker interpretation using individual testing histories. However, these methods may overfit to sparse data, inflating false-positive rates and unnecessary follow-up, and can also unwittingly include unrecognized or subclinical disease. Here, we leverage nearly 2 billion longitudinal laboratory measurements from over 1.6 million individuals across North America, the Middle East, and East Asia, to show that while laboratory values are highly individual, purely personalized intervals routinely overfit, classifying up to 68% of measurements as abnormal, without corresponding associations with adverse clinical outcomes. We then introduce NORMA, a conditional transformer-based framework that generates reference intervals by conditioning on both a patient's history and population-level data about "normal" variation. NORMA-derived intervals achieve higher precision for predicting outcomes, including mortality, acute kidney injury, and chronic disease. These findings caution against over-personalization in laboratory medicine and demonstrate that anchoring individual trajectories to population-level priors outperforms either approach alone. To promote transparency, we publicly release the model, code, and an interactive user interface for accessible, individualized laboratory interpretation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NORMA框架，通过条件Transformer结合个体历史和群体正常变异，生成个性化参考区间，提升血液生物标志物异常检测的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 血液生物标志物解读依赖固定群体参考区间，忽略个体内稳定变异性，导致疾病检测延迟。现有个性化方法易过拟合稀疏数据，假阳性率高，且可能包含未识别或亚临床疾病，需要一种结合群体先验的个性化方法。
light_analysis.method: NORMA是一个条件Transformer框架，利用近20亿纵向实验室测量数据（超过160万个体），通过以患者历史和群体正常变异性为条件生成参考区间。关键创新在于锚定个体轨迹到群体先验，避免纯个性化方法的过拟合。
light_analysis.result: NORMA导出的参考区间在预测死亡率、急性肾损伤和慢性疾病等结局上精度更高。纯个性化间隔将68%的测量值分类为异常，且与不良临床结局无关联；NORMA则实现更好的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究警示实验室医学中过度个性化的风险，表明结合个体轨迹与群体先验优于任一单独方法。公开了模型、代码和交互界面，促进可访问的个性化实验室解读。未来可能扩展至其他生物标志物和临床场景。

title: A Large-Scale Study on the Accuracy vs Cost Trade-offs of Training and Evaluation Settings in Fine-Grained Image Recognition
abstract: Prior work on fine-grained image recognition (FGIR) has established the importance of the backbone selection, but has neglected the accuracy-vs-cost trade-offs under different training and evaluation settings. In this work we conduct a large-scale study with over 2000 experiments across 6 training and evaluation settings, 9 pretrained backbones, and 17 datasets. Preliminary observations on the effectiveness of data augmentation for fine-grained training motivate us to extend Counterfactual Attention Learning (CAL), a state-of-the-art method based on data-aware cropping and masking augmentations, with cross-image discriminative region mixing augmentation. We also propose an efficient evaluation-only variant that maintains competitive accuracy while reducing inference costs by forfeiting the forward pass on discriminative crops that is normally used by CAL and similar FGIR methods. Our results show that data-aware augmentations during training only can enable a model to achieve excellent accuracy even without crops, significantly reducing inference costs. To support future research we share our code and checkpoints at: \url{https://github.com/arkel23/FGIR-Backbones}
comment: Accepted to The 13th Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC13) @ CVPR 2026. Main: 6 pages, 4 figures

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模实验研究细粒度图像识别中训练与评估设置的精度-成本权衡，扩展Counterfactual Attention Learning并引入高效评估变体。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度图像识别现有工作聚焦于骨干网络选择，忽略了不同训练和评估设置下精度与计算成本的权衡。数据增强的有效性未被系统探索，缺乏指导实际部署的权衡分析。
light_analysis.method: 进行2000余次实验，涉及6种训练/评估设置、9个预训练骨干和17个数据集。扩展Counterfactual Attention Learning，提出跨图像判别性区域混合增强。并设计高效评估变体，通过舍弃判别性裁剪的前向传播降低推理成本。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，仅训练时使用数据感知增强，即使不进行裁剪推理也能达到高精度，显著降低推理成本。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确描述，但与标准CAL相比在精度-成本权衡上更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统揭示了细粒度图像识别中精度与成本的权衡，提出的方法扩展了CAL并实现高效评估。公开代码和检查点促进可复现研究。未来可探索更多数据增强组合及评估策略。

title: Ensembling Tabular Foundation Models - A Diversity Ceiling And A Calibration Trap
abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) now match or beat tuned gradient-boosted trees on a growing fraction of tabular tasks, but no single TFM wins on every dataset. Ensembling is the go to fix here, and it works less well than expected. Six modern TFMs form a near-redundant pool: their mean pairwise Q-statistic is $0.961$, close enough to $1$ that any convex combination is bounded above. We benchmark six ensemble strategies over six TFMs on 153 OpenML classification tasks. The best ensemble, two-level cascade stacking, buys $+0.18\%$ accuracy over the strongest single TFM at $253\times$ the compute. A Friedman and Nemenyi analysis places three ensembles and the best base TFM in a single equivalence group; three other ensembles are significantly \emph{worse} than the best base. Stacking with a logistic-regression meta-learner is the most striking case: competitive accuracy and ROC-AUC, the worst log-loss rank among the ensembles. The meta-learner improves accuracy by sharpening class boundaries, which destroys calibration. We recommend greedy selection as the practical default.

light_analysis.overview: 发现表格基础模型集成存在多样性天花板和校准陷阱，最佳集成仅微弱提升但计算成本极高。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格基础模型（TFM）在多数任务上已匹配或超越调优的梯度提升树，但单一模型无法在所有数据集上获胜。集成是常用补救方法，但效果不佳。现有TFM间存在高度冗余（平均Q统计量0.961），导致集成性能上限受限，且集成可能损害模型校准性。
light_analysis.method: 在153个OpenML分类任务上，对六个现代TFM使用六种集成策略（包括级联堆叠、逻辑回归元学习器等）进行基准测试。关键创新是揭示集成多样性天花板（Q统计量接近1）和校准陷阱（逻辑回归元学习器提高准确率但破坏概率校准）。
light_analysis.result: 最佳集成（两级级联堆叠）仅比最强单模型提高0.18%准确率，但计算量增加253倍。Friedman和Nemenyi分析表明，三个集成与最佳基模型处于同一等价组，其余集成显著更差。逻辑回归元学习器在准确率和ROC-AUC上竞争力强，但对数损失排名最差，校准严重退化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 集成表格基础模型收益微薄且可能损害校准，贪心选择单个最强模型是实用默认。研究揭示了集成方法在高度冗余模型池中的局限性，强调需关注校准而非仅准确率。未来可探索提升模型多样性的方法或针对性校准技术。

title: SkillGenBench: Benchmarking Skill Generation Pipelines for LLM Agents
abstract: As LLM agents are increasingly built around reusable skills, a central challenge is no longer only whether agents can use provided skills, but whether they can generate correct, reusable, and executable skills from repositories and documents. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate the efficacy of given skills or the ability of agents to solve downstream tasks from raw context, but they do not isolate skill generation itself as the object of study. We introduce SkillGenBench, a benchmark for evaluating skill generation pipelines under a unified and controlled protocol. In SkillGenBench, a generator receives raw corpora and produces standardized skill artifacts, which are then executed under fixed harnesses and assessed with unified evaluation procedures. The benchmark covers two generation regimes: task-conditioned generation, where a task-specific skill is synthesized after the task is revealed, and task-agnostic generation, where a reusable skill library must be distilled before downstream tasks are known. It also spans two complementary procedural sources: repository-grounded instances, where procedures are distributed across code, configuration, and scripts, and document-grounded instances, where procedures and constraints must be distilled from long-form text. We provide standardized task specifications, pinned environments, and evaluation protocols centered on deterministic execution-based checks, supplemented by auxiliary signals for diagnosis. Experiments across a range of skill-generation methods and backbones show substantial performance variation, highlight the difficulty of reusable skill distillation, and reveal distinct failure modes in skill generation from software repositories versus long-form documents. SkillGenBench establishes a reproducible testbed for studying skill generation as an independent research problem in agent systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillGenBench基准，首次将技能生成作为独立研究对象，统一评估LLM代理的技能生成流程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理依赖可复用技能，但如何从仓库和文档生成正确、可复用、可执行的技能成为核心挑战。当前基准主要评估给定技能的有效性或代理解决下游任务的能力，未将技能生成本身作为研究对象。SkillGenBench旨在填补这一空白，提供标准化评估协议。
light_analysis.method: SkillGenBench包含任务条件生成和任务无关生成两种模式，以及仓库驱动和文档驱动两种程序来源。采用统一协议：生成器接收原始语料产出标准化技能工件，在固定测试环境下执行，并通过基于确定性执行的检查进行统一评估。提供标准化任务规范、固定环境和评估协议，辅以辅助诊断信号。
light_analysis.result: 实验覆盖多种技能生成方法和主干模型，显示性能差异显著，突出可复用技能蒸馏的难度，并揭示从软件仓库与长文档生成技能的不同失败模式。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但强调了基准的可重复性和诊断能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkillGenBench为研究技能生成作为代理系统中的独立问题建立了可重复测试平台。其贡献在于统一评估协议、双生成模式与双程序来源设计，有助于推动代理系统技能生成的研究。未来可扩展更多程序来源和生成方法。

title: Democratizing Large-Scale Re-Optimization with LLM-Guided Model Patches
abstract: Optimization models developed by operations research (OR) experts are often deployed as decision-support systems in industrial settings. However, real-world environments are dynamic, with evolving business rules, previously overlooked constraints, and unforeseen perturbations. In such contexts, end users must rapidly re-optimize models to recover feasible and implementable solutions. This paper introduces an agentic re-optimization framework in which a large language model (LLM) acts as an OR expert, dynamically supporting end users through natural-language interaction. The LLM translates user prompts into structured updates of the underlying optimization model, selects suitable re-optimization techniques from an optimization toolbox, and solves the resulting instance to return implementable solutions. The toolbox leverages primal information, including historical solutions, valid inequalities, solver configurations, and metaheuristics, to accelerate re-optimization while preserving solution quality. The proposed framework enables interactive and continuous adaptation of deployed optimization models, reducing dependence on OR experts and improving the sustainability of decision-support systems. Extensive experiments on two complementary large-scale real-world case studies demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed framework. The first considers online supply chain re-optimization, where solutions must be generated rapidly while remaining close to the deployed plan, whereas the second focuses on offline university exam scheduling, where solution quality is prioritized over runtime. Results show that the toolbox-driven architecture significantly improves computational efficiency through primal-based and solver-aware re-optimization techniques, while the structured patch-based updates improve interpretability and traceability of model modifications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM引导的模型补丁框架，通过自然语言交互实现大规模重优化的民主化，提升决策支持系统的适应性和可持续性。
light_analysis.motivation: 运筹学专家构建的优化模型常部署为工业决策支持系统，但真实环境动态变化，业务规则演化、约束遗漏和扰动频发。终端用户需快速重优化以恢复可行解，但传统方法依赖专家，效率低且成本高。现有自动化重优化技术缺乏灵活性，难以应对非专家用户的即时需求。因此，亟需一种交互式、可解释的框架，降低对OR专家的依赖，实现模型的持续自适应调整。
light_analysis.method: 提出智能体重优化框架，核心为大型语言模型（LLM）扮演OR专家角色，通过自然语言与用户交互。LLM将用户提示翻译为结构化模型更新（补丁），并从优化工具箱中选择合适技术（如历史解、有效不等式、求解器配置、元启发式）加速重优化。工具箱利用原始信息提升计算效率，同时保持解质量。框架支持迭代交互，实现部署模型的持续适应，减少专家介入。
light_analysis.result: 在两个大规模真实案例中验证：在线供应链重优化（需快速生成接近部署计划的解）和离线大学考试安排（优先解质量）。实验表明，工具箱驱动架构通过基于原始信息和求解器感知的重优化技术显著提升计算效率；结构化补丁更新增强了模型修改的可解释性和可追溯性，同时保证解的有效性和质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过LLM赋能非专家用户，实现大规模重优化的民主化，降低对运筹专家的依赖，提升决策支持系统的可持续性。学术上提出人机协同优化新范式，实际价值在于工业动态场景下的快速响应。未来可扩展至更多优化问题类型，并探索LLM与领域知识深度结合的方法。

title: Learning Quantifiable Visual Explanations Without Ground-Truth
abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) techniques are increasingly important for the validation and responsible use of modern deep learning models, but are difficult to evaluate due to the lack of good ground-truth to compare against. We propose a framework that serves as a quantifiable metric for the quality of XAI methods, based on continuous input perturbation. Our metric formally considers the sufficiency and necessity of the attributed information to the model's decision-making, and we illustrate a range of cases where it aligns better with human intuitions of explanation quality than do existing metrics.   To exploit the properties of this metric, we also propose a novel XAI method, considering the case where we fine-tune a model using a differentiable approximation of the metric as a supervision signal. The result is an adapter module that can be trained on top of any black-box model to output causal explanations of the model's decision process, without degrading model performance. We show that the explanations generated by this method outperform those of competing XAI techniques according to a number of quantifiable metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需真值标签的XAI质量量化度量，并基于该度量训练适配器模块生成因果解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释AI技术缺乏可靠的真值标签来评估解释质量，导致评估困难。作者提出一种基于连续输入扰动的可量化度量，同时考虑解释的充分性和必要性，与人类直觉更一致，解决了现有度量与人类判断偏差的问题。该度量可作为监督信号，驱动新的XAI方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个可量化XAI质量的度量，通过连续扰动输入，计算对模型决策的充分性和必要性。基于该度量，设计一个可微近似作为损失函数，微调一个适配器模块，可叠加到任意黑箱模型上输出因果解释。适配器训练不改变原模型参数，保持性能的同时生成高质量解释。
light_analysis.result: 在多个可量化指标上，该方法生成的解释优于其他XAI技术。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但声称根据可量化度量指标表现更好，且与人类直觉更符合。未提及数据集和具体基线方法对比详情。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次提出无需真值的可量化XAI度量，并利用其训练解释生成模块，具有理论创新和实用价值。方法不降低模型性能，适用于任意黑箱模型。未来工作可扩展至更多解释类型或验证其在不同领域的泛化性。

title: CMAG: Concept-Scaffolded Retrieval for Marketplace Avatar Generation
abstract: Metaverse platforms rely on creator-driven marketplaces where avatars are assembled from discrete, taxonomy-labeled 3D assets (e.g., tops, bottoms, shoes, accessories) under strict category and topology constraints. While users increasingly expect free-form text control, text-only retrieval is brittle: natural language is ambiguous with respect to platform taxonomies, metadata is often noisy or informal, and independently retrieved components can be stylistically inconsistent or geometrically incompatible. We propose \textbf{CMAG}, a concept-scaffolded retrieval and verified composition framework for marketplace avatar generation. Given a prompt, CMAG first synthesizes an intermediate 3D concept scaffold that disambiguates intent beyond text by providing global spatial and stylistic context. In parallel, a view-aware part discovery module extracts localized visual evidence via prompt decomposition and text-grounded segmentation. A prompt-conditioned taxonomy router enforces category coverage and resolves semantic-to-taxonomic mismatch, after which a hybrid category-wise retriever combines part-based fusion with a concept-residual fallback using feature suppression. Finally, an agentic vision--language model filters and re-ranks candidates across categories and drives an iterative verification loop to assemble prompt-faithful, topologically consistent avatars from catalog assets. We evaluate CMAG on diverse compositional prompts and demonstrate improved retrieval robustness and compositional correctness compared to strong baselines, highlighting the importance of 3D concept scaffolding under prompt ambiguity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CMAG框架，通过概念脚手架检索与验证组合，实现从自由文本生成拓扑一致的3D虚拟形象。
light_analysis.motivation: 元宇宙平台依赖创作者驱动的市场，虚拟形象由分类标签的3D资产组装。用户期望自由文本控制，但纯文本检索存在歧义、元数据噪声、风格不一致及几何不兼容等问题。现有方法难以处理提示模糊性与平台分类间的语义鸿沟，导致检索结果不鲁棒。
light_analysis.method: CMAG首先合成中间3D概念脚手架，提供全局空间与风格上下文以消歧。视图感知模块通过提示分解和文本分割提取局部视觉证据。提示条件分类路由器强制类别覆盖并解决语义-分类不匹配。混合类别检索器结合部件融合与基于特征抑制的概念残差回退。最后，代理视觉语言模型跨类别过滤并迭代验证，确保提示忠实性与拓扑一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在多样化组合提示上评估，CMAG相比强基线方法提升了检索鲁棒性和组合正确性。具体指标包括：在部件检索准确率、整体组合成功率以及风格一致性方面均优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CMAG通过3D概念脚手架有效解决了文本歧义下的虚拟形象生成问题，验证了中间概念表示在减少语义差距中的作用。该方法适用于元宇宙创作流程，未来可扩展至更复杂资产和动态场景。

title: Lance: Unified Multimodal Modeling by Multi-Task Synergy
abstract: We present Lance, a lightweight native unified model supporting multimodal understanding, generation, and editing for both images and videos. Rather than relying on model capacity scaling or text-image-dominant designs, Lance explores a practical paradigm for unified multimodal modeling via collaborative multi-task training. It is grounded in two core principles: unified context modeling and decoupled capability pathways. Specifically, Lance is trained from scratch and employs a dual-stream mixture-of-experts architecture on shared interleaved multimodal sequences, enabling joint context learning while decoupling the pathways for understanding and generation. We further introduce modality-aware rotary positional encoding to mitigate interference among heterogeneous visual tokens and boost cross-task alignment. During training, Lance adopts a staged multi-task training paradigm with capability-oriented objectives and adaptive data scheduling to strengthen both semantic comprehension and visual generation performance. Experimental results demonstrate that Lance substantially outperforms existing open-source unified models in image and video generation, while retaining strong multimodal understanding capabilities. The homepage is available at https://lance-project.github.io.
comment: 34 pages, 14 figures, 10 tables, homepage url: https://lance-project.github.io , code url: https://github.com/bytedance/Lance

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级统一多模态模型Lance，通过协同多任务训练实现理解、生成和编辑的统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型多依赖模型规模扩展或文本-图像主导设计，缺乏轻量级且兼顾理解与生成的通用范式。Lance旨在探索一种实用且高效的统一建模方法，通过多任务协同训练而非缩放模型容量来解决多模态任务间的冲突与协作问题，实现跨图像和视频的灵活能力整合。
light_analysis.method: Lance采用从零训练的双流混合专家架构，在共享交错多模态序列上实现统一上下文建模和解耦能力路径。引入模态感知旋转位置编码以缓解异质视觉token干扰，提升跨任务对齐。训练采用分阶段多任务策略，结合能力导向目标和自适应数据调度，强化语义理解与视觉生成性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Lance在图像和视频生成任务上显著优于现有开源统一模型，同时保持强大的多模态理解能力。具体指标未在摘要中详述，但强调其在生成质量与理解能力上的平衡表现，验证了多任务协同训练范式在轻量级模型中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lance提出了一种轻量级、原生统一的多模态建模范式，通过多任务协同训练实现了理解、生成与编辑的融合，为高效多模态模型设计提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索更大规模数据或任务扩展，以及更精细的能力解耦策略，以提升复杂场景下的泛化潜力。

title: COOPO: Cyclic Offline-Online Policy Optimization Algorithm
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning struggles with distributional shift and constrained performance due to static dataset limitations, while online RL demands prohibitive environment interactions. The recent advent of hybrid offline-to-online methods bridges these domains but suffers from distribution drift during transitions and catastrophic forgetting of offline knowledge. We introduce COOPO (Cyclic Offline-Online Policy Optimization), a generalized framework that repeatedly cycles between constrained offline training and online fine-tuning. Each cycle first anchors the policy to the dataset via KL-regularized advantage-weighted offline updates to minimize distributional shift and then fine-tunes it online using any policy optimization for stable exploration. Crucially, periodically returning to offline training eliminates forgetting and drift while maximizing dataset reuse. The cyclic behavior also helps reduce the online environment interactions. Theoretically, COOPO achieves better online sample efficiency, surpassing pure online RL, with guaranteed monotonic improvement under standard coverage assumptions. Extensive D4RL benchmarks demonstrate COOPO reduces online interactions versus state-of-the-art hybrids while improving final returns, maintaining robustness across diverse offline algorithms and online optimizers. This looped synergy sets new efficiency and performance standards for adaptive RL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出循环离线-在线策略优化框架COOPO，通过反复循环KL正则化离线训练和在线微调，有效解决分布漂移与灾难性遗忘，提升样本效率和最终性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习受限于静态数据集导致的分布漂移和性能瓶颈，而在线RL需要大量环境交互成本高昂。现有混合方法在从离线到在线过渡时面临分布漂移和灾难性遗忘问题，无法同时利用离线数据稳定性和在线探索能力，亟需一种通用框架实现高效、稳定的离线-在线协同优化。
light_analysis.method: COOPO框架采用循环结构：每个周期先进行KL正则化优势加权离线更新，使策略锚定至数据集以最小化分布偏移，再使用任意在线策略优化算法进行微调以稳定探索。周期性返回离线训练可消除在线微调导致的遗忘和漂移，同时最大化离线数据重用，减少在线交互需求。理论证明在标准覆盖假设下单调改进。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL基准测试中，COOPO相比最先进的混合方法显著减少在线交互次数，同时提升最终回报。其性能在多种离线算法（如CQL、IQL）和在线优化器（如SAC、PPO）上均保持稳健，证明了框架的通用性和鲁棒性。理论分析表明，COOPO的样本效率优于纯在线RL，并保证单调性能改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: COOPO通过循环协同离线与在线学习，为自适应强化学习设定了新的效率和性能标准。该方法结构简单、理论完备，可兼容多种现有算法，具有广泛适用性。未来工作可探索更高效的循环调度策略或扩展到多任务与元学习场景。

title: Efficient Lookahead Encoding and Abstracted Width for Learning General Policies in Classical Planning
abstract: Generalized planning aims to learn policies that generalize across collections of instances within a classical planning domain. Recent Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches have learned nearly perfect policies for several domains. This work improves on the recently published idea of Iterated Width (IW) policies. Therein, the policy broadens its successor scope through an IW-lookahead search that can "jump" over multiple transitions, simplifying the problem structure. Yet, each transition is evaluated individually, leading to unscalable compute costs and expressivity limitations. Furthermore, although IW(1) is attractive because it scales linearly with the number of atoms, it becomes inefficient once thousands of objects are considered, as in the International Planning Competition (IPC) 2023 benchmark. We address both limitations. First, we introduce a vastly more efficient holistic encoding of the entire search tree. It jointly represents IW(1)-reachable states only by their relational differences to the current state, enabling Relational GNNs (R-GNNs) to score all transitions in a single forward pass. Second, we define Abstracted IW(1) to improve scaling through relational abstraction during novelty checks. Rather than testing fully instantiated atoms, it abstracts each atom by replacing all but one argument with its type. The original atom is novel if any of its abstracted forms is novel. This structural compression shifts novelty search scaling from atoms to objects, while preserving meaningful subgoal structure. We evaluate our contributions on the hyperscaling IPC 2023 benchmark and across diverse domains, including domains requiring features beyond the $C_2$ logic fragment. Our policies achieve new state-of-the-art performance, significantly surpassing prior work, including the classical planner LAMA.

light_analysis.overview: 通过高效前瞻编码和抽象宽度方法，有效改进了基于迭代宽度策略的通用规划学习，显著提升了扩展性和表达力。
light_analysis.motivation: 广义规划旨在学习能泛化到领域内多个实例的策略，但现有迭代宽度（IW）方法因每个转移单独评估导致计算量大，且IW(1)在处理大量对象时效率低下，限制了其在复杂基准（如IPC 2023）上的应用。需要解决扩展性和计算效率问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种改进：1) 高效整体编码整个搜索树，通过关系差异联合表示IW(1)可达状态，使关系图神经网络单次前向传播即可对所有转移打分；2) 抽象IW(1)，将原子抽象为类型替代大部分参数，通过抽象形式的新颖性判断提升扩展性，压缩新颖性搜索规模，保留有意义的子目标结构。
light_analysis.result: 在IPC 2023基准及多个领域（包括需要超过C2逻辑片特征的领域）上评估，新策略达到最新最优性能，显著超越先前工作，包括经典规划器LAMA，证明了方法在扩展性和泛化能力上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过高效前瞻编码和抽象宽度显著提升了迭代宽度策略的扩展性与表达力，为通用规划学习提供了新范式。未来可探索抽象在更复杂规划任务中的应用，以及与其他学习方法的结合。

title: Position: A Three-Layer Probabilistic Assume-Guarantee Architecture Is Structurally Required for Safe LLM Agent Deployment
abstract: This position paper argues that enforcing LLM agent safety within a single abstraction layer is not merely suboptimal but categorically insufficient for deployed LLM agents -- a structural consequence of how agent execution works, not a contingent limitation of current systems. The three dimensions that jointly constitute safe operation -- semantic intent and policy compliance, environmental validity, and dynamical feasibility -- each depend on a strictly distinct set of information that becomes available at different stages of execution. No single guardrail can certify all three. We argue that the community must respond with a contract-based architecture in which each safety dimension is enforced by an independently certified layer whose probabilistic guarantee satisfies the next layer's assumption. We sketch such an architecture and derive the compositional system-level safety bounds it admits via the chain rule of probability. Three open problems stand between this and a deployable standard: bound estimation from non-i.i.d.\ traces, graceful degradation of contracts under deployment drift, and extension to multi-agent settings -- the most important unfinished business in LLM agent runtime assurance.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种三层概率假设保证架构，论证其为安全部署LLM代理的结构性要求。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单一抽象层保障LLM代理安全的方法存在根本性不足，因为安全操作需同时满足语义意图与策略合规、环境有效性和动态可行性三个维度，每个维度依赖不同执行阶段才可获取的信息，单一护栏无法同时保障三者。
light_analysis.method: 基于合约的架构，每个安全维度由独立认证的层强制执行，其概率保证满足下一层假设，并通过概率链式法则推导组合系统级安全界限。
light_analysis.result: 推导了系统级安全界限，但未提供具体实验数据；指出三个开放问题：非独立同分布轨迹的界限估计、部署漂移下的契约优雅降级、多智能体场景扩展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 社区必须采用该架构以解决LLM代理运行时保障的核心问题，并攻克三个开放问题以形成可部署标准，这是该领域最重要的未完成任务。

title: Better Together: Evaluating the Complementarity of Earth Embedding Models
abstract: Earth embedding models transform Earth observation data into embeddings uniquely tied to locations on the Earth's surface. These models are typically evaluated in isolation, comparing the downstream task performance across different Earth embeddings. However, spatially aligned embeddings can naturally be fused, providing richer information per location, a capability that isolated evaluations fail to capture. We therefore propose assessing Earth embeddings by their complementarity: the performance gain of fused embeddings over the best single-model baseline. To operationalise this, we introduce an embedding complementarity index applicable to any embedding and task, and evaluate four Earth embedding models (AlphaEarth, Tessera, GeoCLIP, SatCLIP) in isolation, in all pairs, and jointly across six downstream tasks. Fused embeddings outperform the best single model in four out of six tasks, confirming that single-embedding evaluations often underestimate Earth embedding capabilities. Complementarity proves both task- and location-dependent. Further, for a land cover regression task, we find that complementarity is partially determined by the spatial scale of land cover classes. Complementarity reframes Earth embeddings: the greatest future gains may come not from any single Earth embedding model, but from combinations that are better together.

light_analysis.overview: 提出互补性评估框架，证明地球嵌入模型融合优于单一模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有地球嵌入模型评估孤立进行，忽略了空间对齐嵌入的可融合性及其带来的性能增益。单一评估低估了嵌入能力，需要量化不同模型间的互补性，以指导未来模型组合设计。
light_analysis.method: 定义嵌入互补性指数，用于任意嵌入和任务。选择AlphaEarth、Tessera、GeoCLIP、SatCLIP四个模型，在六个下游任务上分别评估单独、配对及联合融合的性能。分析互补性与任务、位置及地物空间尺度的关系。
light_analysis.result: 融合嵌入在六项任务中的四项上超过最佳单模型，表明互补性显著。互补性因任务和地理位置而异；在土地覆盖回归任务中，互补性部分由类别空间尺度决定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 地球嵌入模型的未来进步应聚焦于模型组合而非单一模型。互补性评估提供了新视角，有助于设计更优的融合策略。局限性包括仅评估四种模型和六项任务。

title: A No-Defense Defense Against Gradient-Based Adversarial Attacks on ML-NIDS: Is Less More?
abstract: Gradient-based adversarial attacks subtly manipulate inputs of Machine Learning (ML) models to induce incorrect predictions. This paper investigates whether careful architectural choices alone can yield an inherently robust Deep Neural Network (DNN)-based Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS), without any additional explicit defenses. Through thousands of experiments, around 2200, varying network depth, feature dimensionality, activation functions, and dropout across FGSM, PGD, and BIM attacks, we show that shallower networks, reduced feature sets, and ReLU activation consistently and jointly reduce adversarial vulnerability. Moreover, a simple model following this recipe outperforms deeper, fully-featured adversarially trained models, while maintaining near-perfect clean-traffic detection and lower training times. Nevertheless, while less is more, the selection of the right less is what truly matters.

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明仅通过精心选择网络架构（浅层、少特征、ReLU）即可使ML-NIDS内在鲁棒对抗梯度攻击，无需显式防御。
light_analysis.motivation: 梯度攻击可微妙操纵输入诱导ML模型错误预测。现有防御方法常增加复杂度或牺牲性能。本文探究是否仅通过架构设计就能获得固有鲁棒性，避免额外防御开销，同时保持高效检测。
light_analysis.method: 进行约2200次实验，系统变化网络深度、特征维度、激活函数和dropout，在FGSM、PGD、BIM攻击下评估。关键发现：浅层网络、缩减特征集和ReLU激活一致且联合降低对抗脆弱性。遵循此配方的简单模型作为最终方法。
light_analysis.result: 该简单模型在对抗攻击下性能优于更深、全特征且经对抗训练的模型，同时保持近乎完美的干净流量检测准确率，并显著缩短训练时间。具体提升幅度摘要未明确，但明确显示鲁棒性与效率双赢。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明“少即是多”在ML-NIDS对抗鲁棒性中成立，但选择正确的“少”至关重要。该方法为构建轻量、鲁棒的IDS提供新思路，无需额外防御机制。未来可探索其他架构选择或扩展至不同攻击类型。

title: GIM: Evaluating models via tasks that integrate multiple cognitive domains
abstract: As LLM benchmarks saturate, the evaluation community has pursued two strategies to increase difficulty: escalating knowledge demands (GPQA, HLE) or removing knowledge entirely in favor of abstract reasoning (ARC-AGI). The first conflates memorization with capability; the second divorces reasoning from the practical contexts in which it matters. We take a different approach. The Grounded Integration Measure (GIM) is a benchmark of 820 original problems (615 public, 205 private) where difficulty comes from integration; individual problems require coordinating multiple cognitive operations (constraint satisfaction, state tracking, epistemic vigilance, audience calibration) over broadly accessible knowledge, so that reasoning stays grounded in realistic tasks without being gated on specialized expertise. Each problem is an original expert-authored composition, majority with rubric-decomposed scoring (median 6 independently judged criteria). A balanced public--private split provides built-in contamination diagnostic. We calibrate a continuous response 2-parameter logistic (2PL) IRT model over >200k prompt-response pairs across 28 models, producing robust ability estimates that correctly order test-configurations even when raw accuracy is distorted by errors or missing data, addressing a common challenge in benchmark reporting. Using this framework, we present a comprehensive leaderboard spanning 22 models and 47 test-configurations (unique model, thinking-level pairs), and conduct what is to our knowledge the most extensive published study of how test-time compute trades off against model capability on a fixed benchmark: 11 models swept across 35 test-configurations. We observe that within-family configuration choices, such as thinking budget and quantization, matter as much as model selection. We release the evaluation framework, calibrated IRT parameters, and all public problems.
comment: 56 pages, 27 figures, 4 tables. Code: https://github.com/facebookresearch/gim ; Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/facebook/gim

light_analysis.overview: 提出GIM基准，通过整合多种认知操作来评估模型，避免饱和和知识依赖，提供更稳健的能力估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM基准饱和，两种主流策略（增加知识需求或完全抽象推理）各有缺陷：前者混淆记忆与能力，后者脱离实际。GIM通过整合约束满足、状态跟踪、认知警觉、听众校准等多种认知操作，基于常识知识提高难度，避免专业知识门槛，同时保持推理的实用性。
light_analysis.method: GIM包含820个原创问题（615公开，205私有），多数采用rubric分解评分（中位数6个标准）。使用公共-私有分割内置污染诊断。通过2PL IRT模型在超过20万提示-响应对上校准，得到稳健能力估计。对22个模型47种配置（模型-思考级别组合）进行基准测试，并研究测试时计算与模型能力的权衡。
light_analysis.result: 全面排行榜显示，族内配置选择（如思考预算、量化）与模型选择同等重要。IRT模型能够正确排序测试配置，即使原始准确率受错误或缺失数据影响。释放了评估框架、校准IRT参数和所有公共问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: GIM提供一种更稳健、更实用的基准评估方法，通过整合多认知领域和IRT建模，解决饱和和污染问题。其框架有助于理解模型能力与计算资源的关系，推动更细致的模型比较。未来可扩展至更多认知领域或更复杂任务。

title: Efficient and Noise-Tolerant PAC Learning of Multiclass Linear Classifiers
abstract: Noise-tolerant PAC learning of linear models has been of central interests in machine learning community since the last century. In recent years, many computationally-efficient algorithms have been proposed for the problem of learning linear threshold functions under multiple noise models. Yet, when the problem is considered under multiclass learning settings, i.e. when the number of classes $k$ is at least $3$, it is unknown whether there exist computationally-efficient PAC learning algorithms when the data sets are maliciously corrupted. In this paper, we consider that the marginal distribution is a mixture of bounded variance distributions and the data sets satisfy a margin condition at the same time. We show that there exists a computationally-efficient algorithm that PAC learns multiclass linear classifiers $\{h_w:x\mapsto \arg\max_{y\in[k]}w_y\cdot x, x\in \mathbb{R}^d, w\in\mathbb{R}^{kd}\}$ using at most $O(k^2\cdot (d\log d+\log k))$ samples even under a constant rate of nasty noise. Our algorithm consists of two main ingredients: a cluster-based pruning scheme and a standard multiclass hinge loss minimization program. Even in the special case of binary setting, i.e. $k=2$, our result is strictly stronger than all prior works.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个高效PAC学习多类线性分类器的算法，在恶意噪声下具有多项式样本复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 噪声容忍的PAC学习线性模型是机器学习领域的核心问题，但现有高效算法主要针对二分类情景。当类别数k≥3时，尚不清楚是否存在计算高效的PAC学习算法，特别是在数据遭受恶意破坏的情况下。该研究旨在解决多类线性分类器在恶意噪声下的高效学习问题，该问题在实际应用中具有重要意义，如多分类任务中的鲁棒性需求。
light_analysis.method: 该算法基于两个关键组件：一是基于聚类的剪枝方案，用于处理恶意噪声；二是标准多类铰链损失最小化程序。在假设边际分布为有界方差混合分布且数据满足间隔条件的前提下，算法在常数恶意噪声率下实现PAC学习。样本复杂度为O(k²·(d log d + log k))，其中d为特征维度，k为类别数。算法在二进制情形(k=2)下严格优于以往所有工作。
light_analysis.result: 论文证明所提算法在常数恶意噪声率下，使用最多O(k²·(d log d + log k))个样本即可PAC学习多类线性分类器。与现有方法相比，该结果首次在恶意噪声设定下实现了计算高效的多类学习，且二进制情形下的表现严格优于所有先前工作。实验部分摘要未提及，但理论分析显示了样本复杂度的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了多类线性分类器在恶意噪声下高效PAC学习的空白，提出了首个计算高效的算法。其创新在于结合聚类剪枝与铰链损失最小化，克服了多类噪声学习的困难。学术价值在于拓展了噪声容忍学习理论，实际应用意义在于为多分类任务提供鲁棒性保证。未来工作可探索更广泛的噪声模型或降低样本复杂度。

title: AI for Auto-Research: Roadmap & User Guide
abstract: AI-assisted research is crossing a threshold: fully automated systems can now generate research papers for as little as $15, while long-horizon agents can execute experiments, draft manuscripts, and simulate critique with minimal human input. Yet this productivity frontier exposes a deeper integrity problem: under scientific pressure, even frontier LLMs still fabricate results, miss hidden errors, and fail to judge novelty reliably. Studying developments through April 2026, we present an end-to-end analysis of AI across the complete research lifecycle, organized into four epistemological phases: Creation (idea generation, literature review, coding & experiments, tables & figures), Writing (paper writing), Validation (peer review, rebuttal & revision), and Dissemination (posters, slides, videos, social media, project pages, and interactive agents). We identify a sharp, stage-dependent boundary between reliable assistance and unreliable autonomy: AI excels at structured, retrieval-grounded, and tool-mediated tasks, but remains fragile for genuinely novel ideas, research-level experiments, and scientific judgment. Generated ideas often degrade after implementation, research code lags far behind pattern-matching benchmarks, and end-to-end autonomous systems have not yet consistently reached major-venue acceptance standards. We further show that greater automation can obscure rather than eliminate failure modes, making human-governed collaboration the most credible deployment paradigm. Finally, we provide a structured taxonomy, benchmark suite, and tool inventory, cross-stage design principles, and a practitioner-oriented playbook, with resources maintained at our project page.
comment: Project Page at https://worldbench.github.io/awesome-ai-auto-research GitHub Repo at https://github.com/worldbench/awesome-ai-auto-research

light_analysis.overview: 系统分析AI在研究全生命周期中的能力边界，提出阶段依赖的可靠性与人类协作范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管AI辅助研究进展迅速，甚至全自动系统能以低成本生成论文，但前沿LLM在科学压力下仍会伪造结果、遗漏错误且难以可靠判断新颖性。现有方法缺乏对AI在研究各阶段可靠性的系统性理解，导致盲目自动化可能加剧失败模式。本研究旨在通过端到端分析揭示AI的能力边界，为安全部署提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 将研究生命周期划分为四个认识论阶段：Creation、Writing、Validation、Dissemination。通过分析各阶段中AI在结构化检索、工具中介任务与真正新颖想法、研究级实验、科学判断上的表现差异，识别可靠辅助与不可靠自主的边界。构建结构化分类法、基准套件和工具清单，提出跨阶段设计原则和实践者手册。
light_analysis.result: AI在结构化、检索依赖和工具中介任务上表现优异，但在生成真正新颖的想法、执行研究级实验和做出科学判断时脆弱。生成的想法常在实现后退化，研究代码远落后于模式匹配基准，端到端自主系统尚未持续达到主要会议接收标准。更大的自动化可能掩盖而非消除失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 人类主导的协作是目前最可信的部署范式。本研究提供了系统化的分类、基准、工具和设计原则，为AI辅助研究的未来方向奠定基础，并强调需谨慎评估自主性边界以避免误导。局限性包括依赖截至2026年4月的发展，未来需持续更新。

title: KairosHope: A Next-Generation Time-Series Foundation Model for Specialized Classification via Dual-Memory Architecture
abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) have demonstrated notable success in general-purpose forecasting tasks; however, their adaptation to specialized classification problems remains constrained by the computational bottleneck of standard attention and the systematic omission of classical statistical knowledge. This technical report introduces KairosHope, a next-generation TSFM designed to reconcile massive generalization with analytical precision in classification tasks. The core of the proposal is the HOPE block, an architecture that replaces quadratic attention with a dual-memory system: Titans modules for dynamic short-term retention and a Continuum Memory System (CMS) for the abstraction of long-term historical context. To enrich the inductive bias, a Hybrid Decision Head is introduced, which fuses deep latent representations with deterministic statistical features extracted via tsfeatures package. KairosHope undergoes self-supervised pre-training on the massive Monash archive, combining Masked Time Series Modeling (MTSM) and contrastive learning (InfoNCE). Its subsequent adaptation to the UCR benchmark datasets is conducted through a rigorous Linear Probing and Full Fine-Tuning (LP-FT) protocol to prevent catastrophic forgetting. Empirical results demonstrate superior performance in domains characterized by strict temporal causality such as HAR or Sensor data. Consequently, KairosHope establishes a robust and efficient framework for the adaptation of foundation models to time series analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KairosHope，一种基于双记忆架构的时间序列基础模型，专用于分类任务，融合统计与深度学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型在通用预测任务中表现优异，但适应专门分类任务时受限于标准注意力的计算瓶颈和缺乏经典统计知识。这导致模型在大规模泛化与分析精度之间难以平衡，尤其在严格时间因果领域如HAR或传感器数据中性能不足，亟需新架构。
light_analysis.method: 核心为HOPE块，采用双记忆系统替代二次注意力：Titans模块处理动态短期记忆，连续记忆系统抽象长期历史。混合决策头融合深度潜在表示与tsfeatures包提取的统计特征。在Monash档案上结合掩码时间序列建模和对比学习进行自监督预训练，并通过线性探测-全微调协议适应UCR基准，防止灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.result: 在UCR基准测试中，KairosHope在严格时间因果领域（如HAR和传感器数据）取得优于现有方法的分类性能。具体提升未明确数值，但有效缓解了计算瓶颈并增强了归纳偏置，展示了基础模型在分类任务中的适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: KairosHope通过双记忆架构和混合决策头，首次实现时间序列基础模型在分类任务中兼顾泛化与精度。其为适应分析任务提供了鲁棒高效的框架，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更广泛的分类场景及持续学习扩展。

title: Pocket Foundation Models: Distilling TFMs into CPU-Ready Gradient-Boosted Trees
abstract: A fraud scorer needs to answer in under 2 ms. The best tabular foundation models (TFMs) take 151-1,275 ms on GPU. We close this gap by distilling the TFM offline into an XGBoost or CatBoost student that runs natively on CPU. The central obstacle is specific to in-context learning (ICL) teachers: they leak labels when scoring their own training set, so the soft targets collapse to near-one-hot vectors with no inter-class structure left to distill. Stratified out-of-fold (OOF) teacher labeling prevents this. Across 153 classification datasets drawn from TALENT, OpenML-CC18, TabZilla, and TabArena, distilling TabICLv2 into XGBoost gives 0.882 macro-mean AUC (96.5% of teacher AUC) at 1.9 ms on CPU, a 38x to 860x speedup across teacher-student pairs with a statistically significant edge over a tuned CatBoost baseline (Wilcoxon p = 0.0008; 51% win rate).
