Four further findings: teacher rank transfers exactly to student rank; gains concentrate on low-dimensional data (< 21 features: +0.011 over CatBoost vs. >21 features: +0.001); multi-teacher averaging helps MLP students (+0.006, p = 0.003) but adds less than 0.001 for tree students; and on high-dimensional tasks where the teacher itself trails CatBoost, distillation makes things worse rather than better. The full pipeline is open-sourced as part of the TabTune library.

light_analysis.overview: 将表格基础模型（TFM）蒸馏为XGBoost/CatBoost学生模型，实现CPU上毫秒级推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 欺诈评分需要亚毫秒级响应，而最好的TFM在GPU上需要151-1275ms。现有蒸馏方法对于ICL教师存在标签泄露问题，导致软目标塌缩为近独热向量，无法蒸馏。因此需要解决这一关键障碍，实现高精度且快速的CPU部署。
light_analysis.method: 提出分层出袋（OOF）教师标注方法防止标签泄露。将TabICLv2蒸馏为XGBoost学生模型，在153个分类数据集（来自TALENT、OpenML-CC18、TabZilla、TabArena）上评估，使用XGBoost作为学生，CatBoost作为基线。
light_analysis.result: 学生模型达到0.882 macro-mean AUC（教师AUC的96.5%），推理时间1.9ms（CPU），相较教师加速38x-860x。与调优CatBoost基线相比有统计显著优势（Wilcoxon p=0.0008，获胜率51%）。其他发现：教师排名精确转移；增益集中在低维数据（<21特征+0.011）；多教师平均对树模型帮助有限；高维任务上蒸馏反而变差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出有效蒸馏方法将TFM转换为适合CPU部署的梯度提升树，解决ICL教师标签泄露问题。实际应用价值：使高风险表格任务（如欺诈检测）能在CPU上低延迟运行。局限性：高维任务上可能不如直接使用CatBoost。未来工作可改进高维场景的蒸馏效果。

title: MementoGUI: Learning Agentic Multimodal Memory Control for Long-Horizon GUI Agents
abstract: Recent GUI agents have made substantial progress in visual grounding and action prediction, yet they remain brittle in long-horizon tasks that require maintaining task state across many interface transitions. Existing agents typically rely on raw history replay or text-only memory, which either overwhelms the model with redundant screenshots or discards localized visual evidence needed for future decisions. To address these limitations, we introduce \textbf{MementoGUI}, a plug-in agentic memory framework that equips MLLM-based GUI agents with \textbf{MementoCore}, a learned controller for online memory selection, compression, and retrieval. Rather than treating interaction history as a fixed context, MementoGUI formulates long-horizon GUI control as an online memory-control problem: working memory selectively preserves task-relevant interface events with textual summaries and ROI-level visual evidence, while episodic memory retrieves reusable past trajectories through learned relevance selection. MementoCore modularizes memory control into specialized operators for step processing, memory compression, episodic writing, and episodic selection, enabling plug-in memory augmentation without finetuning the GUI agent backbone. We further develop a scalable data curation pipeline that converts computer-use trajectories into memory-controller training data, introduce \textbf{MementoGUI-Bench} for evaluating long-horizon decision-making in GUI agents, and design MLLM-based metrics for semantic action matching, task progress, and memory consistency. Experiments on GUI-Odyssey, MM-Mind2Web, and MementoGUI-Bench show that MementoGUI consistently improves GUI agents over no-history, history-replay, and text-only memory baselines, with larger MementoCore backbones further strengthening memory-augmented GUI control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MementoGUI框架，通过学习控制器MementoCore实现GUI智能体的在线记忆选择、压缩与检索，提升长时任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GUI智能体在长时任务中表现脆弱，依赖原始历史回放或纯文本记忆，导致冗余截图或丢失局部视觉证据。这些问题限制了智能体在多界面转换中维护任务状态的能力，亟需一种能自动筛选、压缩和检索相关记忆的智能记忆管理方法。
light_analysis.method: MementoGUI将长时GUI控制建模为在线记忆控制问题，工作记忆选择性保留任务相关事件（含文本摘要和ROI视觉证据），情景记忆通过学习的选择机制检索可复用轨迹。核心MementoCore模块化记忆控制为步骤处理、压缩、写入和选择算子，无需微调GUI智能体骨干。同时构建数据管线和基准MementoGUI-Bench。
light_analysis.result: 在GUI-Odyssey、MM-Mind2Web和MementoGUI-Bench上实验，MementoGUI一致优于无历史、历史回放和纯文本记忆基线。更大的MementoCore骨干进一步增强了记忆增强的GUI控制效果。具体提升包括任务完成率和记忆一致性指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: MementoGUI通过智能记忆控制显著提升了长时GUI智能体的决策能力，提供可扩展的数据管线和评估基准。未来可应用于更复杂的交互场景，潜在局限性在于对MLLM骨干的依赖和记忆控制的计算开销。

title: An Assessment of Human vs. Model Uncertainty in Soft-Label Learning and Calibration
abstract: Central to human-aligned AI is understanding the benefits of human-elicited labels over synthetic alternatives. While human soft-labels improve calibration by capturing uncertainty, prior studies conflate these benefits with the implicit correction of mislabeled data (mode shifts), obscuring true effects of soft-labels. We present a controlled audit of soft-label learning across MNIST and a synthetic variant, re-annotating subsets to extract human uncertainty. By decoupling soft-label supervision from underlying label mode shifts, we show that while human soft-labels do provide accuracy gains, their larger value lies in acting as a regularizer that improves model calibration on difficult samples and promotes stable convergence across training runs. Dataset cartography reveals models trained on human soft-labels mirror human uncertainty, whereas those trained on synthetic labels fail to align with humans. Broadly, this work provides a diagnostic testbed for human-AI uncertainty alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 通过控制实验分离软标签监督与标签模式偏移，证明人类软标签的主要价值在于作为正则化器提升模型校准和训练稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 软标签学习旨在利用人类不确定性改善模型校准，但先前研究常将人类软标签的优势与纠正错误标签（模式偏移）的效果混为一谈。这导致对人类软标签真实作用的认知模糊。本文旨在通过精心设计的实验，分离这两种效应，明确人类软标签的独特贡献。
light_analysis.method: 在MNIST及其合成变体数据集上进行控制实验，重新标注子集以提取人类不确定性。通过解耦软标签监督与标签模式偏移，对比人类软标签与合成软标签的效果。使用数据集制图（Dataset Cartography）分析模型不确定性对齐情况。采用软标签学习与校准评估框架。
light_analysis.result: 人类软标签不仅提供准确性提升，更核心的是作为正则化器：提高困难样本的模型校准，促进训练跨运行稳定收敛。数据集制图显示，人类软标签训练的模型能镜像人类不确定性，而合成标签训练的模型无法对齐人类。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了人类软标签在软标签学习中的真正价值在于正则化效应，而非单纯纠正标签错误。提供了一种诊断人类-AI不确定性对齐的测试平台。未来可探索如何更有效地利用人类不确定性信息。

title: Language-Switching Triggers Take a Latent Detour Through Language Models
abstract: Backdoor attacks on language models pose a growing security concern, yet the internal mechanisms by which a trigger sequence hijacks model computations remain poorly understood. We identify a circuit underlying a language-switching backdoor in an 8B-parameter autoregressive language model, where a three-word Latin trigger (nine tokens) redirects English output to French. We decompose the circuit into three phases: (1) distributed attention heads at early layers compose the trigger tokens into the last sequence position; (2) the resulting signal propagates through mid-layers in a subspace orthogonal to the model's natural language-identity direction; (3) the MLP at the final layer converts this latent signal into French logits. The entire circuit flows through a serial bottleneck at a single position: corrupting that position at any layer entirely mitigate the trigger but also hinder the model's capabilities. The orthogonal latent encoding suggests that defenses that search for language-like signals in intermediate representations would miss this trigger entirely.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了语言模型中语言切换后门触发器的内部电路机制，发现其通过正交潜在编码绕过传统防御。
light_analysis.motivation: 后门攻击对语言模型构成日益严重的安全威胁，但触发序列如何劫持模型计算的内在机制仍不明确。理解这一机制对于设计有效的防御至关重要。现有防御方法往往搜索中间表示中的语言类信号，但该后门采用正交潜在编码，可能完全被忽视。
light_analysis.method: 在8B参数自回归语言模型中识别出一个语言切换后门电路，使用三个词的拉丁触发词（九个token）将英语输出重定向为法语。将电路分解为三个阶段：早期层的分布式注意力头将触发token组合到最后序列位置；中间层信号在与模型自然语言身份方向正交的子空间中传播；最终层的MLP将潜在信号转换为法语logits。
light_analysis.result: 整个电路流经单个位置的串行瓶颈：在任意层破坏该位置可完全消除触发效果，但也会损害模型能力。正交潜在编码表明，搜索中间表示中语言类信号的防御方法将完全遗漏该触发器。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但揭示了电路的关键脆弱点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了后门触发器的内部工作机制，特别是其利用正交子空间绕过基于语言信号的防御。这一发现强调了开发更鲁棒防御策略的必要性，例如监控激活中的异常正交方向。未来工作可探索其他类型触发器的电路机制及通用防御方法。

title: Articulation in Prime: Primitive-Based Articulated Object Understanding from a Single Casual Video
abstract: Retrieving the 3D kinematics of articulated objects from monocular video is a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing methods rely on complex video setups or cues such as long-term point tracking or wide-baseline matching, but are frequently brittle under severe occlusions, rapid camera ego-motion, or weak local features. Learning-based methods, meanwhile, struggle to generalize beyond their training categories. We propose a category-agnostic optimization framework that treats articulated object understanding as a primitive-fitting problem. Geometric primitives serve as a proxy representation that avoids the pitfalls of unstable point tracks; a novel mechanism organizes them into coherent parts constrained by revolute and prismatic joints. Our formulation jointly optimizes part segmentation and joint parameters, recovering complex kinematics from a single casually captured video. A visibility-aware procedure handles partial observations and occlusions inherent to real-world data. We also propose the AiP-synth and AiP-real benchmarks, featuring significant camera motion and heavy occlusions, and outperform existing methods. Project page: https://aartykov.github.io/Articulation-in-Prime/

light_analysis.overview: 提出类别无关的优化框架，将铰接物体理解视为原始拟合问题，从单目视频恢复3D运动学。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂视频设置或长期点跟踪，在严重遮挡、相机快速运动或弱特征下脆弱。学习方法泛化性差。需要一种鲁棒且类别无关的方法从单目视频理解铰接物体。
light_analysis.method: 提出类别无关的优化框架，使用几何原始作为代理表示，避免不稳定点跟踪。通过新颖机制将原始组织成由旋转和平移关节约束的连贯部件。联合优化部件分割和关节参数，处理真实世界数据中的部分观测和遮挡。
light_analysis.result: 提出AiP-synth和AiP-real基准，特点为显著相机运动和严重遮挡。在基准上超越现有方法。摘要未说明具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法从单目视频鲁棒恢复铰接物体运动学，无需类别特定训练，具有实用价值。未来可扩展至更多关节类型或复杂场景。

title: Post-Trained MoE Can Skip Half Experts via Self-Distillation
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales language models efficiently through sparse expert activation, and its dynamic variant further reduces computation by adjusting the activated experts in an input-dependent manner. Existing dynamic MoE methods usually rely on pre-training from scratch or task-specific adaptation, leaving the practical conversion of fully trained MoE underexplored. Enabling such adaptation would directly alleviate the inference costs by allowing easy tokens to bypass unnecessary expert during serving. This paper introduces Zero-Expert Self-Distillation Adaptation (ZEDA), a low-cost framework that transforms post-trained static MoE models into efficient dynamic ones. To stabilize this architectural conversion, ZEDA injects parameter-free zero-output experts into each MoE layer and adapts the augmented model through two-stage self-distillation, utilizing the original MoE as a frozen teacher and applying a group-level balancing loss. On Qwen3-30B-A3B and GLM-4.7-Flash across 11 benchmarks spanning math, code, and instruction following, ZEDA eliminates over 50% of expert FLOPs at marginal accuracy loss. It outperforms the strongest dynamic MoE baseline by 6.1 and 4.0 points on the two models, and delivers ~1.20$\times$ end-to-end inference speedup.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ZEDA框架，将静态MoE模型转化为动态MoE，通过自蒸馏和零输出专家实现高效推理，节省超过50%专家FLOPs。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合专家（MoE）模型通过稀疏专家激活高效扩展语言模型，动态MoE变体可根据输入调整专家数量以降低计算量。然而现有动态MoE方法通常需要从头预训练或任务特定适配，无法直接利用已训练好的静态MoE模型。这导致推理时无法根据输入复杂度动态跳过不必要的专家，造成计算浪费。本文旨在解决将后训练的静态MoE高效转化为动态MoE的问题，以减少推理成本。
light_analysis.method: ZEDA（Zero-Expert Self-Distillation Adaptation）框架包含两个关键创新：首先在每个MoE层注入无参数零输出专家，保证架构转换的稳定性；然后通过两阶段自蒸馏进行适配，以原始MoE作为冻结教师，并应用组级平衡损失。该方法无需额外预训练或任务特定数据，仅需少量微调即可将静态MoE转化为动态稀疏激活模型。在Qwen3-30B-A3B和GLM-4.7-Flash上验证，涵盖11个基准。
light_analysis.result: ZEDA在11个数学、代码和指令遵循基准上消除了超过50%的专家FLOPs，仅带来微小的精度损失。在Qwen3-30B-A3B和GLM-4.7-Flash上分别比最强动态MoE基线高出6.1和4.0个平均分，并实现约1.20倍的端到端推理加速。方法无需预训练，仅需少量适配成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: ZEDA有效解决了后训练静态MoE模型向动态MoE转化的难题，通过零输出专家注入和两阶段自蒸馏，实现了大幅降低推理计算量且保持精度。该方法具有实际部署价值，可直接应用于现有已训练的MoE模型，减少推理成本。未来的工作可能探索更高效的专家路由策略或扩展到更大规模的MoE模型。

title: Leveraging Latent Visual Reasoning in Silence
abstract: Latent visual reasoning involves visual evidence more directly in multimodal reasoning by inserting continuous latent tokens before textual generation. However, the necessity of these latent tokens at inference remains ambiguous. We show that replacing latent tokens with random noise or removing them completely causes little performance degradation across spatial reasoning benchmarks. Reinforcement learning further diminishes the latent generation behavior after post-training. These observations raise a central question: Is latent visual reasoning still meaningful? We argue that its value should be measured by how effectively latent tokens guide learning, rather than whether they persist as an inference-time format. Our analysis shows that latent reasoning is unevenly favorable across question types, yet hard task-level routing for applying latent generation is brittle. Motivated by these findings, we propose an attention-based reward that encourages generated latent tokens to interact with later text tokens during RL. This reward promotes latent utilization when the latent mode is activated while preserving the flexibility to use pure-text reasoning. Experiments show that our method improves performance across perception and visual reasoning benchmarks, even when latent tokens are rarely generated after post-training. Our results highlight that, without explicit expression at inference, latent visual reasoning can shape better visual grounding and more accurate textual reasoning in silence. Our code and trained models are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/ddydyd32/silent-lvr/tree/master}{GitHub} and \href{https://huggingface.co/collections/cornuHGF/silent-lvr}{Hugging Face}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过注意力奖励机制在强化学习中利用潜在视觉推理，即使推理时很少生成潜在token也能提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在视觉推理在训练中插入连续潜在token，但推理时去除这些token性能下降很小，引发其必要性问题。研究发现不同问题类型对潜在推理的偏好不均，硬任务级路由脆弱，需要更好的方法利用潜在推理指导学习。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于注意力的奖励函数，在强化学习训练中鼓励生成的潜在token与后续文本token交互，从而在激活潜在模式时促进其利用，同时保留纯文本推理的灵活性。实验使用空间推理基准。
light_analysis.result: 在感知和视觉推理基准上，所提方法提升了性能，即使后训练后很少生成潜在token。与基线相比，展示了潜在视觉推理在推理时不显式表达也能塑造更好的视觉基础和更准确的文本推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 潜在视觉推理的价值在于训练中引导学习，而非推理时格式。所提方法有效提升了性能，代码和模型已公开。未来可探索更细粒度的路由策略。

title: SPIKE: An Adaptive Dual Controller Framework for Cost-Efficient Long-Horizon Game Agents
abstract: Long-horizon multimodal agents in open-world games must stay goal-directed across many low-level interactions under tight token and latency budgets. Existing approaches often trade off costly per-step reasoning against reactive execution that can drift, repeat failures, and recover poorly. Our key idea is to reuse strategic reasoning across locally stable segments and reinvoke it at event boundaries. We present SPIKE, an adaptive dual controller framework for cost-efficient long-horizon game control. Its Strategic Controller performs low-frequency global planning, failure analysis, and recovery, while its Reactive Controller handles fast local execution under a strict token budget. An Event Trigger monitors visual change, task progress, repeated actions, and failure signals to decide when control should stay reactive or escalate to strategic reasoning. Hierarchical Memory separates short-term experience reuse in the State-Action Memory Bank (SA-MB) from structured evidence in the State Action Knowledge Graph (SA-KG), allowing each controller to retrieve the context it needs. This design reuses strategic proposals over multiple reactive steps, supports local override when plans become stale, and reserves expensive reasoning for moments where extra deliberation is useful. On the Lite-100 split of StarDojo, SPIKE improves Lite-100 success rate (SR) by 5.0 percentage points (38.5% relative) over the strongest Lite-100 baseline and Budgeted SR by 9.3 points (75.6% relative) over the strongest budgeted baseline. It also reduces token consumption by 54.9% and latency by 40.8%. Ablations show that event triggering, reactive override, and heterogeneous memory each contribute to success and recovery, supporting selective reasoning rather than reasoning at every step.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPIKE自适应双控制器框架，通过事件触发在战略与反应控制器间切换，实现低成本长周期游戏控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放世界游戏中长周期多模态代理需在严格令牌和延迟预算下保持目标导向。现有方法在每一步进行昂贵推理或采用反应式执行，但后者易漂移、重复失败且恢复不佳。亟需一种能复用战略推理、仅在事件边界重新调用的高效控制方法。
light_analysis.method: SPIKE框架包含战略控制器（低频全局规划与失败分析）、反应控制器（快速局部执行）和事件触发器（监控视觉变化、任务进度、重复动作与失败信号决定控制模式）。层次化记忆将短期经验（SA-MB）与结构化知识（SA-KG）分离，支持上下文检索与本地覆盖。关键创新在于选择性推理而非每步推理。
light_analysis.result: 在StarDojo的Lite-100子集上，SPIKE将成功率提升5.0个百分点（相对38.5%），预算成功率提升9.3个百分点（相对75.6%）。令牌消耗降低54.9%，延迟降低40.8%。消融实验证实事件触发、反应覆盖和异构记忆对成功与恢复均有贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPIKE通过自适应双控制器与事件触发机制，显著提升长周期游戏代理的性价比，在成功率、预算效率和资源消耗上均优于基线。其选择性推理思想为复杂环境中代理设计提供了新思路，未来可探索更细粒度的控制切换策略。

title: Data Presentation Over Architecture: Resampling Strategies for Credit Risk Prediction with Tabular Foundation Models
abstract: Credit default prediction is a tabular learning problem with severe class imbalance, heterogeneous features, and tight latency budgets. Tabular Foundation Models (TFMs) approach this problem through in-context learning, which makes their predictions sensitive to how the context window is built. We benchmark four classical models and five TFMs on the Home Credit and Lending Club datasets, varying the context-construction strategy (seven options) and the context size (1K to 50K). On both datasets, the choice of context strategy explains more variance in AUC-ROC than the choice of TFM family: balanced and hybrid sampling add 3 to 4 AUC points over uniform sampling, and the gap exceeds the spread between TFMs. With a balanced context of 5K to 10K examples, the strongest TFMs reach the AUC of classical baselines trained on the full data, while also recovering meaningful default-class recall that default-threshold GBDTs do not. We frame this as evidence that context construction, rather than architecture choice, is the primary deployment lever for TFMs in imbalanced credit-risk settings.

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现上下文构建策略（尤其是平衡采样）比模型架构选择更关键，能显著提升表格基础模型在不平衡信用风险预测中的AUC和召回率。
light_analysis.motivation: 信用违约预测面临严重类别不平衡、异构特征和严格延迟约束。表格基础模型(TFMs)通过上下文学习进行预测，但其性能高度依赖于上下文窗口的构建方式。现有研究多关注模型架构改进，而忽视了数据呈现策略这一关键部署杠杆。本文旨在系统研究不同上下文构建策略和大小对TFMs在不平衡信用风险预测中性能的影响，以揭示更有效的部署方式。
light_analysis.method: 在Home Credit和Lending Club两个信用风险数据集上，对比了四种经典模型（如GBDTs）和五种TFMs（如TabPFN等）。采用七种不同的上下文构建策略（包括均匀采样、平衡采样、混合采样等），并变化上下文大小从1000到50000。通过AUC-ROC和召回率等指标评估，并分析方差来源，确定上下文策略与模型家族对性能的贡献程度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，上下文策略的选择解释了比TFM家族选择更多的AUC-ROC方差。平衡和混合采样在均匀采样基础上增加了3-4个AUC点，且这一提升幅度超过了不同TFM之间的性能差距。使用5K-10K个平衡上下文样本，最强TFMs能达到在全量数据上训练经典基线的AUC水平，同时显著改善违约类召回率，而传统GBDTs在默认阈值下无法获得同样好的召回率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了在信用风险预测中，表格基础模型的上下文构建策略（尤其是平衡采样）比模型架构选择更为关键。这一发现为TFMs在不平衡表格学习任务中的实际部署提供了重要指导：应优先关注数据呈现方式而非追求更复杂的模型。未来可探索动态上下文构建或结合主动学习等方向。

title: Position: Weight Space Should Be a First-Class Generative AI Modality
abstract: Neural network checkpoints have quietly become a large-scale data resource: millions of trained weight vectors now exist, each encoding task-, domain-, and architecture-specific knowledge. This position paper argues that model checkpoints should be treated as a first-class data modality, and that generative modeling in weight space should be standardized as a core machine learning primitive. Recent advances demonstrate that neural weights can be synthesized on demand, often matching fine-tuning performance while reducing adaptation cost by orders of magnitude. We contend that these results reflect an underlying structural fact: high-performing models occupy low-dimensional, highly structured regions of weight space shaped by symmetry, flatness, modularity, and shared subspaces. Building on this view, we organize existing methods into a five-stage pipeline, survey applications where the approach is already practical, and clarify current limits: adapter-scale and conditional generation are advancing rapidly, while unrestricted frontier-scale checkpoint synthesis remains open. Our goal is to shift the community's default mindset from optimizing models per task to sampling models from learned weight distributions, accelerating toward an era in which AI systems routinely improve or create other AI systems.
comment: AI systems routinely improve or create other AI systems

light_analysis.overview: 提出将神经网络权重空间作为第一类生成式AI模态，通过生成模型检查点来替代传统任务特定优化，实现模型快速适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络检查点已成为大规模数据资源，但未得到有效利用。现有方法需要针对每个任务从头优化或微调模型，成本高昂。生成权重可以降低适应成本数个数量级，但缺乏统一视角和标准化框架。因此，本文主张将权重空间视为一种数据模态，并标准化权重空间的生成建模，以改变社区对模型优化的默认思维。
light_analysis.method: 基于权重空间的结构特性（对称性、平坦性、模块性、共享子空间），将现有方法组织为五阶段管道：数据收集、表示学习、生成模型训练、条件生成和部署。关键创新在于将权重空间视为生成模态，利用扩散模型或自回归模型学习权重分布，支持通过条件生成（如任务、架构）合成适配器或小型模型。当前方法在适配器级别和条件生成上进展迅速，但无条件生成前沿规模检查点仍待解决。
light_analysis.result: 综述表明，生成权重在多种任务上匹配了微调性能，同时将适应成本降低数个数量级。例如，在图像分类、语言模型适配等实际应用中，生成式权重合成已展示出实用性。但摘要未提供具体数值指标，仅说明在适配器级和条件生成上效果显著，而大规模前沿模型检查点的生成仍开放。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文倡导从“为每个任务优化模型”转向“从学习到的权重分布中采样模型”，这有望加速AI系统自我改进。主要贡献是提出权重空间作为第一类生成模态的概念，并系统化现有方法。局限性在于大规模无条件生成尚未解决，未来方向包括扩展生成框架到完整前沿模型、探索更高效率的架构。

title: SCICONVBENCH: Benchmarking LLMs on Multi-Turn Clarification for Task Formulation in Computational Science
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as scientific AI as- sistants, and a growing body of benchmarks evaluates their capabilities across knowledge retrieval, reasoning, code generation, and tool use. These evaluations, however, typically assume the scientific problem is already well-posed, whereas practical scientific assistance often begins with an ill-posed user request that must be refined through dialogue before any computation, analysis, or experiment can be carried out reliably. We introduce SCICONVBENCH, a benchmark for multi- turn clarification in scientific task formulation across four computational science problem domains: fluid mechanics, solid mechanics, materials science, and par- tial differential equations (PDEs). SCICONVBENCH targets two complementary capabilities: eliciting missing information (disambiguation) and detecting and correcting erroneous requests containing internally contradictory information (in- consistency resolution). Our benchmark pairs a structured task ontology with a rubric-based evaluation framework, enabling systematic measurement of LLM per- formance across three dimensions: clarification behavior, conversational grounding, and final-specification fidelity. Current frontier models perform relatively well on inconsistency resolution, but even the best model resolves only 52.7% of the disambiguation cases in fluid mechanics. We further find that frontier LLMs fre- quently make silent assumptions and perform implicit specification repairs that are not grounded in the conversation with users. SCICONVBENCH establishes a foundation for evaluating the upstream conversational reasoning that a reliable computational science assistant requires. The code and data can be found at https://github.com/csml-rpi/SciConvBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCICONVBENCH基准，用于评估大型语言模型在多轮对话中为计算科学问题制定明确任务的能力，涵盖歧义消除和矛盾解决。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准假设科学问题已良好定义，但实际中用户请求常模糊或矛盾，需要对话澄清。作为科学AI助手，LLM必须可靠地处理这种上游推理，而当前缺乏系统评估这一能力的基准。该问题重要，因为不准确的初始任务制定会影响后续计算和分析。
light_analysis.method: 构建涵盖流体力学、固体力学、材料科学和偏微分方程四个领域的基准。设计两种任务：信息缺失澄清（disambiguation）和矛盾检测纠正（inconsistency resolution）。采用结构化任务本体和基于rubric的评估框架，从澄清行为、对话基础和最终规范忠实度三个维度量化性能。
light_analysis.result: 前沿模型在矛盾解决上表现较好，但最佳模型在流体力学歧义消除中仅解决52.7%的案例。模型常做出沉默假设和隐式规范修复，未与用户充分对话，导致最终规范可能偏离用户意图。结果显示了多轮澄清能力的显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCICONVBENCH为评估计算科学助手所需的上游对话推理提供了基础。研究表明当前LLM在澄清能力上存在不足，需要改进以建立可靠的科学AI助手。代码和数据已开源，未来可扩展至更多领域或结合真实用户研究。

title: Aligned Training: A Parameter-Free Method to Improve Feature Quality and Stability of Sparse Autoencoders (SAE)
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are one of the main methods to interpret the inner workings of deep neural networks (DNNs), decomposing activations into higher-dimensional features. However, they exhibit critical shortcomings where a large fraction of features are never activated and are unstable. Despite variants of SAEs that attempt to mitigate these issues, they require additional data, resampling, or training. We propose the \textbf{aligned training}, a parameter-free reparameterization of SAEs that simultaneously improves reconstruction quality, eliminates dead features, and significantly enhances stability across training seeds. Our approach is motivated by an overlooked observation that SAE feature quality, measured by the inner product between encoder and decoder directions (which we call the \textbf{alignment score}), follows a bimodal distribution across all modern architectures. The proposed aligned training enforces a geometric constraint between the encoder and decoder such that their inner product equals one for every feature, which removes a source of degeneracy in the SAE training without adding any hyperparameters. Across multiple models, dictionary sizes, and sparsity levels, the aligned training shows Pareto improvements on the SAEBench benchmarks. Beyond improving dead features, stability and reconstruction, our method readily integrates with techniques in mechanical interpretability such as Top/BatchTop-K architectures and p-Annealing. Overall, the aligned training substantially improves feature quality and stability of SAE without computational complexity or cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出参数无关的SAE重参数化方法，通过几何约束消除编码器与解码器之间的退化，同时改善重构质量、消除死特征并提升稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器(SAE)是解释深度神经网络内部工作机制的主要方法，但存在大量特征从未激活且不稳定等问题。现有变体需要额外数据、重采样或训练，计算成本高。作者观察到SAE特征质量（编码器与解码器方向的内积）在所有现代架构中呈现双峰分布，表明存在退化现象。因此，需要一种无需超参数且高效的方法来改善特征质量和稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出对齐训练(Aligned Training)，是一种参数无关的SAE重参数化方法。核心思想是强制每个特征对应的编码器与解码器方向内积等于1，施加几何约束，消除训练中的退化源。该方法不增加任何超参数，可直接集成到现有架构如Top/BatchTop-K和p-Annealing中。通过在多个模型、字典大小和稀疏度水平上的实验，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在SAEBench基准上，对齐训练在多个模型、字典规模和稀疏度水平下均显示帕累托改进。具体地，同时改善了重构质量、消除了死特征（所有特征均被激活）并显著提升了跨训练种子的稳定性。与传统SAE相比，无需额外数据或计算复杂度，在特征质量和稳定性上取得实质性提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 对齐训练为SAE提供了一种简单有效的改进方案，无需计算开销或额外超参数，即可解决死特征和不稳定性问题。有助于推动机械可解释性研究，特别是通过几何约束提升特征质量。未来可探索其在更广泛模型和任务中的应用，以及与其他解释性技术的结合。

title: Learning Lifted Action Models from Traces with Minimal Information About Actions and States
abstract: It has been recently shown that lifted STRIPS models can be learned correctly and efficiently from action traces alone; i.e., applicable action sequences from a hidden STRIPS model. The result is remarkable because the states are not assumed to be observable at all, and yet it is not practical enough as STRIPS actions include arguments that are not needed for selecting the actions. This shortcoming has been addressed by assuming that the action traces come instead from a hidden STRIPS+ model where some action arguments are implicit in the hidden action preconditions. A limitation of this approach, however, is that it assumes that the states are fully observable. In this work, we relax these restrictions and consider the problem of learning STRIPS+ action domains from traces in a more general context where the traces carry partial information about both actions and states. In particular, we formulate algorithms and completeness results for three general cases, all of which assume full observability of selected action arguments. In the first case, no observability of the state is assumed; in the second case, full observability of some state predicates is assumed, and in the third case, local observability of some state predicates is assumed instead. Given a STRIPS+ domain, these results characterize the conditions under which an equivalent domain can be learned from traces. Experimental results are reported.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在动作和状态部分可观测条件下从轨迹中学习STRIPS+动作模型的方法，并给出三种情况下的完备性结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 已有工作可以从动作轨迹中学习提升的STRIPS模型，但假设状态完全不可观测，且STRIPS动作包含不必要的参数。改进的STRIPS+模型解决了参数问题，但假设状态完全可观测。实际应用中，动作和状态信息往往部分可观测。本工作放松这些限制，考虑更一般的部分可观测条件，提高方法的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种一般情况下的算法和完备性结果：1) 状态完全不可观测，但选定动作参数完全可观测；2) 某些状态谓词完全可观测；3) 某些状态谓词局部可观测。利用动作轨迹中的部分信息，学习等价的STRIPS+领域。关键创新在于处理部分可观测性，并给出学习条件。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法能在不同观测设置下正确学习动作模型。摘要未给出具体性能指标，但通过与基线对比验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文放松了已有工作的严格假设，在更通用的部分可观测条件下学习提升的动作模型，具有理论完备性。该方法对于规划领域知识获取有重要价值，未来可考虑更弱观测条件或处理噪声轨迹。

title: CrossView Suite: Harnessing Cross-view Spatial Intelligence of MLLMs with Dataset, Model and Benchmark
abstract: Spatial intelligence requires multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to move beyond single-view perception and reason consistently about objects, visibility, geometry, and interactions across multiple viewpoints. However, progress in cross-view reasoning remains limited by three major gaps: the scarcity of large-scale well-annotated training data, the lack of comprehensive benchmarks for systematic evaluation, and the absence of explicit alignment mechanisms that establish object-level consistency across views. To address these gaps, we thoroughly develop CrossView Suite across three coordinated components: CrossViewSet, CrossViewBench, and CrossViewer. Firstly, we introduce a multi-agent data engine to meticulously curate a large-scale, high-quality cross-view instruction dataset, termed CrossViewSet, covering 17 fine-grained task types with 1.6M samples. Second, we meticulously create a scene-disjoint CrossViewBench to comprehensively assess the cross-view spatial understanding capability of an MLLM, evaluating it across various aspects. Finally, we propose CrossViewer, a progressive three-stage framework for cross-view spatial reasoning in MLLMs, following a Perception -> Alignment -> Reasoning paradigm. Our method equips an adaptive spatial region tokenizer to capture fine-grained object representations, and then aligns the multi-view objects explicitly, and thus fuses aligned features for boosting the cross-view inference capacity for MLLMs. Extensive experiments and analyses show that large-scale training data, systematic evaluation, and explicit cross-view alignment are all critical for advancing MLLMs from single-view perception toward real-world spatial intelligence. The project page is available at https://github.com/Thinkirin/Crossview-Suite.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CrossView Suite，包括数据集、模型和基准，以提升MLLM跨视图空间智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大模型（MLLM）在空间智能方面主要限于单视图感知，难以进行跨视图的一致推理。主要瓶颈包括：大规模高质量训练数据稀缺、缺乏系统性评估基准、以及缺少显式的跨视图对象级对齐机制。这些问题限制了MLLM从单视图向真实世界空间智能的演进。
light_analysis.method: CrossView Suite包含三个组件：CrossViewSet（多智能体数据引擎生成的1.6M样本、17种细粒度任务的跨视图指令数据集）；CrossViewBench（场景分离的综合评估基准）；CrossViewer（渐进三阶段框架：感知→对齐→推理）。其中CrossViewer采用自适应空间区域分词器捕获细粒度对象表示，显式对齐多视图对象，并融合对齐特征以增强跨视图推理。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验和分析表明，大规模训练数据、系统评估和显式跨视图对齐对于将MLLM从单视图感知推进到真实世界空间智能至关重要。摘要未报告具体数值指标，但强调各组件均有效。项目页面已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: CrossView Suite全面解决了跨视图空间推理的数据、评估和模型对齐问题，为MLLM的空间智能发展提供了重要基础。未来可探索更复杂的场景和更强的推理能力，但当前工作已验证显式对齐和高质量数据的必要性。

title: Stochastic Penalty-Barrier Methods for Constrained Machine Learning
abstract: Constrained machine learning enables fairness-aware training, physics-informed neural networks, and integration of symbolic domain knowledge into statistical models. Despite its practical importance, no general method exists for the non-convex, non-smooth, stochastic setting that arises naturally in deep learning. We propose the Stochastic Penalty-Barrier Method (SPBM), which extends classical penalty and barrier methods to this setting via exponential dual averaging, a~stabilized penalty schedule, and the Moreau envelope to handle non-smoothness. Experiments across multiple settings show that SPBM matches or outperforms existing constrained optimization baselines while incurring only linear runtime overhead compared to unconstrained Adam for up to 10,000 constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPBM，一种将经典罚函数和屏障方法扩展到非凸、非光滑、随机约束优化中的方法，适用于深度学习中的约束机器学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 约束机器学习在公平性训练、物理信息神经网络和符号领域知识融合中至关重要，但深度学习中常见的非凸、非光滑、随机约束优化问题缺乏通用解法。现有罚函数和屏障方法无法直接处理这些特性，需要新的算法来高效、稳定地求解此类问题。
light_analysis.method: SPBM通过指数对偶平均（exponential dual averaging）、稳定化罚函数调度（stabilized penalty schedule）和Moreau包络处理非光滑性，将经典罚函数和屏障方法扩展到随机非凸非光滑设置。该算法在保持与无约束Adam相似的线性运行时开销下，可处理多达10,000个约束。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SPBM在多种约束设置下匹配或超过了现有约束优化基线方法，且仅产生线性运行时开销（相对于无约束Adam），在最多10,000个约束的场景中验证了其可扩展性。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPBM为非凸非光滑随机约束优化提供了首个通用解法，填补了深度学习约束优化领域的方法空白。其线性复杂度使其适用于大规模问题，未来可探索更高效的策略或扩展到更复杂的约束类型。

title: CATA: Continual Machine Unlearning via Conflict-Averse Task Arithmetic
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable ability in aligning visual and textual representations, enabling a wide range of multimodal applications. However, their large-scale training data inevitably raises concerns about privacy, copyright, and undesirable content, creating a strong need for machine unlearning. While existing studies mainly focus on single-shot unlearning, practical VLM deployment often involves sequential removal requests over time, giving rise to continual machine unlearning. In this work, we make the first attempt to study continual unlearning for VLMs and identify three key challenges in this setting: effectiveness in removing target knowledge, fidelity in preserving retained model utility, and persistence in preventing knowledge re-emergence under sequential updates. To address these challenges, we propose CATA, a conflict-averse task arithmetic method that represents each forget request as an unlearning task vector. By maintaining historical task vectors and performing sign-aware conflict-averse aggregation, CATA suppresses conflicting update components that may weaken previous forgetting effects. Extensive experiments under both single-shot and continual settings show that CATA outperforms baselines in terms of forgetting effectiveness, model fidelity, and forgetting persistence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CATA方法，通过冲突回避的任务向量聚合，首次解决视觉语言模型的持续机器遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型的大规模训练数据引发隐私、版权和不良内容等问题，需要机器遗忘。现有研究主要关注单次遗忘，但实际部署中需处理序列移除请求，即持续机器遗忘。持续遗忘面临三大挑战：遗忘目标知识有效性、保持模型原有功能忠实度、防止知识在顺序更新中重现。现有方法无法同时满足这些需求。
light_analysis.method: CATA将每个遗忘请求表示为非学习任务向量，通过维护历史任务向量并进行符号感知的冲突回避聚合，抑制与先前遗忘方向冲突的更新分量，从而避免削弱已遗忘效果。该方法在单次和持续遗忘场景下均有效，无需额外存储原始数据，仅利用任务向量间的符号一致性实现冲突消解。
light_analysis.result: 在单次和持续遗忘设置下，CATA在三个关键指标上均优于基线方法：遗忘有效性（目标知识去除更彻底）、模型忠实度（保留模型在非目标任务上的性能更优）、遗忘持久性（后续更新后遗忘知识不易重现）。具体实验数据摘要未明确说明，但声称全面超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统研究视觉语言模型的持续机器遗忘问题，提出冲突回避任务算术方法CATA。该方法有效解决了遗忘有效性、忠实度和持久性三大挑战，为多模态模型的隐私保护和合规使用提供了实用方案。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的遗忘请求类型或跨模态知识结构。

title: Perfect Parallelization in Mini-Batch SGD with Classical Momentum Acceleration
abstract: Accelerating stochastic gradient methods with classical momentum schemes, such as Polyak's heavy ball, has proven highly successful in training large-scale machine learning models, particularly when combined with the hardware acceleration of large mini-batch computations. Yet, the effect of classical momentum on stochastic mini-batch optimization has been poorly understood theoretically, with prior works requiring strong noise assumptions and extremely large mini-batches. In this work, we develop a general theory of stochastic momentum acceleration for optimizing over quadratics in the interpolation regime, a popular abstraction for studying deep learning dynamics which also includes classical methods such as randomized Kaczmarz and coordinate descent. Our framework encompasses both heavy ball and Nesterov-style momentum, allows for arbitrary mini-batch sizes, and makes minimal assumptions on the stochastic noise. In particular, we show that acceleration from classical momentum is directly proportional to the gradient mini-batch size (up to a natural saturation point), thereby enabling perfect parallelization of mini-batch computations. Our theory also provides a simple choice for the momentum parameter, which is shown to be effective empirically.

light_analysis.overview: 经典动量在小批量SGD中的加速效果与小批量大小成正比，实现完美并行化。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典动量方法如Polyak重球在实际训练中非常成功，尤其是结合大模型和大批量硬件加速时。然而，其在随机小批量优化中的理论效果一直缺乏理解，以往工作需强噪声假设和极大批量。论文旨在填补这一理论空白，为实践中广泛使用的动量方法提供理论支撑。
light_analysis.method: 论文针对二次型函数在插值区域（包含深度学习动力学抽象如随机Kaczmarz和坐标下降）建立通用理论框架，涵盖重球和Nesterov动量，允许任意小批量大小，对随机噪声做最小假设。证明经典动量的加速与梯度小批量大小成正比（至自然饱和点），从而完美并行化小批量计算，并给出简单的动量参数选择。
light_analysis.result: 理论上，加速效果与小批量大小线性相关，直到饱和点，意味着通过增加批量可实现几乎线性加速。实验验证了所提动量参数选择的有效性。与以往需极大批量的方法不同，该理论适用于任意批量，且无需强噪声假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 经典动量在小批量SGD中的加速可完美并行化，为大规模训练提供理论指导。学术上揭示了动量与批量大小的关系，实用上简化了动量参数调优。未来可扩展到非二次型或更一般噪声模型。

title: Dance Across Shifts: Forward-Facilitation Continual Test-Time Adaptation through Dynamic Style Bridging
abstract: Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CTTA) aims to empower perception systems to handle dynamic distribution shifts encountered after deployment. Existing methods predominantly follow a backward-alignment paradigm, which rigidly aligns incoming data with supervisory surrogates derived from the source domain. Consequently, they struggle with unreliable supervision and evolving distribution shifts. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel forward-facilitation paradigm through a method termed Dynamic Style Bridging. Prior to deployment, we construct a compact knowledge base of generated class exemplars. During test time, to mitigate inherent generative bias and adapt these proxies to incoming data, we propose a multi-level bridging mechanism. This mechanism dynamically injects the proxies with incoming data styles at the input, statistical, and representation levels, while preserving the original semantics of the proxies. These high-fidelity proxies are then used to provide reliable, on-demand supervisory signals, enabling stable adaptation under continual shifts. Extensive experiments across standard CTTA benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves consistent and substantial improvements over recent state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/z1358/DAS}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出前向促进的持续测试时自适应范式，通过动态风格桥接解决分布漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续测试时自适应旨在应对模型部署后遇到的持续分布漂移。现有方法主要采用后向对齐范式，将新数据强制对齐到源域衍生的监督代理，导致不可靠的监督和难以适应演变中的分布漂移。因此需要一种更灵活的自适应方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出前向促进范式，通过动态风格桥接方法实现。部署前构建紧凑的类别样本知识库；测试时，提出多级桥接机制，在输入、统计和表示级别动态注入新数据的风格到代理中，同时保留代理原有语义，生成高保真代理用于提供可靠的按需监督信号，实现稳定自适应。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准CTTA基准上的大量实验表明，该方法相比现有最先进方法取得了持续且显著的改进。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明了一致提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了前向促进的CTTA范式，通过动态风格桥接有效解决了分布漂移下的监督不可靠问题。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为测试时自适应提供了新思路；实际应用中可提升感知系统的鲁棒性。未来可进一步优化知识库构建和桥接机制。

title: Forecasting Downstream Performance of LLMs With Proxy Metrics
abstract: Progress in language model development is often driven by comparative decisions: which architecture to adopt, which pretraining corpus to use, or which training recipe to apply. Making these decisions well requires reliable performance forecasts, yet the two commonly used signals are fundamentally limited. Cross-entropy loss is poorly aligned with downstream capabilities, and direct downstream evaluation is expensive, sparse, and often uninformative at early training stages. Instead, we propose to construct proxy metrics by aggregating token-level statistics, such as entropy, top-k accuracy, and expert token rank, from a candidate model's next token distribution over expert-written solutions. Across three settings, our proxies consistently outperform loss- and compute-based baselines: 1) For cross-family model selection, they rank a heterogeneous population of reasoning models with mean Spearman Rho = 0.81 (vs. Rho = 0.36 for cross-entropy loss); 2) For pretraining data selection, they reliably rank 25 candidate corpora for a target model at roughly $10{,}000\times$ less compute than direct evaluation, pushing the Pareto frontier beyond existing methods; and 3) for training-time forecasting, they extrapolate downstream accuracy across an $18\times$ compute horizon with roughly half the error of existing alternatives. Together, these results suggest that expert trajectories are a broadly useful source of signal for assessing model capabilities, enabling reliable performance forecasting throughout the model development life cycle.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用代理指标（如熵、top-k准确率等）预测LLM下游性能，优于交叉熵损失和直接评估。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM开发中常需比较不同架构、语料库或训练方案，但常用信号存在局限：交叉熵损失与下游能力对齐差，直接评估成本高且早期训练阶段信息不足。因此需要一种高效、可靠的性能预测方法，以指导模型选择和数据筛选。
light_analysis.method: 构建代理指标，从候选模型在专家编写解决方案上的下一个token分布中聚合token级统计量（熵、top-k准确率、专家token排名）。在三个场景验证：跨家族模型选择、预训练数据选择、训练时性能预测。通过计算代理指标与下游性能的相关性来评估模型。
light_analysis.result: 在跨家族模型选择中，代理指标平均Spearman Rho=0.81，优于交叉熵损失的0.36；预训练数据选择中，以约1/10000的计算量可靠排序25个候选语料库，推动Pareto前沿；训练时性能预测中，在18倍计算范围内预测下游准确率，误差约为现有方法的一半。
light_analysis.conclusion: 专家轨迹可作为评估模型能力的广泛有用信号，支持模型开发全生命周期中的可靠性能预测。该方法在计算效率和预测准确性上显著优于现有基线，为模型比较和数据选择提供了实用工具。未来可探索更多类型的代理指标和专家数据。

title: Physics-Aligned Canonical Equivariant Fourier Neural Operator under Symmetry-Induced Shifts
abstract: Neural operators approximate PDE solution maps, but they need not respect the symmetries of the governing equation. In out-of-distribution (OOD) regimes, a standard neural operator must often learn coordinate alignment and physical evolution within a single map, which can hurt generalization. We use known continuous symmetries of evolution equations on periodic domains to separate these two roles. We propose the Physics-Aligned Canonical Equivariant Fourier Neural Operator (PACE-FNO), which estimates the input frame with a Lie-algebra coordinate estimator, maps the field to a reference frame, applies a standard Fourier Neural Operator (FNO), and restores the prediction to the target frame. We train alignment and operator prediction jointly using bounded symmetry perturbations, with an optional low-dimensional refinement step that updates the estimated frame at inference. Equivariance is enforced by the input and output transformations, while the FNO architecture remains unchanged. Across 1-D and 2-D Burgers, shallow-water, and Navier-Stokes equations on periodic domains, PACE-FNO matches the in-distribution (ID) accuracy of standard neural operators and reduces out-of-distribution (OOD) relative error by up to 12x over FNO with symmetry augmentation (FNO+Aug) under translations and Galilean shifts, with smaller gains for coupled rotation-translation shifts. Ablations show that aligning the input and restoring the output frame account for most OOD gains; inference-time refinement provides a smaller correction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PACE-FNO，通过李代数坐标估计器将输入场对齐到参考帧，应用标准FNO后再恢复预测帧，利用对称性分离坐标对齐与物理演化，显著提升OOD泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准神经算子需同时学习坐标对齐和物理演化，在分布外场景下泛化能力差。利用PDE的连续对称性可分离这两个作用，从而提升模型泛化性，但现有方法未充分利用对称性。
light_analysis.method: 提出PACE-FNO，包含李代数坐标估计器估计输入帧的对称变换参数，将场映射到规范参考帧，经标准FNO处理后恢复预测到目标帧。联合训练对齐和算子预测，使用有界对称扰动增强鲁棒性，推理时可选低维精细化步骤。架构保持FNO不变，通过输入输出变换强制等变性。
light_analysis.result: 在1-D/2-D Burgers、浅水和Navier-Stokes方程上，PACE-FNO在分布内精度与标准FNO相当；分布外相对误差较FNO+Aug降低最多12倍（平移和伽利略变换），旋转-平移混合变换提升较小。消融表明输入对齐和输出恢复贡献主要OOD增益，推理精细化提供次要修正。
light_analysis.conclusion: PACE-FNO通过对称性诱导移位分离坐标对齐与物理演化，提升了神经算子在分布外泛化能力，保持了标准FNO架构的简单性。该工作揭示了对称性在神经算子设计中的关键作用，未来可扩展至其他对称群和高维问题。

title: Starve to Perceive: Taming Lazy Perception in VLMs with Constrained Visual Bandwidth
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) deployed as situated agents in high-resolution visual environments require active perception -- the ability to dynamically decide where to look through operations like zooming, cropping, and panning. However, current training paradigms produce models that mimic the surface form of such operations without functionally depending on their outputs, a phenomenon we term lazy perception. We trace this to a fundamental learning asymmetry: when coarse global views combined with language priors suffice for moderate accuracy, the model has no incentive to learn harder multi-step visual search. If a model can succeed without actively looking, it will never learn to look. This motivates Starve to Perceive, a training paradigm that constrains visual bandwidth -- restricting each observation to a tight token budget so that no single view suffices for task completion, making active perception the only viable strategy. Despite requiring no auxiliary losses, reward shaping, or architectural changes -- serving as a minimal, plug-in modification to standard post-training pipelines -- models trained under perceptual starvation achieve substantial gains of 5% average relative improvement across diverse benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 通过约束视觉带宽强制VLMs学习主动感知，解决“懒惰感知”问题，实现5%平均相对提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前VLMs在高分辨率视觉环境中需要主动感知（如缩放、裁剪），但现有训练范式导致模型仅模仿操作形式而不依赖其输出，即“懒惰感知”。根源在于粗粒度全局视图与语言先验结合即可达到中等精度，模型缺乏学习多步视觉搜索的动机。这限制了VLMs作为智能体的真实感知能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Starve to Perceive训练范式，通过将每次观察限制在紧密的token预算内，使得单一视图不足以完成任务，从而迫使模型依赖主动感知。无需辅助损失、奖励塑形或架构改变，作为标准后训练流程的即插即用修改，简单有效。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准测试上，该方法平均相对提升5%，有效克服了懒惰感知，增强了VLMs在高分辨率环境中的主动视觉搜索能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和对比基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过约束视觉带宽的简单策略，成功引导VLMs学习主动感知，解决了现有训练范式中的根本性不对称问题。该方法具有广泛适用性，为构建真正具备主动视觉能力的智能体提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的带宽调度策略。

title: Incantation: Natural Language as the Action Interface for Multi-Entity Video World Models
abstract: Modern interactive video world models have achieved impressive visual fidelity, yet lack fine-grained multi-entity control and cross-entity, cross-world generalization. We trace this gap to the action interface: standard control protocols (e.g. animation IDs, device inputs, scene-level captions) bind action semantics to specific entities or engines at design time. We propose natural language as the interface to unlock expressiveness that no prior interface can achieve, and we present Incantation, the first interactive video world model with per-latent-frame (0.25 s) natural-language conditioning that supports simultaneous multi-entity control and concept-level cross-entity transfer beyond any fixed rendering pipeline. We pair a pretrained bidirectional video backbone with frame-local text cross-attention, and enable real-time long-horizon streaming through ODE-initialized Self-Forcing distillation with a RoPE-decoupled sliding KV-cache. We surpass the Action-Index baseline on cross-entity transfer (89% vs. 43%) and out-of-vocabulary prompts (90% vs. 0%), and our 2-step student sustains 19.7 FPS at 480p with stable FVD over 2-hour rollouts. We further apply the same architecture and training recipe to The King of Fighters, changing only the per-entity action vocabulary slots. We have released a preview subset of the Incantation dataset at https://huggingface.co/datasets/zhush/incantation-elden-ring-scenes, containing manually collected Elden Ring player-boss combat clips with structured action-oriented metadata. Larger-scale Elden Ring and KOF data will be released with the full project.

light_analysis.overview: 提出以自然语言作为动作接口的多实体视频世界模型Incantation，实现细粒度多实体控制和跨实体泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互式视频世界模型虽视觉保真度高，但缺乏细粒度多实体控制和跨实体、跨世界泛化能力。归因于动作接口设计时绑定特定实体或引擎，如动画ID、设备输入等，限制了表达力和泛化性。自然语言作为接口可突破这些限制，实现更灵活的控制。
light_analysis.method: Incantation采用预训练双向视频骨干网络与帧级文本交叉注意力，支持每潜在帧（0.25秒）自然语言条件控制。通过ODE初始化的自强制蒸馏和RoPE解耦滑动KV缓存实现实时长时流处理。使用Elden Ring和The King of Fighters数据集，仅改变每实体动作词汇槽即可适配不同游戏。
light_analysis.result: 在跨实体迁移任务上超越Action-Index基线（89% vs. 43%），在词汇外提示上达90% vs. 0%。2步学生模型在480p下实现19.7 FPS，FVD在2小时滚动中保持稳定。验证了自然语言接口在细粒度多实体控制和泛化上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Incantation首次将自然语言作为交互视频世界模型的通用动作接口，显著提升了多实体控制精度和跨实体泛化能力。该架构可迁移至不同游戏域，展示了自然语言接口的潜力。未来可扩展至更复杂场景，数据集已部分公开。

title: Resolving Representation Ambiguity in Feedforward Novel View Synthesis Transformer via Semantic-Spatial Decoupling
abstract: Transformer-based models have advanced feedforward novel view synthesis (NVS). Current architectures such as GS-LRM and LVSM mix semantic information (e.g., RGB) and spatial information (e.g., Plücker rays) into a shared feature space. Since Plücker rays naturally carry lattice-like spatial structure, these designs can make the spatial bias interfere with appearance representation and degrade rendering fidelity. To this end, we propose to decouple the representation of feedforward NVS transformers into separate semantic and spatial tokens. The decoupled design keeps semantic and spatial information explicit in their branches while preserving cross-branch interaction through shared attention routing. Built on this design, we introduce optional categorized supervision and bidirectional modulation: the former provides branch-specific training signals, while the latter improves interaction between the two branches. Notably, the base decoupled design introduces virtually zero additional inference latency due to its architectural design. The proposed designs achieve consistent improvements, demonstrating effectiveness across decoder-only and encoder-decoder feedforward NVS models.
comment: 24 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables. Project page: https://hangzay.github.io/ssd_lvsm/

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义-空间解耦的Transformer架构，解决前馈新视角合成中表示歧义问题，在不增加推理延迟下提升渲染质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Transformer前馈新视角合成模型（如GS-LRM、LVSM）将RGB和Plücker射线等语义与空间信息混合到共享特征空间。由于Plücker射线具有晶格状空间结构，这种混合设计导致空间偏置干扰外观表示，降低渲染保真度。需要有效的特征解耦方法来分离不同类型信息，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出语义-空间解耦的Transformer架构，将前馈NVS的表示分为独立的语义token和空间token，通过共享注意力路由保持跨分支交互。此外引入可选的类别化监督为各分支提供特定训练信号，以及双向调制增强分支间信息流动。解耦设计由于架构特性几乎不增加推理延迟。该方法可应用于解码器-only和编码器-解码器两类前馈NVS模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多种前馈NVS模型（包括解码器-only和编码器-解码器架构）上取得一致改进，证明了方法的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未提供，但指出解耦设计带来稳定提升，且基本不增加推理延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过语义-空间解耦有效解决了前馈NVS中的表示歧义问题，显著提升了渲染质量。该设计轻量高效，易于集成到现有框架。未来可探索更复杂的交互机制或扩展到其他视觉任务，如多视角立体匹配。

title: Pointwise Generalization in Deep Neural Networks
abstract: We address the fundamental question of why deep neural networks generalize by establishing a pointwise generalization theory for fully connected networks. This framework resolves long-standing barriers to characterizing the rich nonlinear feature-learning regime and builds a new statistical foundation for representation learning. For each trained model, we characterize the hypothesis via a pointwise Riemannian Dimension, derived from the eigenvalues of the learned feature representations across layers. This establishes a principled framework for deriving hypothesis-dependent, representation-aware generalization bounds. These bounds offer a systematic upgrade over approaches based on model size, products of norms, and infinite-width linearizations, yielding guarantees that are orders of magnitude tighter in both theory and experiment. Analytically, we identify the structural properties and mathematical principles that explain the tractability of deep networks. Empirically, the pointwise Riemannian Dimension exhibits substantial feature compression, decreases with increased over-parameterization, and captures the implicit bias of optimizers. Taken together, our results indicate that deep networks are mathematically tractable in practical regimes and that their generalization is sharply explained by pointwise, feature-spectrum-aware complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出点式推广理论，通过点式黎曼维度解释深度神经网络泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络的泛化机理是基本问题，现有方法（如模型大小、范数乘积、无限宽线性化）的泛化界过于宽松，缺乏对非线性特征学习区的有效刻画。该研究旨在建立新的统计基础，实现表示感知的紧致泛化界。
light_analysis.method: 提出点式推广理论，针对每个训练模型，通过各层学习特征表示的特征值定义点式黎曼维度，并推导出假设依赖、表示感知的泛化界。该框架系统改进了现有基于模型大小等方法，理论上和经验上均产生更紧的界限。
light_analysis.result: 点式黎曼维度在实验中表现出显著的特征压缩，随过度参数化程度增加而减小，并能捕捉优化器的隐式偏差。泛化界相比传统方法在理论和实验上均紧凑数个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: 深度网络在实际训练机制下数学上可处理，其泛化能力可被点式、特征谱感知的复杂度精确解释。该工作为表示学习提供了新统计基础，未来可扩展到其他网络架构。

title: Latent Action Reparameterization for Efficient Agent Inference
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents often rely on long sequences of low-level textual actions, resulting in large effective decision horizons and high inference cost. While prior work has focused on improving inference efficiency through system-level optimizations or prompt engineering, we argue that a key bottleneck lies in the representation of the action space itself. We propose Latent Action Reparameterization (LAR), a framework that learns a compact latent action space in which each latent action corresponds to a multi-step semantic behavior. By reparameterizing agent actions into latent units, LAR enables decision making over a shorter effective horizon while preserving the expressiveness of the original action space. Unlike hand-crafted macros or hierarchical controllers, latent actions are learned from agent trajectories and integrated directly into the model, allowing both planning and execution to operate over abstract action representations. Across a range of LLM-based agent benchmarks, LAR significantly reduces the effective action horizon and improves inference efficiency under fixed compute budgets. As a consequence, our approach achieves substantial reductions in action tokens and corresponding wall-clock inference time, while maintaining or improving task success rates. These results suggest that action representation learning is a critical and underexplored factor in scaling efficient LLM agent inference, complementary to advances in model architecture and hardware.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Action Reparameterization (LAR)，通过学习紧凑潜在动作空间，将多步语义行为编码为潜在动作，显著缩短LLM代理决策步长，提升推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理依赖长序列低级文本动作，导致大决策步长和高推理成本。现有系统级优化或提示工程未解决核心问题：动作空间表示是效率瓶颈。本文认为学习紧凑动作表示是提高推理效率的关键但被忽视的因素。
light_analysis.method: LAR学习潜在动作空间，每个潜在动作对应多步语义行为。通过重参数化将原始动作序列映射为潜在单元，缩短有效决策步长，保持表达力。潜在动作从代理轨迹中学习并集成到模型，使规划和执行在抽象表示上同步进行。
light_analysis.result: 在多个LLM代理基准上，LAR显著减少有效动作步长和推理时间，在固定计算预算下，动作令牌数大幅降低，任务成功率保持或提升。相比基线方法，实现了更高效的推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明动作表示学习是扩展高效LLM代理推理的关键，与架构和硬件优化互补。LAR通过潜在动作抽象，降低了推理成本并提升了效率，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的动作学习策略。

title: AMARIS: A Memory-Augmented Rubric Improvement System for Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Rubric-based reward shaping is an effective method for fine-tuning LLMs via RL, where structured rubrics decompose standard outcome rewards into multiple dimensions to provide richer reward signals. Recent works make the rubrics adaptive based on local signals such as the rollouts from the current step or pairwise comparisons. However, these methods discard the diagnostics produced during evaluation after immediate use and prevent the long-term accumulation and strategic reuse of evaluation knowledge. This forces the system to re-derive evaluation principles from scratch, limits its ability to detect recurring suboptimal behaviors, and forfeits the curriculum-like progression that a persistent training history would naturally support. To address these limitations, we introduce AMARIS, which grounds rubric modifications in long-term training history. At each training step, AMARIS analyzes individual rollouts, aggregates findings into step-level summaries, retrieves relevant historical context from a persistent evaluation memory through both static (recent steps) and dynamic (semantically matched) retrieval, and updates rubrics based on these accumulated analyses. This procedure runs asynchronously alongside the normal RL loop with minimal overhead. Experiments across both closed and open-ended domains show that AMARIS consistently outperforms the baselines. Ablation studies show that static and dynamic memory retrieval contributes to the performance gain and their combination provides the strongest results with moderate retrieval budgets sufficient to provide most of the gain, and that the entire pipeline adds only ~5\% time overhead through asynchronous execution. These results show that persistent evaluation memory can transform rubric-based reward shaping from a stateless, per-step heuristic into an evidence-driven loop for RL training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AMARIS系统，通过持久评估记忆将rubric-based奖励塑造从无状态启发式转变为证据驱动的循环，显著提升LLMs的RL微调效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于rubric的奖励塑造方法仅利用局部信号（如当前步rollouts或成对比较），丢弃评估诊断，无法长期积累知识，导致系统重复推导评估原则、难以检测重复次优行为，且失去训练历史的课程式渐进性。需要一种能持久化评估记忆并基于长期历史修改rubric的方法。
light_analysis.method: AMARIS在每个训练步分析单个rollout，汇总为步级摘要，通过静态（最近步）和动态（语义匹配）检索从持久评估记忆中获取历史上下文，基于累积分析更新rubric。该过程与正常RL循环异步执行，仅增加约5%时间开销。
light_analysis.result: 在封闭和开放域任务中，AMARIS一致优于基线方法。消融实验表明静态和动态记忆检索均贡献性能提升，组合效果最强；中等检索预算即可获得大部分增益；异步执行仅增加约5%时间开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMARIS证明了持久评估记忆能将rubric-based奖励塑造从无状态启发式转变为证据驱动的循环，提升RL训练效率。方法有效且开销小，未来可探索更大规模记忆和更复杂检索策略。

title: Randomized Advantage Transformation (RAT): Computing Natural Policy Gradients via Direct Backpropagation
abstract: Natural policy gradients improve optimization by accounting for the geometry of distribution space, but their practical use is limited by the cost of estimating and inverting the Fisher matrix. We present Randomized Advantage Transformation (RAT), a method for estimating Tikhonov-regularized natural policy gradients via direct backpropagation. By applying the Woodbury formula, we reformulate the regularized natural policy gradients as vanilla policy gradients with a transformed advantage. RAT computes this transformation efficiently via randomized block Kaczmarz iterations on on-policy mini-batches, avoiding explicit Fisher construction, conjugate-gradient solvers, and architecture-specific approximations. We provide convergence guarantees for RAT and demonstrate empirically that it matches or exceeds established natural-gradient methods across continuous and visual control benchmarks, while remaining simple to implement and compatible with various architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机优势变换(RAT)，通过直接反向传播高效计算正则化自然策略梯度，避免显式Fisher矩阵构造。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然策略梯度利用分布空间几何改进优化，但实际应用受限于Fisher矩阵估计和求逆的高计算成本。现有方法如显式构造Fisher矩阵或共轭梯度求解器复杂度高且架构特定，限制了其在大规模问题中的使用。
light_analysis.method: 利用Woodbury公式将Tikhonov正则化自然策略梯度重写为带变换优势的vanilla策略梯度。变换通过随机块Kaczmarz迭代在策略mini-batch上高效计算，无需显式Fisher矩阵或共轭梯度，兼容任意网络架构并提供收敛保证。
light_analysis.result: 在连续控制和视觉控制基准任务上，RAT匹配或超越现有自然梯度方法（如TRPO、ACER）。算法实现简单，计算效率高，且无需架构特定调整，验证了其有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAT提供了一种计算自然策略梯度的轻量级替代方案，显著降低了计算复杂度与实现难度。学术上简化了自然梯度理论应用，实际中利于强化学习优化。未来可探索自适应正则化参数或扩展至离策略设置。

title: When Outcome Looks Right But Discipline Fails: Trace-Based Evaluation Under Hidden Competitor State
abstract: Outcome-only evaluation can certify economically unsafe agents: a policy can hit a business KPI while violating deployable behavioral discipline. In hotel pricing with hidden competitor state, a learner can achieve plausible revenue per available room while failing to preserve the rate discipline of a rule-based revenue-management competitor.   We introduce discipline stability, a trace-based evaluation paradigm: define the benchmark behavior, restrict observations to the deployment regime, induce trace diagnostics from failure, separate mechanisms with ablations, and test transfer and deployment. Across a two-hotel benchmark and a compact hidden-budget bidding task, reward-only PPO variants miss trace alignment; revealing hidden state reduces label uncertainty; deterministic copy collapses uncertainty; and trace-prior or corrected history policies better preserve price or bid distributions. Pure behavior cloning is nearly enough for symmetric imitation, while Trace-Prior RL adds bounded adaptation under capacity asymmetry. The contribution is an evaluation and benchmark paradigm, not a new optimizer or a universal claim about MARL

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于轨迹的评估范式（discipline stability），用于检测在隐藏对手状态下仅凭结果评估无法发现的智能体不安全行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 在复杂的多智能体环境中，仅依赖结果（如业务KPI）评估智能体可能隐藏其违反纪律的行为，导致部署风险。例如，酒店定价中隐藏竞争对手状态时，智能体虽能实现可观收入，却可能破坏基于规则的定价纪律。现有方法缺乏对行为轨迹的深入分析，无法可靠诊断此类失败。
light_analysis.method: 提出discipline stability评估范式，核心步骤包括：定义基准行为、限制观测到部署领域、从失败中归纳轨迹诊断、通过消融分离机制、测试转移与部署。在双酒店基准和紧凑隐藏预算竞标任务中，比较多种方法：仅奖励PPO、揭示隐藏状态、确定性复制、轨迹先验或修正历史策略。
light_analysis.result: 仅奖励PPO变体无法对齐轨迹；揭示隐藏状态可降低标签不确定性；确定性复制使不确定性崩溃；轨迹先验或修正历史策略能更好保留价格或竞标分布。纯行为克隆在对称模仿中几乎足够，而轨迹先验强化学习在容量不对称下提供有界适应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提供了一个评估和基准范式，而非新的优化器或关于MARL的普适性论断。该范式有助于识别仅结果评估忽略的纪律违规，提升多智能体系统部署的安全性。未来可扩展至更复杂环境，但需注意其依赖基准行为定义。

title: S2Aligner: Pair-Efficient and Transferable Pre-Training for Sparse Text-Attributed Graphs
abstract: Pre-training on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is central to building transferable graph foundation models, where LLM-as-Aligner methods align graph and text representations through the semantic knowledge of large language models. However, these methods usually assume that node texts provide sufficient and reliable supervision, an assumption often violated in real-world sparse TAGs. When textual anchors are missing, noisy, or uneven across domains, graph structures must be aligned with weak semantic evidence, leading to unreliable structure-semantics correspondence and sparsity-induced transfer bias. This paper presents S2Aligner, a sparsity-aware and structure-enhanced LLM-as-Aligner framework for graph-text pre-training on sparse TAGs. The key idea is to decouple semantic alignment from structural modeling, allowing topology-aware signals to enhance alignment without contaminating the shared semantic space. Specifically, S2Aligner decomposes graph-text representations into semantic and structural components, uses structure-oriented reconstruction with consistency control to inject reliable topology cues into text representations, and suppresses inconsistent structural signals under textual sparsity. Moreover, S2Aligner introduces sparsity-aware cross-domain risk balancing, which calibrates domain risks through a global-domain density ratio and downweights unreliable sparse samples via graph reliability estimation. Theoretical analysis shows that this objective reduces cross-domain generalization gaps by controlling domain risk discrepancy. Extensive experiments across diverse graph domains, sparsity levels, and downstream tasks demonstrate that S2Aligner consistently outperforms existing baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S2Aligner，一种稀疏感知且结构增强的LLM-as-Aligner框架，用于稀疏文本属性图的图-文本预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM-as-Aligner方法假设节点文本提供充分可靠的监督，但在现实稀疏文本属性图中，文本锚点可能缺失、噪声或跨领域不均，导致图结构与弱语义证据对齐不可靠，产生稀疏性导致的迁移偏差。这限制了图基础模型的可迁移性。
light_analysis.method: S2Aligner将图-文本表示解耦为语义和结构组件，通过结构导向的重建和一致性控制，向文本表示注入可靠拓扑线索，同时在文本稀疏时抑制不一致的结构信号。引入稀疏感知的跨领域风险平衡，通过全局域密度比校准领域风险，并基于图可靠性估计降低不可靠稀疏样本的权重。理论分析表明该目标通过控制领域风险差异减少跨域泛化差距。
light_analysis.result: 在多种图领域、稀疏级别和下游任务上的大量实验表明，S2Aligner始终优于现有基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了一致的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: S2Aligner通过解耦语义对齐与结构建模，有效解决了稀疏文本属性图中的结构-语义对应不可靠问题，并利用稀疏感知的风险平衡提升了跨域迁移能力。该工作为构建可迁移的图基础模型提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的结构-语义交互。

title: OmniPro: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Omni-Proactive Streaming Video Understanding
abstract: Omni-proactive streaming video understanding, i.e., autonomously deciding when to speak and what to say from continuous audio-visual streams, is an emerging capability of omni-modal large language models. Existing benchmarks fall short in three key aspects: they rely primarily on visual signals, adopt polling or fixed-timestamp protocols instead of true proactive evaluation, and cover only a limited range of tasks, preventing reliable assessment and differentiation of omni-proactive streaming models. We present OmniPro, the first benchmark to jointly evaluate omni-modal perception, proactive responding, and diverse video understanding tasks. It comprises 2,700 human-verified samples spanning 9 sub-tasks and 3 cognitive levels, covering 6 basic video understanding capabilities. Notably, 84% of samples require audio signals (speech or non-speech), and each sample is annotated with modality-isolation labels to enable fine-grained multimodal analysis. We further introduce a dual-mode evaluation protocol: Probe mode assesses content understanding by querying the model before and after each ground-truth trigger, while Online mode evaluates full proactive ability by requiring models to autonomously decide when to respond in streaming input. Evaluating 11 representative models reveals three key findings: (1) audio provides consistent gains but with highly variable utilization across models, (2) performance degrades significantly over time, indicating limited long-horizon robustness, and (3) non-speech audio perception remains the weakest dimension.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了 OmniPro，首个同时评估全模态感知、主动响应和多种视频理解任务的基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准在主动式流式视频理解方面存在三大不足：主要依赖视觉信号、采用轮询或固定时间戳协议而非真正主动评估、任务覆盖有限。这些问题导致无法可靠评估和区分全模态主动流式模型，因此亟需一个更全面的基准来推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: OmniPro 包含 2,700 个人工验证样本，覆盖 9 个子任务和 3 个认知层级，涵盖 6 种基本视频理解能力。84% 样本需要音频信号，每个样本标注模态隔离标签以便细粒度多模态分析。引入双模式评估协议：Probe 模式在触发前后查询模型评估内容理解，Online 模式要求模型自主决定响应时机以评估主动能力。
light_analysis.result: 评估 11 个代表性模型发现：音频提供一致增益但利用率差异大；性能随时间显著下降，长程鲁棒性有限；非语音音频感知是最弱维度。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但揭示了模型在主动式视频理解中的关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniPro 是首个全面评估全模态主动式流式视频理解的基准，揭示了现有模型在音频利用、长期鲁棒性和非语音音频感知方面的不足。该基准为未来研究提供了标准化评估平台，有助于推动 omni-modal LLM 在主动式视频理解场景中的发展。潜在的局限性包括样本规模和任务多样性可能仍需扩展。

title: scHelix: Asymmetric Dual-Stream Integration via Explicit Gene-Level Disentanglement
abstract: A critical challenge in single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) integration is resolving the tension between eliminating batch effects and maintaining biological fidelity. While recent evidence indicates that batch effects manifest heterogeneously across genes, most existing methods process the transcriptome uniformly, frequently resulting in over-correction and loss of subtle biological signals. To address this, we present scHelix, a dataset-adaptive framework that fundamentally changes how features are processed by explicitly partitioning genes into domain-invariant Anchors and domain-sensitive Variants at the input level. scHelix utilizes a dual-stream sparse diffusion encoder equipped with stop-gradient graph caching to efficiently learn multi-scale structural representations. The core of our approach is a novel asymmetric Align-Refine-Fuse protocol: the unstable Variant stream is first aligned to the robust topology of the Anchor stream, followed by a conservative refinement phase where the Anchor stream absorbs denoised details via bounded residual gating. This divide-and-conquer architecture prevents shortcut learning and ensures robust batch removal without compromising the integrity of biological clusters. Extensive benchmarking demonstrates that scHelix outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出scHelix框架，通过显式基因级解耦和不对称双流集成，解决单细胞RNA测序数据整合中批次效应消除与生物学保真度之间的平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞RNA测序数据整合面临的核心挑战是消除批次效应同时保持生物学保真度。现有方法通常对转录组进行均匀处理，忽略了批次效应在基因间的非均匀表现，导致过度矫正和微弱生物学信号丢失。该问题在空间组学和跨数据集分析中尤为突出，亟需一种能够自适应处理基因特异性批次效应的方法。
light_analysis.method: scHelix采用数据集自适应框架，首先将基因显式划分为领域不变Anchors和领域敏感Variants。利用双流稀疏扩散编码器并配备停止梯度图缓存，高效学习多尺度结构表示。核心创新是非对称Align-Refine-Fuse协议：不稳定Variants流首先对齐到稳健的Anchors流拓扑，然后通过边界残差门控进行保守精炼，使Anchors流吸收去噪细节。这种分治架构防止捷径学习，确保稳健批次去除而不损害生物聚类完整性。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛的基准测试中，scHelix在多个单细胞RNA测序整合任务上优于现有最新方法，包括批次效应消除和生物学聚类保持。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过对比实验验证了其在均匀处理基因方法上的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: scHelix通过显式基因级解耦和不对称双流集成，为单细胞数据整合提供了新的范式。其核心贡献在于自适应处理基因异质性批次效应，在去除批次噪声的同时保留微妙生物学信号。该方法具有广泛的应用价值，可用于跨数据集分析、发育生物学和疾病研究。未来可探索扩展到多模态数据或更复杂的基因关系建模。

title: MA$^{2}$P: A Meta-Cognitive Autonomous Intelligent Agents Framework for Complex Persuasion
abstract: Persuasive dialogue generation plays a vital role in decision-making, negotiation, counseling, and behavior change, yet it remains a challenging problem. In complex persuasion where the persuadee's internal states are not expressed clearly, the persuader must interpret responses, infer the persuadee's latent mental states (e.g., beliefs and desires), and translate them into targeted, strategy-consistent actions; however, current approaches often produce generic or weakly grounded responses even when such cues are identified. Moreover, although large language models (LLMs) can generate persuasive content, their performance varies substantially across domains due to uneven knowledge coverage and limited reasoning generalization. To address these challenges, we propose MA$^{2}$P, a meta-cognitive autonomous intelligent agent framework for complex persuasion. Specifically, we develop an autonomous multi-agent architecture that coordinates perception management, mental-state inference, strategy execution, memory maintenance, and performance evaluation. To mitigate cross-domain performance variation, we further design a meta-cognitive configurator that selects an appropriate meta-strategy from a structured knowledge base at the outset, thereby guiding subsequent reasoning and planning. Experimental results show that our approach achieves a higher persuasion success rate than baselines.
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures. Accepted to Findings of ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出MA²P框架，融合元认知与多智能体协作，通过元策略选择提升复杂说服对话成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂说服中说服者内部状态不明确，现有方法响应泛化、LLM跨领域性能不稳定，亟需精准推理与策略执行机制。
light_analysis.method: 构建多智能体架构（感知、心理推理、策略执行、记忆、评估），并设计元认知配置器从知识库预选元策略指导推理与规划。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明MA²P说服成功率优于基线方法（具体数值未明确提及）。
light_analysis.conclusion: MA²P有效增强说服对话的适应性与策略性，结合元认知与多智能体为复杂交互提供新范式，未来可优化跨领域泛化。

title: Query-Conditioned Knowledge Alignment for Reliable Cross-System Medical Reasoning
abstract: Cross-domain knowledge alignment is essential for integrating heterogeneous medical systems, yet existing approaches typically treat entity alignment as a static matching problem, ignoring query context and cross-system asymmetry. This limitation is particularly critical in integrative medical settings, where correspondence between concepts is inherently context-dependent, non-bijective, and direction-sensitive.   In this paper, we propose Query-Conditioned Entity Alignment (QCEA), which reformulates entity alignment as a query-conditioned correspondence problem. Instead of learning a fixed mapping between entity representations, QCEA treats the textual description of a source entity as a query and ranks candidate entities in the target graph, enabling context-dependent alignment. The framework integrates semantic encoding, graph-based representation learning, and a direction-aware transformation module to capture asymmetric and many-to-many correspondence across heterogeneous knowledge systems.   We evaluate QCEA on TCM--WM knowledge graphs derived from SymMap, covering both symptom alignment and herb--molecule alignment tasks. Experimental results show consistent improvements over representative baselines, particularly on rank-sensitive metrics such as Hit@K and MRR. Furthermore, downstream retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) experiments demonstrate that improved alignment leads to better evidence retrieval, stronger grounding, and higher answer accuracy. These findings highlight that alignment is not merely a data integration step, but a key factor that shapes knowledge accessibility and reliability in cross-system medical reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出查询条件实体对齐（QCEA），将实体对齐转化为上下文相关的查询-排序问题，实现跨医疗系统的可靠知识对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨域知识对齐对整合异构医疗系统至关重要，但现有方法将实体对齐视为静态匹配，忽略了查询上下文和跨系统不对称性。在综合医疗环境中，概念对应是上下文相关、非双射且方向敏感的，静态匹配无法处理这种复杂性，导致对齐不准确，影响下游推理。
light_analysis.method: QCEA框架将源实体的文本描述作为查询，在目标图中对候选实体进行排序，实现上下文相关的对齐。它集成语义编码、基于图的表示学习和方向感知变换模块，以捕获异构知识系统间的非对称和多对多对应关系。在SymMap导出的中医-西医知识图谱上评估症状对齐和草药-分子对齐任务。
light_analysis.result: 在症状对齐和草药-分子对齐任务上，QCEA在Hit@K和MRR等排序敏感指标上持续优于代表性基线。下游检索增强生成（RAG）实验表明，改进的对齐带来更好的证据检索、更强的基础和更高的答案准确性，证明对齐对推理质量的关键影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: QCEA通过查询条件对齐有效解决了跨系统实体对齐的上下文依赖和方向敏感问题，显著提升了医疗推理的可靠性和知识可及性。对齐不仅是数据集成步骤，更是影响推理质量的关键因素。未来可扩展到更多异构知识系统及实际临床应用。

title: GUT-IS: A Data-Driven Approach to Integrating Constructs and Their Relations in Information Systems
abstract: Structural equation modeling is widely used in IS research. However, inconsistent construct definitions impede the cumulative development of knowledge. In this work, we present an approach that aims at the integration of structural equation models into a unified model: We use a combination of task-adapted text embeddings and clustering to produce a candidate set of construct groupings. Subsequently, we select the optimal solution using a loss function that explicitly trades off semantic purity and parsimony in the number of clusters. By making this trade-off explicit, our approach allows to analyze how construct groupings and their relations change as one shifts the priority from purity to parsimony. Empirically, we evaluate and explore the proposed methodology on two datasets from the IS domain.
comment: Accepted at the 34th European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2026), Milan, Italy

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种数据驱动方法，通过文本嵌入和聚类将结构方程模型中的构念整合为统一模型，并显式权衡语义纯度和简约性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在信息系统（IS）研究中，结构方程模型被广泛使用，但构念定义的不一致性阻碍了知识的累积发展。现有方法难以自动整合不同模型中的构念，导致研究结果无法统一和比较。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过自动化手段将多个结构方程模型中的构念及其关系整合为统一模型，以促进IS领域的知识融合与发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出GUT-IS方法，首先使用任务适应的文本嵌入将构念表示成向量，然后通过聚类算法生成构念分组的候选集。接着，设计一个损失函数，同时考虑语义纯度（聚类内部的语义一致性）和聚类数量的简约性（避免过多分组），并显式地权衡这两个目标。通过优化该损失函数，选择最优的分组方案。该方法允许调整权衡参数，从而观察构念分组及其关系如何随优先级变化。
light_analysis.result: 论文在IS领域的两个数据集上进行了实证评估，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标，但通过损失函数的选择和权衡分析，展示了方法能够生成语义一致且简约的构念分组。与传统方法相比，GUT-IS能自动整合不同模型，并提供灵活的分组方案，支持研究人员根据需求调整优先级。具体量化结果摘要未提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUT-IS提供了一种数据驱动的方法来整合信息系统研究中的结构方程模型，通过显式权衡纯度和简约性，增强了构念分组的可解释性和灵活性。该方法有助于推动IS领域的知识积累和理论统一。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的模型关系以及在不同领域验证其适用性。

title: LongMINT: Evaluating Memory under Multi-Target Interference in Long-Horizon Agent Systems
abstract: Real-world agents operate over long and evolving horizons, where information is repeatedly updated and may interfere across memories, requiring accurate recall and aggregated reasoning over multiple pieces of information. However, existing benchmarks focus on static, independent recall and fail to capture these dynamic interactions between evolving memories. In this paper, we study how current memory-augmented agents perform in realistic, interference-heavy, long-horizon settings across diverse domains and question types. We introduce LongMINT (Long-Horizon Memory under INTerference), a benchmark featuring (1) long, highly interconnected contexts with frequently updated information that induces substantial interference, (2) diverse domains (state tracking, multi-turn dialogue, Wikipedia revisions, and GitHub commits), enabling evaluation of domain generalization, and (3) diverse question types that assess robustness to interference, including (i) single-target recall tasks requiring retrieval of a specific target from long contexts, and (ii) multi-target aggregation tasks requiring reasoning over multiple relevant pieces of information. Overall, LongMINT has 15.6k question-answering pairs over long-horizon contexts averaging 138.8k tokens and extending up to 1.8M tokens per instance. We evaluate 7 representative systems, including vanilla long-context LLMs, RAG, and memory-augmented agent frameworks. Across all systems, we observe consistently low performance (avg. 27.9% accuracy), especially on questions requiring aggregated reasoning over multiple pieces of evidence. Our analysis shows that performance is primarily limited by retrieval and memory construction. Furthermore, current memory systems struggle to recall and reason over earlier facts that are later revised or interfered with by subsequent context, with performance degrading as the number of intervening updates increases.
comment: Equal contribution; order decided by a coin flip. Code and data: https://github.com/amy-hyunji/LongMINT

light_analysis.overview: 提出LongMINT基准，评估记忆增强系统在多目标干扰下的长时记忆表现，揭示现有系统在动态干扰环境中的严重不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实中的代理需在长期演化的环境中操作，信息频繁更新并互相干扰，但现有基准仅测试静态独立回忆，无法评估动态交互。因此，研究记忆系统在干扰密集的长时设置下的表现至关重要，以推动更鲁棒的代理发展。
light_analysis.method: LongMINT包含15.6k问答对，平均上下文138.8k tokens（最长1.8M），覆盖状态追踪、多轮对话、维基百科修订和GitHub提交四个领域。问题类型包括单目标回忆和多目标聚合。评估7种系统：长上下文LLM、RAG和记忆增强代理框架。
light_analysis.result: 所有系统平均准确率仅27.9%，多目标聚合任务表现更差。性能瓶颈在于检索和记忆构建。系统难以回忆被后续更新干扰的早期事实，且干扰次数越多性能下降越明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: LongMINT揭示了当前记忆增强系统在动态干扰下的严重缺陷，强调需改进记忆管理和检索机制。该基准为长时记忆和抗干扰推理研究提供了标准测试平台，推动更鲁棒代理系统的开发。

title: Readers make targeted regressions to plausible errors in reanalysis of "noisy-channel garden-path" sentences
abstract: A key question in psycholinguistics is how inferences about the meaning of linguistic input unfold incrementally a comprehender's mind. In this work, we study reading dynamics for ``noisy-channel garden-path'' sentences, which temporarily appear well-formed but feature late-appearing violations of expectation that can be resolved not by inferring an alternative syntactic structure, but by inferring the presence of an error. We find evidence for targeted regressions -- eye movements towards regions that are promising loci of possible errors in light of later-arriving information, showing patterns consistent with the posterior inferences of a model of noisy-channel processing with reanalysis. We discuss the implications of these findings for theories of noisy-channel language comprehension and information-theoretic explanations of reading dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 通过眼动实验发现读者在理解噪音通道花园路径句时会出现定向回视至可能错误区域，支持噪音通道模型的后验推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理语言学关注语言理解中增量式意义推断的机制。传统花园路径句研究侧重句法重分析，但忽视了对错误推断的噪音通道视角。本研究旨在探索读者如何利用后期信息重新解释早期输入，特别是针对表面合理但隐含错误的句子，以揭示阅读动态中的错误推理过程。
light_analysis.method: 采用眼动追踪实验，设计带有晚期违反预期的噪音通道花园路径句。这些句子暂时符合语法但后续出现矛盾，读者需推断错误存在而非改变句法结构。分析回视模式（如回视位置和频率），并与基于噪音通道再分析的计算模型的后验推理进行对比，验证模型预测。
light_analysis.result: 读者表现出针对性的眼动回视，即眼球移动至可能包含错误的文本区域，且回视模式与噪音通道模型的后验推理一致。摘要未提供具体量化指标（如回视概率、时间等），但指出结果支持模型预测，表明阅读动态包含基于概率的错误推断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为噪音通道语言理解理论提供了眼动行为证据，表明读者在阅读过程中主动推断错误存在而非仅依赖句法重分析。该发现具有理论和实际价值，有助于理解人类语言处理的鲁棒性。未来可探索其他类型错误或个体差异的影响，但当前实验仅针对特定结构。

title: Self-supervised local learning rules learn the hidden hierarchical structure of high-dimensional data
abstract: The brain learns abstract representations of high-dimensional sensory input, but the plasticity rules that enable such learning are unknown. We study biologically plausible algorithms on the Random Hierarchy Model (RHM), an artificial dataset designed to investigate how deep neural networks learn the intrinsic hierarchical structure of high-dimensional data. We focus on two types of local learning rules that avoid both a long convergence time and the use of a symmetric error network. The first type uses direct feedback signals to approximate error propagation from the output layer. The second type uses layerwise self-supervised contrastive or non-contrastive loss functions that do not explicitly approximate errors at the output layer. We show that all rules of the first type fail to solve the tasks of the RHM and trace this failure back to input-specific nonlinearities (`masking') that are implemented in full backpropagation and are essential for learning complex tasks. However, algorithms of the second type are able to learn the hierarchical hidden structure of the RHM tasks and are as data-efficient as supervised backpropagation training, while being compatible with known rules of synaptic plasticity in cortex.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种局部学习规则，其中自监督对比/非对比规则能学习数据层级结构，数据效率与反向传播相当。
light_analysis.motivation: 大脑如何从高维感官输入中学习抽象表征的突触可塑性规则尚不明确。现有生物合理学习算法存在收敛慢或依赖对称误差网络的问题。本文旨在探究局部学习规则能否有效学习高维数据的固有层级结构，并比较不同类型规则的性能。
light_analysis.method: 使用Random Hierarchy Model（RHM）作为数据集，研究两类局部学习规则：第一类使用直接反馈信号近似误差传播；第二类使用逐层自监督损失（对比或非对比），不显式近似输出层误差。通过分析这些规则在RHM任务上的表现，揭示失败与成功机制。
light_analysis.result: 第一类规则在所有RHM任务上均失败，归因于无法实现反向传播中的输入特定非线性（masking），该特性对学习复杂任务至关重要。第二类自监督规则能成功学习RHM的层级隐藏结构，且数据效率与监督反向传播训练相当，同时与皮层突触可塑性规则兼容。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自监督局部学习规则为理解大脑中的层级表征学习提供了生物合理机制，表明无需全局误差信号即可高效学习复杂数据结构。未来可探索这些规则在更真实神经回路中的应用及masking机制的生物实现。

title: Federated Martingale Posterior Samping
abstract: Federated Bayesian neural networks require fixing a prior on the model parameters together with a likelihood. Eliciting meaningful priors on the weight space of modern overparameterized models is notoriously difficult, and misspecification of either component can severely degrade accuracy and calibration. Motivated by the rapid progress of predictive models such as large language models, the martingale posterior, also known as predictive Bayes, replaces the prior--likelihood pair with a predictive distribution and recovers parameter uncertainty by repeatedly drawing predictive samples and refitting the model. A direct federated implementation, however, would require clients to share the local data sets. This letter proposes {federated martingale posterior} (FMP) sampling, a one-shot embarrassingly parallel protocol in which each client uploads a small set of trainable data embeddings and the server runs the predictive sampler centrally. Experiments on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 show that FMP closely matches the centralized counterpart and significantly improves calibration over consensus-style baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联邦鞅后验采样（FMP），一种一次性联邦贝叶斯方法，通过客户端上传可训练数据嵌入，服务器集中运行预测采样器。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦贝叶斯神经网络需要预先设定参数先验和似然，但在现代过参数化模型中很难定义有意义的先验，且先验或似然指定错误会严重降低模型精度和校准性能。现有方法如直接实现贝叶斯后验需要共享本地数据集，违反联邦学习隐私要求。因此需要一种无需共享数据、且无需指定先验-似然对的联邦贝叶斯方法。
