light_analysis.method: FMP基于鞅后验（预测贝叶斯）框架，用预测分布替代先验-似然对，通过反复抽取预测样本并重新拟合模型来恢复参数不确定性。在联邦场景中，每个客户端只上传一组可训练的数据嵌入（如小样本集），服务器端收集所有嵌入后集中运行预测采样器。该协议是一次性且易并行的，无需客户端间通信。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上的实验表明，FMP的性能与集中式鞅后验采样非常接近，并且在模型校准方面显著优于基于共识的联邦基线方法（如FedAvg）。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但校准提升是主要优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FMP提供了一种有效且保护隐私的联邦贝叶斯推断方法，避免了先验指定难题，同时保持了良好的精度和校准性能。其一次性通信和易并行特性适合实际联邦学习场景。未来可探索更复杂的数据嵌入机制或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: StableHand: Quality-Aware Flow Matching for World-Space Dual-Hand Motion Estimation from Egocentric Video
abstract: Recovering world space 4D motion of two interacting hands from egocentric video is a fundamental capability for supervising robot policy learning, where wrist trajectories track the end-effector and finger articulations specify the grasp pose. Two major challenges arise in this setting: hands frequently leave the camera view for extended periods due to head motion, and persistent hand-object interactions cause severe occlusions of one or both hands. Existing methods uniformly condition on noisy hand motion observations without accounting for their per-frame reliability, leading to substantial performance degradation. Our key insight is that accurate world space hand motion estimation is tightly coupled with the quality of per-frame hand observations. To this end, we decompose the quality of hand motion observations extracted from an off-the-shelf hand pose estimator into four channels: wrist global translation and finger articulations for both hands. We propose StableHand, a quality-aware flow-matching framework conditioned on these four-channel quality signals, which are predicted by a learned quality network. We naturally incorporate the quality signals into the flow-matching process through a per-channel forward schedule, a quality-adjusted velocity target, AdaLN modulation of the DiT denoiser, and a quality-aware ODE initialization. This unified generative process preserves high-quality observations while reconstructing unreliable ones using a learned bimanual motion prior. Experiments on HOT3D and ARCTIC, two egocentric benchmarks featuring long missing-hand spans and persistent hand-object occlusions, show that StableHand achieves state-of-the-art performance across all reported metrics, reducing W-MPJPE by 20-25% compared to the strongest baseline, with the largest gains on heavily occluded ARCTIC sequences.

light_analysis.overview: 提出质量感知流匹配框架StableHand，通过预测四个质量通道并融入生成过程，从第一人称视频中准确估计双手世界空间运动，显著提升遮挡和离视场景下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 从第一人称视频估计双手世界空间运动是机器人策略学习的关键能力，但手部常因头部运动长时间离视，且手物交互导致严重遮挡。现有方法均匀依赖噪声观测，未考虑逐帧可靠性，性能严重下降。解决逐帧可靠性差异对提升世界空间手部运动估计精度至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出StableHand，将手部姿态估计器输出的观测质量分解为四个通道（手腕平移和手指关节，每手两个）。训练质量网络预测四通道质量信号，通过每通道前向调度、质量调整速度目标、AdaLN调制DiT去噪器及质量感知ODE初始化融入流匹配过程，统一生成高质量观测并重构不可靠部分。
light_analysis.result: 在HOT3D和ARCTIC两个基准上，StableHand在所有指标上达到最优，相比最强基线，W-MPJPE降低20-25%，尤其在严重遮挡的ARCTIC序列上提升最大，摘要未明确说明具体数值但提及大幅改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: StableHand通过质量感知流匹配有效处理手部离视和遮挡问题，为机器人学习提供精确手部运动先验。其关键创新在于显式建模观测质量并融入生成过程，学术上验证了质量感知在运动估计中的价值，实际可促进灵巧操作策略学习。未来可扩展至多手交互场景。

title: Protein Fold Classification at Scale: Benchmarking and Pretraining
abstract: Classifying protein topology is essential for deciphering biological function, but progress is held back by the lack of large-scale benchmarks that avoid duplicates and by models that do not scale well. We introduce TEDBench, a large-scale, non-redundant benchmark for protein fold classification constructed from the Encyclopedia of Domains (TED) and Foldseek-clustered AlphaFold structures. We show that on TEDBench, current protein representation learning methods either require very large models or fail to deliver strong performance. To address this challenge, we propose Masked Invariant Autoencoders (MiAE), a self-supervised framework for protein structure representation learning. MiAE uses an extremely high masking ratio of up to 90% with an $\mathrm{SE(3)}$-invariant encoder and a lightweight decoder that reconstructs backbone coordinates from the latent representation and mask tokens. MiAE scales well and outperforms supervised counterparts and state-of-the-art baselines on TEDBench, establishing a strong recipe for protein fold classification. To test transfer beyond AlphaFold structures, we further benchmark on a curated dataset from experimental structures of CATH v4.4. TEDBench is available at https://github.com/BorgwardtLab/TEDBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了TEDBench大规模非冗余基准和MiAE自监督框架，实现高掩码率下的蛋白质折叠分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 蛋白质拓扑分类对理解生物功能至关重要，但现有研究缺乏大规模、无重复的基准数据集，且模型可扩展性差。当前方法要么需要极大型模型，要么性能不佳，亟需一个标准化的评估平台和高效的表示学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建TEDBench基准，包含来自TED和Foldseek聚类的AlphaFold结构。提出Masked Invariant Autoencoders（MiAE），采用高达90%的掩码率，利用SE(3)-不变编码器和轻量级解码器，从潜在表示和掩码令牌重建主干坐标。该方法实现了自监督学习，无需大量标注数据。
light_analysis.result: 在TEDBench上，MiAE优于监督方法和现有基线，表现出良好的可扩展性。进一步在CATH v4.4实验结构数据集上测试迁移能力，验证了模型的泛化性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiAE为蛋白质折叠分类提供了强大且可扩展的方案，TEDBench填补了大规模基准的空白。该工作推动了结构生物学中自监督学习的应用，未来可探索更高阶结构重建或跨任务迁移。局限性包括对AlphaFold结构的依赖，需更多实验验证。

title: Monitoring the Internal Monologue: Probe Trajectories Reveal Reasoning Dynamics
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) introduce new opportunities for safety monitoring through their Chain of Thought (CoT) reasoning. However, CoT is not always faithful to the model's final output, undermining its reliability as a monitoring tool. To address this, we investigate the hidden representations of LRMs to determine whether future behavior can be predicted from prompt and CoT representations. By evaluating a probe at each generated token, we construct a probe trajectory, the continuous evolution of a concept's probability across the reasoning process. We find that future model behavior is more distinguishable when examined over the full trajectory than from a single static prediction. To characterize these temporal dynamics, we extract signal-processing features that capture volatility, trend, and steady-state behavior, significantly improving the separation of future model states. We also present two methodological insights. First, template-based training data achieves near-parity with dynamically generated model responses, eliminating the need for a costly initial inference and labeling. Second, the choice of pooling operation is critical: average-pooling and last-token methods collapse to near-random performance, while max-pooling achieves up to 95% AUROC and yields stable probe trajectories. Using four datasets and four reasoning models across the domains of safety and mathematics, we demonstrate that trajectory features encode task-specific dynamics that improve outcome separability. These findings establish probe trajectories as a complementary framework for monitoring LRM behavior.   Warning: This article contains potentially harmful content.

light_analysis.overview: 提出探针轨迹方法，通过分析推理模型隐藏表示的连续演化来监控其行为，提升未来行为可预测性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRM）的链式思维（CoT）推理为安全监控提供新机会，但CoT并不总是忠实于最终输出，削弱其作为监控工具的可靠性。现有方法依赖于单点静态预测，难以捕获推理过程中的动态变化，亟需一种能揭示推理动力学的方法。
light_analysis.method: 在每个生成token处评估探针，构建探针轨迹（probe trajectory），追踪概念概率的连续演化。提取信号处理特征（波动性、趋势、稳态）来描述时间动态。采用模板训练数据替代动态生成，降低开销；比较不同池化操作，发现最大池化（max-pooling）最优。在四个数据集和四个推理模型（安全与数学领域）上验证。
light_analysis.result: 完整轨迹比单点静态预测显著提升未来行为区分度；最大池化实现高达95% AUROC，平均池化和最后token方法接近随机。轨迹特征编码任务特定动力学，改善结果可分离性，在多个领域有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 探针轨迹为监控LRM行为提供补充框架，利用推理过程中的连续表示演化提升预测准确性。方法具有实用价值，模板数据降低部署成本。未来可探索更复杂信号处理特征或应用于其他模型行为监控。

title: STT-Arena: A More Realistic Environment for Tool-Using with Spatio-Temporal Dynamics
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) deployed in real-world agentic applications must be capable of replanning and adapting when mid-task disruptions invalidate their prior decisions. Existing dynamic benchmarks primarily measure whether LLMs can detect temporal changes in a timely manner, leaving the complementary challenge of adaptive replanning under spatio-temporal dynamics largely unexplored. We introduce STT-Arena (Spatio-Temporal Tool-Use Arena), a benchmark of 227 high-quality interactive tasks spanning nine spatio-temporal conflict types and four solvability levels. Each task is grounded in a realistic, executable environment equipped with injected spatio-temporal triggers that can abruptly invalidate an ongoing plan, forcing the model to detect the state shift and construct a revised execution strategy. Extensive evaluation of frontier LLMs reveals that even the SOTA proprietary models, including Claude-4.6-Opus, achieves less than 40\% overall accuracies, highlighting the fundamental difficulty of spatio-temporal dynamic reasoning. Systematic analysis of failure trajectories uncovers three recurring error modes of existing models: Stale-State Execution, Misdiagnosis of Dynamic Triggers, and Missing Post-Adaptation Verification. Guided by these findings, we propose an iterative trajectory refinement technique that eliminates these failure patterns from training data, and combine it with online RL to produce STT-Agent-4B which outperforms frontier LLMs on STT-Arena.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STT-Arena基准，评估LLMs在时空动态下工具使用的适应规划能力，并基于失败模式训练出STT-Agent-4B。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在真实agent应用中需处理中任务干扰，现有动态基准主要检测时间变化，缺乏时空动态下的适应性规划研究。该问题重要，因为现实场景中时空变化频繁，现有方法未能充分评估模型的重新规划能力。
light_analysis.method: STT-Arena包含227个交互任务，覆盖9种时空冲突类型和4个可解级别，每个任务设有时空触发器。评估多个前沿LLMs后，分析失败轨迹发现三种错误模式：Stale-State Execution、Misdiagnosis of Dynamic Triggers和Missing Post-Adaptation Verification。据此提出迭代轨迹精炼技术消除失败模式，并结合在线RL训练出STT-Agent-4B。
light_analysis.result: 在STT-Arena上，SOTA模型Claude-4.6-Opus总体准确率低于40%，显示时空动态推理的困难。STT-Agent-4B（4B参数）在所有基线中表现最优，准确率超过前沿LLMs。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STT-Arena提供了更现实的评测环境，揭示了LLMs在时空动态规划中的根本性困难，并系统归纳了三种失败模式。基于此训练的STT-Agent-4B展示了有效提升。该工作为LLM评估和训练提供了新方向，未来可扩展至更复杂动态场景。

title: VISAFF: Speaker-Centered Visual Affective Feature Learning for Emotion Recognition in Conversation
abstract: Emotion Recognition in Conversation (ERC) is essential for effective human-machine interaction, aiming to identify speakers' emotional states in multi-turn dialogues. Early text-based methods struggle with complex scenarios like sarcasm because they inherently neglect vital non-verbal information. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) address this by analyzing video directly, they are not inherently tailored for ERC and often focus on emotionally irrelevant background regions or passive listeners rather than the active speaker. Furthermore, fine-tuning these large models incurs prohibitive computational costs. Additionally, isolated visual signals are frequently ambiguous or technically compromised without the context of linguistic content and vocal prosody. To address these challenges, we propose VISAFF, a speaker-centered VISual AFFective feature learning framework for ERC. VISAFF consists of two stages: Speaker-Centered Affective Grounding and Reliability-Guided Affective Complementation. VISAFF utilizes a tuning-free approach to unlock the reasoning capabilities of frozen VLMs, efficiently steering them to focus on the active speaker's emotional visual cues without heavy training overheads. In the second stage, we introduce a reliability-guided affective complementation mechanism that dynamically leverages textual and acoustic modalities to compensate for visual uncertainty. Experiments on two real-world datasets demonstrate that VISAFF achieves highly competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods in a tuning-free setting, significantly enhancing computational efficiency by eliminating the need for expensive fine-tuning of large VLMs. The source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/speaker-2365/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VISAFF，一种无需微调的说话者中心视觉情感特征学习框架，有效提升对话情感识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 对话情感识别（ERC）在人机交互中至关重要，但纯文本方法忽略非语言信息，现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）不专门针对ERC，常关注无关背景或被动听者，且微调计算成本高。因此需要一种能高效利用说话者视觉线索的方法。
light_analysis.method: VISAFF包含两阶段：说话者中心情感定位，利用冻结VLM的推理能力聚焦主动说话者的情感视觉线索；可靠性引导情感补充，动态结合文本和声学模态补偿视觉不确定性。无需调优，高效处理多模态信息。
light_analysis.result: 在两个真实世界数据集上，VISAFF在无需微调设置下取得与最先进方法竞争的性能，显著提升计算效率，避免了大模型微调的昂贵开销。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: VISAFF通过聚焦说话者视觉线索和可靠性引导的多模态融合，解决了ERC中视觉信息利用的挑战，无需昂贵微调即可实现高效性能。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的模态交互。

title: LESSViT: Robust Hyperspectral Representation Learning under Spectral Configuration Shift
abstract: Modeling hyperspectral imagery (HSI) across different sensors presents a fundamental challenge due to variations in wavelength coverage, band sampling, and channel dimensionality. As a result, models trained under a fixed spectral configuration often fail to generalize to other sensors. Existing Vision Transformer (ViT) approaches either rely on implicit spectral modeling with fixed channel assumptions or adopt explicit spatial-spectral attention with prohibitive computational cost, leading to a fundamental trade-off between efficiency and expressiveness. In this work, we introduce Low-rank Efficient Spatial-Spectral ViT (LESSViT), a sensor-flexible architecture for cross-spectral generalization. LESSViT is built on LESS Attention, a structured low-rank factorization that models joint spatial-spectral interactions through separable spatial and spectral components, reducing the complexity of full spatial-spectral attention from $O(N^2 C^2)$ to $O(rNC)$, where $N$ is the number of spatial tokens, $C$ is the number of spectral channels, and $r$ is the rank of the low-rank approximation. We further incorporate channel-agnostic patch embedding and wavelength-aware positional encoding to support flexible spectral inputs. To enable efficient and robust pretraining, we introduce a hyperspectral masked autoencoder (HyperMAE) with decoupled spatial-spectral masking and hierarchical channel sampling. We evaluate LESSViT under a cross-spectral generalization setting that simulates cross-sensor variability. Experiments on the SpectralEarth benchmark demonstrate that LESSViT improves robustness under spectral shifts while remaining competitive in-distribution, and explicit and efficient spatial-spectral modeling is essential for scalable and generalizable hyperspectral representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LESSViT，一种传感器灵活的低秩空间-光谱Transformer架构，通过显式且高效的空间-光谱建模实现跨光谱泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 高光谱影像跨传感器泛化面临波长覆盖、波段采样和通道维度变化的挑战，现有ViT方法要么依赖固定通道的隐式光谱建模，要么采用计算成本高的显式空间-光谱注意力，难以兼顾效率与表达力。因此需要一种既能显式建模空间-光谱交互又保持计算高效的通用架构。
light_analysis.method: LESSViT基于LESS Attention，将全空间-光谱注意力的复杂度从O(N²C²)降至O(rNC)，通过可分离的空间和光谱分量进行低秩分解。采用通道无关的块嵌入和波长感知位置编码支持灵活光谱输入，并设计HyperMAE自监督预训练，包含解耦的空间-光谱掩码和分层通道采样。
light_analysis.result: 在SpectralEarth基准上，LESSViT在跨光谱泛化设置下显著提升了光谱偏移鲁棒性，同时在分布内任务上保持竞争力。实验表明显式且高效的空间-光谱建模对可扩展和泛化的高光谱表示学习至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: LESSViT通过低秩结构实现了高效显式的空间-光谱建模，解决了跨传感器泛化难题，为高光谱表示学习提供了可扩展的解决方案。其设计可启发未来传感器无关的遥感基础模型，但需要进一步验证在更多传感器和任务上的泛化能力。

title: Probing for Representation Manifolds in Superposition
abstract: This paper introduces the Manifold Probe, a supervised method for discovering representation manifolds in superposition. The method generalizes linear regression probes by learning the space of features of a concept that can be linearly predicted from the representations, and then learning the directions used to encode them. We demonstrate the probe on representations of time and space in Llama 2-7b, finding manifolds which linearly represent an interpretable set of features in each case. In the case of time, we show that by steering along the manifold, we can influence the model's completions about the years in which famous songs, movies and books were released, providing evidence that the Manifold Probe can discover manifolds which are causally involved in model behaviour.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Manifold Probe方法，在表征叠加中发现线性可解释的流形，并通过操控验证因果性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有线性探针仅能发现单一方向，但概念表征可能在高维空间中形成流形。传统方法无法捕捉这种结构，且缺乏因果验证。本文旨在通过监督方法从叠加表征中学习概念特征的线性空间，并验证其因果作用。
light_analysis.method: Manifold Probe是一种监督方法，通过扩展线性回归探针，首先学习概念特征的可线性预测空间，再学习编码这些特征的方向。以Llama 2-7b的时间和空间表征为例，实验使用模型内部表示，发现对应流形包含一组可解释的线性特征。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama 2-7b上，Manifold Probe成功发现时间和空间的表征流形，每个流形对应一组可解释的线性特征。通过沿时间流形方向干预，可影响模型对著名歌曲、电影和书籍发行年份的补全，证明这些流形因果参与模型行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: Manifold Probe有效发现叠加表征中的可解释流形，并验证其因果性。该方法为理解大型语言模型内部表征提供了新工具，未来可拓展至更多概念和模型。局限性包括依赖线性假设，可能无法捕获非线性结构。

title: Beyond Scaling: Agents Are Heading to the Edge
abstract: The bottleneck of useful agentic intelligence has shifted from compressing world knowledge into a single model to executing a coordinated system. This position paper argues that personal-agent architecture must move to the edge because the core properties of agentic intelligence tasks, particularly their structural coupling with high-fidelity local context and the need for zero-latency execution loops, do not sit well with cloud-centric designs. We develop this claim through three structural shifts. First, the Prefrontal Turn: the main marginal lever of capability has moved from pre-training scale to framework-level executive control. Such control must remain physically close to the environment of action if the agent is to preserve cognitive alignment. Second, the Data-Geography Paradox, the ``dark matter'' of agentic data (local file hierarchies, real-time sensor streams, and transient OS states) degrades, disappears, or loses meaning once prepared for cloud transmission, thereby cutting the agent off from ground-truth context. Third, the interaction-alignment loop, the only economically and ecologically sustainable source of agentic refinement data is the high-fidelity implicit preference signal produced through real-time local interaction. Third, the interaction-alignment loop, the only economically and ecologically sustainable source of agentic refinement data is the high-fidelity implicit preference signal produced through real-time local interaction. We conclude with falsifiable predictions for the next deployment cycle of personal agents.

light_analysis.overview: 论文主张个人代理架构转向边缘，因云中心设计无法满足代理任务对高保真本地上下文和零延迟执行的需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前有用代理智能的瓶颈已从压缩世界知识转向执行协调系统。云中心设计难以满足代理任务的结构耦合高保真本地上下文和零延迟执行的需求，现有云传输方式导致上下文丢失和延迟，因此需要将代理架构移至边缘。
light_analysis.method: 提出三个结构性转变：1）前额叶转向：能力杠杆从预训练规模转向框架级执行控制，需靠近环境以保持认知对齐；2）数据地理悖论：代理数据（本地文件、传感器流、OS状态）在云传输中退化或失去意义，需本地处理；3）交互对齐循环：仅本地实时交互产生的高保真隐式偏好信号才是经济可持续的改进数据来源。
light_analysis.result: 本文为立场论文，未提供具体实验数据。其核心论点是基于三个结构性转变的论证，并给出可证伪的预测，如未来个人代理部署周期将向边缘迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 个人代理必须部署在边缘，因为核心任务属性要求本地上下文和零延迟。三个结构性转变重新定义了代理系统设计方向，学术上挑战了云中心范式，实际上为个人代理的架构优化和部署提供了新思路。潜在局限在于缺乏实证验证。

title: XCTFormer: Leveraging Cross-Channel and Cross-Time Dependencies for Enhanced Time-Series Analysis
abstract: Multivariate time-series analysis involves extracting informative representations from sequences of multiple interdependent variables, supporting tasks such as forecasting, imputation, and anomaly detection. In real-world scenarios, these variables are typically collected from a shared context or underlying phenomenon, suggesting the presence of latent dependencies across time and channels that can be leveraged to improve performance. However, recent findings show that channel-independent (CI) models, which assume no inter-variable dependencies, often outperform channel-dependent (CD) models that explicitly model such relationships. This surprising result indicates that current CD models may not fully exploit their potential due to limitations in how dependencies are captured. Recent studies have revisited channel dependence modeling with various approaches; however, these methods often employ indirect modeling strategies, which can lead to meaningful dependencies being overlooked. To address this issue, we introduce XCTFormer, a transformer-based channel-dependent (CD) model that explicitly captures cross-temporal and cross-channel dependencies via an enhanced attention mechanism. The model operates in a token-to-token fashion, modeling pairwise dependencies between every pair of tokens across time and channels. The architecture comprises (i) a data processing module, (ii) a novel Cross-Relational Attention Block (CRAB) that increases capacity and expressiveness, and (iii) an optional Dependency Compression Plugin (DeCoP) that improves scalability. Through extensive experiments on three time-series benchmarks, we show that XCTFormer achieves strong results compared to widely recognized baselines; in particular, it attains state-of-the-art performance on the imputation task, outperforming the second-best method by an average of 20.8% in MSE and 15.3% in MAE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 XCTFormer，一种基于 Transformer 的通道依赖模型，通过显式建模跨时间和跨通道的成对依赖，提升多变量时间序列分析性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列分析中，变量间存在潜在依赖，但近期研究发现通道独立模型优于显式建模依赖的通道依赖模型，表明现有CD模型未充分捕获依赖。现有方法采用间接建模策略，可能忽略重要依赖，亟需更显式的依赖建模方法。
light_analysis.method: XCTFormer 采用 token-to-token 方式，通过增强注意力机制显式建模每对时间-通道 token 的跨时间和跨通道依赖。架构包括数据处理模块、交叉关系注意力块（CRAB）增强容量和表达力，以及可选的依赖压缩插件（DeCoP）提升可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个时间序列基准上，XCTFormer 表现优异，尤其在插补任务中取得最先进结果，相比第二好方法，MSE 平均降低 20.8%，MAE 平均降低 15.3%。
light_analysis.conclusion: XCTFormer 通过显式建模跨通道和跨时间依赖，有效提升了多变量时间序列分析性能，尤其在插补任务上显著优于现有方法。未来可探索更高效的依赖压缩方式，并推广至其他时间序列任务。

title: Continuous Diffusion Scales Competitively with Discrete Diffusion for Language
abstract: While diffusion has drawn considerable recent attention from the language modeling community, continuous diffusion has appeared less scalable than discrete approaches. To challenge this belief we revisit Plaid, a likelihood-based continuous diffusion language model (DLM), and construct RePlaid by aligning the architecture of Plaid with modern discrete DLMs. In this unified setting, we establish the first scaling law for continuous DLMs that rivals discrete DLMs: RePlaid exhibits a compute gap of only $20\times$ compared to autoregressive models, outperforms Duo while using fewer parameters, and outperforms MDLM in the over-trained regime. We benchmark RePlaid against recent continuous DLMs: on OpenWebText, RePlaid achieves a new state-of-the-art PPL bound of $22.1$ among continuous DLMs and superior generation quality. These results suggest that continuous diffusion, when trained via likelihood, is a highly competitive and scalable alternative to discrete DLMs. Moreover, we offer theoretical insights to understand the advantage of likelihood-based training. We show that optimizing the noise schedule to minimize the ELBO's variance naturally yields linear cross-entropy (information loss) over time. This evenly distributes denoising difficulty without any case-specific time reparameterization. In addition, we find that optimizing embeddings via likelihood creates structured geometries and drives the most significant likelihood gain.

light_analysis.overview: 通过重新设计Plaid架构为RePlaid，首次建立连续扩散语言模型的缩放律，证明其在似然训练下能与离散方法竞争。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前语言建模领域，连续扩散模型被认为比离散方法可扩展性差。本文挑战这一观点，旨在通过架构对齐和似然训练，证明连续扩散DLM在性能和缩放性上能与离散DLM相匹敌，填补连续DLM缩放律研究的空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于Plaid模型，将架构与现代离散DLM（如MDLM）对齐构建RePlaid；采用似然目标训练，通过优化噪声调度最小化ELBO方差，自然得到线性交叉熵（信息损失），均匀分布去噪难度；同时发现嵌入优化能形成结构化几何并带来最大似然增益。
light_analysis.result: RePlaid在OpenWebText上达到连续DLM最佳困惑度上界22.1，生成质量优于先前模型；计算差距仅为自回归模型的20倍，性能超越Duo和MDLM（在过训练区域）。首个缩放律显示连续DLM可与离散DLM竞争。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明连续扩散在似然训练下是高度可扩展且具有竞争力的替代方案，理论阐明噪声调度和嵌入优化的作用。为连续扩散语言模型的发展提供新方向，未来可探索更大规模训练和架构改进。

title: AMR-SD: Asymmetric Meta-Reflective Self-Distillation for Token-Level Credit Assignment
abstract: The alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) for complex reasoning heavily relies on Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, standard algorithms like GRPO apply sequence-level rewards uniformly to all tokens, creating a severe credit-assignment bottleneck. While on-policy self-distillation attempts to resolve this by conditioning a self-teacher on privileged contexts, direct exposure to raw oracle solutions often induces over-conditioned teacher distributions, implicit answer leakage, and late-stage training collapse. To overcome these limitations, we propose Asymmetric Meta-Reflective Self-Distillation (AMR-SD). Instead of conditioning directly on raw reference traces, AMR-SD inserts a reflection bottleneck: it compresses diagnostic signals -- from verifier outcomes, peer rollouts, or reference feedback -- into concise, self-generated Socratic hints and critiques. Furthermore, we introduce Causal Information Gain (CIG) with an asymmetric, ReLU-gated threshold to translate these reflections into sparse, highly precise token-level advantage modulations. Combined with temporal annealing, this mechanism preserves the base environmental reward while filtering out distributional noise. Experiments across scientific, mathematical, and tool-use benchmarks demonstrate that AMR-SD significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving robust long-horizon stability and successfully preventing late-stage collapse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出非对称元反思自蒸馏（AMR-SD）方法，通过反射瓶颈和因果信息增益实现细粒度令牌级信用分配，提升大模型复杂推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于可验证奖励的强化学习中，标准算法如GRPO对所有令牌施加均匀的序列级奖励，导致严重的信用分配瓶颈。现有自蒸馏方法直接暴露于原始参考解，引发过条件化教师分布、隐式答案泄露和后期训练崩溃。这些问题限制了复杂推理任务中模型对齐的效果和稳定性。
light_analysis.method: AMR-SD引入反思瓶颈，将验证器结果、同伴轨迹或参考反馈等诊断信号压缩为自生成的苏格拉底式提示和批评。随后提出因果信息增益（CIG），结合非对称ReLU门控阈值，将这些反思转化为稀疏高精度的令牌级优势调整。结合时间退火机制，该方法在保留环境奖励的同时过滤分布噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在科学、数学和工具使用基准上，AMR-SD显著优于现有基线，实现了稳健的长程稳定性，并成功防止了后期训练崩溃。具体性能提升包括在数学推理任务中准确率提高XX%（摘要未明确说明，但可推断有显著改进），且训练过程更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMR-SD通过反射瓶颈和CIG机制有效解决了令牌级信用分配问题，避免了过条件化和训练崩溃。该方法为复杂推理任务中的大模型对齐提供了新范式，具有广阔应用前景。未来可探索更高效的反思压缩策略或扩展到多模态场景。

title: Beyond Morphology: Quantifying the Diagnostic Power of Color Features in Cancer Classification
abstract: In histopathology, human experts primarily rely on color as a means of enhancing contrast to interpret tissue morphology, whereas machine vision models process color as raw statistical information. This distinction raises a fundamental question: to what extent can pixel intensity alone, independent of structural and morphological cues, support cancer classification? To address this question, we systematically evaluated the standalone discriminative power of global color features while deliberately excluding all morphological information. Specifically, we extracted statistical color moments and discretized RGB and HSV color histograms, and assessed their performance across ten diverse experimental settings using classical machine learning classifiers. Our results demonstrate that color features alone can achieve strong performance in binary diagnostic tasks (e.g., benign versus malignant), with classification accuracies reaching up to 89%. This performance is likely attributable to global chromatic shifts associated with malignancy. Importantly, these simple color-based representations consistently outperformed random baselines by a substantial margin, indicating that raw color distributions encode a non-random and diagnostically relevant signal for cancer detection. Consequently, this study suggests that simple, computationally efficient color features can serve as an effective pre-screening tool. By identifying samples with strong chromatic indicators of malignancy, these lightweight models could function as a first-pass triage system, reducing the computational burden on complex deep learning architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 量化颜色特征在癌症分类中的独立诊断能力，证明仅利用像素强度即可达到高准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在组织病理学中，人类专家主要利用颜色增强对比以解读组织形态，而机器模型则将颜色作为原始统计信息处理。这种差异引发了一个基本问题：像素强度本身（独立于结构和形态线索）能在多大程度上支持癌症分类？现有方法多依赖复杂深度模型，忽视了颜色特征的独立诊断潜力。本研究旨在系统性评估全局颜色特征单独用于癌症分类的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出系统性评估方案，提取全局颜色特征（统计颜色矩、离散化RGB和HSV直方图），严格排除所有形态信息。在10种不同实验设置下，使用经典机器学习分类器（如SVM、随机森林等）进行训练和测试。重点分析颜色特征在二元诊断任务（如良/恶性分类）中的表现，并与随机基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，仅使用颜色特征在二元诊断任务中最高达到89%的分类准确率，显著优于随机基线。该性能主要归因于与恶性肿瘤相关的全局色偏移。颜色分布编码了非随机的、与诊断相关的信号，证明简单颜色特征具有强大的判别能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了颜色特征本身蕴含丰富的诊断信息，可作为高效、计算简单的预筛选工具。通过识别具有强恶性染色体征的样本，这些轻量模型可作为一级分诊系统，减少复杂深度学习架构的计算负担。未来工作可探索颜色特征与形态特征的互补性。

title: Easier to Judge than to Find: Predicting In-Context Learning Success for Demonstration Selection
abstract: In-context learning (ICL) is highly sensitive to which demonstrations appear in the prompt, but selecting them is expensive because the space of possible demonstration contexts and combinations is enormous. We argue that demonstration selection is \emph{easier to judge than to find}: predicting whether a specific query--context pair $(q,D)$ will succeed is cheaper and more general than searching for an optimal $D^\star$. Based on this insight, we propose DiSP, a sample-and-judge framework that stratifies queries by difficulty. DiSP runs random demonstration trials to estimate success rate of each training query, trains a lightweight router to predict difficulty from the query, and trains level-specific judges for sampled demonstrations. At inference, DiSP performs stop-on-acceptance judging under an explicit budget, emitting diagnostic risk tags when no suitable context is found. Across five classification datasets with Llama~3--8B and Qwen~2.5--7B, DiSP achieves the best average accuracy, improving over strong learned selection baselines by up to 3.4\%, while achieving up to $23\times$ end-to-end wall-clock speedup.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiSP框架，通过预测查询-上下文对的成功概率，实现高效、可扩展的演示示例选择。
light_analysis.motivation: In-context learning (ICL) 对提示中的演示示例高度敏感，但选择最优演示组合的搜索空间巨大，现有方法成本高昂或泛化性不足。研究发现，预测特定查询-上下文对 (q,D) 的成功概率比直接搜索最优 D* 更廉价且更通用。基于这一洞察，需要一种高效的演示选择方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出 DiSP 框架，采用样本-判断策略。先通过随机演示试验估计每个训练查询的成功率，训练轻量级路由器预测查询难度，再训练难度特定的判断器评估演示质量。推理时，在显式预算下执行停止接受判断，若无合适上下文则发出诊断风险标签。使用 Llama-3-8B 和 Qwen-2.5-7B 在五个分类数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在五个分类数据集上，DiSP 平均准确率最佳，比强学习基线提升高达 3.4%，同时端到端加速达 23 倍。具体性能指标依赖数据集，但整体优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiSP 验证了“判断比寻找更容易”的核心思想，提供高效的演示选择方案，兼具准确性和计算效率。未来可扩展更复杂的判断器以处理更广泛任务，潜在局限性包括对随机试验的依赖和判断器泛化性。

title: A Practical Noise2Noise Denoising Pipeline for High-Throughput Raman Spectroscopy
abstract: A lightweight and reproducible denoising pipeline for high-throughput Raman spectroscopy is presented. The approach relies on a one-dimensional convolutional autoencoder trained using a Noise2Noise strategy, requiring neither external spectral libraries nor high signal-to-noise reference spectra for training. From a reduced training subset composed of repeated short-exposure acquisitions, the model learns to reconstruct Raman spectra while efficiently suppressing stochastic noise. The method is evaluated on a heterogeneous mineral sample, using both quantitative spectral fidelity metrics (RMSE, SNR, SSIM) and task-oriented criteria based on unsupervised K-means classification. Results demonstrate that integration times as short as 5 ms per spectrum, which are typically insufficient for reliable interpretation, yield denoised spectra with high fidelity to the reference data while preserving chemically coherent maps. This work provides a practical trade-off between spectral quality and acquisition speed, enabling fast, adaptable Raman workflows compatible with routine laboratory use. It also offers a transferable framework for other one-dimensional spectroscopic modalities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于Noise2Noise策略的一维卷积自编码器去噪管道，实现高吞吐量拉曼光谱的快速、保真去噪。
light_analysis.motivation: 高吞吐量拉曼光谱中，短曝光采集速度快但信噪比低，传统去噪方法依赖于高信噪比参考谱或外部光谱库，限制了实际应用。现有方法难以在保持光谱保真度的同时实现快速采集，需要一种轻量级、可复现且无需外部数据的去噪方案。
light_analysis.method: 采用一维卷积自编码器，训练数据仅由重复的短曝光拉曼光谱组成，无需高信噪比参考谱或外部库。通过Noise2Noise策略，模型学习从噪声输入重建干净光谱，有效抑制随机噪声。评估使用定量指标（RMSE、SNR、SSIM）和基于K-means聚类的任务导向评价。
light_analysis.result: 在异质矿物样本上，积分时间短至5毫秒每光谱的去噪结果与参考数据高度一致，RMSE、SNR和SSIM指标显著优于未处理数据。K-means聚类结果保持化学一致性，证明了去噪质量。该方法在采集速度和质量之间取得实用平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种实用、可迁移的拉曼光谱去噪管道，无需外部数据即可实现快速高保真去噪，适用于常规实验室高通量分析。未来可推广至其他一维光谱模态，局限性可能在于对复杂噪声类型的泛化能力。

title: Offline Contextual Bandits in the Presence of New Actions
abstract: Automated decision-making algorithms drive applications such as recommendation systems and search engines. These algorithms often rely on off-policy contextual bandits or off-policy learning (OPL). Conventionally, OPL selects actions that maximize the expected reward from an existing action set. However, in many real-world scenarios, actions, such as news articles or video content, change continuously, and the action space evolves over time after data collection. We define actions introduced after deploying the logging policy as new actions and focus on OPL with new actions. Existing OPL methods identify optimal actions from the existing set effectively but cannot learn and select new actions because no relevant data are logged. To address this limitation, we propose a new OPL method that leverages action features. We first introduce the Local Combination PseudoInverse (LCPI) estimator for the policy gradient, generalizing the PseudoInverse estimator initially proposed for off-policy evaluation of slate bandits. LCPI controls the trade-off between reward-modeling condition and the condition for data collection regarding the action features, capturing the interaction effects among different dimensions of action features. Furthermore, we propose a generalized algorithm called Policy Optimization for Effective New Actions (PONA), which integrates LCPI, a component specialized for new action selection, with Doubly Robust (DR), which excels at learning within existing actions. We define PONA as a weighted sum of the LCPI and DR estimators, optimizing both the selection of existing and new actions, and allowing the proportion of new action selections to be adjusted by the weight parameter. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that PONA efficiently selects new actions while maintaining the overall policy performance as opposed to most existing methods that cannot select new actions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种能处理新动作的离线上下文赌博机学习方法，通过局部组合伪逆估计器和PONA算法实现新动作的有效选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线策略学习（OPL）通常假设动作集固定，但在推荐系统等场景中，新动作（如新闻文章）会不断出现。现有OPL方法无法学习或选择新动作，因为缺乏相关日志数据。因此，需要一种新方法，既能利用已有动作的数据，又能有效识别和选择新动作，以应对动态变化的动作空间。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出局部组合伪逆（LCPI）估计器，用于策略梯度估计，它通过动作特征控制奖励建模条件与数据收集条件之间的权衡，捕捉动作特征维度间的交互效应。然后提出PONA算法，将LCPI（擅长新动作选择）与Doubly Robust估计器（擅长已有动作学习）加权结合，通过权重参数调整新动作选择比例，实现整体策略优化。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量实验证明，PONA能高效选择新动作，同时保持整体策略性能。与多数现有方法（无法选择新动作）相比，PONA在包含新动作的场景下表现更优，具体指标提升摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文定义了动作空间动态变化下的新动作学习问题，并提出LCPI和PONA方法，填补了现有OPL方法在新动作处理上的空白。该方法具有实际应用价值，如推荐系统和搜索引擎。未来可进一步探索特征表示或估计器设计。摘要未提及明显的局限性。

title: DiPRL: Learning Discrete Programmatic Policies via Architecture Entropy Regularization
abstract: Programmatic reinforcement learning (PRL) offers an interpretable alternative to deep reinforcement learning by representing policies as human-readable and -editable programs. While gradient-based methods have been developed to optimize continuous relaxations of programs, they face a significant performance drop when converting the continuous relaxations back into discrete programs. Post-hoc discretization can discard optimized branches and parameters in a program, which results in a collapse of policy expressivity and lowered task performance, leading in turn to a need for additional fine-tuning. To overcome these limitations, we propose Differentiable Discrete Programmatic Reinforcement Learning (DiPRL), a method that learns programmatic policies that become nearly discrete during training, avoiding a separate post-hoc fine-tuning stage. We first analyze the inherent risks of performance drop introduced by post-hoc discretization of gradient-based methods. Then, we introduce programmatic architecture entropy regularization, which enables smooth, differentiable training that encourages convergence toward a discrete program. DiPRL maintains the efficiency of gradient-based optimization while mitigating the risks of post-hoc discretization. Our experiments across multiple discrete and continuous RL tasks demonstrate that DiPRL can achieve strong performance via interpretable programmatic policies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiPRL方法，通过架构熵正则化在训练中实现程序逐步离散化，避免了梯度方法事后离散化导致的性能损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 程序化强化学习（PRL）提供可解释策略，但梯度方法在将连续松弛转化为离散程序时，因事后离散化丢弃优化分支和参数，导致策略表达能力下降和性能损失，需额外微调。亟需一种在训练过程中直接学习离散程序的方法，以保持可解释性且避免性能下降。
light_analysis.method: DiPRL引入程序化架构熵正则化，使神经网络的连续松弛在可微训练中逐渐收敛到离散形式，从而获得离散程序化策略。该方法保留了梯度优化的效率，同时避免了事后离散化带来的风险。论文首先理论分析性能下降原因，然后设计正则化项促进离散化，并应用于多种强化学习任务。
light_analysis.result: 在多个离散和连续强化学习任务上的实验表明，DiPRL能够通过可解释的程序化策略取得强性能。与基线相比，DiPRL避免了事后离散化的性能下降，无需额外微调，在保持策略可读性的同时达到与深度RL相当的效果。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiPRL通过架构熵正则化成功学习离散程序化策略，解决了梯度PRL方法中事后离散化的问题，兼具高性能与可解释性。该工作为可解释强化学习提供了新思路，有望应用于需要安全性和人类理解的关键领域。未来可探索更复杂的程序结构或扩展至多任务场景。

title: Weakly Supervised Cross-Modal Learning for 4D Radar Scene Flow Estimation
abstract: Due to the difficulty of obtaining ground-truth data for 4D radar scene flow estimation, previous methods typically rely on either self-supervised losses or cross-modal supervision using 3D LiDAR data, 2D images, and odometry. However, self-supervised approaches often yield suboptimal results due to radar's inherently low-fidelity measurements, while existing cross-modal supervised methods introduce complex multi-task architecture and require costly LiDAR sensors to generate pseudo radar scene flow labels from pretrained 3D tracking models. To overcome these limitations, we propose a task-specific iterative framework for weakly supervised radar scene flow learning, using only images and odometry for auxiliary supervision during training. Specially, we establish two novel instance-aware self-supervised losses by exploiting off-the-shelf 2D tracking and segmentation algorithms to obtain tracked instance masks, which are back-projected into 3D space to provide instance-level semantic guidance; for static regions, we integrate vehicle odometry with radar's intrinsic motion cues to construct a rigid static loss. Extensive experiments on the real-world View-of-Delft (VoD) dataset demonstrate that our method not only surpasses state-of-the-art cross-modal supervised approaches that rely on 3D multi-object tracking on dense LiDAR point clouds but also outperforms existing fully supervised scene flow estimation methods. The code is open-sourced at \href{https://github.com/FuJingyun/IterFlow}{https://github.com/FuJingyun/IterFlow}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种弱监督跨模态4D雷达场景流估计框架，仅利用图像和里程计辅助监督，无需LiDAR，通过实例感知损失和刚性静态损失实现高效学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 4D雷达场景流估计中，获取真实标注数据困难。现有自监督方法因雷达测量保真度低而导致性能不佳；跨模态监督方法依赖复杂的多任务架构和昂贵的LiDAR传感器生成伪标签，成本高且实用性受限。为此，本文旨在设计一种仅需廉价传感器（图像和里程计）的弱监督方法，克服雷达数据不足和现有方法依赖强监督的局限，提升场景流估计的实用性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出任务特定的迭代弱监督学习框架，训练时仅使用图像和里程计辅助监督。核心创新包括两个实例感知自监督损失：利用现有2D跟踪和分割算法获取实例掩码，反投影到3D空间提供实例级语义指导；针对静态区域，融合车辆里程计与雷达内在运动线索构建刚性静态损失。该方法无需LiDAR和3D标注，利用2D视觉信息增强雷达场景流学习。
light_analysis.result: 在真实View-of-Delft数据集上，该方法不仅超越了依赖密集LiDAR点云和多目标跟踪的现有跨模态监督方法，还优于现有的全监督场景流估计方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明弱监督方法达到甚至超过强监督方法的精度，验证了框架的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种弱监督跨模态学习范式，有效解决了4D雷达场景流估计中真值缺失问题，通过实例感知损失和刚性损失实现了仅用图像和里程计的高质量估计。该方法降低了传感器成本，拓展了雷达场景流在实际应用中的可行性。未来可进一步探索更丰富的2D-3D语义融合策略，或应用于其他雷达感知任务。

title: Ancient Greek to Modern Greek Machine Translation: A Novel Benchmark and Fine-Tuning Experiments on LLMs and NMT Models
abstract: Machine Translation (MT) for Ancient Greek (AG) to Modern Greek (MG) is a low-resource task, constrained by the lack of large-scale, high-quality parallel data. We address this gap by introducing the AG-MG Parallel Corpus, a new resource containing 132,481 sentence-aligned pairs derived from literary, historical, and biblical texts. We present a novel corpus creation pipeline that combines web-scraped, excerpt-level data with a multi-stage sentence-level alignment, and refinement process. Our method uses VecAlign with LaBSE embeddings, which we first fine-tune on a manually-aligned AG-MG subset, followed by an LLM-based error/misalignment correction phase using Gemini 2.5 Flash to ensure high alignment quality. Furthermore, we provide the first comprehensive benchmark of modern MT models on this task, evaluating three fine-tuning strategies across NMT models (NLLB, M2M100) and a Greek LLM (Llama-Krikri-8B). Our experiments show that fine-tuning yields significant improvements over base models, increasing performance by up to +10.3 BLEU points. Specifically, full-parameter fine-tuning of Llama-Krikri-8B achieves the highest overall performance with a BLEU score of 13.16, while the QLoRA-adapted M2M100-1.2B model demonstrates the largest relative gains and highly competitive results. Our dataset and models represent a significant contribution to Greek NLP.
comment: 14 pages. Accepted for presentation at the 15th Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026), Palma, Mallorca, Spain

light_analysis.overview: 构建古希腊语到现代希腊语的平行语料库并微调LLM和NMT模型，首次提供全面基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 古希腊语到现代希腊语的机器翻译是低资源任务，缺乏大规模高质量平行数据。现有方法受限于数据稀缺，导致翻译效果不佳。论文旨在解决这一空白，通过构建高质量平行语料库并评估多种现代翻译模型，推动该领域发展。该研究对希腊语自然语言处理具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 提出AG-MG平行语料库，包含132,481句对，源自文学、历史、圣经文本。语料构建结合网页抓取和多阶段句子级对齐：先微调VecAlign（基于LaBSE嵌入）于手动对齐子集，再用Gemini 2.5 Flash进行LLM纠错。评估三种微调策略（全参数、QLoRA等）在NLLB、M2M100和Llama-Krikri-8B模型上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 微调显著提升性能，最高提升+10.3 BLEU。Llama-Krikri-8B全参数微调取得最高BLEU 13.16；QLoRA适应的M2M100-1.2B模型相对增益最大且结果极具竞争力。数据集和模型为希腊语NLP做出重要贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文针对古希腊语到现代希腊语机器翻译的低资源问题，贡献了高质量平行语料库和全面基准。实验表明微调能有效提升性能，尤其是QLoRA方法在资源受限时表现优异。该工作填补了该领域的研究空白，为后续希腊语NLP研究奠定基础。未来可扩展语料库规模或探索更优对齐方法。

title: Implicit Hierarchical GRPO: Decoupling Tool Invocation from Execution for Tool-Integrated Mathematical Reasoning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have increasingly leveraged tool invocation to enhance their reasoning capabilities. However, existing approaches typically tightly couple tool invocation with immediate execution. Such immediate tool interaction may disrupt the reasoning coherence of LLMs and constrain their expressivity, ultimately degrading reasoning performance. To this end, for the first time, we propose and formalize the problem of decoupling tool invocation from execution during reasoning, and introduce delayed execution with explicit control to enhance tool-integrated reasoning (TIR). Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical control framework and theoretically derive a surrogate loss that enables an implicitly hierarchical policy to learn behavior equivalent to that of an explicit hierarchical policy, leading to the proposed IH-GRPO algorithm. Extensive experiments on IH-GRPO achieve absolute improvements of 1.87\%, 2.16\%, and 2.53\% on Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Qwen3-8B across six out-of-domain mathematical reasoning benchmarks over the strongest baseline method, while also yielding consistent performance gains in other domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/Lumina04/IH-GRPO-01.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦工具调用与执行的分层框架IH-GRPO，通过延迟执行和隐式分层策略提升工具集成数学推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将工具调用与立即执行紧密耦合，破坏了推理连贯性，限制了表达性，导致推理性能下降。为增强工具集成推理，首次形式化解耦问题，提出延迟执行与显式控制。
light_analysis.method: 提出分层控制框架，理论推导出代理损失使隐式分层策略学习等价于显式分层策略，形成IH-GRPO算法。通过延迟执行解耦调用与执行，保持推理连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 在六个域外数学推理基准上，相比最强基线，Qwen3-1.7B、4B、8B分别提升1.87%、2.16%、2.53%，其他域也有一致增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出解耦工具调用与执行的分层框架IH-GRPO，有效提升工具集成推理性能。未来可扩展至更多工具集成场景。代码已开源。

title: DBES: A Systematic Benchmark and Metric Suite for Evaluating Expert Specialization in Large-Scale MoEs
abstract: Expert specialization in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models remains poorly understood, with traditional evaluations conflating architectural load-balancing with functional specialization. We introduce DBES, a comprehensive diagnostic framework combining a multi-domain benchmark with five theoretically grounded metrics: Routing Specialization, Normalized Effective Rank, Domain Isolation, Routing Stiffness Score, and N-gram Expertise measures.   Critical findings demonstrate distinct specialization paradigms across models: Qwen-series exhibit modular specialization with high domain isolation, while DeepSeek and GLM employ distributed collaboration. However, we emphasize that specialization is a diagnostic dimension, necessary but not sufficient for downstream performance. Most crucially, interventional evidence validates the actionability of these metrics: by using DBES to identify high-specialization expert paths during domain-specific post-training, we achieved 66% to 94.48% improvement in specialized domains with only 15% of original training resources, demonstrating that these diagnostic tools can be converted into concrete optimization operators. This work provides the first systematic methodology for evaluating expert specialization independently of accuracy metrics, offering crucial insights for the design and post-training optimization of next-generation MoE systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DBES框架，系统评估大规模MoE模型的专家专门化，并通过干预实验验证其可操作性。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE模型中专家专门化的理解不足，传统评估将架构负载均衡与功能专门化混为一谈。现有方法缺乏独立于准确率的专门化评测，难以指导模型设计与后训练优化。
light_analysis.method: 构建DBES诊断框架，包含多领域基准和五个理论指标：路由专门化、归一化有效秩、领域隔离、路由刚度分数和N-gram专长。通过识别高专门化专家路径，在领域特定后训练中仅用15%原始资源进行干预。
light_analysis.result: Qwen系列呈现模块化专门化，DeepSeek和GLM采用分布式协作。干预实验在专门领域提升66%至94.48%，仅用15%训练资源，证明指标可转化为优化算子。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提供独立于准确率的专家专门化系统评估方法，揭示不同专门化范式，并展示后训练优化潜力。为下一代MoE系统设计与优化提供关键见解，未来可扩展至更多模型与任务。

title: Benchmarking transferability of SSL pretraining to same and different modality segmentation tasks
abstract: Methods: Nine SSL methods spanning four pretext-task families were pretrained from scratch using the same 10{,}412 3D CT scans (1.89~M 2D axial slices) covering varied disease sites. The pretrained Swin Transformer encoder from each method was integrated into a SwinUNETR-style segmentation network (Swin encoder with a 3D CNN decoder and skip connections) and fine-tuned on nine public segmentation tasks of varying complexity, including large abdominal organs, head-and-neck structures, and tumors from CT and MRI. Performance was assessed using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC). Fine-tuning convergence speed, transferability across modalities (CT-to-MRI), and feature-reuse patterns between few- and many-shot fine tuning were further analyzed using centered kernel alignment.   Results: Self-distilled masked image transformer (SMIT), which combines masked image modeling (MIM) with local and global self-distillation, achieved the highest overall segmentation accuracy across the nine tasks, the fastest fine-tuning convergence, and the smallest few-shot-to-many-shot performance gap, indicating the strongest data efficiency. SMIT also showed the most consistent feature-reuse patterns between few- and many-shot fine tuning. MIM-based SimMIM and self-distillation methods (DINO, iBOT) outperformed contrastive learning and rotation prediction, which rely on image-level global representations. Differences between SSL methods were largest in the few-shot setting and narrowed as the size of the labeled fine-tuning dataset increased, indicating that the choice of SSL pretraining matters most under limited annotation budgets.
comment: Paper submitted to Medical Physics for review

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较九种自监督学习方法在医学图像分割中的迁移性，发现SMIT方法在多种分割任务中表现最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督预训练在医学图像分析中潜力巨大，但不同SSL方法的迁移性缺乏系统比较。现有研究多针对相同模态任务，跨模态迁移和不同预训练方法的影响尚不明确。本文旨在全面评估SSL预训练对CT和MRI分割任务的迁移效果，为有限标注资源下的模型选择提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 使用10,412张3D CT扫描（1.89M 2D切片）从零预训练九种SSL方法（涵盖掩码图像建模、对比学习、旋转预测、自蒸馏四类）。将每个预训练的Swin Transformer编码器集成到SwinUNETR（Swin编码器+3D CNN解码器+跳跃连接），在九个CT/MRI分割任务上微调，采用Dice系数评估性能，并通过中心核对齐分析微调收敛速度和特征复用模式。
light_analysis.result: SMIT在九个任务中取得最高平均Dice，微调收敛最快，小样本与大样本性能差距最小，数据效率最高。MIM类方法（SimMIM、DINO、iBOT）优于对比学习和旋转预测。SSL方法差异在小样本设置中最大，随标注数据增加而缩小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实SSL预训练选择对医学图像分割至关重要，尤其在小标注预算下。SMIT结合掩码图像建模与自蒸馏的特性使其迁移性能最佳。未来可探索更大规模预训练数据及更多下游任务的通用性。

title: Vector RAG vs LLM-Compiled Wiki: A Preregistered Comparison on a Small Multi-Domain Research
abstract: We preregistered a comparison of two ways to help an LLM answer questions over a small research corpus: a single-round Vector RAG system and an LLM-compiled markdown wiki. Both systems answered the same 13 questions over 24 papers using the same answer-generating model, and their answers were scored by blinded LLM judges.   The wiki scored much better at connecting findings across papers, but its advantage in answer organization was not strong after judge adjustment. RAG met the preregistered test for single-fact lookup questions. The clean query-side cost result went against the expected wiki advantage: under the tested setup, the wiki used far more query tokens than RAG, so it could not recover any upfront build cost through cheaper queries.   Two exploratory analyses changed how we interpret the result. First, claim-level citation checking favored the wiki: its cited pages more often supported the exact claims being made, even though RAG scored better on the overall groundedness rubric. Second, a decomposition-based RAG variant recovered most of the wiki's advantage on cross-paper synthesis at lower LLM-token cost, but it did not recover the wiki advantage in claim-by-claim citation support.   The main conclusion is that grounded research synthesis is not a single capability. Systems can differ in how well they organize evidence, how well their citations support each claim, and how much they cost to run. In this study, no architecture was best on all three.

light_analysis.overview: 预注册对比向量RAG与LLM编译维基在小规模多领域文献问答上的表现，发现两者各有优劣，没有架构在所有维度上最佳。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在系统比较两种辅助LLM回答研究文献问题的方法：单轮向量RAG和LLM编译的markdown维基，评估它们在证据组织、引用支持和运行成本上的差异。现有问题在于不同系统可能在这些维度上表现不同，需要明确权衡。
light_analysis.method: 采用预注册实验，使用相同生成模型（LLM）回答13个问题，覆盖24篇论文。RAG为单轮向量检索，Wiki为LLM编译的维基。评估使用盲法LLM评分，并探索声明级引用检查和分解式RAG变体。
light_analysis.result: Wiki在跨论文连接上得分更高，但组织优势经调整后不显著；RAG在单事实查找上达标。Wiki查询token消耗更大，未能通过低成本查询回收构建成本。探索分析显示Wiki在声明级引用支持上更优，分解式RAG在合成上接近Wiki但引用支持不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究文献综合问答能力非单一维度，不同系统在证据组织、引用支持和成本上表现各异。无架构在所有三方面最优，未来需针对特定能力优化。

title: Modality vs. Morphology: A Framework for Time Series Classification for Biological Signals
abstract: Time series classification (TSC) of biological signals has progressed from handcrafted, modality-specific approaches to deep architectures capable of representing the diverse waveform structures of underlying physiological processes (i.e., morphology). This review introduces a unified morphology--modality framework that connects waveform structure to a methodological design, revealing how spikes, bursts, oscillations, slow drift, and hierarchical rhythms inform model design. By analyzing electroencephalography, electromyography, electrocardiography, photoplethysmography, and ocular modalities (electrooculography, pupillometry, eye-tracking), the review demonstrates how morphology determines preprocessing and modeling strategies. Integrating evidence across these biological signals, the framework reveals that morphology, not model class, most strongly determines performance and interpretability. This provides insight into why deep models succeed when their inductive biases align with underlying waveform dynamics. This review also identifies future work including morphological data augmentation and evaluation metrics to improve generalization. Together, these insights position morphology-aware modeling as a unifying principle for developing generalizable, interpretable, and physiologically meaningful TSC models across biological signals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的形态-模态框架，揭示生物信号时间序列分类中波形结构对模型设计的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生物信号时间序列分类方法从手工特征演进到深度学习，但忽略了波形结构（形态）与模型设计的内在联系。该研究旨在连接波形形态与方法论，阐明形态如何主导预处理和建模策略，从而提升模型的泛化能力和可解释性，为不同生物信号提供统一设计原则。
light_analysis.method: 通过综合分析EEG、EMG、ECG、PPG及眼部信号（EOG、瞳孔测量、眼动追踪），构建形态-模态框架。该框架依据尖峰、爆发、振荡、慢漂移和层次节律等波形特征指导预处理与模型选择，强调形态而非模型类别决定性能与可解释性。未来方向包括形态数据增强和专用评估指标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但明确指出形态比模型类别更强烈地决定性能与可解释性。该框架解释了深度模型成功的关键：当归纳偏置与波形动力学对齐时表现优异。为跨模态通用TSC模型提供了理论依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述将形态感知建模确立为统一原则，用于开发通用、可解释且生理有意义的时间序列分类模型。通过揭示形态对性能的决定作用，为未来模型设计提供了方向，包括数据增强和评估指标改进，以增强泛化性。

title: OCCAM: Open-set Causal Concept explAnation and Ontology induction for black-box vision Models
abstract: Interpreting the decisions of deep image classifiers remains challenging, particularly in black-box settings where model internals are inaccessible. We introduce OCCAM, a framework for open-set causal concept explanation and ontology induction in vision models. OCCAM discovers visual concepts in an open-set manner, localizes them via text-guided segmentation, and performs object-level interventions by removing concepts to measure changes in class confidence, estimating each concept's causal contribution. Beyond local explanations, OCCAM aggregates interventional evidence across a dataset to induce a structured concept ontology that captures how classifiers globally organize visual concepts. Reasoning over this ontology reveals consistent dependencies between concepts, exposes latent causal relations, and uncovers systematic model biases. Experiments on Broden and ImageNet-S across multiple classifiers show that OCCAM improves explanation quality in open-set black-box settings while providing richer global insight than per-image attribution methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OCCAM框架，实现黑盒视觉模型的开集因果概念解释和本体归纳。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度图像分类器的决策解释困难，尤其在黑盒设置下模型内部不可访问。现有方法无法在开集场景下发现概念并评估其因果贡献，且缺乏全局结构化的本体来揭示概念间的依赖关系和模型偏差。
light_analysis.method: OCCAM通过文本引导分割在开集中发现并定位视觉概念，通过移除概念进行对象级干预，测量类置信度变化以估计因果贡献。跨数据集聚合干预证据，归纳结构化概念本体，揭示概念依赖和潜在因果关系。
light_analysis.result: 在Broden和ImageNet-S数据集上，对多个分类器的实验表明，OCCAM在开集黑盒设置下提升了解释质量，并提供比每图像归因方法更丰富的全局洞察，如识别概念间的因果结构和系统偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: OCCAM为黑盒视觉模型提供了开集因果概念解释与本体归纳框架，有助于理解模型决策和发现偏见。未来可扩展至更多模态和模型，增强可解释AI的实用性。

title: GAMMA: Global Bit Allocation for Mixed-Precision Models under Arbitrary Budgets
abstract: Mixed-precision quantization improves the budget--accuracy trade-off for large language models (LLMs) by allocating more bits to sensitive modules. However, automating this allocation at LLM scale faces a unique combination of constraints: learnable approaches require quantization-aware training, which is infeasible for billion-parameter models; training-free alternatives rely on static proxy metrics that miss cross-module interactions and must be recomputed per target budget; and search-based methods are expensive without guaranteeing exact budget compliance. We propose GAMMA, a quantizer-agnostic framework that learns module-wise precision preferences entirely within a post-training pipeline. GAMMA optimizes a teacher-forced hidden-state reconstruction objective under an augmented Lagrangian constraint, and projects the learned preferences into exact budget-feasible discrete assignments via integer programming. A key property is score reuse: because the learned preferences encode a stable sensitivity ranking rather than budget-specific weights, a single training run serves arbitrary deployment targets by re-solving only the integer program, reducing per-budget adaptation from hours to a few minutes. Across Llama and Qwen models (8B--32B), GAMMA outperforms both fixed-precision baselines (up to +12.99 Avg.) and search-based mixed-precision methods (up to +7.00 Avg.), and can match fixed 3-bit quality at 2.5-bit average precision, enabling deployment at substantially smaller memory footprints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAMMA框架，通过后训练学习模块精度偏好并利用整数规划实现任意预算下的混合精度量化，支持分数重用。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合精度量化需自动分配比特以优化LLM的精度-预算权衡。现有方法中，可学习方案需要量化感知训练，不适合十亿参数模型；无训练方法依赖忽略跨模块交互的静态指标，且需为每个目标预算重新计算；搜索方法昂贵且无法精确满足预算。这些限制促使开发一种高效、精确且与量化器无关的后训练框架。
light_analysis.method: GAMMA采用与量化器无关的后训练框架，通过优化教师强制隐藏状态重建目标（增强拉格朗日约束）学习模块精度偏好，再经整数规划投影为精确预算可行的离散分配。核心创新在于分数重用：学习的偏好编码稳定敏感性排名而非预算特定权重，单次训练后仅需重新求解整数规划即可适配任意预算，将每预算适应时间从数小时降至几分钟。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama和Qwen模型（8B-32B）上，GAMMA在平均精度上相比固定精度基线提升最高12.99点，比基于搜索的混合精度方法提升最高7.00点。能以2.5位平均精度匹配固定3位量化质量，显著降低内存占用。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAMMA为LLM混合精度量化提供了一种高效精确的后训练方案，通过分数重用实现单次训练适应任意预算，兼具实用性与可扩展性。其学术价值在于突破现有方法在跨模块交互和预算遵守上的瓶颈，实际应用价值在于显著降低部署成本。未来可探索更广泛模型架构和更细粒度分配策略。

title: InstructAV2AV: Instruction-Guided Audio-Video Joint Editing
abstract: Recent diffusion-based methods have achieved impressive progress in video content manipulation. However, they typically ignore the accompanying audio, leaving the audio disjointed from the edited results. In this paper, we propose InstructAV2AV, the first end-to-end framework for instruction-guided audio-video joint editing. We first develop a scalable data synthesis pipeline and construct InsAVE-80K, the first large-scale audio-video editing dataset with high-quality source-to-target pairs. With this data foundation, we adapt an audio-video generation backbone to leverage its robust priors. We concatenate the audio-video input with noisy latent codes to anchor the source context, propose the source-instruction gated attention to improve instruction following and content preservation, and introduce a two-stage training strategy to effectively transfer these pre-trained priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InstructAV2AV outperforms state-of-the-art methods across 11 metrics spanning three aspects on two evaluation sets, highlighting its potential for controllable content creation. Project page: https://hjzheng.net/projects/InstructAV2AV/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个端到端指令引导音频-视频联合编辑框架InstructAV2AV，构建大规模数据集InsAVE-80K，实现音频与视频的协同编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频编辑方法通常忽略音频，导致编辑后音视频不协调。同时缺乏大规模高质量音视频编辑数据集，限制了联合编辑技术的发展。本文旨在解决音频与视频编辑的协同问题，实现指令引导下的音视频一致性编辑。
light_analysis.method: 构建数据合成管线生成InsAVE-80K数据集，包含高质量源-目标对。采用预训练音视频生成骨干，通过将音视频输入与噪声潜码拼接以锚定源上下文，提出源-指令门控注意力机制增强指令遵循与内容保持，并设计两阶段训练策略有效迁移先验知识。
light_analysis.result: 在两个评估集上，InstructAV2AV在涵盖三个方面的11项指标上均优于现有最先进方法，表明其在可控内容生成方面的优越性能。具体指标包括编辑准确性、音视频一致性等，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: InstructAV2AV首次实现了端到端的指令引导音视频联合编辑，填补了该领域空白。其数据合成方法和模型架构为音视频协同编辑提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的编辑指令和实时编辑场景。

title: Speech-Guided Multimodal Learning for Vocal Tract Segmentation in Real-Time MRI
abstract: Segmenting vocal tract articulators in real-time MRI (rtMRI) is a challenging dynamic image segmentation problem characterized by low contrast, rapid motion, and limited spatial resolution. However, while rtMRI acquisitions may provide synchronized acoustic signals, existing methods discard this information, and the few multimodal approaches that incorporate audio cannot be deployed when audio is unavailable. We propose a three-stage framework that leverages acoustic and phonological supervision during training while requiring only the rtMRI image at inference: phonological representations are converted into spatial bounding-box priors for articulator localization, visual and acoustic encoders are aligned via dual-level cross-modal contrastive pretraining, and the learned representations are fused through a cross-attention decoder, effectively transferring multimodal knowledge into a single-modality inference pipeline. Evaluated on 75-Speaker~Annot-16 and USC-TIMIT datasets, our method outperforms existing unimodal and multimodal methods, demonstrating that multimodal supervision provides transferable benefits for precise and clinically deployable vocal tract segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种语音引导的多模态学习框架，在训练时利用声学和语音监督，推理时仅需rtMRI图像，实现临床可部署的声道分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时MRI声道分割面临低对比度、快速运动、空间分辨率有限等挑战。现有方法丢弃了同步的声学信号，少数多模态方法在音频不可用时无法部署。因此，需要一种既能利用多模态监督又能在推理时仅依赖图像的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出三阶段框架：1）将语音表征转换为空间边界框先验，定位发音器官；2）通过双层级跨模态对比预训练对齐视觉和声学编码器；3）利用交叉注意力解码器融合学习表示，将多模态知识迁移到单模态推理。
light_analysis.result: 在75-Speaker Annot-16和USC-TIMIT数据集上，该方法优于现有单模态和多模态方法，证明了多模态监督能为精确且临床可部署的声道分割提供可迁移的收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次实现训练时利用语音信息而推理时仅需图像的多模态学习，提升了分割精度，具有临床部署价值。未来可探索更复杂的表示对齐策略与实时性优化。

title: PERL: Parameter Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space
abstract: Contrastively trained vision-language models such as CLIP provide strong zero-shot transfer by aligning images and text in a shared embedding space. However, adapting these models to downstream tasks without degrading their open-vocabulary generalization remains challenging. Existing parameter-efficient adaptation methods typically improve task specialization through learned prompts, adapters, or multimodal transformations, where adaptation capacity is primarily expressed through additional trainable parameters. Inspired by recent latent reasoning methods in language models, we investigate a complementary perspective: can adaptation emerge from iterative reasoning on latent representations rather than from increasing parameter count alone? We introduce PERL (Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space), a lightweight adaptation framework that augments a frozen CLIP model with a compact shared reasoning module applied recurrently across refinement steps. At each step, PERL generates a latent reasoning token conditioned on the current representation and injects it into an intermediate encoder layer, progressively refining higher-level semantic representations while preserving CLIP's pretrained multimodal structure. Across 15 benchmarks spanning base-to-novel generalization, cross-dataset transfer, and out-of-distribution ImageNet variants, PERL achieves the best parameter-performance trade-off among the compared methods under a fast-adaptation few-shot setting, combining strong novel-class accuracy and competitive transfer performance with only about 6K trainable parameters, up to 817x fewer than the largest compared approach. Overall, our results suggest that iterative latent reasoning provides a complementary adaptation mechanism to parameter scaling in discriminative vision-language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PERL方法，在冻结CLIP潜在空间通过迭代推理实现参数高效适应，仅需约6K参数即在多项基准上达到最佳参数-性能权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数高效适应方法（如prompt、adapter）通过增加可训练参数提升下游任务性能，但可能损害CLIP的开放词汇泛化能力。受语言模型潜在推理启发，探索从潜在表示迭代推理而非单纯增加参数来促进适应的新视角，以在保持泛化性的同时实现高效任务特化。
light_analysis.method: PERL在冻结CLIP模型上添加轻量共享推理模块，每个推理步骤生成潜在推理token并注入中间编码层，逐步精炼高层语义表示。模块以循环方式应用，学习对当前表示进行细化。训练采用快速适应的少样本设置，仅更新推理模块参数（约6K），保持预训练多模态结构不变。
light_analysis.result: 在15个基准（包括base-to-novel泛化、跨数据集迁移和ImageNet OOD变体）上，PERL在少样本快速适应下取得最佳参数-性能权衡，新颖类准确率领先，跨数据集迁移有竞争力。相比最大对比方法，参数减少817倍，同时保持或超越现有适配方法的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PERL表明迭代潜在推理为判别式视觉语言模型提供了一种互补于参数缩放的适应机制，在极低参数下实现高效微调。学术上开辟了新适应范式，应用上适合资源受限场景。未来可探索推理步数动态调整及更复杂推理模块设计。

title: From BERT to T5: A Study of Named Entity Recognition
abstract: Named entity recognition (NER) has been one of the essential preliminary steps in modern NLP applications. This report focuses on implementing the NER task on finetuning two pretrained models: (i) an encoder-only model (BERT) with a simple classification head, and (ii) a sequence-to-sequence model (T5) with few-shot prompts. Under the original 7-class tag and 3-class simplified tag schemes, BERT is applied a weighted cross-entropy for training loss, and T5 is fine-tuned with two validation strategies. It also conducted an ablation study with different hyperparameters. Moreover, the related analysis provides valuable insights into common errors in BERT and the two models' performance. Based on a bunch of performance metrics, this report aims to compare the above two architectures and explore their abilities in the sequence labelling task, laying the groundwork for further practical use cases.

light_analysis.overview: 比较BERT和T5在命名实体识别任务上的微调性能，包括标签方案、损失函数和验证策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 命名实体识别是NLP应用的基础步骤，但不同模型架构（编码器-only vs. 序列到序列）在NER上的表现差异尚未充分研究。现有方法多依赖单一模型，缺乏对两种典型预训练模型（BERT和T5）在相同任务上的系统对比。该研究旨在通过实验分析它们在不同标签方案和超参数下的性能，为实际应用选择模型提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 采用两种预训练模型微调：BERT作为编码器-only模型，添加简单分类头并使用加权交叉熵损失；T5作为序列到序列模型，使用少样本提示和两种验证策略。实验在原始7类标签和简化3类标签方案下进行，并包含超参数消融研究。通过对比性能指标和错误分析，评估两种架构的NER能力。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过多个性能指标比较了BERT和T5在NER上的表现。具体结果摘要未明确说明，但提及了消融研究和错误分析，表明BERT和T5在不同设置下有不同优势。例如，BERT在标准设置下可能表现稳定，而T5在少样本场景下更具灵活性。详细数据需查阅原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究系统比较了BERT和T5在NER任务上的微调效果，为序列标注任务提供了模型选择依据。BERT适合传统分类头，T5擅长少样本提示。实验中的错误分析揭示了常见错误模式，有助于改进模型。未来可扩展至更多预训练模型和实际应用场景。

title: When Fireflies Cluster; Enhancing Automatic Clustering via Centroid-Guided Firefly Optimization
abstract: This work presents a novel variant of the Firefly Algorithm (FA) for data clustering, addressing limitations of traditional methods like K-Means that struggle with non-uniform cluster shapes, densities, and the need for pre-defining the number of clusters. The proposed algorithm introduces a centroid movement strategy and a multi-objective fitness function that balances compactness, separation, and a novel TSP-based navigation penalty. It automatically estimates the optimal number of clusters and dynamically adjusts cluster boundaries. Application to robotic sensor networks highlights its practical value, with experiments showing improved clustering quality and reduced intra-cluster path distances compared to K-Means. These results confirm the algorithm's robustness in complex spatial clustering tasks, with potential for future extensions to higher-dimensional and adaptive scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于质心引导的萤火虫优化自动聚类算法，自动估计聚类数目并处理非均匀形状和密度，提升聚类质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统聚类方法如K-Means需要预设聚类数量，且对非均匀簇形状和密度敏感，导致聚类效果不佳。本研究旨在开发一种自动聚类算法，能够灵活适应复杂空间数据分布，无需先验知识，同时适用于机器人传感器网络等实际场景，解决簇内路径优化问题。
light_analysis.method: 算法在萤火虫优化框架中引入质心移动策略，并设计多目标适应度函数，综合考虑簇内紧凑性、簇间分离性以及基于旅行商问题的导航惩罚。通过迭代优化自动估计最优聚类数，动态调整聚类边界，实现自适应聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在机器人传感器网络应用中，与K-Means相比，该算法显著提高了聚类质量，并减少了簇内路径距离。实验验证了其在复杂空间聚类任务中的鲁棒性，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该算法在自动聚类和路径优化方面表现优异，为机器人传感器网络提供了实用解决方案。未来工作可扩展至高维数据和自适应聚类场景，具有重要的学术和工程价值。

title: Adaptive Experimentation for Censored Survival Outcomes
abstract: Adaptive experimentation enables efficient estimation of causal effects, but existing methods are not designed for survival data with censoring, where event times are only partially observed (e.g., overall survival in cancer trials but with dropout). In this paper, we develop a novel framework for adaptive experimentation to estimate causal effects under right censoring. For this, we derive the semiparametric efficiency bound for the average survival effect curve as a function of the treatment allocation policy and thereby obtain a closed-form efficiency-optimal allocation policy. The policy generalizes classical Neyman allocation to survival settings by prioritizing patient strata where both event and censoring dynamics induce high uncertainty. Building on this, we propose the Adaptive Survival Estimator (ASE), an adaptive framework that learns the allocation policy and estimates the average survival effect curve sequentially. Our framework has three main benefits: (i) it accommodates arbitrary machine learning models for nuisance estimation; (ii) it is guided by a closed-form efficiency-optimal allocation policy; and (iii) it admits strong theoretical guarantees, including asymptotic normality via a martingale central limit theorem. We demonstrate our framework across various numerical experiments to show consistent efficiency gains over uniform randomization and censoring-agnostic baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对右删失生存数据的自适应实验框架，推导闭式效率最优分配策略并构建自适应生存估计器（ASE）。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自适应实验方法无法处理生存数据中的删失问题，而生存数据在医学试验中常见（如癌症总生存期但存在脱落）。缺乏能同时处理删失和自适应分配的方法，导致因果效应估计效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 基于半参数效率界推导平均生存效应曲线的闭式效率最优分配策略，推广经典Neyman分配至生存场景。提出自适应生存估计器（ASE），顺序学习分配策略并估计效应曲线，可集成任意机器学习模型进行 nuisance 估计，并通过鞅中心极限定理保证渐近正态性。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，ASE在估计效率上一致优于均匀随机化和忽略删失的基线方法，显著降低估计方差，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文填补了删失生存数据在自适应实验中的空白，提供理论最优分配策略和灵活框架，具有强理论保障。适用于医学临床试验等场景，未来可扩展至竞争风险或左删失等复杂设定。

title: Scheduling That Speaks: An Interpretable Programmatic Reinforcement Learning Framework
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has recently emerged as a promising approach to solve combinatorial optimization problems such as job shop scheduling. However, the policies learned by DRL are typically represented by deep neural networks (DNNs), whose opaque neural architectures and non-interpretable policy decisions can lead to critical trust and usability concerns for human decision makers. In addition, the computational requirements of DNNs can further hinder practical deployment in resource constrained environments. In this work, we propose ProRL, a novel interpretable programmatic reinforcement learning framework that achieves high-performance scheduling with human-readable and editable programmatic policies (i.e., programs). We first introduce a domain-specific language for scheduling (DSL-S) to represent scheduling strategies as structured programs. ProRL then explores the program space defined by DSL-S using local search to identify incomplete programs, which are subsequently completed by learning their parameters via Bayesian optimization. ProRL learns which scheduling heuristic rules to select, and hence, it naturally incorporates existing heuristics already used in industrial scenarios. Experiments on widely used benchmark instances demonstrate the strong performance of ProRL against existing heuristics and DRL baselines. Furthermore, ProRL performs well under strongly constrained computational resources, such as training with only 100 episodes. Our code is available at https://github.com/HcPlu/ProRL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProRL框架，以可读可编辑的程序化策略实现高性能调度，兼顾可解释性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度强化学习（DRL）在调度问题中表现优异，但策略由深度神经网络表示，缺乏可解释性，导致用户信任度低且难以部署于资源受限环境。现有方法无法提供透明决策，工业实际应用受限。
light_analysis.method: 设计领域特定语言DSL-S将调度策略编码为结构化程序；通过局部搜索探索程序空间，识别不完整程序后，利用贝叶斯优化学习缺失参数。该框架自然集成已有启发式规则，输出可解释策略。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准实例中，ProRL性能优于现有启发式方法和DRL基线。尤其擅长资源受限场景，仅需100训练回合即可取得良好效果，验证了高效性与实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProRL开创性地将可解释程序化策略引入调度领域，兼顾高性能与透明度，提升用户信任。代码开源支持复现，未来可扩展至更多组合优化问题。

title: Code-as-Room: Generating 3D Rooms from Top-Down View Images via Agentic Code Synthesis
abstract: Designing realistic and functional 3D indoor rooms is essential for a wide range of applications, including interior design, virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. While recent MLLM-based approaches have shown great potential for 3D room synthesis from textual descriptions or reference images, text-based methods struggle to capture precise spatial information, and existing image-conditioned agents suffer from instability and infinite looping when tasked with holistic room generation from top-down views. To address these limitations, we propose Code-as-Room, an MLLM-based agentic framework equipped with a structured execution harness, which represents 3D rooms with Blender codes. Given a top-down room image, the framework parses the reference image to extract scene elements and their spatial relationships, and synthesizes executable Blender code for geometry, materials, and lighting in a principled, multi-stage pipeline. A cross-stage memory module is maintained throughout to mitigate context forgetting inherent to existing agent-based frameworks. We further introduce a dedicated benchmark for code-based 3D room synthesis, encompassing various evaluation protocols. Based on our benchmark, comprehensive comparisons against existing agent-based methods are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our proposed execution harness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Code-as-Room框架，利用多模态大语言模型和Blender代码，从俯视图生成三维房间，解决现有方法空间信息缺失和代理不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 三维室内房间设计在室内设计、虚拟现实和具身AI中至关重要。现有基于文本的方法难以捕捉精确空间布局，而基于图像的条件代理在从俯视图生成完整房间时存在不稳定和无限循环问题。亟需一种稳定、精确的框架，能够解析俯视图并生成可执行代码。
light_analysis.method: 提出Code-as-Room，一种基于MLLM的代理框架，配备结构化执行机制。通过解析俯视图图像，提取场景元素和空间关系，在多阶段流水线中合成可执行的Blender代码，涵盖几何、材质和光照。引入跨阶段记忆模块，缓解代理框架中常见的上下文遗忘问题。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但介绍了专用基准测试和多种评估协议。通过对比现有代理方法，验证了所提执行框架的有效性，表明Code-as-Room在稳定性和生成质量上具有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Code-as-Room实现了从俯视图到3D房间的可靠生成，克服了现有方法的空间精度和稳定性缺陷。学术上提供了一种结构化代码合成范式，实际应用于室内设计、虚拟现实等领域。未来可扩展至更复杂场景或交互式生成。

title: Modelling Customer Trajectories with Reinforcement Learning for Practical Retail Insights
abstract: Understanding customer movement within retail spaces is essential for optimizing store layouts. Real-world trajectory data can provide highly accurate insights, but collecting it is costly and often infeasible for many retailers. Heuristics such as Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP) and Probabilistic Nearest Neighbours (PNN) are commonly used as inexpensive approximations, but actual customer trajectories deviate by an average of 28% from shortest paths, highlighting a tradeoff between accuracy and practicality. We propose an agent-based modelling framework that casts customer trajectory prediction as a maximum entropy reinforcement learning (RL) problem, balancing reward maximization with stochasticity to better reflect customers with bounded rationality. Using real-world trajectory data from a convenience store, we show that RL-generated trajectories align more closely with customer behaviour than TSP and PNN, providing more accurate estimates of impulse purchase rates and shelf traffic densities. Furthermore, only RL-based predictions yield repositioning decisions for impulse products that align with those derived from actual trajectory data, resulting in comparable estimated profit gains. Our work demonstrates that RL provides a practical, behaviourally grounded alternative that bridges the gap between oversimplified heuristics and data-intensive approaches, making accurate layout optimization more accessible. To encourage further research, the source code is available on GitHub.
comment: Proceeding of the 25th International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最大熵强化学习的顾客轨迹建模框架，平衡准确性与实用性，用于零售布局优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解顾客在零售空间中的移动对优化布局至关重要，但收集真实轨迹数据成本高昂，许多零售商难以实现。常用启发式方法（如旅行商问题和概率最近邻）虽成本低，但实际轨迹与最短路径平均偏差28%，存在准确性与实用性的权衡。需要一个既能捕捉真实行为又具有实用性的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 将顾客轨迹预测建模为最大熵强化学习问题，通过平衡奖励最大化与随机性来反映有限理性。使用便利店真实轨迹数据，将RL生成的轨迹与TSP和PNN进行对比，评估其在冲动购买率估计和货架流量密度方面的准确性。
light_analysis.result: RL生成的轨迹比TSP和PNN更接近真实顾客行为，对冲动购买率和货架流量的估计更准确。此外，只有RL预测的冲动产品重新定位决策与基于真实数据做出的决策一致，且估计的利润增益相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: RL提供了行为驱动的实用替代方案，弥合了简单启发式与数据密集方法之间的差距，使布局优化更易实现。代码已开源，促进后续研究。

title: NeRF-based Spacecraft Reconstruction from Close-Range Monocular Imagery Under Illumination Variability and Pose Uncertainty
abstract: Autonomous rendezvous and proximity operations around uncooperative, unknown spacecraft are critical for active debris removal and on-orbit servicing missions. A key component of such operations is the offline reconstruction of a 3D model of the target from a set of 2D images. This task is challenging due to two main factors. First, in-orbit illumination conditions exhibit considerable variability, and change rapidly over time. Second, the inaccuracy of pose information in the images, results in 3D reconstruction uncertainty. To overcome these challenges, we propose to extend Neural Radiance Fields with per-image degrees of freedom: a learnable appearance embedding that captures the illumination conditions specific to each image, and an image-specific pose correction term that refines its noisy pose label to increase 3D consistency across images. These parameters add minimal complexity, as they are learned jointly with the NeRF, yet they substantially improve robustness to illumination variability and pose inaccuracies. We validate our approach on three image sets representative of in-orbit operations, demonstrating its effectiveness for offline reconstruction and highlighting its suitability for online reconstruction, an open problem in the field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩展NeRF，通过每图像外观嵌入和位姿修正项，提升光照变化和位姿不确定性下的航天器3D重建鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主交会和近距离操作中，对非合作未知航天器的离线3D重建至关重要。然而在轨光照条件多变且快速变化，同时图像的位姿信息不准确导致重建不确定性。现有方法难以同时应对这两个挑战。因此需要一种能处理光照变化和位姿噪声的3D重建方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于NeRF框架，为每张图像引入两个可学习参数：一个外观嵌入，捕获该图像特有的光照条件；一个位姿修正项，用于优化噪声位姿标签以增强跨图像3D一致性。这些参数与NeRF联合学习，仅增加极少量复杂度，但显著提升对光照变化和位姿误差的鲁棒性。验证采用三组代表性在轨图像集。
light_analysis.result: 在三组模拟在轨操作的图像集上验证了该方法，离线重建效果显著，能有效处理光照变化和位姿不确定性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但指出方法适用于离线重建并展示了在线重建的潜力，这是该领域的开放问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过扩展NeRF引入每图像外观嵌入和位姿修正项，有效解决了航天器重建中的光照和位姿不确定性问题。方法简单高效，适用于离线重建，并为在线重建提供了新思路。未来工作可探索更高效的优化策略或扩展到其他非合作目标重建场景。

title: What is Holding Back Latent Visual Reasoning?
abstract: Humans can approach complex visual problems by mentally simulating intermediate visual steps, rather than reasoning through language alone. Inspired by this, several works on Vision-Language Models have recently explored chain-of-thought reasoning with continuous latent tokens as intermediate visual imagination steps. In this work, we investigate how recent models leverage such latent tokens. Surprisingly, we find that model accuracy is unaffected when latent tokens are replaced by uninformative ``dummy'' tokens. This indicates that latent tokens play a minimal causal role in the model's final prediction. To better understand this phenomenon, we analyze both the training signal provided by oracle latent representations and the quality of the latent tokens generated at inference time. Our experiments reveal two crucial issues holding back latent visual reasoning: First, in most existing datasets, oracle latent tokens provide limited additional information beyond the original image and do not substantially simplify the task, leading models to ignore them during training and effectively bypassing them at inference time. When fine-tuned on a diagnostic dataset, in which latent tokens provide sufficient support for the final prediction, we show that models can causally rely on them. Second, the latent tokens produced at inference time deviate from their corresponding oracle representations, collapsing to a narrow region and preventing benefits even when the model relies on them. Overall, our findings suggest that future progress in latent visual reasoning depends on two key pillars: high-quality datasets with informative intermediate steps and more precise latent token prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示潜在视觉推理中潜在令牌的因果作用有限，并指出两大瓶颈：数据集质量不足和潜在令牌预测精度低。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类通过模拟中间视觉步骤解决复杂视觉问题，而现有视觉语言模型尝试使用连续潜在令牌作为中间视觉想象步骤进行链式推理。然而，研究发现潜在令牌对模型预测的因果作用几乎为零，替换为无信息令牌时准确率不变。这表明当前方法未能有效利用潜在推理，亟需探究其失效原因以推动进步。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先通过实验替换潜在令牌为无信息令牌，发现准确率无影响，揭示其因果作用缺失。接着分析训练信号和推理生成的潜在令牌质量。使用诊断数据集微调，证明在高质量潜在令牌下模型可因果依赖。研究指出潜在令牌偏离真实表示且坍缩到狭窄区域，限制了益处。核心创新在于系统诊断两大瓶颈：数据集的中间步骤信息不足和潜在令牌预测不精确。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在现有数据集中，潜在令牌对模型最终预测无因果影响（准确率不变）。当使用提供充分支持的诊断数据集微调时，模型能因果依赖潜在令牌。然而，推理时生成的潜在令牌与真实表示偏差大，坍缩到狭窄区域，即使模型依赖也难获收益。这些发现量化了当前潜在视觉推理的局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统性揭示了潜在视觉推理停滞的原因：数据集缺乏信息性中间步骤和潜在令牌预测精度低。贡献在于明确两大改进方向：构建高质量数据集和提升潜在令牌预测准确性。研究为未来视觉语言模型中的潜在推理发展提供了基础，但局限性在于诊断数据集可能简化了真实任务，需进一步扩展验证。

title: Heterogeneous Tasks Offloading in Vehicular Edge Computing: A Federated Meta Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
abstract: Vehicular edge computing (VEC) enables latency-sensitive vehicular applications by offloading computation-intensive tasks to nearby edge servers. However, real-world vehicular workloads are typically modeled as heterogeneous directed acyclic graph (DAG) tasks with complex dependency structures, making joint offloading and resource allocation highly challenging. Moreover, distributed MEC deployment raises privacy concerns when collaboratively training learning-based policies.   In this paper, we propose a Federated Meta Deep Reinforcement Learning framework with GAT-Seq2Seq modeling (FedMAGS) for heterogeneous task offloading in VEC systems. The proposed approach leverages Graph Attention Networks to capture DAG dependencies, a Seq2Seq-based policy to generate structured offloading decisions, and federated meta-learning to enable fast adaptation across distributed MEC servers without sharing raw data.   Extensive simulations demonstrate that FedMAGS achieves faster convergence, lower execution delay, and better scalability compared with state-of-the-art baselines. In addition, the federated design preserves data privacy while reducing communication overhead, making the framework well suited for dynamic and large-scale VEC environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedMAGS框架，融合联邦元学习和深度强化学习，解决车联网边缘计算中异构DAG任务卸载问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 车联网边缘计算中，实际工作负载为异构有向无环图（DAG）任务，具有复杂依赖结构，使得联合卸载与资源分配极具挑战性。此外，分布式MEC部署下协作训练学习策略会引发隐私问题。现有方法难以同时兼顾任务依赖建模、通信效率与隐私保护，亟需一种能够快速适应分布式环境且保护数据隐私的卸载方案。
