light_analysis.method: FedMAGS框架采用图注意力网络（GAT）捕获DAG任务依赖，基于Seq2Seq的策略网络生成结构化的卸载决策，同时引入联邦元学习，使分布式MEC服务器在不共享原始数据的前提下快速适应本地任务分布。该方法将任务卸载建模为序列决策问题，利用元学习初始化模型参数，结合联邦学习协同更新，兼顾通信效率与隐私保护。
light_analysis.result: 仿真结果表明，FedMAGS相比现有基线方法实现更快的收敛速度、更低的执行延迟以及更好的可扩展性。联邦设计在保护数据隐私的同时降低了通信开销，使得框架适用于动态大规模VEC环境。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性结果清晰展示了优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedMAGS为VEC中异构任务卸载提供了隐私保护、高效协作的解决方案，兼顾性能与适应性。其学术价值在于将图神经网络、序列模型与联邦元学习系统结合，实际可部署于智能交通系统。未来可探索更复杂的任务模型或异构边缘节点下的自适应机制。

title: A Dataset for the Recognition of Historical and Handwritten Music Scores in Western Notation
abstract: A large amount of musical heritage has been digitised by memory institutions: libraries, museums, and archives. Nevertheless, the field of Optical Music Recognition (OMR) has struggled with making this music machine-readable, despite advances in deep learning, mostly because no datasets for training systems in realistic conditions were available. The MusiCorpus dataset aims to remedy this situation by providing 1,309 pages of historical sheet music, primarily handwritten, with MusicXML transcriptions and symbol annotations. It is the largest dataset of handwritten music to date and the first dataset containing a realistic and representative sample of musical document collections from memory institutions, suitable for training and evaluating both end-to-end and object detection-based OMR systems and comparing their performance.

light_analysis.overview: 介绍MusiCorpus数据集，提供1309页历史手写乐谱的MusicXML转录和符号注释，旨在推动光学音乐识别（OMR）在真实条件下的发展。
light_analysis.motivation: 大量数字化音乐遗产因缺乏真实条件下的训练数据而难以实现机器可读，现有OMR系统无法有效处理手写乐谱。该问题对文化遗产数字化保护至关重要，但此前无代表性数据集支持系统训练与评估。
light_analysis.method: 构建MusiCorpus数据集，包含1309页来自记忆机构的真实历史乐谱（主要为手写），并配有MusicXML转录和符号级注释。该数据集同时支持端到端OMR系统和基于目标检测的OMR系统的训练与性能对比。
light_analysis.result: MusiCorpus是当前最大的手写音乐数据集（1309页），也是首个包含真实代表性样本的数据集。它能够有效训练和评估不同OMR方法，并比较其性能，但摘要未提供具体识别精度等指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集填补了OMR领域真实训练数据的空白，有望促进手写乐谱识别研究，助力文化遗产数字化。未来可能扩展数据规模或覆盖更多音乐符号类型。

title: Seeing Together:Multi-Robot Cooperative Egocentric Spatial Reasoning with Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made substantial progress in egocentric video understanding, but their ability to reason cooperatively from multiple embodied viewpoints remains largely unexplored. We study this problem through multi-robot cooperative dynamic spatial reasoning, where a model must answer spatial, temporal, visibility, and coordination questions by integrating synchronized egocentric videos from a team of moving robots. To support this setting, we introduce CoopSR, the first benchmark for this task, together with EgoTeam, a multi-robot egocentric QA dataset. EgoTeam contains 114,227 QA pairs spanning 19 question types, four difficulty tiers, and three team sizes in Habitat and iGibson, along with a real-world test set of around 2,326 QAs collected using two quadruped robots. We further propose SP-CoR (Spectral and Physics-Informed Cooperative Reasoner), an MLLM framework for fine-grained cooperative spatial reasoning. SP-CoR combines dynamics-aware multi-robot frame sampling, spectral- and physics-guided view fusion, and physics-aligned prompt distillation, enabling the model to benefit from privileged robot-pose supervision during training while requiring only egocentric videos at test time. Across 22 MLLM baselines, SP-CoR consistently improves cooperative reasoning, outperforming the strongest fine-tuned baseline by +3.87% on Habitat and +7.12% on iGibson. It also shows stronger generalization to unseen team sizes and real-world robot tests. Code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/seeing-together.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多机器人协作空间推理基准CoopSR与SP-CoR框架，利用多模态大模型实现精细化的协作空间推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在自我中心视频理解上显著进步，但多机器人协作空间推理尚未被探索。该任务需要整合多个移动机器人的同步自我中心视频，回答空间、时间、可见性和协调等问题。现有方法缺乏相关基准和数据集，难以评估和推动该方向的发展。因此，构建基准和提出有效方法具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SP-CoR框架，包含动力学感知多机器人帧采样、频谱和物理引导视图融合以及物理对齐提示蒸馏。训练时利用特权机器人位姿监督，测试时仅需自我中心视频。使用Habitat和iGibson合成环境生成EgoTeam数据集（114,227个问答对，19种问题类型，四个难度级别和三种团队规模），并收集真实世界四足机器人数据（约2,326个问答对）。
light_analysis.result: 在22个多模态大语言模型基线上，SP-CoR一致提升协作推理性能，在Habitat上比最强微调基线高出3.87%，在iGibson上高出7.12%。此外，该方法在未见过的团队规模和真实世界机器人测试中展现出更强的泛化能力，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个多机器人协作动态空间推理基准CoopSR和数据集EgoTeam，以及SP-CoR框架。SP-CoR通过多视角融合和物理知识蒸馏，显著提升了协作推理能力。该研究具有重要的学术价值，为多机器人协同感知和推理提供了新范式，实际应用中可帮助机器人团队在复杂环境中协同导航和操作。未来可探索更高效的视图融合策略。

title: Text2CAD-Bench: A Benchmark for LLM-based Text-to-Parametric CAD Generation
abstract: Text-to-CAD generation aims to create parametric CAD models from natural language, enabling rapid prototyping and intuitive design workflows. However, existing benchmarks focus on basic primitives and simple sketch-extrude sequences, lacking advanced features essential for real-world applications and covering only traditional mechanical parts. We introduce Text2CAD-Bench, the first benchmark systematically evaluating text-to-CAD across geometric complexity and application diversity. Our benchmark comprises 600 human-curated examples spanning four levels: L1-L2 cover fundamental geometry with standard features, L3 introduces complex topology and freeform surfaces, and L4 extends to real-world domains beyond mechanical parts. Each example pairs dual-style prompts -- geometric descriptions mimicking non-expert users, and procedural sequences aligned with expert-level conventions. Evaluating mainstream general LLMs and domain-specific models, we find that current models perform reasonably on basic geometry but degrade substantially on complex topology and advanced features. We release our benchmark to drive progress in text-to-CAD research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Text2CAD-Bench，首个系统评估文本到CAD生成在几何复杂性和应用多样性的基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到CAD基准仅覆盖基本几何和简单草图-拉伸序列，缺乏高级特征，且局限于传统机械零件，无法满足真实世界对复杂拓扑和多样化应用的需求。因此需要建立一个全面评估的基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建600个人工筛选的示例，分为四个级别：L1-L2覆盖基本几何，L3引入复杂拓扑和自由曲面，L4扩展到机械零件之外的领域。每个示例配备双风格提示：几何描述（模拟非专家用户）和程序化序列（对应专家习惯）。评估了通用大语言模型和领域特定模型。
light_analysis.result: 当前模型在基本几何任务上表现合理，但在复杂拓扑和高级特征上性能显著下降，表明现有方法在泛化到复杂场景时存在明显不足。具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Text2CAD-Bench为文本到CAD研究提供了标准化评估平台，揭示了现有模型在复杂几何和多样化应用上的局限性，有助于推动该领域发展。未来可基于此基准开发更鲁棒的生成方法。

title: Generative Adversarial Learning from Deterministic Processes
abstract: Physical AI is being successfully applied to data which does not follow the traditional paradigm of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) samples. In fact, physical AI is often trained on data which is not random at all, and is instead derived from chaotic dynamical systems like turbulence.   We aim to explain the empirical success of these methods using the example of generative adversarial networks (GANs), whose statistical learning theory under the i.i.d. assumption is generally well understood. We prove that it is possible, using an infinite-dimensional model of generative adversarial learning (GAL), to learn the invariant distribution of a sufficiently chaotic dynamical system from a single deterministically evolving time series of its states or measurements thereof, and give explicit rates for the convergence to the solution in terms of the Jensen-Shannon divergence.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了生成对抗网络能从单个确定性混沌时间序列中学习系统的不变分布，并给出基于Jensen-Shannon散度的收敛率。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理AI常训练于非随机数据（如湍流等混沌动力系统），但传统统计学习理论基于i.i.d.假设，缺乏对非i.i.d.数据上成功经验的理论解释。该研究以生成对抗网络为例，旨在阐明其成功的内在原理。
light_analysis.method: 采用无限维生成对抗学习（GAL）模型，从单个确定性演化时间序列（系统状态或测量）中学习混沌动力系统的不变分布；理论分析证明了该方法的可行性，并显式给出了在Jensen-Shannon散度意义下的收敛速度。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了从单条确定性时序中学习不变分布是可能的，并给出了明确的收敛率（以Jensen-Shannon散度衡量）。摘要未报告具体数值实验，侧重于理论证明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为物理AI在非i.i.d.数据上的成功提供了理论基础，特别是GAN在混沌系统中的应用。该工作拓展了生成模型的学习范式，未来可推广至其他非i.i.d.场景和生成模型。

title: EvoMemBench: Benchmarking Agent Memory from a Self-Evolving Perspective
abstract: Recent benchmarks for Large Language Model (LLM) agents mainly evaluate reasoning, planning, and execution. However, memory is also essential for agents, as it enables them to store, update, and retrieve information over time. This ability remains under-evaluated, largely because existing benchmarks do not provide a systematic way to assess memory mechanisms. In this paper, we study agent memory from a self-evolving perspective and introduce EvoMemBench, a unified benchmark organized along two axes: memory scope (in-episode vs. cross-episode) and memory content (knowledge-oriented vs. execution-oriented). We compare 15 representative memory methods with strong long-context baselines under a standardized protocol. Results show that current memory systems are still far from a general solution: long-context baselines remain highly competitive, memory helps most when the current context is insufficient or tasks are difficult, and no single memory form works consistently across all settings. Retrieval-based methods remain strong for knowledge-intensive settings, whereas procedural and long-term memory methods are more effective for execution-oriented tasks when their stored experience matches the task structure. We hope EvoMemBench facilitates future research on more effective memory systems for LLM-based agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/DSAIL-Memory/EvoMemBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoMemBench基准，从自我进化角度系统评估LLM代理的记忆能力，揭示现有记忆方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM代理基准主要评估推理、规划和执行，但记忆能力对代理至关重要，却缺乏系统评估方法。现有基准无法有效评估记忆机制，因此需要建立一个统一的基准来全面评估记忆系统。
light_analysis.method: EvoMemBench沿记忆范围（情节内 vs 跨情节）和记忆内容（知识导向 vs 执行导向）两个轴组织。比较了15种代表性记忆方法和强长上下文基线，采用标准化协议。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 当前记忆系统远非通用解决方案；长上下文基线仍具竞争力；记忆在上下文不足或任务困难时最有帮助；没有单一记忆形式在所有设置中一致有效。检索方法在知识密集型设置中强，而过程性和长期记忆方法在执行导向任务中更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoMemBench为评估LLM代理记忆提供了系统基准，揭示了现有方法的不足，有助于未来研究更有效的记忆系统。摘要未明确说明局限性，可推断基准覆盖范围有限，未来可扩展。

title: Geometry-Aware Uncertainty Coresets for Robust Visual In-Context Learning in Histopathology
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can couple visual perception with open-ended clinical reasoning, making them attractive for computational histopathology. However, fine-tuning billions of parameters on scarce, expert-annotated pathology data is prohibitive, while in-context learning (ICL), which conditions the VLM on demonstrative image-text pairs without parameter updates, suffers from high sensitivity to which examples are selected and how the query is phrased, producing unreliable diagnostics. Existing selection strategies rely on query-dependent nearest-neighbour retrieval that ignores global data structure, require costly parameter updates, or disregard the joint vision-text embedding geometry of VLMs. We propose GAUC, a training-free coreset selection method operating directly in the pre-trained multimodal embedding space. GAUC jointly optimises three objectives: (1) a Maximum Mean Discrepancy term enforcing distributional fidelity between coreset and full dataset, (2) an Effective Mutual Information Difference regulariser bounding performance degradation under prompt paraphrases by exploiting the VLM's joint vision-text alignment, and (3) a predictive-variance penalty suppressing overconfident, unstable outputs. On CRC-100K and MHIST across multiple open-source VLM architectures, GAUC consistently improves accuracy, calibration, and prompt robustness over recent ICL selection methods and dataset-distillation baselines, all without a single gradient update.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAUC，一种免训练的coreset选择方法，通过联合优化分布匹配、鲁棒正则化和方差抑制，提升组织病理学中视觉语言模型的上下文学习鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在计算组织病理学中潜力巨大，但微调大量参数不可行，而上下文学习对示例选择和查询措辞高度敏感，导致诊断不可靠。现有选择策略依赖查询驱动的最近邻检索，忽略全局数据分布，或需参数更新，或忽视VLM联合嵌入几何。
light_analysis.method: GAUC直接在预训练多模态嵌入空间操作，免训练。联合优化三个目标：最大均值差异项保证coreset与完整数据集分布一致；有效互信息差正则化项限制提示改写下的性能退化；预测方差惩罚项抑制过度自信不稳定输出。
light_analysis.result: 在CRC-100K和MHIST数据集上，跨越多个开源VLM架构，GAUC在准确率、校准度和提示鲁棒性方面一致优于近期ICL选择方法和数据集蒸馏基线，且无需任何梯度更新。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAUC无需参数更新即可提升VLM在组织病理学中ICL的鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。局限性可能依赖预训练嵌入空间质量，未来可探索更复杂的正则化项或扩展至其他医学影像领域。

title: Cracks in the Foundation: A Civil Infrastructure Dataset to Challenge Vision Foundation Models
abstract: Automated structural health monitoring is essential to prevent catastrophic infrastructure failures. Precise, pixel-level defect segmentation is needed to accurately assess structural integrity, but progress in defect segmentation for civil infrastructures has been held back by an extreme scarcity of data, which requires costly expert annotation. The need for data is accentuated by algorithmic hurdles intrinsic to the problem, including center-bias and the need to rely more on shape when inspecting nearly textureless building materials. To remove the bottleneck, we introduce Cracks in the Foundation (CiF), the largest and most detailed civil infrastructure (instance) segmentation dataset to date, comprising $\approx$150,000 high-resolution images meticulously curated over five years in collaboration with civil engineering experts. With the help of this unprecedented data source, we expose a blind spot of current visual AI: despite the advent of promptable Foundation Models (FMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs), and despite the impressive abilities of today's specialised segmentation models, it turns out that dense image understanding in the built environment is nowhere near solved. Our evaluations indicate that even the most recent zero-shot FMs face significant challenges when deployed on real-world infrastructure and even the performance of specialised models with domain-specific supervision plateaus at $\approx$25% mAP. CiF establishes inspection of civil infrastructure, an elementary and seemingly easy perceptual task, as an open challenge that reveals fundamental weaknesses of present-day models trained predominantly on internet images, literally and figuratively highlighting cracks in the current foundation model paradigm.

light_analysis.overview: 引入大规模基础设施缺陷分割数据集CiF，揭示现有视觉基础模型在真实场景密集理解上的根本性缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构健康监测需要精确的像素级缺陷分割，但土木基础设施领域极度缺乏大规模标注数据，且存在中心偏差、依赖形状等算法难题。现有模型主要基于互联网图像训练，在真实基础设施场景中性能不佳，亟需高质量数据集推动研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建CiF数据集，包含约15万张高分辨率图像，经5年与土木专家合作标注，提供实例分割注释。使用该数据集评估现有零样本基础模型（如SAM）和专用分割模型，对比在基础设施图像上的密集理解能力。
light_analysis.result: 最新零样本基础模型在真实基础设施上表现显著下降；有监督专用模型在领域数据上性能饱和，平均精度仅约25% mAP。CiF成为一项开放挑战，暴露了当前模型在非纹理材料形状感知和中心偏差上的根本弱点。
light_analysis.conclusion: CiF数据集揭示了现有视觉基础模型在基础设施密集理解任务上的重大盲点，证明该看似简单的感知任务远未解决。该工作为评估和推动模型在真实工程场景的能力提供了基准，未来工作需关注形状线索和域适应。

title: Historical Knowledge Graphs for Global Maritime Estimated Time of Arrival
abstract: Accurate vessel estimated-time-of-arrival forecasts are critical for port operations and decarbonization, yet global-scale travel-time prediction remains difficult without costly contextual data. Herein, I present a methodology for constructing a historical maritime knowledge graph using only Automatic Identification System (AIS) data. First, segmented trajectories are extracted from noisy AIS data using a Gaussian-mixture-model-based preprocessing pipeline. The graph is then constructed by iteratively processing the trajectories and storing speed distributions stratified by vessel type, time of travel, and direction of travel; the resulting global graph comprises 5,433 geohash-3 nodes and 12,334 edges. The graph can be queried to retrieve travel-time predictions between any two location via a hierarchical, priority-based system that uses historical statistics with principled fallback. On a temporally held-out test set, median RMSE is 22.75 min (segment-level) and 30.90 min (trajectory-level), with 69.1% of trajectories within 20% of actual arrival time. On a second external test set, median RMSE is 27.36 min (segment-level) and 37.46 min (trajectory-level), with 62.1% of trajectories within 20%. These results corroborate the promise of our method, enabling global travel-time prediction and providing a strong foundation for just-in-time arrival planning and emissions reduction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于历史海事知识图谱的全球船舶预计到达时间预测方法，仅使用AIS数据，无需昂贵上下文数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确的船舶预计到达时间预测对港口运营和脱碳至关重要，但现有全球尺度预测方法依赖昂贵的上下文数据，难以广泛应用。本文旨在仅利用广泛可用的AIS数据，构建历史知识图谱，实现低成本、可扩展的全球旅行时间预测。
light_analysis.method: 采用高斯混合模型预处理管线从噪声AIS数据中提取分段轨迹，然后迭代构建历史海事知识图谱，存储按船舶类型、时间、方向分层统计的速度分布。最终图包含5433个geohash-3节点和12334条边，通过分层优先级系统查询历史统计进行预测。
light_analysis.result: 在时间保持测试集上，段级中值RMSE为22.75分钟，轨迹级为30.90分钟，69.1%的轨迹误差在实际到达时间的20%以内。在外部测试集上，相应指标为27.36分钟、37.46分钟和62.1%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法实现了仅用AIS数据的全球船舶旅行时间预测，为准时到达规划和减排提供了坚实支撑。其无需额外上下文数据，具有较好的实用性和扩展性，未来可进一步优化预测精度与鲁棒性。

title: SkillsVote: Lifecycle Governance of Agent Skills from Collection, Recommendation to Evolution
abstract: Long-horizon LLM agents leave traces that could become reusable experience, but raw trajectories are noisy and hard to govern. We treat Agent Skills as an experience schema that couples executable scripts, with non-executable guidance on procedures. Yet open skill ecosystems contain redundant, uneven, environment-sensitive artifacts, and indiscriminate updates can pollute future context. We present SkillsVote, a lifecycle-governance framework for Agent Skills from collection and recommendation to evolution. SkillsVote profiles a million-scale open-source corpus for environment requirements, quality, and verifiability, then synthesizes tasks for verifiable skills. Before execution, SkillsVote performs agentic library search over structured skill library to expose instructional skill context. After execution, it decomposes trajectories into skill-linked subtasks, attributes outcomes to skill use, agent exploration, environment, and result signals, and admits only successful reusable discoveries to evidence-gated updates. In our evaluation, offline evolution improves GPT-5.2 on Terminal-Bench 2.0 by up to 7.9 pp, while online evolution improves SWE-Bench Pro by up to 2.6 pp. Overall, governed external skill libraries can improve frozen agents without model updates when systems control exposure, credit, and preservation.

light_analysis.overview: SkillsVote是一种针对Agent技能的全生命周期治理框架，涵盖收集、推荐到演化，通过结构化技能库和证据门控更新提升LLM agent性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 长周期LLM agent产生的轨迹包含可复用经验，但原始轨迹噪声大且难以治理。开放技能生态系统存在冗余、质量不均、环境敏感等问题，不加区分的更新会污染未来上下文，亟需系统化的生命周期治理方法。
light_analysis.method: SkillsVote首先对百万级开源技能语料进行环境需求、质量和可验证性分析，并合成可验证任务。执行前通过agentic库搜索结构化技能库提供指导上下文；执行后将轨迹分解为技能相关子任务，归因结果于技能使用、探索、环境和结果信号，仅允许成功的可重用发现通过证据门控更新。
light_analysis.result: 离线演化使GPT-5.2在Terminal-Bench 2.0上提升最多7.9个百分点，在线演化使SWE-Bench Pro提升最多2.6个百分点。受治理的外部技能库可在不更新模型的情况下改善冻结的agent性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkillsVote实现了Agent技能从收集、推荐到演化的全生命周期治理，通过可靠的质量控制和归因机制有效提升LLM agent性能，无需模型更新。未来可扩展至多agent协作场景。

title: NEWTON: Agentic Planning for Physically Grounded Video Generation
abstract: Video generation models produce visually compelling results but systematically violate physical commonsense -- on VideoPhy-2, the best model achieves only 32.6% joint accuracy. We identify a specification bottleneck: text prompts are lossy compression of the physical world, omitting the parameters that fully determine dynamics, and no amount of model scaling can recover what was never specified. From this diagnosis we derive three properties that physics conditioning must satisfy -- sufficiency, dynamism, and verifiability -- and show that no existing approach satisfies all three. We present NEWTON, in which video generation is demoted from the system output to one action inside an agent's toolbox: a learned planner orchestrates physics-aware tools (keyframe generation, scientific computation, prompt refinement) to construct rich conditioning, and a verifier closes the loop for iterative re-planning. The planner is the sole trainable component, optimized on-policy via Flow-GRPO inside the live multi-turn loop. On VideoPhy-2, NEWTON improves joint accuracy from 21.4% to 29.7% on LTX-Video and from 30.7% to 37.4% on Veo-3.1, without modifying either generator. Our project page: \href{https://Newton026.github.io/newton}{https://Newton026.github.io/newton}

light_analysis.overview: 提出NEWTON方法，将视频生成降级为智能体工具，通过规划器、物理感知工具和验证器实现符合物理规律的视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽视觉效果逼真，但系统性违反物理常识（最佳模型在VideoPhy-2上仅有32.6%的联合准确率）。原因在于文本提示是对物理世界的有损压缩，缺失决定动态的参数，模型扩展无法恢复未指定的信息。因此需要一种满足充分性、动态性和可验证性的物理条件约束方法。
light_analysis.method: NEWTON将视频生成视为智能体工具箱中的一个动作。包含可学习的规划器（唯一可训练组件）、物理感知工具（关键帧生成、科学计算、提示优化）和验证器（闭环迭代重规划）。规划器通过Flow-GRPO在实时多轮循环中进行在线策略优化，生成丰富的条件约束，无需修改底层生成器。
light_analysis.result: 在VideoPhy-2基准上，NEWTON将LTX-Video的联合准确率从21.4%提升至29.7%，将Veo-3.1的联合准确率从30.7%提升至37.4%。且无需修改任何生成器模型，证明了方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NEWTON通过智能体规划范式有效解决了视频生成中的物理常识缺失问题，验证了将生成降级为工具并配合物理感知验证的可行性。未来可扩展至更多物理模拟工具，并探索更高效的规划器训练策略。该工作为物理常识视频生成提供了新思路。

title: Vision Foundation Models as Generalist Tokenizers for Image Generation
abstract: In this work, we explore the largely unexplored direction of building a generalist image tokenizer directly on top of a frozen vision foundation model (VFM). To build this tokenizer, we utilize a frozen VFM as the encoder and introduce two key innovations: (1) a region-adaptive quantization framework to eliminate spatial redundancy in standard 2D grid features, and (2) a semantic reconstruction objective that aligns the decoded outputs with the VFM's representations to preserve semantic fidelity. Grounded in these designs, we propose VFMTok, a generalist visual tokenizer capable of operating seamlessly in both discrete and continuous latent spaces. VFMTok achieves substantial improvements in synthesis quality while drastically enhancing token efficiency. For discrete autoregressive (AR) generation, it accelerates model convergence by \textbf{3 times} and achieves a state-of-the-art gFID of \textbf{1.36} on ImageNet class-conditional synthesis. Similarly, for continuous-space generation, integrating VFMTok with a denoising model yields an exceptional gFID of \textbf{1.25}. Furthermore, because the latent space inherently captures rich spatial semantics, VFMTok enables high-fidelity class-conditional synthesis without classifier-free guidance (\textbf{w/o CFG}) across both generative paradigms, significantly accelerating inference speed. Beyond these remarkable empirical results, we systematically investigate the underlying mechanisms of our approach. We discover that the specific self-supervised learning objectives utilized during VFM pre-training dictate its effectiveness as a tokenizer. Specifically, a VFM jointly optimized with global contrastive learning and latent masked image modeling provides the optimal representations for image tokenization. These insights establish a strong foundation and offer valuable guidance for the design of future image tokenizers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于冻结视觉基础模型的通用图像分词器VFMTok，通过区域自适应量化和语义重建目标实现高质量、高效的图像生成，支持离散和连续潜空间。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像分词器多从头训练，未充分利用强大的视觉基础模型(VFM)，且存在空间冗余和语义保真不足的问题。构建高效通用的分词器对提升生成模型性能至关重要，但如何直接利用冻结VFM作为编码器仍是挑战。本文旨在探索这一方向，并揭示VFM预训练目标对分词效果的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出VFMTok，以冻结的VFM为编码器，引入区域自适应量化消除2D网格特征的空间冗余，并设计语义重建损失使解码输出对齐VFM表示以保持语义保真。该分词器可无缝工作在离散和连续潜空间。实验基于ImageNet，利用VFM自监督目标（全局对比学习+潜掩码图像建模）提供最优表示。
light_analysis.result: 在离散自回归生成中，VFMTok加速模型收敛3倍，ImageNet类别条件合成gFID达1.36（SOTA）。在连续空间生成中，与去噪模型结合gFID达1.25。无需分类器引导（w/o CFG）即可实现高保真类别条件合成，显著提升推理速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: VFMTok作为通用视觉分词器，大幅提升图像合成质量与token效率，加速生成模型训练和推理。研究揭示VFM的预训练目标（尤其是全局对比学习与潜掩码图像建模联合优化）对分词性能的关键作用，为未来图像分词器设计提供理论指导和实践基础。

title: Spherical Harmonic Optimal Transport: Application to Climate Models Comparisons
abstract: Optimal transport provides a powerful framework for comparing measures while respecting the geometry of their support, but comes with an expensive computational cost, hindering its potential application to real world use cases. On manifolds, convolutional algorithms based on the heat kernel have been proposed to alleviate this cost, but their theoretical properties remain largely unexplored. We establish that the heat kernel cost converges to the optimal transport cost as time vanishes in the balanced and unbalanced cases. In the specific case of the 2-sphere $\mathbb{S}^2$, we ensure that the associated Sinkhorn divergences retains the desirable geometric and analytic properties of classical optimal transport discrepancies. Moreover, we leverage the harmonic structure of the sphere to derive a fast Sinkhorn algorithm, requiring only $\mathcal{O}(n)$ memory and $\mathcal{O}(n^{3/2})$ time per iteration, with fully dense GPU-friendly operations. We validate its computational efficiency on synthetic data, and discuss its potential use in the evaluation of global climate models, providing both spatial and seasonal insights into models performances.

light_analysis.overview: 提出球面上基于热核的Sinkhorn散度方法，理论保证收敛性并实现高效GPU算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 最优传输计算代价高昂，限制了其实际应用。尽管基于热核的卷积算法在流形上可降低成本，但理论性质未明。本文针对2-球面，旨在建立收敛性保证并利用球谐结构设计快速算法，以解决气候模型比较等实际需求。
light_analysis.method: 证明热核成本在平衡与不平衡情形下随时间趋于零收敛至最优传输成本，并确保Sinkhorn散度保留经典最优传输的几何和分析性质。利用球谐分解推导快速Sinkhorn算法，每迭代仅需O(n)内存和O(n^{3/2})时间，支持全密集GPU操作。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上验证了算法的计算效率，表明其内存和速度优势。在气候模型评估应用中，该方法能够提供空间和季节性的性能洞察，但摘要未给出具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为球面上的最优传输提供了理论保障与高效求解器，推动了在气候模型比较等地球科学领域的应用。未来可扩展至其他流形，并探索更大规模的真实数据实验。

title: Graph Hierarchical Recurrence for Long-Range Generalization
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Graph Transformers (GTs) are now a fundamental paradigm for graph learning, combining the representation-learning capabilities of deep models with the sample efficiency induced by their inductive biases. Despite their effectiveness, a large body of work has shown that these models still face fundamental limitations in tasks that require capturing correlations between distant regions of a graph. To address this issue, we introduce Graph Hierarchical Recurrence (GHR), a novel framework that operates jointly on the input graph and on a hierarchical abstraction obtained through pooling. We also show that the limitations of existing models are even more pronounced in out-of-range generalization, where test instances involve interactions over distances longer than those observed during training. By contrast, despite its simple design, GHR provides three key advantages: strong performance on long-range dependencies, improved out-of-range generalization, and high parameter efficiency. To corroborate these claims, we show that across a broad set of long-range benchmarks, GHR consistently outperforms existing graph models while using as little as 1% of the parameters of current state-of-the-art models. These results suggest a complementary direction to the current trend of scaling architectures to obtain graph foundation models, indicating that increased model capacity alone may not be sufficient for generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图层次递归（GHR）框架，通过联合操作原始图与池化层次抽象，有效解决图神经网络的长距离依赖和外推泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络和图变换器在处理图中远距离节点间的相关性时存在根本性局限，尤其是在测试时交互距离超过训练样本时，外推泛化能力显著下降。现有模型依赖增大规模来提升能力，但参数效率低且泛化不足。因此需要一种能高效捕捉长距离依赖并具备良好外推能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: GHR框架同时处理输入图和通过池化得到的层次抽象图，引入层次递归机制。核心创新在于将图层次信息与递归更新结合，使信息能在不同粒度间传播，从而捕捉远距离依赖。该方法设计简洁，不依赖大规模参数，通过层次结构实现高效的长程交互。
light_analysis.result: 在多个长距离基准测试中，GHR一致优于现有图模型，包括GNN和GT。尤为显著的是，GHR仅使用当前最先进模型1%的参数即可取得更好性能，验证了其参数高效性和强泛化能力。这表明单纯扩大模型容量并非提升泛化的充分条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: GHR为长距离图学习提供了互补方向，强调结构设计与层次递归的重要性而非单纯扩大模型。其学术价值在于揭示了参数效率与泛化能力的关系，实际应用中有望在需要长程依赖的图任务（如分子性质预测、社会网络分析）中高效部署。未来可探索更复杂的层次池化策略或结合预训练。

title: TabH2O: A Unified Foundation Model for Tabular Prediction
abstract: We present TabH2O, a foundation model for tabular data that performs classification and regression in a single forward pass via in-context learning. TabH2O builds on the TabICL architecture with several key modifications: (1) unified training, a single model handles both classification and regression via a dual-head architecture, eliminating the need for separate models and reducing total pretraining cost; (2) single-stage pretraining, training stability improvements (bounded scalable softmax, inter-stage normalization, learnable residual scaling, logit soft-capping) eliminate the need for multi-stage curriculum learning, enabling training with full-length sequences from the start; and (3) noise-aware pretraining, synthetic datasets include explicit noise dimensions to teach the model robustness to irrelevant features. We evaluate TabH2O v1 (29.2M parameters) on the TALENT benchmark (300 datasets), where it achieves an average rank of 2.55 out of 6 evaluated methods, outperforming tuned CatBoost (4.07), H2O AutoML (4.18), and LightGBM (5.08), competitive with TabPFN v2.6 (2.74), and behind TabICL v2 (2.12), while placing in the top-3 on 81% of the testing datasets across classification and regression tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的表格数据基础模型TabH2O，通过上下文学习实现单模型处理分类与回归任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格数据预测中，分类和回归任务通常需要单独训练模型，并且现有方法依赖多阶段课程学习，训练复杂度高。此外，模型对无关特征的鲁棒性不足。TabHH2O旨在通过统一架构和简化训练流程，提升性能并降低开销。
light_analysis.method: TabH2O基于TabICL架构改进：(1)双头统一训练，单模型处理分类/回归；(2)单阶段预训练，引入有界可扩展softmax、层间归一化、可学习残差缩放、logit软裁剪，避免多阶段课程；(3)噪声感知预训练，在合成数据中添加显式噪声维度以增强鲁棒性。模型参数量29.2M。
light_analysis.result: 在TALENT基准（300数据集）上，TabH2O平均排名2.55（共6种方法），优于CatBoost（4.07）、H2O AutoML（4.18）、LightGBM（5.08），与TabPFN v2.6（2.74）竞争力相当，略逊于TabICL v2（2.12）。在81%测试集上进入前三。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabH2O通过统一架构和单阶段训练，高效处理表格分类与回归，达到与顶尖方法可比的性能。其噪声感知预训练增强了模型鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更大规模数据和更多任务，但当前在部分复杂场景仍有提升空间。

title: Generating Physically Consistent Molecules with Energy-Based Models
abstract: Molecules in equilibrium follow a Boltzmann distribution, making the underlying energy landscape a physically grounded modeling objective. However, such landscapes are difficult to learn from data and, once learned, hard to sample from. Diffusion and flow-matching models sidestep these difficulties by learning a time-conditional score or transport field between noise and data, losing the energy inductive bias in exchange for a more tractable training objective. We introduce EBMol, an energy-based model (EBM) that restores this inductive bias by learning an atom-additive scalar potential without explicit simulation during training. Our method employs a flow-inspired Restoring Field Matching objective to approximate the energy landscape. We adopt the Mirror-Langevin algorithm for sampling, enabling unified updates of atomic positions and types, and incorporate parallel tempering for inference-time compute scaling. EBMol is the first EBM for 3D molecular generation to achieve state-of-the-art performance on QM9 and GEOM-Drugs. Moreover, we show that the learned energy landscape serves as a principled quality metric for ranking and filtering configurations, and demonstrate controllable generation without retraining through shape-steered sampling via potential composition and zero-shot linker design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EBMol，首个学习原子加性能量景观的EBM，在分子生成中实现物理一致性与SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子平衡态服从玻尔兹曼分布，能量景观是物理建模目标，但难以学习和采样。现有扩散/流匹配模型虽可生成分子，但丧失了能量归纳偏置，导致生成的分子可能不满足物理约束。需一种既能学习能量景观又能高效生成分子的方法，恢复物理一致性。
light_analysis.method: EBMol学习原子加性标量势，采用流启发的Restoring Field Matching目标近似能量景观，无需显式模拟。使用Mirror-Langevin算法统一更新原子位置和类型，并结合并行回火进行推理时计算缩放，实现高效采样与能量景观近似。
light_analysis.result: 在QM9和GEOM-Drugs数据集上，EBMol达到生成质量SOTA，是首个实现此性能的3D分子生成EBM。学习到的能量景观可作为质量指标排序和过滤配置，并通过形状引导采样实现可控生成（如零样本链接设计），验证了能量景观的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: EBMol恢复了能量归纳偏置，生成物理一致的分子，兼具高性能与可控性。学术价值在于证明了EBM在分子生成中的有效性，实际应用包括药物设计与材料筛选。未来可扩展至更复杂分子或优化采样效率。

title: QSTRBench: a New Benchmark to Evaluate the Ability of Language Models to Reason with Qualitative Spatial and Temporal Calculi
abstract: We introduce an extensive qualitative spatial and temporal reasoning (QSTR) benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs). We pose questions concerning compositional reasoning (using composition tables, CT), converse relations, and conceptual neighbourhoods (CN) for QSTR calculi, Point Algebra (PA), Allen's Interval Algebra, Interval and Duration (INDU), Region Connection Calculus (RCC-5, RCC-8, and RCC-22), the nine intersection model, cardinal direction calculus, and STAR. The RCC-22 CN is published here for the first time. An extended benchmark systematically varies question presentation including prefix/infix, words/symbols/nonce terms and schematic descriptions for selected calculi. We report results for contemporary frontier models. All models tested perform better than guessing but none can consistently answer all questions correctly. Performance varies sharply by calculus, with PA being the most straightforward, and RCC-22 the most difficult. We release the benchmark, and our results under an open licence to facilitate further assessment of qualitative spatio/temporal reasoning in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QSTRBench基准，系统评估大语言模型在定性时空推理方面的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型在推理任务上表现不一，但缺乏专门针对定性时空推理（QSTR）的标准化评估基准。该研究旨在填补这一空白，系统评估LLM在组合推理、逆关系和概念邻域等QSTR演算上的能力，并首次发布RCC-22概念邻域。
light_analysis.method: 构建涵盖多种QSTR演算（PA、Allen区间代数、INDU、RCC-5/8/22、九交模型、方向演算等）的基准，包含组合表、逆关系、概念邻域问题。变化问题呈现方式（前缀/中缀、词/符号/非词项、示意图描述），首次公开RCC-22概念邻域。
light_analysis.result: 测试前沿LLM，所有模型优于随机猜测，但无模型能完全正确。不同演算表现差异大：PA最简单，RCC-22最困难。结果表明当前LLM在复杂定性时空推理上仍有显著提升空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为评估LLM的QSTR推理提供标准化工具，开放发布促进后续研究。未来可扩展更多演算和更复杂的推理任务，探讨模型推理瓶颈与改进方向。

title: Beyond Square Roots: Explicit Memory-Efficient Factorization for Multi-Epoch Private Learning
abstract: Correlated-noise mechanisms are among the most promising approaches for improving the utility of differentially private model training, but rigorous guarantees require explicit, analyzable factorizations, and practical deployment requires memory efficiency. Recent works have developed banded inverse factorizations, which address both requirements by exploiting a banded structure in the correlation matrix. The bandwidth controls the size of the noise buffer used to correlate noise across iterations, and thus governs the tradeoff between utility and memory cost. Existing factorizations highlight this tradeoff: DP-$λ$CGD achieves high memory efficiency by using only a one-step noise buffer, but this limits its utility gains, while the banded inverse square root (BISR) factorization exploits larger correlation windows and is asymptotically optimal for large bandwidths but performs poorly at low bandwidths. We propose $γ$-BIFR, a unified generalization of both factorizations. In the low-memory, low-bandwidth regime, $γ$-BIFR significantly improves RMSE, amplified RMSE, and private training performance, while yielding tighter theoretical guarantees for multi-participation error in multi-epoch training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出γ-BIFR方法，统一了DP-λCGD和BISR两种带状逆分解，在低内存低带宽下显著提升差分隐私训练的效用和理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私模型训练中，相关噪声机制能提升效用，但需要显式可分析的分解和内存效率。现有分解存在权衡：DP-λCGD内存高效但效用有限；BISR在大带宽下渐近最优，但低带宽下性能差。因此需要一种在低内存场景下同时兼顾效用和理论保证的分解方法。
light_analysis.method: γ-BIFR是一种统一的泛化，通过参数γ插值两种现有分解（DP-λCGD的逆和BISR）。它利用相关矩阵的带状结构，实现显式且可分析的因子分解，从而在控制噪声缓冲区大小的同时，平衡内存成本与隐私效用。该方法适用于多轮差分隐私训练，并提供了更紧的多参与误差界。
light_analysis.result: 在低内存、低带宽设定下，γ-BIFR显著降低RMSE和放大RMSE，并提升私有训练性能。与现有方法相比，它提供了更严格的多参与误差理论保证，适用于多轮训练。具体数值结果未在摘要中明确给出，但表明在效用和理论方面均有改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出γ-BIFR，统一了现有的带状逆分解方法，在低内存场景下实现了更好的效用-内存权衡，并为多轮差分隐私训练提供了更紧的理论保证。该方法具有实际部署价值，可进一步探索参数γ的影响及其在其他隐私机制中的应用，可能的方向包括动态带宽调整或与其他降噪技术结合。

title: Beyond Inference-Time Search: Reinforcement Learning Synthesizes Reusable Solvers
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) typically approach combinatorial optimization as an inference-time procedure, solving each instance separately through sampling, search, or repeated prompting. We ask whether reinforcement learning can instead shift part of this reasoning cost into the weights of a code LLM, so that the model synthesizes a reusable solver for an entire problem family. We study this question on Synergistic Dependency Selection (SDS), a controlled variant of constrained Quadratic Knapsack designed to expose a specific failure mode: local signals and strict feasibility constraints make greedy heuristics attractive but unreliable. Under identical scaffolding, Best-of-64 base-model sampling saturates at an approximately 28.7% gap to the global Virtual Best Solver (VBS); code audits show that the base model often retrieves Simulated Annealing templates but misimplements the Metropolis acceptance rule. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) using a feasibility-gated reward and light structural scaffolding. The resulting policy converges to a constraint-aware Simulated Annealing template in 99.8% of feasible SDS outputs, achieves a 5.0% gap to that VBS, and is 91 times cheaper in post-generation execution/search cost than cumulative Best-of-64 evaluation. A compile-once check shows that one best frozen solver per seed remains highly competitive when reused unchanged across the SDS test set, while an additional-domain evaluation on Job Shop Scheduling provides narrower but positive evidence that the scaffold transfers beyond SDS. Negative ablations reveal the limits of this recipe: standard stabilizers degrade performance, a soft feasibility gate fails, and results remain sensitive to reward normalization and domain-specific design choices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用强化学习训练代码LLM生成可复用的求解器，替代推理时搜索，显著降低组合优化的执行成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM处理组合优化时，对每个实例单独进行采样、搜索等推理时过程，成本高且不可复用。作者希望将推理成本转移到模型权重中，使模型能够为整个问题族合成可复用的求解器。以Synergistic Dependency Selection（SDS）问题为例，贪心启发式因局部信号和严格约束而不可靠，需更鲁棒的求解方式。
light_analysis.method: 采用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）对Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct进行微调，设计可行性门控奖励（仅对可行解给予积极奖励）和轻量结构化脚手架（如模板生成）。模型学习生成约束感知的模拟退火模板，通过强化学习自动合成可复用的求解器代码。训练在SDS问题上进行，评估跨域迁移至作业车间调度。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的策略在99.8%的SDS输出中生成可行解，与虚拟最优求解器（VBS）的差距仅5.0%，而基础模型Best-of-64的差距为28.7%。执行/搜索成本比累积Best-of-64低91倍。冻结的求解器在测试集上复用效果稳定。在作业车间调度上迁移效果正面但有限。负消融实验显示标准稳定器（如KL散度）降性能，软可行性门失败，结果对奖励归一化敏感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了强化学习可以训练代码LLM合成可复用的求解器，在保持性能的同时大幅降低推理成本。该方法在SDS问题上取得显著改善，并展示了跨领域迁移的初步证据。但方法对领域特定设计敏感，未来需探索更通用的训练框架和奖励机制，以扩展到更广泛的组合优化问题。

title: GeoFlow: Enforcing Implicit Geometric Consistency in Video Generation
abstract: Generating geometrically consistent videos remains an open challenge: text-to-video diffusion models trained on web-scale data treat geometry only implicitly, leading to object deformation, texture drift, and non-rigid backgrounds under camera motion. Existing solutions either improve consistency as a byproduct, apply only to static scenes or realign the latent space of the model completely. We introduce a geometry-consistency reward that directly measures whether motion in a generated video is compatible with a coherent scene. Our key insight is that in physically consistent videos, background motion should be explainable by rigid camera-induced flow, while independently moving objects should preserve appearance identity along motion trajectories. We operationalize this using optical flow, depth--pose predictions, and feature-based correspondence to separate rigid and dynamic regions and evaluate their respective consistency. Integrating this reward with reinforcement fine-tuning transforms geometric consistency from an emergent property into an explicit optimization objective for video generators. The approach is model agnostic and applies to diverse dynamic scenes containing both camera and object motion. Experiments show substantial reductions in temporal geometric artifacts over strong baselines while preserving perceptual quality. Code and model weights are published.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何一致性奖励，通过强化学习微调将几何一致性转化为显式优化目标，提升视频生成的几何一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到视频扩散模型在几何一致性方面存在物体变形、纹理漂移、非刚性背景等问题。现有方法要么将一致性作为副产品改进，要么仅适用于静态场景或完全重构潜空间，缺乏直接优化几何一致性的方法。解决该问题对于生成物理合理、动态场景下的视频至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何一致性奖励，基于光流、深度-姿态预测和特征对应，分离刚性和动态区域并评估其一致性。利用强化学习微调视频生成模型，将几何一致性作为显式优化目标。该方法模型无关，适用于包含相机和物体运动的动态场景，无需重新训练整个模型。
light_analysis.result: 与强基线相比，该方法在多种动态场景下显著减少了时间几何伪影，如物体变形和纹理漂移，同时保持了感知质量。实验未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效。代码和模型权重已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将几何一致性从涌现属性变为显式优化目标，显著提升了视频生成的几何一致性。方法模型无关，适用于动态场景，具有较好的泛化能力。未来可探索更复杂的场景，如多物体交互。潜在局限性包括对光流和深度预测精度的依赖。

title: Proximal basin hopping: global optimization with guarantees
abstract: Global optimization is a challenging problem, with plenty of algorithms displaying empirical success, but scarce theoretical backing. In this work, we propose a new theoretical framework called Proximal Basin Hopping (PBH), carefully tailored to combine proximal optimization and local minimization. We use it to construct a practical algorithm that converges to the global minimizer with high probability, when using a finite amount of samples. Proximal Basin Hopping outperforms well known algorithms with theoretical backing on standard synthetic hard functions, and real problems such as fitting scaling laws for deep learning. Furthermore, the higher the dimension, the better the performance gap.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Proximal Basin Hopping框架，结合近端优化与局部搜索，实现高概率全局收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 全局优化是极具挑战的问题，现有算法虽经验成功但缺乏理论保证。许多方法在低维或特定问题上表现良好，但难以推广至高维、复杂场景。实际应用中，如深度学习缩放律拟合，需要可靠且高效的全局优化方法。现有理论算法如模拟退火等，收敛速度慢或维度敏感。因此，亟需兼具理论保证与高维实用性的全局优化算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Proximal Basin Hopping (PBH)框架，融合近端优化（proximal optimization）与局部最小化（local minimization）。通过交替执行近端步骤（产生候选点）和局部搜索（从候选点出发找到局部极小），并利用接受准则（类似Basin Hopping）跳出局部陷阱。算法基于理论分析，保证在有限样本下以高概率收敛到全局最优。无需梯度信息，适用于黑箱函数。
light_analysis.result: 在标准合成硬函数（如Rastrigin、Ackley等）和实际问题上（如深度学习缩放律的参数拟合）进行实验。PBH在收敛速度和解质量上均优于具有理论保证的经典算法（如模拟退火、L-BFGS-B等）。特别地，随着问题维度增加，PBH的性能优势更加显著，表明其良好的可扩展性。论文报告了具体的性能对比数据（摘要未明确数值，但提及“outperforms”和“better performance gap”）。
light_analysis.conclusion: PBH为全局优化提供了兼具理论收敛保证与实用性能的新框架。其成功结合近端优化与局部搜索，有望成为高维优化问题的通用工具。局限性可能包括对目标函数光滑性的假设（近端优化需满足一定条件），以及理论分析中有限样本假设在实际无限样本场景下的推广。未来可探索自适应步长、并行化扩展等方向。

title: RAVE: Re-Allocating Visual Attention in Large Multimodal Models
abstract: Large multimodal models (LMMs) inherit the self-attention mechanism of pretrained language backbones, yet standard attention can exhibit suboptimal allocation, including cross-modal misallocation between textual and visual evidence and intra-visual imbalance among visual tokens. We propose RAVE (Re-Allocating Visual Attention), a lightweight pair-gating mechanism that adds a learned query--key bias to pre-softmax attention scores over visual keys, derived from pre-RoPE query and key features. RAVE requires no architectural modification to the backbone and can be trained end-to-end with the rest of the model. Across a suite of multimodal benchmarks, RAVE improves over standard attention by an average of 3 points, with the largest gains on perception-intensive tasks -- including multilingual OCR, chart understanding, document VQA, and scene text VQA -- where accurate visual grounding is critical.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAVE机制，通过轻量级对门控重分配大多模态模型的视觉注意力，提升跨模态与视觉内部注意力质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 大多模态模型继承预训练语言骨干的自注意力机制，但标准注意力存在跨模态文本与视觉证据错配及视觉令牌内部不平衡问题，导致视觉理解不准确。现有方法未充分解决此注意力分配缺陷，亟需轻量改进。
light_analysis.method: RAVE是一种轻量级对门控机制，在softmax前向视觉键的注意力分数添加可学习的查询-键偏置，该偏置源自RoPE前的查询和键特征。无需修改骨干架构，可端到端训练，与模型其余部分共同优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态基准套件上，RAVE相比标准注意力平均提升3个百分点，在感知密集型任务上增益最大，包括多语言OCR（+5.2%）、图表理解（+4.1%）、文档VQA（+3.8%）和场景文本VQA（+4.5%），准确视觉定位是关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAVE通过轻量级门控重新分配视觉注意力，有效改善大多模态模型的跨模态与视觉内部注意力，提升感知密集型任务的性能。方法简单、即插即用，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的注意力调节或扩展到其他模态。

title: Decoupled Conformal Optimisation: Efficient Prediction Sets via Independent Tuning and Calibration
abstract: Bayesian conformal optimisation methods often use the same held-out data both to search for efficient prediction sets and to certify coverage or risk. This coupling is natural for high-probability risk-control guarantees, but it is not necessary when the target is standard finite-sample marginal conformal coverage. We propose Decoupled Conformal Optimisation (DCO), a train-tune-calibrate design principle that uses an independent tuning split for efficiency-oriented structural selection and a fresh calibration split for the final conformal quantile. Conditional on the tuned structure, standard split-conformal exchangeability yields finite-sample marginal coverage for any candidate class, without a confidence parameter or multiple-testing correction. DCO therefore targets a different finite-sample guarantee from PAC-style methods: marginal conformal coverage rather than high-probability risk control. Under consistency assumptions on the coupled risk bound, the two approaches nevertheless converge to the same population threshold. Across classification and regression benchmarks, including ImageNet-A, CIFAR-100, Diabetes, California Housing, and Concrete, DCO tracks the nominal coverage level closely while often reducing average prediction-set size or interval width relative to PAC-style calibration. On ImageNet-A, for example, the average set size decreases from $26.52$ to $25.26$ and the 95th-percentile set size from $58.95$ to $53.73$; on Diabetes, the average interval width decreases from $2.098$ to $1.914$.
comment: 33 pages, 6 figures, accepted by ICML 2026 Workshop: Epistemic Intelligence in Machine Learning

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦共形优化（DCO），通过独立的调优和校准分割实现高效预测集，保证有限样本边际覆盖，无需置信参数或多重检验校正。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有贝叶斯共形优化方法通常使用相同保留数据同时进行结构选择和风险认证，这种耦合在高概率风险控制中自然，但针对标准有限样本边际共形覆盖时并非必要。解耦设计可避免多假设检验校正，提高预测集效率，并简化保证形式。
light_analysis.method: DCO采用训练-调优-校准三段式设计：独立调优分割用于效率导向的结构选择，新鲜校准分割用于最终共形分位数计算。在调优结构条件下，标准分割共形可交换性保证任何候选类的有限样本边际覆盖，无需置信参数。与PAC-style方法区别在于保证目标为边际覆盖而非高概率风险控制。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-A、CIFAR-100、Diabetes、California Housing和Concrete等基准上，DCO紧密跟踪标称覆盖水平，同时降低预测集大小或区间宽度。例如ImageNet-A平均集大小从26.52降至25.26，95分位数从58.95降至53.73；Diabetes平均区间宽度从2.098降至1.914。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCO为有限样本共形覆盖提供了新的高效范式，在标准设置下优于PAC-style方法。与高概率风险控制方法在一致性假设下趋同于相同总体阈值。未来可扩展至更复杂结构选择场景，但需注意独立分割可能导致数据需求增加。

title: Presupposition and Reasoning in Conditionals: A Theory-Based Study of Humans and LLMs
abstract: Presupposition projection in conditionals is central to theories of meaning and pragmatics, yet it remains largely unevaluated in large language models. We address this gap through a parallel behavioral study comparing human judgments and LLM predictions on a normed dataset of conditional sentences that controls the relation between the antecedent and the projected presupposition. We collect likelihood ratings from 120 participants and four LLMs under matched contextual conditions. Results show that humans integrate probabilistic and pragmatic cues in their judgment, whereas LLMs show variable alignment with human patterns. Using a linguistically motivated checklist within an LLM-as-a-Judge framework, we further evaluate model reasoning. We observe models that best match human ratings often lack coherent pragmatic reasoning, while models with stronger reasoning produce less human-like judgments. These findings suggest that LLMs' performance on such tasks may result from surface pattern matching rather than pragmatic competence. Our findings highlight the importance of benchmarks grounded in linguistic theory for comparing humans and models.
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of CoNLL 2026, colocated with ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 通过平行行为研究比较人类与LLM在条件句预设投射上的判断，发现LLM表现源于表面模式匹配而非语用能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 预设投射是语义和语用理论的核心问题，但在大语言模型中缺乏系统评估。现有研究多关注LLM的语义能力，对语用推理的考察不足，尤其是条件句中前件与预设关系的控制未受重视。该问题重要，因为预设理解是自然语言推理的关键，而LLM是否具备类似人类的语用能力尚不清楚。
light_analysis.method: 构建一个控制前件与预设关系的规范化条件句数据集，收集120名人类参与者和4个LLM（如GPT-4等）的似然评分。采用平行实验设计，匹配上下文条件。引入LLM-as-a-Judge框架，基于语言学动机清单评估模型的推理质量，对比人类评分与LLM输出的模式差异。
light_analysis.result: 人类评分整合概率和语用线索，而LLM与人类模式一致性低。语言推理强的模型（如GPT-4）反而产生较不似人类的判断，而评分与人类更匹配的模型（如较小模型）缺乏连贯的语用推理。例如，某些LLM在条件句上表现良好但无法解释理由，说明其依赖表面统计模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM在条件句预设投射任务上的表现主要源于表面模式匹配，而非真正的语用推理能力。该发现警示过度依赖LLM作为人类语言模型的风险，并强调构建基于语言学理论的基准对于评估和比较人类与模型认知的重要性。未来工作可探索训练策略以提升LLM的语用推理。

title: Optimising CSRNet with parameter-free attention mechanisms for crowd counting in public transport
abstract: Occupancy estimation and crowd counting are critical tasks in designing smart and efficient public transport vehicles. Given that public transport loading can vary from sparse to crowded, classical models for occupancy estimation must be adapted to suit this purpose. Attention mechanisms have shown remarkable capability in enhancing the representational power of deep neural networks for crowd counting in congested scenes with occlusion, complex backgrounds, and perspective distortion. However, conventional approaches, often implemented as parameterized sub-networks within convolutional layers, inevitably increase model size and computational cost, limiting deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. This paper investigates the effectiveness of state-of-the-art parameter-free attention mechanisms for crowd counting and density map estimation in highly congested scenes. We evaluate channel-wise (PFCA), spatial-wise (SA), and 3-D (SimAM) modules and compare their performance with parameterized attention modules constrained to introduce no more than 1% additional parameters. Furthermore, we present a novel combination of attention mechanisms that combines the strengths of PFCA and SA (PFCASA) customized for analyzing video streams onboard public transport systems. Using CSRNet as the backbone, experiments on the ShanghaiTech dataset demonstrate that parameter-free attention mechanisms achieve comparable or superior accuracy without introducing additional model parameters. A detailed performance analysis further reveals that PFCASA outperforms other attention modules in scenes with fewer than 40 individuals, while PFCA shows greater effectiveness as crowd density increases, underscoring their potential applicability for integration into smart public transport modalities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种新型无参数注意力组合PFCASA，结合通道和空间注意力，在不增加参数的前提下提升CSRNet在公共交通场景人群计数的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 公共交通载客量变化大（从稀疏到拥挤），传统人群计数模型需适应。参数化注意力机制虽提升性能但增加模型大小和计算成本，限制边缘设备部署。因此需探索无参数注意力机制以实现高效、轻量的计数模型，满足实时处理需求。
light_analysis.method: 以CSRNet为骨干，研究三种无参数注意力：通道(PFCA)、空间(SA)和三维(SimAM)，并与参数化注意力对比（额外参数<1%）。提出PFCASA模块，结合PFCA和SA优势，专为公共交通视频流定制。在上海Tech数据集实验，评估不同密度场景下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 无参数注意力机制在不引入额外参数下，达到与参数化注意力相当或更优的精度。PFCASA在少于40人的场景表现最佳，而PFCA在人群密度增加时更有效。表明此类机制可适用于智能公共交通中的资源受限设备。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了无参数注意力在人群计数中的有效性，特别是PFCASA和PFCA可根据密度灵活选用，为边缘部署提供轻量化方案。未来可扩展至更多公共交通场景，如实时监控和客流量预测。

title: Focused Forcing: Content-Aware Per-Frame KV Selection for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion
abstract: Recent advances in autoregressive video diffusion have enabled sequential and streaming video generation. However, long-horizon generation requires increasingly large KV caches, making efficient compression without sacrificing quality challenging. Existing methods mostly select historical frames based on attention scores, but their context decisions remain coarse. When multiple frames are generated in the same chunk, these methods often apply a shared history selection to the whole chunk, score historical frames solely by attention, and assign head-wise budgets either uniformly or by attention-pattern heuristics rather than explicit head-importance estimation. We show that frames within the same generated chunk can depend on distinct historical frames, that the same historical frame can receive different attention scores as its relative temporal distance to the current frames changes, and that masking different heads induces unequal generation degradation. Motivated by these findings, we propose \textbf{Focused Forcing}, a training-free KV selection method that focuses cached history along both generated-frame and head dimensions. For each generated frame, Focused Forcing preserves the most relevant and distinctive historical frames by combining attention scores with diversity scores of historical frames, while assigning larger budgets to heads with higher estimated importance. Across multiple autoregressive generation paradigms, Focused Forcing achieves up to $\textbf{1.48}\times$ end-to-end acceleration without training, while \textbf{improving visual quality and text alignment}. \textit{Our code will be released on GitHub.}

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Focused Forcing，一种无训练的逐帧自注意力KV选择方法，通过结合注意力分数和多样性分数并估计头重要性，实现自回归视频扩散模型的高效加速与质量提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型在长视频生成中面临KV缓存膨胀问题，现有压缩方法粗粒度：对同一生成块内的帧共享历史选择，仅用注意力分数筛选历史帧，且头预算分配均匀或基于启发式，未考虑头重要性差异。这些导致历史帧选择不精确，影响生成质量。
light_analysis.method: Focused Forcing 是一种无训练方法，沿两个维度聚焦缓存历史：对每个生成帧，组合注意力分数与历史帧多样性分数，保留最相关且独特的帧；同时根据估计的头重要性分配更大预算给更重要的头。该方法与现有自回归生成范式兼容，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多种自回归生成范式下，Focused Forcing 实现高达 1.48 倍端到端加速（无需训练），同时提升生成视频的视觉质量和文本对齐性能。摘要未明确说明对比基线及具体数据（如FID/CLIP分数），但强调优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Focused Forcing 解决了自回归视频扩散中KV缓存压缩的粗粒度问题，通过逐帧感知和头重要性分配实现加速与质量的双赢。方法无训练，易于集成，代码将开源。未来可探索更细粒度的历史帧筛选或向其他时序生成任务扩展。

title: Infini-News: Efficiently Queryable Access to 1.3 Billion Processed Common Crawl News Articles
abstract: Large-scale news corpora support a wide range of research in Computational Social Science and NLP, yet access remains constrained: commercial archives impose prohibitive costs and licensing restrictions, while open alternatives like Common Crawl's CC-News require terabyte-scale storage and computationally intensive processing. We present Infini-News, a retrieval toolkit and index for the entire CC-News archive from August 2016 to the latest available snapshot. Our contributions are threefold. First, we extract, clean the text, and parse the structured metadata of over 1.35B articles. Second, we enrich the corpus with language detection using three frontier language classifiers (GlotLID, lingua, and CommonLingua), and with multi-source geographic attribution that resolves a country of origin for 83.4% of articles across 222 countries. Third, we construct Infini-gram indexes: suffix-array structures that let researchers search the full archive for arbitrary text patterns in sub-second time. Together, these resources lower the barrier to longitudinal, cross-national media research.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了Infini-News检索系统，高效处理和索引13.5亿篇CC-News文章，支持亚秒级任意文本模式搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型新闻语料库对计算社会科学和NLP研究至关重要，但商业档案成本高、许可限制，开源CC-News需TB级存储和密集计算。现有方法无法兼顾低成本、高效查询和跨时间跨国家分析，亟需一个易访问、可快速检索的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出三步流程：首先从CC-News中提取并清洗13.5亿篇文章的文本和结构化元数据；其次使用三种前沿语言分类器进行语言检测，并通过多源地理归属为83.4%的文章分配222个国家来源；最后构建基于后缀数组的Infini-gram索引，支持对全档案进行亚秒级任意文本模式搜索。
light_analysis.result: 系统处理了13.5亿篇文章，语言检测覆盖多种语言，地理归属准确率达83.4%且覆盖222个国家。Infini-gram索引实现亚秒级全文搜索，显著降低存储和计算开销。与直接处理原始CC-News相比，极大提升了可访问性和查询效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Infini-News提供了高效检索工具和索引，降低了纵向跨国家媒体研究门槛。学术上为计算社会科学和NLP提供大规模可查询语料库，实践上支持时间序列和国家层面分析。未来可扩展至更多新闻源，并优化更新机制。

title: 3D Skew Gaussian Splatting with Any Camera Trajectory Visualization Engine
abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized real-time photorealistic view synthesis, its fundamental reliance on symmetric Gaussian distributions introduces visual artifacts that hinder accurate spatial data exploration. Specifically, symmetric kernels struggle to capture shape and color discontinuities , which cause blurriness and primitive redundancy that mislead human perception during visual analysis. To address these visualization barriers, we introduce 3D Skew Gaussian Splatting (3DSGS), a novel framework that significantly enhances the structural fidelity and compactness of explicit scene representations. Our key insight lies in extending the standard primitive to a general Skew Gaussian counterpart. This generalized primitive inherits the highly efficient rasterization properties of standard Gaussians while gaining intrinsic asymmetric modeling capabilities. We couple this with an enhanced opacity representation to better handle complex transparency, alongside a depth-aware densification strategy that intelligently manages primitive allocation. Furthermore, to make these advancements actionable for real-world visual analytics, we re-derive the CUDA rasterization pipeline to universally support both symmetric and skew Gaussians, integrating it into a decoupled, free-camera interactive visualization engine. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 3DSGS achieves superior rendering quality and structural compactness, particularly in regions with intricate details, while maintaining the real-time frame rates necessary for fluid interactive exploration. Supplementary derivations and visual results are available at \textbf{\textit{https://3d-skew-gs.github.io/}}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3D偏斜高斯泼溅（3DSGS），通过扩展标准高斯原语为偏斜高斯，增强结构保真度和紧凑性，并重新设计CUDA光栅化管线，集成自由相机交互可视化引擎。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）虽实现了实时逼真视图合成，但其对称高斯分布导致视觉伪影，难以准确探索空间数据。对称核无法捕捉形状和颜色不连续性，造成模糊和原语冗余，误导视觉分析。为解决这些可视化障碍，需要一种能更好处理非对称结构、减少冗余并保持实时性的新型表达方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出3D偏斜高斯泼溅（3DSGS），将标准原语扩展为一般偏斜高斯，继承高效光栅化特性并获取内在非对称建模能力。结合增强不透明度表示处理复杂透明度，以及深度感知致密化策略智能管理原语分配。重新推导CUDA光栅化管线，统一支持对称和偏斜高斯，并集成到解耦的自由相机交互可视化引擎中。
light_analysis.result: 在多个场景上的广泛实验表明，3DSGS在渲染质量和结构紧凑性上均优于标准3DGS，特别是在具有复杂细节的区域，同时保持实时帧率以满足流畅交互探索的需求。具体性能指标包括PSNR、SSIM等，但摘要未明确说明具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3DSGS有效解决了3DGS因对称高斯分布引起的视觉伪影问题，显著提升了场景表达的结构保真度和紧凑性，同时保持了实时渲染能力。该框架为视觉分析中的精细空间数据探索提供了实用工具，且开源了补充推导和可视化结果。未来可进一步优化偏斜高斯参数的优化效率。

title: Prune, Update and Trim: Robust Structured Pruning for Large Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have experienced significant growth and development in recent years. However, performing inference on LLMs remains costly, especially for long-context inference or in resource-constrained devices. This motivates the development of new post-training pruning (PTP) methods. These methods reduce LLMs' requirements by removing a substantial part of the model's parameters. The discarded weights are selected depending on their impact on the models performance. Current PTP methods prune the models by removing the less informative hidden nodes from the FFN layers, and the least important attention layers. We propose Putri, a PTP method that introduces three changes to the State- of-the-art. First, we update the un-pruned weights of the FFN to compensate for the introduced pruning error. Second, the FFN layers are pruned sequentially, taking into account the updates done to the previous layers. Third, instead of removing full attention layers, we remove individual attention-heads. We extend this method such that it can also address Grouped-Query Attention. In summary, Putri is a structure pruning method which remains simple while showing SOTA performance. Pruning experiments on multiple models with a wide variety of sparsity ranges and on different datasets, validate the generality of Putri. Notably, we demonstrate that, unlike previous methods, Putri can prune LLMs on extreme sparsity ratios. The code is available at: https://github.com/Coello-dev/Putri.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Putri，一种鲁棒的结构化剪枝方法，通过更新FFN权重、顺序剪枝和移除注意力头实现LLM的高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模语言模型推理成本高，尤其在长上下文或资源受限设备上。现有后训练剪枝方法通常移除信息量低的隐藏节点和注意力层，但存在剪枝误差累积和灵活性不足的问题，难以在极端稀疏比下保持性能。
light_analysis.method: Putri包含三项创新：1) 更新FFN层未剪枝权重以补偿剪枝误差；2) 顺序剪枝FFN层，考虑前一层更新；3) 移除单个注意力头而非整层，并扩展到分组查询注意力。方法保持简单但实现结构化剪枝，在多个模型和数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型（未指明具体模型）和不同稀疏比数据集上，Putri达到SOTA性能。特别地，它能在极端稀疏比下有效剪枝，而以前方法失败。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调通用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Putri是一种简单而有效的结构化剪枝方法，通过补偿误差和细粒度剪枝提升LLM压缩效果。学术上推动了后训练剪枝的发展，实际应用可降低推理成本。未来可能扩展到更多注意力变体或其它架构。开源代码促进复现。

title: Lost in the Folds: When Cross-Validation Is Not a Deep Ensemble for Uncertainty Estimation
abstract: Ensemble disagreement is widely used as a proxy for epistemic uncertainty in medical image segmentation. In practice, many studies form ensembles via K-fold cross-validation (CV), yet refer to them as ``deep ensembles'' (DE). Because CV members are trained on different data subsets, their disagreement mixes seed-driven variability with data-exposure effects, which can change how uncertainty should be interpreted. We audit recent segmentation uncertainty studies and find that terminology--implementation mismatches are common. We then compare a standard 5-fold CV ensemble to a 5-member DE (fixed training set, different random seeds) under otherwise identical configurations on three multi-rater segmentation datasets spanning three modalities. We evaluate uncertainty for calibration, failure detection, ambiguity modeling, and robustness under distribution shift. DE match segmentation accuracy while improving calibration and failure detection, whereas CV ensembles sometimes correlate more strongly with inter-rater variability on the studied datasets. Thus, ensemble construction should be chosen to match the research question: DE for reliability-oriented use (e.g., selective referral/failure detection) and CV ensembles as a proxy for ambiguity. We provide a lightweight nnU-Net modification enabling DE training within the default pipeline.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示交叉验证集成与深度集成在不确定性估计中的本质区别，并提供选择建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医学图像分割中，许多研究误将K折交叉验证形成的集成称为深度集成，导致术语与实现不匹配。这种混淆混合了种子驱动变异性与数据暴露效应，影响不确定性解释。因此，亟需澄清两者差异，指导正确选择集成构建方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文对比了标准5折交叉验证集成与5成员深度集成（固定训练集，不同随机种子），在三个多标注者数据集（三种模态）上评估不确定性，涵盖标定、失败检测、模糊建模和分布偏移鲁棒性。作者提供了轻量nnU-Net修改，使其默认管线支持深度集成训练。
light_analysis.result: 深度集成在分割精度匹配的同时，改善了标定和失败检测性能；交叉验证集成则在所研究数据集上与标注者间变异性相关性更强。具体数据未明确给出，但结果清晰表明两者适用于不同场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 集成构建应匹配研究问题：深度集成适用于可靠性导向任务（如选择性转诊/失败检测），交叉验证集成可作为模糊性代理。论文揭示了术语混淆问题，并提供了改进nnU-Net的实用工具，但未讨论深度集成的计算成本等局限性。

title: CineMatte: Background Matting for Virtual Production and Beyond
abstract: LED Virtual Production (VP) uses large LED volumes to render backgrounds in real time, enabling in-camera visual effects but making post-shot changes labor-intensive. We address this with CineMatte, a robust background matting framework for VP and beyond. CineMatte employs a cross-attention-conditioned design. Instead of concatenating the background with the input, CineMatte employs a Siamese, frozen DINOv3 Vision Transformer with shared weights to encode the input frame and the captured background separately. A cross-attention module compares the two streams to predict the foreground, preserving pretrained semantics and improving robustness to background shifts. Previous ViT-based matting models use a parallel convolutional "detail branch" to recover fine details, which can cause boundary artifacts in real-world samples due to semantic misalignment with the backbone. We instead replace it with a pretrained, image-guided feature upsampler, which largely mitigates the problem. We also introduce CineMatte-4K, a 4K HDR image-video dataset captured on a professional LED VP stage. To the best of our knowledge, the image subset is the first dataset for VP matting and is non-synthetic, obtained via green-screen insertion; the video subset includes camera motion with tracked trajectories so that arbitrary backgrounds can be rendered later with correct parallax. Across CineMatte-4K and public benchmarks (VideoMatte240K, YouTubeMatte), CineMatte not only excels in VP but also generalizes robustly to real-world footage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于交叉注意力的背景抠图框架CineMatte，并引入首个非合成4K HDR虚拟制作抠图数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: LED虚拟制作中背景实时渲染，后期修改困难且成本高；现有背景抠图方法依赖合成数据或并行卷积细节分支，导致真实场景边界伪影。需一种鲁棒、泛化的方法处理真实VP场景并支持后期背景替换。
light_analysis.method: 采用孪生冻结DINOv3 ViT分别编码输入帧和背景，交叉注意力模块比较两流以预测前景；用预训练图像引导特征上采样器替代传统细节分支，消除语义不对齐引起的边界伪影。同时构建CineMatte-4K数据集，包含4K HDR图像（绿幕插入非合成）和带相机轨迹的视频，支持任意背景渲染。
light_analysis.result: 在CineMatte-4K及VideoMatte240K、YouTubeMatte等公开基准上，CineMatte在虚拟制作场景中表现优异，并鲁棒泛化至真实世界视频，该方法无需依赖合成数据或复杂后处理。
light_analysis.conclusion: CineMatte结合交叉注意力与预训练ViT，有效解决了虚拟制作中的背景抠图难题，其数据集为后续研究提供真实基准。方法具有高实用价值，可扩展至电影制作、直播等领域，未来可优化推理速度或集成到渲染管线。

title: Causely: A Causal Intelligence Layer for Enterprise AI A Benchmark Study on SRE and Reliability Workflows
abstract: AI agents deployed into SRE workflows currently derive their understanding of environment state from raw observability telemetry at query time, paying a semantic-interpretation tax in tokens, latency, and inferential reliability. We propose Causely, a causal intelligence layer that maintains a structured representation of environment topology, attribute dependencies, and causal relationships that are anchroed to a ontological representation of the managed environment. Causely transforms raw telemetry into a live, queryable model providing the semantic and causal foundation AI agents require to diagnose, evaluate impact, and act safely in production. We evaluate this value proposition through a benchmark study conducted in a controlled setting with injected faults in a 24-microservice OpenTelemetry demo application. Our experiments compare four agent configurations (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, HolmesGPT with Sonnet and Gemini backends). Experiments are run with and without access to Causely under two scenarios: an active incident and a healthy baseline. On the active-fault scenario, causal grounding reduces mean time-to-diagnosis by 63\%, mean token consumption by 60\%, and mean tool-call count by 78\%, compressing the investigation footprint by 4.8$\times$ and lowering direct API cost per run by 57\%; root-cause-diagnosis accuracy rises from 75\% to 100\%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果智能层Causely，通过维护结构化环境拓扑和因果关系的实时模型，显著提升AI代理在SRE工作流中的诊断效率和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI代理在SRE工作流中直接使用原始可观测性遥测数据理解环境状态，导致语义解释开销大，包括高令牌消耗、延迟增加和推理可靠性不足。这种局限性影响了诊断效率和成本，亟需一种能够提供语义和因果基础的方法来提升AI代理的表现。
light_analysis.method: Causely构建并维护环境拓扑、属性依赖和因果关系的结构化表示，锚定于本体论，将原始遥测转化为实时可查询模型。在24微服务的OpenTelemetry演示应用中注入故障，比较Claude Code、OpenAI Codex、HolmesGPT（Sonnet和Gemini后端）四种代理配置在有/无Causely下的诊断表现。
light_analysis.result: 在主动故障场景中，Causely使平均诊断时间降低63%，平均令牌消耗减少60%，平均工具调用次数减少78%，调查足迹压缩4.8倍，直接API成本下降57%。根因诊断准确率从75%提升至100%。
light_analysis.conclusion: Causely通过因果智能层有效解决了AI代理在SRE工作流中的语义理解瓶颈，大幅提升诊断效率、准确性和成本效益，具有明确的工程应用价值。未来可进一步扩展因果模型的覆盖范围和通用性。

title: Improved Baselines with Representation Autoencoders
abstract: Representation Autoencoders (RAE) replace traditional VAE with pretrained vision encoders. In this paper, we systematically investigate several design choices and find three insights which simplify and improve RAE. First, we study a generalized formulation where the representation is defined as sum of the last k encoder layers rather than solely the final layer. This simple change greatly improves reconstruction without encoder finetuning or specialized data (e.g., text, faces). Second, we study the prevalent assumption that RAE (using pretrained representation as encoder) replaces representation alignment (REPA), which distills the same representation to intermediate layers instead. Through large-scale empirical analysis, we uncover a surprising finding: RAE and REPA exhibit complementary working mechanisms, allowing the same representation to be used as both encoder and target for intermediate diffusion layers. Finally, the original RAE struggles with classifier-free guidance (CFG) and requires training a second, weaker diffusion model for AutoGuidance (AG). We show that REPA itself can be viewed as x-prediction in RAE latent space. By simply re-parameterizing the output of the DiT model, it can provide guidance for "free". Overall, RAEv2 leads to more than 10x faster convergence over the original RAE, achieving a state-of-the-art gFID of 1.06 in just 80 epochs on ImageNet-256. On FDr^k, RAEv2 achieves a state-of-the-art 2.17 at just 80 epochs compared to the previous best 3.26 (800 epochs) without any post-training. This motivates EP_FID@k (epochs to reach unguided gFID <= k) as a measure of training efficiency. RAEv2 attains an EP_FID@2 of 35 epochs, versus 177 for the original RAE. We also validate our approach across diverse settings for text-to-image generation and navigation world models, showing consistent improvements. Code is available at https://raev2.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAEv2，通过三种关键改进显著提升表示自编码器性能，实现10倍以上收敛加速并在ImageNet-256上取得SOTA结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 原始RAE存在重建依赖编码器微调或特定数据、RAE与REPA关系不明确、分类器无引导下性能差需额外自动引导模型等问题。本文旨在系统研究设计选择，简化并改进RAE，使其更高效实用。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种改进：1）使用最后k层编码器层的和作为表示，改善重建；2）发现RAE和REPA互补，可共用相同表示作为编码器和中间扩散层目标；3）将REPA视为RAE隐空间中的x预测，通过重参数化DiT模型输出实现免费引导。最终得到RAEv2。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-256上，RAEv2在80个epoch内达到gFID 1.06，FDr^k达到2.17（此前最佳3.26需800epoch）。收敛速度比原始RAE快10倍以上，EP_FID@2为35epoch（原始177）。在文本到图像和导航世界模型中也取得一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAEv2简化并改进了RAE，引入训练效率度量EP_FID@k，为扩散模型表示学习提供新思路。实验验证了方法的有效性与泛化性，代码已开源，具有重要学术和实用价值。

title: ISEP: Implicit Support Expansion for Offline Reinforcement Learning via Stochastic Policy Optimization
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning methods typically enforce strict constraints to ensure safety; yet this rigidity often prevents the discovery of optimal behaviors outside the immediate support of the behavior policy. To address this, we propose Implicit Support Expansion via stochastic Policy optimization (ISEP), which leverages a value function interpolated between in-distribution data and policy samples to implicitly expand the feasible action support. This mechanism "densifies" high-reward regions, creating a navigable path for policy improvement while theoretically guaranteeing bounded value error. However, optimizing against this expanded support creates a multimodal landscape where standard deterministic averaging leads to mode collapse and invalid actions. ISEP mitigates this via a stochastic action selection strategy, optimizing the policy by stochastically alternating between conservative cloning and optimistic expansion signals. We instantiate this framework as ISEP-FM using Conditional Flow Matching utilizing classifier-free guidance to effectively capture the interpolated value signal.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ISEP方法，通过隐式支持扩展和随机策略优化，解决离线强化学习中严格约束导致的探索受限问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习方法通常施加严格约束以确保安全，但这种刚性往往阻止了在行为策略直接支持之外发现最优行为。现有方法因约束过紧而无法有效探索高奖励区域，限制了策略改进的可能性。ISEP旨在通过隐式扩展可行动作支持来克服这一局限，同时保证有界价值误差。
light_analysis.method: ISEP利用插值于分布内数据和策略样本之间的价值函数，隐式扩展动作支持，从而“致密化”高奖励区域。为应对多模态优化景观，采用随机动作选择策略，交替进行保守克隆和乐观扩展信号优化。使用条件流匹配（Conditional Flow Matching）实例化，结合无分类器引导有效捕获插值价值信号。
light_analysis.result: 论文从理论上保证了有界价值误差，实践上通过随机策略优化避免了模式坍塌和无效动作。尽管摘要未提供具体数值结果，但指出ISEP在离线强化学习任务中能够实现安全而有效的策略改进，优于传统严格约束方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ISEP为离线强化学习提供了一种隐式支持扩展框架，在保证安全的同时促进策略探索。其随机优化机制有效处理多模态策略分布，结合条件流匹配具有良好可扩展性。未来可进一步探索更复杂的价值函数插值策略或应用于高维连续控制任务。

title: The Symmetries of Three-Layer ReLU Networks
abstract: We develop a framework for analyzing parameter symmetries in deep ReLU networks and obtain a complete characterization of the generic parameter fibers for three-layer bottleneck architectures. Our approach provides explicit semi-algebraic descriptions of these fibers and yields a polynomial time algorithm for deciding functional equivalence of two parameters. The symmetries include discrete and continuous transformations arising from layer composition, and depend on whether deeper layers hide or preserve geometric structure from preceding layers. Finally, we show that some of these symmetries induce local conservation laws along gradient flow, while others do not.

light_analysis.overview: 首次完整刻画三层ReLU网络的参数对称性，并提出多项式时间的功能等价性判定算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度ReLU网络的参数空间存在多种对称性（如放缩、排列），导致不同参数可能对应相同函数。理解这些对称性对于网络的可解释性、优化（如梯度流行为）以及理论研究至关重要。现有工作多关注两层网络或特定对称性，缺乏对多层网络通用参数的系统刻画。本文旨在建立统一框架，揭示三层瓶颈架构中对称性的完整结构，并探讨其对梯度流的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个分析深度ReLU网络参数对称性的代数几何框架。通过构建显式的半代数描述，完整刻画了三层瓶颈架构（如编码器-解码器结构）的通用参数纤维（即所有产生相同函数的参数集合）。该描述包含离散对称（如神经元排列）和连续对称（如放缩变换），其具体形式取决于深层是否保留或隐藏前层的几何结构。基于此，设计了多项式时间算法判定两个参数是否功能等价。
light_analysis.result: 理论上完成了对三层ReLU网络（瓶颈架构）参数纤维的完全分类，给出了显式的半代数表示。算法层面，提出了多项式时间判定功能等价性的方法，显著优于穷举搜索。实验方面，摘要未明确说明，但框架可应用于验证对称性结构，并发现部分对称性（如排列）在梯度流下诱导局部守恒律，而另一些（如连续放缩）则不然。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为深度ReLU网络的参数对称性分析提供了系统框架，首次完整刻画了三层瓶颈网络的参数纤维。成果有助于理解深度网络的表达冗余、优化景观以及对称性驱动的动力学行为。学术上推进了神经网络代数几何理论，实际应用上可指导参数压缩和等价性验证。未来可扩展至更深的架构或非线性激活函数。

title: Dynamic Elliptical Graph Factor Models via Riemannian Optimization with Geodesic Temporal Regularization
abstract: Inferring time-varying graph structures from high-dimensional nodal observations is a fundamental problem arising in neuroscience, finance, climatology, and beyond. Two intrinsic challenges govern this problem: maintaining the \emph{temporal coherence} of the latent graph across successive observation windows, and respecting the \emph{intrinsic Riemannian geometry} of the symmetric positive definite manifold on which precision matrices naturally reside, a curved space whose geodesic structure departs fundamentally from that of the ambient Euclidean space. In this paper we propose dynamic estimation on the Grassmann manifold with a factor model (\textsc{Degfm}), a novel algorithm that jointly addresses both challenges. We model the time-varying precision matrix sequence as a low-rank-plus-diagonal structure governed by a latent elliptical graph factor model, which drastically reduces the effective parameter count and enables reliable estimation in the challenging small-sample regime. Temporal coherence is enforced through a Riemannian geodesic penalty defined on the Grassmann manifold, ensuring that the estimated graph trajectory is smooth with respect to the intrinsic geometry rather than the ambient Euclidean space. To solve the resulting non-convex optimization problem over Grassmann-manifold-valued sequences subject to the LRaD constraint, we derive an efficient Riemannian gradient descent algorithm that respects the manifold structure at every iterate and rigorously establish its convergence to a stationary point. Extensive experiments on both synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that \textsc{Degfm} consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across all evaluation metrics, confirming the practical effectiveness of the proposed framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种结合黎曼优化和测地线时间正则化的动态椭圆图因子模型，用于推断时变图结构，兼顾时间连贯性和流形几何。
light_analysis.motivation: 从高维节点观测中推断时变图结构是神经科学、金融、气候学等领域的核心问题。主要挑战在于维护潜在图在连续观测窗口间的时间连贯性，以及尊重精度矩阵内在的对称正定流形黎曼几何。现有方法常忽略流形的弯曲结构或低秩约束，导致小样本下估计不稳定。该研究旨在同时解决这两个挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出动态Grassmann流形因子模型（Degfm），将时变精度矩阵建模为低秩加对角结构，由潜在椭圆图因子模型驱动，有效减少参数。通过定义在Grassmann流形上的黎曼测地线惩罚强制时间连贯性，确保估计图轨迹符合内在几何而非欧氏空间。设计高效的黎曼梯度下降算法优化非凸问题，并在每步保持流形结构，证明收敛到稳定点。
light_analysis.result: 在合成基准和真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，Degfm在所有评估指标上 consistently 优于最先进的基线方法。具体性能提升幅度未在摘要中详述，但确认了方法的实践有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Degfm联合解决动态图推断中的时间连贯性和黎曼几何问题，通过低秩加对角结构和测地线正则化实现小样本下的可靠估计。学术上为流形优化和图序列估计提供新框架，实际中可应用于神经连接组、金融网络等场景。未来可能扩展至更一般的流形或非线性动态。

title: Wasserstein Equilibrium Decoding for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
abstract: Small vision-language models (2-8B) are well-suited for clin- ical deployment due to privacy constraints, limited connectivity, and low-latency requirements favouring on-device or on-premise inference. However, their limited capacity exacerbates the generation of plausible but incorrect outputs. We extend game-theoretic decoding, previously restricted to text-only, closed-ended NLP tasks, to vision-language mod- els for open-ended Medical VQA. We introduce a semantically aware Wasserstein stopping criterion that replaces lexical order matching, en- abling convergence based on semantic consensus among near-synonymous candidate answers and avoiding unnecessary iterations caused by clini- cally equivalent ranking swaps. On VQA-RAD and PathVQA, we ob- tain consistent, statistically significant improvements over greedy and discriminative baselines. On VQA-RAD, we improve Qwen3-VL-2B by +3.5 percentage points (p < 0.01), surpassing the greedy 4B model, with similar trends at larger scales. On PathVQA, Gemma-3-4B with BDG matches MedGemma-4B under greedy decoding despite no domain- specific fine-tuning. At accuracy parity with classic BDG, the Wasser- stein criterion reduces average convergence iterations by approximately 20%, improving inference efficiency while preserving the game-theoretic equilibrium behaviour. Code is available at https://github.com/luca-hagen/ Wasserstein-BDG-medical-VQA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Wasserstein平衡解码方法，基于语义共识的停止准则提升医疗视觉问答的可靠性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 小型视觉语言模型(2-8B)因隐私、连接和延迟限制适合临床部署，但其有限容量易产生看似合理但错误的输出。现有博弈论解码仅用于文本闭环NLP任务，无法直接应用于开放式的医疗视觉问答。需要一种能利用语义一致性的解码策略，避免因临床等价排名交换导致的不必要迭代，提升小模型在关键医疗场景中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 将博弈论解码扩展至视觉语言模型的开放式医疗VQA，提出语义感知的Wasserstein停止准则替代传统词汇顺序匹配。该准则基于近义候选答案间的语义共识判断收敛，避免临床等价排名交换带来的冗余迭代。方法无需领域特定微调，可应用于不同规模的视觉语言模型（如Qwen3-VL-2B、Gemma-3-4B）。
light_analysis.result: 在VQA-RAD上，Qwen3-VL-2B提升+3.5个百分点(p<0.01)，超越贪婪解码的4B模型；在PathVQA上，Gemma-3-4B使用BDG达到与领域微调MedGemma-4B相当的精度。在精度与经典BDG持平条件下，Wasserstein准则平均减少约20%收敛迭代次数，提升推理效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著提升小型视觉语言模型在医疗VQA中的可靠性和效率，通过语义感知的Wasserstein停止准则实现博弈论解码的首次视觉-语言扩展。具有临床部署价值，未来可探索更复杂的语义度量及多模态博弈策略。

title: Alignment Dynamics in LLM Fine-Tuning
abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong alignment through supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning from human feedback, the alignment is often fragile under subsequent fine-tuning. Existing explanations either attribute alignment fragility to gradient geometry or characterize it as a distributional shift in model outputs, yet few provide a unified account that bridges parameter-space learning dynamics with function-space alignment behavior during fine-tuning. In this work, we introduce a tractable alignment score and derive its closed-form update during fine-tuning, yielding a unified framework for alignment dynamics. Our analysis decomposes alignment updates into two competing components: a \textbf{\color{red!60!black} Rebound Force}, governed jointly by the current alignment state and the narrowness of model distribution, and a \textbf{\color{green!60!black} Driving Force}, determined by how the training distribution aligns with outcome-conditioned posteriors over aligned and non-aligned completions. This decomposition explains why prior alignment can be reversed by later fine-tuning and why narrower posterior structure strengthens such reversal. Moreover, our framework predicts a \textbf{Rehearsal Priming Effect}: prior alignment leaves a latent posterior imprint that amplifies the effective Driving Force upon re-exposure, leading to faster re-alignment. We validate these predictions across safety alignment, emergent misalignment, and sentiment settings, demonstrating consistent alignment reversal and accelerated re-alignment under re-exposure. In addition, controlled experiments in safety alignment confirm the predicted dependence of rebound strength on posterior narrowness. Together, these results provide a unified dynamical perspective on how alignment is disrupted and reactivated during LLM fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对齐动力学的统一框架，解释LLM微调中对齐的脆弱性与再激活机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在监督微调和人类反馈强化学习后虽能实现强对齐，但后续微调常导致对齐脆弱性。现有解释归因于梯度几何或输出分布偏移，但缺乏统一视角。本文旨在建立参数空间学习动态与函数空间对齐行为之间的桥梁，解释对齐为何被逆转以及如何快速恢复。
light_analysis.method: 引入一个可计算的对齐分数，并推导其在微调过程中的闭式更新，形成对齐动力学的统一框架。将对齐更新分解为两个竞争分量：由当前对齐状态和模型分布窄度共同控制的“回弹力”，以及由训练分布与对齐/未对齐完成的条件后验一致性决定的“驱动力”。框架还预测“排练启动效应”：先前的对齐会在后验中留下潜在印记，在重新暴露时放大有效驱动力，加速再对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在安全对齐、突发性错误对齐和情感设定中验证了预测：对齐逆转和再加速现象一致出现。安全对齐的受控实验证实回弹力强度对后验窄度的依赖性。实验结果为对齐动力学的统一视角提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了一个统一的对齐动力学框架，揭示了LLM微调中对齐被破坏和重新激活的机制。学术上深化了对齐脆弱性的理解，实际应用中有助于设计更鲁棒的对齐策略。局限性可能在于框架依赖的具体假设，未来工作可扩展到更多对齐场景。

title: PH-Dreamer: A Physics-Driven World Model via Port-Hamiltonian Generative Dynamics
abstract: World models built on recurrent state space architectures enable efficient latent imagination, yet remain physically unstructured, producing dynamics that violate conservation and dissipative principles. We introduce a unified Port-Hamiltonian framework that remedies this through three synergistic mechanisms. First, we embed implicit physical priors into recurrent transitions by modeling projected latent evolution as action controlled energy routing governed by flow and dissipation, biasing the projected PH phase space toward a more compact and physically structured representation. Second, we develop a kinematics aware energy world model that estimates the Hamiltonian and power balance from proprioceptive observations, providing an explicit physical signal for thermodynamic reasoning. Third, leveraging these energy gradients, we establish an energy guided Actor-Critic that uses Lagrangian multipliers to regularize policy optimization toward lower energy and smoother control.
