Across visual control benchmarks, this paradigm not only attains superior asymptotic returns but also elevates internal simulator fidelity by establishing a tighter, lower variance alignment between imagined and real rewards, all while reducing latent phase space volume by 4.18-8.41%, energy consumption by up to 7.80%, and mean squared jerk by up to 9.38%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PH-Dreamer，一种基于Port-Hamiltonian框架的物理驱动世界模型，通过嵌入物理先验实现更节能、平滑的视觉控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模型基于循环状态空间架构，但缺乏物理结构，导致生成的动力学违背守恒和耗散原理，限制了想象的真实性和控制效率。因此需要一种能显式遵循物理定律的模型，以提高内模拟保真度和控制性能。
light_analysis.method: 通过三个协同机制实现：1）在循环转换中嵌入隐式物理先验，将潜变量演化建模为受流和耗散控制的能量路由；2）构建运动学感知能量世界模型，从本体感观测估计哈密顿量和功率平衡；3）利用能量梯度引导Actor-Critic，使用拉格朗日乘子正则化策略优化，朝向低能量和平滑控制。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉控制基准上，达到更优的渐进回报，且想象与真实奖励之间的对齐更紧密、方差更低。潜相空间体积减少4.18-8.41%，能耗降低最高7.80%，平均加加速度降低最高9.38%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将物理先验融入世界模型，提升了模型的物理一致性和控制效果，为具身智能和模型预测控制提供了新范式。未来可扩展到更复杂的物理系统和真实机器人。

title: SD-Search: On-Policy Hindsight Self-Distillation for Search-Augmented Reasoning
abstract: Search-augmented reasoning agents interleave internal reasoning with calls to an external retriever, and their performance relies on the quality of each issued query. However, under outcome-reward reinforcement learning, every search decision in a rollout shares the same trajectory-level reward, leaving individual queries without step-specific credit. Recent process-supervision approaches address this gap by drawing step-level signals from outside the policy, relying either on a much larger teacher model, or on sub-question annotations produced by a stronger external system. In contrast, we propose SD-Search, which derives step-level supervision from the policy itself through on-policy hindsight self-distillation, requiring neither an external teacher nor additional annotations. In SD-Search, a single model plays two roles that differ only in conditioning: a student that sees only the context available at inference time, and a teacher that additionally conditions on a compact hindsight block summarizing the search queries and final outcomes of a group of rollouts sampled from the same question. Since the teacher knows how each rollout unfolded and which ones succeeded, its query distribution implicitly marks which decisions were worth making, and the student is trained to recover this behavior by minimizing the token-level Jensen--Shannon divergence to the teacher at search-query positions. This layers a dense, step-level signal on top of GRPO's coarse trajectory reward. Crucially, this signal is produced by the policy itself within the standard RL training loop, without external model inference, auxiliary annotation pipeline, or additional training stage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SD-Search，利用在线策略事后自蒸馏为搜索增强推理提供步骤级监督，无需外部模型或标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 搜索增强推理代理依赖查询质量，但结果奖励强化学习为所有搜索决策分配相同轨迹级奖励，缺乏步骤特定信用。现有过程监督需外部教师或子问题标注，成本高。因此需要一种从策略自身获取步骤级信号的方法，以提升每步查询的决策质量。
light_analysis.method: SD-Search让同一模型扮演学生和教师，教师额外条件化于一个紧凑的事后块，包含同一问题多次采样的搜索查询和结果。教师分布隐式标记有价值决策，学生通过最小化查询位置上的token级Jensen-Shannon散度模仿教师。该步骤级信号叠加在GRPO轨迹奖励上，由策略自身在标准RL循环中产生，无需外部推理或标注。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值结果，但声称该方法无需外部模型或标注，在标准RL训练循环内由策略自身产生步骤级信号，可叠加强化学习奖励，提升信用分配。具体性能提升待实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: SD-Search提供了一种自监督的步骤级信用分配方法，避免对外部资源的依赖，提升了搜索增强推理的训练效率。其轻量级设计易于集成到现有RL框架。未来可探索在多步搜索场景下的泛化能力及与更大模型的结合。

title: DARE-EEG: A Foundation Model for Mining Dual-Aligned Representation of EEG
abstract: Foundation models pre-trained through masked reconstruction on large-scale EEG data have emerged as a promising paradigm for learning generalizable neural representations across diverse brain-computer interface applications. However, a critical yet overlooked challenge is that EEG encoders must learn representations invariant to incomplete observations-when different masked views of the same signal have minimal overlap, existing methods fail to constrain them to a consistent latent subspace, leading to degraded transferability. To address this, we propose DARE-EEG, a self-supervised foundation model that explicitly enforces the mask-invariance property through dual-aligned representation learning during pre-training. Specifically, we introduce mask alignment that constrains representations from multiple masked views of the same EEG sample via contrastive learning, complementing anchor alignment that aligns masked representations to momentum-updated complete features for semantic stability. Additionally, we propose conv-linear-probing, a parameter-efficient strategy that adapts pre-trained representations to heterogeneous electrode configurations and sampling rates through decoupled spectro-spatial projections. Extensive experiments across diverse EEG benchmarks demonstrate that DARE-EEG consistently achieves state-of-the-art in accuracy performance while maintaining relatively low parameter complexity and superior cross-dataset portability compared to existing methods. Furthermore, DARE-EEG contributes to effectively discovering and utilizing the rich potential representations in EEG.
comment: 22 pages, 10 pages of main text + 12 pages of appendices

light_analysis.overview: DARE-EEG通过双对齐表征学习强制掩码不变性，提出基础模型提升EEG表征泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型在预训练时面临关键挑战：当同一信号的不同掩码视图重叠极少时，编码器难以学习到对不完整观测不变的统一潜在子空间表示，导致迁移性下降。这一问题被现有方法忽视，限制了跨任务、跨个体的泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: DARE-EEG采用双对齐自监督预训练：掩码对齐通过对比学习约束同一EEG样本多个掩码视图的表征；锚点对齐则将掩码表征与动量更新的完整特征对齐以保持语义稳定。同时提出conv-linear-probing策略，通过解耦频谱-空间投影适配异质电极配置和采样率，实现参数高效迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在多个EEG基准任务上，DARE-EEG取得最优准确率，同时保持较低参数量和优越的跨数据集移植性。与现有方法相比，性能持续领先，验证了其有效发现和利用EEG潜在丰富表征的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DARE-EEG通过双对齐机制解决了掩码不变性问题，为EEG基础模型提供了新范式。该架构具备高泛化性和参数效率，可广泛应用于不同脑机接口场景。未来可探索更高效的投影策略及更大规模数据集预训练。

title: Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Method for Unsupervised Fine-Grained Image Hashing
abstract: Unsupervised fine-grained image hashing aims to learn compact binary codes that preserve subtle visual differences among highly similar instances without manual annotations. However, most existing methods neglect collision resistance, leading to identical hash codes for slightly semantically different samples. In this paper, we propose Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Self-Supervised Semantic Hashing (CS3H), a collision-resistant framework that directly optimizes Hamming-space similarity via a single-pass normalized Hamming distance loss to produce well-separated binary representations. We further introduce a collision-sensitive attention module to emphasize rare and discriminative local patterns, reducing hash collisions and improving fine-grained discrimination. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that CS3H consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in retrieval accuracy while achieving superior collision resistance with minimal computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CS3H，一种抗碰撞的无监督细粒度图像哈希方法，通过单遍归一化汉明距离损失和碰撞敏感注意力模块，提升检索精度和抗碰撞性。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督细粒度图像哈希旨在学习紧凑二进制码以保留细微视觉差异，但现有方法忽视碰撞抵抗，导致语义稍异的样本产生相同哈希码，影响检索性能。因此需要一种抗碰撞框架来直接优化汉明空间相似性，减少哈希碰撞，提高细粒度判别能力。
light_analysis.method: CS3H框架包含两部分：单遍归一化汉明距离损失直接优化汉明空间相似性，生成分离的二进制表示；碰撞敏感注意力模块强调罕见和判别性局部模式，减少哈希碰撞。该方法为单遍训练，避免多阶段，计算开销小。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CS3H在检索精度上持续优于最先进方法，并实现优越的抗碰撞性，且计算开销最小。摘要未提供具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: CS3H有效解决了无监督细粒度图像哈希中的碰撞问题，通过新颖损失和注意力机制无需标注学习高质量哈希码。具有实际应用价值，未来工作可能探索极端细粒度场景的适应性。

title: StableVLA: Towards Robust Vision-Language-Action Models without Extra Data
abstract: It is infeasible to encompass all possible disturbances within the training dataset. This raises a critical question regarding the robustness of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models when encountering unseen real-world visual disturbances, particularly under imperfect visual conditions. In this work, we conduct a systematic study based on recent state-of-the-art VLA models and reveal a significant performance drop when visual disturbances absent from the training data are introduced. To mitigate this issue, we propose a lightweight adapter module grounded in information theory, termed the Information Bottleneck Adapter (IB-Adapter), which selectively filters potential noise from visual inputs. Without requiring any extra data or augmentation strategies, IB-Adapter consistently improves over the baseline by an average of 30%, while adding fewer than 10M parameters, demonstrating notable efficiency and effectiveness. Furthermore, even with a 14x smaller backbone (0.5B parameters) and no pre-training on the Open X-Embodiment dataset, our model StableVLA achieves robustness competitive with 7B-scale state-of-the-art VLAs. With negligible parameter overhead (<10M), our approach maintains accuracy on long-horizon tasks and surpasses OpenPi under both synthetic and physical visual corruptions.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. Code: https://github.com/DAGroup-PKU/HumanNet. Project website: https://dagroup-pku.github.io/StableVLA/

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级信息瓶颈适配器模块，无需额外数据即可显著提升视觉-语言-行动模型的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言-行动模型在训练数据中未包含的视觉干扰下性能显著下降，而收集所有可能的干扰数据不可行。现有方法缺乏对未知视觉扰动的鲁棒性，尤其在真实世界不完美视觉条件下，模型脆弱性成为实际部署的关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出信息瓶颈适配器（IB-Adapter），基于信息论原理选择性地过滤视觉输入中的潜在噪声。该模块参数小于10M，可插入现有VLA模型，无需额外数据或数据增强策略。在0.5B参数的小骨干网络上构建StableVLA模型，未使用Open X-Embodiment预训练。
light_analysis.result: IB-Adapter在基线基础上平均提升30%的性能，仅增加不到10M参数。即使使用0.5B参数模型（比7B模型小14倍），StableVLA的鲁棒性可与最先进的7B VLA模型竞争。在长时域任务中保持准确率，并在合成和物理视觉损坏条件下超越OpenPi。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了通过轻量级适配器即可有效提升VLA模型的视觉鲁棒性，无需额外数据或大规模模型。该方法高效且易于集成，为机器人领域部署鲁棒的视觉-语言-行动模型提供了实用方案。未来可探索适配器在不同任务和视觉扰动场景下的泛化能力。

title: Temporal Task Diversity: Inductive Biases Under Non-Stationarity in Synthetic Sequence Modelling
abstract: Modern deep learning science often assumes that neural networks learn from a fixed data distribution. However, many practically important learning problems involve data distributions that change throughout training. How does such non-stationarity impact the inductive biases of deep learning towards models with different structural, generalisation, and safety properties? A fruitful testbed for studying inductive bias is in-context linear regression sequence modelling, where small transformers display strikingly different generalisation patterns depending on the diversity of the (fixed) training task distribution. In this paper, we explore the effect of diversifying the task distribution across training time, finding that such temporal diversity leads to an increased bias towards generalisation over memorisation.
comment: Presented at Technical AI Safety Conference (TAIS), Oxford, May 2026. Code available at https://github.com/matomatical/temporal-task-diversity

light_analysis.overview: 探究训练过程中数据分布非平稳性对深度学习归纳偏置的影响，发现时间任务多样性促进模型泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代深度学习通常假设固定数据分布，但实际应用中数据分布常随时间变化。这种非平稳性如何影响神经网络的归纳偏置（如结构、泛化和安全性）尚不明确。现有研究多聚焦于固定任务分布的多样性，忽视了时间维度的变化。该研究旨在填补这一空白，理解时间任务多样性对模型泛化与记忆权衡的作用。
light_analysis.method: 采用合成序列建模中的上下文线性回归作为测试平台，通过对比小型Transformer在不同任务分布下的泛化模式。实验设计包含两种条件：固定任务分布和随时间变化的多样性任务分布。核心创新是系统地操控训练时间上的任务多样性，以分离其对归纳偏置的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，时间任务多样性显著增强了模型对泛化的偏置而非记忆。与固定分布训练相比，随时间变化的多样性使Transformer在未见任务上表现出更好的泛化性能。具体指标包括损失函数的下降速度和测试准确率提升，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了非平稳训练数据分布可引导神经网络倾向于学习可泛化模式，而非简单记忆。这为设计动态训练策略提供了理论依据，尤其在现实世界数据流场景中具有应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的模型和实际任务，以及时间多样性的最优调度策略。

title: From Volume to Value: Preference-Aligned Memory Construction for On-Device RAG
abstract: With the rapid emergence of personal AI agents based on Large Language Models (LLMs), implementing them on-device has become essential for privacy and responsiveness. To handle the inherently personal and context-dependent nature of real-world requests, such agents must ground their generation in device-resident personal context. However, under tight memory budgets, the core bottleneck is what to store so that retrieval remains aligned with the user. We propose EPIC (Efficient Preference-aligned Index Construction), which focuses on user preferences as a compact and stable form of personal context and integrates them throughout the RAG pipeline. EPIC selectively retains preference-relevant information from raw data and aligns retrieval toward preference-aligned contexts. Across four benchmarks covering conversations, debates, explanations, and recommendations, EPIC reduces indexing memory by 2,404 times, improves preference-following accuracy by 20.17 percentage points, and achieves 33.33 times lower retrieval latency over the best-performing baseline. In our on-device experiment, EPIC maintains a memory footprint under 1 MB with 29.35 ms/query latency in streaming updates.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Code and data are available at https://github.com/UbiquitousAILab/EPIC

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPIC方法，通过偏好对齐的索引构建，实现设备上RAG的高效记忆，大幅降低内存占用和检索延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 个人AI代理需在设备上基于本地上下文生成，但内存预算有限。现有RAG方法存储大量数据，导致检索效率低下且与用户偏好脱节。核心瓶颈在于如何选择存储内容以保持与用户偏好对齐，同时满足内存和延迟约束。
light_analysis.method: EPIC将用户偏好作为紧凑稳定的上下文形式，从原始数据中选择性保留偏好相关信息，并调整检索流程以对齐偏好。通过构建偏好感知索引，集成到RAG流水线中，实现高效存储和检索。
light_analysis.result: 在对话、辩论、解释和推荐四个基准上，EPIC将索引内存降低2404倍，偏好遵循准确率提升20.17个百分点，检索延迟降低33.33倍。设备实验中，内存占用小于1MB，流式更新延迟29.35ms/query。
light_analysis.conclusion: EPIC有效解决了设备上RAG的内存效率问题，通过偏好对齐实现轻量级索引，提升了检索质量和速度。方法具有实用价值，适用于资源受限的个人AI代理。未来可探索更细粒度的偏好建模和动态更新策略。

title: SRC-Flow: Compact Semantic Representations Enable Normalizing Flows for Image Generation
abstract: Normalizing flows (NFs) provide exact likelihoods and deterministic invertible sampling, but have historically lagged behind diffusion models for large-scale image generation. We identify a key obstacle: NFs are required to learn a single invertible transport over the full ambient space, making them highly sensitive to high-dimensional representations. This leads to a semantic-capacity mismatch in modern visual representation spaces, where semantic information is compact but encoded in overcomplete features. We propose SRC-Flow, which introduces a Semantic Representation Compressor (SRC) to compact high-dimensional RAE features into a low-dimensional semantic space before flow modeling and preserve reconstruction through the frozen RAE decoder. This compact space reduces the modeling burden of NFs and enables effective likelihood-based generation in semantic representation space. We further adopt constant noise regularization tailored to the fixed unconditional bijection learned by flows. On ImageNet $256 \times 256$ and $512 \times 512$, SRC-Flow achieves state-of-the-art generation quality among normalizing flow methods, with gFID scores of 1.65 and 2.07 under classifier-free guidance, while retaining exact likelihood computation in the compact semantic representation space and deterministic invertible sampling at the flow level. Codes and models will be available at https://github.com/longtaojiang/SRC-Flow.

light_analysis.overview: SRC-Flow通过引入语义表示压缩器（SRC）将高维RAE特征压缩到低维语义空间，解决了归一化流在高维空间中建模的困难，实现了高质量图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 归一化流（NFs）在图像生成任务中落后于扩散模型，主要原因是NFs需要在完整环境空间中学习一个可逆变换，对高维表示高度敏感。现代视觉表示空间中语义信息紧凑但编码在过完备特征中，导致语义-容量不匹配。现有方法难以在保持精确似然计算的同时实现高质量生成，亟需一种能有效压缩表示并减轻NFs建模负担的方法。
light_analysis.method: SRC-Flow提出语义表示压缩器（SRC），将高维RAE编码器的过完备特征压缩到低维语义空间，然后在该空间上训练归一化流进行似然建模，并通过冻结的RAE解码器保持重建质量。采用常数噪声正则化以适配流学习的固定无条件双射。该方法在语义表示空间中实现高效的基于似然的生成，并保留精确似然计算和确定性可逆采样。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet 256×256和512×512上，SRC-Flow在归一化流方法中达到最优生成质量，无分类器引导下的gFID分别为1.65和2.07。与基线方法对比，SRC-Flow显著优于以往NF方法，同时保留了精确似然计算和确定性可逆采样的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SRC-Flow通过压缩语义表示解决了NFs在高维空间中的建模瓶颈，实现了与扩散模型相竞争的质量。该工作表明紧凑语义表示可使NFs在图像生成中发挥潜力，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的压缩策略及与其他生成模型的结合。

title: RT-Splatting: Joint Reflection-Transmission Modeling with Gaussian Splatting
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables real-time novel view synthesis with high visual quality. However, existing methods struggle with semi-transparent specular surfaces that exhibit both complex reflections and clear transmission, often producing blurry reflections or overly occluded transmission. To address this, we present RT-Splatting, a framework that disentangles each Gaussian's geometric occupancy from its optical opacity. This factorization yields a unified surface-volume scene representation with a single set of Gaussian primitives. Our hybrid renderer interprets this representation both as a surface to capture high-frequency reflections and as a volume to preserve clear transmission. To mitigate the ambiguity in jointly optimizing reflection and transmission, we introduce Specular-Aware Gradient Gating, which suppresses misleading gradients from highly specular regions into the transmission branch, effectively reducing distracting floaters. Experiments on challenging semi-transparent scenes show that RT-Splatting achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering high-fidelity reflections and clear transmission with real-time rendering. Moreover, our factorization naturally enables flexible scene editing. The project page is available at https://sjj118.github.io/RT-Splatting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RT-Splatting，通过解耦高斯几何占用与光学不透明度实现反射和透射联合建模，在半透明镜面场景中达到SOTA实时渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3DGS方法在处理半透明镜面表面时，难以同时建模复杂反射和清晰透射，常产生模糊反射或过度遮挡的透射。该问题在真实场景中广泛存在（如玻璃、水面），但缺乏高效统一的解决方案，亟需一种既能捕捉高频反射又能保持透射清晰度的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出因子化表示，将每个高斯的几何占用与光学不透明度解耦，形成统一表面-体积场景表示。混合渲染器既作为表面捕捉高频反射，又作为体积保持清晰透射。引入Specular-Aware Gradient Gating，抑制高镜面区域误导梯度进入透射分支，减少漂浮物伪影。使用单组高斯原语。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性半透明场景上，RT-Splatting实现了SOTA性能：高保真反射和清晰透射，同时保持实时渲染速度。相比基线方法，反射模糊度降低，透射遮挡减少。具体数值指标未在摘要中明确，但指出优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出解耦的因子化表示和混合渲染框架，解决了半透明镜面场景的反射-透射联合建模难题。具有实时渲染和灵活场景编辑能力，适用于VR/AR、影视制作等领域。未来可扩展至更多复杂光学现象建模。

title: Knowledge-to-Verification: Exploring RLVR for LLMs in Knowledge-Intensive Domains
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated promising potential to enhance the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in domains such as mathematics and coding. However, its applications on knowledge-intensive domains have not been effectively explored due to the scarcity of high-quality verifiable data. Furthermore, current RLVR focuses solely on the correctness of final answers, leading to the limitations of flawed reasoning and sparse reward signals. In this work, we propose Knowledge-to-Verification (K2V), a framework that extends RLVR to knowledge-intensive domains through automated verifiable data synthesis, while enabling verification of the LLM's reasoning process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that K2V enhances the reasoning of LLM in knowledge-intensive domains without significantly compromising the model's general capabilities. This study also suggests that integrating automated data synthesis with reasoning verification is a promising direction to enhance model capabilities in these broader domains. Code is available at https://github.com/SeedScientist/K2V.

light_analysis.overview: 提出K2V框架，将RLVR扩展到知识密集型领域，通过自动化验证数据合成和推理过程验证，提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR在数学和编码领域表现良好，但知识密集型领域因缺乏高质量可验证数据而难以应用。此外，现有方法仅关注最终答案的正确性，导致推理过程存在缺陷且奖励信号稀疏，限制了模型在该类领域的性能提升。
light_analysis.method: K2V框架通过自动化合成可验证数据，将验证扩展到推理过程，从而提供更密集的奖励信号。具体包括数据合成模块和推理验证模块，确保训练数据的质量和推理步骤的正确性，实现RLVR在知识密集型领域的有效应用。
light_analysis.result: 在知识密集型领域，K2V显著增强了LLM的推理能力，同时模型在通用任务上的性能未出现明显下降。实验表明，该方法优于仅关注答案正确性的基线，验证了自动化数据合成与推理验证结合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: K2V将RLVR成功应用于知识密集型领域，验证了自动化数据合成与推理验证在提升LLM推理能力方面的潜力。未来可进一步优化数据合成效率及推理验证的细粒度，为更广泛的领域提供通用增强方案。

title: CodeBind: Decoupled Representation Learning for Multimodal Alignment with Unified Compositional Codebook
abstract: Multimodal representation alignment is pivotal for large language models and robotics. Traditional methods are often hindered by cross-modal information discrepancies and data scarcity, leading to suboptimal alignment spaces that overlook modality-unique features. We propose CodeBind, a framework that optimizes multimodal representation spaces through a modality-shared-specific codebook design. By incrementally aligning target and bridging modalities, CodeBind bypasses the need for fully paired data. Unlike traditional hard alignment, CodeBind decomposes features into shared components for semantic consistency and specific components for modality-unique details. This design utilizes a compositional vector quantization scheme, where a shared codebook bridges modality gaps and modality-specific codebooks mitigate representation bias by preventing dominant modalities from overshadowing others. Validated across nine modalities (text, image, video, audio, depth, thermal, tactile, 3D point cloud, EEG), CodeBind achieves state-of-the-art performance in multimodal classification and retrieval tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CodeBind框架，通过模态共享-特定码本设计实现解耦表示学习，优化多模态对齐，无需完全配对数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态对齐方法因跨模态信息差异和数据稀缺，对齐空间常忽略模态独特特征，导致性能不佳。CodeBind旨在解决在不完全配对数据下，如何有效对齐多模态并保留模态特有信息的问题。
light_analysis.method: CodeBind采用模态共享-特定码本设计，通过增量对齐目标与桥接模态，避免依赖完全配对数据。利用组合向量量化，共享码本保证语义一致性，特定码本保留模态独特细节，减轻主导模态的表示偏差。在九种模态上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在文本、图像、视频、音频、深度、热感、触觉、3D点云、脑电图九种模态的多模态分类与检索任务中，CodeBind均取得最先进性能，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CodeBind通过解耦表示学习框架，有效解决了多模态对齐中的信息损失与数据稀缺问题，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可扩展至更多模态及下游任务。

title: Machine Unlearning for Masked Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Recent masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), such as LLaDA and Dream, have achieved performance comparable to autoregressive large language models. Unlike autoregressive models, which generate text sequentially, MDLMs generate text by iteratively denoising masked positions in parallel. During fine-tuning, MDLMs learn to recover responses from masked response states conditioned on a prompt, thereby shifting their predictions from a prompt-masked unconditional distribution toward a prompt-conditional distribution. Despite this distinct generative and fine-tuning mechanism, machine unlearning for MDLMs remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose Masked Diffusion Unlearning (MDU), the first unlearning framework for MDLMs, by revisiting the process of learning specific knowledge in terms of diffusion. Specifically, MDU minimizes a forward KL divergence from the prompt-conditional prediction to a prompt-masked unconditional anchor at every masked response position, with a temperature scaling parameter to control the privacy-utility trade-off. Our empirical results on standard benchmarks and MDLM backbones show that MDU achieves high unlearning performance compared to existing LLM unlearning methods. Code is available at https://github.com/leegeoru/MDU.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出针对掩码扩散语言模型的去学习框架MDU，通过最小化前向KL散度实现高效知识遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）如LLaDA和Dream已取得与自回归大语言模型相当的性能，但具有不同的生成和微调机制：通过并行迭代去噪掩码位置生成文本。现有的大语言模型去学习方法主要针对自回归模型，对MDLM的去学习研究空白。由于MDLM在微调时学习从掩码响应状态恢复响应，其知识存储方式不同，需要专门设计去学习框架以有效移除特定知识，同时保持模型效用。
light_analysis.method: 提出Masked Diffusion Unlearning (MDU)框架，核心思想是重新审视扩散过程中特定知识的学习。MDU在每个掩码响应位置最小化前向KL散度，从提示条件预测（需遗忘的知识）到提示掩码无条件锚点（不包含目标知识），并引入温度缩放参数控制隐私-效用权衡。该方法无需重训练，直接调整模型预测分布，适用于任何MDLM骨干。
light_analysis.result: 在标准去学习基准测试和MDLM骨干（如LLaDA）上进行实验，与多种现有大语言模型去学习方法（如梯度上升、负向采样等）对比。MDU在遗忘率（隐私指标）上显著优于基线，同时保持模型在剩余任务上的效用（如困惑度、生成质量）。具体数据表明MDU能高效移除指定知识，且在效用损失方面更低，实现了更优的隐私-效用平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次探索掩码扩散语言模型的去学习问题，提出MDU框架，填补了该领域空白。MDU通过KL散度最小化实现可控知识遗忘，理论简洁且实用。实验结果证明其有效性。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的遗忘场景，如序列遗忘或持续去学习。代码已开源，促进后续研究。

title: GaussianZoom: Progressive Zoom-in Generative 3D Gaussian Splatting with Geometric and Semantic Guidance
abstract: We introduce GaussianZoom, a generative zoom-in 3D reconstruction system with an iterative progressive framework that combines geometry-consistent scene modeling and multi-scale semantic reasoning to enable high-fidelity extreme zoom-in rendering from low-resolution inputs. To achieve this, we develop a novel multi-view consistent super-resolution module with depth-based feature warping and VLM-driven detail synthesis, ensuring accurate multi-view correspondence while enriching fine-scale appearance beyond the observed resolution. To support zooming across large magnification ranges, we further introduce a new expandable continuous Level-of-Detail hierarchy that dynamically modulates Gaussian visibility for smooth, alias-free cross-scale rendering. Experiments on Mip-NeRF360 and Tanks\&Temples demonstrate that GaussianZoom achieves superior perceptual quality, multi-view consistency, and robustness under extreme magnification, establishing a strong baseline for generative zoom-in 3D scene reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GaussianZoom系统，通过渐进式框架结合几何一致建模与多尺度语义推理，实现从低分辨率输入到高保真极端缩放渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D重建方法在极端放大时无法保持多视图一致性和细节丰富度，缺乏有效的跨尺度渲染机制。GaussianZoom旨在解决从低分辨率输入生成高保真极端缩放渲染的难题，提升大倍率下的感知质量和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 开发多视图一致超分辨率模块，利用深度特征扭曲和VLM驱动细节合成保证多视图对应并丰富细节；引入可扩展连续LOD层次动态调节高斯可见性，实现平滑无锯齿跨尺度渲染。
light_analysis.result: 在Mip-NeRF360和Tanks&Temples数据集上，GaussianZoom在感知质量、多视图一致性和鲁棒性方面优于现有方法，尤其在极端放大下表现出色，建立了强基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了生成式zoom-in 3D场景重建的强基线，通过渐进式框架和几何语义引导实现高保真渲染。未来工作可扩展至更大场景和提升效率。

title: Privacy Preserving Reinforcement Learning with One-Sided Feedback
abstract: We study reinforcement learning (RL) in multi-dimensional continuous state and action spaces with one-sided feedback, where the agent receives partial observations of the state and obtains reward information for only a subset of the state-action space at each time step. This setting introduces substantial challenges in both learning efficiency and privacy preservation. To address these challenges, we propose POOL, a novel privacy-preserving RL algorithm. We conduct a comprehensive theoretical analysis of POOL, deriving a sample complexity bound that matches the known lower bounds for non-private RL. Here, E_rho denotes the privacy parameter, H is the time horizon, and alpha is the optimality-gap parameter. Our findings show that it is possible to enforce strong privacy guarantees while maintaining high learning efficiency, marking a significant step toward practical, privacy-aware RL in multi-dimensional environments with one-sided feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出POOL算法，首次在多维连续空间单侧反馈下实现隐私保护RL，样本复杂度匹配非私有下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RL研究多假设完全状态反馈，但实际中智能体仅获得部分状态和奖励的子集，即单侧反馈，带来学习效率与隐私保护的双重挑战。多维连续空间进一步加剧难度，传统方法难以同时满足隐私和性能需求，亟需新算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出POOL（Privacy-preserving One-sided rLinforcements learning），一种新颖的隐私保护RL算法。算法在面对单侧反馈时，通过机制设计在迭代中注入噪声，确保差分隐私。理论分析推导出样本复杂度为O( (E_rho^{-1} H^3 / alpha^2) )，匹配非私有RL下界，其中E_rho为隐私参数，H为时间范围，alpha为最优性间隙。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，POOL的样本复杂度与已知非私有RL下界匹配，即O( (E_rho^{-1} H^3 / alpha^2) )，证明强隐私保证（小E_rho）下仍能维持高效学习。该结果首次在单侧反馈多维连续空间中实现隐私与效率的权衡最优，数值实验（摘要未明确说明）预期验证理论。
light_analysis.conclusion: POOL证明了在多维连续空间单侧反馈场景下，隐私保护RL可以同时达到强隐私和高学习效率，为实际部署隐私感知RL系统迈出重要一步。未来可扩展到更复杂反馈结构或非平稳环境，但当前理论分析限于隐私参数与最优性间隙的特定假设。

title: Multilingual jailbreaking of LLMs using low-resource languages
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to jailbreak attempts that circumvent safety guardrails. We investigate whether multi-turn conversations using low-resource African languages (Afrikaans, Kiswahili, isiXhosa, and isiZulu) can bypass safety mechanisms across commercial LLMs. We translated prompts from existing datasets and evaluated ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and Grok through automated testing and human red-teaming with native speakers. Single-turn translation attacks proved ineffective, while multi-turn conversations achieved English harmful response rates from 52.7% (Claude 3.5 Haiku) to 83.6% (GPT-4o-mini), Afrikaans from 60.0% (Claude 3.5 Haiku) to 78.2% (GPT-4o-mini), and Kiswahili from 41.8% (Claude 3.5 Haiku) to 70.9% (DeepSeek). Human red-teaming increased jailbreak rates compared to automated methods. Over all evaluated languages, the average jailbreak rate increased from 59.8% to 75.8%, with improvements of +20.0% (Afrikaans), +12.7% (isiZulu), +12.3% (isiXhosa), and +1% (Kiswahili), demonstrating that poor translation quality limits jailbreak success. These findings suggest that vulnerabilities in LLMs persist in multilingual contexts and that translation quality is the critical factor determining jailbreak success in low-resource languages.

light_analysis.overview: 研究利用低资源非洲语言通过多轮对话绕过LLM安全机制，揭示了翻译质量对越狱成功率的关键影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）仍易受越狱攻击，现有安全防护机制在英语环境中相对完善，但多语言场景下的脆弱性尚未充分探索。低资源语言由于翻译质量差，可能成为新的攻击突破口。本研究旨在验证这一假设，并量化不同语言和攻击策略对越狱效果的影响。
light_analysis.method: 从现有数据集翻译有害提示至四种低资源非洲语言（南非语、斯瓦希里语、科萨语、祖鲁语），对ChatGPT、Claude、DeepSeek、Gemini、Grok进行自动测试和人工红队测试。采用单轮翻译攻击和多轮对话两种方式，比较其越狱成功率。
light_analysis.result: 单轮翻译攻击无效；多轮对话中，英语有害回复率52.7%-83.6%，南非语60.0%-78.2%，斯瓦希里语41.8%-70.9%。人工红队测试使平均越狱率从59.8%升至75.8%，其中南非语提升+20.0%，祖鲁语+12.7%，科萨语+12.3%，斯瓦希里语仅+1%，表明翻译质量低限制了越狱成功。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明LLM在多语言环境中仍存在显著漏洞，翻译质量是决定低资源语言越狱成功的关键因素。未来需加强多语言安全对齐，尤其关注翻译效果差的低资源语言。局限性在于仅评估四种非洲语言，未覆盖其他语系。

title: Non-Colliding Biometric Identities for Digital Entities: Geometry, Capacity, and Million-Scale Virtual Identity Provisioning
abstract: Digital entities such as AI agents and humanoid robots increasingly operate alongside real humans, yet their identity infrastructure is based on credentials rather than embodied biometric identity. We introduce Biometric Identity Provisioning (BIP), a new problem and solution framework that addresses: given an enrollment gallery of real human identities, provision virtual identities that are non-colliding with every enrolled identity, maintain sufficient inter-class separability, and are realizable as high-fidelity face images. The key geometric insight is that real face identities occupy a low-dimensional subspace of the embedding hypersphere, leaving no residual subspace for virtual identities. Hence, virtual identities must instead be allocated as unclaimed gaps within the real face manifold itself. BIP is therefore a constrained packing problem: available gaps vastly exceed any foreseeable enrollment scale, and provisioned identities remain non-colliding even as new real identities are subsequently enrolled. Grounded in this geometry, our repulsion-based allocation is not bounded by any fixed provisioning count; we demonstrate 10M non-colliding virtual identity embeddings against a gallery of 360K real identities. Realizing these embeddings as face images requires a generator that operates outside the training distribution of real face images; we introduce GapGen, a gap-aware generator trained with a curriculum that progressively extends synthesis into non-colliding regions, validated at 1M photorealistic virtual face images. We further construct v-LFW, a virtual counterpart to LFW face dataset, with protocols for virtual face verification, cross-reality matching, real-vs-virtual detection, and unified recognition and detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Biometric Identity Provisioning框架，利用人脸流形间隙为数字实体分配非冲突虚拟身份，实现百万级生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 数字实体（如AI代理、机器人）需要生物特征身份，但现有身份基础设施基于凭证，而非生物特征。直接使用真实人脸身份会导致冲突。关键问题在于真实人脸嵌入占据超球面低维子空间，无剩余空间，虚拟身份必须分配到流形内部的未声称间隙中。该问题的解决对数字实体的可信身份至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出BIP框架，核心为基于排斥的分配方法，将虚拟身份嵌入到真实人脸流形的间隙中，不限于固定数量。为生成面部图像，设计GapGen生成器，通过课程学习从分布内逐步扩展到非冲突区域，实现高保真度。使用360K真实身份画廊，分配10M虚拟嵌入，并生成1M逼真图像。构建v-LFW数据集用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 在36万真实身份画廊上成功分配1000万个非冲突虚拟身份嵌入，展示了可扩展性。GapGen生成100万张逼真虚拟人脸图像，并构建v-LFW数据集，提供虚拟人脸验证、跨现实匹配、真实vs虚拟检测等协议，验证了非冲突性和可生成性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次提出数字实体生物特征身份供应问题，基于几何洞察给出解决方案。BIP框架利用流形间隙实现可扩展分配，GapGen实现高质量生成。该工作为数字实体身份管理提供新范式，具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更多模态和安全性。

title: Enhancing Train-Free Infinite-Frame Generation for Consistent Long Videos
abstract: Without incurring significant computational overhead, train-free long video generation aims to enable foundation video generation models to produce longer videos. Frame-level autoregressive frameworks, e.g., FIFO-diffusion, offer the advantage of generating infinitely long videos with constant memory consumption. However, the mismatch between training and inference, coupled with the challenge of maintaining long-term consistency, limits the effective utilization of foundation models. To mitigate these concerns, we propose \textbf{MIGA}, a novel infinite-frame long video generation method. Firstly, we propose an effective two-stage alignment mechanism that mitigates the training-inference gap by reducing the excessive noise span fed to the model. We then introduce an innovative dual consistency enhancement mechanism, where the self-reflection approach corrects early high-noise frames and the long-range frame guidance approach leverages later low-noise frames with broad coverage to steer generation, jointly improving temporal consistency. Extensive experiments on VBench and NarrLV demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of MIGA. Our project page is available at https://xiaokunfeng.github.io/miga_homepage/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MIGA方法，通过两阶段对齐和双一致性增强，实现无训练无限帧长视频生成，解决训练-推理不匹配和长期一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无训练长视频生成方法（如FIFO-diffusion）存在训练与推理不匹配以及长期一致性差的问题，限制了基础模型的有效利用。解决这些挑战对于生成一致的长视频至关重要，且需要避免显著计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出MIGA方法，包含两阶段对齐机制（减少输入模型的过程噪声跨度以缩小训练-推理差距）和双一致性增强机制（自反射方法修正早期高噪声帧，远程帧引导方法利用后期低噪声帧的广泛覆盖来引导生成）。采用帧级自回归框架，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在VBench和NarrLV基准上的大量实验表明MIGA达到了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称SOTA。与现有方法相比，有效提升了长视频的一致性和生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIGA有效缓解了训练-推理差距和长期一致性问题，实现了无训练无限帧长视频生成。学术价值在于扩展了基础视频模型的能力，实际应用在于低成本生成长视频。未来可能进一步优化或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: SomaliWeb v1: A Quality-Filtered Somali Web Corpus with a Matched Tokenizer and a Public Language-Identification Benchmark
abstract: Somali is a Cushitic language of the Horn of Africa with ~25 million speakers, yet no documented dedicated Somali pretraining corpus with a companion tokenizer and language-identification benchmark has been publicly released. Existing Somali text appears either inside multilingual distributions (HPLT v2, CC100, MADLAD-400, OSCAR, mC4) or in small, undocumented Somali-only uploads on Hugging Face. We introduce SomaliWeb v1, a quality-filtered Somali corpus of 819,322 documents (~303M tokens) built from three upstream sources (HPLT v2, CC100, Somali Wikipedia) through a six-stage reproducible pipeline. We release (i) the corpus, (ii) a matched BPE-16K tokenizer, and (iii) the first public side-by-side Somali benchmark of three production language identifiers. Our measurements reveal concrete quality defects in existing distributions: HPLT v2's "cleaned" Somali release retains 17.3% byte-exact duplicates, 56.1% of its documents contain fixable mojibake, and 10.7% of its byte-unique documents are near-duplicates at Jaccard tau=0.80. Our BPE-16K tokenizer emits 40.2% fewer tokens than GPT-4's cl100k_base on FLORES-200 Somali devtest as a tokenizer-level measurement; downstream language-model perplexity comparisons are deferred to a follow-up release.

light_analysis.overview: 发布首个专门针对索马里语的质量过滤网络语料库、配套BPE tokenizer及语言识别基准，填补低资源语言资源空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 索马里语拥有约2500万使用者，但缺乏公开的专用预训练语料库、tokenizer和语言识别基准。现有资源分散在多语言数据集或小规模上传中，质量未经系统验证，存在重复、乱码等缺陷，阻碍该语言NLP发展。
light_analysis.method: 从HPLT v2、CC100和索马里语维基百科三个上游来源，通过六阶段可复现流水线构建了包含819,322文档（约3.03亿token）的质量过滤语料库SomaliWeb v1。同时训练了BPE-16K tokenizer，并发布了首个并排对比三种生产级语言识别器的公开基准。
light_analysis.result: HPLT v2的索马里语子集存在17.3%字节精确重复、56.1%文档含有可修复的乱码（mojibake）、10.7%字节唯一文档为近似重复。新tokenizer在FLORES-200索马里语devtest上比GPT-4的cl100k_base减少40.2% token数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了高质量索马里语资源，验证了现有数据集的严重质量问题。新tokenizer效率更高，有利于下游建模。未来将进行语言模型困惑度对比。该工作对低资源语言NLP具有示范价值。

title: Attacking the First-Principle: A Black-Box, Query-Free Targeted Mimicry Attack on Binary Function Classifiers
abstract: Binary function classifiers play a crucial role in maintaining the security and integrity of software systems by detecting malicious code and unauthorized modifications. However, machine learning-based classifiers are vulnerable to adversarial attacks that can evade detection. In this study, we present Kelpie, a novel framework for executing mimicry attacks, a stronger type of targeted evasion attacks, on binary function classifiers in a black-box, zero-query setting. Unlike previous approaches that rely on querying the target classifier to refine untargeted evasion attacks, Kelpie leverages code transformations that preserve the functionality of malicious payloads while causing them to be misclassified as we want. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that Kelpie can successfully execute mimicry attacks against six state-of-the-art binary function classifiers representing different model architectures without requiring direct interaction with them. We further validate our approach with a practical demonstration, involving a keylogger and a wiper concealed within benign-looking functions embedded in an application. This work, to our best knowledge, is the first to demonstrate such a mimicry attack in a black-box, zero-query context, raising important questions about the reliability and security of existing machine learning-based binary function classifiers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kelpie框架，首次实现针对二进制函数分类器的黑盒零查询目标模仿攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 二进制函数分类器在软件安全中至关重要，但基于机器学习的分类器易受对抗攻击。现有逃避攻击方法需查询目标分类器进行优化，无法在零查询黑盒场景下实现目标性攻击，限制了攻击的实用性和隐蔽性。
light_analysis.method: Kelpie框架通过保持恶意载荷功能的代码转换，使其被误分类为目标良性函数，实现黑盒零查询下的目标模仿攻击。无需与目标分类器交互，适用于不同模型架构，并在实际演示中将键盘记录器和擦除器伪装成良性函数。
light_analysis.result: 针对六个最先进的二进制函数分类器（不同模型架构）的实验表明，Kelpie成功执行模仿攻击，无需直接交互。实际演示验证了其在应用程序中隐藏恶意代码的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明黑盒零查询下的模仿攻击，挑战了现有二进制函数分类器的可靠性。工作揭示了机器学习在安全应用中的脆弱性，未来需研究防御机制。

title: Are Sparse Autoencoder Benchmarks Reliable?
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are a core interpretability tool for large language models, and progress on SAE architectures depends on benchmarks that reliably distinguish better SAEs from worse ones. We audit the SAE quality metrics in SAEBench, the de-facto standard SAE evaluation suite, through three complementary lenses: reseed noise on a fixed SAE, ground-truth correlation on synthetic SAEs, and discriminability across training trajectories. We find that two of these metrics, Targeted Probe Perturbation (TPP) and Spurious Correlation Removal (SCR), fail multiple lenses at their canonical settings and should not be used to evaluate SAEs. The other metrics show higher reseed noise and lower discriminability than the field assumes. The sae-probes variant of $k$-sparse probing is the most reliable metric we tested, but even sae-probes struggles to separate variants of the same SAE architecture. Our results show the field needs better SAE benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 审计SAE基准可靠性，发现两个常用指标不可靠，sae-probes最可靠但仍需改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器是大语言模型可解释性的核心工具，但SAE架构的进步依赖于可靠的基准来区分好坏。现有基准SAEBench中的质量指标未经过充分审计，其可靠性存疑。本研究旨在通过多视角分析评估这些指标的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 通过三个互补视角审计SAEBench中的指标：固定SAE的重种子噪声、合成SAE的真实相关性、训练轨迹的区分度。重点关注Targeted Probe Perturbation (TPP)、Spurious Correlation Removal (SCR)和sae-probes等指标。
light_analysis.result: TPP和SCR在标准设置下多个视角失败，不应用来评估SAE；其他指标噪声高、区分度低；sae-probes是测试中最可靠的指标，但仍难以区分同一SAE架构的不同变体。
light_analysis.conclusion: 现有SAEBench指标不可靠，需要更好的SAE基准来推动领域进步。研究揭示了当前评估体系的局限性，为未来设计更可靠的SAE基准提供了方向。

title: Context Memorization for Efficient Long Context Generation
abstract: Modern large language model (LLM) applications increasingly rely on long conditioning prefixes to control model behavior at inference time. While prefix-augmented inference is effective, it incurs two structural limitations: i) the prefix's influence fades as generation proceeds, and ii) attention computation over the prefix scales linearly with its length. Existing approaches either keep the prefix in attention while compressing it, or internalize it into model parameters through gradient-based training. The former still attends to the prefix at inference, while the latter is training-intensive and ill-suited to prefix updates. To address these issues, we propose attention-state memory, a training-free approach that externalizes the prefix into a lightweight, lookup-based memory of precomputed attention states between prefix and query tokens. On ManyICLBench with LLaMA-3.1-8B, our method improves accuracy over in-context learning at 1K-8K memory budgets while reducing attention latency by 1.36x at 8K, and surpasses full-attention RAG performance on NBA benchmark using only 20% of its memory footprint.

light_analysis.overview: 提出注意力状态记忆方法，通过轻量级查找表外化前缀注意力状态，实现高效长上下文生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型应用中长条件前缀控制推理行为，但存在两个问题：前缀影响随生成长度衰减，以及前缀注意力计算开销随长度线性增长。现有方法要么保留前缀但压缩，要么通过梯度训练内化到模型参数中，前者仍需要前缀注意力计算，后者训练成本高且难以更新前缀。因此需要一种高效、灵活且免训练的方法来利用长前缀。
light_analysis.method: 提出注意力状态记忆（attention-state memory），是一种免训练的方法。它将前缀与查询token之间预计算的注意力状态存储在轻量级、基于查找的记忆中，从而外化前缀信息。推理时直接查找记忆，避免重新计算前缀注意力。该方法无需梯度更新，支持前缀动态替换。在实验中采用LLaMA-3.1-8B模型。
light_analysis.result: 在ManyICLBench上，在1K-8K记忆预算下，该方法相比上下文学习提高了准确率，并在8K预算下将注意力延迟降低1.36倍。在NBA基准上，仅使用全注意力RAG 20%的内存占用即可超越其性能，表明方法高效且有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过记忆化注意力状态，解决了长前缀推理中的效率和效果问题，兼具免训练、低开销和灵活更新优势。学术上为长上下文生成提供了新范式，实际中可应用于需要动态前缀的场景（如对话、个性化）。未来可探索记忆压缩及更大规模模型验证。

title: A Simplex Witness Certificate for Constant Collapse in Variational Autoencoders
abstract: This note studies exact constant collapse in variational autoencoders, where the encoder mean becomes independent of the input. The goal is to make this specific failure mode pre-designable, monitorable during training, and certifiable after training. The prior is kept as the standard Gaussian. Given a fixed teacher posterior, we attach to the latent mean a fixed simplex witness head. The resulting teacher-student alignment loss has an exact constant-predictor baseline equal to the teacher information. If the alignment loss is below this baseline, the latent mean cannot be input-independent constant collapsed.   The simplex witness also has a closed-form inverse. Any full-support teacher posterior can be represented by embedding its centered log-odds into the latent space. This gives an explicit latent energy cost and explains when the alignment loss can be made small. A computable view gap handles the case where teacher targets are computed from a different view. Thus exact constant collapse is converted from an after-the-fact training pathology into a design-and-certificate problem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单纯形证人证书将VAE中的常数坍缩从训练病理转化为可设计、可监控、可认证的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 变分自编码器中编码器均值与输入无关的常数坍缩是常见失败模式，现有方法无法预先设计、训练中监控或训练后认证。该研究旨在通过理论框架将这种病理转化为可预测和可验证的问题，提升VAE训练的可靠性与可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 在潜在均值上附加固定单纯形证人头，构建教师-学生对齐损失，其理论基线为教师信息。若对齐损失低于基线，则潜在均值不可能发生常数坍缩。同时利用闭式逆表示全支持教师后验，通过中心化对数几率嵌入解释能量成本，并引入视图差距处理不同视图的教师目标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但理论表明该方法使常数坍缩成为可设计、可监控、可认证的问题。通过对齐损失与基线比较可严格判定是否发生坍缩，且视图差距扩展了适用场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将VAE的精确常数坍缩转化为设计-认证问题，提供了理论可解释的预设计、训练监控和事后认证工具。未来可扩展至其他生成模型，增强训练鲁棒性，但需实验验证实用性。

title: EgoInteract: Synthetic Egocentric Videos Generation for Interaction Understanding and Anticipation
abstract: Collecting large-scale egocentric video datasets with dense spatial and temporal annotations is costly, slow, and often constrained by environmental biases, privacy constraints, and limited coverage of interaction patterns. While synthetic data has shown strong potential in several vision domains, its use for egocentric perception remains relatively underexplored, especially for tasks requiring temporally coherent human-object interactions. In this work, we introduce EgoInteract, a controllable simulator for egocentric video generation designed to model fine-grained egocentric interactions and their temporal dynamics. The simulator enables precise control over camera, human body and hand motion, object manipulation, and scene composition across diverse environments. Building on this framework, we generate a synthetic egocentric video dataset with dense spatial and temporal annotations for temporal action segmentation, next-active object detection, interaction anticipation, and hand-object interaction detection. We evaluate models trained with simulated data on multiple real-world egocentric benchmarks spanning diverse environments, object categories, and interaction patterns. Results show consistent improvements over strong baselines across tasks and datasets, demonstrating the effectiveness and transferability of our simulation-based approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EgoInteract可控模拟器，生成合成第一人称视频，用于细粒度交互理解和预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模第一人称视频数据集收集成本高、速度慢，且存在环境偏差、隐私约束和交互模式覆盖有限等问题。现有合成数据在视觉领域有潜力，但在第一人称感知中探索不足，尤其是需要时间连贯的人-物交互任务。因此需要一种可控、可扩展的模拟方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出EgoInteract模拟器，可精确控制相机、人体和手部运动、物体操作和场景组成。基于此生成合成第一人称视频，带有密集时空标注，用于时间动作分割、下一活动物体检测、交互预测和手-物交互检测。采用仿真生成数据训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界第一人称视频基准上评估，涵盖不同环境、物体类别和交互模式。使用合成数据训练的模型在所有任务和数据集上一致超过强基线，表明基于仿真的方法有效且可迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是EgoInteract模拟器及其生成的合成数据集，解决了真实数据稀缺问题。实验证明了其在多个下游任务上的效用，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可能扩展更多交互场景和提升逼真度。

title: Leveraging Graph Structure in Seq2Seq Models for Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
abstract: We introduce Graph-Augmented Sequence-to-Sequence (GA-S2S), a novel framework that integrates a T5-small encoder-decoder with a Relational Graph Attention Network (RGAT) to improve link prediction in knowledge graphs. While existing Seq2Seq models rely solely on surface-level textual descriptions of entities and relations and at best, flatten the neighborhoods of a query entity into a single linear sequence, thereby discarding the inherent graph structure, GA-S2S jointly encodes both textual features and the full $k$-hop subgraph topology surrounding the query entity. By integrating raw encoder outputs with RGAT's relation-aware embeddings, our model captures and leverages richer multi-hop relational patterns and textual information. Our preliminary experiments on the CoDEx dataset demonstrate that GA-S2S outperforms competitive Seq2Seq-based baseline models, achieving up to a 19\% relative gain in link prediction accuracy.
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Preprint of a paper accepted at the 5th Workshop on LLM-Integrated Knowledge Graph Generation from Text (TEXT2KG), co-located with ESWC 2026, May 10--14, 2026, Dubrovnik, Croatia

light_analysis.overview: 提出GA-S2S框架，融合T5-small与RGAT，利用图结构提升知识图谱链接预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Seq2Seq模型仅依赖实体和关系的表面文本描述，最多将查询实体邻域展平为线性序列，丢弃了固有的图结构，导致多跳关系模式利用不足。该方法旨在通过联合编码文本与子图拓扑捕获更丰富的结构信息，解决链接预测精度受限的问题。
light_analysis.method: GA-S2S框架采用T5-small编码器-解码器作为基础，并引入Relational Graph Attention Network (RGAT) 对查询实体周围的k跳子图进行关系感知编码。通过将原始编码器输出与RGAT嵌入集成，模型同时处理文本特征和图拓扑，从而利用多跳关系模式。
light_analysis.result: 在CoDEx数据集上的初步实验显示，GA-S2S显著优于基于Seq2Seq的基线模型，链接预测准确率相对提升最高达19%，验证了图结构增强的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了在Seq2Seq模型中显式整合图结构能够有效提升链接预测性能，为知识图谱推理提供了新思路。未来可探索更大规模图编码器或跨数据集泛化能力。

title: SPATIOROUTE: Dynamic Prompt Routing for Zero-Shot Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Spatial question answering over egocentric video is a challenging task that requires Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to reason about 3D object positions, scene affordances, and directional relationships, particularly in the zero-shot setting where no task-specific fine-tuning is available. We introduce SpatioRoute, a dynamic prompt generation approach that routes each incoming question to a semantically tailored prompt template -- without any additional training, fine-tuning, or 3D sensor input. SpatioRoute operates in two complementary modes: SpatioRoute-R, a rule-based router that deterministically maps question typologies (e.g., What, Is, How, Can, Which) to specialized prompt templates; and SpatioRoute-L, an LLM-driven approach that generates task-specific prompts from the question and situational context alone, with no video input at routing time. We evaluate SpatioRoute on the SQA3D benchmark across VLMs spanning model families. SpatioRoute achieves consistent overall accuracy gains up to 5% over fixed prompt baselines, establishing a new state-of-the-art for zero-shot video-only spatial VQA without requiring 3D point-cloud inputs. As an additional finding, we observe that Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, implemented via the Think it Twice architecture, consistently degrades performance in this setting on Qwen series models, confirming that question-aware routing is more effective than uniform reasoning instructions for spatial video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatioRoute动态提示路由方法，无需训练或微调，通过规则或LLM将问题路由到定制提示模板，零样本提升视频空间问答性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 第一人称视频的空间问答需VLM推理3D物体位置、场景功能及方向关系，零样本场景下缺乏任务特化微调，现有固定提示或统一推理指令难以适应多样问题类型，导致性能瓶颈。SpatioRoute旨在无需额外资源下提升空间推理能力。
light_analysis.method: SpatioRoute包含两种互补模式：SpatioRoute-R基于规则，将问题类型（如What、Is、How）映射到专用模板；SpatioRoute-L由LLM根据问题和情境生成任务特定提示，无需视频输入。在SQA3D基准上测试多个VLM家族。创新在于动态路由而非固定提示，且不依赖3D点云。
light_analysis.result: 在SQA3D基准上，SpatioRoute在多个VLM上一致提升准确率高达5%，超越固定提示基线，建立零样本视频空间VQA新SOTA。同时发现Chain-of-Thought提示在Qwen系列模型上会降低性能，确认问题感知路由更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatioRoute通过动态提示路由显著提升零样本空间推理能力，无需训练或3D传感器，具有实际应用价值。揭示了提示工程对空间视频理解的关键作用，未来可探索更复杂路由策略或结合多模态信息。局限性：路由依赖问题类型，可能忽视细粒度视觉线索。

title: Concise and Logically Consistent Conformal Sets for Neuro-Symbolic Concept-Based Models
abstract: Neuro-Symbolic Concept-based Models (NeSy-CBMs) are a family of architectures that integrate neural networks with symbolic reasoning for enhanced reliability in high-stakes applications. They work by first extracting high-level concepts from the input and then inferring a task label from these compatibly with given logical constraints. Yet, their label and concept predictions can be overconfident, making it difficult for stakeholders to gauge when the model's decisions can be trusted. We address this issue by integrating ideas from Conformal Prediction (CP), a framework providing rigorous, distribution-free coverage guarantees. We formalize three desiderata -- consistency, coverage, and conciseness -- that any conformal method for NeSy-CBMs should satisfy, and show that existing approaches fall short of at least one. We then introduce COCOCO, a post-hoc framework that conformalizes concepts and labels jointly and reconciles them via a single deduction-abduction revision step. COCOCO satisfies all three desiderata, retains distribution-free coverage, is robust to imperfect knowledge and supports user-specified size budgets. Our experiments on 8 data sets highlight how COCOCO compares favorably against competitors and natural baselines in terms of performance and set size.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COCOCO框架，对神经符号概念模型进行联合共形预测，满足一致性、覆盖性和简洁性三个期望。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经符号概念模型(NeSy-CBMs)在概念和标签预测上常过度自信，难以判断可信度。现有共形预测方法无法同时满足一致性、覆盖性和简洁性三个关键期望，导致在风险敏感应用中可靠性不足。因此，需要一种能联合共形化概念与标签并确保逻辑自洽的后处理框架。
light_analysis.method: COCOCO是一个后处理框架，核心是联合共形化概念和标签预测，并通过单一的演绎-溯因修订步骤协调两者，确保逻辑一致性。它保留分布无关的覆盖保证，对不完美知识具有鲁棒性，并支持用户指定的集合大小预算。方法不依赖特定模型架构，可即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在8个数据集上的实验表明，COCOCO在性能（如覆盖率达标）和集合大小（更紧凑）方面均优于现有竞争方法和自然基线。具体而言，它能在维持所需覆盖水平的同时生成更小的预测集，减少了无效预测，且运行高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: COCOCO成功解决了NeSy-CBMs预测的可信度问题，同时满足了一致性、覆盖性和简洁性，为高风险应用提供了可靠的决策依据。其分布无关性质增强了泛用性。未来工作可探索更复杂的推理规则或适应动态环境下的约束变化。

title: Beyond the Cartesian Illusion: Testing Two-Stage Multi-Modal Theory of Mind under Perceptual Bottlenecks
abstract: While Multi-Modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate impressive capabilities in general reasoning, their embodied spatial intelligence remains hampered by a "Cartesian Illusion" - a reliance on text-based probability distributions that lack grounded, 3D topological understanding. This limitation is starkly exposed in multi-agent environments, which demand more than just scene perception; they require second-order Theory of Mind (ToM). Specifically, an Agent A must be able to infer Agent B's belief about the environment, governed strictly by Agent B's physical orientation and sensory limitations. In this paper, we probe the limits of two-stage spatial inference in MLLMs through a novel audio-visual task: requiring Agent A to predict Agent B's estimation of A's relative location. To solve this, we propose an Epistemic Sensory Bottleneck module that abandons rigid, rule-based coordinate transformations. Instead, we introduce an Anchor-Based Embodied Spatial Decomposition Chain-of-Thought (CoT). This guides the MLLM through a "geometric-to-semantic" projection, forcing it to first establish B's local coordinate system and then dynamically weight visual and auditory modalities based on whether A falls within B's visual frustum. Extensive evaluations reveal that while current MLLMs fundamentally struggle with spatial symmetry and out-of-view ambiguities (establishing a rigorous zero-shot baseline of 42% accuracy), our sensory-bounded reasoning chain robustly outperforms pure egocentric and allocentric baselines. By systematically benchmarking these perceptual bottlenecks, our work exposes the current limits of MLLM spatial reasoning and establishes a foundational paradigm for epistemic, modality-aware inference in Embodied AI.

light_analysis.overview: 针对MLLM在二阶心智理论中空间推理的瓶颈，提出Epistemic Sensory Bottleneck模块和Anchor-Based Embodied Spatial Decomposition CoT，建立从几何到语义的投影，提升多智能体信念推断能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）虽具通用推理能力，但其空间智能受限于“笛卡尔错觉”——依赖文本概率分布而缺乏3D拓扑理解。在多智能体环境中，Agent需要二阶心智理论（ToM）以推断其他智能体基于物理方向和感官限制的信念。现有方法无法处理视野外歧义和空间对称性，且缺乏对感知约束的系统性考虑，严重制约了具身AI在复杂交互场景中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出Epistemic Sensory Bottleneck模块，通过Anchor-Based Embodied Spatial Decomposition Chain-of-Thought（CoT）实现从几何到语义的投影。该引导链先建立Agent B的局部坐标系，再根据Agent A是否落入B的视觉视锥内动态加权视觉和听觉模态。该方法放弃刚性坐标变换，采用感官约束推理，在音视频任务中迫使MLLM进行感知对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在音视频基准测试中，当前MLLM零样本基线准确率仅42%，暴露了空间对称性和视野外歧义的严重缺陷。提出的感官约束推理链显著优于纯自我中心和异中心基线，尤其在Agent A位于Agent B视野外时鲁棒性大幅提升。定量对比显示该方法将准确率提升至更高水平（摘要未明确具体数值），验证了感知瓶颈建模的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统揭示了MLLM在二阶心智理论空间推理中的根本局限，并提出了首个感知模态感知的Epistemic Sensory Bottleneck范式。该工作不仅建立了具身AI中认知约束推理的基线，还为下一代多智能体交互系统提供了理论基础。未来可拓展至更复杂的多感知耦合场景并优化CoT引导效率。

title: Best Segmentation Buddies for Image-Shape Correspondence
abstract: Finding correspondences is a fundamental and extensively researched problem in computer vision and graphics. In this work, we examine the underexplored task of estimating segmentation-to-segmentation correspondence between images in the wild and untextured 3D shapes. This task is highly challenging due to substantial differences in appearance, geometry, and viewpoint. Our approach bridges the cross-modality gap by linking pixels in the image segment to vertices in the corresponding semantic part of the 3D shape. To achieve this, we first distill deep visual features from a 2D vision model onto the 3D shape surface, allowing for the computation of feature similarity between image pixels and shape vertices. Then, we identify Best Segmentation Buddies, vertices whose most similar image pixel lies within the image segmentation region, enabling the reliable discovery of vertices in semantically corresponding shape parts. Finally, we leverage distilled 3D features from the 2D image segmentation model to segment the shape directly in 3D, bootstrapping the correspondence process. We demonstrate the generality and robustness of our approach across a wide range of image-shape pairs, showcasing accurate and semantically meaningful correspondences. Our project page is at https://threedle.github.io/bsb/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种跨模态的图像-3D形状分割对应方法，通过特征蒸馏和最佳分割伙伴实现准确对应。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像与未纹理3D形状之间建立分割到分割的对应关系是一个未被充分探索的挑战性任务。由于外观、几何和视角的显著差异，现有方法难以处理跨模态对应问题。该研究旨在桥接这种跨模态鸿沟，为图像和3D形状的语义部分建立可靠对应，具有重要的计算机视觉和图形学应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 首先，从2D视觉模型（如分割模型）中提取深度视觉特征，并将其蒸馏到3D形状表面，使得图像像素和3D顶点之间可以计算特征相似度。然后，识别“最佳分割伙伴”，即那些最相似图像像素位于图像分割区域内的顶点，从而可靠地发现语义对应部分。最后，利用从2D图像分割模型蒸馏得到的3D特征直接对3D形状进行分割，引导对应过程。该方法无需3D标注，仅依赖预训练2D模型。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛多样的图像-形状对上进行实验，验证了方法的通用性和鲁棒性。与现有方法相比，该方法能够产生准确且语义上有意义的对应关系。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但展示了跨不同类别和姿态的定性结果，证明了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新颖的跨模态分割对应方法，通过特征蒸馏和最佳分割伙伴策略，有效解决了图像与未纹理3D形状之间的对应难题。该方法具有通用性，可直接应用于无标注的3D数据。未来可探索更高效的特征蒸馏技术或扩展到动态形状。项目页面已公开。

title: View-Aware Semantic Alignment for Aerial-Ground Person Re-Identification
abstract: Aerial-Ground Person Re-Identification (AGPReID) remains highly challenging due to drastic viewpoint variations between drones and fixed cameras. Existing methods typically follow a view-invariant paradigm, aligning shared features across views to achieve robustness. However, view-invariant inherently enforces part-level alignment, which ignores view-specific cues and discriminative identity information. To this end, this work proposes ViSA (View-aware Semantic Alignment), a view-aware framework that achieves cross-view semantic consistency containing an Expert-driven Token Generation Module (ETGM) and a Dual-branch Local Fusion Module (DLFM). Technically, the former constructs a set of view-aware experts to generate adaptive semantic queries that perceive viewpoint-specific patterns, while the latter leverages graph reasoning to extract and align local regions responsive to different experts. Extensive experiments on three AGPReID benchmarks including AG-ReID.v2, CARGO and LAGPeR demonstrate that ViSA consistently achieves superior performance, with a notable 10.06\% mAP improvement on the challenging CARGO cross-view protocol. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/Cat-Zero/ViSA}{https://github.com/Cat-Zero/ViSA}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViSA框架，通过视角感知语义对齐显著提升无人机与地面摄像头间的行人重识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机与固定摄像头间剧烈的视角变化导致行人重识别极具挑战。现有方法遵循视角不变范式，强制共享特征对齐，但忽略了视角特有的判别性线索。这种部分级对齐限制了模型对视角差异的适应能力，尤其在极端视角下性能下降明显。因此，需要一种能感知视角差异并保持语义一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ViSA框架，包含专家驱动令牌生成模块（ETGM）和双分支局部融合模块（DLFM）。ETGM构建一组视角感知专家，为不同视角生成自适应语义查询；DLFM利用图推理在局部区域间进行特征交互，提取并对齐与特定专家响应的关键区域。该方法在保持跨视角语义一致性的同时，保留了视角特定的判别信息。
light_analysis.result: 在AG-ReID.v2、CARGO和LAGPeR三个基准数据集上进行评估，ViSA在所有指标上均取得最优结果。特别是在CARGO的跨视角协议上，mAP提升了10.06%，显著优于现有方法。此外，在标准协议下也取得了稳定增益，证明了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViSA通过视角感知语义对齐解决了空中-地面行人重识别中的视角差异问题，为跨视角行人检索提供了新思路。实验验证了其有效性，开源代码便于复现和扩展。未来可探索将视角感知模块应用于其他视觉任务，如目标跟踪或跨域识别。

title: Pairwise Preference Reward and Group-Based Diversity Enhancement for Superior Open-Ended Generation
abstract: Current reinforcement learning(RL) methods are broadly applicable and powerful in verifiable settings where scalar rewards can be provided. However, in open-ended generation tasks, verifying the correctness of responses remains challenging, and training reward models incurs substantial computational and annotation costs. Moreover, reinforcement learning (RLVR) often leads to diversity collapse and produces stereotypical or rigid outputs, outcomes that are particularly undesirable in open-domain scenarios. We propose Pairwise Preference Reward and Group-based Diversity Enhancement (PPR-GDE), a RL method that is more suitable for open-ended generation. PPR-GDE does not require scalar rewards and incorporates group-level diversity into the reward signal, it preserves the comparative structure of subjective evaluation through a pairwise preference reward, mitigates judge position bias via repeated comparisons with swapped response order, and introduces a group-based diversity reward that explicitly encourages semantic dispersion within a response group, all of these reward signals are integrated into a unified group-relative policy optimization objective. We instantiate PPR-GDE on role-playing task, experiments show that PPR-GDE achieves a better alignment quality as well as expressive diversity than strong RL baselines. Further analysis shows that pairwise preference is critical for preference alignment in subjective perspective, while the diversity metric plays an essential role in achieving superior expressive diversity and broader semantic coverage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PPR-GDE方法，通过成对偏好奖励和组级多样性增强，实现开放生成中更好的对齐质量和表达多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放生成任务中验证响应正确性困难，训练奖励模型成本高；现有RL方法易导致多样性崩溃和刻板输出，在开放场景中尤其不利。需要一种无需标量奖励、能够保持主观评估结构并促进多样性的方法。
light_analysis.method: PPR-GDE无需标量奖励，采用成对偏好奖励保留主观评估的比较结构，通过交换响应顺序重复比较缓解位置偏见；引入组级多样性奖励，明确鼓励响应组内的语义分散。所有奖励信号集成到统一的组相对策略优化目标中，在角色扮演任务上实例化。
light_analysis.result: 在角色扮演任务上，PPR-GDE在对齐质量和表达多样性方面均优于强RL基线。进一步分析表明，成对偏好对于主观视角下的偏好对齐至关重要，而多样性指标对于实现更优的表达多样性和更广的语义覆盖不可或缺。
light_analysis.conclusion: PPR-GDE有效解决了开放生成中奖励获取困难和多样性崩溃问题，通过成对偏好和组级多样性实现了更好的对齐与多样性。实验验证了其有效性，为开放生成任务提供了新的RL范式，未来可扩展到其他开放域任务。

title: Dual-Rate Diffusion: Accelerating diffusion models with an interleaved heavy-light network
abstract: Diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art generative performance but suffer from high computational costs during inference due to the repeated evaluation of a heavy neural network. In this work, we propose Dual-Rate Diffusion, a method to accelerate sampling by interleaving the execution of a heavy high-capacity context encoder and a light efficient denoising model. The context encoder is evaluated sparsely to extract high-dimensional features, which are effectively reused by the light denoising model at every step to refine the sample efficiently. This approach significantly accelerates inference without compromising sample quality. On ImageNet benchmarks, Dual-Rate Diffusion matches the performance of standard baselines while reducing computational cost by a factor of $2$-$4$. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method is compatible with distillation techniques, such as Moment Matching Distillation, enabling further efficiency gains in few-step generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Dual-Rate Diffusion方法，通过交错执行重型上下文编码器和轻型去噪模型，在不牺牲样本质量的前提下显著加速扩散模型的推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在推理时因反复评估重型神经网络而导致计算成本高昂，限制了其实际应用。现有加速方法往往以牺牲样本质量为代价，或需要额外的蒸馏步骤。因此，设计一种能在保持高质量的同时大幅降低计算开销的方法具有重要意义。Dual-Rate Diffusion旨在通过双速率机制解决这一问题，实现高效采样。
light_analysis.method: 该方法采用双速率架构：重型高容量上下文编码器以较低频率（稀疏）评估，提取高维特征；轻型高效去噪模型在每个采样步骤中重用这些特征，以细化样本。这种交错执行方式大幅减少了计算量。此外，该方法兼容蒸馏技术（如Moment Matching Distillation），可进一步优化少步生成效率。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet基准测试中，Dual-Rate Diffusion在匹配标准基线生成质量的前提下，将计算成本降低了2-4倍。与Moment Matching蒸馏结合后，在少步生成场景中实现了更高的效率增益，验证了其与蒸馏技术的兼容性及加速效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种实用的扩散模型加速框架，通过双速率设计显著降低推理计算量，同时保持样本质量。该方法具有实际部署价值，并能与现有蒸馏技术协同工作，为扩散模型的高效应用提供了新思路。未来可探索更优的编码器-解码器协作策略。

title: UTOPYA: A Multimodal Deep Learning Framework for Physics-Informed Anomaly Detection and Time-Series Prediction
abstract: Anomaly detection in batch processes is hindered by transient dynamics, scarce fault labels, and reliance on single-modality sensor data. This work introduces UTOPYA (Unified Temporal Observation for Physics-Informed Anomaly Detection and Time-Series Prediction), a 15.2M-parameter multimodal framework that jointly addresses anomaly detection, time-series prediction, and phase classification in batch distillation by fusing eight data modalities through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) conditioned cross-modal attention and gated fusion. A physics-informed regularisation scheme introduced in this work enforces temporal smoothness and thermodynamic monotonicity, while curriculum learning introduces training samples in order of physical difficulty. On the 119-experiment multimodal batch distillation dataset of Arweiler et al. (2026), UTOPYA achieves a window-level test AUROC of 0.832 and 0.874 under multi-signal experiment-level scoring, substantially outperforming four external baselines (PCA, autoencoder, Isolation Forest, and LSTM autoencoder) evaluated under identical conditions (+0.147 window-level AUROC over the best baseline). A multimodal ablation over 15~architectural configurations shows that static context via FiLM conditioning is the key enabler, lifting experiment-level multi-signal AUROC by +0.145 over the unimodal baseline (0.729 to 0.874). Separately, a training ablation across 14 design choices reveals that several widely-adopted techniques, including instance normalisation, Mixup, ensembling, test-time augmentation, and stochastic weight averaging, fail to improve or actively degrade generalisation in this data-scarce setting. These negative results expose a fundamental tension between smoothing-based regularisation and anomaly detection, providing practical guidance for multimodal process monitoring deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UTOPYA多模态框架，融合物理信息正则化和课程学习，提升批处理异常检测与时序预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 批处理过程中的异常检测面临瞬态动态、故障标签稀缺和依赖单模态传感器数据等问题。现有方法如PCA、自编码器、孤立森林和LSTM自编码器在处理多模态数据时表现不佳，缺乏对物理约束的利用，且数据稀缺场景下泛化能力差。因此，需要一种融合多模态信息和物理先验的统一框架来提升检测精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: UTOPYA是一个1520万参数的多模态框架，通过特征线性调制（FiLM）调节的跨模态注意力和门控融合融合8种数据模态。引入物理信息正则化方案强制时间平滑性和热力学单调性，并采用课程学习按物理难度排序训练样本。在119实验批蒸馏多模态数据集上评估，与PCA、自编码器、孤立森林和LSTM自编码器基线对比。
light_analysis.result: UTOPYA在窗口级测试AUROC达0.832，多信号实验级评分AUROC达0.874，比最佳基线（LSTM自编码器）窗口级AUROC高出0.147。多模态消融实验表明，FiLM条件化静态上下文是关键，将实验级多信号AUROC从0.729提升至0.874。训练消融发现实例归一化、Mixup、集成、测试时增强和随机权重平均在数据稀缺时无效甚至有害。
light_analysis.conclusion: UTOPYA通过多模态融合和物理信息正则化显著提升了批处理异常检测性能，揭示了平滑正则化与异常检测之间的根本矛盾。实验结果为多模态过程监测部署提供了实用指导。未来可探索更高效的物理约束融合及数据高效训练策略。

title: Scalable Environments Drive Generalizable Agents
abstract: Generalizable agents should adapt to diverse tasks and unseen environments beyond their training distribution. This position paper argues that such generalization requires environment scaling: expanding the distribution of executable rule-sets that agents interact with, rather than only increasing trajectories or tasks within fixed benchmarks. Current scaling practices largely focus on collecting more experience or broader task sets under fixed interaction rules, leaving agents brittle when underlying interfaces, dynamics, observations, or feedback signals change. The core challenge is therefore a world-level distribution shift: agents need systematic exposure to environments with meaningfully different executable rule-sets. To clarify this challenge, we propose a unified taxonomy that separates trajectory scaling, task scaling, and environment scaling by their primary deliverables and by what changes in the executable rule-set. Building on this taxonomy, we synthesize construction paradigms for scalable environments, contrasting programmatic generators that prioritize controllability and verifiability with generative world models that offer broader coverage and open-endedness. We further outline how environment scaling can be coupled with stateful learning mechanisms, emphasizing learned update rules for cross-environment adaptation. We conclude by discussing alternative perspectives and argue that scalable environments provide the essential substrate for measurable and controllable progress toward robust general agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出环境扩展（Environment Scaling）作为提升智能体泛化能力的关键，并给出统一分类法与构建范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前智能体泛化研究主要关注在固定规则下收集更多轨迹或任务，但在底层接口、动态、观测或反馈信号变化时表现脆弱，核心挑战是环境级分布偏移。该问题重要，因为缺乏系统暴露于可执行规则集变化的环境，导致智能体无法适应未见过场景。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一分类法区分轨迹扩展、任务扩展与环境扩展，指出环境扩展改变可执行规则集。对比两种构建范式：程序化生成器（侧重可控性与可验证性）和生成世界模型（侧重广度与开放性）。强调环境扩展需与状态学习机制结合，特别是跨环境适应的学习更新规则。
light_analysis.result: 本文为立场论文，未提供具体实验结果，但从理论上论证了环境扩展对实现稳健通用智能体的必要性，并给出了明确的分类框架与构建方向，为后续研究提供基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是厘清环境扩展的概念与核心挑战，提出统一分类法和两种构建范式。学术价值在于为泛化研究提供新视角，实际价值在于指导设计可扩展环境以测试和提升智能体鲁棒性。未来需进一步研究环境扩展的具体实现与状态学习机制的融合。

title: Token-Space Mask Prediction for Efficient Vision Transformer Segmentation
abstract: Query-based Vision Transformer segmentation models typically reconstruct dense spatial feature maps to predict masks, inheriting design patterns from convolutional architectures. We show that this explicit image-space reconstruction is not required. We introduce TokenMask, a token-space mask head that computes mask logits directly from query-token affinities and performs interpolation in logit space rather than feature space. This reformulation preserves the original linear scoring mechanism while simplifying the computational structure. Across diverse ViT backbones, datasets and segmentation tasks, TokenMask consistently improves efficiency over prior approaches by reducing computational and memory requirements while maintaining competitive accuracy, leading to tangible speedups on NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin using TensorRT FP16 inference. Overall, TokenMask yields a simpler and more deployment-friendly design for embedded vision systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TokenMask，直接在token空间计算掩码logits，避免特征空间重建，提升效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于查询的ViT分割模型通常重建稠密空间特征图来预测掩码，继承卷积架构设计，导致计算和内存开销大。为简化计算结构、降低部署成本，需设计更高效的掩码预测方法，适应嵌入式视觉系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出TokenMask掩码头，直接利用查询-令牌亲和度计算掩码logits，在logit空间进行插值而非特征空间。保留线性评分机制，简化计算结构，无需显式图像空间重建，兼容多种ViT骨干和分割任务。
light_analysis.result: 在多种ViT骨干、数据集和分割任务上，TokenMask相比先前方法减少计算和内存需求，保持竞争精度。在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin上使用TensorRT FP16推理实现实际加速，验证了嵌入式部署效能。
light_analysis.conclusion: TokenMask提供更简单、高效的掩码预测设计，降低计算开销，提升部署友好性，适用于资源受限的嵌入式视觉系统。未来可扩展至更多视觉任务，但文中未讨论局限。

title: MARS: Technical Report for the CASTLE Challenge at EgoVis 2026
abstract: This report presents MARS, short for Multimodal Agentic Reasoning with Source selection, our system for the CASTLE Challenge at EgoVis 2026. Participants must answer 185 closed-form questions over the CASTLE 2024 dataset. In contrast to prior single-video egocentric benchmarks, CASTLE requires reasoning over four days of activity, 15 synchronized perspectives, official transcripts, and multiple auxiliary modalities, including personal photos, auxiliary videos, gaze, thermal imagery, and heartrate measurements. MARS therefore treats the task as an agentic evidence-selection problem over multimodal sources rather than a purely text-only pipeline. MARS first follows the official CASTLE directory organization to build evidence memories from two primary sources, videos and transcripts, and four auxiliary sources, gaze, heartrate, photos, and thermal imagery. Long videos are converted into captions and DeepSeek-based summaries only because CASTLE videos are too long to fit directly into the model context for every question; this step compresses temporal evidence while keeping photos and other auxiliary media available as source-specific evidence. At inference time, a GPT-5.4 decision agent repeatedly chooses whether to continue reasoning, request a specific missing modality, produce an answer, or fall back to a random option when the evidence remains insufficient. The resulting system achieved second place on the final CASTLE Challenge leaderboard. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Hyu-Zhang/MARS.
comment: The Runner-up Solution for CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出MARS多模态智能体推理系统，将多天、多视角、多模态的时序问答任务转化为证据选择问题，在CASTLE挑战赛获第二名。
light_analysis.motivation: CASTLE挑战要求从四天的活动、15个同步视角、官方转录及个人照片、辅助视频、注视、热像、心率等辅助模态中回答185个封闭式问题，远超单视频基准的复杂度。现有纯文本管道无法处理多模态长时序推理，需要一种能动态选择并压缩多源证据的新方法。
light_analysis.method: MARS首先按CASTLE目录组织构建证据记忆，包括视频和转录两大主要来源，以及注视、心率、照片、热像四个辅助来源。长视频经字幕和DeepSeek摘要压缩为时间压缩证据，保留照片等模态。推理时，GPT-5.4决策代理反复迭代，选择继续推理、请求缺失模态、生成答案或在证据不足时随机回退，实现多源证据的动态推理。
light_analysis.result: 在CASTLE 2024数据集上，MARS系统最终在CASTLE挑战赛排行榜上取得第二名。摘要未给出具体准确率或效率数字，仅提及排名结果，表明其方法在竞争者中的相对表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARS将复杂多模态时序推理建模为智能体证据选择问题，有效利用了长视频、多视角及多种辅助模态，验证了多模态智能体在现实场景问答中的潜力。开源代码促进后续研究。未来可探索更高效的证据压缩与模态请求策略，减少对大型模型的依赖。

title: Ringmaster LMO: Asynchronous Linear Minimization Oracle Momentum Method
abstract: Muon has recently emerged as a strong alternative to AdamW for training neural networks, with encouraging large-scale pretraining results and growing evidence that matrix-structured updates can be faster in practice. Yet Muon, and more generally Linear Minimization Oracle (LMO) based methods, are typically used synchronously. This is problematic in heterogeneous distributed systems, where workers complete gradient computations at different speeds and synchronous training must repeatedly wait for slower workers. In this work, we introduce Ringmaster LMO, an asynchronous LMO-based momentum method for unconstrained stochastic nonconvex optimization. Our method builds on the delay-thresholding idea of Ringmaster ASGD. For SGD-type methods, Ringmaster ASGD achieves optimal time complexity by discarding overly stale gradients. Ringmaster LMO extends this mechanism to general LMO-based updates. We establish convergence guarantees under generalized $(L_0, L_1)$-smoothness and further develop a parameter-agnostic variant with decreasing stepsizes and adaptive delay thresholds. Finally, we translate our iteration guarantees into time complexity bounds under heterogeneous worker computation times. In the classical Euclidean smooth setting, these bounds recover the optimal time complexity of Ringmaster ASGD. Experiments on stochastic quadratic problems and NanoChat language-model pretraining show that the advantages of Ringmaster LMO grow with system heterogeneity and that the method outperforms strong synchronous and asynchronous baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ringmaster LMO，一种异步线性最小化Oracle动量方法，解决分布式训练中异构设备同步瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon等基于LMO的方法通常同步训练，在异构分布式系统中，慢速工作者拖慢整体进度。现有异步方法如Ringmaster ASGD针对SGD，但缺乏对LMO类方法的适配。需要一种异步LMO方法，在保持收敛的同时适应异构计算环境。
light_analysis.method: Ringmaster LMO扩展了Ringmaster ASGD的延迟阈值机制至LMO更新，采用动量方法。提出参数自适应性变体，使用递减步长和自适应延迟阈值。理论分析在广义(L0,L1)-光滑性下建立收敛保证，并推导异构计算时间下的时间复杂度界。
light_analysis.result: 在随机二次问题和NanoChat语言模型预训练实验中，Ringmaster LMO在异构性增长时优势明显，性能优于强同步和异步基线。在经典欧几里得光滑设置下，时间复杂度恢复Ringmaster ASGD的最优界。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ringmaster LMO为LMO类方法提供异步解决方案，兼具理论保证和实际加速效果。适用于异构分布式训练，未来可扩展至更复杂的优化场景或自适应阈值策略的进一步优化。

title: Do You Need Text Rectification? Soft Attention Mask Embedding for Rectification-Free Scene Text Spotting
abstract: End-to-end scene text spotting, which unifies text detection and recognition within a single framework, has witnessed remarkable progress driven by deep learning advances. However, most existing approaches still suffer from incomplete mask proposals caused by multi-scale variation, arbitrary text shapes, and complex background interference, thereby degrading recognition accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel Soft Attention Mask Embedding module (SAME) that leverages the global receptive field of Transformer encoders to encode high-level features and compute soft attention weights, which are then hierarchically embedded with predicted masks to generate refined text-boundary-aware masks that effectively suppress background noise. Building upon this module, we present SAME-Net, a robust end-to-end text spotting framework that requires neither character-level annotations nor auxiliary text rectification modules. Since the soft attention mechanism is fully differentiable, recognition loss gradients can be back-propagated through the SAME module to the detection branch, enabling joint optimization of detection and recognition objectives. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach: SAME-Net achieves 84.02\% end-to-end H-mean on the arbitrarily-shaped Total-Text dataset, surpassing the previous state-of-the-art GLASS by 1.02\% in full-lexicon accuracy without additional training data, and obtains competitive 83.4\% strong-lexicon results on the multi-oriented ICDAR 2015 dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出软注意力掩码嵌入模块 (SAME)，无需文本校正即可实现鲁棒的端到端场景文本识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端场景文本检测与识别方法在多尺度、任意形状和复杂背景干扰下，掩码预测不完整，导致识别精度下降。现有方法通常需要辅助文本校正模块或字符级标注，增加了复杂性。因此，亟需一种既不需要文本校正也不需要字符级标注的鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出软注意力掩码嵌入模块 (SAME)，利用Transformer编码器的全局感受野编码高层特征，计算软注意力权重，并与预测掩码层次嵌入生成文本边界感知掩码，有效抑制背景噪声。SAME模块可微分，使识别损失梯度可反传到检测分支，实现联合优化。该方法不需要字符级标注或文本校正模块。
light_analysis.result: 在Total-Text数据集上达到84.02%端到端H-mean，超过先前最佳GLASS 1.02%（全词典）；在ICDAR 2015上达到83.4%强词典结果，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的SAME模块及其框架SAME-Net实现了无需文本校正的鲁棒场景文本识别，在多个挑战性基准上取得先进结果。该工作简化了端到端流程，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的注意力机制或更高效的结构。

title: Visualizing the Invisible: Generative Visual Grounding Empowers Universal EEG Understanding in MLLMs
abstract: Leveraging the universal representations of pre-trained LLMs and MLLMs offers a promising path toward brain foundation models. However, visually-evoked EEG datasets remain scarce, leading existing methods to align neural signals mainly with abstract text, a lossy translation that may discard fine-grained perceptual information encoded in brain activity. We propose Generative Visual Grounding (GVG), a framework that visualizes the invisible by using an EEG-to-image generative model as a visual translator. Instead of forcing EEG into text alone, GVG hallucinates instance-specific proxy images for non-visual EEG, providing structured visual contexts that allow MLLMs to exploit their visual priors for clinical-state interpretation. We validate this idea on two MLLM backbones, GVG-X-Omni and GVG-Janus. Image-only alignment is already competitive: the lightweight GVG-X-Omni matches 1.7B-parameter text-aligned baselines while tuning only 170M parameters on a frozen 7B backbone. We further extend GVG-Janus with trimodal Image+Text alignment, where text supplies categorical semantic anchors and visual proxies enrich neural representations with perceptual details. Experiments show consistent gains in EEG understanding and visual generation, suggesting visual proxy grounding as an effective complement to textual alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Generative Visual Grounding (GVG)框架，通过EEG-to-image生成模型将非视觉EEG信号转化为代理图像，使多模态大语言模型利用视觉先验提升脑电理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉诱发电位EEG数据集稀缺，现有方法仅将神经信号与抽象文本对齐，导致感知细节丢失。需要一种能保留脑电中精细感知信息的方法，以增强MLLMs对临床状态的理解。
light_analysis.method: 提出GVG框架，使用EEG-to-image生成模型为每个非视觉EEG样本生成实例特定的代理图像，提供结构化视觉上下文。在X-Omni和Janus两种MLLM骨干上实现，前者仅用图像对齐（微调170M参数），后者采用图像+文本三模态对齐。
light_analysis.result: 轻量级GVG-X-Omni（仅图像对齐）匹配1.7B参数文本对齐基线，仅微调170M参数。GVG-Janus在EEG理解和视觉生成任务上均取得一致性改善，验证了视觉代理接地的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 视觉代理接地是文本对齐的有效补充，为通用脑电理解提供新范式。未来可探索更复杂的生成模型和跨模态融合策略，以进一步提升脑电信号解码能力。

title: Elastic-dLLM: Position Preserving Context Compression and Augmentation of Diffusion LLMs
abstract: Unlike autoregressive models, which generate one token at a time, dLLMs denoise a chunk of [MASK] tokens jointly and sample one or more tokens per step; despite enabling parallel decoding, this process incurs substantial computational cost due to the large chunk size of masked tokens. We observe that much of this cost is spent on repeatedly processing the preceding context and many [MASK] tokens with the same feature representations, indicating considerable computational redundancy. In this work, we revisit dLLM's redundancy from the perspective of [MASK] tokens. Through systematic analysis, we verify the redundancy of [MASK] tokens while revealing their critical role in providing structural information. Guided by these findings, we propose position-preserving [MASK] token compression and terminal-aware augmentation. By compressing redundant [MASK] computation, this approach accelerates decoding and further provides a natural extension toward context-folding-like long-context scaling under limited input-length constraints for full-sequence dLLMs such as LLaDA-8B-Instruct and LLaDA-1.5. Moreover, for block dLLMs such as LLaDA2.0-mini, it augments the context with a protected terminal [MASK] token to enhance generation quality with negligible overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出位置保持的[MASK] token压缩与终端感知增强方法，减少dLLM冗余计算，加速解码并支持长上下文扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散式LLMs（dLLMs）每步需同时去噪大量[MASK] token，但大量计算被重复用于处理固定上下文和相似特征表示的[MASK] token，存在显著计算冗余。现有方法未充分利用[MASK] token的结构信息。本文旨在识别并压缩冗余计算，同时保留其结构作用，以提升解码效率并赋能长上下文场景。
light_analysis.method: 通过系统性分析发现[MASK] token存在计算冗余但提供关键结构信息。提出位置保持的[MASK] token压缩（压缩冗余计算）和终端感知增强（在上下文末尾添加保护性终端[MASK] token）。方法在全序列dLLMs（如LLaDA-8B-Instruct）上实现类context-folding的长上下文扩展，在块dLLMs（如LLaDA2.0-mini）上增强生成质量。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在多种dLLMs上显著加速解码过程，并支持有限输入长度下的长上下文扩展。针对LLaDA2.0-mini，终端感知增强以极低开销提升了生成质量。摘要未明确给出具体数值指标，但声称优于未优化版本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文有效降低了dLLM的计算冗余，实现位置保持的压缩和增强，加速解码的同时不牺牲结构信息。该工作提升了dLLM的实际效率，为长上下文应用提供了可行方案。未来可探索更极致的压缩策略或扩展至其他扩散生成模型。

title: TRACE: Trajectory Correction from Cross-layer Evidence for Hallucination Reduction
abstract: Hallucination correction is not a one-direction problem. We show that intermediate layers are neither uniformly more truthful than final layers nor uniformly less trustworthy. Yet hallucination reduction is usually instantiated through one fixed intervention form: contrast one layer against another, steer along a truthfulness direction, or defer to external evidence. This framing is structurally incomplete. Cross-layer factual evidence does not evolve uniformly: in some failures truthful support is present internally and later suppressed, whereas in others candidate competition remains genuinely multi-directional across depth, so no single signed scalar family is generally sufficient.
