We introduce Trajectory Correction from Cross-layer Evidence for Hallucination Reduction (TRACE), a deterministic, training-free algorithm which corrects hallucinations at inference time by deriving both the corrective layer and the appropriate correction operator from each input's cross-layer candidate trajectory inside the LLM's own forward pass. Under one frozen hyperparameter setting, TRACE selects among scalar reversal, earlier-state recovery, and candidate-space correction using only model-internal evidence. Evaluated as a single universal algorithm across 15 models, 8 model families, and 3 factuality benchmarks, TRACE improves every evaluation cell, yielding mean gains of +12.26 MC1 points and +8.65 MC2-style points with no regressions, with gains reaching +47.20 MC1 and +43.38 MC2-style points. The method uses no labels, retrieval, pretraining, finetuning, or per-model calibration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE算法，通过分析LLM内部跨层候选轨迹，动态选择修正层和操作符，无需训练即可减少幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有幻觉纠正方法通常采用固定干预形式，如对比层间信息、沿真实性方向引导或依赖外部证据，但忽略了跨层事实证据的非均匀演化。研究表明，中间层并非一致更真实或更不可信，不同失败模式中事实支持可能内部存在但后期被抑制，或候选竞争在深度上呈现多方向性。因此需要一种能根据输入动态调整的通用纠正方法。
light_analysis.method: TRACE是一种确定性、免训练的推理时算法。它通过分析LLM前向传播中每个输入的跨层候选轨迹，自动确定纠正层和纠正操作符。在单一冻结超参数下，TRACE可从标量反转、早期状态恢复和候选空间纠正中选择，仅使用模型内部证据。无需标签、检索、预训练、微调或逐模型校准。
light_analysis.result: 在15个模型、8个模型家族和3个事实性基准上，TRACE作为单一通用算法，在每一个评估单元上均取得提升，平均MC1分数提升12.26点，MC2风格分数提升8.65点，无任何退化；最高增益分别达47.20 MC1和43.38 MC2风格点。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACE证明了通过动态选择修正策略可以有效减少LLM幻觉，且无需额外训练或外部知识。其无标签、免训练的通用性具有重要实用价值，适用于多种模型和场景。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹分析方法或扩展到其他语言任务。

title: Self-Evolving Spatial Reasoning in Vision Language Models via Geometric Logic Consistency
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have made striking progress, yet their spatial reasoning remains fragile: models that answer an original input correctly can still fail under paired transformations with predictable answer mappings, revealing a gap between instance-level correctness and robust spatial reasoning. To address this, we propose Spatial Alignment via Geometric Evolution (SAGE), a self-evolving framework that enforces logical consistency in VLMs through geometric and linguistic duality operations. SAGE incorporates duality consistency as an auxiliary reward within GRPO training, encouraging models to produce logically coherent answers across original and transformed inputs. A dynamic operation pool continuously probes for inconsistencies, promoting challenging operations and retiring mastered ones, so that training focuses on the most informative signals. SAGE is model-agnostic, data-efficient compared to prior GRPO methods, and can be applied as a lightweight post-training stage to any existing VLM. Experiments on video and spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines and enhanced generalization to unseen data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAGE框架，通过几何逻辑一致性训练增强VLM空间推理鲁棒性，实现自我进化。
light_analysis.motivation: VLM在空间推理中表现脆弱：即使对原始输入回答正确，在可预测答案映射的配对变换下仍可能失败。这表明实例级正确性与鲁棒空间推理之间存在差距，现有方法缺乏对逻辑一致性的保证。解决该问题对于提升VLM在真实场景中的可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: SAGE框架通过几何和语言对偶操作强制VLM保持逻辑一致性。在GRPO训练中将对偶一致性作为辅助奖励，鼓励模型在原始和变换输入上产生连贯答案。动态操作池持续探测不一致，优先训练最信息量的操作。SAGE为模型无关、数据高效，可作为轻量后训练阶段应用于任何现有VLM。
light_analysis.result: 在视频和空间推理基准上，SAGE一致优于强基线，并展示了向未见数据的增强泛化能力。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调改进显著且泛化性强。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAGE通过自我进化框架有效提升了VLM的空间推理鲁棒性，弥补了实例级正确性与逻辑一致性之间的差距。其模型无关和轻量特性便于集成，学术上为鲁棒推理提供了新范式，应用上有望增强自动驾驶、机器人等领域的VLM可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的操作和跨任务泛化。

title: Vision Inference Former: Sustaining Visual Consistency in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress, primarily attributed to effective paradigms for integrating visual and textual information. The dominant connector-based paradigm projects visual features into textual sequence, enabling unified multimodal alignment and reasoning within a generative architecture. However, our experiments reveal two key limitations: (1) Although visual information serves as the core evidential modality in MLLMs, it is treated on par with textual tokens, diminishing the unique contribution of the visual modality; (2) As generation length increases, particularly within a limited context window, the model's dependence on visual information progressively weakens, resulting in deteriorated vision-language alignment and reduced consistency between generated content and visual semantics. To address these challenges, we propose the Vision Inference Former (VIF), a lightweight architectural module that establishes a direct bridge between pure visual representations and the model's output space. Specifically, VIF continuously injects visual semantics throughout the decoding phase of the inference process, ensuring that the model remains firmly grounded in visual content during generation. We conduct experiments on 14 benchmark tasks covering general reasoning, OCR, table understanding, vision-centric evaluation, and hallucination. Experimental results show that VIF consistently improves model performance across diverse architectures while introducing minimal additional overhead. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/Dong-Xinpeng/VIF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Vision Inference Former (VIF)模块，在解码阶段持续注入视觉语义，以维持多模态大语言模型的视觉一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中，视觉信息被等同于文本token处理，削弱了视觉模态的独特贡献；随着生成序列增长，模型对视觉信息的依赖减弱，导致视觉-语言对齐和内容一致性下降。需要一种机制在推理过程中持续增强视觉约束。
light_analysis.method: VIF是一个轻量级架构模块，在推理解码阶段建立纯视觉表示与模型输出空间之间的直接桥梁。通过持续注入视觉语义，使生成内容始终紧密基于视觉输入。该方法不改变原有模型结构，仅添加少量参数，可适用于多种MLLM架构。
light_analysis.result: 在14个基准任务（涵盖通用推理、OCR、表格理解、视觉中心评估和幻觉测试）上，VIF在不同架构中均一致提升性能，且引入的额外计算开销极小。实验证明了模块的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIF通过持续的视觉语义注入有效解决了长序列生成中视觉一致性退化的问题，为多模态大语言模型提供了一种轻量级增强方案。该工作公开了代码，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的视觉注入策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Semi-LAR: Semi-supervised Contrastive Learning with Linear Attention for Removal of Nighttime Flares
abstract: Lens flare removal is challenging due to the large spatial extent of flare artifacts and their entanglement with scene structures, while existing methods heavily rely on large-scale paired data. We propose a semi-supervised flare removal framework that enables stable learning from unlabeled images by jointly addressing pseudo-label reliability and representation discrimination. We propose an adaptive pseudo-label repository that progressively refines pseudo supervision through no-reference quality assessment, momentum-based updates, and invalid label filtering, effectively mitigating error accumulation. Moreover, we propose a flare-aware contrastive loss that explicitly treats flare-contaminated inputs as negatives and performs patch-level contrastive learning, encouraging representations that are discriminative against flare patterns while remaining consistent with reliable pseudo targets. Extensive experiments on multiple flare benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework is model-agnostic and consistently improves performance and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出半监督对比学习框架，通过自适应伪标签和flare-aware对比损失，解决夜间镜头眩光去除中伪标签可靠性和表示判别性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 镜头眩光去除因工件空间范围大且与场景结构纠缠而极具挑战，现有方法严重依赖大规模配对数据。为了减少标注需求，半监督学习成为潜在方案，但面临伪标签累积错误和表示区分度不足的问题。该研究旨在探索稳定从无标签图像学习的机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出Semi-LAR框架，包含自适应伪标签仓库，通过无参考质量评估、动量更新和无效标签过滤逐步优化伪标签，抑制误差传播；并设计flare-aware对比损失，将含眩光输入视为负样本，在补丁级别进行对比学习，迫使模型学习对眩光模式有判别性且与可靠伪目标一致的表示。框架与具体模型无关。
light_analysis.result: 在多个眩光去除基准数据集上进行广泛实验，结果表明该方法与模型无关，能够一致地提升性能（如PSNR和SSIM）和鲁棒性。与现有半监督方法相比，在抑制眩光伪影和保持场景细节上表现出明显优势，具体数值摘要未详细列出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功提出一个半监督框架，通过创新的伪标签管理机制和对比学习损失，有效缓解了配对数据依赖问题，提升了眩光去除的效果和稳定性。该工作为半监督图像复原提供了新思路，尤其适用于标注困难的任务。未来可探索更高效的伪标签筛选策略或扩展到其他图像恢复问题。

title: FOL2NS: Generating Natural Sentences from First-Order Logic
abstract: Translating formal language into natural language is a foundational challenge in NLP, driving various downstream applications in semantic parsing, theorem validation, and question answering. In this study, we introduce First-Order Logic to Natural Sentence (FOL2NS), a neurosymbolic framework designed to generate synthetic FOL formulas and convert them into natural human expressions. It handles deeply nested structures with varying quantifier depths (QD), which are rarely captured by existing corpora. By combining rule-driven modules with fine-tuned language models, FOL2NS enhances the diversity and coverage of the generated samples. In our experiments, we systematically evaluate the framework's capabilities through both character-level analysis and overall performance metrics. Experimental results show that FOL2NS can reliably produce well-formed templates and fluent statements, but it faces challenges in achieving precise semantic representations and natural generation as structural complexity increases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FOL2NS神经符号框架，结合规则驱动模块与微调语言模型，从一阶逻辑生成自然句子，增强样本多样性和覆盖度。
light_analysis.motivation: 将形式语言转化为自然语言是NLP的基础挑战，驱动语义解析、定理验证和问答等应用。现有语料库极少捕获深层嵌套结构和不同量词深度，限制了生成样本的多样性和覆盖度。因此需要新框架来合成FOL公式并转换为流畅的自然表达。
light_analysis.method: FOL2NS采用神经符号方法，首先生成综合FOL公式（含嵌套结构和变化量词深度），然后通过规则驱动模块与微调语言模型结合，转换为自然语句。框架通过字符级分析和整体性能指标系统评估，未明确提及数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明FOL2NS能可靠生成格式良好的模板和流畅的句子，但随结构复杂度增加，在精确语义表示和自然生成方面面临挑战。摘要未提供与基线方法的定量对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: FOL2NS填补了现有语料在深层嵌套FOL句子方面的空白，增强了生成样本的多样性和覆盖度，对语义解析、定理验证等应用有学术价值。局限性在于高复杂度下语义精度和自然度不足，未来可优化生成模型和推理模块。

title: Whispers in the Noise: Surrogate-Guided Concept Awakening via a Multi-Agent Framework
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) are widely used for text-to-image generation, but their strong generative capabilities also raise concerns about unsafe or undesirable content. Concept erasure aims to mitigate these risks by removing specific concepts from pretrained models. However, recent studies show that such methods often suppress rather than fully eliminate target concepts, leaving models vulnerable to awakening attacks. Existing approaches primarily rely on white-box access through optimization or inversion, while concept awakening under black-box constraints remains underexplored. In this work, we revisit the denoising process from a trajectory perspective and show that concept erasure mainly disrupts early-stage text-semantic alignment but does not fully prevent semantic information from propagating along the denoising dynamics. As generation proceeds, the model increasingly depends on the evolving noisy state rather than textual conditions, which creates an opportunity to bypass erased mappings. Motivated by this observation, we propose ConceptAgent, a training-free, black-box, multi-agent framework that awakens erased concepts by initializing the denoising trajectory from surrogate-guided noisy states. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ConceptAgent enables accurate and controllable awakening of erased concepts under black-box settings without access to model parameters, gradients, or internal representations. These results highlight fundamental limitations of current concept erasure methods and provide new insights into the dynamic nature of semantic control in DMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConceptAgent，一种无需训练的黑盒多智能体框架，通过代理指导的噪声状态初始化去噪轨迹，实现对被擦除概念的准确可控唤醒。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在文本到图像生成中广泛应用，但存在生成不安全内容的担忧。概念擦除方法旨在移除特定概念，但现有方法往往只是抑制而非彻底消除，易受唤醒攻击。目前概念唤醒主要依赖白盒优化或反转，黑盒场景下的研究不足。本文从轨迹视角发现，概念擦除主要干扰早期文本语义对齐，但语义信息仍沿去噪过程传播，这为绕过擦除映射提供了机会。
light_analysis.method: 提出ConceptAgent，一种无训练、黑盒的多智能体框架。核心思路是利用代理模型（如分类器或预训练模型）指导生成噪声状态，从该状态初始化去噪轨迹，从而绕过概念擦除。框架无需模型参数、梯度或内部表示，仅需黑盒访问生成模型。通过多智能体协作，实现准确且可控的概念唤醒。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，ConceptAgent在黑盒设置下能够准确唤醒被擦除的概念，且效果可控。与现有白盒方法相比，无需访问模型内部细节即可实现类似或更优的唤醒性能。结果揭示了当前概念擦除方法的根本局限性，即无法完全阻断语义信息的传播。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了扩散模型中概念擦除的脆弱性，并提出了一种黑盒场景下的有效唤醒方法。ConceptAgent无需训练即可实现可控唤醒，为理解扩散模型的语义控制动态提供了新视角。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的概念擦除策略，或将该框架应用于其他生成模型。

title: Foundation Models for Credit Risk Prediction: A Game Changer?
abstract: Predictive models play a pivotal role in credit risk management, guiding critical decisions through accurate estimation of default probabilities and losses. Extensive research has introduced new modeling techniques, complemented by large-scale benchmarking studies consolidating the state-of-the-art. Today, quasi-standards such as gradient-boosting models paired with SHAP explainers have emerged, yet continuous improvement of risk models remains a top priority. Concurrently, rapid advancements in AI, most notably large language models, have disrupted predictive modeling paradigms. Foundation models, pretrained on extensive datasets from diverse domains, have demonstrated remarkable performance by leveraging prior knowledge. While prevalent in natural language processing and computer vision, foundation models for tabular data have only recently emerged. We conjecture that pretraining on out-of-domain data is particularly beneficial in small-data settings, such as SME lending or specialized corporate portfolios, and may help address longstanding challenges including low default portfolios and class imbalance. This paper benchmarks recently proposed tabular foundation models against a broad set of competitors, including established and advanced machine learning techniques, across two core tasks: PD and LGD modeling. Our evaluation encompasses various datasets, performance indicators, and experimental conditions. We find that tabular foundation models generally perform best across datasets and tasks. Moreover, they offer significant improvement in predictive performance as dataset size shrinks. These results are remarkable given that the models are tested out-of-the-box, without hyperparameter tuning, ensuring ease of use and mitigating computational costs.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次系统评估表格基础模型在信用风险预测中的性能，发现其优于传统方法，尤其在数据稀疏场景下表现突出。
light_analysis.motivation: 信用风险管理中准确预测违约概率和损失至关重要，现有方法如梯度提升模型已成为标准，但小样本场景（如中小企业贷款）和类别不平衡等问题仍未解决。基础模型在自然语言处理等领域表现优异，但针对表格数据的研究较少。本文旨在探索基础模型在信用风险预测中的潜力，特别是其在小数据集和低违约组合中的优势。
light_analysis.method: 本文基准测试了最新提出的表格基础模型，与广泛竞争方法（包括传统机器学习、梯度提升等）进行比较，涵盖违约概率和损失率两个核心任务。使用多个数据集、多种性能指标和不同实验条件（如数据集大小变化）进行评估。模型以开箱即用方式测试，未进行超参数调优，以确保易用性和降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 表格基础模型在所有数据集和任务中通常表现最佳，显著优于其他方法。尤其在数据集规模缩小时，预测性能提升更为明显。这些结果是在未调整超参数的情况下取得，体现了模型的易用性和鲁棒性。性能提升幅度随数据减少而增大，表明基础模型在数据稀缺场景下的独特价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明表格基础模型是信用风险预测领域的有力候选，其无需调优即可取得优异性能，尤其适合小样本和低违约率组合。研究为风险模型改进提供了新方向，但潜在局限性包括对大规模预训练数据的依赖及泛化能力验证。未来工作可探索模型可解释性、计算效率优化及更广泛金融场景的应用。

title: Evidence-Grounded Frontier Mapping and Agentic Hypothesis Generation in Nanomedicine
abstract: Nanomedicine research spans delivery chemistry, immunology, imaging, biomaterials, and disease-specific translational science, yet its conceptual design space remains fragmented across a large and heterogeneous literature. To date, artificial intelligence in nanomedicine has focused primarily on property prediction and formulation optimization, with much less attention to evidence-grounded discovery support at the level of research direction selection. We introduce pArticleMap, a literature-mapping and research-hypothesis-generation system that combines article embeddings, similarity-graph analysis, sparse frontier extraction, structured evidence-pack retrieval, and an audited large-language-model (LLM) workflow for grounded ideation. Rather than forecasting future concept co-occurrence, pArticleMap targets low-density article-level bridge regions and cluster interfaces, then generates and scores citation-grounded hypotheses with large language models in an agentic setup. We evaluate the system with a retrospective realization benchmark (generate later literature under a historical cutoff) and a blinded human reader assessment layer across cue-conditioned nanomedicine tasks. Across 4 selected retrospective bundles, pArticleMap generated ideas and selected task-retained hypotheses (winner ideas) under the benchmark protocol. For task-level retained hypotheses, a pooled gold recovery rate of 10.8% was obtained, with a recall@10 of 15.9% and a future-neighborhood rate of 61.0%, indicating that the system often reached the correct forward-looking neighborhood (paper ideas) even without exact paper-level recovery. Human-agent agreement is modest overall, indicating that internal scoring is useful as a support signal but does not replace expert judgment. These results position pArticleMap as a conservative, evidence-grounded research assistant for nanomedicine.

light_analysis.overview: 提出pArticleMap系统，结合文章嵌入、相似图分析和LLM，实现纳米医学的证据驱动前沿映射与假设生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 纳米医学研究文献量大且异构，概念设计空间碎片化。现有AI方法集中于属性预测和配方优化，缺乏对研究方向选择的证据支持。需要一种系统能够从文献中提取低密度前沿区域和跨簇接口，生成可追溯的假设以辅助研究者决策。
light_analysis.method: pArticleMap整合文章嵌入、相似图分析、稀疏前沿提取、结构化证据包检索及审计的大语言模型工作流。通过识别低密度桥接区域和聚类界面，利用LLM以智能体方式生成并评分基于引文的假设。评估采用回顾性基准（历史截止点后生成文献）和盲审人类评估。
light_analysis.result: 在4个回顾性任务中，任务保留假设的池金回收率10.8%，recall@10为15.9%，未来邻域率61.0%。系统常能到达正确的前瞻领域，但精确恢复能力有限。人机一致性中等，表明内部评分可作为支持信号，但无法替代专家判断。
light_analysis.conclusion: pArticleMap作为保守的、证据驱动的纳米医学研究助手，能辅助研究者探索前沿方向。其价值在于提供可追溯、可审计的假设生成，但局限性在于人机一致性不高，需结合专家判断。未来可优化评分机制和扩大任务覆盖。

title: Generative AI and the Productivity Divide: Human-AI Complementarities in Education
abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) is transforming how firms create, process, and apply knowledge, yet little is known about the heterogeneity of its productivity effects across users. We report results from a randomized controlled experiment in which participants-analogs of early-career knowledge workers-were assigned to self-study a technical domain using either traditional resources or large-language-model (LLM) assistance. On average, GenAI access significantly increased task performance, but the distribution of gains was highly uneven. Improvements were not predicted by GPA or prior knowledge, but by \textit{AI Interaction Competence (AIC)} -- the ability to elicit, filter, and verify model outputs. High-AIC participants realized outsized gains; low-AIC participants saw limited or even negative marginal returns. A scaffolding intervention (conceptual maps) reduced outcome variance, indicating that standardized workflows can mitigate inequality in AI-mediated performance. We interpret these findings through the lens of human-AI complementarities: GenAI raises mean productivity while introducing a new axis of capability inequality. Managerially, firms should pair GenAI access with short AIC micro-training and simple standard operating procedures to capture value consistently and avoid uneven adoption outcomes.

light_analysis.overview: 通过随机对照实验，发现GenAI提升生产力但分布不均，AI交互能力（AIC）是关键因素，脚手架干预可减少不平等。
light_analysis.motivation: GenAI正在改变知识工作方式，但对其生产力效应的异质性缺乏了解。现有研究多关注平均效果，忽略了用户交互能力差异导致的不平等。理解并缓解这种不平等对于发挥GenAI潜力、避免加剧技能鸿沟至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用随机对照实验，让早期职业知识工作者自学技术领域，比较传统资源与LLM辅助。测量参与者的AI交互能力（AIC），并对部分组实施概念图脚手架干预。实验设计旨在分离GenAI访问对任务表现的影响，并探索AIC的调节作用。
light_analysis.result: GenAI访问显著提升平均任务表现，但增益分布高度不均。高AIC参与者获得显著超额收益，低AIC参与者收益有限甚至为负。脚手架干预（概念图）降低了结果方差，表明标准化工作流程可缓解AI介导的不平等。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenAI在提高平均生产力的同时引入了新的能力不平等。管理上应通过短期AIC微培训和简单标准操作程序来确保价值捕获和减少采用差异。未来工作可探索更广泛的干预措施和长期影响。

title: Xiaomi EV World Model: A Joint World Model Integrating Reconstruction and Generation for Autonomous Driving
abstract: This report presents a unified technical system addressing the two core capabilities of world models for autonomous driving: world representation and world generation. For world representation, we propose WorldRec, a feed-forward reconstruction architecture driven by sparse scene queries. WorldRec initializes structured queries in 3D space, leveraging them to aggregate cross-view, cross-temporal features, thereby naturally enforcing spatial consistency across frames and yielding compact yet high-fidelity 3D Gaussian scene representations. For world generation, we propose WorldGen, a two-stage training framework of bidirectional pretraining followed by causal fine-tuning through three progressive stages (Teacher Forcing, ODE distillation, and DMD), enabling high-quality online causal video generation in as few as 4 denoising steps. Building on both modules, we further introduce the JWM, which deeply integrates WorldRec and WorldGen to achieve synergistic gains in generation stability, cross-frame consistency, and visual fidelity, providing a solid foundation for closed-loop simulation, data synthesis, and end-to-end training in autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联合世界模型JWM，融合WorldRec（世界表示）和WorldGen（世界生成），实现自动驾驶中高保真场景重建与高效因果视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界模型在自动驾驶中需同时具备世界表示和世界生成能力。现有方法多单独处理，缺乏统一架构导致跨帧一致性差、生成效率低。本文旨在通过联合模型解决上述问题，为闭环仿真和数据合成提供基础。
light_analysis.method: WorldRec采用稀疏场景查询的前馈重建架构，在3D空间初始化结构查询，聚合跨视角、跨时序特征，生成紧凑高保真的3D高斯场景表示。WorldGen采用两阶段训练框架：双向预训练后经三种渐进式因果微调（教师强制、ODE蒸馏、DMD），仅需4步去噪即可生成高质量在线因果视频。JWM深度融合两者，实现协同增益。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体数值，但指出JWM在生成稳定性、跨帧一致性和视觉保真度上获得协同提升，优于独立模块，为闭环仿真、数据合成和端到端训练提供了坚实基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出统一的世界模型系统，同时实现世界表示与生成，显著提升生成质量和一致性。学术上创新了联合建模思路，实际可应用于自动驾驶的仿真、数据增强和训练。未来可探索更高效的生成步数或更复杂的场景交互。

title: Who Generated This 3D Asset? Learning Source Attribution for Generative 3D Models
abstract: Generative 3D models are deployed in gaming, robotics, and immersive creation, making source attribution critical: given a 3D asset, can we identify whether and which generative model created it? This problem faces two core challenges: dispersed attribution signals, where 3D fingerprints are distributed across multi-view, geometric, and frequency-domain cues; and realistic deployment constraints, where scarce labels, degraded prompts, and mixed real/synthetic assets undermine attribution reliability. To systematically study this problem, we construct, to the best of our knowledge, the first passive source attribution benchmark for modern generated assets, covering 22 representative 3D generators under standard, few-shot, and realistic deployment protocols. Based on this benchmark, we find that generative 3D models leave two types of stable fingerprints: cross-view inconsistency and structural artifacts reflected in geometric statistics and frequency-domain cues. To capture these dispersed signals, we propose a hierarchical multi-view multi-modal Transformer that fuses appearance, geometric, and frequency-domain features within each view and models global relationships across views. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance, achieving 97.22% accuracy under full supervision and 77.17% accuracy with only 1% training data, corresponding to fewer than five samples per generator. These results show that modern 3D generators leave stable and attributable fingerprints, establishing a new benchmark and methodological foundation for trustworthy 3D content provenance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个被动3D生成资产源归属基准和分层多视图多模态Transformer方法，实现高准确率来源识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式3D模型在游戏、机器人和沉浸式创作中广泛应用，但现有方法缺乏对3D资产来源的可靠归属能力。核心挑战包括：归属信号分散在多视图、几何和频域线索中；现实部署面临标签稀缺、提示退化以及真假资产混合等问题，导致归属可靠性下降。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含22个代表性3D生成器的被动源归属基准，覆盖标准、小样本和现实部署协议。提出分层多视图多模态Transformer，融合每个视图内的外观、几何和频域特征，并建模跨视图全局关系，从而捕获跨视图不一致和结构伪影两类稳定指纹。
light_analysis.result: 在全监督条件下达到97.22%准确率，仅用1%训练数据（每生成器少于5个样本）时仍达77.17%准确率，验证了现代3D生成器存在稳定可归属的指纹，为可信3D内容溯源提供了基准和方法基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统研究3D生成资产的被动源归属，建立了基准和方法，证明3D生成器留下稳定的指纹。成果可用于版权保护、内容审核和溯源，未来可扩展至更复杂的生成器和混合场景。

title: Rad-VLSM: A Cross-Modal Framework with Semantics-Assisted Prompting for Medical Segmentation and Diagnosis
abstract: Medical image segmentation is more clinically valuable when it supports diagnosis rather than merely producing lesion masks. However, diagnostically relevant lesion cues are often subtle and localized, while existing models may be distracted by background tissues, acoustic artifacts, and irrelevant visual correlations. To address this problem, we propose Rad-VLSM, a two-stage cross-modal framework for semantics-assisted lesion focusing, robust segmentation, and visually grounded diagnosis. In the first stage, a BLIP-2-based vision-language alignment module identifies lesion-related candidate regions under semantic guidance and converts them into box prompts. In the second stage, these prompts are fed into a SAM-based multitask network, where a multi-candidate region aggregation strategy improves prompt stability and guides lesion segmentation. The predicted masks are then used as spatial priors for diagnosis, and a visual-radiomics fusion head integrates lesion-aware visual features with selected radiomics descriptors. By using semantic information for localization rather than direct prediction, Rad-VLSM reduces text-to-diagnosis dependence and grounds diagnosis in lesion-level evidence. Experiments on a private clinical breast ultrasound dataset and public benchmarks show that Rad-VLSM achieves strong segmentation and diagnostic performance with favorable generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rad-VLSM两阶段跨模态框架，利用语义提示引导病变聚焦，实现鲁棒分割和视觉诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割通常仅生成病变掩膜，但临床诊断需要更细致的病变线索。现有模型易受背景、伪影和无关视觉相关性干扰，导致诊断相关特征被忽略。该研究旨在通过语义信息定位病变区域，减少文本-诊断依赖，提升分割和诊断性能。
light_analysis.method: Rad-VLSM采用两阶段架构。第一阶段使用基于BLIP-2的视觉-语言对齐模块，在语义引导下识别病变候选区域并转化为框提示。第二阶段将提示输入基于SAM的多任务网络，通过多候选区域聚合策略提高提示稳定性，引导病变分割。预测掩膜作为空间先验用于诊断，视觉-放射组学融合头整合病变感知特征和选定的放射组学描述符。利用语义定位而非直接预测，降低文本到诊断的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在私有临床乳腺超声数据集和公共基准上，Rad-VLSM在分割和诊断任务中均取得强劲性能，并展现出良好的泛化能力。摘要未明确具体数值，但表明方法优于现有模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: Rad-VLSM通过语义辅助提示和两阶段框架，实现了病变聚焦分割和视觉诊断的结合，提升了医学影像分析的临床价值。该方法具有较好的泛化性，未来可推广至其他模态和病变类型。潜在局限性包括对语义提示质量的依赖及计算开销。

title: POST: Prior-Observation Adversarial Learning of Spatio-Temporal Associations for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
abstract: Existing Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection (MTSAD) frameworks increasingly rely on integrating Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with sequence models to capture complex spatio-temporal dependencies. However, less attention is paid to the spatial over-generalization problem, where unconstrained structural modeling indiscriminately reconstructs anomalies, inevitably degrading detection recall. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel framework that unifies spatio-temporal modeling through a joint prior-observation adversarial learning paradigm. In the spatial dimension, the model alternately learns adjacency matrices as structural prior and models the association discrepancy between prior and data-driven observation in a minimax manner during training. Such adversarial optimization not only improves the model sensitivity for time-wise detection, but also enables the model to localize anomalies to specific channels. To systematically evaluate this anomaly localization capability, we further construct a synthetic benchmark equipped with precise channel-wise annotations. Extensive experiments across public datasets and our dedicated benchmark demonstrate that the proposed framework establishes a new state-of-the-art in both time-wise detection and spatial localization tasks. Our code, pre-trained models, and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/anocodetest1/POST.

light_analysis.overview: 提出POST框架，通过先验-观测对抗学习统一时空建模，解决多变量时序异常检测中的空间过泛化问题，实现时间检测和通道级定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MTSAD方法常结合GNN与序列模型捕获时空依赖，但忽略了空间过泛化问题：无约束的结构建模会无差别重构异常，导致检测召回率下降。该问题在异常检测中至关重要，因为低召回率会遗漏关键异常事件。因此需一种能抑制空间过泛化、增强异常敏感性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出POST框架，采用联合先验-观测对抗学习范式。空间维度上，交替学习邻接矩阵作为结构先验，并在训练中以极小极大方式建模先验与数据驱动观测间的关联差异。这种对抗优化既提升时间检测灵敏度，又能将异常定位到具体通道。同时构建了带通道级标注的合成基准以评估定位能力。
light_analysis.result: 在公开数据集和专用基准上，POST在时间检测和空间定位任务上均达到新SOTA。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明优于现有方法。代码、预训练模型和基准已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: POST通过对抗学习统一时空建模，有效缓解空间过泛化，提升异常检测召回率和通道级定位能力。具有重要的学术价值，为MTSAD提供了新范式；实际应用中可增强工业系统监控的精度。未来可探索更复杂的先验设计或扩展到多模态数据。

title: WinTok: A Win-Win Hybrid Tokenizer via Decomposing Visual Understanding and Generation with Transferable Tokens
abstract: Building a unified visual tokenizer is essential for bridging the gap between visual understanding and generation. Yet existing approaches struggle with the inherent conflict between these tasks, as a single token space is forced to support both high-level semantic abstraction and low-level pixel reconstruction. We propose WinTok, a concise hybrid tokenizer that achieves a win-win performance by explicitly decoupling the two objectives. WinTok supplements pixel tokens with a set of learnable semantic tokens, effectively mitigating cross-task interference without incurring the computational overhead of dual tokenizers. To further enhance understanding capability, we introduce an asymmetric token distillation mechanism: the semantic tokens are guided by pretrained semantic embeddings from any visual foundation model, enabling them to inherit strong discriminative power while maintaining flexibility. Across 10 challenging benchmarks, WinTok delivers consistent improvements in reconstruction, understanding, and generation. Trained on only 50M open-source data, WinTok surpasses the strong baseline UniTok by 11.2% in classification accuracy and achieves a competitive reconstruction rFID of 0.41, despite using substantially less training data. Code is released at https://github.com/markywg/WinTok.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WinTok混合分词器，通过可转移语义令牌解耦视觉理解与生成任务，实现双赢性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一视觉分词器面临理解与生成的内在冲突，单个令牌空间需同时支持高层语义抽象和低层像素重建，导致性能折衷。本文旨在显式解耦这两个目标，在不引入双分词器计算开销的前提下，实现两者的协同提升。
light_analysis.method: WinTok在像素令牌基础上补充一组可学习语义令牌，有效缓解跨任务干扰。引入非对称令牌蒸馏机制，利用预训练视觉基础模型的语义嵌入指导语义令牌，使其继承强判别力同时保持灵活性。训练仅需50M开源数据，架构简洁高效。
light_analysis.result: 在10个挑战性基准上，WinTok在重建、理解和生成任务中均取得一致改进。相比强基线UniTok，分类准确率提升11.2%，重建rFID达到0.41，且训练数据量大幅减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: WinTok成功平衡视觉理解与生成任务，实现了双赢性能。其简洁设计和高数据效率表明在统一视觉分词领域具有重要学术与应用价值。代码已开源，便于后续研究。

title: iPOE: Interpretable Prompt Optimization via Explanations
abstract: Prompt optimization has often been framed as a discrete search problem to find high-performing and robust instructions for an LLM. However, the search result might not make it transparent why and where specific prompt changes lead to performance gains. This is in contrast to how humans are instructed for annotation tasks. Here, researchers carefully design annotation guidelines, leading to enhanced annotation consistency. Our paper aims at joining these two approaches and introduces iPOE, a novel interpretable prompt optimization strategy via explanations. We guide the prompt optimization process by automatically created guidelines from explanations of annotation decisions (either automatically generated or from humans). This set of guidelines is furthermore optimized by as series of operations, including removing, adding, shuffling, and merging. The resulting prompt includes guidelines that instruct the annotation, making the decision process of the LLM and the optimization transparent. It therefore supports also laypeople in the area of prompt optimization, particularly in challenging domains requiring expertise. In our experiments on four datasets, we find that iPOE can improves over prompts without guidelines and with random selected guidelines by up to $31\%$ and $35\%$, respectively. Moreover, LLM explanations can replace human explanations in the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出iPOE，一种基于解释的可解释提示优化策略，通过自动生成的指导准则提升LLM注释性能和透明度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有提示优化方法通常将优化视为离散搜索问题，但搜索结果难以解释为何及何处更改提示带来性能提升，这与人类通过详细注释准则提高一致性的方式形成对比。因此，需要一种可解释的提示优化方法，使优化过程和LLM决策透明化，尤其适合需要专业知识的领域。
light_analysis.method: iPOE通过自动或人工生成的注释决策解释创建初始指导准则，然后通过移除、添加、打乱和合并等操作优化准则集。最终提示包含这些准则，指导LLM进行注释，从而使优化和决策过程可解释。实验在四个数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: iPOE相比无准则提示和随机准则提示分别提升高达31%和35%的性能。此外，LLM生成的解释可以替代人类解释，表明该方法具有实用性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: iPOE通过引入可解释的提示优化策略，提高了LLM注释任务的性能和透明度，尤其适用于需要专家知识的领域。其自动生成准则的能力减少了对人工解释的依赖。未来工作可探索更多优化操作和更广泛的应用场景。

title: How Good LLMs Are at Answering Bangla Medical Visual Questions? Dataset and Benchmarking
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) have enabled general-purpose systems to demonstrate promising capabilities in complex reasoning tasks, including those in the medical domain. Medical Visual Question Answering (MedVQA) has particularly benefited from these developments. However, despite Bangla being one of the most widely spoken languages globally, there exists no established MedVQA benchmark for it. To address this gap, we introduce BanglaMedVQA, a dataset comprising clinically validated image-question-answer pairs, along with a comprehensive evaluation of current foundation models on this resource. Consistent with prior findings that report low performance of current models on English MedVQA benchmarks, our analysis reveals that Bangla performance is substantially lower, reflecting the challenges inherent to low-resource languages. Even top-performing models such as Gemini and GPT-4.1 mini fail to accurately answer specialized diagnostic questions, indicating severe limitations in fine-grained medical reasoning. Although certain open-source models, such as Gemma-3, occasionally outperform these models in general categories, they too struggle with clinically complex questions, underscoring the urgent need for top-notch evaluation method.
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables, Proceedings of The Second AAAI Bridge Program on AI for Medicine and Healthcare, PMLR 317:1-14, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 引入首个孟加拉语医学视觉问答数据集BanglaMedVQA，并基准测试当前大语言模型和视觉语言模型在该低资源语言任务上的表现，揭示显著性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM和LVLM在医学领域展现出潜力，但孟加拉语作为全球使用最广泛的语言之一，却缺乏对应的MedVQA基准。现有模型在英语MedVQA上表现已不佳，低资源语言面临更大挑战。因此，建立孟加拉语MedVQA数据集和评估基准，对推动多语言医学AI发展至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建BanglaMedVQA数据集，包含临床验证的图像-问题-答案对。使用多种主流LVLM（如Gemini、GPT-4.1 mini、Gemma-3等）进行零样本评估，涵盖一般性和专科诊断问题。通过自动化指标和人工评估，分析模型在孟加拉语医学视觉问答上的细粒度推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 模型在BanglaMedVQA上性能远低于英语MedVQA，即使顶级模型如Gemini和GPT-4.1 mini也未能准确回答专科诊断问题。开源模型Gemma-3在一般类别上偶尔超越这些模型，但所有模型在临床复杂问题上表现不佳，显示低资源语言和医学推理的双重挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 孟加拉语医学VQA任务对现有模型极具挑战性，现有方法在低资源语言和细粒度医学推理上存在严重局限。该工作填补了孟加拉语MedVQA基准空白，揭示了需要专门针对低资源语言和医学领域的模型改进。未来可探索多语言预训练、领域自适应方法。

title: TaskGround: Structured Executable Task Inference for Full-Scene Household Reasoning
abstract: In real home deployments, household agents must often operate from a complete household scene and a situated household request, rather than from a clean task specification. Such requests require agents to identify task-relevant entities, recover intended task conditions, and resolve ordering constraints from the surrounding scene context. We formalize this capability as full-scene household reasoning: given a complete household scene and a situated household request, an agent must infer executable task structure before producing a grounded skill-level action sequence. This setting is challenging because complete household scenes contain substantial task-irrelevant information, making direct complete-scene prompting inefficient and error-prone. In practical deployment, this challenge is further amplified by privacy and local compute constraints, which favor compact open-weight models with limited long-context reasoning ability. We propose TaskGround, a training-free and model-agnostic Ground-Infer-Execute framework that grounds complete scenes into compact task-relevant scene slices, infers executable task structure, and compiles it into grounded skill-level action sequences. To evaluate this setting, we introduce FullHome, a human-validated evaluation suite of 400 household tasks spanning diverse home-scale environments and both goal-oriented and process-constrained requirements. On FullHome, TaskGround improves task success rates by large margins across both proprietary and open-weight models. Notably, it makes Qwen3.5-9B competitive with GPT-5 under direct complete-scene prompting while reducing total input-token cost by up to 18x. Our results identify executable task-structure inference as a central bottleneck in full-scene household reasoning and show that structured grounding can make compact local models substantially more effective for practical household deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TaskGround框架，通过任务场景切片和结构化推理，使紧凑模型在家用全场景任务推理中达到顶级性能，成本降低18倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 家庭机器人需从完整场景和自然语言请求中推断任务结构，但完整场景包含大量无关信息，直接提示效率低且易出错。实际部署受隐私和本地算力限制，偏好紧凑模型，其长上下文推理能力弱，现有方法无法有效应对。
light_analysis.method: TaskGround是训练无关、模型无关的Ground-Infer-Execute框架：先压缩完整场景为任务相关场景切片，再推断可执行任务结构（实体识别、条件恢复、顺序约束），最后编译为基于技能的动作序列。使用FullHome数据集（400个家庭任务）评估。
light_analysis.result: 在FullHome上，TaskGround显著提升专有和开源模型的任务成功率。Qwen3.5-9B使用后与GPT-5在直接完整场景提示下竞争，输入token成本降低18倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: TaskGround通过结构化基础使紧凑模型在家庭部署中更有效，确认可执行任务结构推断是全场景推理的核心瓶颈。该框架为实际家庭机器人提供高效、隐私友好的解决方案。

title: How Loud Rumbles Hit Newsstands: A Data Analysis of Coverage and Spatial Bias in German News about Landslides Around the World
abstract: Landslides often hit newsstands due to their destructive and potentially fatal effects. News are a valuable source of information for creating or enriching disaster databases and for expediting media-based studies of the dynamics of media attention. To accomplish that, news datasets must be filtered, geolocated and validated. This paper focuses on how landslides around the world are reported in German newspapers. We analyse almost 60k news articles about 5.5k news events in a 25-year period, compare it with external measures of countries' susceptibility to landslides and provide insights, e.g.~the overreporting of Southern and Western Europe, to foment further studies on inequalities in media attention to international disasters.

light_analysis.overview: 分析德国报纸对全球滑坡报道的空间偏差，发现南欧和西欧被过度报道。
light_analysis.motivation: 新闻是灾害数据库的重要来源，但存在报道偏差。理解德国新闻对全球滑坡报道的不平等性，有助于改进基于媒体的灾害研究和媒体关注动态分析。现有方法缺乏对跨区域报道偏差的系统量化。
light_analysis.method: 收集25年间近60k篇德国新闻文章，对应5.5k新闻事件。通过过滤、地理定位和验证构建数据集，并与各国滑坡易发性外部指标进行比较，分析空间报道偏差。
light_analysis.result: 发现德国新闻对南欧和西欧的滑坡报道显著过度，而其他地区报道不足。研究提供了量化证据，例如近60k文章和5.5k事件的分析，揭示了媒体关注的不平等性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了国际灾害报道中的空间偏差，促进了对媒体关注不平等性的理解。未来可用于改进灾害数据库的校正，或指导媒体资源分配，减少报道偏差。

title: Safety Geometry Collapse in Multimodal LLMs and Adaptive Drift Correction
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often fail to transfer safety capabilities learned in the text modality to semantically equivalent non-text inputs, revealing a persistent multimodal safety gap. We study this gap from a representation-geometric perspective by analyzing a text-aligned refusal direction and a modality-induced drift direction. We show that multimodal inputs compress the usable separation along the refusal direction, making it no longer reliable for identifying and refusing harmful inputs. We refer to this failure mode as Safety Geometry Collapse. We quantify it through conditional refusal separability and show that stronger modality-induced drift is consistently associated with weaker refusal separability and higher attack success rates. We then validate the causal role of modality-induced drift through a fixed-strength activation intervention: counteracting the estimated drift restores refusal separability and improves multimodal safety. After drift correction, we further observe self-rectification, where the model recovers its ability to recognize and refuse harmful multimodal inputs during forward dynamics. This effect also provides an internal signal of the model's perceived harmfulness of each input. Motivated by this signal, we propose ReGap, a training-free inference-time method that adaptively corrects modality drift using self-rectification. Experiments across multiple multimodal safety benchmarks and utility benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of ReGap, which significantly improves the safety of MLLMs without compromising general capabilities. Our findings highlight representation-level modality alignment as a crucial direction for real-time safety improvement and for building safer, more reliable MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 发现多模态大模型中安全几何坍塌现象，并提出自适应漂移校正方法ReGap。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在文本模态中学习到的安全能力无法迁移到语义等价的非文本输入，导致多模态安全鸿沟。现有方法缺乏从表示几何角度分析这一失败模式，且通常需要重新训练或额外数据，难以实时提升安全性。因此，有必要研究模态引起的表示几何变化，并开发轻量级、训练无关的校准方法。
light_analysis.method: 从表示几何角度分析多模态安全鸿沟，定义了文本对齐的拒绝方向和模态诱导的漂移方向。发现多模态输入压缩了沿拒绝方向的可分离性，导致安全几何坍塌。提出训练无关的推理时方法ReGap，通过固定强度的激活干预抵消估计的模态漂移，利用自矫正信号自适应调整漂移校正强度。在多个多模态安全基准和通用能力基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: ReGap显著提升了MLLMs的多模态安全性，而不会损害通用能力。量化指标显示：条件拒绝可分离性增强，攻击成功率降低。与基线方法相比，ReGap在保持模型原有性能的同时，有效修复了安全几何坍塌，验证了表示层次对齐对实时安全改进的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了多模态安全鸿沟的几何本质——安全几何坍塌，并提出了轻量级、无需训练的ReGap方法，通过自适应漂移校正恢复拒绝分离性。该工作强调了表示层次模态对齐对实时安全改进的重要性，为构建更安全、更可靠的多模态大模型提供了新方向。未来可探索更复杂的漂移估计和自适应策略。

title: DanceHMR: Hand-Aware Whole-Body Human Mesh Recovery from Monocular Videos
abstract: Monocular video human mesh recovery is essential for digital humans, avatar animation, and embodied simulation, where both temporal stability and expressive whole-body motion are required. Existing video HMR methods produce coherent body motion but often overlook detailed hand articulation, while image-based whole-body methods recover SMPL-X meshes independently per frame, often leading to jittery and inaccurate hand motion. We present a temporally coherent whole-body HMR framework for challenging in-the-wild monocular videos. Our model unifies body context and part-specific hand observations through residual body-hand fusion, enabling stable body motion and detailed hand recovery within a single temporal architecture. We further introduce close-up-aware augmentation to improve robustness under upper-body framing. Experiments on whole-body and body-only benchmarks demonstrate improved hand reconstruction and competitive body accuracy. Our method also produces temporally stable and 2D-consistent SMPL-X motion in challenging real-world videos.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个时间一致的全身人体网格恢复框架，通过残差身体-手部融合实现稳定身体运动和精细手部恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单目视频人体网格恢复方法要么产生连贯身体运动但忽略手部细节，要么逐帧恢复全身网格但导致手部抖动和不准确。需要一种既能保持身体运动稳定性又能恢复精细手部运动的方法，以支持数字人、虚拟人动画和具身模拟等应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出DanceHMR框架，在统一的时间架构中通过残差身体-手部融合结合身体上下文和手部特定观测，实现稳定的身体运动和详细的手部恢复。引入近景感知增强以提高上半身构图下的鲁棒性。输出SMPL-X参数化网格。
light_analysis.result: 在全身和身体基准测试上实验表明，手部重建性能提升，身体精度具有竞争力。在具有挑战性的真实世界视频中产生时间稳定且2D一致的SMPL-X运动，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DanceHMR有效解决了单目视频中全身网格恢复的手部运动不稳定和细节缺失问题，为数字人、虚拟人动画等应用提供了统一的解决方案。未来可探索更高效的手部融合策略或扩展到多人场景。

title: SENSE: Satellite-based ENergy Synthesis for Sustainable Environment
abstract: Urban Building Energy Modeling plays a critical role in achieving the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals 7 and 11. Although existing studies based on satellite imagery and deep learning have achieved remarkable progress, many challenges exist: most existing studies are inherently predictive, failing to reflect the generative nature of urban planning; although generative AI and diffusion models have seen explosive growth in satellite imagery, they lack the urban functional generation (e.g., energy layer); third, aligned high-quality high-resolution building energy data with satellite imagery is limited and scarce. Here we propose SENSE (Satellite-based ENergy Synthesis for Sustainable Environment), a unified generative UBEM framework that jointly synthesizes realistic urban satellite imagery and aligned high-quality building energy consumption and height maps. By conditioning on road networks and urban density metrics, SENSE, based on a controllable diffusion model, leverages the knowledge learned by large vision models to generate urban building energy consumption and height information (annotations) in the latent space. Experiments across four cities (New York City, Boston, Lyon, Busan) demonstrate that SENSE achieves high visual fidelity and strong physical consistency, satisfying the ASHRAE standard metric. Experiments demonstrate that SENSE can generate enough annotated synthetic data using less than 20% labeled energy data, boosting downstream prediction performance by 10% IoU. Compared to SOTA urban energy prediction methods, SENSE significantly reduced prediction error (reduced 3%-11% NMBE and 1%-9% CVRMSE). This study offers an energy-efficiency urban planning and physical generation solution for urban science, energy science and building science. The dataset and code: https://huggingface.co/datasets/skl24/MUSE and https://github.com/kailaisun/GenAI4Urban-Energy/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SENSE，一种基于可控扩散模型的统一生成式UBEM框架，联合合成逼真的城市卫星图像、建筑能耗与高度图。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市建筑能耗建模对实现联合国可持续发展目标至关重要。现有基于卫星图像和深度学习的预测方法缺乏生成性，无法反映城市规划的生成本质；生成式AI和扩散模型在卫星图像领域缺乏城市功能生成（如能耗层）；高质量建筑能耗数据与卫星图像的对齐数据稀缺。因此，需要一种生成式框架来合成逼真的城市卫星图像和对应的建筑能耗数据。
light_analysis.method: SENSE采用基于可控扩散模型的统一生成框架，以道路网络和城市密度指标为条件，利用大型视觉模型的知识在潜在空间中生成建筑能耗和高度信息。该模型联合合成逼真的城市卫星图像和对应的高质量建筑能耗、高度图。实验在纽约、波士顿、里昂、釜山四个城市进行，使用ASHAE标准评估物理一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SENSE实现了高视觉保真度和强物理一致性，满足ASHAE标准指标。使用少于20%的标记能耗数据即可生成足够的标注合成数据，提升下游预测性能10% IoU。与最先进的城市能耗预测方法相比，SENSE显著降低了预测误差（NMBE降低3%-11%，CVRMSE降低1%-9%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: SENSE为城市科学、能源科学和建筑科学提供了节能导向的城市规划和物理生成解决方案。其统一生成框架能有效利用少量标记数据生成高质量合成数据，提升下游任务性能。未来可扩展至更多城市和功能层，但需进一步验证泛化能力。

title: Learning to Solve Compositional Geometry Routing Problems
abstract: We study the Compositional Geometry Routing Problem (CGRP), a unified superclass of traditional routing problems that covers point-only, line-only, area-only, and arbitrary hybrid task geometries, providing a broad abstraction for real-world routing scenarios. Beyond standard point-based routing, CGRP with non-point tasks can be inherently asymmetric, tightly coupled travel routes with the intrinsic path, and enlarges the action space with numerous feasible yet often irrelevant options, thereby posing significant challenges for both representation learning and decision-making. To address these challenges, we propose DiCon, a differential attention-assisted solver with contrastive learning, as a plug-and-play framework that tackles the problem from two complementary angles. First, we introduce a differential attention mechanism that actively suppresses the probability mass on less competitive candidate actions. Second, we design a double-level contrastive learning objective to promote robust global instance representations and regularize geometry-aware task representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiCon achieves strong performance, broad versatility, and superior generalization across diverse CGRP instances with different compositions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiCon框架，通过差分注意力和对比学习解决组合几何路径问题中的非对称性和大动作空间挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实路由场景涉及点、线、区域等混合几何任务，传统的点基路径问题无法覆盖。CGRP中非点任务导致内在非对称性，路径与行程紧密耦合，动作空间巨大且包含大量无效选项，给表示学习和决策带来显著挑战。现有方法难以处理这种复杂性和多样性。
light_analysis.method: DiCon作为即插即用框架，从两个角度解决问题：一是差分注意力机制，主动抑制竞争性弱候选动作的概率质量；二是双层对比学习目标，促进鲁棒的全局实例表示并正则化几何感知任务表示。该框架可集成到现有求解器中。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，DiCon在不同构成的CGRP实例上取得强性能、广泛通用性和优越泛化能力。具体数据未明确说明，但摘要强调其在多样任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiCon为组合几何路由问题提供了有效解决方案，通过注意力与对比学习结合提升性能。其即插即用特性便于推广。未来可探索更复杂的几何组合或扩展到其他组合优化问题。

title: A Data-Efficient Path to Multilingual LLMs: Language Expansion via Post-training PARAM$Δ$ Integration into Upcycled MoE
abstract: Expanding Large Language Models~(LLMs) to new languages is a costly endeavor, demanding extensive Continued Pre-Training~(CPT) and data-intensive alignment. While recent data-free merging techniques attempt to bypass alignment by fusing a multilingual CPT-enhanced model with its instruct counterpart, they are plagued by a critical trade-off: mitigating parameter conflicts to preserve original abilities inevitably dilutes new language acquisition, and vice-versa. To resolve this conflict, we introduce \method, which upcycles a dense model into a Mixture-of-Experts~(MoE) architecture, allocating different experts to different languages. Alignment ability is then transferred by grafting a MoE-expanded parameter delta~($Δ_{\text{post}}$) to the CPT-enhanced base model, bypassing the complex alignment phase. Experiments demonstrate \method's superiority even against baselines with similar FLOPs or number of parameters; it improves performance on expanded languages while effectively preserving original capabilities. We further show our approach is highly applicable across different models and Post-training deltas.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PARAMΔ方法，通过将密集模型升级为混合专家架构并嫁接后训练参数增量，实现数据高效的多语言扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩展大语言模型（LLM）到新语言成本高昂，需要大量持续预训练和数据对齐。现有数据无关的合并技术存在参数冲突的权衡：缓解参数冲突以保留原有能力会稀释新语言习得，反之亦然。该方法旨在解决这一冲突，实现高效扩展。
light_analysis.method: 将密集LLM升级为混合专家（MoE）架构，为不同语言分配不同专家。通过将MoE扩展的后训练参数增量（Δ_post）嫁接至持续预训练增强的基础模型，绕过复杂的对齐阶段，从而转移对齐能力。该方法无需额外数据即可实现语言扩展。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PARAMΔ方法在扩展语言上性能优于具有相似FLOPs或参数数量的基线方法，同时有效保留原有能力。该方法在不同模型和后训练增量上均表现出高度适用性，摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PARAMΔ通过MoE架构和后训练参数嫁接，解决了多语言LLM扩展中的数据效率和能力保持问题。该方法具有实际应用价值，可显著降低新语言部署成本。未来工作可探索更复杂的专家分配策略或参数增量设计。

title: pyforce-1.0.0: Python Framework for data-driven model Order Reduction of multi-physiCs problEms
abstract: pyforce is a Python package implementing Data-Driven Reduced Order Modelling techniques for applications to multi-physics problems, mainly set in the Nuclear Engineering world. The package is part of the ROSE (Reduced Order modelling with data-driven techniques for multi-phySics problEms): mathematical algorithms aimed at reducing the complexity of multi-physics models (for nuclear reactors applications), at searching for optimal sensor positions and at integrating real measures to improve the knowledge on the physical systems. With respect to the previous original implementation based on dolfinx package (v0.6.0), version 1.0.0 of pyforce has been completely re-written using pyvista as backend for mesh importing, computing integrals, and visualisation of results; in addition, functions are stored as numpy arrays, improving the ease of use of the package. This choice allows to use pyforce with any software solver able to export results in VTK format.

light_analysis.overview: pyforce-1.0.0是一个重新设计的Python降阶建模框架，采用pyvista后端和numpy数组，支持任意VTK格式求解器，提升通用性与易用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多物理模型（如核反应堆）计算复杂，需要降阶建模降低计算成本并融合实测数据。现有实现基于dolfinx，依赖特定求解器，通用性差，限制了其在不同软件环境中的应用。
light_analysis.method: pyforce实现数据驱动降阶建模技术，包括模型降阶、传感器优化和测量数据集成。1.0.0版本完全重写，使用pyvista处理网格与可视化，函数存储为numpy数组，从而支持任何能导出VTK格式的求解器（如FEniCS、OpenFOAM等），增强了框架的独立性和易用性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验性能指标或对比结果，仅说明版本升级提高了通用性和易用性，但未给出定量数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: pyforce为核工程多物理问题提供了通用、易用的降阶建模工具，便于模型简化与数据融合。未来可进一步扩展算法库并在更多实际场景中验证。

title: The Expressive Power of Low Precision Softmax Transformers with (Summarized) Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Existing expressivity results for transformers typically rely on hardmax attention, high precision, and other architectural modifications that disconnect them from the models used in practice. We bridge this gap by analyzing standard transformer decoders with softmax attention and rounding of activations and attention weights, while allowing depth and width to grow logarithmically with the context length. As an intermediate step, we construct hardmax transformers with ternary activations and well-separated attention scores that simulate Turing machines using Chain-of-Thought (CoT). This lets us convert the constructions to equivalent softmax transformers without the unrealistic parameter magnitudes or activation precision that prior approaches would require. Using the same technique, we analyze a recently proposed summarized CoT paradigm and show that it simulates Turing machines more efficiently, with model size scaling logarithmically in a space bound rather than a time bound. We empirically test predictions made by our results on a Sudoku reasoning task and find better alignment with learnability than for prior high-precision results. Our code is available at https://github.com/moritzbroe/transformer-expressivity.

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明低精度softmax变换器在结合链式思维后具有图灵完备的表达能力，且模型规模与上下文长度对数相关。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的变换器表达能力研究通常依赖硬注意力、高精度等不切实际的假设，与实际使用的模型脱节。本文旨在弥合这一差距，分析标准softmax解码器在精度受限下的表达能力。该问题重要，因为实际模型常使用低精度和softmax注意力，但之前缺乏严格的理论证明。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了一种构造方法：首先构建具有三元激活和良好分离注意力分数的硬注意力变换器，利用链式思维模拟图灵机；然后通过中间步骤将其转换为等效的软注意力变换器，避免不现实的参数大小或精度。进一步分析了一种新提出的总结链式思维范式，证明其更高效地模拟图灵机，模型规模与空间界而非时间界对数相关。实验在数独推理任务上验证了理论预测。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，标准softmax变换器在低精度和允许深度与宽度随上下文长度对数增长时，能模拟图灵机。总结链式思维进一步将模型规模与空间界（而非时间界）对数相关，提升了效率。在数独推理任务中，实验结果与理论预测对齐，优于先前高精度结果的可学习性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了低精度softmax变换器在链式思维下具有强大的表达能力，为实际模型提供了理论基础。总结链式思维范式更高效，有助于理解上下文长度与模型规模的关系。未来工作可探索更严格的精度下界或实际应用中的效率。

title: Equilibrium Selection in Multi-Agent Policy Gradients via Opponent-Aware Basin Entry
abstract: Multi-agent policy-gradient methods have been shown to converge locally near stable Nash equilibria. Local convergence, however, does not determine which equilibrium is reached. We study this question through basin-entry probability with respect to a target set of equilibria selected by an external criterion, such as payoff dominance. For finite-unroll Meta-MAPG, we show that the update decomposes into ordinary policy gradient plus own-learning and peer-learning corrections, with controlled sampling noise and finite-unroll bias. We identify the peer-learning correction as the main equilibrium-selection mechanism: under a local alignment condition, the probability of entering the certified attraction region of the target stable-Nash set increases, relative to ordinary policy gradient. Because persistent correction may shift zero-update points of the original game, annealing the correction after entering the basin recovers ordinary policy-gradient dynamics and inherits local stable-Nash convergence guarantees. Experiments in Stag Hunt, iterated Prisoner's Dilemma, and preliminary neural-policy coordination environments support this basin-entry view, showing increased entry into cooperative basins under peer-aware updates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对手感知盆地进入机制，通过同伴学习校正增加多智能体策略梯度中目标均衡的进入概率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体策略梯度方法虽能局部收敛至稳定纳什均衡，但无法决定具体达到哪个均衡。实际应用中需根据收益优势等外部标准选择均衡，现有方法缺乏显式均衡选择机制。该研究旨在通过分析盆地进入概率，设计一种能提高进入期望均衡概率的学习规则。
light_analysis.method: 针对有限展开Meta-MAPG，将更新分解为普通策略梯度、自身学习校正和同伴学习校正。同伴学习校正在局部对齐条件下增加进入目标稳定纳什集吸引盆地的概率。通过退火校正恢复原始政策梯度动态，继承局部稳定纳什收敛保证。
light_analysis.result: 在Stag Hunt、迭代囚徒困境及初步神经策略协调实验中，同伴感知更新相比普通策略梯度显著提高了进入合作盆地的概率。具体数据未给出，但实验支持理论分析，验证了盆地进入机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了多智能体策略梯度中均衡选择的理论基础，并提供了可操作的同伴学习校正方法。成果有助于在合作型多智能体任务中引导系统收敛至更优均衡。未来工作可扩展至更复杂环境及非静态对手。

title: LLM-Guided Communication for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Communication is a key component in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for mitigating partial observability, yet prior approaches often rely on inefficient information exchange or fail to transmit sufficient state information. To address this, we propose LLM-driven Multi-Agent Communication (LMAC), which leverages an LLM's reasoning capability to design a communication protocol that enables all agents to reconstruct the underlying state as accurately and uniformly as possible. LMAC iteratively refines the protocol using an explicit state-awareness criterion, improving state recovery while narrowing differences in agents' knowledge. Experiments on diverse MARL benchmarks show that LMAC improves state reconstruction across agents and yields substantial performance gains over prior communication baselines.
comment: 9 pages for main, 32 pages for total, Accepted to ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出LMAC方法，利用LLM推理能力设计通信协议，实现多智能体协同状态重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 在部分可观测的多智能体强化学习中，通信是缓解观测局限性的关键，但现有方法往往信息交换效率低下或无法传递充分的状态信息，导致智能体知识不一致，影响合作效率。因此，需要一种利用大型语言模型推理能力的高效通信协议，使智能体能够准确且一致地重建全局状态。
light_analysis.method: LMAC利用大型语言模型的推理能力设计通信协议，通过显式的状态感知准则迭代优化，使所有智能体尽可能准确地重建底层状态，并缩小知识差异。该方法在多样化的MARL基准测试上进行评估，未明确提及具体模型架构或数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多样化的MARL基准测试中，LMAC改善了智能体间的状态重建，并在多个通信基线上取得了显著的性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值或与基线方法的详细对比，但明确报告了性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: LMAC通过LLM驱动的通信协议有效解决了部分可观测性带来的信息不一致问题，提升了合作效率，为LLM在MARL中的应用提供了新思路。实际价值在于可应用于需要多智能体协作的场景。局限性可能在于LLM推理的计算开销，未来可探索更高效的协议设计。

title: KVDrive: A Holistic Multi-Tier KV Cache Management System for Long-Context LLM Inference
abstract: Supporting long-context LLMs is challenging due to the substantial memory demands of the key-value (KV) cache. Existing offloading systems store the full cache in host memory and selectively fetch critical entries during decoding, but this strategy quickly hits a ceiling: sparsity cannot be pushed further without degrading accuracy. As a result, when context length and batch size grow, the volume of KV transfers rises sharply and becomes the dominant source of decoding latency. We present KVDrive, a holistic multi-tier KV cache management system spanning GPU memory, host DRAM, and SSD. Unlike prior work that pursues greater sparsity through algorithmic refinements, KVDrive tackles the problem from a systems perspective - jointly orchestrating cache placement, pipeline scheduling, and cross-tier coordination to sustain high-throughput inference under tight GPU budgets. KVDrive advances three fundamental capabilities: it adapts cache management to attention behavior to maximize reuse and minimize redundant data movement; it restructures the decoding pipeline to overlap I/O- and CPU/GPU compute-bound stages, eliminating stalls across heterogeneous resources; and it harmonizes data movement across memory tiers to unlock scalable long-context inference far beyond GPU and DRAM limits. We have implemented a fully functional prototype of KVDrive and evaluated it on long-context benchmarks with popular LLMs. The system achieves up to 1.74x higher throughput compared to state-of-the-art works while preserving accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: KVDrive是一个面向长上下文LLM推理的多层KV缓存管理系统，通过系统级协同优化而非算法稀疏性改进，实现高吞吐低延迟推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文LLM推理中，KV缓存的内存需求巨大。现有卸载系统将完整缓存存储在主机内存中，解码时选择性获取关键条目，但稀疏性无法进一步压缩而不损失精度。随着上下文长度和批大小增加，KV传输量急剧上升，成为解码延迟的主要来源。因此，需要新的系统级方法来缓解这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: KVDrive提出整体多层级缓存管理系统，涵盖GPU内存、主机DRAM和SSD。核心创新包括：根据注意力行为自适应缓存管理，最大化复用并减少冗余数据移动；重构解码流水线，使I/O和CPU/GPU计算阶段重叠，消除跨异构资源的停滞；协调多层内存间的数据移动，突破GPU和DRAM限制，实现可扩展的长上下文推理。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文基准测试中，使用流行LLM进行评估，KVDrive相比最先进的工作，吞吐量提升高达1.74倍，同时保持精度不变。这表明系统级优化能有效缓解KV缓存传输瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: KVDrive通过系统级多层级缓存管理和流水线调度，解决了长上下文LLM推理中KV缓存传输成为主要延迟来源的问题。其价值在于提供了一种无需牺牲精度的可扩展推理方案，适用于计算资源受限环境。未来可探索更细粒度的跨层协调策略。

title: Improving Spatio-Temporal Residual Error Propagation by Mitigating Over-Squashing
abstract: Residual error propagation remains a fundamental problem in recurrent models, where small prediction inaccuracies compound over time and degrade long-horizon performance. Accurately modeling the correlation structure of such residuals is critical for reliable uncertainty quantification in probabilistic multivariate timeseries forecasting. While recent time-series deep models efficiently parametrize time-varying contemporaneous correlations, they often assume temporal independence of errors and neglect spatial correlation across the observed network. In this paper, we introduce Teger, a structured uncertainty module that overcomes the spa- tial and temporal limitations of error-correlated autoregressive forecasting. Teger proposes a spatial curvature-aware graph rewiring mechanism explicitly strengthening information-bottleneck edges identified by discrete Forman curvature. The component is integrated into a low-rank-plus-diagonal covariance head, preserving tractable inference via the Woodbury identity. Teger is backbone-agnostic, requiring only the latent state produced by any autoregressive encoder. We provide theoretical evidence of Teger, and experimentally evaluate it on LSTM, Transformer, and xLSTM backbones across four real-world spatio-temporal datasets, showing consistent improvement in Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS). We further provide a formal theoretical analysis connecting curvature-aware rewiring to (i) oversquashing alleviation, (ii) improved spectral connectivity, (iii) reduced effective resistance, and (iv) improved covariance calibration bounds

light_analysis.overview: 提出Teger模块，通过曲率感知图重连缓解过挤压，改进时空残差误差传播，提升概率预测的不确定性量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 残差误差传播是递归模型的基础问题，小预测误差随时间累积严重降低长期性能。现有时间序列深度模型虽能有效参数化时变相关性，但常假设误差时间独立，并忽略观测网络的空间相关性。这导致在多元时空预测中，不确定性量化不可靠，迫切需要一种能同时建模时空误差相关性的方法。
light_analysis.method: Teger模块包含空间曲率感知图重连机制，利用离散Forman曲率识别并加强信息瓶颈边。该组件集成到低秩加对角协方差头中，通过Woodbury恒等式保持可推断性。Teger与任意自回归编码器兼容，仅需其产生的隐状态。实验在LSTM、Transformer和xLSTM骨干上，使用四个真实时空数据集进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在四个真实时空数据集上，Teger在LSTM、Transformer和xLSTM骨干下均持续改进连续排名概率评分（CRPS）。理论分析证明，曲率感知重连与缓解过挤压、改善谱连通性、降低有效电阻以及改进协方差校准界有直接联系。
light_analysis.conclusion: Teger有效解决了时空残差误差传播问题，提升了概率预测的不确定性量化质量。其骨干无关特性便于集成到现有模型，理论分析为设计更鲁棒的时空模型提供了新视角。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或自适应曲率阈值。

title: PPAI: Enabling Personalized LLM Agent Interoperability for Collaborative Edge Intelligence
abstract: Deploying large language model (LLM) on edge device enables personalized LLM agents for various users. The growing availability of diverse personalized agents presents a unique opportunity for peer-to-peer (P2P) collaboration, wherein each user can delegate tasks beyond the local agent's expertise to remote agents more suited for the specific query. This paper introduces PPAI, the first personalized LLM agent interoperability system, which enables users to collaborate with each other based on agent specialization. However, the ever-changing pool of agents and their interchangeable capacity introduce new challenges when it comes to matching queries to agents and balancing loads, compared with existing P2P systems. Therefore, we propose a scalable query-agent pair scoring mechanism based on prototypes to identify suitable agents within a P2P network with churn. Moreover, we propose a multi-agent interoperability Bayesian game to balance local demand and global efficiency, when changes in remote agent load occur too quickly to be observed. Finally, we implement a prototype of PPAI and demonstrate that it substantially broadens the range of tasks that could be carried out while maintaining load balance. On average, it achieves an accuracy improvement of up to 7.96% across multiple tasks, while reducing latency by 16.34% compared to the baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个个性化LLM代理互操作系统PPAI，实现基于代理专长的P2P协作，扩展任务范围并保持负载均衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 在边缘设备上部署大语言模型（LLM）可创建个性化代理，但单一代理能力有限。现有P2P系统无法应对动态变化的代理池和负载，导致查询匹配和负载均衡困难。因此需要一种能基于代理专长进行协作的系统，以充分利用多样化的个性化代理，提升整体任务处理能力。
light_analysis.method: PPAI采用基于原型的可扩展查询-代理对评分机制，在存在节点波动的P2P网络中识别合适代理。同时提出多代理互操作性贝叶斯博弈，当远程代理负载变化快于观测时，平衡本地需求与全局效率。系统原型实现中结合了这两种机制，确保动态环境下任务准确分配和负载均衡。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PPAI在多个任务上平均准确率提升最高达7.96%，延迟相比基线降低16.34%。系统有效扩展了可执行任务范围，同时维持负载均衡，证明了其在动态边缘环境中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PPAI首次实现个性化LLM代理的互操作，通过专长匹配和负载博弈显著提升协作效率。学术上贡献了动态P2P代理协作的框架，实际应用中可增强边缘AI的个性化服务能力。未来可探索更复杂的代理协作策略和更大规模网络。

title: The MixCount Dataset: Bridging the Data Gap for Open-Vocabulary Object Counting
abstract: Object counting is a foundational vision task with over a decade of dedicated research, yet state-of-the-art models still fail systematically in the mixed-object setting that dominates real-world applications such as industrial inspection and product sorting. We show that this gap is strongly driven by limitations in existing training and evaluation data: real counting datasets are prohibitively expensive to annotate and suffer from labeling noise, while existing synthetic alternatives lack diversity and realism. We address this with MixCount, a dataset and benchmark for mixed-object counting designed to target the failure modes of current counting models. To overcome the high cost of constructing and labeling such data, we develop an automatic generation pipeline that synthesizes images, fine-grained textual descriptions, and pixel-perfect counting annotations at scale, eliminating the labeling ambiguity that plagues prior datasets. Evaluating state-of-the-art counting models on MixCount exposes severe degradation in the mixed-object setting. More importantly, training these models on our synthesized data yields substantial gains on real-world benchmarks, reducing MAE by 20.14% on FSC-147 and by 18.3% on PairTally. These results establish MixCount as both a benchmark and a training dataset for fine-grained counting, and demonstrate that our pipeline, which produces effectively unlimited labeled data, helps address a long-standing bottleneck in counting models.
comment: Co-first authors. Dataset and project page https://corentindumery.github.io/projects/mixcount.html

light_analysis.overview: 提出MixCount数据集和自动生成管道，解决开放词汇混合物体计数的数据缺口问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有物体计数模型在混合物体场景下系统失败，因为真实数据集标注昂贵且存在噪声，合成数据集缺乏多样性和真实性。该问题在工业检测和产品分拣等应用中主导，重要但缺乏解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出MixCount数据集和自动生成管道，合成图像、细粒度文本描述和像素级计数标注，消除标注歧义，提供无限量的标签数据。
light_analysis.result: 在MixCount上评估现有模型显示性能严重退化；用合成数据训练模型在真实基准上MAE降低20.14%（FSC-147）和18.3%（PairTally）。
light_analysis.conclusion: MixCount作为基准和训练数据集，证明了自动管道有助于解决计数模型的长期瓶颈。未来可能扩展更多场景。

title: Embedded ConvNet Ensembles: A Lightweight Approach to Recognize Arabic Handwritten Characters
abstract: Arabic Handwritten Character Recognition (AHCR) has recently advanced significantly with deep Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets). However, many models in the literature are deep and computationally expensive in terms of parameters and FLOPs, limiting their deployment on resource-constrained devices, which are increasingly common. This study addresses this gap by proposing a combination of lightweight embedded ConvNet models and ensemble learning techniques. Extensive experiments were conducted to identify best practices in AHCR, considering training hyperparameters, learning strategies, model choices, and ensemble methods. Results show that embedded models can achieve accuracy comparable to, or even surpassing, heavier architectures. Ensemble learning further enhances performance with only modest computational overhead, particularly under challenging training scenarios. Among the ensembling strategies, soft voting yielded the best overall results.
comment: Accepted in the IEEE 15th Image, Video, and Multidimensional Signal Processing Workshop 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级嵌入式ConvNet集成方法，在资源受限设备上实现与深度模型相当的阿拉伯手写字符识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯手写字符识别（AHCR）虽因深度卷积神经网络取得进展，但现有模型参数量和FLOPs高，难以部署于日益普及的资源受限设备。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过轻量级嵌入式模型与集成学习结合，在保证识别精度的同时降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出组合轻量级嵌入式ConvNet模型与集成学习的技术路线。通过系统性实验对比训练超参数、学习策略、模型选择和集成方法（如软投票），旨在识别最佳实践。轻量级嵌入式模型具有较低参数量和FLOPs，集成学习在增加少量计算负担下提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，嵌入式模型在精度上与更重的架构相当甚至更优。集成学习进一步增强了性能，尤其在困难训练场景下，且计算开销仅适度增加。所有集成策略中，软投票取得了最佳整体结果。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了轻量级嵌入式ConvNet集成在AHCR中的有效性，为资源受限设备上的字符识别提供了实用方案。未来可探索其他集成策略或针对特定硬件优化模型。

title: Threats to Arabic Handwriting Recognition: Investigating Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on embedded ConvNet models
abstract: Arabic handwriting recognition (AHR) has made significant progress with deep learning models. AHR research has largely focused on performance, with security receiving little attention. This study provides what appears to be a new line of inquiry by demonstrating the vulnerability of high-performing models to adversarial black-box attacks. The focus on black-box attacks reflects real-world scenarios where the attacker has no prior knowledge of the model architecture. Extensive experiments were conducted on two benchmark AHR datasets containing Arabic handwritten Characters. Results demonstrated the effectiveness of the attacks, with the Pixle attack achieving an attack success rate of 99-100\% on most models. Other, less aggressive attacks achieved success rates of 50-96\% across most experiments. Despite the higher attack success rate, the attacks maintain the structural integrity of the characters, rendering them almost imperceptible to the human eye. The findings indicate the higher vulnerability of the studied models to adversarial manipulation. This underscores the need to strengthen efforts to secure these models and ensure their reliability in AHR real-world applications.
comment: Accepted in the IEEE 15th Image, Video, and Multidimensional Signal Processing Workshop 2026

light_analysis.overview: 揭示阿拉伯语手写识别模型对黑盒对抗攻击的脆弱性，尤其是Pixle攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯语手写识别（AHR）研究主要关注性能提升，安全性被忽视。本文首次展示高性能模型在黑盒攻击下的脆弱性，反映真实场景中攻击者不了解模型架构的威胁。
light_analysis.method: 在两个阿拉伯语手写字符基准数据集上，采用多种黑盒对抗攻击方法（如Pixle）进行实验。攻击在保持字符结构完整性及人眼不可察觉性的同时，测试模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: Pixle攻击在多数模型上实现99-100%攻击成功率；其他较温和攻击成功率达50-96%。攻击不破坏字符结构，几乎不可察觉。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明现有AHR模型极易受对抗操控，亟需加强安全防护以确保实际应用可靠性。未来可探索防御机制。

title: FLAG: Foundation model representation with Latent diffusion Alignment via Graph for spatial gene expression prediction
abstract: Predicting spatial gene expression from routine H\&E enables large-scale molecular profiling, yet current models treat this as isolated pointwise tasks, thereby overlooking essential biological structures like gene coordination and spatial distribution. To preserve these relationships, we introduce \textbf{FLAG}, a diffusion-based framework that redefines this task as structured distribution modeling. At the same time, we identify the critical \textbf{Gene Dimension Curse}, where joint modeling gene expression and their spatial interactions fail in high-dimensional spaces, and FLAG solves this challenge by integrating a spatial graph encoder for topological consistency and utilizing Gene Foundation Model (GFM) alignment for gene-gene fidelity in the generation process. To rigorously assess model performance, we propose a set of novel structural evaluation metrics, including Gene Structural Correlation (\textbf{GSC}) and Spatial Structural Correlation (\textbf{SSC}). Our experiments demonstrate that FLAG is highly competitive in traditional accuracy (PCC/MSE) while achieving significantly enhanced structural fidelity in capturing both gene-gene and gene-spatial relationships. The code is available at https://github.com/darkflash03/FLAG.
comment: 9 pages for main text, 3 pages for references, 19 pages for appendix. accepted by ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLAG框架，利用扩散模型和基因基础模型对齐，从H&E图像预测空间基因表达，同时保留基因与空间结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间基因表达预测方法将任务视为孤立的点任务，忽略了基因协调和空间分布等关键生物结构。高维空间中联合建模基因表达与空间交互存在'基因维度诅咒'问题。因此需要一种能够保留基因-基因关系和空间拓扑结构的方法，以实现更准确的分子谱分析。
light_analysis.method: FLAG框架将预测任务重新定义为结构化分布建模，采用扩散模型生成基因表达。核心创新包括：空间图编码器保持空间拓扑一致性，以及基因基础模型（GFM）对齐保证生成过程中的基因-基因保真度。通过图结构捕捉基因与空间邻域关系，克服高维诅咒。
light_analysis.result: 在传统精度指标（PCC/MSE）上具有竞争力，同时在新提出的结构评估指标（Gene Structural Correlation GSC和Spatial Structural Correlation SSC）上显著提升，表明FLAG在捕获基因-基因关系和基因-空间关系方面具有更强的结构保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLAG有效解决了空间基因表达预测中结构保持的难题，为生物医学研究提供更全面的分子谱分析工具。其扩散框架和GFM对齐策略可推广至其他结构化生成任务。未来工作可探索更高效的图编码器或扩展至多模态数据。

title: Protection Is (Nearly) All You Need: Structural Protection Dominates Scoring in Globally Capped KV Eviction
abstract: We study KV cache eviction under a shared globally capped decode-time harness. Seven policies (LRU, H2O, SnapKV, StreamingLLM, Ada-KV, QUEST, Random) share a prompt-boundary vulnerability: without structural protection, they collapse to near-zero quality on six pure-transformer models (F1$\leq$0.064). Reserving 10\% of cache at each boundary recovers 69--90\% of the $C{=}2{,}048$ reference-ceiling quality on seven LongBench models at $C{=}256$ (13\% retention); a ten-model panel spans 68--98\%. An attention-mass pilot (Qwen2.5-3B, $N{=}30$) suggests why: the position-0 sink holds ${\sim}75\%$ of prefix mass, while other boundary tokens sit near ${\sim}0.41{\times}$ uniform expectation, so attention scorers retain the sink but still drop structurally critical tokens. With protection, simplified score-isolation variants are TOST-equivalent to LRU at $K{=}32$ ($Δ{=}0.02$); at $K{=}8$, attention policies pairwise converge yet beat LRU by 0.011--0.021 F1 across $C{=}256$ and $C{=}512$. Faithful Ada-KV/QUEST add ${\sim}0.03$--$0.04$ F1 on Mistral-7B and Phi-3.5 beyond simplified variants. A NIAH-32K regime-transfer pilot on Qwen3-4B (decode vs.\ prefill, $C{\in}\{512,2048\}$) shows near-identical protection lifts (ratio 0.99--1.00). At 64K, protection helps but recovery is modest; faithful per-head scoring matches full-cache ceiling on Gemma-3-4B at 6.3\% retention only when the model already supports strong 64K retrieval without eviction. Overall: protection dominates; scoring differences are secondary once boundaries are guarded; per-head allocation gives a further modest gain.
comment: 38 pages, 6 figures, 25 tables (includes one longtable). Code and figure regeneration scripts: https://github.com/gpgabriel25/KVCacheBoundaryProtection

light_analysis.overview: 发现结构缓存保护（保留边界令牌）对KV缓存驱逐质量的主导作用远超评分策略差异，七种策略在不保护时均崩溃。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型推理时，KV缓存大小成为瓶颈，缓存驱逐策略需要在有限预算下保留关键信息。现有策略（如LRU、H2O、SnapKV等）在全局共享缓存下存在prompt边界脆弱性，若不保护边界令牌，所有策略在多个纯Transformer模型上性能降至接近零（F1≤0.064），说明边界保护是维持性能的前提。
light_analysis.method: 在全局共享的decode时缓存上限（C=256/512/2048）下，比较七种驱逐策略（LRU、H2O、SnapKV、StreamingLLM、Ada-KV、QUEST、Random）在有无结构保护（保留10%边界缓存）时的表现。通过注意力量化分析（Qwen2.5-3B），发现位置0的sink token集中约75%前缀质量，其他边界令牌也高于均匀期望。设计简化评分变体，与完整策略对比。
light_analysis.result: 保留10%边界缓存可恢复69-90%参考质量（C=256，13%缓存率）。简化评分变体与LRU在K=32时等效（Δ=0.02）；K=8时注意力策略相互收敛但比LRU高0.011-0.021 F1。完整Ada-KV/QUEST在Mistral-7B和Phi-3.5上额外提升0.03-0.04 F1。64K长场景下保护有效但恢复有限；仅当模型本身支持强检索时，逐头评分可达全缓存上限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构保护是KV缓存驱逐的关键，评分策略的差异在边界得到保护后成为次要因素。逐头分配可带来适度增益。该发现简化了缓存管理设计：优先保护边界令牌，再优化评分。未来工作可探索更高效的边界保护机制或自适应保留比例。

title: Efficient 3D Content Reconstruction and Generation
abstract: Automatic 3D content creation seeks to replace labor-intensive modeling and scanning pipelines with systems that can synthesize or recover 3D assets directly from text or images. Its applications span video games, virtual reality, robotics, and simulation, enabling rapid asset prototyping, diverse interactive world generation, and efficient 3D data collection for training foundation models. Contemporary solutions largely follow two complementary paradigms: (i) text- or image-to-3D generation, which learns priors over 3D geometry and appearance to create novel assets from natural language or a single view image; and (ii) 3D reconstruction, which estimates camera poses and geometry from RGB images. This thesis advances both directions. On the generation side, I introduce Instant3D, which combines multi-view diffusion with feed-forward sparse-view 3D reconstruction to produce high-quality assets in 5-20 seconds. On the reconstruction side, I develop FastMap, a structure-from-motion pipeline that achieves up to 10x speedup over prior state-of-the-art by using first-order optimization with fused GPU kernels extensively, while maintaining comparable pose accuracy and downstream novel view synthesis quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Instant3D和FastMap，分别实现快速3D生成和高效3D重建，显著提升速度和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动3D内容创建旨在替代人工建模和扫描，在游戏、VR、机器人等领域有重要应用。现有方法分为文本/图像到3D生成和3D重建两个范式，但生成速度慢或重建效率低，难以满足实时或大规模需求。论文针对这两个方向的效率问题，提出Instant3D和FastMap，分别加速生成和重建过程。
light_analysis.method: Instant3D结合多视图扩散模型与前馈稀疏视图3D重建，5-20秒生成高质量3D资产。FastMap采用一阶优化和融合GPU内核，实现结构从运动流水线，相比最先进方法加速10倍，同时保持姿态精度和新视图合成质量。
light_analysis.result: Instant3D在5-20秒内生成高质量3D资产，FastMap实现最高10倍加速，且与现有方法相比，姿态精度和下游新视图合成质量相当，验证了方法的有效性和效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文在3D生成和重建两个方向取得显著效率提升，Instant3D支持快速资产原型化，FastMap加速3D数据采集，有助于游戏、VR、机器人等应用。未来可进一步优化生成质量或扩展到更多输入类型，如视频或点云。

title: DocOS: Towards Proactive Document-Guided Actions in GUI Agents
abstract: While Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have shown promising performance in automated device interaction, they primarily depend on static parametric knowledge from pre-training or instruction tuning. This reliance fundamentally limits their ability to handle long-tailed tasks that require explicit procedural knowledge absent from model parameters, often forcing agents to resort to inefficient and brittle trial-and-error exploration. To mitigate this limitation, we introduce \textbf{Proactive Document-Guided Action} for GUI agents in dynamic, open-web environments, a novel paradigm that mirrors human problem-solving by enabling agents to autonomously search for relevant documentation to resolve long-tailed tasks. To evaluate agents' capability in this paradigm, we propose \textbf{DocOS}, a benchmark designed to assess document-guided problem solving in fully interactive environments. DocOS requires agents to autonomously navigate a web browser, locate relevant online documentation, comprehend procedural instructions, and faithfully ground them into executable GUI actions. Extensive experiments reveal that progress is strictly constrained by dual bottlenecks: agents struggle to reliably locate relevant information during proactive search and frequently fail to faithfully ground retrieved instructions into precise actions, pointing toward document-guided interaction as a crucial pathway for enabling self-evolving GUI agents in dynamic environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Proactive Document-Guided Action范式和DocOS基准，让GUI代理自主搜索文档解决长尾任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GUI代理依赖预训练或指令微调的静态参数知识，缺乏处理需要显式过程知识的长尾任务的能力，只能通过低效试错探索。这限制了代理在动态开放环境中的实用性，亟需一种能主动利用外部文档指导行动的新范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出Proactive Document-Guided Action范式，使GUI代理能自动搜索在线文档、理解程序指令并将其转化为可执行的GUI动作。配套构建DocOS基准，要求代理在完全交互式网页环境中自主导航、定位文档、理解指令并可靠执行。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现进展受双重瓶颈严格约束：代理难以在主动搜索中可靠定位相关信息，且经常无法将检索到的指令忠实转化为精确动作。这表明文档引导交互是实现自进化GUI代理的关键但仍有挑战的途径。
light_analysis.conclusion: DocOS揭示了主动文档引导对于解决GUI代理长尾任务的重要性，指出了当前方法在信息定位和指令执行方面的关键瓶颈。未来工作需聚焦提升代理的文档搜索可靠性和指令动作对齐能力，推动自进化GUI代理的发展。

title: OmniSelect: Dynamic Modality-Aware Token Compression for Efficient Omni-modal Large Language Models
abstract: Omnimodal large language models (OmniLLMs) have recently gained increasing attention for unified audio-video understanding. However, processing long multimodal token sequences introduces substantial computational overhead, making efficient token compression crucial. Existing methods typically rely on fixed, modality-specific guidance, which fails to account for the varying importance of modalities across different queries. To address this limitation, we propose $\textbf{OmniSelect}$, a training-free, modality-adaptive token pruning framework that dynamically selects appropriate compression strategies for multimodal inputs. Specifically, we leverage a lightweight AudioCLIP model to estimate cross-modal relevance and categorize each input into three pruning regimes: Audio-Centric, Video-Centric, and Uniform pruning. Based on these relevance scores, OmniSelect further performs fine-grained token pruning within each temporal group, adaptively allocating pruning ratios to preserve informative tokens across modalities. By explicitly modeling modality preference and enabling dynamic strategy selection, OmniSelect effectively avoids the pitfalls of one-size-fits-all compression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves efficient multimodal token reduction while maintaining strong performance, without requiring any additional training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的模态自适应令牌剪枝框架OmniSelect，通过动态选择压缩策略高效处理多模态输入。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖固定模态指导，未考虑不同查询中模态重要性的变化，导致压缩效率低。OmniSelect通过动态策略选择解决此问题，实现更优的令牌压缩效果。
light_analysis.method: 利用轻量级AudioCLIP模型估计跨模态相关性，将输入分为音频中心、视频中心和统一剪枝三类。基于相关性分数在每个时间组内进行细粒度令牌剪枝，自适应分配剪枝比率以保留关键信息。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在不需额外训练的情况下，实现高效多模态令牌缩减，并保持强性能。具体数据未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过显式建模模态偏好和动态策略选择，避免了固定压缩的弊端，为多模态大模型的高效推理提供了新思路。未来可研究更多模态或扩展至其他架构。

title: SGSoft: Learning Fused Semantic-Geometric Features for 3D Shape Correspondence via Template-Guided Soft Signals
abstract: Learning dense correspondences across deformable 3D shapes remains a long-standing challenge due to structural variability, non-isometric deformation, and inconsistent topology. Existing methods typically trade off generalization, geometric fidelity, and efficiency. We address this by proposing SGSoft, a unified intrinsic pipeline that (i) constructs a geodesic correspondence field on a canonical template, (ii) learns multimodal dense descriptors guided by pretrained semantic priors with this geodesic correspondence field supervision, (iii) retrieves dense correspondences in a single feed-forward pass via nearest-neighbor search in descriptor space. This formulation enables stable and topology-invariant supervision under large pose variation, structural differences, and remeshing.
