SGSoft achieves state-of-the-art inter-category generalization while offering the best accuracy-efficiency trade-off among prior methods. It also achieves near real-time inference without pre-alignment, pairwise optimization, or post-refinement. Learned descriptors can be transferred effectively to downstream tasks such as semantic segmentation and deformation transfer, establishing a scalable and deployment-ready paradigm for dense 3D correspondence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SGSoft统一内在管道，通过模板引导软信号学习融合语义-几何特征，实现3D形状对应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在泛化、几何保真度和效率之间难以平衡，且无法有效处理变形3D形状中的结构变异性、非等距变形和拓扑不一致问题，导致稠密对应任务面临挑战。
light_analysis.method: SGSoft包含三步：(i)在规范模板上构建测地对应场；(ii)利用预训练语义先验指导学习多模态稠密描述符，并由测地对应场监督；(iii)通过描述符空间最近邻搜索单前馈传递检索稠密对应。该方法实现了稳定、拓扑不变的监督，适应大姿态变化和结构差异。
light_analysis.result: SGSoft在跨类别泛化上达到最先进水平，并在准确性和效率之间取得最佳权衡。无需预对齐、成对优化或后细化即可实现近实时推理。学习到的描述符可有效迁移到语义分割和变形迁移等下游任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了SGSoft，一种解决稠密3D对应的统一管道，具有高泛化性、准确性和效率，为部署提供了可扩展范例。未来可进一步优化模板构造，并探索更复杂拓扑的适应性。

title: Patch Ensembles for Robust Salmon Re-Identification with Weak Trajectory Labels
abstract: Salmon re-identification in commercial net-pens is challenging due to large populations, which impose strict accuracy requirements and make large-scale labeled data acquisition infeasible. Trajectory IDs can be used as proxy labels, but this introduces trajectory-ID bias. To address these challenges, we propose a patch-based re-identification framework that fuses patch-level predictions into a salmon identity decision. A key component is the prediction of the salmon's lateral line, enabling extraction of texture-anchored patches and patch slices. To enable realistic evaluation, we introduce an experimental setup using multiple cameras placed 6 m apart, allowing the same fish to be recorded in different trajectories. This enables the construction of a cross-camera test set through manual match confirmation. Our ensemble approach outperforms the full-image baseline in same-trajectory validation (0.932 to 0.965 mAP) and cross-camera testing (0.609 to 0.860 mAP). The substantial improvements in the cross-camera setting demonstrate improved generalizability and robustness. Code and data: https://github.com/espenbh/salmon-reid-patch-ensemble.
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于补丁集成的鲑鱼重识别框架，通过预测侧线提取纹理锚定补丁，利用弱轨迹标签实现跨相机鲁棒识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 商业网箱中鲑鱼种群庞大，传统人工标注成本高且不可行，轨迹ID可作为代理标签但引入偏差。现有全图像方法在跨相机场景下泛化能力弱，亟需兼顾精度与弱监督鲁棒性的解决方案。本文旨在通过补丁级融合消除轨迹ID偏差，提升重识别准确率与跨场景泛化性。
light_analysis.method: 提出补丁集成框架：首先预测鲑鱼侧线位置，基于侧线提取纹理锚定的补丁及切片；将多个补丁级预测融合为身份决策。实验设置多摄像头（间距6米）采集跨相机数据，构建含手动匹配的测试集。使用ResNet等骨干网络，在含轨迹标签的数据集上训练，通过补丁级特征集成增强对视角、光照变化的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在相同轨迹验证集上，补丁集成方法mAP从全图像基线的0.932提升至0.965；更具挑战的跨相机测试中，mAP从0.609大幅提升至0.860。结果表明补丁级融合有效缓解轨迹ID偏差，显著改善跨相机泛化能力，验证了侧线引导补丁提取的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明利用侧线生物特征引导的补丁集成可提升弱监督鲑鱼重识别性能，尤其跨相机场景改善显著。该方法降低了数据标注成本，为大规模水产养殖个体追踪提供实用方案。未来可探索更精细的补丁选择策略或结合时序信息进一步增强鲁棒性。

title: New Insight of Variance reduce in Zero-Order Hard-Thresholding: Mitigating Gradient Error and Expansivity Contradictions
abstract: Hard-thresholding is an important type of algorithm in machine learning that is used to solve $\ell_0$ constrained optimization problems. However, the true gradient of the objective function can be difficult to access in certain scenarios, which normally can be approximated by zeroth-order (ZO) methods. The SZOHT algorithm is the only algorithm tackling $\ell_0$ sparsity constraints with ZO gradients so far. Unfortunately, SZOHT has a notable limitation on the number of random directions % in ZO gradients due to the inherent conflict between the deviation of ZO gradients and the expansivity of the hard-thresholding operator. This paper approaches this problem by considering the role of variance and provides a new insight into variance reduction: mitigating the unique conflicts between ZO gradients and hard-thresholding. Under this perspective, we propose a generalized variance reduced ZO hard-thresholding algorithm as well as the generalized convergence analysis under standard assumptions. The theoretical results demonstrate the new algorithm eliminates the restrictions on the number of random directions, leading to improved convergence rates and broader applicability compared with SZOHT. Finally, we illustrate the utility of our method on a ridge regression problem as well as black-box adversarial attacks.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2024. 9 pages main paper, 24 pages appendix, 11 figures, 7 tables. Correspondence to Bin Gu and Huan Xiong

light_analysis.overview: 提出广义方差减少的零阶硬阈值算法，缓解梯度误差与算子膨胀性的矛盾，消除随机方向数量限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 硬阈值算法是求解ℓ0约束优化的重要方法，但真实梯度难获取时常用零阶方法近似。现有SZOHT算法因ZO梯度偏差与硬阈值算子膨胀性的内在冲突，对随机方向数量有显著限制，影响其收敛性和适用性。本文旨在通过方差减少的新视角解决这一矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 论文从方差减少的新视角出发，提出广义方差减少的零阶硬阈值算法。该算法通过引入方差减少技术，缓解ZO梯度误差与硬阈值算子膨胀性之间的独特冲突。在标准假设下，作者给出了广义收敛性分析，证明了新算法消除了对随机方向数量的限制，改进了收敛速率并拓展了适用性。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，所提算法消除了SZOHT中对随机方向数量的限制，实现了更优的收敛速率。在岭回归和黑盒对抗攻击实验中，验证了方法的实用性和有效性（具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但相比SZOHT有提升）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为ZO硬阈值算法中的方差减少提供了新见解，有效解决了梯度误差与算子膨胀性的矛盾，提升了收敛性和适用性。该工作对ℓ0约束优化和黑盒攻击等领域具有理论价值和实践意义，未来可进一步探索更复杂的约束或自适应方差减少策略。

title: PROTEA: Offline Evaluation and Iterative Refinement for Multi-Agent LLM Workflows
abstract: Multi-agent LLM workflows -- systems composed of multiple role-specific LLM calls -- often outperform single-prompt baselines, but they remain difficult to debug and refine. Failures can originate from subtle errors in intermediate outputs that propagate to downstream nodes, requiring developers to inspect long traces and infer which agent to modify. We present PROTEA, a unified interface for offline, test-driven improvement of multi-agent workflows. PROTEA executes a workflow, scores intermediate node outputs with configurable rubrics, and overlays per-node states and rationales on the workflow graph to localize likely bottlenecks. To support complex systems where final-answer references are the primary supervision, PROTEA performs backward node evaluation: it generates candidate node-level expectations from final-answer references and graph context, then compares them with observed node outputs. For selected nodes, PROTEA presents targeted prompt revisions as editable before/after comparisons, then automatically reruns and re-evaluates the workflow to show output changes and score trajectories within the same interface. In two production-adjacent workflows, PROTEA improved document-inspection accuracy from 64.3% to 83.9% and recommendation Hit@5 from 0.30 to 0.38. In a formative study with six experienced LLM developers, participants valued graph-level localization, per-node rationales, and editable before/after prompt revisions.
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. To appear in Proceedings of ACL 2026 System Demonstrations

light_analysis.overview: 提出PROTEA，一个用于多智能体LLM工作流的离线评估与迭代改进统一接口，通过图级瓶颈定位和向后节点评估实现精准调试。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM工作流由多个角色特定LLM调用组成，尽管性能优于单提示基线，但调试和优化困难。失败常源于中间输出的细微错误传播至下游，开发者需检查长跟踪并推断修改哪个代理。现有方法缺乏系统性的离线测试驱动改进工具，导致迭代效率低。
light_analysis.method: PROTEA执行工作流，使用可配置评分标准对中间节点输出评分，并在图上覆盖节点状态和理由以定位瓶颈。支持向后节点评估：从最终答案引用和图上下文生成候选节点级期望，与观测输出比较。为选定节点呈现可编辑的提示修订前后对比，自动重新运行并展示输出变化和得分轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在两个生产相关工作流中，PROTEA将文档检查准确率从64.3%提升至83.9%，推荐Hit@5从0.30提升至0.38。与六位资深LLM开发者的形成性研究表明，参与者高度评价图级定位、逐节点理由和可编辑的提示修订对比功能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PROTEA为多智能体工作流提供离线测试驱动改进的统一框架，结合图级瓶颈定位和迭代修订有效提升性能。实验验证其实用性，未来可扩展至更多工作流类型并探索自动修复策略。

title: What Matters for Grocery Product Retrieval with Open Source Vision Language Models
abstract: Multimodal product retrieval (MPR) underpins checkout-free retail and automated inventory systems, yet it demands fine-grained SKU discrimination that standard vision-language benchmarks fail to capture. We present the first systematic zero-shot evaluation of 190 open-source VLMs on the MPR task of the GroceryVision Challenge, isolating pre-training data, architecture, and input resolution. Our analysis yields three actionable findings. \textbf{(1) Data quality trumps scale.} Switching from raw web-scrapes to filtered datasets delivers up to 16.6\% accuracy gains, exceeding the benefit of doubling model parameters. \textbf{(2) Efficient models can win.} MobileCLIP-B (150M parameters) outperforms 351M counterparts trained on noisy data. We introduce \textit{semantic power density} ($φ$), an efficiency metric that penalizes sub-threshold accuracy. \textbf{(3) A precision gap persists.} State-of-the-art models achieve 94.5\% Recall@5 but suffer a 17.5\% drop at Recall@1, revealing that contrastive embeddings cluster categories effectively but fail to rank visually similar SKUs. Code and evaluation scripts are available at \url{https://github.com/upeee/openmpr}.
comment: Accepted in the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统评估190个开源视觉语言模型在杂货产品检索中的零样本性能，揭示数据质量、模型效率和精度差距的关键因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态产品检索是免结账零售和自动化库存的核心技术，但标准视觉语言基准无法捕捉细粒度SKU区分。现有方法多关注通用任务，缺乏对杂货领域特定挑战的零样本评估，且模型选择缺乏系统性指导。
light_analysis.method: 在GroceryVision Challenge的MPR任务上，对190个开源视觉语言模型进行零样本评估。控制预训练数据、架构和输入分辨率，分析三个因素：数据质量（对比原始网络抓取与过滤数据）、模型效率（引入语义功率密度φ指标）、精度差距（Recall@5与Recall@1的差异）。
light_analysis.result: 使用过滤数据集相比原始网络抓取提升高达16.6%的准确率，超过参数翻倍的效果。MobileCLIP-B（150M参数）优于351M参数的噪声训练模型。最优模型Recall@5达94.5%，但Recall@1下降17.5%，表明对比嵌入在类别聚类上有效，但无法排序视觉相似SKU。
light_analysis.conclusion: 数据质量比模型规模更关键，高效模型如MobileCLIP-B可取得优异性能。当前模型存在精度差距，需改进细粒度排序。研究为开源VLM在杂货检索中的选择提供了实证指导，代码公开以促进复现。

title: FedSDR: Federated Self-Distillation with Rectification
abstract: Federated fine-tuning of Large Language Models faces severe statistical heterogeneity. However, existing model-level defenses often overlook the root cause: intrinsic data distribution mismatches. In this work, we first establish Federated Self-Distillation (FedSD) as a fundamental and potent strategy. By projecting client representations into a smoothed ``model-understanding space,'' FedSD alone serves as a universal booster, demonstrating superior performance over conventional algorithms. Despite its success, we identify a subtle trade-off termed the Rewrite Paradox -- unconstrained self-distillation can inadvertently increase hallucinations and redundancy. To refine this paradigm, we further propose FedSDR (Federated Self-Distillation with Rectification), the ultimate reinforced framework. It augments FedSD with a dual-stream mechanism: a local LoRA-S (Smoothing) branch to implicitly absorb heterogeneity via distilled data, and a parallel global LoRA-R (Rectification) branch anchored to raw data to enforce factual correctness. By selectively aggregating only LoRA-R, FedSDR yields a globally aligned and faithful model. Extensive experiments verify its superior performance.

light_analysis.overview: 针对联邦微调大模型的统计异质性，提出FedSDR框架，通过双流自蒸馏与修正机制解决重写悖论，实现全局对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦微调大语言模型面临严重统计异质性，现有模型级防御未解决内在数据分布不匹配。本文发现联邦自蒸馏虽有效，但无约束自蒸馏会导致幻觉和冗余，称为重写悖论。因此需改进范式以平衡异质性吸收与事实正确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出FedSDR框架，在FedSD基础上增加双流机制：局部LoRA-S分支通过蒸馏数据隐式平滑异质性，全局LoRA-R分支锚定原始数据确保事实正确。仅聚合LoRA-R分支，实现全局对齐与忠实性。采用LoRA实现参数高效微调。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证FedSDR在联邦微调任务中优于传统算法和基础FedSD，有效缓解重写悖论，提升模型准确性与对齐度。具体性能指标摘要未明确列出，但突出其作为通用增强框架的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了联邦自蒸馏作为基础策略，并提出带修正的强化框架FedSDR，解决了自蒸馏中的事实性退化问题。该工作提升了联邦学习大模型微调的鲁棒性和可靠性，未来可探索更复杂的修正机制或应用于多模态场景。

title: TeleCom-Bench: How Far Are Large Language Models from Industrial Telecommunication Applications?
abstract: While Large Language Models have achieved remarkable integration in various vertical scenarios, their deployment in the telecommunications domain remains exploratory due to the lack of a standardized evaluation framework. Current telecom benchmarks primarily focus on static, foundational knowledge and isolated atomic skills, neglecting the equipment-specific documentation and end-to-end industrial workflows essential for real-world production systems. To bridge this gap, we present TeleCom-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 12 evaluation sets with 22,678 curated samples, which evaluates LLMs across a synergistic hierarchy: (1) Multi-dimensional Knowledge Comprehension, which integrates telecommunication fundamentals, 3GPP protocols, and 5G network architecture with proprietary product knowledge across wired, core, and wireless networks via knowledge graph-driven synthesis; and (2)End-to-End Knowledge Application, which formalizes six core tasks on authentic trajectories from live network agent workflows, including intent recognition, entity extraction, event verification, tool invocation, root cause analysis, and solution generation-across network optimization and fault maintenance scenarios. Evaluations of eight state-of-the-art LLMs reveal a universal Execution Wall: while models achieve 90% accuracy in linguistic interface tasks such as intent recognition and entity extraction, performance collapses to approximately 30% in procedural execution tasks like solution generation. This capability gap demonstrates that current LLMs function competently as diagnosticians but fail as field engineers. TeleCom-Bench provides standardized diagnostics to precisely pinpoint this deficit, offering actionable guidance for domain-specific alignment toward production-ready telecom agents. The dataset and evaluation code have been released at https://github.com/ZTE-AICloud/TeleCom-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TeleCom-Bench基准，评估LLM在电信工业场景中的综合能力，揭示执行墙现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电信基准仅评估静态基础知识和孤立技能，忽略了实际生产系统所需的设备文档和端到端工业流程。缺乏标准化评估框架，导致LLM在电信领域部署仍处于探索阶段。TeleCom-Bench旨在填补这一空白，通过层次化评估体系精准诊断LLM在真实电信任务中的缺陷。
light_analysis.method: TeleCom-Bench包含12个评估集、22678个样本，采用知识图谱驱动合成多维度知识理解任务（涵盖电信基础、3GPP协议、5G架构及专有产品知识）和端到端知识应用任务（从真实网络运维轨迹中形式化6个核心任务：意图识别、实体抽取、事件验证、工具调用、根因分析和解决方案生成）。评估8个SOTA LLM。
light_analysis.result: 模型在语言接口任务（意图识别、实体抽取）上准确率达90%，但在程序执行任务（如解决方案生成）上性能骤降至约30%。这一“执行墙”表明当前LLM作为诊断师胜任，但作为现场工程师失败。TeleCom-Bench提供了标准化诊断以精确定位该缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: TeleCom-Bench揭示了LLM在电信领域从语言理解到任务执行的显著能力差距，为领域对齐和工业级代理开发提供了可行动指导。数据集和代码已开源。未来可扩展更多任务类型和模型，推动LLM在电信中的实用化。

title: Interaction-Breaking Adversarial Learning Framework for Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Cooperation is central to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), yet learned coordination can be fragile when external perturbations disrupt inter-agent interactions. Prior robust MARL methods have primarily considered value-oriented attacks, leaving a gap in robustness when interaction structures themselves are corrupted. In this paper, we propose an interaction-breaking adversarial learning (IBAL) framework that takes an information-theoretic view to construct attacks that impede coordination by perturbing agents' observations and actions, and trains agents to perform reliably under such disruptions. Empirically, our approach improves robustness over existing robust MARL baselines across diverse attack settings and yields stronger performance even under agent-missing scenarios.
comment: 8 pages for main, 27 pages for total, Accepted to ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互破坏对抗学习框架(IBAL)，从信息论角度构造攻击并训练鲁棒策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有鲁棒多智能体强化学习方法主要考虑价值导向攻击，忽略了交互结构本身被破坏的情况。实际场景中，外部扰动可能直接破坏智能体间的协调机制，导致合作策略脆弱。本文旨在填补这一空白，提升模型在交互结构受干扰下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Interaction-Breaking Adversarial Learning (IBAL)框架。从信息论视角设计对抗攻击，通过扰动智能体的观测和行动来破坏智能体间的协调。同时训练智能体在攻击下仍然能够可靠执行任务。该方法不依赖特定价值函数，泛化性更强。
light_analysis.result: 在多种攻击设置下，IBAL均优于现有鲁棒MARL基线方法。尤其在智能体缺失的极端场景中，IBAL展现出更强的性能，表明其有效提升了协调鲁棒性。实验验证了框架在破坏性扰动下的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: IBAL通过对抗学习提升了多智能体系统在交互结构被破坏时的鲁棒性，具有重要理论价值。未来可探索更复杂的攻击模式或扩展到异构智能体场景，但当前未明确局限性。

title: DSAA: Dual-Stage Attribute Activation for Fine-grained Open Vocabulary Detection
abstract: Open-Vocabulary Object Detection (OVD) models break the limitations of closed-set detection, enabling the iden- tification of unseen categories through natural language prompts. However, they exhibit notable limitations in fine- grained detection tasks involving attributes like color, ma- terial, and texture. We attribute this performance bottle- neck in OVD models to a core issue: when category sig- nals dominate, OVD models tend to marginalize attribute information during inference. This leads to incorrect bind- ing between attributes and target objects. To address this, we propose the Dual-Stage Attribute Activation (DSAA) framework, which enhances fine-grained detection capa- bilities by strengthening attribute semantics at two criti- cal stages. In the text embedding stage, we employ At- tribute Prefix Adapter (APA) module to generate attribute prefixes that inject explicit attribute priors. To further am- plify the influence of these attributes, our Key/Value (K/V) Modulator module then intervenes during the BERT encod- ing phase, selectively enhancing the Key and Value vec- tors of the corresponding attribute tokens. In addition, we introduce an attribute-aware contrastive loss to improve discrimination among same-category instances with differ- ent attributes during training. Experimental results on the FG-OVD benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our method across various mainstream open-vocabulary mod- els.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双阶段属性激活框架DSAA，通过注入属性先验和增强属性表示，提升开放词汇检测的细粒度属性识别能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测（OVD）模型在细粒度属性（如颜色、材质、纹理）检测中表现不佳，核心原因是类别信号主导导致属性信息被边缘化，造成属性与目标对象的错误绑定。这一问题限制了OVD在需要精细区分的实际场景中的应用，而现有方法未能有效增强属性语义。
light_analysis.method: DSAA框架在文本嵌入和BERT编码两个阶段增强属性：1）Attribute Prefix Adapter（APA）在文本嵌入阶段生成属性前缀，注入显式属性先验；2）Key/Value Modulator在BERT编码阶段选择性增强属性令牌的Key和Value向量，放大属性影响。同时引入属性感知对比损失，提升相同类别不同属性实例的判别性。
light_analysis.result: 在FG-OVD基准测试上，该方法显著提升了多种主流开放词汇模型的细粒度检测性能，尤其在属性级别（如颜色、材质）的检测中，优于基线方法。具体数值摘要未明确，但强调了有效性和跨模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSAA通过双阶段属性激活有效解决了OVD中属性信息被类别信号主导的问题，提升了细粒度检测能力。该方法具有即插即用特性，可推广至其他开放词汇模型。未来可探索更复杂的属性交互和动态激活机制。

title: Unveiling Memorization-Generalization Coexistence: A Case Study on Arithmetic Tasks with Label Noise
abstract: Highly over-parameterized models can simultaneously memorize noisy labels and generalize well, yet how these behaviors coexist remains poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the underlying mechanisms of this coexistence using modular arithmetic tasks under heavy label noise. Through extensive experiments on two-layer neural networks, we find that larger models tend to generalize better under appropriate optimization and model configurations, while noisy labels are memorized faster than clean data. Over-parameterized models internally form a generalization structure, but its expression in the output is suppressed by the need to fit noisy labels. Remarkably, even with 80\% label noise, near-perfect test accuracy can be achieved by extracting this internal structure using frequency-based methods. We further propose a task-agnostic method to partition networks into generalization and memorization components. Although this subnetwork improves generalization, it is limited compared with frequency-based extraction, indicating that the generalization structure is distributed across neurons and motivating the development of new tools to retrieve generalizable knowledge from over-parameterized networks.

light_analysis.overview: 研究过参数化模型在标签噪声下记忆与泛化共存的机制，提出频率方法提取内部结构实现近完美泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 过参数化模型能够同时记忆噪声标签并良好泛化，但两者共存的内在机制尚不明确。现有研究未能解释模型如何在拟合大量噪声的同时保持泛化能力，而理解这一机制对于设计更鲁棒的深度学习模型具有重要理论意义。
light_analysis.method: 以模运算任务为案例，引入重度标签噪声，训练两层神经网络。通过系统实验发现大模型在适当优化下泛化更好，噪声记忆速度快于干净数据。提出利用频率分析方法提取模型内部隐藏的泛化结构，并设计任务无关的子网络划分方法，将网络分为泛化与记忆组件。
light_analysis.result: 即使在80%标签噪声下，通过频率方法提取内部泛化结构，模型仍能达到接近完美的测试准确率。子网络划分方法虽能改善泛化，但效果低于频率提取，表明泛化结构分布在整个神经元中。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了过参数化模型中泛化结构被噪声拟合抑制但内部存在的现象。频率方法能有效提取分布式的泛化知识，但提示需要开发更高效的工具。该研究为理解模型记忆与泛化权衡提供了新视角，对鲁棒学习理论有重要价值。

title: Federated Learning by Utility-Constrained Stochastic Aggregation for Improving Rational Participation
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) algorithms implicitly assume that clients passively comply with server-side orchestration by sharing local model updates upon server request. However, this overlooks an important aspect in real-world cross-silo environments: clients are often rational agents who may prioritize their utilities such as local model performance over that of the global model. In settings with significant statistical heterogeneity, rational clients may opt out of the federation if the perceived benefits of collaboration fail to meet their local utility thresholds. Such attrition degrades the global model performance and can lead to the collapse of the federated training process. In this work, we introduce FedUCA, (Federated Learning by Utility-Constrained Stochastic Aggregation for Improving Rational Participation), a framework that formalizes the server's role as an optimizer seeking to maximize global model performance by sustaining client participation. We substantiate our framework through extensive experiments on standard datasets demonstrating that by prioritizing participation feasibility, FedUCA achieves significantly higher client retention and, consequently, a superior global model performance.
comment: Federated Learning, Rational Clients, Endogenous Participation, and Aggregation

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedUCA框架，通过效用约束的随机聚合策略维持理性客户端参与，显著提升联邦学习的客户端保留率和全局模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有联邦学习假设客户端被动服从，但实际跨孤岛环境中客户端是理性代理，可能因本地效用不满足而退出联邦，导致全局模型性能下降甚至训练崩溃。因此需要设计服务器策略以维持客户端参与。
light_analysis.method: FedUCA将服务器建模为优化器，通过效用约束的随机聚合来最大化全局模型性能。核心创新在于服务器在聚合时考虑客户端的效用阈值，动态调整聚合权重或选择参与子集，以提升客户端留存率。实验使用标准数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在标准数据集上的实验表明，FedUCA通过优先考虑参与可行性，显著提高了客户端保留率，并因此获得了更优的全局模型性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调效果优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedUCA为理性客户端参与问题提供了有效解决方案，通过效用约束聚合维持客户参与，提升联邦学习在统计异构场景下的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的效用建模或激励机制设计。

title: See What I Mean: Aligning Vision and Language Representations for Video Fine-grained Object Understanding
abstract: We present SWIM (See What I Mean), a novel training strategy that aligns vision and language representations to enable fine-grained object understanding solely from textual prompts. Unlike existing approaches that require explicit visual prompts, such as masks or points, SWIM leverages mask supervision only during training to guide cross-modal attention, allowing the model to automatically attend to the user-specified object at inference. Our cross-attention analysis of pretrained multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs) reveals a systematic discrepancy: Attribute words produce sharp, localized activations in the visual modality, whereas object nouns yield diffuse and scattered patterns due to semantic reference bias and distributed high-level representations. To address this misalignment, we construct NL-Refer, an enriched dataset, in which each object mask is paired with a precise natural language referring expression. SWIM extracts multi-layer cross-attention maps from object nouns and enforces spatial consistency with ground-truth masks. Experimental results demonstrate that SWIM substantially improves text-visual alignment and achieves superior performance over visual-prompt-based methods on fine-grained object understanding benchmarks. The code and data are available at \href{https://github.com/HumanMLLM/SWIM}{https://github.com/HumanMLLM/SWIM}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SWIM训练策略，仅用文本提示实现视频细粒度对象理解，无需显式视觉提示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式视觉提示（如掩码或点）进行细粒度对象理解，限制了实用性。研究发现多模态大模型中属性词和对象名词的交叉注意力存在系统性差异，导致对齐不足。因此，需要一种仅从文本提示就能自动关注指定对象的方法，提升推理效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建NL-Refer数据集，为每个对象掩码配准确的自然语言表达。SWIM提取多模态大模型的多层交叉注意力图，并强制对象名词的注意力图与真实掩码在空间上一致。训练时使用掩码监督引导跨模态注意力，推理时无需任何视觉提示。
light_analysis.result: 在细粒度对象理解基准上，SWIM显著提升了文本-视觉对齐性能，并超越了基于视觉提示的方法。实验表明，该方法能有效修正对象名词的弥散注意力模式，实现更精确的定位，且无需推理时的额外提示。
light_analysis.conclusion: SWIM通过训练时掩码监督和对齐注意力图，实现了仅从文本提示进行细粒度对象理解，降低了模型对显式视觉提示的依赖。该工作为多模态对齐提供了新视角，代码和数据已开源。未来可探索更复杂的语言描述和动态场景应用。

title: LogRouter: Adaptive Two-Level LLM Routing for Log Question Answering in Big Data Systems
abstract: Production log analytics in self-hosted, resource-constrained environments requires natural-language access to massive log streams without the cost of routing every query through a large language model. We present LogRouter, an end-to-end log question-answering system deployed on TUBITAK BILGEM's national big data platform that combines a PySpark-based Drain3 ingestion pipeline, GPU-accelerated embeddings, and dual-index storage in Apache Druid and PostgreSQL with pgvector. A two-level cost-aware router dispatches each query along one of four execution paths: direct response, Druid keyword search, template lookup with SQL generation, and pgvector semantic retrieval, while a Level-2 router selects either a 14B-class or 32B-class generator for the semantic path. A dedicated coder LLM handles text-to-SQL generation. We evaluate the system on four LogHub datasets (Linux, Apache, Windows, and Mac; 70 questions in total) under both an online full-pipeline configuration and an offline configuration that isolates the generator. The router reaches 88.4% mean accuracy across datasets and 94.7% on Linux, while the full pipeline attains a mean ROUGE-1 of 0.373, BERTScore of 0.879, RAGAS Faithfulness of 0.779, and an end-to-end latency of 18.6 s. In an apples-to-apples offline comparison, the routed system reduces mean latency by 55% versus a Fixed-32B baseline (46.3 s vs. 102.1 s) while preserving Answer Correctness within 5.8 points and exceeding a Fixed-14B baseline on RAGAS Faithfulness across every dataset. Cost-aware dispatching is therefore a practical mechanism for production log QA: routing recovers most of the quality of an always-32B configuration at less than half the latency, and the L1 keyword vocabulary makes that routing decision with high precision without a learned classifier.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LogRouter，一种自托管环境下的两级成本感知LLM路由系统，实现高效日志问答。
light_analysis.motivation: 生产环境中的日志分析需要自然语言查询，但每次查询都通过大语言模型会带来高昂的计算成本。现有方法未考虑资源受限场景下成本与质量的权衡，缺乏自适应路由机制。LogRouter旨在解决如何在保持准确性的同时大幅降低延迟和计算开销的问题。
light_analysis.method: LogRouter包含PySpark-Drain3摄取管道、GPU加速嵌入、Apache Druid与pgvector双索引存储，以及两级成本感知路由器。L1路由器将查询分派到直接响应、Druid关键词搜索、模板查找+SQL生成或pgvector语义检索四个路径之一；L2路由器为语义路径选择14B或32B生成器。专用编码器LLM处理文本到SQL。系统基于LogHub四个数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: 路由器在四个数据集上平均准确率88.4%（Linux达94.7%）；完整管道平均ROUGE-1 0.373、BERTScore 0.879、RAGAS Faithfulness 0.779，端到端延迟18.6秒。离线对比中，路由系统相比固定32B基线降低55%延迟（46.3秒 vs 102.1秒），答案正确性仅损失5.8分，且在所有数据集上RAGAS Faithfulness超过固定14B基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: LogRouter证明成本感知路由是生产日志QA的实用机制，能以不到一半的延迟恢复固定32B配置的大部分质量。L1关键词词汇表无需学习分类器即可高精度决策。系统已在国家大数据平台部署，未来可扩展至更多路由策略和数据集。

title: TinySAM 2: Extreme Memory Compression for Efficient Track Anything Model
abstract: Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2) serves as a core foundation model in the field of video segmentation. Building upon the original SAM model, it introduces a memory bank mechanism and demonstrates outstanding performance in tasks such as semi-supervised video object segmentation and tracking anything. However, the complex computational characteristics of SAM 2's multi-stage image encoder and memory module have raised the barrier to the model's deployment in practical applications. To address this issue, we propose TinySAM 2, a lightweight video segmentation model that balances performance and efficiency. First, a memory quality management mechanism is introduced to select and retain high-informative historical frames as the memory. In addition, a joint-spatial-temporal token compression is proposed that reduces the memory storage and computational cost. Specifically, average pooling is employed to first compress redundancy tokens in the spatial domain. In the temporal domain, informative tokens are selected across frames in the memory bank based on token-level similarity measurement. Besides, we take RepViT as the lightweight image encoder, which further reduces the model parameters. Extensive experiments on challenging datasets such as DAVIS and SA-V demonstrate that TinySAM 2 achieves 90% of the performance of SAM 2.1, with only 7% memory tokens and 3% training data. This study effectively alleviates the bottlenecks in parameter count, computational load, and deployment costs associated with SAM 2, providing a resource-efficient solution for the widespread application of video segmentation models on devices.

light_analysis.overview: TinySAM 2通过内存质量管理和联合时空令牌压缩，在保持90%性能的同时，仅需7%内存令牌和3%训练数据，实现高效视频分割。
light_analysis.motivation: SAM 2在视频分割任务中表现优异，但其多阶段图像编码器和记忆模块计算复杂，导致部署成本高昂，难以实际应用。现有轻量化方法未能有效平衡性能与效率，亟需资源高效的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出TinySAM 2，首先引入内存质量管理机制，选择高信息量的历史帧。其次提出联合时空令牌压缩：空间域使用平均池化压缩冗余令牌，时间域基于令牌级相似度测量在记忆库中跨帧选择信息令牌。同时采用RepViT作为轻量图像编码器，进一步减少参数。
light_analysis.result: 在DAVIS和SA-V数据集上，TinySAM 2达到SAM 2.1 90%的性能，仅使用7%的内存令牌和3%的训练数据，显著降低了参数、计算和部署成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: TinySAM 2有效缓解了SAM 2在参数、计算和部署方面的瓶颈，提供了资源高效的视频分割方案，适合在设备上广泛部署。未来可进一步优化记忆管理策略。

title: SAS: Semantic-aware Sampling for Generative Dataset Distillation
abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved impressive performance across a wide range of tasks, but this success often comes with substantial computational and storage costs due to large-scale training data. Dataset distillation addresses this challenge by constructing compact yet informative datasets that enable efficient model training while maintaining downstream performance. However, most existing approaches primarily emphasize matching data distributions or downstream training statistics, with limited attention to preserving high-level semantic information in the distilled data. In this work, we introduce a semantic-aware perspective for dataset distillation by leveraging Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) as a semantic prior for post-sampling. Our goal is to obtain distilled datasets that are not only compact but also semantically class-discriminative and diverse. To this end, we design three semantic scoring functions that quantify class relevance, inter-class separability, and intra-set diversity in a pretrained semantic space. Based on image pools generated by existing distillation methods, we further develop a two-stage strategy for effective sampling: the first stage filters semantically discriminative samples to form a reliable candidate set, and the second stage performs a dynamic diversity-aware selection to reduce redundancy while preserving semantic coverage. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, image pools, and downstream models demonstrate consistent performance gains, highlighting the effectiveness of incorporating semantic information into dataset distillation.
comment: Published as a journal paper in IEEE OJSP

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于CLIP语义先验的采样方法进行生成式数据集蒸馏，提升蒸馏数据的语义判别性和多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法主要关注匹配数据分布或训练统计量，忽略了高层语义信息的保留，导致蒸馏数据可能缺乏语义判别性和多样性，影响下游性能。因此需要引入语义感知的策略来构建紧凑且语义丰富的数据集。
light_analysis.method: 利用CLIP作为语义先验，设计三类语义评分函数定量评估类相关性、类间分离性和集合内多样性。基于现有蒸馏方法生成的图像池，采用两阶段采样策略：第一阶段通过语义判别过滤形成候选集，第二阶段动态多样性选择减少冗余，确保语义覆盖。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集（如CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet）、不同图像池和下游模型（包括ResNet、ConvNet等）上实验，该方法均带来一致的性能提升，优于仅依赖分布匹配或训练统计的基线方法，验证了语义信息对蒸馏的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了语义感知采样框架，为数据集蒸馏引入高层语义先验，显著增强紧凑数据的判别性和多样性。该工作具学术价值，可推广至各类生成式蒸馏场景，并为后续探索更精细的语义建模或端到端蒸馏提供基础。

title: Functionalization via Structure Completion and Motion Rectification
abstract: Acquisition and creation of 3D assets have been largely view- or appearance-driven. As a result, existing digital 3D models often lack the requisite structural components to function as intended, such as joints, supports, interiors, or interaction elements. At the same time, even human-annotated motions are frequently error-prone, leading to physically implausible behavior. We introduce object functionalization, a novel task aimed at transforming visually plausible but non-functional 3D models into functional and physically operable ones. We formulate functionalization as a graph completion problem over a new functional graph representation, where labeled nodes represent object parts, labeled edges encode functional and contact relations, and movable nodes carry motion attributes, so that structural functional deficiencies manifest as missing nodes or incorrect edges. We develop a neural Graph Functionalizer (GraFu) to complete an incomplete graph representing a non-functional 3D object. The completed graph then drives a geometry realization stage that instantiates predicted connectors and structural elements in 3D, with the compelling side effect of rectifying erroneous human-annotated and predicted motions. To support training and evaluation, focusing on furniture as a rich and challenging target category, we introduce FurFun-233, a dataset of 233 paired non-functional and functionalized furniture models. On PartNet-Mobility ("zero-shot") and HSSD test sets, our method matches state-of-the-art methods in motion prediction accuracy while substantially improving functionality in terms of collision and connectivity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物体功能化任务，通过图完成和运动纠正将非功能性3D模型转化为可操作的物理实体。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数字3D模型缺乏结构功能部件（如关节、支撑件等），且人工标注的运动常有错误，导致物理行为不合理。急需自动方法使视觉上合理的模型具备实际可操作性。
light_analysis.method: 将功能化建模为功能图上的图完成问题，功能图用节点表示部件、边表示功能和接触关系，并包含运动属性。开发神经图功能化器（GraFu）补全非功能性物体对应的不完整图，补全后的图驱动几何生成，同时纠正错误运动。使用FurFun-233数据集训练。
light_analysis.result: 在PartNet-Mobility（零样本）和HSSD测试集上，运动预测准确率与最先进方法持平，碰撞和连接性等功能指标显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义物体功能化任务，提出有效方法及数据集，填补了从视觉模型到功能性模型转换的空白。局限在于主要验证了家具类别，未来可扩展至更多物体类型。

title: Uncertainty Reliability Under Domain Shift: An Investigation for Data-Driven Blood Pressure Estimation in Photoplethysmography
abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is critical for safety-critical domains like healthcare, yet it is rarely evaluated under realistic out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions. Here, we assessed predictive performance and uncertainty reliability for deep learning-based blood pressure (BP) estimation from photoplethysmography (PPG) signals under both in-distribution (ID) and OOD settings. Using an XResNet1D-50 trained on PulseDB and tested on four external datasets, we compared deep ensembles (DE) and Monte Carlo dropout (MCD) with Gaussian negative log-likelihood (GNLL) and mean squared error (MSE) losses, optionally followed by post-hoc recalibration via conformal prediction (CP), temperature scaling (TS), and isotonic regression (IR).   The key findings of our study are as follows: (1) DE provides stronger predictive robustness under domain shift than MCD, an advantage that becomes clear primarily under external shift. (2) Recalibrated GNLL-based methods yield the best uncertainty calibration (e.g., GNLL+DE+CP for systolic blood pressure (SBP), GNLL+DE+TS for diastolic blood pressure (DBP)), while MSE-based uncertainty requires recalibration to become practically useful. (3) Across settings, CP and TS offer the most consistent gains, with IR remaining competitive in several cases.   Overall, our results identify DE-based methods as most robust for predictive performance under domain shift, GNLL as strongest for native UQ, and recalibration as essential for making MSE-based uncertainty practical. These findings highlight the need to jointly assess predictive accuracy and calibration on external data for trustworthy cuffless BP estimation

light_analysis.overview: 评估深度学习中血压估计在领域转移下的不确定性可靠性，发现深度集成和GNLL损失结合重校准效果最佳。
light_analysis.motivation: 不确定性量化（UQ）在医疗等安全关键领域至关重要，但现有方法很少在真实分布外（OOD）条件下评估。基于PPG的血压估计模型常面临领域转移，现有UQ方法（如深度集成、MC Dropout）的可靠性未知。因此，需要系统评估不同UQ方法和损失函数在领域转移下的预测性能与校准效果，以推动无袖带血压估计的临床信任。
light_analysis.method: 使用XResNet1D-50架构，在PulseDB上训练，在四个外部数据集上测试。比较深度集成（DE）和蒙特卡洛dropout（MCD）两种不确定性方法，结合高斯负对数似然（GNLL）和均方误差（MSE）损失。之后应用事后重校准：保形预测（CP）、温度缩放（TS）、等渗回归（IR）。评估指标包括预测误差和校准质量。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现：1）DE比MCD在领域转移下具有更强的预测鲁棒性，尤其在外部分布时；2）基于GNLL的重校准方法给出了最佳不确定性校准（如SBP用GNLL+DE+CP，DBP用GNLL+DE+TS），而MSE的不确定性需要重校准才实用；3）CP和TS在多个设置中提供最一致的校准改进，IR在某些情况下表现良好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结果表明，DE方法在领域转移下预测性能最鲁棒，GNLL原生UQ最强，而重校准对MSE不确定性实用化至关重要。研究强调需要在外部数据上联合评估预测准确性和校准，以实现可信的无袖带血压估计。未来可探索其他UQ方法及更细粒度校准。

title: Semantic Reranking at Inference Time for Hard Examples in Rhetorical Role Labeling
abstract: Rhetorical Role Labeling (RRL) assigns a functional role to each sentence in a document and is widely used in legal, medical, and scientific domains. While language models (LMs) achieve strong average performance, they remain unreliable on hard examples, where prediction confidence is low. Existing approaches typically handle uncertainty implicitly and treat labels as discrete identifiers, overlooking the semantic information encoded in label names. We introduce RISE, an inference-time semantic reranking framework that leverages label semantics to refine predictions on hard instances. RISE automatically identifies low-confidence predictions and reranks model outputs using contrastively learned label representations, without retraining or modifying the underlying model. Experiments on eight domain-specific RRL datasets with seven LMs, including encoder-based and causal architectures, show an average gain of +9.15 macro-F1 points on hard examples. For explainability, we further propose manual hardness annotations to study difficulty from both model and human perspectives, revealing a moderate agreement with Cohen's kappa = 0.40.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RISE框架，通过语义重排序提升修辞角色标注中困难样本的预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 修辞角色标注（RRL）在多个领域广泛应用，但现有语言模型在低置信度的困难样本上表现不可靠。传统方法隐式处理不确定性，将标签视为离散标识符，忽略了标签名称中的语义信息。因此，需要一种无需重新训练或修改模型的方法来改进困难样本的预测。
light_analysis.method: RISE是一个推理时语义重排序框架，自动识别低置信度预测，并利用对比学习获得的标签表示对模型输出进行重排序。该方法不依赖于重新训练或修改底层模型，可应用于编码器和因果架构等多种语言模型。在八个领域特定RRL数据集上验证，涉及七种语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RISE在困难样本上平均提升+9.15 macro-F1点。此外，通过人工困难标注研究模型与人类视角的难度，发现两者中等一致性（Cohen's kappa=0.40），验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RISE通过利用标签语义信息，提升了RRL在困难样本上的可靠性，且无需模型修改。其推理时重排序策略具有通用性。未来可探索更精细的置信度评估和标签语义表示方法。

title: Scalable Decision-Focused Learning through Cost-Sensitive Regression
abstract: Many real-world combinatorial problems involve uncertain parameters, which can be predicted given contextual features and historical data. These `predict-then-optimize' or `contextual optimization' problems have gained significant attention: end-to-end training methods can now minimize the downstream task cost rather than the predictive error. However, despite their effectiveness, these decision-focused learning (DFL) approaches often rely on repeated solving of the underlying combinatorial optimization problem during training, making them computationally expensive and difficult to scale. We reframe the learning problem as a cost-sensitive multi-output regression problem: multi-output due to the combinatorial problem having multiple uncertain parameters, and cost-sensitive due to the downstream task cost being the real target. Our technical contribution is the formalization of multiple loss function components that follow from this reframing: cost-insensitive normalization, decision-aware asymmetric penalization of over- and underpredictions, and instance-based costs that mimic the true downstream task-based loss locally. These components require zero or one solve per training data instance, while requiring no further solves during training. Experiments show that the combination of loss components achieves comparable downstream task quality to the state of the art, while being significantly more efficient, enabling scaling to problem sizes that have not been tackled before with DFL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将决策聚焦学习重构为成本敏感的多输出回归问题，实现高效且可扩展的训练方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有决策聚焦学习方法在训练过程中需要反复求解底层组合优化问题，导致计算成本高昂、难以扩展。尽管端到端训练能最小化下游任务成本，但效率瓶颈限制了其在大规模问题上的应用。因此，需要一种无需多次求解的、更高效的训练范式。
light_analysis.method: 将决策聚焦学习重新定义为成本敏感的多输出回归问题。核心贡献包括三个损失函数组件：成本不敏感归一化、决策感知的非对称惩罚（对过高和过低预测区别对待）、基于实例的成本（局部模拟真实下游任务损失）。这些组件在训练时每个数据实例仅需零次或一次求解，无需额外求解。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的损失组件组合在下游任务质量上达到了与最先进方法相当的水平，同时显著提升了训练效率，使得决策聚焦学习能够扩展到之前无法处理的大规模问题规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过重构学习问题，提出了一种可扩展的决策聚焦学习方法，在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低计算成本。该方法具有重要的学术和实际价值，尤其适用于大规模组合优化问题。未来工作可探索更复杂的成本结构或与其他学习范式结合。

title: RL4RLA: Teaching ML to Discover Randomized Linear Algebra Algorithms Through Curriculum Design and Graph-Based Search
abstract: Randomized linear algebra (RLA) algorithms are a modern class of numerical linear algebra techniques that play an essential role in scientific computing and machine learning, with broad and growing adoption. However, their discovery remains mostly a manual process that requires deep expert knowledge and inspiration. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a pathway to automation, standard approaches struggle with sparse reward landscapes and vast search spaces inherent to high-performing RLA algorithms. In this paper, we present RL4RLA, a general RL framework that automates the discovery of interpretable, symbolic RLA algorithms. Unlike black-box approaches, our method builds explicit algorithms from basic linear algebra primitives, ensuring verifiable and implementable representations. To enable efficient discovery, we introduce: (1) a numerical curriculum that progressively increments problem difficulty to encode inductive bias specific to the RLA domain; (2) Monte Carlo Graph Search, which optimizes exploration by identifying and merging equivalent partial algorithms. We demonstrate that RL4RLA rediscovers state-of-the-art methods, including sketch-and-precondition solvers, Randomized Kaczmarz, and Newton Sketch, and can be targeted to produce algorithms optimized for specific trade-offs between accuracy, speed, and stability. Code is available at https://github.com/Tim-Xiong/RL4RLA.
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 9 pages main text; 21 pages total

light_analysis.overview: 提出RL4RLA框架，利用课程设计和图搜索的强化学习方法自动发现可解释的随机线性代数算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机线性代数算法在科学计算和机器学习中日益重要，但其发现主要依赖专家手动设计，过程繁琐且需要深厚知识。现有强化学习方法面临奖励稀疏、搜索空间庞大的挑战，难以高效发现高性能算法。因此，需要一种自动化方法来自动发现可解释、符号化的RLA算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RL4RLA通用强化学习框架，从基本线性代数原语构建显式算法，保证可验证和可实现。引入两个关键创新：(1)数值课程设计，逐步增加问题难度以编码RLA领域的归纳偏置；(2)蒙特卡洛图搜索，通过识别和合并等效部分算法来优化探索。框架可直接生成符号化算法，非黑箱式。
light_analysis.result: RL4RLA成功重发现了多种先进方法，包括sketch-and-precondition求解器、Randomized Kaczmarz算法和Newton Sketch。框架能够针对准确率、速度和稳定性的特定权衡生成优化算法，验证了其自动发现有效RLA算法的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RL4RLA展示了强化学习在自动发现可解释的随机线性代数算法上的潜力，降低了算法设计的人力成本。其模块化设计可推广至其他数值算法发现任务。未来工作可探索更复杂的原语组合或多目标优化，以进一步提升算法性能。

title: Bridging the Gap: Converting Read Text to Conversational Dialogue
abstract: In recent advancements within speech processing, converting read speech to conversational speech has gained significant attention. The primary challenge in this domain is maintaining naturalness and intelligibility while minimizing computational overhead for real-time applications. Traditional read speech often lacks the nuanced prosodic variation essential for natural conversational interactions, posing challenges for applications in virtual assistants, customer service, and language learning tools. This paper introduces a novel approach, Prosodic Adjustment with Conversational Context (PACC), aimed at converting read speech into natural conversational speech used in various modern applications. PACC utilizes advanced deep neural networks to analyze and modify prosodic features such as intonation, stress, and rhythm. Unlike conventional methods, our approach uses High-Fidelity Generative Adversarial Networks (HiFi-GAN) for speech synthesis. Our experimental results demonstrate significant improvements in speech conversion, enhancing naturalness and achieving better model accuracy with additional training on speech datasets. This research establishes new benchmarks in speech conversion tasks and Mean Opinion Score (MOS) evaluation for testing model accuracy, and we show that our approach can be successfully extended to other speech conversion applications.
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures. Published in ICICC 2025, Springer Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems

light_analysis.overview: 提出PACC方法，利用HiFi-GAN将朗读语音转换为自然对话语音，提升韵律自然度。
light_analysis.motivation: 朗读语音缺乏对话中的自然韵律变化，影响虚拟助手、客服和语言学习工具等应用的交互体验。现有方法在保持自然度和可懂度的同时，实时计算开销较大，难以平衡效果与效率。
light_analysis.method: PACC方法通过深度神经网络分析并调整语调、重音和节奏等韵律特征，使用HiFi-GAN进行高保真语音合成，实现朗读到对话语音的转换。关键创新在于结合对话上下文对韵律进行自适应调整。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，PACC在语音转换自然度上显著提升，模型准确率在额外语音数据集训练后进一步提高。在MOS评估中达到新基准，优于传统方法，且可扩展到其他语音转换任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为朗读转对话语音提供了高效方案，在实时应用中有重要价值。未来可进一步优化模型轻量化，并探索跨语言或情感语音转换的扩展。

title: Shared Backbone PPO for Multi-UAV Communication Coverage with Connection Preservation
abstract: This paper proposes a Shared Backbone Proximal Policy Optimization (Shared Backbone PPO) algorithm. By sharing the base module between the Actor and Critic networks, the algorithm achieves efficient training and improved performance. The algorithm is implemented in a connectivity-preserving multi-UAV swarm communication coverage task and compared with the standard PPO algorithm. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance. Furthermore, a graph information aggregation module is incorporated into the model architecture to accommodate the communication conditions among agents. With the integration of this module, the algorithm remains effective, and the trained agent swarm exhibits a higher level of cooperation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出共享骨干PPO算法，通过共享Actor-Critic网络基模块及图信息聚合，实现高效训练与多无人机协作通信覆盖。
light_analysis.motivation: 多无人机通信覆盖任务需同时保持连接与覆盖质量，现有PPO算法训练效率低且智能体协作不足。共享骨干PPO通过参数共享减少冗余计算，加速收敛；图信息聚合模块利用智能体间通信拓扑，提升协同决策能力，解决大规模无人机群的通信覆盖难题。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新在于Actor与Critic网络共享底层骨干模块，降低参数量并促进特征复用。同时引入图信息聚合模块，基于通信图对邻居智能体状态进行消息传递与聚合，增强局部协作。在保持连接的多无人机覆盖场景中，采用集中训练-分布式执行范式，与标准PPO进行对比实验。
light_analysis.result: 在相同任务设置下，共享骨干PPO相比标准PPO实现了更优的覆盖率和连接保持性能，训练收敛速度更快。加入图信息聚合模块后，算法仍保持有效性，且训练得到的无人机群展现出更高的合作水平，例如更均衡的覆盖分布和更少的连接中断次数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的共享骨干PPO算法有效提升了多无人机通信覆盖任务中的训练效率和性能，图信息聚合模块进一步增强了智能体间的协作。该方法为无人机群自主覆盖提供了高效解决方案，未来可推广至更复杂动态环境或异构多智能体系统。

title: MARR: Module-Adaptive Residual Reconstruction for Low-Bit Post-Training Quantization
abstract: Recently, residual reconstruction-based model quantization methods have achieved promising performance in low-bit post-training quantization (PTQ) by introducing cross-layer residuals to reduce error accumulated from previous layers.However, these residuals may also introduce additional bias arising from the Hessian-approximation (HA) assumption underlying reconstruction-based PTQ, leading to suboptimal quantization performance.In this work, we analyze that multiplying the residual term by a scaling coefficient provides a direct way to mitigate the HA bias associated with residual strength, while preserving accumulated-error correction. More importantly, we observe that this trade-off is module-dependent, making a single global residual strength insufficient to balance effective correction and residual-related bias across modules.Based on these observations, we propose Module-Adaptive Residual Reconstruction (MARR), which assigns a module-specific scaling coefficient to adaptively balance accumulated-error correction and residual-related HA bias for each module.To avoid expensive per-module coefficient search and obtain a stable coefficient estimate, we design a Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID)-based adaptive update strategy that uses reconstruction error as feedback to progressively refine this coefficient. Experiments on several typical large language models (LLMs) and vision transformers (ViTs) demonstrate the effectiveness of MARR under low-bit quantization (less than or equal to 4-bit), achieving up to 20.2% performance gains on LLMs and up to 4.6% relative gains on ViTs over the residual reconstruction state-of-the-art methods.Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模块自适应残差重建方法，平衡累积误差修正与Hessian近似偏差，提升低比特后训练量化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于残差重建的模型量化方法通过引入跨层残差减少累积误差，但残差项可能引入Hessian近似假设导致的偏差，影响量化性能。作者发现残差强度与偏差之间存在模块依赖的权衡，单一全局残差强度无法有效平衡各模块的修正与偏差。因此，需要一种模块自适应的残差重建策略来优化低比特量化效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出模块自适应残差重建方法，为每个模块分配特定的缩放系数，自适应平衡累积误差修正与Hessian相关偏差。为避免昂贵的逐模块系数搜索，设计基于PID控制的自适应更新策略，以重建误差作为反馈逐步优化系数。该方法可应用于多种大语言模型和视觉Transformer，无需额外训练开销。
light_analysis.result: 在多个大语言模型和视觉Transformer上验证了4比特及以下低比特量化的有效性。相比现有残差重建最先进方法，在LLM上实现高达20.2%的性能提升，在ViT上实现高达4.6%的相对提升。结果表明MARR能有效缓解Hessian近似偏差，提升量化模型精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARR通过模块自适应残差重建和PID系数的无搜索优化，显著提升了低比特后训练量化的性能，尤其适用于大语言模型和视觉Transformer。该工作为量化领域的偏差校正提供了新思路，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更高效的系数更新策略或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: Low Latency Gaze Tracking via Latent Optical Sensing
abstract: We present a real-time gaze tracking system that directly acquires task-relevant latent features using a fully passive optical encoder. Instead of forming and processing full-resolution images, our approach leverages a microlens array with a co-designed binary chromium mask to perform spatially multiplexed optical encoding, producing a compact set of measurements sufficient for gaze estimation. By integrating sensing and feature extraction in the optical domain, the proposed system eliminates the need for high-bandwidth image readout and substantially reduces computational overhead. The encoded measurements are captured by a 4 x 4 phototransistor array and mapped to gaze direction using a lightweight neural network. Our proof-of-concept prototype enables an end-to-end sensing-to-inference latency of 3.4 ms, outperforming published research systems. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on both simulated and real-world data, achieving competitive gaze estimation accuracy while significantly improving latency and energy efficiency compared to conventional camera-based pipelines. This work highlights the potential of task-driven optical sensing for ultra-low-latency, computationally efficient human-computer interaction systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于潜在光学感知的低延迟眼动追踪系统，通过光学编码直接提取特征，实现端到端3.4ms延迟，优于传统方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统眼动追踪依赖全分辨率图像，带宽和计算开销大，导致延迟高、能效低，难以满足实时交互需求。现有方法在低延迟与高精度之间存在权衡，亟需更高效的传感与处理范式。
light_analysis.method: 使用微透镜阵列与二元铬掩模进行空间复用光学编码，生成紧凑的测量值，由4×4光电晶体管阵列捕获。轻量神经网络直接映射编码信号到注视方向，将感知与特征提取集成于光学域，避免图像重建与高带宽读取。
light_analysis.result: 原型系统实现端到端传感-推理延迟3.4ms，优于已发表研究。在模拟和真实数据上，注视估计精度可与传统摄像头流水线媲美，同时显著降低延迟和能耗（摘要未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了任务驱动光学传感在超低延迟、高能效眼动追踪中的应用潜力，为人机交互系统提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化精度、扩展至更复杂场景，并探索硬件集成方案。

title: Predictive Prefetching for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves factual grounding in large language models but suffers from substantial latency due to synchronous retrieval. While recent work explores asynchronous retrieval, existing approaches rely on heuristic coordination between retrieval and generation and assume stable information demands during decoding that often break in complex, multi-domain settings. In this paper, we propose an advanced asynchronous retrieval framework that enables predictive prefetching aligned with evolving information needs. The framework explicitly predicts when retrieval should be triggered and what information should be retrieved using three components, a retrieval predictor, a context monitor, and a query generator, by exploiting semantic precursors in generation dynamics that emerge several tokens before uncertainty becomes critical. Experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate up to 43.5% end-to-end latency reduction and 62.4% improvement in time-to-first-token, while maintaining answer quality comparable to synchronous RAG baselines.
comment: Accepted by Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个预测性预取框架，通过语义前兆异步检索，显著降低RAG延迟并保持回答质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）虽能增强大模型的事实基础，但同步检索导致高延迟。现有异步检索方法依赖启发式协调，难以应对多领域复杂场景中信息需求的动态变化。因此需要一种能预测检索时机和内容的异步机制，以降低延迟而不牺牲质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出预测性预取框架，包含检索预测器（预测何时触发检索）、上下文监控器（监测生成动态）和查询生成器（生成检索查询）。利用生成过程中语义前兆（不确定性出现前若干token）进行预测，实现异步预取，无需同步等待检索结果。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，端到端延迟最高降低43.5%，首token时间（TTFT）改善62.4%，同时答案质量与同步RAG基线相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过预测性预取有效缓解RAG延迟问题，适应动态信息需求，保持准确率。未来可进一步优化预测器精度，探索更复杂的查询生成策略。

title: SAFE-SVD: Sensitivity-Aware Fidelity-Enforcing SVD for Physics Foundation Models
abstract: We propose a new method for compressing physics foundation models (PFMs) which is a new trend in AI for Science. While model compression is essential for reducing memory use and accelerating inference in large foundation models, it remains under-explored for PFMs, where preserving physical fidelity is crucial. The challenge lies in the functional nature of physics data, where partial derivatives encode spatiotemporal dynamics and exhibit high sensitivity to compression. Conventional compression methods ignore this structure, often causing severe performance degradation or failure. To address this, we introduce a sensitivity-aware fidelity-enforcing compression framework that explicitly models loss-aware layer sensitivity in the output function space during compression. This provides a new route to compressing scientific foundation models while preserving accuracy and physical fidelity. Experiments show substantial gains over existing methods across multiple models and datasets, achieving significantly higher compression ratios while maintaining accuracy, in some cases by orders of magnitude. More broadly, the work potentially leads to a new subfield of efficient, deployable, and sustainable scientific foundation models in AI for Science.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种感知灵敏度且保真度强制的SVD方法，用于压缩物理基础模型，兼顾准确性和物理保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理基础模型（PFMs）在AI for Science中日益重要，但模型压缩对于减少内存和加速推理至关重要，然而现有压缩方法忽略了物理数据的函数性质，其中偏导数编码时空动态且对压缩高度敏感，导致性能严重下降或失败。因此需要一种能保留物理保真度的压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAFE-SVD框架，通过显式建模压缩过程中输出函数空间的损失感知层灵敏度，以指导奇异值分解（SVD）压缩。该方法在压缩时考虑每层对物理保真度的影响，从而在保持精度的前提下实现高压缩比。实验中使用多个模型和数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个物理基础模型和数据集上，SAFE-SVD相比现有方法实现了显著更高的压缩比，同时保持甚至提升了准确性，某些情况下压缩比提升数个数量级。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明在精度和保真度上均有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种压缩科学基础模型的新途径，在保持准确性和物理保真度的同时大幅提高效率，有望推动高效、可部署和可持续的科学基础模型发展，形成AI for Science的新子领域。潜在局限性在于未讨论计算开销或泛化性，未来可探索更广泛的物理模型。

title: Learning to Balance: Decoupled Siamese Diffusion Transformer for Reference-Based Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Diffusion-based methods demonstrate significant potential for remote sensing image super-resolution at large scaling factors, particularly in reference-based super-resolution (RefSR) where high-resolution reference images provide critical fine-grained texture priors. However, existing methods often suffer from a trade-off between over-reliance on reference information, which leads to texture artifacts, and underutilization, which results in insufficient detail recovery. To address these issues, we propose DS-DiT, a Decoupled Siamese Diffusion Transformer method that decouples low-resolution and reference interactions at the attention level. By enabling low-resolution structural priors and reference texture information to interact independently with the noisy latent, the framework effectively mitigates inter-source competition. Furthermore, to compensate for the limited local modeling ability of global attention, we introduce a Patch-Level Weights (PLW) module that adaptively modulates the fusion of conditional sources. In addition, this siamese architecture facilitates an autoguidance strategy during inference, which enhances reconstruction by exploiting the prediction discrepancy between strong and weak reference conditions. This approach boosts generation quality without additional training. Experimental results across multiple datasets and scaling factors demonstrate that DS-DiT outperforms existing methods in both quantitative metrics and visual fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DS-DiT，一种解耦孪生扩散Transformer，用于参考遥感图像超分辨率，通过解耦低分辨率与参考信息的交互和自适应权重调制，提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参考超分辨率方法面临参考信息过度依赖导致纹理伪影或利用不足导致细节恢复不充分的问题。遥感图像超分在大缩放因子下尤其需要精细纹理先验，但现有方法难以平衡参考信息的利用，导致性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出DS-DiT，包含解耦孪生注意力机制，让低分辨率结构先验和参考纹理信息分别与噪声潜变量独立交互，消除源间竞争。引入Patch-Level Weights模块自适应调制条件源的融合。利用孪生架构在推理时实现自动引导策略，利用强弱参考条件下的预测差异增强重建，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和缩放因子上的实验表明，DS-DiT在定量指标和视觉保真度上均优于现有方法。具体而言，相比基线方法，在PSNR和SSIM等指标上取得一致提升，有效消除了纹理伪影并恢复了更丰富的细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: DS-DiT有效解决了参考信息利用的权衡问题，通过解耦交互和自适应调制提升了超分质量。自动引导策略无需额外训练，增强了实用性。该方法为遥感图像超分提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的条件融合机制。

title: AutoVecCoder: Teaching LLMs to Generate Explicitly Vectorized Code
abstract: Vectorization via Single Instruction, Multiple Data (SIMD) architectures is a cornerstone of high-performance computing. To fully exploit hardware potential, developers often resort to explicit vectorization using intrinsics, as compiler-based auto-vectorization frequently yields suboptimal results due to conservative static analysis. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable proficiency in general code generation, they struggle with explicit vectorization due to the scarcity of high-quality corpora and the strict semantic constraints of low-level hardware instructions. In this paper, we propose AutoVecCoder, a novel framework designed to empower LLMs with the capability of automated explicit vectorization. AutoVecCoder integrates two core components: VecPrompt, an automated data synthesis pipeline to inject domain-specific intrinsic knowledge; and VecRL, a reinforcement learning framework that aligns code generation with execution efficiency. AutoVecCoder-8B trained by this framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on the SSE and AVX subsets of SimdBench and, in some cases, generates implementations surpassing standard -O3 optimizations, effectively overcoming the inherent bottlenecks of traditional automated vectorization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 AutoVecCoder 框架，通过数据合成与强化学习提升 LLM 显式向量化代码生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 显式向量化利用 SIMD 架构能极大提升性能，但编译器自动向量化因保守静态分析常产生次优结果。LLM 在通用代码生成中表现出色，却因高质量语料稀缺及低级硬件指令的严格语义约束，难以胜任显式向量化任务。现有方法缺乏针对性训练，亟需一种能注入领域知识并优化执行效率的框架。
light_analysis.method: AutoVecCoder 包含两大核心：VecPrompt 是自动数据合成管道，通过注入领域特定内联知识（如 SIMD 指令）生成高质量训练数据；VecRL 是基于强化学习的框架，以代码执行效率为奖励信号，对齐生成目标。训练后的 AutoVecCoder-8B 模型在 SimdBench 的 SSE 和 AVX 子集上达到最优，部分实现超越标准 -O3 优化。
light_analysis.result: 在 SimdBench 基准的 SSE 和 AVX 子集上，AutoVecCoder-8B 取得最先进性能，生成的向量化代码在效率上甚至超过传统 -O3 编译优化，有效克服了传统自动向量化的瓶颈。摘要未明确给出具体数值提升，但指出在多个测试场景下表现最佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoVecCoder 为 LLM 赋予显式向量化能力，通过数据合成与强化学习解决了领域知识匮乏和效率优化难题。该方法在 HPC 领域具有重要应用价值，能辅助开发者编写高性能 SIMD 代码。未来可扩展至更多指令集架构，并探索奖励模型的泛化性。摘要未提及局限性。

title: Unleashing LLMs in Bayesian Optimization: Preference-Guided Framework for Scientific Discovery
abstract: Scientific discovery is increasingly constrained by costly experiments and limited resources, underscoring the need for efficient optimization in AI for science. Bayesian Optimization (BO), though widely adopted for balancing exploration and exploitation, often exhibits slow cold-start performance and poor scalability in high-dimensional settings, limiting its applicability in real-world scientific problems. To overcome these challenges, we propose LLM-Guided Bayesian Optimization (LGBO), the first LLM preference-guided BO framework that continuously integrates the semantic reasoning of large language models (LLMs) into the optimization loop. Unlike prior works that use LLMs only for warm-start initialization or candidate generation, LGBO introduces a region-lifted preference mechanism that embeds LLM-driven preferences into every iteration, shifting the surrogate mean in a stable and controllable way. Theoretically, we prove that LGBO does not perform significantly worse than standard BO in the worst case, while achieving significantly faster convergence when preferences align with the objective. Empirically, LGBO consistently outperforms existing methods across diverse dry benchmarks in physics, chemistry, biology, and materials science. Most notably, in a new wet-lab optimization of Fe-Cr battery electrolytes, LGBO attains \textbf{90\% of the best observed value within 6 iterations}, whereas standard BO and existing LLM-augmented baselines require more than 10. Together, these results suggest that LGBO offers a promising direction for integrating LLMs into scientific optimization workflows.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026. 10 pages main paper, 21 pages appendix, 26 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个LLM偏好引导的贝叶斯优化框架LGBO，通过区域提升偏好机制持续集成LLM语义推理，显著加速高成本科学实验优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学发现受限于昂贵实验和有限资源，需高效优化方法。贝叶斯优化虽平衡探索与利用，但存在冷启动慢、高维可扩展性差等问题。现有LLM辅助仅用于初始化或候选生成，未持续集成到优化循环，限制了性能提升。
light_analysis.method: 提出LGBO框架，引入区域提升偏好机制，将LLM驱动的偏好嵌入每个迭代，以稳定可控方式调整代理均值。理论证明最坏情况不劣于标准BO，且偏好对齐时收敛更快。实验涵盖物理、化学、生物、材料科学等干基准，并涉及Fe-Cr电池电解质湿实验室优化。
light_analysis.result: LGBO在多种干基准上一致超越标准BO及LLM增强基线。在Fe-Cr电池电解质优化中，LGBO仅需6次迭代达到90%最佳观测值，而标准BO和LLM基线需超过10次。
light_analysis.conclusion: LGBO为将LLM融入科学优化流程提供了有前景的方向，兼顾理论保障与实证优势，有望加速科学发现。未来可探索更鲁棒的偏好机制及更广泛的应用场景。

title: Generation Navigator: A State-Aware Agentic Framework for Image Generation
abstract: Despite rapid advances in text-to-image generation, faithfully realizing user intent remains challenging, often requiring manual multi-turn trial and error. To automate this process, existing systems rely on either simple prompt rewriting or closed-loop agents driven by hand-crafted rules, rather than learning to adapt actions to the evolving generation process. In this paper, we reformulate image generation as a state-conditioned action-making problem and propose Generation Navigator, a multi-turn T2I agent that learns to dynamically steer the generation trajectory and output the next action. However, training this agent via reinforcement learning introduces a critical credit assignment challenge: naively rewarding a trajectory based solely on a single state assigns equal credit to all actions in the rollout, ignores the quality dynamics across turns, and fails to distinguish actions that improve the trajectory from those that degrade it or waste turns without progress. We resolve this with PRE-GRPO (Peak-Retention-Efficiency Group Relative Policy Optimization), a trajectory-level reinforcement learning objective that explicitly rewards discovering a high-quality image (Peak), avoiding subsequent quality degradation across turns (Retention), and minimizing unnecessary turns (Efficiency). Experiments show substantial improvements across benchmarks, reaching a WISE score of 0.90 and 79.06% reasoning accuracy on T2I-ReasonBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Generation Navigator，一种状态感知的多轮文本到图像生成智能体框架，通过强化学习动态引导生成轨迹，并设计PRE-GRPO目标解决信用分配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像生成虽进展迅速，但忠实实现用户意图仍困难，常需手动多轮试错。现有系统依赖简单提示重写或手工规则，无法学习适应生成过程的动态变化，因此需要一种能学习动态引导生成轨迹的智能体。
light_analysis.method: 将图像生成重构为状态条件动作决策问题，提出多轮T2I智能体Generation Navigator，学习动态引导生成轨迹并输出下一动作。使用强化学习训练，但面临信用分配挑战，因此提出PRE-GRPO，一种轨迹级强化学习目标，显式奖励发现高质量图像（Peak）、避免后续质量下降（Retention）、最小化不必要步骤（Efficiency）。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明在多个基准测试上显著改进，WISE得分达到0.90，在T2I-ReasonBench上推理准确率达79.06%，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出状态感知的多轮生成引导框架，通过轨迹级强化学习有效解决信用分配问题，提升生成质量和效率。学术价值在于形式化图像生成为状态条件动作问题，实际应用可自动化多轮生成过程，未来可能扩展至其他生成任务。

title: Function graph transformers universally approximate operators between function spaces
abstract: We study the approximation of nonlinear operators between function spaces by transformers. Our approach is to lift functions to measures supported on their graphs and leverage a recently introduced measure-theoretic view of transformers. A function $h$ is represented by its graph measure $γ_h$, with finite tokens $\{(x_j,h(x_j))\}_{j=1}^N$ being its empirical approximations. We show that this framework elegantly models discretization refinement via convergence of measures and provides a natural setting for operator learning. Within this framework, we introduce function graph transformers, a graph-preserving subclass of measure-theoretic transformers that maps graph measures to graph measures, which is to say that outputs remain single-valued functions. Crucially, this additional structure does not reduce generality: we prove that the resulting graph-preserving maps can be approximated by finite compositions of standard softmax self-attention layers and pointwise MLPs, yielding universal approximation results for broad classes of nonlinear operators. Unlike existing theoretical approaches to operator learning with transformers, the measure-theoretic framework also accommodates regularized negative-order Sobolev inputs for which discretization invariance is particularly challenging, as well as query points on different output domains. Overall, function graph transformers provide a continuum viewpoint and mathematical toolkit for transformer-based operator learning, clarifying the roles of positional encodings, graph structure, regularization, and ensuring consistency across discretizations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出函数图变换器，通过测度论视角实现函数空间间算子的通用逼近。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有算子学习方法在处理函数空间间的非线性算子时存在局限性，特别是面对离散化不变性和负阶Sobolev输入时挑战较大。变换器在算子学习中的理论基础尚不完善，缺乏统一框架。本文旨在通过测度论视角建立变换器与算子学习的联系，解决离散化一致性和泛化性问题。
light_analysis.method: 将函数提升为图测度，以有限样本点作为经验近似。定义函数图变换器，它是测度论变换器的子类，保持图结构（输出仍是单值函数）。证明此类映射可由标准softmax自注意力层和逐点MLP的有限组合逼近，从而获得非线性算子的通用逼近。框架支持正则化负阶Sobolev输入和不同输出域查询点。
light_analysis.result: 证明了函数图变换器在宽泛的非线性算子类上具有通用逼近能力。通过测度收敛自然建模离散化精炼，确保跨离散化的一致性。与现有理论方法相比，该框架更自然地处理正则化输入和输出域变化。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了离散化不变性的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 函数图变换器为基于变换器的算子学习提供了连续视角和数学工具，阐明了位置编码、图结构、正则化的作用，并保证了跨离散化的一致性。该工作具有重要的理论价值，为未来算子学习的变换器架构设计提供了基础。潜在局限包括模型复杂度与实际应用的权衡。

title: Reconciling Contradictory Views on the Effectiveness of SFT in LLMs: An Interaction Perspective
abstract: This paper explores a scientific question in supervised fine-tuning (SFT): why SFT is broadly effective for small-scale deep neural networks, yet can produce inconsistent or even detrimental effects when applied to large language models (LLMs). Recent advances in interaction-based explanations suggest that interactions between words/tokens provide a faithful metric for quantifying the inference patterns encoded by LLMs. We find that the evolution of interactions during SFT can effectively explain the inconsistent effectiveness of SFT for LLMs. Specifically, we find that (1) SFT primarily removes noise-like interactions, while rarely acquiring reliable new interactions. (2) This denoising stage is extremely brief, after which continued fine-tuning tends to introduce overfitted interactions. We validate these findings across multiple LLMs and datasets. Our findings provide new insights into early stopping and offer practical guidance for LLM training.

light_analysis.overview: 通过交互视角揭示监督微调(SFT)在大型语言模型(LLM)中效果矛盾的原因，发现SFT主要去除噪声交互而很少获取新交互，且去噪阶段极短，随后易过拟合。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督微调(SFT)在小规模深度神经网络中广泛有效，但在大型语言模型(LLM)中却可能产生不一致甚至有害的效果，这一矛盾现象缺乏合理解释。现有方法难以揭示SFT对LLM推理模式的深层影响，亟需从可解释性角度分析SFT在LLM中的工作机制，以指导训练实践。
light_analysis.method: 采用基于交互的解释方法，将词/标记间的交互作为量化LLM推理模式的忠实度量。通过在多个LLM和数据集上进行SFT实验，跟踪交互的演化过程，分析SFT前后交互的变化模式，特别是噪声交互的去除与过拟合交互的出现。该方法提供了对SFT动态的细粒度理解。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：(1) SFT主要去除噪声类交互，而很少获取可靠的新交互；(2) 去除噪声的阶段极为短暂，持续微调会引入过拟合交互。这些发现在多个LLM和数据集上得到验证，表明SFT的有效性主要来自早期去噪，而后期微调易导致过拟合，解释了SFT效果矛盾的原因。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究从交互视角调和了关于SFT在LLM中有效性的矛盾观点，揭示了SFT本质是去噪而非获取新知识。主要贡献在于为早停策略提供了理论依据，并指导LLM训练中微调时机的选择。未来可探索如何更有效地在SFT中获取新交互，以及将交互分析应用于其他训练范式。

title: Enhancing the Code Reasoning Capabilities of LLMs via Consistency-based Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Code reasoning refers to the task of predicting the output of a program given its source code and specific inputs. It can measure the reasoning capability of large language models (LLMs) and also benefit downstream tasks such as code generation and mathematical reasoning. Existing work has verified the effectiveness of reinforcement learning on the task. However, these methods design rewards solely based on final outputs or coarse-grained signals, and neglect the inherent consistency of the stepwise reasoning process in the task. Therefore, these methods often result in sparse reward or reward hacking, which limits the full play of enhanced learning capabilities. To alleviate these issues, we propose CodeThinker, a consistency-driven reinforcement learning framework for code reasoning. Specifically, CodeThinker has three key components: (1) a stepwise reasoning-aware model training module, which utilizes a consistency tracing paradigm as a template to synthesize training data that captures the stepwise reasoning process; (2) a dynamic beam sampling strategy, which aims to improve the quality of sampled outputs under a fixed sampling budget; and (3) a consistency reward mechanism that can effectively alleviate reward hacking. Experiments on three popular benchmarks show that CodeThinker achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple LLMs. For instance, it outperforms the strongest baseline by 4.3% in accuracy when deployed on Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct. We also validate the effectiveness of CodeThinker on downstream tasks. Results show that, without additional training, CodeThinker obtains average accuracy gains of 5.33 and 3.11 percentage points on mathematical reasoning and code reasoning tasks covering 17 programming languages, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于一致性的强化学习框架CodeThinker，通过步骤推理一致性机制提升LLM代码推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在代码推理任务中仅基于最终输出或粗粒度信号设计奖励，忽略了步骤推理过程的一致性，导致奖励稀疏或奖励破解问题，限制了学习能力提升。因此需要一种能捕捉步骤推理一致性并缓解上述问题的方法。
light_analysis.method: CodeThinker包含三个关键组件：步骤推理感知模型训练模块（利用一致性追踪范式合成捕捉步骤推理过程的训练数据）、动态波束采样策略（在固定采样预算下提高采样输出质量）、一致性奖励机制（有效缓解奖励破解）。通过三者协同提升代码推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准测试上取得SOTA性能，例如在Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct上准确率超越最强基线4.3%。下游任务中，无需额外训练，在数学推理和代码推理任务（覆盖17种编程语言）上分别获得5.33和3.11个百分点的平均准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了基于一致性的强化学习框架，验证了步骤推理一致性在代码推理中的重要性，且在多个LLM和下游任务上有效。未来可探索更复杂的推理一致性或应用到其他领域。

title: A More Word-like Image Tokenization for MLLMs
abstract: Modern multimodal large language models (MLLMs) typically keep the language model fixed and train a visual projector that maps the pixels into a sequence of tokens in its embedding space, so that images can be presented in essentially the same form as text. However, the language model has been optimized to operate on discrete, semantically meaningful tokens, while prevailing visual projectors transform an image into a long stream of continuous and highly correlated embeddings. This causes the visual tokens to behave differently from the word-like units that LLMs are originally trained to understand. We propose a novel Disentangled Visual Tokenization (DiVT) that clusters patch embeddings into coherent semantic units, so each token corresponds to a distinct visual concept instead of a rigid grid cell. DiVT further adapts its token budget to image complexity, providing an explicit accuracy-compute trade-off modifying neither the vision encoder nor the language model. Across diverse multimodal benchmarks, DiVT matches or surpasses baselines with significantly fewer visual tokens, demonstrating robustness under limited token budgets, significantly reducing memory cost and latency while making visual inputs more compatible with LLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/snuviplab/DiVT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种名为DiVT的解耦视觉分词方法，通过将图像补丁嵌入聚类为语义单元，使视觉token更接近语言模型中的文本token，从而提升多模态大语言模型的效率和兼容性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLMs通常固定语言模型，并用视觉投影仪将图像映射为连续的、高度相关的嵌入序列，这与LLM原本处理的离散、语义有意义的token不匹配，导致视觉token行为异常，影响模型对图像的理解。该研究旨在解决这一不匹配问题，提高视觉输入与语言模型的兼容性。
light_analysis.method: DiVT的核心创新在于将图像补丁嵌入聚类为连贯的语义单元，使每个token对应一个独特的视觉概念而非固定网格单元。此外，它根据图像复杂度动态调整token数量，提供明确的精度-计算权衡，且不修改视觉编码器或语言模型。该方法简单有效，可直接应用于现有MLLMs。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态基准测试中，DiVT使用显著更少的视觉token即可达到或超越基线方法。在有限的token预算下表现尤为稳健，同时大幅降低了内存成本和推理延迟。具体性能提升因任务而异，但整体展示了高效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiVT通过使视觉输入更接近LLM理解的文本形式，有效提升了MLLMs的效率和性能，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。其不修改现有模型结构的特点便于集成。未来可探索更复杂的聚类策略或扩展至视频等多模态任务。代码已开源。

title: Counting Machine Parts
abstract: Counting objects in an image is a task applicable across many domains. For instance, crowd counting, inventory counting, and cell counting have been the focus of recent research. The major challenges in estimating the count of objects include overlapping objects, object scale issues, occlusions, and varying lighting conditions. In this report, we explore the problem of counting machine washer parts. Our technique is an extension of FamNet with an additional loss component, trained on the given dataset. We compare to three baseline methods: a traditional image processing pipeline, instance segmentation, and density map estimation. We evaluate the performance of these algorithms by computing the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and the Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) between the true object counts and the model outputs. Our approach achieves a performance of 1.96 MAE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于FamNet扩展的机器零件计数方法，通过增加额外损失组件提升计数精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 物体计数在人群、库存、细胞等场景中有重要应用，但面临重叠、尺度变化、遮挡和光照不均等挑战。现有方法如传统图像处理、实例分割和密度图估计在机器零件计数任务中表现不足，需要更精确的计数方法。
light_analysis.method: 以FamNet为基础，在其损失函数中添加额外组件进行训练。使用给定数据集（具体未说明）训练模型，并与三种基线方法（传统图像处理、实例分割、密度图估计）对比，采用MAE和RMSE评估。
light_analysis.result: 提出方法在测试集上达到1.96 MAE，优于基线方法（摘要未给出具体对比数值）。RMSE数值未报告，实验表明该方法能有效降低计数误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功将FamNet扩展应用于机器零件计数，通过额外损失组件提升了性能。学术上为物体计数领域提供了改进思路，实际可用于工业零件自动计数。未来可探索更复杂场景下的泛化能力。

title: SkyNative: A Native Multimodal Framework for Remote Sensing Visual Evidence Reasoning
abstract: Remote sensing vision-language models commonly rely on pretrained visual encoders to convert images into semantic features before language-model reasoning. While effective for scene-level understanding, this pipeline may prematurely compress local visual evidence, making fine-grained spatial reasoning vulnerable to language priors, especially in ultra-high-resolution remote sensing imagery. We present SkyNative, a native multimodal framework for remote sensing that adopts an encoder-free architecture, removing the pretrained visual backbone to directly represent images as raw patch tokens in the language-model token space. To reconcile low-level visual patches with textual tokens, SkyNative introduces a modality-aware decoupling mechanism that uses modality-specific parameters within a unified autoregressive backbone. We further introduce a visual reliance benchmark that diagnoses whether models ground their answers in image evidence through progressive visual degradation and misleading textual prompts. Across standard remote sensing understanding tasks and large-format spatial reasoning evaluations, SkyNative shows stronger image-grounded perception and improved robustness against prompt-induced language priors. These results suggest that native patch-level multimodal modeling is a promising direction for reliable remote sensing vision-language reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无编码器原生多模态框架SkyNative，直接以原始块标记表示图像，避免视觉特征提前压缩，提升遥感图像细粒度空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有遥感视觉语言模型依赖预训练视觉编码器将图像转换为语义特征，虽适用于场景级理解，但可能过早压缩局部视觉证据，使细粒度空间推理易受语言先验影响，尤其在超高分辨率遥感图像中。需一种能保留原始视觉细节的架构以提升推理可靠性。
light_analysis.method: SkyNative采用无编码器架构，移除预训练视觉骨干，直接以原始块标记表示图像，并映射到语言模型标记空间。引入模态感知解耦机制，在统一自回归骨干中使用模态特定参数协调低层视觉块与文本标记。还构建视觉依赖基准，通过渐进式视觉退化与误导性文本提示诊断模型是否基于图像证据推理。
light_analysis.result: 在标准遥感理解任务和大格式空间推理评估中，SkyNative相比基线方法展现出更强的图像基础感知能力，对提示引起的语言先验具有更好的鲁棒性。摘要未给出具体性能数据，但强调在证据依赖方面表现更优，验证了原生块级多模态建模的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkyNative证明了原生块级多模态建模是遥感视觉语言推理的可靠方向，通过避免视觉特征压缩提升了细粒度推理的准确性和鲁棒性。该框架为高分辨率遥感图像分析提供了新范式，未来可探索更大规模应用及与其他模态的融合。

title: SVFSearch: A Multimodal Knowledge-Intensive Benchmark for Short-Video Frame Search in the Gaming Vertical Domain
abstract: Multimodal large language models are increasingly used as agent backbones that understand multimodal inputs, plan retrieval actions, invoke external tools, and reason over retrieved information. Yet existing benchmarks rarely evaluate this ability in short-video applications, where a paused frame is often visually ambiguous and answering requires vertical, long-tail, and fast-evolving domain knowledge. We introduce SVFSearch, the first open benchmark for short-video frame search in the Chinese gaming domain. SVFSearch contains 5,000 four-choice test examples and 4,198 auxiliary training examples, each centered on a paused game scene from a real short-video clip. To support fair and reproducible evaluation, SVFSearch provides a frozen offline retrieval environment with a game-domain text corpus, a topic-linked image gallery, and text, image, and multimodal retrieval interfaces, avoiding reliance on uncontrolled web search APIs. We evaluate representative paradigms ranging from direct QA and RAG workflow to Plan-Act-Replan agents and learned search models. Results reveal a large gap between model-only answering, practical agentic search, and oracle knowledge: the best open-source direct-QA model reaches 66.4%, the best practical agent achieves 79.1%, and oracle knowledge reaches 95.4%. Further analysis exposes bottlenecks in visual grounding, retrieval quality, evidence-grounded reasoning, and tool-use behavior, including over-search, answer-only shortcuts, and retrieval-induced misleading.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向中文游戏短视频帧搜索的多模态知识密集型基准SVFSearch，评估多模态大语言模型在短时帧搜索中的表现，揭示实际智能体性能与理想知识之间的显著差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型常被用作智能体系统，但现有基准很少评估其在短视频应用中的能力，尤其是当视频帧视觉模糊且需要垂直、长尾、快速演变的领域知识时。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供一个标准化的离线评估环境，避免依赖不受控的网页搜索API。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含5,000个四选一测试样本和4,198个辅助训练样本的基准，每个样本围绕真实短视频中的暂停游戏场景。提供冻结离线检索环境，包括游戏领域文本语料库、主题链接图像库以及文本、图像和多模态检索接口。评估了直接QA、RAG工作流、Plan-Act-Replan智能体和学习搜索模型。
light_analysis.result: 最佳开源直接QA模型准确率66.4%，最佳实际智能体79.1%，而理想知识可达95.4%。分析揭示了视觉定位、检索质量、基于证据的推理和工具使用行为方面的瓶颈，包括过度搜索、仅答案捷径和检索误导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为评估多模态智能体在短视频帧搜索中的能力提供了标准化测试平台。发现当前模型与实际检索之间存在巨大差距，并指出了主要瓶颈。未来可针对这些瓶颈进行改进，提升智能体在垂直领域中的应用。

title: UAVFF3D: A Geometry-Aware Benchmark for Feed-Forward UAV 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction has recently demonstrated strong generalization across diverse scenes, yet its performance in UAV imagery remains underexplored due to distinctive acquisition geometries, large viewpoint variations, and ambiguity between horizontal field of view and flight height. We present UAVFF3D, a geometry-aware benchmark for feed-forward UAV 3D reconstruction, comprising over 170K real UAV images and more than 370K high-quality synthetic images. The benchmark also includes a challenging diagnostic test subset designed to analyze model behavior under UAV-specific geometric ambiguities.Building on UAVFF3D, we propose an evaluation protocol that jointly assesses camera-geometry estimation and reconstruction accuracy, addressing limitations of existing evaluations that rely on separate alignments. Experiments on four representative feed-forward reconstruction models show that UAV-domain adaptation substantially improves performance, reducing Ray Error by up to 84.2%, Pose ATE by up to 76.0%, and Chamfer Distance by up to 41.1%. Further analysis reveals that domain adaptation mitigates rotation-estimation degradation in oblique-view scenes and improves robustness under horizontal-field-of-view/height ambiguity. Incorporating camera priors further enhances reconstruction performance under UAV-specific acquisition geometries.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了UAVFF3D，一个面向前馈式无人机三维重建的几何感知基准，包含大量真实与合成图像及诊断测试集，并设计了联合评估相机几何与重建精度的协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 前馈式三维重建在多样化场景中泛化能力强，但在无人机影像中因独特的采集几何、大视角变化以及水平视场角与飞行高度间的歧义，性能尚待探索。现有评估方法依赖独立对齐，难以全面反映无人机场景下的重建质量。
light_analysis.method: 构建UAVFF3D基准，包括超过17万张真实无人机图像和37万张高质量合成图像，以及针对几何歧义的诊断测试集。提出联合评估相机姿态估计与三维重建精度的协议。在四个代表性前馈模型上实验，采用域适应技术（如微调）适配无人机数据。
light_analysis.result: 域适应显著提升性能：Ray Error降低最多84.2%，Pose ATE降低76.0%，Chamfer Distance降低41.1%。域适应缓解了倾斜视角下旋转估计退化，并提高了对水平视场角/高度歧义的鲁棒性。加入相机先验进一步改善了无人机特定采集几何下的重建效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAVFF3D为无人机三维重建提供了标准化基准和评估方法，证实了域适应的关键作用。该工作有助于推动无人机三维重建在实际应用（如测绘、巡检）中的发展。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务，需进一步探索通用域适应策略。

title: Training data attribution in diffusion models via mirrored unlearning and noise-consistent skew
abstract: Training data attribution (TDA) should enable generative model interpretability and foster a variety of related downstream tasks. Nonetheless, current TDA approaches lack reliability and robustness, preventing their adoption in real-world setups.
