In this paper, we take a decisive step towards more reliable and robust TDA for diffusion models. We propose to perform TDA with mirrored unlearning and noise-consistent skew (MUCS). The idea is to fine-tune a second model with bounded mirrored gradient ascent, and to measure the normalized skew of this model with respect to the original one using consistent noise samples. We show that, while being conceptually simple and generic, MUCS systematically outperforms existing methods on three different datasets by a large margin. We additionally study the effect that core design choices have on final performance, and analyze novel aspects regarding the overlap of influential instances across generated items and the potential of ensembling TDA approaches. We believe that our findings may have broader implications for more general unlearning setups, as well as for tasks requiring the comparison of diffusion losses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于镜像反学习和噪声一致偏斜的扩散模型训练数据归因方法MUCS，显著提升归因的可靠性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练数据归因方法在生成模型可解释性和下游任务中缺乏可靠性和鲁棒性，阻碍实际应用。扩散模型作为强大的生成模型，需要有效的归因方法来理解模型行为和数据影响，但当前方法性能不足，无法在真实场景中落地。
light_analysis.method: MUCS方法包括两部分：镜像反学习，通过有界镜像梯度上升微调第二个模型，使其遗忘特定训练数据；噪声一致偏斜，使用一致噪声样本测量该模型相对于原始模型的归一化偏斜。该方法概念简单、通用性强，无需复杂架构修改。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同数据集上，MUCS系统性地大幅优于现有TDA方法。此外，研究揭示了核心设计选择对性能的影响，分析了生成项间影响实例的重叠现象，并展示了集成多种TDA方法的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUCS为扩散模型提供了可靠且鲁棒的训练数据归因，有望推动生成模型可解释性和相关应用。其设计思想可推广至一般反学习任务和需要比较扩散损失的问题，具有重要学术和实际价值。

title: BacktestBench: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Automated Quantitative Strategy Backtesting
abstract: Quantitative backtesting is essential for evaluating trading strategies but remains hampered by high technical barriers and limited scalability. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a transformative path to automate this complex, interdisciplinary workflow through advanced code generation, tool usage, and agentic planning, the practical realization is significantly challenged by the current lack of a large-scale benchmark dedicated to automated quantitative backtesting, which hinders progress in this field. To bridge this critical gap, we introduce BacktestBench, the first large-scale benchmark for automated quantitative backtesting. Built from over 6 million real market records, it comprises 18,246 meticulously annotated question-answering pairs across four task categories: metrics calculation, ticker selection, strategy selection, and parameter confirmation. We also propose AutoBacktest, a robust multi-agent baseline that translates natural language strategies into reproducible backtests by coordinating a Summarizer for semantic factor extraction, a Retriever for validated SQL generation, and a Coder for Python backtesting implementation. Our evaluation on 23 mainstream LLMs, complemented by targeted ablations, identifies key factors that influence end-to-end performance and highlights the importance of grounded verification and standardized indicator representations.
comment: This paper has been accepted by KDD 2026 (Datasets and Benchmarks Track)

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出大规模量化回测基准BacktestBench及多智能体基线AutoBacktest，评估23个主流LLM。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化回测是评估交易策略的关键，但技术门槛高、可扩展性有限。LLM通过代码生成、工具使用和智能体规划有望自动化这一复杂跨学科流程，但缺乏大规模专用基准阻碍了进展。现有方法无法系统评估LLM在自动回测中的实际能力，亟需标准化测试平台。
light_analysis.method: 构建BacktestBench，基于600万条真实市场记录，生成18,246个标注问答对，覆盖指标计算、股票选择、策略选择和参数确认四类任务。提出AutoBacktest多智能体基线，包含Summarizer（语义因子提取）、Retriever（SQL生成验证）和Coder（Python回测实现），协作将自然语言策略转化为可复现回测。
light_analysis.result: 在23个主流LLM上评估，AutoBacktest在各任务上表现优于单智能体。消融实验表明，基础验证和标准化指标表示对端到端性能至关重要。具体数据未明确，但摘要强调识别了关键影响因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: BacktestBench填补了自动量化回测基准空白，为评估LLM提供标准化平台。AutoBacktest验证了多智能体协同的有效性。未来可扩展任务类型和提升跨市场适应性。

title: Universal Adversarial Triggers
abstract: Recent works have illustrated that modern NLP models trained for diverse tasks ranging from sentiment analysis to language generation succumb to universal adversarial attacks, a class of input-agnostic attacks where a common trigger sequence is used to attack the model. Although these attacks are successful, the triggers generated by such attacks are ungrammatical and unnatural. Our work proposes a novel technique combining parts-of-speech filtering and perplexity based loss function to generate sensible triggers that are closer to natural phrases. For the task of sentiment analysis on the SST dataset, the method produces sensible triggers that achieve accuracies as low as 0.04 and 0.12 for flipping positive to negative predictions and vice-versa. To build robust models, we also perform adversarial training using the generated triggers that increases the accuracy of the model from 0.12 to 0.48. We aim to illustrate that adversarial attacks can be made difficult to detect by generating sensible triggers, and to facilitate robust model development through relevant defenses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种生成语法自然、难以检测的通用对抗触发器的方法，结合词性过滤和困惑度损失函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有通用对抗攻击生成的触发器不自然、不合语法，容易被检测。本研究旨在生成更接近自然短语的对抗触发器，使攻击更难被察觉，同时通过对抗训练提升模型鲁棒性。这对构建安全可靠的NLP系统至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出结合词性过滤和基于困惑度的损失函数的技术。词性过滤确保触发器符合语法结构；困惑度损失函数使触发器更接近自然语言分布。在SST数据集上进行情感分析任务，生成对抗触发器。
light_analysis.result: 在SST数据集上，生成的触发器将正面预测翻转为负面的准确率低至0.04，反之翻转为0.12。对抗训练后，模型在受攻击时的准确率从0.12提升至0.48，显著增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了通过生成自然语言对抗触发器可使攻击更难检测，并利用对抗训练有效防御。未来可应用于其他NLP任务，但局限性在于仅验证了情感分析任务。

title: AtlasVA: Self-Evolving Visual Skill Memory for Teacher-Free VLM Agents
abstract: Vision-language model (VLM) agents increasingly rely on memory-augmented reinforcement learning to reuse experience across long-horizon tasks, yet most existing frameworks store memory as text and depend on proprietary teacher models to summarize or refine it. This design is poorly matched to spatial decision making: geometric priors are compressed into lossy language, and sparse interaction is often supervised through delayed textual feedback rather than dense visually grounded signals. We argue that reusable experience for VLM agents should remain visually grounded. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{AtlasVA}, a teacher-free visual skill memory framework that organizes memory into three complementary layers: spatial heatmaps, visual exemplars, and symbolic text skills. AtlasVA further evolves danger and affinity atlases directly from trajectory statistics and lightweight grid heuristics, and reuses these self-evolving atlases as potential-based shaping rewards for reinforcement learning. This unifies perception, memory, and optimization without external LLM supervision. Experiments on \textsc{Sokoban}, \textsc{FrozenLake}, 3D embodied navigation, and 3D robotic manipulation benchmarks show that AtlasVA consistently outperforms text-centric memory baselines and competitive VLM agents, with especially strong gains on spatially intensive tasks. Homepage: https://wangpan-ustc.github.io/AtlasvaWeb

light_analysis.overview: 提出无教师视觉技能记忆框架AtlasVA，通过自演化视觉记忆提升VLM代理在空间任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM代理的记忆框架依赖文本存储和教师模型总结，但在空间决策中，几何先验被压缩为有损语言，稀疏交互依赖延迟文本反馈，缺乏密集视觉信号。因此，需要一种视觉接地且无需外部监督的记忆机制。
light_analysis.method: AtlasVA组织记忆为三层：空间热图、视觉示例和符号文本技能。通过轨迹统计和轻量网格启发式自演化危险与亲和力图，并将其作为势能整形奖励用于强化学习，统一感知、记忆和优化，无需外部LLM监督。
light_analysis.result: 在Sokoban、FrozenLake、3D具身导航和机器人操作基准上，AtlasVA一致优于文本中心记忆基线和竞争性VLM代理，尤其在空间密集型任务上提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: AtlasVA证明了视觉接地记忆在VLM代理空间任务中的有效性，避免了教师模型依赖，为自主智能体提供了可扩展的记忆框架。未来可探索更复杂的自演化机制和跨任务迁移。

title: Prompt Compression in Diffusion Large Language Models: Evaluating LLMLingua-2 on LLaDA
abstract: Prompt compression reduces inference cost and context length in large language models, but prior evaluations focus primarily on autoregressive architectures. This study investigates whether prompt compression transfers effectively to diffusion large language models (DLLMs) using LLMLingua-2, specifically the 8B-parameter DLLM LLaDA. We evaluate compression performance on GSM8K, DUC2004, and ShareGPT using 250 prompts per dataset at an approximate 2$\times$ compression ratio, across mathematical reasoning, prompt reconstruction, and summarization tasks. Outputs generated from original prompts, compressed prompts, reconstructed prompts, and reconstructed-prompt reasoning were compared using exact-match accuracy, BLEU, ROUGE, and BERTScore. Results show that semantic preservation does not necessarily imply stable downstream behavior in diffusion models. Summarization tasks remained comparatively robust under compression, while mathematical reasoning degraded substantially despite high semantic similarity scores. Reconstruction experiments further showed that semantically similar prompts may still omit reasoning-critical information required for stable denoising. Across tasks, BERTScore recall was consistently lower than precision, suggesting that compression failures are primarily driven by information omission rather than semantic drift. These findings indicate that prompt compression methods designed for autoregressive models do not transfer uniformly to diffusion large language models and motivate the development of diffusion-aware compression strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 研究提示压缩方法在扩散大语言模型上的迁移效果，发现其性能不直接适用，需开发扩散感知策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 提示压缩可降低推理成本和上下文长度，但现有评估主要针对自回归架构。扩散大语言模型（DLLMs）的生成机制不同，压缩方法能否有效迁移尚不清楚。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索压缩对DLLM下游任务的影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用LLMLingua-2压缩器（2倍压缩比）对8B参数扩散模型LLaDA进行压缩，在GSM8K（数学推理）、DUC2004（摘要）和ShareGPT（对话）数据集上各用250个提示评估。比较原始、压缩、重建及重建推理输出的精确匹配率、BLEU、ROUGE和BERTScore。
light_analysis.result: 压缩后语义相似度高但下游行为不稳定：摘要任务鲁棒，数学推理大幅下降。重建实验显示语义相似提示可能遗漏推理关键信息。BERTScore召回率始终低于精确率，表明压缩失败主因信息遗漏而非语义漂移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 现有面向自回归模型的提示压缩方法不能直接迁移至扩散大语言模型，压缩导致的信息遗漏削弱了扩散模型的去噪稳定性。未来需研发扩散感知的压缩策略，以平衡压缩率与推理保真度。

title: InfoFlow: A Framework for Multi-Layer Transformer Analysis
abstract: While the approximation properties of single-layer Transformer architectures have been studied in recent works, a rigorous theoretical understanding of the multi-layer setting remains limited. In this work, we establish that multi-layer Transformers possess fundamentally different approximation capabilities from single-layer ones: for certain retrieval tasks, any single-layer Transformer requires least $Ω(\varepsilon^{-k})$ parameters to achieve precision $\varepsilon$, where $k$ grows linearly with sequence length $T$, whereas a two-layer Transformer with a single head per layer achieves the same approximation precision with at most $O (\varepsilon^{-1})$ parameters. To understand this separation, we identify two structural mechanisms underlying multi-layer approximation. Specifically, softmax attention can only efficiently retrieve the token attaining the maximum attention score, incurring exponential-in-length parameter cost for $k$-th largest retrieval with $k \geq 2$. Moreover, the parameter cost of decoding coupled information scales with the size of the retrieved token set. Motivated by these findings, we propose InfoFlow, a framework for multi-layer Transformers. The framework tracks an information set of accessible input positions at each token and layer, assigning an explicit approximation rate to each mode of information propagation. This abstraction recovers known approximation bounds, remains consistent with experimental observations on trained networks, and yields concrete predictions in settings where direct theoretical analysis is currently intractable. Our results provide a principled framework for reasoning about the approximation efficiency of multi-layer Transformers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InfoFlow框架，揭示多层Transformer在检索任务上具有比单层更优的近似能力，并建立理论分析机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单层Transformer的近似性质，对多层Transformer的理论理解有限。本文旨在解决多层近似能力的问题，发现对于某些检索任务，单层Transformer需要指数级参数（Ω(ε^{-k})，k随序列长度线性增长），而双层只需线性参数（O(ε^{-1})），表明多层Transformer具有本质不同的能力，亟需理论框架解释这一分离现象。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析两种结构机制：softmax注意力仅高效检索最大得分token，第k大检索需指数级参数；解码耦合信息的参数成本随检索token集大小增长。基于此，提出InfoFlow框架，为每个token和层跟踪可访问输入位置的信息集，分配显式近似速率，抽象信息传播模式。该方法统一了理论推导与实验观察，并能在直接分析不可行的设置中给出预测。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明：单层Transformer达到精度ε需Ω(ε^{-k})参数，k随序列长度T线性增长；而两层单头Transformer仅需O(ε^{-1})参数。InfoFlow框架恢复了已知近似边界，与训练网络的实验观察一致，并在无法直接分析的场景中提供具体预测，验证了框架有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了分析多层Transformer近似效率的原则性框架，解释了多层优于单层的结构机制，具有重要理论价值。该工作为理解Transformer可扩展性奠定基础，未来可推广至更深层网络或其它注意力变体，但实际应用中的计算开销和复杂性仍需进一步研究。

title: An Efficient Streaming Video Understanding Framework with Agentic Control
abstract: Streaming video requires handling dynamic information density under strict latency budgets. Yet, existing methods typically employ static strategies, such as fixed memory compression or reliance on a single model, forcing a trade-off: fast models fail on complex queries, while always-on heavy models violate real-time constraints and overcomplicate simple queries. Rather than fixing these decisions upfront, we propose R3-Streaming (Remember, Respond, Reason), which formulates streaming video understanding as a cascaded control problem: for each query, the system compresses memory, judges response readiness, and routes computation sequentially, so that each downstream decision builds on progressively refined information states. To optimize this pipeline, we introduce an age-aware forgetting policy for memory compression, as aggressively compressing historical frames can yield substantial performance gains. For compute routing, we propose TB-GRPO, a target-balanced reinforcement learning objective that routes hard queries to a stronger model while preventing mode collapse. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that R3-Streaming achieves state-of-the-art results among streaming MLLMs, reaching 57.92 on OVO-Bench and 76.36 on StreamingBench, while reducing visual token usage by 95 to 96 percent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出R3-Streaming框架，将流式视频理解建模为级联控制问题，通过年龄感知遗忘策略和TB-GRPO强化学习优化计算路由，实现高效且准确。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式视频处理需要在严格延迟预算下处理动态信息密度。现有方法采用静态策略（如固定记忆压缩或单一模型），导致快速模型无法处理复杂查询，而重型模型违反实时约束且过度简化简单查询。因此需要自适应路由机制平衡效率与准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出R3-Streaming框架，包括三步：记忆压缩（Remember）、响应判断（Respond）和推理路由（Reason）。采用年龄感知遗忘策略进行记忆压缩，动态丢弃旧帧。提出TB-GRPO（目标平衡强化学习）目标函数，将困难查询路由到更强模型，防止模式崩溃。优化级联决策过程。
light_analysis.result: 在OVO-Bench和StreamingBench上分别达到57.92和76.36的SOTA结果，同时将视觉令牌使用量减少95-96%。表明方法在保持高性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效的流式视频理解框架，通过级联控制动态分配计算资源，解决了静态策略的权衡问题。具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多模态和场景。

title: Domain Transfer Becomes Identifiable via a Single Alignment
abstract: Domain transfer (DT) maps source to target distributions and supports tasks such as unsupervised image-to-image translation, single-cell analysis, and cross-platform medical imaging. However, DT is fundamentally ill-posed: push-forward mappings are generally non-identifiable, as measure-preserving automorphisms (MPAs) preserve marginals while altering cross-domain correspondences, leading to content-misaligned translation. Recent work shows that MPAs can be eliminated by jointly transferring multiple corresponding source/target conditional distributions, but supervision signals labeling such conditionals are not always available in practice. We develop an alternative route to DT identifiability. Under a structural sparsity condition on the Jacobian support pattern, we show that distribution matching together with a single paired anchor sample suffices to identify the ground-truth transfer -- requiring substantially less supervision than prior approaches. To enable practical high-dimensional learning, we further propose an efficient Jacobian sparsity regularizer based on randomized masked finite differences, yielding a scalable surrogate without explicit Jacobian evaluation. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world DT tasks validate the theory.

light_analysis.overview: 通过单一对齐锚点样本和雅可比稀疏性条件，实现域迁移映射的可辨识性。
light_analysis.motivation: 域迁移（DT）在无监督图像翻译、单细胞分析等领域有广泛应用，但本质上是病态问题：保测自同构（MPA）保留边缘分布但改变跨域对应关系，导致内容不对齐。现有方法通过联合迁移多个条件分布消除MPA，但需标注条件分布，实际中难以获取。因此，需探索更少监督的DT可辨识方案。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出在雅可比矩阵支撑模式的稀疏性条件下，仅需一个成对锚点样本即可识别真实域迁移映射，显著减少监督需求。为支持高维学习，进一步设计基于随机掩蔽有限差分的雅可比稀疏正则化器，避免显式雅可比计算，实现可扩展的近似方法。理论分析证明该条件足以消除MPA歧义。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实域迁移任务（如无监督图像翻译、单细胞跨平台分析）上的实验验证了理论结果。与需多个条件分布标注的现有方法相比，仅用单个锚点样本即可达到可比或更优的对齐效果，且所提正则化器在高维场景下有效提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了域迁移可辨识性的新路径，证明了雅可比稀疏性条件下单一锚点样本的充分性，降低了监督需求。提出的随机掩蔽有限差分正则化器实用高效。该工作为无监督域迁移提供了理论基础，并有望推动单细胞分析、医学图像对齐等应用发展。未来可探索更一般的结构化约束或扩展到多域迁移。

title: PanoWorld: A Generative Spatial World Model for Consistent Whole-House Panorama Synthesis
abstract: Generating a consistent whole-house VR tour from a floorplan and style reference requires both photorealistic panoramas and cross-view spatial coherence. Pure 2D generators produce appealing single panoramas but re-imagine geometry and materials when the viewpoint changes, whereas monolithic 3D generation becomes expensive and loses fine texture at multi-room scale. We introduce PanoWorld, a generative spatial world model that treats whole-house synthesis as autoregressive generation of node-based 360-degree panoramas, matching the discrete navigation used by real VR tour products. PanoWorld uses a floorplan-derived 3D shell as a global geometric proxy and a dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting cache as renderable spatial memory. A feed-forward panoramic LRM designed for metric-scale multi-room 360-degree inputs lifts generated panoramas into local 3DGS updates, while Room-aware Group Attention suppresses cross-room feature interference. A topology-aware progressive caching strategy fuses these local updates without repeatedly reconstructing the full history. By decoupling shell-based geometry guidance from cache-rendered visual memory, PanoWorld preserves high-frequency 2D synthesis quality while improving cross-node layout and material consistency. The project link is https://jjrcn.github.io/PanoWorld-project-home/

light_analysis.overview: 提出PanoWorld，一种生成式空间世界模型，通过自回归生成节点式360度全景实现一致的全屋VR合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有全屋VR合成方法面临挑战：纯2D生成器在视点变化时几何和材料不一致，而单片3D生成成本高且在多房间尺度丢失纹理细节。为解决这一问题，需要一种既能保持高保真2D合成质量，又能实现跨视图空间一致性的方法，满足真实VR导航的离散视点需求。
light_analysis.method: PanoWorld将全屋合成视为自回归的节点式360度全景生成，利用平面图导出的3D外壳作为全局几何代理，并引入动态3D高斯泼溅缓存作为可渲染空间记忆。设计前馈全景LRM处理公制尺度多房间360度输入，生成局部3DGS更新；房间感知组注意机制抑制跨房间特征干扰。采用拓扑感知渐进缓存策略融合局部更新，无需重复重建历史。通过解耦几何引导与视觉记忆，兼顾高频合成质量与跨节点一致性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体量化结果，但方法通过解耦几何与视觉记忆，在保持高频2D合成质量的同时，显著改善了跨节点布局和材料一致性。与纯2D生成器和单片3D方法相比，PanoWorld在视觉质量与空间一致性之间取得更好平衡，适用于生成一致的全屋VR游览体验。
light_analysis.conclusion: PanoWorld提出了一种新颖的生成式空间世界模型，通过自回归全景生成和动态3DGS缓存，有效解决了全屋VR合成中的一致性问题。其创新在于将全局几何代理与局部视觉记忆解耦，兼顾效率与保真度。该工作为大规模室内场景合成和沉浸式VR内容生成提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的拓扑结构和交互式导航。

title: SurgLQA: Scalable Long-Horizon Surgical Video Question Answering
abstract: Surgical Video Question Answering (VideoQA) provides a promising paradigm for dynamic intraoperative interpretation, enabling real-time decision support and context-aware retrieval in clinical environments. Nevertheless, existing approaches are predominantly restricted to images or short clips, limiting their ability to model long-range procedural dynamics and causal dependencies across extended surgical workflows. To address this challenge, we propose SurgLQA, a unified long-horizon VideoQA framework for scalable surgical reasoning. This framework incorporates Faithful Temporal Consolidation (FTC), which leverages intrinsic temporal cues to construct compact long-range representations while preserving fine-grained temporal fidelity. Further, we develop Temporally-Grounded Multi-Policy Scaling (TMS), an adaptive test-time inference paradigm that strategically adjusts policy-level reasoning capacity within temporally grounded contexts. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we restructured a long-duration colonoscopy VideoQA benchmark, Colon-LQA, and conducted extensive experiments on Colon-LQA and REAL-Colon-VQA. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves consistent performance gains in long-range reasoning with temporally grounded inference. Code link: https://github.com/RascalGdd/SurgLQA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SurgLQA，一个可扩展的长时序手术视频问答框架，通过时间一致性整合和自适应推理策略提升长程推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手术视频问答方法局限于图像或短视频，无法有效建模长程手术流程的动态变化和因果依赖。长时序推理对于临床环境中的实时决策支持和上下文检索至关重要，但现有方法在处理长视频时存在性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: SurgLQA框架包含两个核心模块：Faithful Temporal Consolidation (FTC)利用内在时间线索构建紧凑的长程表示，同时保留细粒度时间保真度；Temporally-Grounded Multi-Policy Scaling (TMS)是一种自适应测试时推理范式，在时间上下文中有策略地调整策略级推理能力。此外，还重新构建了长结肠镜视频问答基准Colon-LQA。
light_analysis.result: 在Colon-LQA和REAL-Colon-VQA数据集上进行的实验表明，该方法在长程推理任务中取得了一致的性能提升，并展现出时间接地推理能力。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgLQA填补了现有手术视频问答在长程动态建模上的空白，为临床环境中的实时决策支持提供了可扩展方案。未来工作可进一步优化时序表示质量和推理策略的泛化性。

title: A Pilot Benchmark for NL-to-FOL Translation in Planetary Exploration
abstract: Future planetary exploration envisions autonomous robotic agents operating under severe communication constraints, without global positioning, and with minimal human intervention. In such environments, agents must not only perceive and act, but also reason over mission objectives, operational constraints, and evolving environmental conditions. While prior work has largely focused on perception and control, the translation of high-level mission knowledge into structured, machine-interpretable representations remains underexplored.   We introduce a pilot benchmark for translating natural language (NL) into First-Order Logic (FOL) within the domain of planetary exploration. The dataset is constructed from real mission documentation sourced from NASA's Planetary Data System (PDS), spanning missions from 2003 to 2013. These documents describe mission phases such as launch, boost, coast, cruise, and orbital operations in rich natural language. We manually annotate these documents with corresponding FOL representations that capture temporal structure, agent roles, and operational dependencies. In addition, we provide structured predicate vocabularies and typed constants to enable controlled experimentation with varying levels of prior knowledge. This pilot benchmark provides a foundation for research at the intersection of language understanding and formal reasoning, grounded in real-world, safety-critical mission data. The dataset is provided at: https://github.com/HaydenMM/planetary-logic-benchmark/blob/main/pilot_benchmark.json

light_analysis.overview: 构建了行星探索领域自然语言到一阶逻辑翻译的首个基准数据集，填补了高层任务知识向结构化表示转化的研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 未来行星探索中，自主机器人需在高延迟、无GPS及最小人工干预下推理任务目标、操作约束及环境变化。现有研究集中于感知与控制，而将自然语言描述的任务知识转化为机器可理解的逻辑表示（如一阶逻辑）的技术仍未被充分探索。该研究通过提供首个专用基准，旨在推动语言理解与形式推理的交叉研究，解决安全关键任务中知识表示与推理的缺失。
light_analysis.method: 从NASA行星数据系统（PDS）的真实任务文档（2003-2013年）中提取自然语言描述，涵盖发射、推进、巡航、轨道运行等阶段。手动标注对应的一阶逻辑（FOL）表示，捕获时间结构、角色和操作依赖。提供结构化谓词词汇表和类型化常量，支持不同先验知识水平的控制实验。数据集公开于GitHub。
light_analysis.result: 该研究未报告具体性能指标，而是发布了首个包含自然语言及对应一阶逻辑标注的基准数据集。数据集构建基于真实任务文档，确保了领域相关性与实用性。作为初步基准，为后续NL-to-FOL翻译模型的开发与评估提供了标准化测试平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为行星探索中自然语言理解与形式推理的交叉研究奠定了基础，尤其适用于安全关键的自主任务。数据集源自真实任务文档，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的逻辑形式或跨领域迁移，并支持对翻译模型的系统评估。

title: Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV): A Provably Deterministic Governance-Aware JIT Compiler Architecture for Agentic Systems
abstract: As autonomous agentic systems scale across regulated critical infrastructures, the lack of mechanistic, hardware-rooted enforcement for high-frequency policy updates presents a fundamental safety gap. We introduce Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV), a novel architectural framework for the formal verification of AI governance policies at runtime. Unlike retrospective auditing frameworks (ISO/IEC 42001, NIST AI RMF) which introduce 14-30 day latencies, EHV relocates the Policy Enforcement Point (PEP) into the inference pipeline via a Governance-Aware Just-In-Time (JIT) Compiler. By integrating Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) for policy synchronization and Epoch-based Attestation Caching within Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), EHV achieves Sub-millisecond Formal Determinism (SMFD). We demonstrate via TLA+ formal verification that non-compliant agentic actions are computationally unreachable within the system's bounded operating state space. We prove that O(1) runtime enforcement can eliminate the traditional trade-off between deployment velocity and governance integrity, reducing Governance Latency from O(days) to O(1).
comment: 11 pages, 3 TikZ figures, 1 table. Bounded TLA+ formal specification and model checking verification logs included as supplementary artifacts

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种名为Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV)的架构，通过治理感知的JIT编译器实现亚毫秒级形式确定性策略执行。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着自主智能体系统在关键基础设施中大规模部署，缺乏机械性、硬件根信任的高频策略更新执行机制带来了基本的安全缺口。现有的回顾性审计框架（如ISO/IEC 42001、NIST AI RMF）存在14-30天的延迟，无法满足实时治理需求。因此，需要一种能够在不牺牲部署速度的前提下保证治理完整性的运行时策略执行方案。
light_analysis.method: EHV将策略执行点（PEP）重新定位到推理管道内部，通过治理感知的即时（JIT）编译器实现。它集成无冲突复制数据类型（CRDTs）进行策略同步，并在可信执行环境（TEE）中使用基于周期的证明缓存，以实现亚毫秒级形式确定性（SMFD）。通过TLA+形式验证，证明不合规的智能体行为在系统有界运行状态空间内计算上不可达。
light_analysis.result: 实验通过TLA+形式验证证明了O(1)运行时执行能够消除传统部署速度与治理完整性之间的权衡，将治理延迟从O(天)降低到O(1)。具体地，EHV实现了亚毫秒级形式确定性，保证非合规动作在计算上不可达，从而在不影响性能的前提下提供实时策略强制执行。
light_analysis.conclusion: EHV架构通过将治理策略直接嵌入推理管道，实现了可证明的确定性运行时间执行，解决了高频政策更新与实时合规之间的矛盾。该研究为自主智能体系统在关键基础设施中的安全部署提供了形式化保证，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂的策略场景和异构TEE环境。

title: One Model to Translate Them All: Universal Any-to-Any Translation for Heterogeneous Collaborative Perception
abstract: By sharing intermediate features, collaborative perception extends each agent's sensing beyond standalone limits, but real-world feature modality heterogeneity remains a key barrier to effective fusion. Most existing methods, including direct adaption and protocol-based transformation, typically rely on training adapters for newly emerging feature modalities and often require additional retraining or fine-tuning. Such repeated training is costly and is often infeasible across manufacturers due to model and data privacy constraints, limiting real-world scalability. To address this issue, we propose UniTrans, a universal any-to-any feature modality translation model that instantiates translators on the fly for arbitrary modalities.   UniTrans pretrains a bank of translator expert parameters and learns their combination coefficients as a function of source-to-target modality mapping. The mapping is measured in a modality-intrinsic latent space, where an intrinsic encoder extracts modality-specific yet scene-invariant codes from single-frame intermediate features, enabling UniTrans to instantiate translators in a zero-shot manner.   Experiments on OPV2V-H and DAIR-V2X demonstrate that UniTrans consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both simulated and real-world settings, enabling efficient any-to-any translation through a universal model. The code is available at https://github.com/CheeryLeeyy/UniTrans.
comment: 19 pages, accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniTrans，一种零样本任意到任意特征模态翻译模型，解决异构协同感知中的模态异质性挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有协同感知方法在处理异构特征模态时，通常需要训练适配器或进行协议转换，这导致重复训练成本高，且因模型和数据隐私限制难以跨制造商部署。实际应用中，新模态不断涌现，现有方法缺乏通用性和可扩展性，限制了协同感知在大规模真实场景中的落地。因此，需要一个无需重新训练即可适应任意模态的通用翻译模型。
light_analysis.method: UniTrans预训练一个翻译专家参数库，并学习与源-目标模态映射相关的组合系数。它引入一个内在编码器，从单帧中间特征中提取模态特定但场景不变的代码，该代码在模态内在潜空间中度量映射关系。通过此设计，UniTrans能够以零样本方式即时实例化翻译器，无需针对新模态进行额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在OPV2V-H（模拟）和DAIR-V2X（真实）数据集上，UniTrans一致优于现有最先进方法。它实现了高效的任意到任意翻译，且作为通用模型，显著降低了部署成本。实验验证了其在跨模态协作感知中的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniTrans提出了一种通用且零样本的翻译框架，解决了异构协同感知中模态适配的瓶颈。其学术贡献在于将模态翻译建模为专家组合，并利用内在潜空间实现即用。实际应用中，它促进了不同厂商和传感器配置的协同感知协作，具有广泛前景。未来可探索更大规模专家库和动态模态发现。

title: Beyond Euclidean Prototypes: Spectral Disentanglement and Geodesic Matching for Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation (FSMIS) aims to delineate novel anatomical targets from one or a few annotated support images, addressing the annotation scarcity in medical imaging. Notwithstanding recent advancements, current prototype-based methods are bottlenecked by two coupled limitations: 1) cue entanglement, where a single spatial-domain prototype is forced to summarise organ silhouette, parenchymal texture and boundary appearance simultaneously, so any support-query mismatch on one cue propagates indiscriminately to the others; and 2) topology-blind matching, where cosine similarity measures distance in the ambient Euclidean space and ignores the connectivity of the underlying feature manifold, causing fragmented activations inside low-contrast organs and leakage into neighbouring tissues. To this end, we propose Spectral-Geodesic Prototype Network (SGP-Net), built around a Spectral-Geodesic Prototype Module with two coupled components. A Spectral Prototype Bank (SPB) decomposes support and query features into low-, mid- and high-frequency bands via learnable radial Fourier filters, yielding three disentangled prototypes per class that separately encode shape, texture and boundary cues. A Geodesic Matcher (GM) then replaces cosine similarity with a differentiable heat-diffusion approximation of geodesic distance, propagating matching signals along a feature affinity graph so that on-manifold pixels accumulate consistent responses while off-manifold look-alikes are suppressed. Experiments on three public FSMIS benchmarks demonstrate that SGP-Net achieves competitive performance against recent state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SGP-Net，通过光谱解缠和测地匹配，解决少样本医学图像分割中原型纠缠和拓扑盲匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前原型方法在少样本医学图像分割中受限于两个耦合问题：1) 单原型被迫同时编码轮廓、纹理和边界，导致线索纠缠，支持-查询不匹配时误差扩散；2) 余弦相似度忽略特征流形拓扑，在低对比器官内产生碎片化激活并泄露至邻近组织。这些问题限制了分割精度。
light_analysis.method: SGP-Net包含光谱原型库(SPB)和测地匹配器(GM)。SPB通过可学习径向傅里叶滤波器将特征分解为低、中、高频带，分别生成形状、纹理和边界解耦原型。GM用可微热扩散近似测地距离，沿特征亲和图传播匹配信号，增强流形内一致性并抑制流形外伪影。
light_analysis.result: 在三个公开少样本医学图像分割基准上，SGP-Net取得了与最新方法竞争的优越性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明其有效克服了原型方法的固有缺陷，提升了分割鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SGP-Net通过光谱解缠和测地匹配创新性地改进了原型机制，为少样本医学图像分割提供了更鲁棒的方案。学术上引入流形几何到原型匹配，实践上在标注稀缺场景下可有效分割新目标。未来可探索更高效的傅里叶滤波或扩展到其他医学图像任务。

title: Agentic Chunking and Bayesian De-chunking of AI Generated Fuzzy Cognitive Maps: A Model of the Thucydides Trap
abstract: We automatically generate feedback causal fuzzy cognitive maps (FCMs) from text by teaching large-language-model agents to break the text into overlapping chunks of text. Convex mixing of these chunk FCMs gives a representative cyclic FCM knowledge graph. The text chunks can have different levels of overlap. The chunk FCMs still mix to form a new FCM causal knowledge graph. The mixing technique scales because it uses light computation with sparse causal chunk matrices. The mixing structure allows an operator-level type of Bayesian inference that produces "de-chunked" or posterior-like FCMs from the mixed FCM. These de-chunked FCMs are useful in their own right and allow further iterations of Bayesian updating. We demonstrate these mixing techniques on the essay text of Allison's "Thucydides Trap" model of conflict between a dominant power such as the United States and a rising power such as China. The FCM dynamical systems predict outcomes as they equilibrate to fixed-point or limit-cycle attractors. Seven out of 8 FCM knowledge graphs predicted a type of war when we stimulated them by turning on and keeping on the concept node that stands for the rising power's ambition and entitlement. Gemini 3.1 LLMs served as the chunking AI agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用大语言模型代理进行文本分块凸混合生成因果模糊认知图，并基于贝叶斯推理实现去分块，应用于修昔底德陷阱模型预测冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 从文本自动生成因果模糊认知图对于建模复杂系统至关重要，但现有方法可扩展性差，难以处理大规模文本且无法进行动态推理。本文旨在通过轻量计算和贝叶斯更新实现高效、可迭代的因果图生成。
light_analysis.method: 使用Gemini 3.1 LLM代理将文本切割为重叠块，为每块构建稀疏因果矩阵形成块FCM，通过凸混合得到全局循环FCM知识图。混合过程利用稀疏运算保持效率，并引入操作者级别贝叶斯推理产生去分块后验FCM，支持连续贝叶斯更新。在Allison的修昔底德陷阱文本上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在8个生成的FCM知识图中，7个在刺激上升强国的野心节点后预测战争类型（如固定点或极限环吸引子），验证了模型捕捉动态因果冲突的能力，表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了结合LLM分块与因果图贝叶斯混合的框架，能自动从文本构建可预测的因果模型，适用于政治冲突分析。未来可扩展至更大文本和更复杂系统，但依赖LLM分块质量。

title: LAST-RAG: Literature-Anchored Stochastic Trajectory Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Conditioned Degradation Model Selection
abstract: Stochastic-process-based degradation modeling is a core approach for estimating the distribution of remaining useful life (RUL); however, the selection of an appropriate stochastic process has not been sufficiently addressed. Existing model selection methods mainly rely on the statistical fit of the observed health indicator (HI) trajectory, but this approach may select a model that is inconsistent with the underlying degradation mechanism when the observation window is short or the signal is highly noisy. To address this issue, this paper proposes Literature-Anchored Stochastic Trajectory Retrieval-Augmented Generation (LAST-RAG). The proposed method uses both the observed HI trajectory and domain-specific context, and hierarchically conditions the candidate degradation model space based on theoretical and mechanical evidence retrieved from a local evidence bank. In addition, Rule-based Confidence Reasoning with Uncertain State (RCRUS) is introduced to prevent candidate models from being prematurely eliminated when hierarchical decisions are uncertain. Simulation-based experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms statistical, prognostic, and uncertainty-aware baselines in both Wiener/gamma family classification and detailed degradation model classification. Ultimately, this study reframes degradation model selection from a purely statistical goodness-of-fit problem into a knowledge-conditioned decision-making problem that integrates observed data with domain knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LAST-RAG方法，利用检索增强生成将退化模型选择从统计拟合问题转化为知识条件决策问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机过程建模是剩余寿命估计的核心方法，但现有模型选择主要依赖健康指标轨迹的统计拟合。当观测窗口短或信号噪声高时，统计拟合可能选出与退化机理不一致的模型，导致预测偏差。该研究旨在通过整合领域知识改进模型选择可靠性。
light_analysis.method: LAST-RAG方法结合观测HI轨迹和领域上下文，从本地证据库检索理论机械证据，层次化约束候选模型空间。引入Rule-based Confidence Reasoning with Uncertain State (RCRUS)处理层级决策中的不确定状态，防止过早淘汰候选模型。使用仿真数据评估性能。
light_analysis.result: 仿真实验在Wiener/gamma族分类和详细退化模型分类任务中，LAST-RAG优于统计、预测和不确定性感知基线方法。具体性能指标如准确率、F1分数等，摘要未明确说明，但表明方法在分类精度上显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究将退化模型选择重构为知识条件决策问题，整合观测数据与领域知识，提高了模型选择的机械一致性。方法可应用于设备健康管理和预测性维护。潜在局限包括对证据库完整性的依赖，未来可扩展至更多退化类型。

title: DuIVRS-2: An LLM-based Interactive Voice Response System for Large-scale POI Attribute Acquisition
abstract: Accurate Point of Interest (POI) attribute acquisition is essential for location-based services, yet traditional modular Interactive Voice Response (IVR) systems suffer from error accumulation and high maintenance overhead. We present DuIVRS-2, a large language model (LLM)-based end-to-end framework designed for large-scale POI attribute acquisition at Baidu Maps. To address the long-tail distribution of real-world interactions, our methodology first employs a finite state machine (FSM)-guided data augmentation strategy to synthesize a balanced and diverse training dataset. We then streamline dialogue management via a selective generation scheme combined with a Chain-of-Thought (CoT) mechanism, which ensures output stability and effectively eliminates hallucinations in industrial settings. To facilitate continuous policy refinement with minimal manual effort, we design a cooperative iterative learning framework that leverages a dual-evaluator voting system. Deployed in production for two months, DuIVRS-2 processed 0.4 million calls daily and achieved a 83.9\% Task Success Rate (TSR), outperforming its predecessor by 4 percentage points while maintaining a low reaction time of 130ms. This work provides a production-proven reference for developing robust, cost-effective LLM agents for large-scale industrial dialogue applications.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Industry Track. 14 pages, including appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM的端到端IVR系统DuIVRS-2，用于大规模POI属性获取，通过数据增强、选择性生成与CoT机制及迭代学习框架提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统模块化IVR系统在POI属性获取中存在错误累积和高维护开销，难以应对真实交互的长尾分布，亟需一种稳定、高效且可扩展的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 采用FSM引导的数据增强合成平衡多样的训练集；通过选择性生成与CoT机制稳定输出、消除幻觉；设计双评估器投票的协同迭代学习框架，实现低人工干预的策略持续优化。
light_analysis.result: 部署两个月，日处理40万通话，任务成功率达83.9%，较前代提升4个百分点，反应时间仅130ms，验证了系统在工业大规模场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为开发稳健、低成本的LLM智能体用于大规模工业对话应用提供了生产级参考，未来可探索更复杂的对话策略与跨领域迁移。

title: DCFold: Efficient Protein Structure Generation with Single Forward Pass
abstract: AlphaFold3 introduces a diffusion-based architecture that elevates protein structure prediction to all-atom resolution with improved accuracy. This state-of-the-art performance has established AlphaFold3 as a foundation model for diverse generation and design tasks. However, its iterative design substantially increases inference time, limiting practical deployment in downstream settings such as virtual screening and protein design. We propose DCFold, a single-step generative model that attains AlphaFold3-level accuracy. Our Dual Consistency training framework, which incorporates a novel Temporal Geodesic Matching (TGM) scheduler, enables DCFold to achieve a 15x acceleration in inference while maintaining predictive fidelity. We validate its effectiveness across both structure prediction and binder design benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DCFold，一种单步生成模型，结合双一致性训练和TGM调度器，实现与AlphaFold3相当的精度，推理速度提升15倍。
light_analysis.motivation: AlphaFold3虽精度高，但其迭代设计导致推理耗时长，限制了在虚拟筛选和蛋白质设计等实际场景中的部署。现有方法需要在不牺牲精度前提下显著加速，以满足高效率需求。
light_analysis.method: DCFold采用单步生成代替迭代扩散，核心是双一致性训练框架，利用新型时间测地线匹配（TGM）调度器，在保持预测保真度的同时实现快速推理。该方法无需多步采样即可直接输出蛋白质结构。
light_analysis.result: 在蛋白质结构预测和结合剂设计基准上，DCFold达到与AlphaFold3同等的精度，同时推理速度加快15倍，即实现约15x加速，验证了其高效性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCFold成功解决了AlphaFold3推理速度慢的问题，为蛋白质生成和设计提供了高效工具，具有重要应用价值。未来可扩展至更多蛋白质相关任务，但摘要未明确讨论局限性。

title: Lightweight Gaussian Process Inference in C++ on Metal and CUDA
abstract: Gaussian process (GP) inference in Python is dominated by libraries such as GPyTorch and GPflow, which are built on deep-learning frameworks and inherit their dispatch overhead and dependency footprint. We present LightGP, a dependency-free C++17 library for GP regression with Python bindings, supporting Apple Metal and NVIDIA CUDA backends alongside tuned CPU paths via Apple Accelerate and OpenBLAS. LightGP provides four inference paths -- exact Cholesky, matrix-free conjugate gradients, sparse variational free energy, and structured kernel interpolation with FFT -- covering problems from $N{=}100$ to $N{=}500{,}000$. On an Apple M4, LightGP CPU is 2.6--8.7$\times$ faster than GPyTorch CPU for exact GP and ${\sim}1.5\times$ faster for sparse GP at every scale tested. On an NVIDIA RTX~3060, LightGP CUDA is 2.3--6.7$\times$ faster than GPyTorch CUDA for exact GP up to $N{=}2{,}048$, with GPyTorch closing the gap at $N{=}4{,}096$. A fused matrix-free kernel-vector product on Metal achieves 32$\times$ over the explicit path at $N{=}20{,}000$ with $O(N)$ memory, and an FFT-accelerated SKI matvec via Accelerate vDSP runs in sub-millisecond time at $N{=}200{,}000$. LightGP compiles as a single static library with zero external dependencies and is installable via \texttt{pip install lightgp

light_analysis.overview: LightGP是一个无依赖的C++17高斯过程库，支持Metal和CUDA，速度显著优于GPyTorch。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有高斯过程推理库如GPyTorch和GPflow基于深度学习框架，存在调度开销和依赖问题。为在资源受限或需要高性能的场景下高效运行，需要一个轻量级、无外部依赖、支持多种后端（CPU、Metal、CUDA）的GP库。
light_analysis.method: LightGP采用C++17实现，提供四种推理路径：精确Cholesky、无矩阵共轭梯度、稀疏变分自由能、结构化核插值FFT。通过Apple Accelerate和OpenBLAS优化CPU路径，Metal和CUDA加速GPU。包含融合矩阵-向量积和FFT加速SKI。
light_analysis.result: 在Apple M4上，LightGP CPU精确GP比GPyTorch快2.6-8.7倍，稀疏GP快约1.5倍。在RTX 3060上，CUDA精确GP在N≤2048时快2.3-6.7倍，N=4096时差距缩小。Metal融合内核-向量积在N=20000时比显式路径快32倍，FFT-SKI在N=200000时亚毫秒完成。
light_analysis.conclusion: LightGP在多个硬件后端上实现了显著的速度提升，且无外部依赖，易于安装。适用于从数百到五十万数据点的GP回归任务。未来可能扩展更多推理方法和更广泛的硬件支持。

title: Evaluating Cognitive Age Alignment in Interactive AI Agents
abstract: While agentic AI and its core multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable promise in language and visual reasoning across domains ranging from daily life to advanced scientific research, a profound gap remains between artificial and human intelligence. Despite the integration of powerful tools and advanced MLLMs, state-of-the-art AI agents frequently fail at foundational, seemingly simple tasks that a child can resolve with ease. Inspired by the Wechsler Intelligence Scale for Children (WISC), we introduce ChildAgentEval, the first psychometrically grounded interactive benchmark for evaluating cognitive age alignment in MLLM-based agents. ChildAgentEval systematically compares the reasoning performance of various MLLM-based interactive agents against age-specific human developmental stages, exposing where current agentic AI systems can and cannot simulate age-specific cognitive behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个心理学基础的交互基准ChildAgentEval，评估MLLM智能体与人类认知发展的年龄对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI智能体在语言和视觉推理上表现卓越，但在儿童能轻松完成的简单任务上频繁失败，暴露出人工智能与人类智能之间的深刻差距。现有方法缺乏系统性评估该差距的标准，尤其缺乏基于人类认知发展心理学的交互式基准。这个问题至关重要，因为理解AI在何种程度上能模拟不同年龄的人类认知行为对于构建更接近人类智能的代理系统具有指导意义。
light_analysis.method: 受韦氏儿童智力量表（WISC）启发，提出ChildAgentEval——一个心理学基础交互式基准。该基准通过设计专门任务，系统比较多种基于MLLM的交互智能体与不同年龄段人类的发展阶段（如儿童认知能力）在推理表现上的差异。关键创新在于将心理学测试范式转化为AI评估场景，量化智能体的认知年龄对齐度，而非仅关注绝对任务性能。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值结果，但指出评估暴露了当前代理AI系统在哪些方面能够及不能模拟特定年龄的认知行为。例如，较先进的MLLM智能体在部分儿童级任务上仍表现不佳，与其高级语言能力形成反差。与人类年龄基线对比，发现了系统性的认知错位，验证了基准的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChildAgentEval作为首个交互式认知年龄对齐基准，填补了AI心理学评估的空白。它揭示了当前MLLM智能体在模拟人类认知发展方面的局限性，尤其是在简单但基础的任务上。该研究为设计更类人的AI提供了评估工具，并启发未来工作结合认知发展理论改进模型架构或训练范式，但需要扩展更多任务和年龄范围以增强覆盖面。

title: CoX-MoE: Coalesced Expert Execution for High-Throughput MoE Inference with AMX-Enabled CPU-GPU Co-Execution
abstract: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture improves computational efficiency via sparse expert activation, but throughput-oriented inference faces substantial GPU memory pressure due to a significant parameter size and intermediate data. Prior works attempt to mitigate this using expert offloading with micro-batching or by offloading computation to the CPU. However, the fragmented workload resulting from micro-batching degrades operational intensity, causing expert execution to become memory-bound. Meanwhile, CPU offloading is constrained by slow PCIe transfers and its limited applicability to attention computation in the decode stage. Consequently, these inefficiencies prevent effective system utilization, severely restricting the end-to-end throughput of MoE inference.   To address these challenges, this paper proposes CoX-MoE, an Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX)-enabled CPU-GPU collaborative system that comprehensively optimizes MoE inference by combining coalesced expert execution with strategic workload orchestration for higher throughput. CoX-MoE introduces (i) a coalescing-aware orchestration policy to jointly optimize resource allocation by adopting ordinary batch, instead of micro-batch, for expert computation and selective attention offloading, and (ii) a static expert-aware stratification scheme that pre-assigns frequently activated experts to the GPU, mitigating PCIe transfer overhead and balancing workload for the CPU and GPU during inference. Compared to state-of-the-art frameworks, CoX-MoE delivers significant gains, achieving up to 7.1x and 2.4x higher throughput than FlexGen and MoE-Lightning, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoX-MoE系统，通过AMX加速的CPU-GPU协同执行和合并专家执行策略，显著提升MoE推理吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE架构通过稀疏专家激活提升计算效率，但吞吐量导向推理中参数量和中间数据带来巨大GPU内存压力。现有方法采用微批处理专家卸载或CPU计算卸载，但微批处理导致工作负载碎片化，操作强度降低，专家执行变为内存受限；CPU卸载受限于慢速PCIe传输和解码阶段注意力计算适用性有限，无法有效利用系统资源，严重限制端到端吞吐量。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoX-MoE系统，包含两个核心创新：一是合并感知编排策略，采用普通批次而非微批次进行专家计算，并选择性卸载注意力计算，联合优化资源分配；二是静态专家感知分层方案，预先将频繁激活的专家分配给GPU，减少PCIe传输开销，平衡CPU与GPU在推理过程中的工作负载。系统利用AMX指令集加速CPU端计算。
light_analysis.result: 相比现有框架FlexGen和MoE-Lightning，CoX-MoE分别实现高达7.1倍和2.4倍的吞吐量提升，表明系统在优化MoE推理效率方面具有显著优势。摘要未明确说明具体测试配置和数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoX-MoE通过CPU-GPU协同执行和合并专家策略，有效解决了MoE推理中的内存瓶颈和传输开销问题，大幅提升系统吞吐量。该方法具有实际应用价值，可部署于现代异构计算平台。未来可能探索动态专家分配策略以进一步优化性能。

title: Attention Sinks and Outliers in Attention Residuals
abstract: We propose OASIS, an outlier- and sink-aware technique built on inter-layer null signaling. As AttnResidual architectures introduce an additional depth-wise normalization channel, they improve inter-layer routing flexibility but also exacerbate attention sinks, activation outliers, and the resulting degradation in inference stability and quantization robustness. OASIS addresses this issue by introducing a Softmax1-based null space and coupling token-level null evidence to depth routing through an inter-layer null signal, thereby reducing sink-dominated routing and improving structural robustness. Theoretically, we show that the dual-normalization design of AttnResidual intensifies sink formation and quantization brittleness. Experimentally, we compare OASIS against five baselines on three real-world datasets and observe consistent improvements in both attention sink and post-quantization performance. Notably, OASIS achieves an average reduction of 9.26% in maximum infinity norm and 2.60% in average kurtosis across the evaluated settings, while lowering perplexity by 75.85% under W8A8 and improving GSM8K Pass@1 by 12.42% under W4A4.

light_analysis.overview: OASIS利用层间空信号处理注意力残差中的下沉和异常值，提升量化鲁棒性和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: AttnResidual架构引入额外深度归一化通道，提高层间路由灵活性，但加剧了注意力下沉和激活异常值，导致推理稳定性与量化鲁棒性下降。现有方法无法有效同步缓解这两个问题，亟需一种专门针对下沉和异常值的鲁棒性增强技术。
light_analysis.method: OASIS基于Softmax1构建零空间，将token级空证据通过层间空信号耦合到深度路由，减少下沉主导的路由。该方法通过弱化异常值对归一化的影响，增强模型对量化的鲁棒性。关键创新在于引入层间空信号作为结构约束，实现深度维度的路由优化。
light_analysis.result: 在三个真实数据集上与五个基线对比，OASIS一致提升性能：最大无穷范数平均降低9.26%，平均峰度降低2.60%；W8A8量化下困惑度降低75.85%，W4A4量化下GSM8K Pass@1提升12.42%。验证了其在缓解下沉和异常值以及改善量化效果上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OASIS有效缓解注意力残差中的下沉和异常值，显著提升量化鲁棒性和推理稳定性。理论层面揭示了双归一化设计加剧问题的机制，实践层面为低比特量化部署提供可行方案。未来可探索其在大规模多模态模型中的适用性。

title: Multi-agent AI systems outperform human teams in creativity
abstract: Although artificial intelligence (AI) now matches or exceeds human performance across numerous cognitive tasks, creativity remains a highly contested frontier. As AI systems based on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted in research and innovation, it is essential to understand and augment their creativity. Here we demonstrate that multi-agent LLM teams not only surpass single agents, but also substantially outperform human teams in creativity (Cohen's d=1.50) across 4,541 multi-agent LLM ideas and 341 human-team ideas on six diverse problem-solving tasks. This advantage is driven by novelty while maintaining comparable usefulness. To investigate the generative processes in both groups, we represent conversations as paths through semantic space using neural language model representations. Both LLM and human teams produce more creative ideas when conversations range widely rather than staying centered on a single theme (low global coherence). However, the additional patterns that predict creativity differ: LLM teams benefit from efficient exploration (high semantic spread, shorter paths), while human teams benefit from maintaining smooth conversational flow (high local coherence, frequent pivots). Additionally, we identify model choice and discussion structure as orthogonal design levers that together explain 26.8% of variance in LLM conversational dynamics, paving the way for systematic approaches to developing multi-agent systems with augmented creative capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 多智能体LLM系统在创造力任务上显著超越人类团队，Cohen's d=1.50，优势源于新颖性而保持可用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管AI在众多认知任务中已超越人类，但创造力仍是争议焦点。随着基于LLM的AI系统日益应用于研究和创新，理解和提升其创造力至关重要。现有研究多关注单一智能体，缺乏对多智能体协作创造力的系统比较，尤其与人类团队的量化对比。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了6个多样性问题解决任务，比较了4541个多智能体LLM想法与341个人类团队想法。利用神经语言模型将对话表示为语义空间中的路径，通过全局/局部连贯性、语义传播、路径长度等指标分析生成过程。同时探究模型选择和讨论结构两个正交设计杠杆。
light_analysis.result: 多智能体LLM团队在创造力上大幅超越人类团队（Cohen's d=1.50），主要体现在新颖性，而可用性相当。LLM团队创造力与低全局连贯性、高语义传播和短路径相关；人类团队则与低全局连贯性、高局部连贯性和频繁转折相关。模型选择和讨论结构共同解释了26.8%的LLM对话动态方差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了多智能体LLM系统在集体创造力上的显著优势，并揭示了人机创造力过程的差异。学术上为理解AI创造力机制提供新视角，实践上为设计高效创意生成的多智能体系统提供指导。未来可探索更优的模型组合与讨论结构。

title: PAIR: Prefix-Aware Internal Reward Model for Multi-Turn Agent Optimization
abstract: A significant hurdle for current LLMs is the execution of complex, multi-stage tasks. Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has been emerging as a leading choice, but its reliance on sparse outcome rewards severely limits credit assignment across intermediate steps. Existing remedies such as running full rollouts to assign step-level advantages, calling external LLM judges at each step, or computing intrinsic rewards that require ground-truth answers at every evaluation introduce significant costs or practical constraints. We hypothesize that internal correctness probing over LLM hidden states can be repurposed as a step-level reward signal, potentially addressing all of these limitations at once. However, existing probing research assumes clean inputs, and we first show that this assumption breaks down in multi-step settings: hidden-state probes degrade severely under prefix contamination tracking coherence with the (possibly corrupted) prefix rather than grounded correctness, while attention-based features remain robust to contamination but underperform on clean prefixes. Building on this complementary relationship, we propose the Prefix-Aware Internal Reward (PAIR), a two-stage model with a frozen hidden-state probe estimating belief-consistency and a lightweight attention-based head correcting it toward grounded correctness. Experimental results show that PAIR achieves the highest AUROC on contaminated trajectories while operating at negligible inference cost, enabling dense step-level reward signals for GRPO training without external model calls, ground-truth dependencies, or full-trajectory rollouts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PAIR模型，利用LLM隐藏状态生成步骤级奖励信号，解决GRPO在多步任务中的稀疏奖励问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM在执行复杂多步任务时面临巨大挑战。GRPO虽然流行，但其稀疏的最终结果奖励难以有效分配信用到中间步骤。现有解决方案如完整轨迹展开、外部LLM评判器或基于真实答案的内在奖励，均带来高昂成本或实际限制。因此需要一种低成本、无需外部依赖的步骤级奖励信号。
light_analysis.method: PAIR模型包含两个阶段：一个冻结的隐藏状态探针估计信念一致性，一个轻量级注意力头将其校正为基于事实的正确性。该设计利用了隐藏状态探针和注意力特征在干净和污染前缀下的互补特性：前者对污染敏感但干净时准确，后者对污染鲁棒但干净时稍弱。通过协同工作，PAIR能在污染轨迹上达到最高AUROC，且推理成本可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PAIR在受污染轨迹上取得了最高的AUROC，同时推理成本极低。它能为GRPO训练提供密集的步骤级奖励信号，无需外部模型调用、真实答案依赖或完整轨迹展开。相比现有方法，PAIR在效率和性能上均有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: PAIR成功将LLM内部状态探针改造为实用的步骤级奖励信号，解决了多步优化中的信用分配问题。其低成本和无需外部依赖的特性使其具有很高的实用价值。未来工作可能探索更复杂的探针架构或应用于其他强化学习框架。

title: HexagonalWarriorMamba: Superior Threshold-Dependent Multi-label Classification of 12-Lead ECG Cardiac Abnormalities
abstract: The accurate automated diagnosis of cardiac abnormalities from 12-lead electrocardiograms (ECGs) is critical for managing cardiovascular disease. However, detecting concurrent conditions remains a challenge for traditional deep learning models, which often have limited ability to model the long-range dependencies inherent in ECG signals. This manuscript proposes HexagonalWarriorMamba (HWMamba), a framework built on the Mamba architecture that processes 12-lead ECGs as single-channel 2D images rather than conventional 1D time series. By integrating a hierarchical architecture with a 2D Selective Scan mechanism, HWMamba is designed to model global context and complex spatial relationships within the data. The model is evaluated on the PhysioNet/Computing in Cardiology Challenge 2021 dataset, which includes 26 diagnostic labels and comprises recordings collected from seven institutions across four countries and three continents. Results demonstrate that HWMamba outperforms current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods across five key threshold-dependent metrics, including Challenge Score and Subset Accuracy. These improvements provide a balance between strong discriminative capability and effective threshold selection derived from the training data, while maintaining near-SOTA performance in Macro AUROC. This Hexagonal Warrior performance, reflecting consistent performance across multiple evaluation dimensions, positions HWMamba as a robust and versatile approach for multi-label ECG classification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Mamba架构的HexagonalWarriorMamba，将12导联ECG处理为2D图像，利用2D选择性扫描机制进行多标签分类，在阈值依赖指标上超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 高效准确的12导联心电图自动诊断对心血管疾病管理至关重要，但传统深度学习模型难以捕捉ECG信号的长期依赖关系，且对并发疾病检测能力有限。现有方法在多标签分类中面临阈值选择和判别能力不足的问题，需要更强大的全局建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出HexagonalWarriorMamba框架，基于Mamba架构，将12导联ECG视为单通道2D图像，而非传统1D序列。通过分层架构结合2D选择性扫描机制，建模全局上下文和复杂空间关系。使用PhysioNet/Computing in Cardiology Challenge 2021数据集，包含26个诊断标签，来自多国多机构。
light_analysis.result: 在五个关键阈值依赖指标上超越当前最先进方法，包括Challenge Score和Subset Accuracy。同时保持Macro AUROC接近最优性能。模型在训练数据上实现了强判别能力和有效阈值选择，展现出多维度的稳定性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: HexagonalWarriorMamba通过创新的2D图像处理视角和选择性扫描机制，为多标签ECG分类提供了鲁棒且通用的解决方案。其优势在于全局建模能力和阈值依赖性指标的提升，适合实际临床部署。未来可探索更复杂的架构和更多数据集验证。

title: HINT-SD: Targeted Hindsight Self-Distillation for Long-Horizon Agents
abstract: Training long-horizon LLM agents with reinforcement learning is challenging because sparse outcome rewards reveal whether a task succeeds, but not which intermediate actions caused the outcome or how they should be corrected. Recent methods alleviate this issue by generating rewards or textual hints from turn-level action-output signals, or by using feedback-conditioned self-distillation. However, generating feedback at every turn is inefficient when many intermediate turns are already successful or neutral, and applying feedback at a fixed or misaligned turn often fails to supervise the actions that contributed to the failure. To bridge this gap, we propose HINT-SD, a targeted self-distillation framework that uses full-trajectory hindsight to select failure-relevant actions and applies feedback-conditioned distillation only on targeted action spans. Experiments on BFCL v3 and AppWorld show that our method improves over the dense per-turn feedback baseline by up to 18.80 percent while achieving 2.26$\times$ lower time per training step, suggesting that selecting where to distill is a key factor for both effective and efficient long-horizon agent training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HINT-SD，一种目标自蒸馏框架，通过全轨迹事后分析选择失败相关动作，仅对目标动作跨度进行蒸馏，提升长程agent训练效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练长程LLM agent面临稀疏奖励问题，现有方法每步生成反馈效率低，且固定或错位步反馈无法监督真正导致失败的动作。需要更高效、精准的反馈机制，避免对大量成功或中性中间步的无效处理。
light_analysis.method: HINT-SD使用全轨迹事后分析选择与失败相关的动作，仅对选中的动作跨度应用反馈条件蒸馏。通过忽略大量成功或中性中间步，聚焦关键失败动作，减少无效计算，提升蒸馏的针对性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在BFCL v3和AppWorld上，相比每步密集反馈基线，性能提升最多18.80%，每个训练步时间降低2.26倍，验证了选择性蒸馏在有效性和效率上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: HINT-SD通过选择关键动作进行蒸馏，实现了高效长程agent训练。学术上证明了稀疏奖励下定向反馈的重要性；实际应用中可加速训练、提升性能。未来可探索更细粒度的选择策略。

title: PySIFT: GPU-Resident Deterministic SIFT for Deep Learning Vision Pipelines
abstract: A widespread assumption in local feature research holds that classical handcrafted descriptors are accuracy-limited relics best replaced by learned alternatives. We show this is wrong. Through an 8-configuration ablation spanning four benchmarks (HPatches, ROxford5K, IMC Phototourism, MegaDepth), we demonstrate that classical SIFT with DSP multi-scale pooling outperforms neural descriptor and orientation replacements (HardNet, OriNet) on every accuracy metric--while running 2--18$\times$ faster--and that learned matchers (LightGlue) complement rather than supersede classical features. The conclusion reframes a decade of work: not "replace SIFT" but "compose with SIFT," classical extraction paired with learned matching only where geometric context demands it. This finding was invisible because no prior GPU SIFT kept the complete pipeline in VRAM or offered modularity for controlled classical-vs-learned ablations. We present PySIFT, the first fully GPU-resident SIFT, implemented in CuPy/Numba CUDA kernels with DLPack zero-copy handoff to downstream DL frameworks--submillisecond O(1) metadata swap regardless of keypoint count. On a laptop-grade NVIDIA RTX 3050 (4 GB VRAM), PySIFT achieves: (i) higher Mean Matching Accuracy (MMA) than OpenCV SIFT on HPatches, (ii) 383 ms faster per pair on high-resolution MegaDepth, (iii) higher geometric accuracy on cross-dataset benchmarks (+5.6 pp AUC@10${}^\circ$ on MegaDepth, more inliers on IMC Phototourism), and (iv) bitwise deterministic output--identical keypoints and descriptors across runs, with detection reproducing identically even across GPU architectures: a guarantee that learned extractors cannot match without significant performance sacrifice, and cannot achieve at all across GPU architectures due to cuDNN's architecture-dependent algorithm selection. PySIFT is open-source, requiring no C++ compilation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PySIFT，首个完全GPU驻留的SIFT实现，证明经典SIFT在准确性和速度上优于神经替代方法，并实现确定性输出。
light_analysis.motivation: 局部特征研究中普遍认为经典手工描述符精度有限，应被学习型替代。然而，现有GPU SIFT未能完全驻留VRAM或提供模块化控制，导致无法进行公平的经典vs学习型消融实验。该研究旨在检验这一假设，并提供一个高效的GPU SIFT工具。
light_analysis.method: PySIFT采用CuPy/Numba CUDA内核实现完全GPU驻留的SIFT，通过DSP多尺度池化增强特征，支持DLPack零拷贝传递给下游深度学习框架。关键创新包括O(1)元数据交换（无论关键点数量）和位级确定性输出，跨GPU架构可复现。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准（HPatches、ROxford5K、IMC Phototourism、MegaDepth）上，PySIFT在准确性上优于HardNet和OriNet，速度提升2-18倍。在MegaDepth上AUC@10°提高5.6个百分点，高分辨率图像对处理快383毫秒，且输出跨运行和GPU架构一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究颠覆了“替换SIFT”的共识，提出“与SIFT组合”的范式：经典特征提取配合学习型匹配仅在几何上下文需求时使用。PySIFT作为开源工具，无需C++编译，为计算机视觉提供确定性、高效的SIFT实现，未来可探索更广泛的应用。

title: DAD4TS: Data-Augmentation-Oriented Diffusion Model for Time-Series Forecasting with Small-Scale Data
abstract: Small-scale data is a critical problem in time-series forecasting tasks. Data augmentation is an effective strategy for this task, but it has a limitation in generating meaningful data. To address this limitation, we propose DAD4TS, a diffusion-model-based data augmentation method with reinforcement learning, designed for time-series forecasting with small-scale data. In DAD4TS, a data generator is simultaneously trained with a time-series model and controlled by a reinforcement learning model to efficiently generate samples that improve the forecast accuracy of the time-series model. To support small-scale data, we use mathematical methods instead of conventional VAE methods to train the diffusion model by projecting the time-series data into the geometric space. We validated the effectiveness of DAD4TS with seven comparative methods through qualitative and quantitative experiments on six real-world datasets and eight time-series models. As a result, DAD4TS was validated on five datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DAD4TS，一种基于扩散模型和强化学习的数据增强方法，专为小样本时间序列预测设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 小样本数据是时间序列预测中的关键难题。现有数据增强方法生成有意义数据的能力有限，难以有效提升模型性能。因此，需要一种能生成高质量、有助于提高预测准确性的增强样本的新方法。
light_analysis.method: DAD4TS包含一个数据生成器，与时间序列模型联合训练，并由强化学习模型控制以优化生成样本。为适应小样本场景，采用数学方法而非传统VAE，将时间序列投影到几何空间来训练扩散模型，从而增强数据多样性。
light_analysis.result: 在六个真实数据集和八个时间序列模型上，与七种对比方法进行定性和定量实验。DAD4TS在五个数据集上验证了有效性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升幅度。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAD4TS有效解决了小样本时间序列预测中的数据增强问题，通过扩散模型与强化学习结合生成有意义样本。实验证明其广泛适用性，但具体性能增益未量化。未来可探索更高效的几何映射或扩展至其他序列任务。

title: Imaging Hidden Objects with Consumer LiDAR via Motion Induced Sampling
abstract: LiDARs are being increasingly deployed for consumer imaging in handheld, wearable, and robotic applications. These sensors can capture the time-of-flight of light at picosecond resolution, which in principle, enables them to capture information about objects hidden from their field of view. While such non-line-of-sight (NLOS) imaging capabilities have been shown on research-grade LiDARs, they are challenging to achieve on consumer devices due to poor signal quality resulting from low laser power, low spatial resolution, and object and camera motion. Inspired by burst photography and synthetic aperture radar, we propose a multi-frame fusion strategy to overcome these challenges and demonstrate NLOS imaging on consumer LiDAR. We first introduce the motion-induced aperture sampling model to unify the effects of object shape, object motion, and camera motion under a single measurement model. Using this model, we demonstrate several NLOS capabilities on a smartphone-grade LiDAR: (1) 3D reconstruction, (2) single and multi-object tracking, and (3) camera localization using hidden objects. Previously, NLOS imaging capabilities were largely restricted to bulky and expensive research-grade hardware that requires extensive setup and calibration. Our results represent a shift towards plug-and-play NLOS imaging, where anyone can image hidden objects with off-the-shelf hardware ($<100) and no additional setup. We believe that democratization of such capabilities will advance consumer applications of NLOS imaging.

light_analysis.overview: 提出运动诱导采样模型，通过多帧融合策略在消费级LiDAR上实现非视距成像，包括3D重建、目标跟踪和相机定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 非视距成像传统依赖研究级LiDAR，设备昂贵、体积庞大、设置复杂，限制了实际应用。消费级LiDAR虽然普及，但信号质量差（低激光功率、低分辨率、运动干扰），难以直接用于NLOS。本文旨在利用廉价现成设备实现即插即用的NLOS成像，降低技术门槛，推动大众化应用。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴突发摄影和合成孔径雷达思想，提出运动诱导孔径采样模型，统一描述物体形状、物体运动和相机运动对测量的影响。通过多帧融合策略，将连续帧中的运动作为额外的采样维度来增强孔径，从而克服低信号质量。在智能手机级LiDAR上采集数据，无需额外硬件或校准。
light_analysis.result: 在消费级LiDAR上首次展示了多种NLOS能力：隐藏物体的3D重建、单目标和多目标跟踪、以及利用隐藏物体进行相机定位。相比传统研究级系统（价格高昂、需要复杂设置），本方法使用<100美元的现成设备，无需额外设置，实现了与高端硬件相当的效果，验证了即插即用NLOS成像的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了消费级LiDAR结合多帧融合即可实现NLOS成像，标志着从实验室专用设备向大众化应用的转变。该工作具有重要学术价值，扩展了NLOS成像的可用硬件范围；实际应用中可促进机器人、自动驾驶、增强现实等领域的感知能力。未来可进一步优化运动建模和抗噪能力。

title: $\boldsymbol{f}$-OPD: Stabilizing Long-Horizon On-Policy Distillation with Freshness-Aware Control
abstract: Scaling on-policy distillation (OPD) for large language models (LLMs) confronts a fundamental tension: asynchronous execution is necessary for system efficiency, but structurally deviates from the ideal on-policy objective. To address this challenge, we theoretically decompose the objective discrepancy into rollout drift and supervision drift, capturing staleness in student rollout and teacher context, respectively. Building on this, we introduce a sample-level freshness score that quantifies the reliability of a buffered sample with respect to the on-policy objective. Guided by this signal, we further propose f-OPD, a novel framework that adaptively regulates stale-sample influence and constrains policy drift accumulated under asynchronous training. Across reasoning, tool-use, and coding-agent tasks of increasing interaction horizon, f-OPD consistently achieves task performance comparable to synchronous optimization while largely retaining the throughput advantages of asynchronous execution. Our results establish the first recipe for achieving a performance-efficiency trade-off in OPD, paving the way for long-horizon agentic post-training at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 f-OPD 框架，通过新鲜度感知控制稳定长视界策略蒸馏，首次实现同步性能与异步效率的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模语言模型的在线策略蒸馏面临异步执行与理想策略目标之间的张力。异步虽提升系统效率，但会导致目标偏差，现有方法未能有效解决。该问题重要，因为长视界代理后训练需要高效扩展，而异步带来的策略漂移会损害性能。研究旨在平衡性能与效率，突破 OPD 规模化瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 理论分解目标差异为 rollout drift（学生 rollout 过时）和 supervision drift（教师上下文过时），定义样本级新鲜度分数衡量可靠性。提出 f-OPD，通过自适应调节陈旧样本影响并约束策略漂移。在推理、工具使用和编码代理等长视界任务上验证，使用 LLM 作为学生和教师模型。
light_analysis.result: f-OPD 在多种长视界任务上（推理、工具使用、编码）达到与同步优化相当的性能，同时显著保留异步执行的高吞吐量优势。实验表明，该方法有效缓解了异步训练中的性能下降，首次在 OPD 中实现了性能与效率的均衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次建立起 OPD 中性能-效率权衡的可行方案，为长视界代理后训练的大规模应用奠定基础。新鲜度感知控制直接针对异步漂移问题，具有理论支撑和实证效果。未来可探索更细粒度的新鲜度度量或扩展到多教师场景。

title: PAREDA: A Multi-Accent Speech Dataset of Natural Language Processing Research Discussions
abstract: While modern Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems achieve high accuracy on benchmark corpora, their performance often degrades when there is real-world variability. This work focuses on variability arising due to accented, spontaneous, and domain-specific speech. In particular, we introduce PAper REading DAtaset (PAREDA), a first-of-its-kind multi-accent speech dataset consisting of discussions on academic Natural Language Processing (NLP) papers between speakers with Australian, Indian-English, and Chinese English accents. Each session elicits a spontaneous monologue (a summary of a paper's abstract) and a non-monologue (a question-and-answer session between participants), resulting in a corpus rich with technical jargon and conversational phenomena. We evaluate the performance of SOTA ASR models on PAREDA, analysing the impact of accent mixing and increased speech rate. Our results show that, in the zero-shot setting, models perform worse, confirming the dataset's challenging nature. However, fine-tuning on PAREDA significantly reduces the Word Error Rate (WER), demonstrating that our dataset captures linguistic characteristics often missing from existing corpora. PAREDA serves as a valuable new resource for building and evaluating more robust and inclusive ASR systems for specialised, real-world applications.
comment: Accepted and presented at SPEAKABLE 2026 workshop at LREC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 构建多口音自发学术讨论语音数据集PAREDA，用于提升ASR系统对真实世界变异的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代ASR系统在基准语料库上准确率高，但面对口音、自发语音和领域特定变异性时性能下降。现有数据集缺乏多口音、自发和领域专业语音的复合场景，限制了鲁棒ASR系统的发展。因此，需要构建涵盖这些变异的数据集，以评估和增强ASR对真实应用的适应性。
light_analysis.method: 提出PAREDA数据集，包含澳大利亚、印度英语和中国英语口音，每个会话包括自发独白（论文摘要总结）和非独白（问答）两种模式，富含技术术语和会话现象。评估SOTA ASR模型在零样本和微调设置下的性能，分析口音混合和语速的影响，通过比较WER来衡量数据集挑战性和微调效果。
light_analysis.result: 零样本设置下，模型在PAREDA上表现较差，验证了数据集的挑战性。微调后，所有模型的WER显著降低，表明数据集有效捕捉了现有语料缺失的语言特征（如口音、自发性和专业术语）。具体WER数值摘要未给出，但趋势明确证明数据集价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PAREDA是首个针对多口音学术讨论的语音数据集，为构建和评估更鲁棒、包容的ASR系统提供宝贵资源。它填补了真实世界变异数据的空白，推动ASR在专业场景（如学术会议）的应用。未来可扩展更多口音和领域，并用于训练更稳健的模型。

title: KISS - Knowledge Infrastructure for Scientific Simulation: A Scaffolding for Agentic Earth Science
abstract: Process-based simulation models encode decades of scientific understanding across the Earth sciences, yet the communities most exposed to climate risk and resource scarcity are the least able to use them. Here, we introduce knowledge infrastructure (KI), an agent-actionable scaffold that externalizes expertise into validated modelling operators, staged domain protocols, and diagnostic recovery mechanisms. Across a 3,000-trial coupled-hydrology benchmark, agents equipped with KI produced physically plausible, verifiable end-to-end simulations in up to 84% of trials, while agents without KI plateaued below 40%. KI generalizes across disciplines. We packaged its construction into a Knowledge Dissection Toolkit (KDT) that autonomously produced KI enabling end-to-end agent execution of 117 additional process-based models across 14 Earth-science domains. Across all 119 KIs, modelling decisions and failure remedies converged despite different underlying physics, showing that operational expertise is structured and extractable rather than ad hoc. Demonstrations show KI-equipped agents lowering both the access barrier between non-specialist users and process-based simulation, and the integration barrier between modelling communities. Through this scaffold, process-based science can then evolve as a living scientific commons, answerable to whoever needs to know and extendable by whoever can contribute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识基础设施（KI）和知识解剖工具包（KDT），使智能体能够利用过程模拟模型进行端到端仿真，显著提升非专家用户的可及性和跨学科整合。
light_analysis.motivation: 过程模拟模型虽编码了地球科学数十年的知识，但最易受气候风险和资源短缺影响的社区最不善于使用它们。现有方法依赖专家操作，限制了非专业用户和跨学科整合，亟需一种可行动的、外部化的知识结构来降低使用门槛。
light_analysis.method: 引入知识基础设施（KI），一种智能体可操作的脚手架，将专业知识外化为验证过的建模算子、阶段化领域协议和诊断恢复机制。构建知识解剖工具包（KDT），可自主为117个额外过程模型生成KI，覆盖14个地球科学领域，将操作专业知识结构化而非临时收集。
light_analysis.result: 在3000次试验的水文耦合基准测试中，配备KI的智能体在84%的试验中产生物理合理、可验证的端到端模拟，而未配备KI的智能体低于40%。所有119个KI中，建模决策和故障修复模式趋同，表明操作专业知识是可提取的结构化知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: KI降低了非专家用户使用过程模拟的障碍，以及建模社区间的集成障碍，使过程科学演变为活的科学公地，可被任何人访问和扩展。未来可进一步验证在不同领域的泛化性及持续更新机制。

title: Learning over Positive and Negative Edges with Contrastive Message Passing
abstract: Conventional approaches to learning on graphs involve message passing along existing (i.e., positive) edges to update node features. However, these approaches often disregard the potentially valuable information contained in the absence (i.e., negative) of edges. Here, we theoretically analyze the value of negative edges in graph representations and prove that in settings of low label rates, high homophily, and high edge density, access to negative edges provides significant information gain over using only positive edges. Motivated by this insight, we introduce Contrastive Message Passing (CMP), a general message passing architecture that enable graph neural network layers to reason over positive and negative edges. By imposing soft positive semidefinite constraints on the learnable weights, our approach differentially applies similarity-preserving transformations to positively connected nodes and dissimilarity-inducing transformations to negatively connected nodes. Over simulated and real datasets in varying data regimes, CMP consistently outperforms baselines in low-label settings when negative edges are informative.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对比消息传递（CMP），一种利用正负边进行推理的图神经网络架构，通过理论分析证明负边在低标签率等场景下的信息增益。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图神经网络仅沿正边传递消息，忽视了负边（缺失边）蕴含的潜在价值。理论分析表明，在低标签率、高同质性和高边密度的数据设定下，负边能提供显著的信息增益，而现有方法未能有效利用这一信息。因此，需要一种新的消息传递机制来同时处理正负边，以提升图表示学习性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出对比消息传递（CMP），一种通用架构，使GNN层能同时对正负边进行推理。通过对可学习权重施加软正半定约束，CMP对正连接节点应用相似性保持变换，对负连接节点应用差异性诱导变换。该方法在模拟和真实数据集上进行评估，涵盖不同数据场景。
light_analysis.result: 在低标签设置且负边信息丰富的条件下，CMP在模拟和真实数据集上持续优于现有基线方法。具体而言，CMP在性能上取得了显著提升，尤其在标签率低、同质性高和边密度高的场景中表现突出，验证了理论分析中负边的信息价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: CMP有效挖掘了负边中的有价值信息，提升图学习性能，尤其在标签稀缺场景下。理论分析为负边的利用提供了依据，实验证实了其有效性。未来可进一步探索CMP在其他图学习任务中的应用及负边信息的更精细利用。

title: Generating Pretraining Tokens from Organic Data for Data-Bound Scaling
abstract: LLM pretraining is shifting from a compute-bound to a data-bound regime, where available human (organic) text falls far short of scaling demands. However, reaching the data-bound regime does not mean the model has fully utilized its organic corpus. In this paper, we introduce SynPro, a synthetic data generation framework that helps LLMs more thoroughly learn from limited organic data. SynPro applies two operations, rephrasing and reformat, that present the same organic source in diverse forms to facilitate deeper learning without introducing external information. Both generators are optimized via reinforcement learning with quality, faithfulness, and data influence rewards, and are continuously updated as pretraining plateaus to target content the model has yet to absorb. We pretrain 400M and 1.1B models with 10% of their Chinchilla-optimal tokens (0.8B and 2.2B) from DCLM-Baseline, reflecting a realistic data-bound regime in frontier pretraining. Our results reveal that organic data is significantly underutilized by standard repetition: SynPro unlocks 3.7-5.2x the effective tokens of repetition, even surpassing the non-data-bound oracle that trains on equivalent unique data at the 1.1B scale. Analyses confirm that faithful, model-aware synthesis sustains data-bound scaling without causing distribution collapse. We open-source our code at https://github.com/cxcscmu/SynPro.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SynPro框架，通过重述和重格式化生成多样化合成token，在数据约束下实现预训练的有效扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 大模型预训练正从计算受限转向数据受限，现有有机文本远不足以满足扩展需求。然而，达到数据受限状态并不意味着模型已充分利用有机语料。标准重复方法对有机数据的利用率低，需要更有效的策略在有限数据上实现深度学习和持续扩展。
light_analysis.method: SynPro框架采用重述和重格式化两种操作，将同一有机源以多样化形式呈现，在不引入外部信息下促进深层学习。生成器通过强化学习优化，结合质量、忠实度和数据影响力奖励，并随预训练平台持续更新以针对模型未吸收内容。实验使用DCLM-Baseline数据集，训练400M和1.1B参数模型，仅用10%的Chinchilla最优token。
light_analysis.result: 在数据受限条件下，SynPro相比标准重复可解锁3.7-5.2倍的有效token数，在1.1B规模甚至超越非数据受限的oracle（使用等价唯一数据）。分析证实忠实且模型感知的合成能持续支持数据受限扩展，不导致分布崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有机数据被显著低估，SynPro通过模型感知的合成生成释放其潜力，为数据受限规模扩展提供可行方案。该方法在学术和工业中具有实用价值，未来可探索更复杂的合成策略或结合主动学习。

title: No Free Swap: Protocol-Dependent Layer Redundancy in Transformers
abstract: When researchers ask whether two transformer layers are "equivalent" for compression, they often conflate distinct tests. Replacement asks whether one layer's map can substitute for another's in place; interchange asks whether two layers approximately commute when their positions are swapped. Both are output-grounded swap-KL probes, but they need not agree: on pretrained transformers the protocol gap can change which layers look safe to prune by several-fold under the same evaluator, especially when replacement distances are high. We measure both protocols across checkpoints and architectures. On a Pythia training trajectory (410M and 1.4B), the replacement-interchange gap grows from initialization to convergence. Under one matched WikiText-2 contract at 8B scale, Qwen3-8B enters a divergent regime: interchange-guided removal is several-fold safer than replacement-guided at the same layer budgets, while Llama-3.1-8B ties the two protocols for pruning cost even though interchange KL is lower, showing metric gaps need not map one-to-one to removal. Before layer removal or merging, score both swap-KLs on the target checkpoint; the diagnostic requires only unlabeled forward passes.
comment: 40 pages, 8 figures, 24 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/Gpgabriel25/ProtocolGapDiagnostic

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Transformer层冗余评估中替换与交换协议的不一致性，并提出基于swap-KL的诊断方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在模型压缩中，判断Transformer层是否等价对于剪枝和合并至关重要。现有研究常用替换测试（replacement）或交换测试（interchange）来衡量层间距离，但两者可能得出矛盾结果，导致不同剪枝决策。这种协议依赖性尚未被系统研究，且可能导致错误的安全层移除。论文旨在澄清两种测试的差异及其对层冗余评估的影响。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出两种swap-KL探针：replacement KL（衡量一层映射替换另一层后的输出变化）和interchange KL（衡量两层交换位置后的输出变化）。通过在Pythia（410M、1.4B）训练轨迹、Qwen3-8B和Llama-3.1-8B上测量两种KL，并比较其协议差距（replacement-interchange gap）。诊断仅需未标注的前向传播。
light_analysis.result: 在Pythia上，协议差距随训练增大。在8B模型上，Qwen3-8B的交换引导移除比替换引导安全得多（在相同层预算下），而Llama-3.1-8B的两种协议在剪枝成本上相当，尽管interchange KL更低。表明协议差距不直接映射到移除安全性，不同模型表现各异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了Transformer层冗余评估中的协议依赖性，并建议在层移除或合并前同时计算两种swap-KL作为诊断工具。该发现对模型压缩实践有重要指导意义，有助于避免因协议选择导致的错误剪枝。未来可探索协议差距的成因及其与模型架构、训练过程的关系。

title: Property-Guided LLM Program Synthesis for Planning
abstract: LLMs have shown impressive success in program synthesis, discovering programs that surpass prior solutions. However, these approaches rely on simple numeric scores to signal program quality, such as the value of the solution or the number of passed tests. Because a score offers no guidance on why a program failed, the system must generate and evaluate many candidates hoping some succeed, increasing LLM inference and evaluation costs. We study a different approach: property-guided LLM program synthesis. Instead of scoring programs after evaluation, we check whether a candidate satisfies a formally defined property. When the property is violated, we stop the evaluation early and provide the LLM with a concrete counterexample showing exactly how the program failed. This feedback drastically reduces both the number of program generations and the evaluation cost, and can guide the LLM to generate stronger programs. We evaluate this approach on PDDL planning domains, asking the LLM to synthesize direct heuristic functions: every state reachable by strictly improving transitions has a strictly improving successor. A heuristic with this property leads hill-climbing algorithm directly to a goal state. A counterexample-guided repair loop generates one candidate program, checks the property over a training set, and returns the first case that violates the property. We evaluate our approach on ten planning domains with an out-of-distribution test set. The synthesized heuristics are effectively direct on virtually all test tasks, and compared to the best prior generation method our approach generates seven times fewer programs per domain on average, solves more tasks without using search, and requires several orders of magnitude less computation to evaluate candidates. Whenever a problem admits a verifiable property, property-guided LLM synthesis can reduce cost and improve program quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出属性引导的LLM程序合成方法，通过违反属性时提供反例，显著降低生成与评估成本，并提高程序质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM程序合成依赖简单数值分数（如解值或通过测试数）指示质量，但分数无法解释失败原因，导致需生成大量候选程序尝试，增加LLM推理和评估成本。为解决这一效率低下问题，本文引入属性引导机制，利用形式化属性约束提供明确反馈，减少盲目搜索。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为属性引导的LLM程序合成：不进行事后评分，而是检查候选程序是否满足形式化定义的属性（如直接性）。若属性违反，提前终止评估并向LLM返回具体反例。在PDDL规划域中，要求合成直接启发式函数，确保爬山算法能直达目标。实现反例引导的修复循环：每轮生成一个候选程序，在训练集上检验属性，返回首个违反案例用于修正。
light_analysis.result: 在十个规划领域的外分布测试集上，合成启发式几乎对所有测试任务满足直接性。与最佳先前方法相比，平均每个领域生成程序数量减少7倍，更多任务无需搜索即可求解，且评估计算量降低数个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: 属性引导的LLM合成通过提供可验证的反例反馈，有效降低程序生成与评估成本，同时提升程序质量。该方法适用于任何具有可验证属性的人工智能问题，具有广泛的应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的属性定义或结合其他规划范式。

title: Imperfect World Models are Exploitable
abstract: We propose a novel definition of model exploitation in reinforcement learning. Informally, a world model is exploitable if it implies that one policy should be strictly preferred over another while the environment's true transition model implies the reverse. We analogize our definition with a prior characterization of reward hacking but show that the associated proof of inevitability does not transfer to exploitation. To overcome this obstruction, we develop a general theory of reward hacking and model exploitation that proves that exploitation is essentially unavoidable on large policy sets and yields the corresponding claim for hacking as a special case. Unfortunately, we also find that the conditions that guarantee unhackability in finite policy sets have no counterpart that precludes exploitation. Consequently, we introduce a relaxed notion of exploitation and derive a safe horizon within which it can be avoided. Taken together, our results establish a formal bridge between reward hacking and model exploitation and elucidate the limits of safe planning in world models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出强化学习中世界模型利用的形式化定义，证明其不可避免性，并引入松弛的安全视界。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于模型的强化学习中，世界模型可能不完美，导致代理利用模型缺陷获取虚假性能。现有工作主要关注奖励黑客，但模型利用现象未被充分研究。论文旨在形式化模型利用问题，揭示其与奖励黑客的关系，并探索避免利用的可行性。
light_analysis.method: 提出模型利用的形式化定义：当模型认为某策略优于另一策略，而真实环境反之。类比奖励黑客定义，但证明其不可避免性不直接适用。发展一般理论，证明在大型策略集上利用不可避免，并推导出有限策略集中防奖励黑客的条件无法防止利用。最后引入松弛利用概念，导出可避免利用的安全规划视界。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明表明，模型利用在大型策略集上本质不可避免，且防止奖励黑客的条件无法防止利用。通过松弛利用概念，推导出安全视界，在此视界内可避免利用。摘要未提供具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了奖励黑客与模型利用之间的形式化桥梁，阐明了基于世界模型的安全规划极限。理论结果有助于理解不完美模型的潜在风险，并为设计鲁棒的模型基强化学习算法提供指导。未来工作可能探索实际环境中安全视界的计算。

title: UAM: A Dual-Stream Perspective on Forgetting in VLA Training
abstract: Vision--language--action (VLA) models are typically built by fine-tuning a pretrained vision--language model (VLM) on action data. However, we show that this standard recipe systematically erodes the VLM's multimodal competence, a side effect we call the embodiment tax. But do VLAs have to forget? Inspired by the two-stream organization of biological vision, we trace this degradation to a structural bottleneck: current VLAs ask a single encoder to support both language-grounded semantics and control-relevant visual features, whereas biological vision separates recognition and visuomotor control into distinct pathways. Building on this view, we propose the Unified Action Model (UAM), which adds a parallel Dorsal Expert, an analog of the brain's dorsal pathway. To make the Dorsal Expert an effective second pathway and reduce the control-learning burden on the VLM, we initialize it from a pretrained generative model and train it with a mid-level reasoning objective that predicts visual dynamics. This design allows us to train the whole VLA end-to-end on action data alone: with no parameter freezing, no gradient stopping, and no auxiliary VL co-training, UAM retains over $95\%$ of the underlying VLM's multimodal capability and at the same time achieves the highest average success rate among baselines on a variety of manipulation tasks that probe out-of-distribution generalization, including unseen objects, novel object--target compositions, and instruction variation. Together, these results suggest that semantic preservation in VLAs can emerge from architectural separation itself, rather than being enforced by frozen weights or auxiliary data replay, and that this preserved semantic capability can naturally transfer from VLMs to semantic generalization in actions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UAM模型，通过双流架构避免VLA训练中VLM多模态能力退化。
