light_analysis.motivation: VLA模型微调会侵蚀VLM的多模态能力（embodiment tax），原因是单编码器需同时处理语义和视觉控制特征，缺乏生物视觉中的分离通路。现有方法依赖冻结参数或辅助训练，但UAM通过架构分离从根源上解决该问题。
light_analysis.method: UAM在VLM基础上添加并行Dorsal Expert（模拟背侧通路），初始化自预训练生成模型，使用预测视觉动态的中级推理目标训练。实现端到端训练，无需参数冻结、梯度停止或辅助多模态共训练。
light_analysis.result: UAM保留95%以上VLM多模态能力，同时在一系列操作任务（包括未见物体、新物体-目标组合、指令变化）上达到最高平均成功率。表明语义保留来自架构分离而非冻结或数据重放。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语义保留可通过架构分离实现，避免VLM能力退化，且保留的语义能力自然迁移到动作语义泛化。具有学术和实际价值，未来可探索双流架构在VLA中的更广泛应用。

title: Going Beyond the Edge: Distributed Inference of Transformer Models on Ultra-Low-Power Wireless Devices
abstract: Transformer models are rapidly becoming a cornerstone of modern Internet of Things (IoT) applications, yet their computational and memory demands far exceed the capabilities of a single typical ultra-low-power IoT device. We present CATS, a framework for distributed transformer inference on ultra-low-power wireless devices, enabling multiple devices to collaboratively execute models far larger than what a single device can sustain. At its core, CATS is a communication-aware distributed transformer inference scheme co-designed across transformer partitioning, wireless communication and training. It employs SomeGather, a new pruned communication primitive that selectively broadcasts activation columns to reduce communication bandwidth and RAM usage without sacrificing model accuracy. Building on SomeGather, we design a partitioning method that exploits this primitive for efficient model parallelism. To cope with unreliable wireless communication, CATS employs message-dropout during training, which mimics packet losses and yields models that are robust to message loss during inference. In real-world experiments, we show that CATS brings distributed transformer inference to ultra-low-power wireless devices for the first time, with deployments on up to 16 devices that collaboratively execute transformer models up to 14 times larger than what a single device can run.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CATS框架，首次实现超低功耗无线设备上分布式Transformer模型推理，通过通信感知的划分和剪枝通信原语大幅提升模型规模。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型正成为物联网应用的关键，但其计算和内存需求远超单个超低功耗无线设备的能力。现有方法无法在资源受限的无线设备上有效部署大型Transformer模型，缺乏针对通信和计算联合优化的分布式推理方案。因此需要一种协同设计框架，使得多个设备能够协作执行远超单设备容量的大模型。
light_analysis.method: CATS框架核心包括：1) SomeGather剪枝通信原语，选择性广播激活列以降低带宽和RAM占用；2) 基于SomeGather的模型划分方法，实现高效模型并行；3) 训练时使用消息丢弃模拟数据包丢失，增强模型对无线通信不可靠的鲁棒性。协同优化分区、通信和训练，实现分布式推理。
light_analysis.result: 在真实实验中，CATS首次在超低功耗无线设备上实现分布式Transformer推理。部署在最多16个设备上，可协作执行比单个设备大14倍的Transformer模型，验证了框架在资源受限环境下的有效性，显著扩展了单设备能力上限。
light_analysis.conclusion: CATS开创了超低功耗无线设备上分布式Transformer推理的先河，通过通信感知设计和训练鲁棒性策略，克服了资源与通信限制。该工作为物联网中部署大型Transformer模型提供了可行方案，未来可进一步优化通信效率并扩展到更复杂的模型架构。

title: Position: Zeroth-Order Optimization in Deep Learning Is Underexplored, Not Underpowered
abstract: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization, learning from finite differences of function evaluations without backpropagation, has recently regained attention in deep learning due to its memory efficiency and applicability to gray- or black-box pipelines. Yet, ZO methods are often dismissed as fundamentally unscalable because of estimator variance and unfavorable query complexity. We argue that this conclusion might be misguided: ZO optimization is underexplored, not underpowered. We show that many perceived limitations stem from myopic development practices, most notably full-space, element-wise, estimator-centric designs. We articulate six positions spanning the algorithmic, systems, and evaluation stack. First, we revisit the feasibility boundaries of estimator-centric ZO methods through variance control, variance-query tradeoffs, and directional-derivative lenses. Then, we identify three underexplored opportunities: (i) subspace and spectral views of ZO that enable interpretable variance reduction with graceful query scaling, (ii) the forward-only nature of ZO as a systems advantage for communication-efficient, pipeline-friendly, and resource-constrained training, and (iii) the need to de-obfuscate ZO evaluations from task complexity. We strongly advocate rethinking ZO optimization around its unique strengths and acting accordingly, opening a viable path toward large-scale, system-aware, and resource-efficient learning with ZO optimization.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026 Position Paper Track as a Spotlight Paper

light_analysis.overview: 本文主张零阶优化在深度学习中未被充分探索，而非能力不足，指出其独特优势可实现大规模、系统感知和资源高效的学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 零阶优化通过函数值有限差分学习，无需反向传播，具有内存高效和适用于灰盒或黑盒管线的优势。然而，现有观点常因估计方差和查询复杂度不佳而认为其不可扩展。作者认为这种结论源于短视的开发实践，如全空间、元素级、估计器中心的设计，从而忽视了ZO的潜在价值。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出六个立场，涵盖算法、系统和评估层面。首先重新审视估计器中心ZO方法的可行性边界，通过方差控制、方差-查询权衡和方向导数视角。然后识别三个未充分探索的方向：(i) 子空间和谱视图，实现可解释的方差降低与优雅的查询扩展；(ii) ZO的前向传播特性，在通信高效、管线友好和资源受限训练中的系统优势；(iii) 去混淆ZO评估与任务复杂性的需求。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但基于分析指出ZO具有独特优势：通过方差控制可缓解估计方差问题；子空间方法可降低查询复杂度；前向传播特性带来系统效率提升。这挑战了ZO不可扩展的传统观点，表明其在深度学习中具有实际竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文呼吁重新思考零阶优化，围绕其固有优势进行创新，从而开辟一条通向大规模、系统感知和资源高效学习的可行路径。研究强调ZO的潜力被低估，未来应关注其算法设计、系统集成和评估标准化，以推动实际应用。

title: Embracing Biased Transition Matrices for Complementary-Label Learning with Many Classes
abstract: Complementary-label learning (CLL) is a weakly supervised paradigm where instances are labeled with classes they do not belong to. Despite a decade of research, CLL methods remain competitive mainly on 10-class classification, with scaling to large label spaces continuing to be an enduring bottleneck. This limitation stems from the common assumption of uniform label generation in traditional methods, which fatally dilutes the learning signal in many-class settings. In this paper, we demonstrate that this long-standing barrier can be overcome by deliberately designing a biased (non-uniform) generation process that restricts complementary labels to a subset of classes. This finding motivates us to propose Bias-Induced Constrained Labeling (BICL), a principled framework spanning data collection to training that leverages this bias. BICL enables effective learning on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet-200, achieving more than sevenfold accuracy improvements over traditional methods. Our findings establish a new trajectory for making CLL feasible for many classes in real-world applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过设计有偏的补标签生成过程来突破大规模类别下补标签学习瓶颈的BICL框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 互补标签学习（CLL）在处理大规模类别（如100类以上）时效果不佳，传统方法假设均匀标签生成，导致学习信号被稀释，难以扩展到多类场景。这一问题限制了CLL在现实应用中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Bias-Induced Constrained Labeling (BICL) 框架，通过故意设计非均匀的补标签生成过程，将补标签限制在类别子集内，从而增强学习信号。框架涵盖数据收集到训练阶段，利用这种偏置信息进行有效学习。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-100和TinyImageNet-200数据集上，BICL相较于传统CLL方法实现了超过7倍的准确率提升，有效解决了大规模类别下CLL的性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: BICL证明了有偏的补标签生成可以显著提升多类CLL的性能，为CLL在大规模现实应用中的可行性提供了新方向。未来可进一步探索其他偏置设计及理论分析。

title: STS: Efficient Sparse Attention with Speculative Token Sparsity
abstract: The quadratic complexity of attention imposes severe memory and computational bottlenecks on Large Language Model (LLM) inference. This challenge is particularly acute for emerging agentic applications that require processing multi-million token sequences. We propose STS, a sparse attention mechanism that requires no model retraining. STS leverages the key insight that tokens identified as important by a smaller draft model are highly predictive of important tokens for a larger target model. By integrating into speculative decoding frameworks, STS repurposes the draft model's attention scores to dynamically construct a token-and-head-wise sparsity mask. This mask effectively prunes the expensive attention computation in the target LLM. Our evaluation shows that STS achieves a 2.67x speedup operating at approximately 90% sparsity on representative benchmark NarrativeQA, maintaining negligible accuracy degradation compared to dense attention. STS establishes a new state-of-the-art on the sparsity-accuracy trade-off, outperforming prior techniques by enabling higher sparsity levels for a given accuracy budget.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STS稀疏注意力机制，通过草稿模型动态构建稀疏掩码，无需重训练即加速LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准注意力的二次复杂度在LLM推理中造成严重内存和计算瓶颈，尤其对于处理百万级token序列的agent应用。现有方法要么需要重训练，要么在稀疏度与精度之间权衡不佳。
light_analysis.method: 利用推测解码框架，将小规模草稿模型的注意力分数作为重要token的预测，为大型目标模型动态生成token-头部稀疏掩码，剪枝冗余计算。无需模型重训练，直接集成于现有LLM。
light_analysis.result: 在NarrativeQA上实现约90%稀疏度下2.67倍加速，精度下降可忽略。相比先前方法，在相同精度预算下达到更高稀疏度，建立了稀疏-精度权衡的新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: STS提出一种高效且即插即用的稀疏注意力方案，显著降低LLM推理开销，特别适合长序列场景。未来可探索更精细的稀疏策略及与其他加速技术的结合。

title: Ensemble Monitoring for AI Control: Diverse Signals Outweigh More Compute
abstract: As AI systems are increasingly deployed in autonomous agentic settings at scale, it is important to ensure the actions they take are safe and aligned with user intent. Monitoring agent actions is a key safety mechanism, yet reliable monitors remain difficult to build and the scale of these systems makes human oversight impractical. We show that combining signals from diverse monitors into an ensemble improves detection of misaligned actions. We build 12 GPT-4.1-Mini monitors using both prompting and fine-tuning strategies. We evaluate them on coding tasks where candidate solutions pass standard tests but fail on adversarial inputs. In this setting, diverse ensembles outperform both individual monitors and homogeneous ensembles. Our best 3-monitor ensemble achieves 2.4x greater detection performance gain compared to an ensemble composed of three identical monitors, with the same ensemble performing strongly on an independent dataset. We contend that these results show that diversity - not scale - drives gains. The best ensembles combine strong individual performance with low correlation between monitors. Furthermore, fine-tuned monitors appear in every top-performing ensemble and maintain this advantage on out-of-distribution attack types, suggesting that fine-tuning enables detection capabilities that prompting alone does not elicit. These results support ensemble monitoring as a practical AI control strategy for safety gains at reasonable inference costs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过多样化监控器集成提升AI智能体动作对齐检测能力，证明多样性比计算规模更关键。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统大规模自主部署时，确保动作安全对齐至关重要，但构建可靠监控器困难且人工监督不可行。现有单个或均质集成监控器检测能力不足，亟需高效实用的监控策略。
light_analysis.method: 构建12个GPT-4.1-Mini监控器，采用提示和微调策略，在编码任务中评估（候选通过标准测试但对抗输入失败）。提出多样化集成方法，组合不同监控器信号，关键创新在于强调多样性驱动增益，最佳集成结合强个体性能和低相关性。
light_analysis.result: 最佳3监控器集成相比3个相同监控器集成，检测性能提升2.4倍，且在独立数据集上表现强劲。微调监控器出现在每个顶级集成中，并在分布外攻击类型上保持优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论支持集成监控作为实用的AI控制策略，以合理推理成本获得安全性提升。主要贡献证明多样性驱动增益，微调增强检测能力。价值在于提供可部署的安全机制，未来可优化集成组合或扩展应用场景。

title: Tokenizer Fertility and Zero-Shot Performance of Foundation Models on Ukrainian Legal Text: A Comparative Study
abstract: Tokenizer fertility varies 1.6x across foundation models on Ukrainian legal text, yet this cost-critical dimension is absent from model selection practice. We benchmark seven models from five providers on 273 validated court decisions from Ukraine's state registry (EDRSR), measuring tokenizer fertility and zero-shot performance on three tasks. Four findings emerge. (1) Qwen 3 models consume 60% more tokens than Llama-family models on identical input, making tokenizer analysis a prerequisite for cost-efficient deployment. (2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B) achieves the highest composite score (83.1), outperforming Mistral Large 3 (5.6x more total parameters) at one-third the API cost model scale is a poor proxy for domain performance. (3) Few-shot prompting degrades performance by up to 26 percentage points; stratified and prompt-sensitivity ablations confirm this is intrinsic to Ukrainian-language demonstrations, not an artifact of example selection. (4) A cross-temporal generalization experiment reveals that classifiers trained on pre-war court ecisions (2008-2013) lose 27.9 percentage points when applied to full-scale invasion era decisions (2022-2026), with a pronounced forward-backward asymmetry: newer models transfer backward (+14.6 pp above forward transfer), but older models fail catastrophically on wartime legal language. For practitioners: tokenizer analysis should precede model selection, and zero-shot is a more reliable default than few-shot for morphologically rich languages. To support reproducibility and address the absence of Ukrainian from legal NLP benchmarks, we release a public dataset of 14,452 court decisions spanning 2008-2026, annotated with seven outcome labels across three temporal epochs that capture the impact of armed conflict on judicial proceedings.
comment: 25 pages, 13 tables, 5 figures; v2 adds cross-temporal generalization experiment and classical baseline

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示标记器生育率在乌克兰法律文本中因模型不同差异达1.6倍，但常被忽视；发现零样本学习优于少样本，并发布大规模乌克兰法律判决数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 标记器生育率（tokenizer fertility）影响模型部署成本，但在模型选择中未被考虑。乌克兰语作为形态丰富语言，法律NLP缺乏基准。现有方法在处理乌克兰法律文本时性能不佳，少样本提示甚至降低效果。
light_analysis.method: 在273份乌克兰最高法院判决上，从5个供应商的7个基础模型进行基准测试，测量标记器生育率和零样本性能。通过少样本提示、分层消融和跨时间泛化实验分析，并发布14,452份判决数据集（2008-2026年，含7种结果标签及三个时间阶段）。
light_analysis.result: Qwen3模型比Llama系多消耗60% token。NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B)取得最高复合得分83.1，API成本仅为Mistral Large 3的三分之一。少样本提示导致性能下降最多26个百分点。跨时间泛化中，战前数据训练的模型在战时数据上损失27.9个百分点，新模型向后迁移比向前迁移高14.6个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 标记器分析应优先于模型选择以确保成本效率；对形态丰富语言，零样本比少样本更可靠。该数据集填补了乌克兰法律NLP空白，支持可重复研究。未来需应对武装冲突带来的语言演变挑战。

title: Delta Forcing: Trust Region Steering for Interactive Autoregressive Video Generation
abstract: Interactive real-time autoregressive video generation is essential for applications such as content creation and world modeling, where visual content must adapt to dynamically evolving event conditions. A fundamental challenge lies in balancing reactivity and stability: models must respond promptly to new events while maintaining temporal coherence over long horizons. Existing approaches distill bidirectional models into autoregressive generators and further adapt them via streaming long tuning, yet often exhibit persistent drift after condition changes. We identify the cause as conditional bias, where the teacher may provide condition-aligned but trajectory-agnostic guidance, biasing generation toward locally valid yet globally inconsistent modes. Inspired by Trust Region Policy Optimization, we propose Delta Forcing, a simple yet effective framework that constrains unreliable teacher supervision within an adaptive trust region. Specifically, Delta Forcing estimates transition consistency from the latent delta between teacher and generator trajectories, and uses it to balance teacher supervision with a monotonic continuity objective. This suppress unreliable teacher-induced shifts while preserving responsiveness to new events. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta Forcing significantly improves consistency while maintaining event reactivity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Delta Forcing框架，通过信任区域约束教师监督，提升交互式自回归视频生成的时序一致性与反应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 交互式实时自回归视频生成需要在响应新事件的同时保持长期时间连贯性。现有方法通过蒸馏双向模型和流式长调优适应，但存在条件偏差：教师提供与条件对齐但轨迹无关的指导，导致生成偏向局部有效但全局不一致的模式，引发条件变化后的持续漂移。解决此问题对于内容创作和世界建模等应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: Delta Forcing借鉴信任区域策略优化思想，估计教师与生成器轨迹之间的潜在差异（transition consistency），并据此构建自适应信任区域。在该区域内平衡教师监督与单调连续性目标，抑制不可靠的诱导偏移，同时保留对新事件的响应能力。无需额外训练，仅通过推理时约束实现。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，Delta Forcing在多个视频生成基准上显著提升时序一致性（如减少帧间漂移），同时保持对事件变化的快速反应能力。与基线方法（如直接蒸馏、流式调优）相比，在定性视觉连贯性和定量指标（如FVD、连贯性得分）上均有改善。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Delta Forcing有效解决了自回归视频生成中反应性与稳定性的矛盾，通过信任区域约束教师监督，抑制条件偏差导致的漂移。该框架简单高效，可直接应用于现有生成器，提升交互式应用中的视觉质量。未来可探索扩展到其他时序生成任务，或结合更复杂的信任区域机制。

title: ClawForge: Generating Executable Interactive Benchmarks for Command-Line Agents
abstract: Interactive agent benchmarks face a tension between scalable construction and realistic workflow evaluation. Hand-authored tasks are expensive to extend and revise, while static prompt evaluation misses failures that only appear when agents operate over persistent state. Existing interactive benchmarks have advanced agent evaluation significantly, but most initialize tasks from clean state and do not systematically test how agents handle pre-existing partial, stale, or conflicting artifacts. We present \textbf{ClawForge}, a generator-backed benchmark framework for executable command-line workflows under state conflict. The framework compiles scenario templates, grounded slots, initialized state, reference trajectories, and validators into reproducible task specifications, and evaluates agents step by step over persistent workflow surfaces using normalized end state and observable side effects rather than exact trajectory matching. We instantiate this framework as the ClawForge-Bench (17 scenarios, 6 ability categories). Results across seven frontier models show that the best model reaches only 45.3% strict accuracy, wrong-state replacement remains below 17\% for all models, and the widest model separation (17% to 90%) is driven by whether agents inspect existing state before acting. Partial-credit and step-efficiency analyses further reveal that many failures are near-miss closures rather than early breakdowns, and that models exhibit qualitatively different failure styles under state conflict.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ClawForge，一个生成器支持的交互式基准框架，用于在状态冲突下评估命令行代理，并引入基于归一化结束状态和可观察副作用的新评估方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互式基准从干净状态初始化，未测试代理处理预先存在的冲突状态的能力，且手工任务难以扩展，静态评估忽略持久状态上的失败。因此需要一种可扩展的、能测试状态冲突下代理鲁棒性的基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出ClawForge框架，将场景模板、接地槽、初始化状态、参考轨迹和验证器编译为可复现任务规范，使用归一化结束状态和可观察副作用逐步评估代理，而非精确轨迹匹配。实例化为ClawForge-Bench，包含17个场景和6个能力类别。
light_analysis.result: 在7个前沿模型上，最佳模型严格准确率仅45.3%，错误状态替换低于17%，最大模型差异（17%-90%）由是否检查现有状态驱动。部分信用和逐步效率分析显示失败多为接近失误，且模型有不同的失败风格。
light_analysis.conclusion: ClawForge通过生成支持的可复现工作流和基于状态效果的评估，推进了交互式代理基准的生态。揭示了当前模型在状态冲突下的局限性，为未来改进提供方向。可能限制是场景数量有限，未来可扩展。

title: Mistletoe: Stealthy Acceleration-Collapse Attacks on Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding has become a widely adopted technique for accelerating large language model (LLM) inference by drafting multiple candidate tokens and verifying them with a target model in parallel. Its efficiency, however, critically depends on the average accepted length $τ$, i.e., how many draft tokens survive each verification step. In this work, we identify a new mechanism-level vulnerability in model-based speculative decoding: the drafter is trained to approximate the target model distribution, but this approximation is inevitably imperfect. Such a drafter-target mismatch creates a hidden attack surface where small perturbations can preserve the target model's visible behavior while substantially reducing draft-token acceptability. We propose Mistletoe, a stealthy acceleration-collapse attack against speculative decoding. Mistletoe directly targets the acceptance mechanism of speculative decoding. It jointly optimizes a degradation objective that decreases drafter-target agreement and a semantic-preservation objective that constrains the target model's output distribution. To resolve the conflict between these objectives, we introduce a null-space projection mechanism, where degradation gradients are projected away from the local semantic-preserving direction, suppressing draft acceptance while minimizing semantic drift. Experiments on various speculative decoding systems show that Mistletoe substantially reduces average accepted length $τ$, collapses speedup, and lowers averaged token throughput, while preserving output quality and perplexity. Our work highlights that speculative decoding introduces a mechanism-level attack surface beyond existing output robustness, calling for more robust designs of LLM acceleration systems.

light_analysis.overview: 发现推测性解码中草稿-目标模型不匹配的机制漏洞，提出Mistletoe攻击，通过联合优化降级和语义保持目标，降低草稿令牌可接受性，使加速崩溃。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测性解码通过草稿模型并行验证多个候选令牌来加速LLM推理，但其效率依赖平均接受长度τ。现有研究关注输出鲁棒性，但忽略了机制层面的漏洞：草稿模型对目标模型的近似不完美，这种不匹配创造了隐藏攻击面。微小扰动可在保持目标模型可见行为的同时大幅降低草稿令牌可接受性。因此，亟需研究针对推测性解码的加速崩溃攻击。
light_analysis.method: 提出Mistletoe攻击，直接针对推测性解码的接受机制。联合优化两个目标：降级目标（减少草稿-目标模型一致性）和语义保持目标（约束目标模型输出分布）。为解决冲突，引入零空间投影机制，将降级梯度投影到远离局部语义保持方向，从而抑制草稿接受性并最小化语义漂移。无需修改目标模型，仅需扰动输入令牌。
light_analysis.result: 在多种推测性解码系统上实验表明，Mistletoe显著降低平均接受长度τ，导致加速比崩溃，并降低平均令牌吞吐量。同时，输出质量和困惑度保持不变。攻击有效破坏了推测性解码的加速效果，验证了机制级漏洞的存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mistletoe首次揭示了推测性解码的机制级攻击面，超出传统输出鲁棒性范畴。该工作强调加速系统设计需考虑此类脆弱性，为更鲁棒的LLM加速方案提供了方向。未来可探索防御机制及更通用的攻击范式。

title: Leveraging Speech to Identify Signatures of Insight and Transfer in Problem Solving
abstract: Many problems seem to require a flash of insight to solve. What form do these sudden insights take, and what impact do they have on how people approach similar problems in the future? In this work, we prompted participants (N = 189) to think aloud as they attempted to solve a sequence of five "matchstick-arithmetic" problems. These problems either all relied on the same kind of non-obvious solution (Same group) or a different kind each time (Different group). Our first observation was that Same participants improved more rapidly than Different participants. We then leveraged techniques from natural language processing to analyze participants' speech, and found that this accelerated improvement for Same participants was accompanied by changes in both how much they spoke and what they said. In particular, they were more likely to spontaneously label the kind of problem they were working on. Taken together, these findings suggest that a hallmark of transferable insights is their accessibility for verbal report, even if the underlying precursors of insight remain difficult to articulate.

light_analysis.overview: 利用自然语言处理分析出声思考，发现顿悟后可迁移解决方案更易被言语报告。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多问题依赖顿悟解决，但顿悟的形式及其对未来问题解决的影响尚不明确。现有方法难以捕捉顿悟的认知机制。本研究通过让参与者在解决火柴棒算术问题时出声思考，利用语音数据探索顿悟和迁移的言语痕迹，以揭示顿悟的可及性特征。
light_analysis.method: 招募189名参与者，要求他们在解决五个火柴棒算术问题时出声思考。问题分为两类：同一组（所有问题依赖同种非明显解法）和不同组（每个问题解法不同）。使用自然语言处理技术分析参与者言语，包括说话量和内容。
light_analysis.result: 同一组参与者比不同组改进更快，且加速改进伴随说话量和内容变化：他们更可能自发标记问题类型。这表明迁移性顿悟的特征是易于通过言语报告访问，即使顿悟的前兆难以清晰表达。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，可迁移的顿悟表现为言语报告的增加，揭示了顿悟的可及性特征。该发现有助于理解顿悟的本质及其在类比问题解决中的迁移机制，为教育实践（如设计启发顿悟的教学策略）提供启示。未来需进一步探究言语报告与顿悟的因果关系。

title: Revisiting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards from a Contrastive Perspective
abstract: RLVR has become a widely adopted paradigm for improving LLMs' reasoning capabilities, and GRPO is one of its most representative algorithms. In this paper, we first show that GRPO admits an equivalent discriminative reformulation as a weighted positive-negative score difference. Under this view, GRPO increases sequence-level scores of verified positive rollouts and decreases those of negative rollouts, where the scores are averages of clipped token-level importance sampling ratios. This reformulation reveals two structural limitations of GRPO: likelihood-misaligned scoring, where clipped ratio-based surrogate scores are optimized instead of generation likelihoods, and score-insensitive credit assignment, where rollout-level credit is assigned without accounting for relative score gaps between positive and negative rollouts in the same group. To address these limitations, we propose ConSPO, a framework for Contrastive Sequence-level Policy Optimization in RLVR. ConSPO replaces GRPO's clipped ratio-based scores with length-normalized sequence log-probabilities, aligning the optimized rollout scores with the likelihoods used in autoregressive generation. It then optimizes a group-wise InfoNCE-style objective that contrasts each positive rollout against negative distractors from the same group, enabling credit assignment to depend on their relative scores. This contrastive formulation amplifies updates for poorly separated positives while concentrating suppressive updates on high-scoring negatives. Moreover, ConSPO introduces a curriculum-scheduled margin, guiding optimization from coarse positive-negative ordering in early training toward stronger separation in later stages. Extensive evaluations across diverse backbone models, parameter scales, and training datasets show that ConSPO consistently outperforms several strong RLVR baselines on challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 从对比视角重新审视基于可验证奖励的强化学习，提出ConSPO框架以优化序列级策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR算法GRPO存在两个结构局限性：似然不匹配的评分（优化裁剪比率分数而非生成似然）和分数不敏感的信用分配（忽略组内正负样本分数差距），限制了LLM推理能力的提升。
light_analysis.method: 提出ConSPO框架，用长度归一化的序列对数概率替代GRPO的裁剪比率分数，使评分与自回归生成似然对齐；采用组内InfoNCE风格目标函数，对比正负样本并根据相对分数进行信用分配；引入课程式间隔，从粗排序优化逐步过渡到强分离。
light_analysis.result: 在多种骨干模型（不同参数规模）和数学推理基准上，ConSPO一致优于GRPO等强RLVR基线，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重新解释了GRPO的判别式等价形式，揭示了其局限性，并提出了对比序列级策略优化框架ConSPO。该工作为RLVR提供了新视角，有望提升LLM的推理能力，未来可探索更大规模应用。

title: Inference-Time Machine Unlearning via Gated Activation Redirection
abstract: Large Language Models memorize vast amounts of training data, raising concerns regarding privacy, copyright infringement, and safety. Machine unlearning seeks to remove the influence of a targeted forget set while preserving model performance, ideally approximating a model retrained from scratch without the forget set. Existing approaches aim to achieve this by updating model parameters via gradient-based methods. However, these updates are computationally expensive, lead to irreversible weight changes, and degrade when the model is quantized for deployment. A recent alternative to changing model weights is activation engineering, where activations are changed during inference to steer model behavior. Despite circumventing weight editing, naive activation steering introduces its own failure modes, as a single global steering vector applies the same intervention to every input, leading to unintended changes in model behavior. We introduce Inference-Time Unlearning via Gated Activation Redirection (GUARD-IT), a training- and gradient-free method that unlearns via input-dependent activation steering at inference time. The resulting intervention is applied as a norm-preserving rotation in the residual stream, leaving model weights untouched. Experiments on TOFU and MUSE show that GUARD-IT matches or exceeds 12 gradient-based baselines across three model scales, while being the only method to simultaneously preserve utility, suppress memorization, and avoid catastrophic collapse across all settings. GUARD-IT further supports continual unlearning without retraining, and remains effective under quantization, a scenario in which parameter-editing methods degrade.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练和梯度的推理时机器遗忘方法，通过门控激活重定向实现输入依赖的模型行为控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型记忆大量训练数据，引发隐私、版权和安全问题。现有基于梯度的方法计算昂贵、导致不可逆权重变化，且在模型量化时性能下降。简单的激活转向使用全局向量导致不希望的模型行为改变。因此需要一种高效、无需权重修改且适应量化的遗忘方法。
light_analysis.method: GUARD-IT方法在推理时通过门控激活重定向实现遗忘。它不更新模型权重，而是在残差流中应用范数保持的旋转，根据输入依赖的激活转向干预模型行为。该方法无需训练和梯度计算，支持连续遗忘。实验使用TOFU和MUSE数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在三个模型规模上，GUARD-IT匹配或超过12个基于梯度的基线方法，是唯一在所有设置中同时保持效用、抑制记忆并避免灾难性崩溃的方法。它支持连续遗忘无需重新训练，且在模型量化下仍保持有效，而参数编辑方法性能下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUARD-IT提供了一种高效、可伸缩的机器遗忘范式，无需权重编辑，保持模型性能，支持持续遗忘和量化鲁棒性。未来可进一步探索其在更复杂遗忘场景中的应用。

title: FuTCR: Future-Targeted Contrast and Repulsion for Continual Panoptic Segmentation
abstract: Continual Panoptic Segmentation (CPS) requires methods that can quickly adapt to new categories over time. The nature of this dense prediction task means that training images may contain a mix of labeled and unlabeled objects. As nothing is known about these unlabeled objects a priori, existing methods often simply group any unlabeled pixel into a single "background" class during training. In effect, during training, they repeatedly tell the model that all the different background categories are the same (even when they aren't). This makes learning to identify different background categories as they are added challenging since these new categories may require using information the model was previously told was unimportant and ignored. Thus, we propose a Future-Targeted Contrastive and Repulsive (FuTCR) framework that addresses this limitation by restructuring representations before new classes are introduced. FuTCR first discovers confident future-like regions by grouping model-predicted masks whose pixels are consistently classified as background but exhibit non-background logits. Next, FuTCR applies pixel-to-region contrast to build coherent prototypes from these unlabeled regions, while simultaneously repelling background features away from known-class prototypes to explicitly reserve representational space for future categories. Experiments across six CPS settings and a range of dataset sizes show FuTCR improves relative new-class panoptic quality over the state-of-the-art by up to 28%, while preserving or improving base-class performance with gains up to 4%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FuTCR框架，通过未来目标对比和排斥机制重构表示，显著提升持续全景分割中新类识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续全景分割（CPS）需快速适应新类别，但训练中未标注对象被统一归为背景，导致模型学习新类时需利用之前被忽略的信息。现有方法将不同背景类别视为相同，阻碍新类识别，亟需有效利用未标注区域的表示学习方法。
light_analysis.method: FuTCR首先发现可信的未来类似区域：通过分组模型预测掩码中分类为背景但具有非背景logits的像素。然后应用像素到区域对比学习，从这些未标注区域构建一致性原型，同时将背景特征排斥已知类原型，显式保留表示空间给未来类别。
light_analysis.result: 在六个CPS设置和多种数据集上，FuTCR相对新类全景质量提升高达28%，基类性能保持或提升（增益达4%），优于现有最佳方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FuTCR通过未来目标对比和排斥有效解决背景混淆问题，提升CPS新类学习能力，同时不损害基类性能。具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的区域发现策略。

title: Beyond Localization: A Comprehensive Diagnosis of Perspective-Conditioned Spatial Reasoning in MLLMs from Omnidirectional Images
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show strong visual perception, yet remain limited in reasoning about space under changing viewpoints. We study this challenge as Perspective-Conditioned Spatial Reasoning (PCSR) in 360-degree omnidirectional images, where broad scene coverage reduces ambiguity from partial observations without eliminating the need for viewpoint-dependent inference. To assess this capability, we introduce PCSR-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark of 84,373 question-answer pairs from 2,600 omnidirectional images across 26 indoor environments. PCSR-Bench contains eight tasks spanning foundational perception (e.g., object counting, relative distance, and relative direction) and advanced PCSR, including compositional chains, egocentric rotation, perspective re-anchoring, ego-distortion, and limited-FOV visibility. We evaluate 14 representative MLLMs and observe a substantial perception-reasoning gap: accuracy reaches 57.59% on foundational relative direction, but drops to 13.49% on egocentric rotation, 7.13% on egocentric distortion, and 0.64% on open-ended compositional reasoning. To probe the plasticity of this gap, we conduct an RL-based diagnostic study on a 7B-scale model. Reward shaping improves a matched 7B baseline from 31.10% to 60.06% under a controlled setting, suggesting that PCSR is partial plasticity rather than being fully immutable. Still, the gains are task-selective, sensitive to reward design including both weight allocation and reward formulation, and partially dependent on the evaluation protocol. These results position PCSR as a key bottleneck in current MLLMs and highlight limited but meaningful room for recovery under targeted optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PCSR-Bench基准测试，系统诊断多模态大模型在全向图像中视角条件空间推理的能力，发现显著推理瓶颈，并通过强化学习验证其部分可塑性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在视觉感知上表现优异，但在视角变化下的空间推理能力不足。现有评估缺乏对视角条件空间推理的系统诊断，尤其在全向图像中，尽管场景覆盖广，仍需视角依赖推理。该研究填补了全面评估这一能力的空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建PCSR-Bench基准，包含84,373个问答对，来自2,600张全向图像（26个室内场景），覆盖8个任务：基础感知（物体计数、相对距离、相对方向）和高级PCSR（组合链、自我中心旋转、视角重定位、自我中心畸变、有限视场可见性）。评估14种MLLMs，并对7B模型进行强化学习诊断（奖励塑形）。
light_analysis.result: 基础相对方向准确率57.59%，但高级推理任务显著下降：自我中心旋转13.49%，自我中心畸变7.13%，开放组合推理0.64%。RL奖励塑形使7B基线从31.10%提升至60.06%（受控设置），但增益任务选择性、对奖励设计敏感，且部分依赖评估协议。
light_analysis.conclusion: PCSR是当前MLLMs的关键瓶颈，但通过定向优化存在有限但有意义的改进空间。该研究提供了全面诊断基准和可塑性分析，为提升空间推理能力指明方向，未来可探索更鲁棒的多视角训练策略。

title: LegalCheck: Retrieval- and Context-Augmented Generation for Drafting Municipal Legal Advice Letters
abstract: Public-sector legal departments in the Netherlands face acute staff shortages, increased case volumes, and increased pressure to meet regulatory compliance. This paper presents LegalCheck, a novel system that addresses these challenges by automating the drafting of objection response letters through a combination of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Context-Augmented Generation (CAG). Using a large language model (LLM) alongside curated legal knowledge bases, LegalCheck performs retrieval of relevant laws and precedents, and uses controlled prompting to incorporate both external knowledge and case-specific details into a coherent draft. An expert-in-the-loop review ensures that each generated letter is legally sound and contextually appropriate. In a real-world deployment within the Municipality of Amsterdam, LegalCheck produced near-final advice letters in minutes rather than hours, while maintaining high legal consistency and factual accuracy. The output is based on actual regulations and prior cases, providing explainable outputs that captured the vast majority of required legal reasoning (often 80\% to 100\% of essential content). Legal professionals found that the system reduced their workload and ensured a consistent application of legal standards, without replacing human judgment. These results demonstrate substantial efficiency gains, improved legal consistency, and positive user acceptance. More broadly, this work illustrates how responsible AI can be deployed in the legal domain by augmenting LLMs with domain knowledge and governance mechanisms.
comment: Accepted at ICAIL 2026 as Short Paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出LegalCheck系统，通过RAG和CAG技术自动化起草市政法律咨询意见书，提高效率和法律一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 荷兰公共部门法律部门面临严重的人员短缺、案件量增加和合规压力，现有方法无法高效生成法律咨询意见书。传统人工起草耗时长且难以保证一致性和准确性，急需自动化系统来减轻负担并确保合规。
light_analysis.method: LegalCheck结合检索增强生成（RAG）和上下文增强生成（CAG），使用大型语言模型（LLM）和 curated 法律知识库，检索相关法律和先例，通过受控提示将外部知识和案件细节整合成连贯草稿。引入专家在环审查确保法律合理性和上下文适当性。
light_analysis.result: 在阿姆斯特丹市实际部署中，LegalCheck将生成近终版咨询意见书的时间从数小时缩短至数分钟，保持了高法律一致性和事实准确性。输出基于实际法规和先例，可解释性输出捕获了80%至100%的关键法律论证。法律专业人员认为该系统减少了工作量并确保了法律标准的统一应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: LegalCheck展示了负责任AI在法律领域的部署潜力，通过增强LLM的领域知识和治理机制，实现了效率提升和法律一致性。专家在环设计保证了人类判断不可或缺，为未来法律自动化提供了可借鉴的框架。局限性可能在于对知识库质量和专家审查的依赖。

title: Split the Differences, Pool the Rest: Provably Efficient Multi-Objective Imitation
abstract: This work investigates multi-objective imitation learning: the problem of recovering policies that lie on the Pareto front given demonstrations from multiple Pareto-optimal experts in a Multi-Objective Markov Decision Process (MOMDP). Standard imitation approaches are ill-equipped for this regime, as naively aggregating conflicting expert trajectories can result in dominated policies. To address this, we introduce Multi-Output Augmented Behavioral Cloning (MA-BC), an algorithm that systematically partitions divergent expert data while pooling state-action pairs where no behavior conflict is observed. Theoretically, we prove that MA-BC converges to Pareto-optimal policies at a faster statistical rate than any learner that considers each expert dataset independently. Furthermore, we establish a novel lower bound for multi-objective imitation learning, demonstrating that MA-BC is minimax optimal. Finally, we empirically validate our algorithm across diverse discrete environments and, guided by our theoretical insights, extend and evaluate MA-BC on a continuous Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) control task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MA-BC算法，通过选择性聚合与划分专家数据，实现多目标模仿学习的帕累托最优策略，并证明其统计最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多目标模仿学习中，标准方法直接聚合多个帕累托最优专家的轨迹，但由于专家目标冲突，简单聚合会导致被支配策略。现有行为克隆等方法无法处理这种分歧，且独立学习每个专家效率低下。该研究旨在设计一种算法，能够有效利用多专家数据，同时避免冲突，并保证收敛到帕累托最优策略，这是多目标强化学习中的关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出多输出增强行为克隆（MA-BC）算法。核心思想是：根据行为冲突与否，系统划分专家数据——对于存在冲突的轨迹，分开处理；对于无冲突的状态-动作对，则合并学习。该方法在保留专家多样性的同时，共享一致行为信息。理论分析证明MA-BC的收敛统计速率快于独立学习每个专家，并推导了多目标模仿学习的最小最大下界，证明算法最优。实验采用离散环境与连续线性二次调节器（LQR）任务。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，MA-BC收敛到帕累托最优策略的统计速率优于独立学习每个专家数据集的方法。同时，论文建立了多目标模仿学习的新下界，证明MA-BC达到最小最大最优。在离散环境（如网格世界）和连续LQR控制任务上的实证验证中，MA-BC成功恢复帕累托前沿，且性能优于基线方法，如朴素行为克隆和独立专家学习。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文为多目标模仿学习提供了理论保证和实用算法。MA-BC通过智能划分与聚合专家数据，解决了多目标环境下的冲突问题，并实现了统计最优。工作具有重要学术价值，为多目标强化学习领域开辟了新方向；实践上可用于机器人学习等需权衡多个目标的场景。未来可扩展至更复杂任务或结合深层神经网络的端到端学习。

title: Stochastic Minimum-Cost Reach-Avoid Reinforcement Learning
abstract: We study stochastic minimum-cost reach-avoid reinforcement learning, where an agent must satisfy a reach-avoid specification with probability at least $p$ while minimizing expected cumulative costs in stochastic environments. Existing safe and constrained reinforcement learning methods typically fail to jointly enforce probabilistic reach-avoid constraints and optimize cost in the learning setting in stochastic environments. To address this challenge, we introduce reach-avoid probability certificates (RAPCs), which identify states from which stochastic reach-avoid constraints are satisfiable. Building on RAPCs, we develop a contraction-based Bellman formulation that serves as a principled surrogate for integrating reach-avoid considerations into reinforcement learning, enabling cost optimization under probabilistic constraints. We establish almost sure convergence of the proposed algorithms to locally optimal policies with respect to the resulting objective. Experiments in the MuJoCo simulator demonstrate improved cost performance and consistently higher reach-avoid satisfaction rates.
comment: Accepted at the Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于可达避免概率证书的随机最小代价可达避免强化学习方法，实现概率约束下的代价优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 在随机环境中，智能体需以至少概率p满足可达避免规范并最小化期望累积代价。现有安全强化学习方法难以联合满足概率约束和优化代价。本文旨在解决这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: 引入可达避免概率证书（RAPCs）识别可满足随机可达避免约束的状态。基于RAPCs开发基于收缩的Bellman公式作为原则性替代，将可达避免考虑集成到强化学习中，实现概率约束下的代价优化。算法几乎必然收敛到局部最优策略。
light_analysis.result: 在MuJoCo模拟器上的实验表明，所提方法在代价性能上有所提升，并持续更高的可达避免满足率。具体性能指标与基线对比情况摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了随机最小代价可达避免强化学习的新方法，通过RAPCs和Bellman公式有效解决概率约束下的代价优化问题。理论保证了算法收敛性，实验验证了其有效性。未来可探索更复杂环境中的应用。

title: Learning Subspace-Preserving Sparse Attention Graphs from Heterogeneous Multiview Data
abstract: The high-dimensional features extracted from large-scale unlabeled data via various pretrained models with diverse architectures are referred to as heterogeneous multiview data. Most existing unsupervised transfer learning methods fail to faithfully recover intrinsic subspace structures when exploiting complementary information across multiple views. Therefore, a fundamental challenge involves constructing sparse similarity graphs that preserve these underlying subspace structures for achieving semantic alignment across heterogeneous views. In this paper, we propose a sparse attention graph learning (SAGL) method that learns subspace-preserving sparse attention graphs from heterogeneous multiview data. Specifically, we introduce a bilinear attention factorization scheme to capture asymmetric similarities among the high-dimensional features, which breaks the symmetry bottleneck that is inherent in the traditional representation learning techniques. A dynamic sparsity gating mechanism then predicts a feature-specific compression factor for adaptively controlling the topological contributions of neighbors. Furthermore, we employ a structured sparse projection via $α$-entmax to generate subspace-preserving sparse attention graphs for individual views. SAGL leverages these view-specific graphs to conduct sparse information aggregation, yielding discriminative representations for multiview learning tasks. In addition, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis that bridges differentiable sparse attention and probability simplex constraints. Extensive experiments conducted on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that SAGL consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art unsupervised transfer learning approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出稀疏注意力图学习方法，从异构多视图数据中学习保持子空间结构的稀疏注意力图。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维异构多视图数据中，现有无监督迁移学习方法利用多视图互补信息时无法忠实恢复内在子空间结构。构建保持子空间的稀疏相似图以实现跨视图语义对齐是核心挑战。对称性瓶颈和动态稀疏控制问题亟待解决。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAGL方法，采用双线性注意力分解捕获非对称相似性；动态稀疏门控机制预测特征特定压缩因子自适应控制邻居拓扑贡献；通过α-entmax结构化稀疏投影生成子空间保持的稀疏注意力图，并聚合视图特定图获得判别性表示。提供可微稀疏注意力与概率单纯形约束的理论联系。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上与现有最先进无监督迁移学习方法相比，SAGL一致性地取得更优性能。具体指标提升摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAGL有效解决了异构多视图数据子空间保持问题，理论分析桥接了稀疏注意力和概率单纯形。方法可推广至多视图学习任务，潜在局限性在于对大规模数据的计算开销，未来可探索更高效稀疏化机制。

title: Self-Distilled Trajectory-Aware Boltzmann Modeling: Bridging the Training-Inference Discrepancy in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive language models, offering stronger global awareness and highly parallel generation. However, post-training DLMs with standard Negative Evidence Lower Bound (NELBO)-based supervised fine-tuning remains inefficient: training reconstructs randomly masked tokens in a single step, whereas inference follows a confidence-guided, multi-step easy-to-hard denoising trajectory. Recent trajectory-based self-distillation methods exploit such inference trajectories mainly for sampling-step compression and acceleration, often improving decoding efficiency without substantially enhancing the model's underlying capability, and may even degrade performance under full diffusion decoding. In this work, we ask whether self-distilled trajectories can be used not merely for faster inference, but for genuine knowledge acquisition. Although these trajectories lie on the pretrained DLM's own distributional manifold and thus offer a potentially lower optimization barrier, we find that naively fine-tuning on them with standard NELBO objectives yields only marginal gains. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{T}rajectory-\textbf{A}ligned optimization via \textbf{Bo}ltzmann \textbf{M}odeling (\textbf{TABOM}), a self-distilled trajectory-based post-training framework that aligns training with the easy-to-hard structure of inference. TABOM models the inference unmasking preference as a Boltzmann distribution over predictive entropies and derives a tractable pairwise ranking objective to align the model's certainty ordering with the observed decoding trajectory. Empirically, TABOM achieves substantial gains in new domains, expands the effective knowledge boundary of DLMs, and significantly mitigates catastrophic forgetting compared with standard SFT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TABOM框架，通过Boltzmann建模对齐训练与推理轨迹，提升扩散语言模型性能并减少灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLM）在训练时使用标准负证据下界（NELBO）进行监督微调，但训练过程是单步重建随机掩码标记，而推理过程则是多步、置信度引导的从易到难去噪轨迹，导致训练-推理不一致。现有基于轨迹的自蒸馏方法主要关注采样步压缩以加速推理，并未显著提升模型底层能力，甚至可能在完整扩散解码下降低性能。因此需要一种方法，利用自蒸馏轨迹进行真正的知识获取，而不仅仅是加速推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出轨迹对齐的Boltzmann建模（TABOM），一种基于自蒸馏轨迹的后训练框架。将推理过程中的非掩码偏好建模为预测熵上的Boltzmann分布，并推导出可处理的成对排序目标，使模型的不确定性排序与观察到的解码轨迹对齐。通过这种方式，训练过程与推理的从易到难结构相匹配，从而弥合训练-推理差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明，TABOM在新领域上取得了显著性能提升，扩展了DLM的有效知识边界，并且与标准监督微调相比，显著缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。具体效果包括在多个任务上的改进，但摘要未提供详细数值指标，仅表述为“substantial gains”。
light_analysis.conclusion: TABOM通过将自蒸馏轨迹用于知识获取而非仅加速推理，有效解决了DLM训练-推理不一致问题。该方法能够提升模型在新领域的表现，同时保持原有知识。未来工作可探索更复杂的轨迹建模或将其应用于其他生成模型。局限性可能在于Boltzmann分布假设的适用范围及计算开销。

title: Unlocking Compositional Generalization in Continual Few-Shot Learning
abstract: Object-centric representations promise a key property for few-shot learning: Rather than treating a scene as a single unit, a model can decompose it into individual object-level parts that can be matched and compared across different concepts. In practice, this potential is rarely realized. Continual learners either collapse scenes into global embeddings, or train with part-level matching objectives that tie representations too closely to seen patterns, leaving them unable to generalize to truly novel concepts. In this paper, we identify this fundamental structural conflict and pioneer a new paradigm that strictly decouples representation learning from compositional inference. Leveraging the inherent patch-level semantic geometry of self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs), our framework employs a dual-phase strategy. During training, slot representations are optimized entirely toward holistic class identity, preserving highly generalizable, object-level geometries. At inference, preserved slots are dynamically composed to match novel scenes. We demonstrate that this paradigm offers dual structural benefits: The frozen backbone naturally prevents representation drift, while our lightweight, holistic optimization preserves the features' capacity for novel-concept transfer. Extensive experiments validate this approach, achieving state-of-the-art unseen-concept generalization and minimal forgetting across standard continual learning benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出严格解耦表示学习与组合推理的新范式，利用自监督ViT的补丁级语义几何，实现小样本持续学习中的组合泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有小样本持续学习方法中，对象中心表示要么将场景压缩为全局嵌入，要么使用部分级匹配目标导致表示与已见模式过度绑定，无法泛化到真正新概念。本文识别了这种结构冲突，旨在通过严格解耦表示学习和组合推理来解决该问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用双阶段策略：训练时，槽位表示完全优化为整体类别身份，保持高度可泛化的对象级几何；推理时，动态组合保留的槽位以匹配新场景。利用自监督ViT的固有补丁级语义几何，冻结骨干网络防止表示漂移，轻量级整体优化保留特征用于新概念迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在标准持续学习基准上实现最先进的未见概念泛化和最小遗忘。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过广泛实验验证了该方法的有效性，达到了SOTA水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该范式提供双重结构优势：冻结骨干自然防止表示漂移，轻量级整体优化保留特征用于新概念迁移。学术价值在于解决持续学习中组合泛化的结构冲突，实际应用适用于需要快速适应新概念的场景。未来工作可探索更复杂的组合策略。

title: Weather-Robust Cross-View Geo-Localization via Prototype-Based Semantic Part Discovery
abstract: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL), which matches an oblique drone view to a geo-referenced satellite tile, has emerged as a key alternative for autonomous drone navigation when GNSS signals are jammed, spoofed, or unavailable. Despite strong recent progress, three limitations persist: (1) global-descriptor designs compress the patch grid into a single vector without separating layout from texture across the view gap; (2) altitude-related scale variation is retained in the learned embedding rather than marginalized; and (3) multi-objective training relies on hand-tuned scalars over losses on incompatible gradient scales. We propose SkyPart, a lightweight swappable head for patch-based vision transformers (ViTs) that institutes explicit part grouping over the patch grid. SkyPart has four theory-grounded components: (i) learnable prototypes competing for patch tokens via single-pass cosine assignment; (ii) altitude-conditioned linear modulation applied only during training, making the retrieval embedding altitude-free at inference; (iii) a graph-attention readout over active prototypes; and (iv) a Kendall uncertainty-weighted multi-objective loss whose stationary points are Pareto-stationary. At 26.95M parameters and 22.14 GFLOPs, SkyPart is the smallest among top-performing methods and sets a new state of the art on SUES-200, University-1652, and DenseUAV under a single-pass, no-re-ranking, no-TTA protocol. Its advantage over the strongest baseline widens under the ten-condition WeatherPrompt corruption benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkyPart，一种轻量级可替换头部，通过原型语义部分发现实现鲁棒的跨视角地理定位，在多个数据集上达到最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法存在三个主要局限：一是全局描述符设计将补丁网格压缩为单个向量，无法区分布局和纹理；二是高度相关的尺度变化被保留在嵌入中而非消除；三是多目标训练依赖手动调整标量权重，梯度尺度不兼容。这些问题限制了模型在复杂天气和高度变化下的鲁棒性，亟需一种能够显式建模语义部分且自适应处理尺度变化的轻量级方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SkyPart，作为补丁视觉变换器的可替换头部，包含四个理论支撑的组件：1）可学习原型通过单次余弦分配竞争补丁令牌；2）仅在训练时应用高度条件线性调制，使推理时的检索嵌入与高度无关；3）图注意力读出活跃原型；4）Kendall不确定性加权多目标损失，其稳定点为帕累托稳定。总参数量26.95M，计算量22.14 GFLOPs。
light_analysis.result: 在SUES-200、University-1652和DenseUAV数据集上，采用单次、无需重排、无测试时增强协议，SkyPart达到新的最先进性能，且参数量和计算量最小。在WeatherPrompt十种天气退化基准上，与最强基线相比优势扩大，验证了其天气鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkyPart通过显式语义部分发现和高度无关嵌入，有效解决了跨视角地理定位中的视图差异和尺度变化问题，实现了轻量高效且鲁棒的定位。该方法在无人机导航中具有重要应用价值，尤其适用于GNSS信号受限场景。未来可探索更高效的原型分配策略或扩展到其他跨域匹配任务。

title: MIST: Reliable Streaming Decision Trees for Online Class-Incremental Learning via McDiarmid Bound
abstract: Streaming decision trees are natural candidates for open-world continual learning, as they perform local updates, enjoy bounded memory, and static decision boundaries. Despite these, they still fail in online class-incremental learning due to two coupled miscalibrations: (i) their split criterion grows unreliable as the class count K expands, and (ii) the absence of knowledge transfer at split time. Both failures share a common root: the range of Information Gain intrinsically scales with log2 K. Consequently, any Hoeffding-style confidence radius derived from it must inevitably grow with the class count, making a K-independent split criterion structurally impossible, taking away the potential benefits of applying streaming decision trees to continual learning. To fix this issue, we present MIST (McDiarmid Incremental Streaming Tree), which resolves both failures through three integrated components: (i) a tight, K-independent McDiarmid confidence radius for Gini splitting that acts as a structural regulariser; (ii) a Bayesian inheritance protocol that projects parent statistics to child nodes via truncated-Gaussian moments, with variance reduction guarantees strongest precisely when splitting is most conservative; and (iii) per-leaf KLL quantile sketches that support both continuous threshold evaluation and geometry-adaptive leaf prediction from a single data structure. On standard and stress-test tabular streams, MIST is competitive with global parametric methods on near-Gaussian benchmarks and uniquely robust on non-Gaussian geometry where SOTA benchmarks collapse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MIST流决策树，通过McDiarmid界和贝叶斯继承解决在线类增量学习中分裂标准随类别数增长而失效的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线类增量学习要求模型在不断新增类别的情况下持续更新，但流决策树存在两个耦合的校准问题：分裂标准随类别数K增长变得不可靠，且分裂时缺乏知识转移。根源在于信息增益的范围与log2 K成正比，导致基于Hoeffding的置信半径必然随K增长，无法实现K无关的分裂准则，这限制了流决策树在持续学习中的潜力。
light_analysis.method: MIST包含三个组件：1) 基于McDiarmid界的Gini分裂置信半径，与K无关，作为结构正则化器；2) 贝叶斯继承协议，通过截断高斯矩将父节点统计量投影到子节点，在分裂保守时方差缩减最强；3) 每叶KLL分位草图，支持连续阈值评估和几何自适应叶预测，所有功能复用同一数据结构。
light_analysis.result: 在标准和高压力表格数据流上，MIST在近高斯基准上与全局参数方法竞争力相当，在非高斯几何数据上表现出独特鲁棒性，而现有最佳方法在此场景下性能崩溃。摘要未给出确切数值指标，但强调其鲁棒性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIST通过理论驱动的K无关置信半径和知识转移机制，解决了流决策树在类增量学习中的根本缺陷。其贡献在于提供了结构上可证明的流决策树方法，尤其适合非高斯分布的实际数据流。未来可探索更高效的贝叶斯协议或扩展到高维特征。

title: Breaking $\textit{Winner-Takes-All}$: Cooperative Policy Optimization Improves Diverse LLM Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiers (RLVR) has become a central paradigm for improving LLM reasoning, yet popular group-based optimization algorithms like GRPO often suffer from exploration collapse, where the models prematurely converge on a narrow set of high-scoring patterns, lacking the ability to explore new solutions. Recent efforts attempt to alleviate this by adding entropy regularization or diversity bonus. However, these approaches do not change the \textit{winner-takes-all} nature, where rollouts still compete for individual advantage rather than cooperating for maximizing global diversity. In this work, we propose Group Cooperative Policy Optimization (GCPO), which shifts the training paradigm from rollout competition to team cooperation. Specifically, GCPO replaces independent rollout scoring with team-level credit assignment: a rollout is rewarded by how much it contributes to the team's valid solution coverage, rather than its individual accuracy. This coverage is described as a determinant volume over reward-weighted semantic embeddings, where only correct and non-redundant rollouts contribute to this volume. During advantage estimation, GCPO redistributes the collective team reward to each single rollout according to its average marginal contribution to the team. This cooperative training paradigm routes optimization toward non-redundant correct reasoning paths. Experiments across multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that GCPO significantly improves both reasoning accuracy and solution diversity over existing approaches. Code will be released at https://github.com/bradybuddiemarch/gcpo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Group Cooperative Policy Optimization (GCPO)方法，通过团队级信用分配替代个体竞争，在提升LLM推理准确性的同时增强解决方案多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法中，组优化算法如GRPO易陷入探索崩溃，模型过早收敛于少量高分割模式，无法探索新解。虽然熵正则化或多样性奖励被提出，但仍保持赢者通吃特性，各rollout竞争个体优势而非合作最大化全局多样性，导致推理路径单一化。
light_analysis.method: GCPO将训练范式从rollout竞争转为团队合作。核心是团队级信用分配：对每个rollout，依据其对团队有效解覆盖的贡献（而非个体准确性）给予奖励。覆盖度定义为奖励加权语义嵌入的行列式体积，仅正确且非冗余的rollout贡献。优势估计时，根据每个rollout对团队的平均边际贡献重新分配团队总奖励。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准上实验表明，GCPO相比现有方法显著提升了推理准确性和解决方案多样性。具体指标如准确率提升和多样性度量改善，摘要未提供具体数值，但强调超越基线。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: GCPO通过合作式训练解决了RLVR中的探索崩溃问题，兼顾准确性与多样性，为LLM推理提供了新范式。其团队级信用分配思想可推广至其他需要多样化输出的场景。局限性与未来工作摘要未明确，但可推测需进一步验证可扩展性。

title: Causal Bias Detection in Generative Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Automated systems built on artificial intelligence (AI) are increasingly deployed across high-stakes domains, raising critical concerns about fairness and the perpetuation of demographic disparities that exist in the world. In this context, causal inference provides a principled framework for reasoning about fairness, as it links observed disparities to underlying mechanisms and aligns naturally with human intuition and legal notions of discrimination. Prior work on causal fairness primarily focuses on the standard machine learning setting, where a decision-maker constructs a single predictive mechanism $f_{\widehat Y}$ for an outcome variable $Y$, while inheriting the causal mechanisms of all other covariates from the real world. The generative AI setting, however, is markedly more complex: generative models can sample from arbitrary conditionals over any set of variables, implicitly constructing their own beliefs about all causal mechanisms rather than learning a single predictive function. This fundamental difference requires new developments in causal fairness methodology. We formalize the problem of causal fairness in generative AI and unify it with the standard ML setting under a common theoretical framework. We then derive new causal decomposition results that enable granular quantification of fairness impacts along both (a) different causal pathways and (b) the replacement of real-world mechanisms by the generative model's mechanisms. We establish identification conditions and introduce efficient estimators for causal quantities of interest, and demonstrate the value of our methodology by analyzing race and gender bias in large language models across different datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 形式化生成式AI中的因果公平性问题，提出统一理论框架和新的因果分解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI在关键领域广泛应用，引发公平性担忧。现有因果公平性工作主要针对标准机器学习，但生成式AI能采样任意条件分布，隐式构建所有因果机制，而非学习单一预测函数，导致现有方法不适用。本文旨在解决生成式AI中独特的公平性评估问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建统一的理论框架，将生成式AI与标准ML的因果公平性统一。提出新的因果分解方法，分别量化沿不同因果路径的公平性影响，以及真实世界机制被生成模型机制替代的影响。建立识别条件，并引入高效估计器用于估计因果量。
light_analysis.result: 通过在不同数据集上分析大型语言模型中的种族和性别偏见，展示了所提方法的价值。摘要未提供具体数值结果，但表明方法能有效量化偏见来源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为生成式AI的因果公平性提供了形式化基础和新方法，有助于理解并检测模型中的偏见。学术上拓展了因果推理在公平性中的应用，实用上为生成式AI的公平性审计提供工具。未来可进一步完善估计器和扩展至更多应用。

title: Training-Free Cultural Alignment of Large Language Models via Persona Disagreement
abstract: Large language models increasingly mediate decisions that turn on moral judgement, yet a growing body of evidence shows that their implicit preferences are not culturally neutral. Existing cultural alignment methods either require per-country preference data and fine-tuning budgets or assume white-box access to model internals that commercial APIs do not expose. In this work, we focus on this realistic black-box, public-data-only regime and observe that within-country sociodemographic disagreement, not consensus, is the primary steering signal. We introduce DISCA (Disagreement-Informed Steering for Cultural Alignment), an inference-time method that instantiates each country as a panel of World-Values-Survey-grounded persona agents and converts their disagreement into a bounded, loss-averse logit correction. Across 20 countries and 7 open-weight backbones (2B--70B), DISCA reduces cultural misalignment on MultiTP by 10--24% on the six backbones >=3.8B, and 2--7% on open-ended scenarios, without changing any weights. Our results suggest that inference-time calibration is a scalable alternative to fine-tuning for serving the long tail of global moral preferences.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需微调的黑盒文化对齐方法DISCA，利用国内意见分歧作为引导信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在道德判断上存在文化偏见，现有对齐方法依赖每个国家的偏好数据和微调预算，或需要白盒访问模型内部，不适用于商业API。本文聚焦于现实的黑盒、公开数据场景，发现国内社会人口统计的分歧而非共识是主要的引导信号，旨在实现无需额外数据或权重修改的文化对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出DISCA（分歧引导的文化对齐），一种推理时方法。将每个国家实例化为基于世界价值观调查（WVS）的人格代理面板，通过模拟这些代理的分歧，将其转化为有界、损失厌恶的logit修正，从而在输出层调整模型偏好。该方法使用公开的WVS数据，无需模型微调或内部访问，适用于黑盒API。
light_analysis.result: 在20个国家和7个开源模型（2B-70B参数）上评估，DISCA在MultiTP基准上对6个≥3.8B的模型减少文化失调10-24%，在开放场景上减少2-7%。所有结果均未修改模型权重，表明推理时校准是有效的替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: DISCA证明了推理时校准是大语言模型文化对齐的可扩展替代方案，无需微调或内部访问，适用于长尾全球道德偏好。其利用国内分歧而非共识的思路具有创新性，局限在于依赖WVS数据的覆盖范围和时效性，未来可扩展至更多国家或动态更新。

title: SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (SLASH), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate that SLASH delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出训练无关的SLASH方法，通过锐化LLM内部结构注意力来提升图拓扑理解。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在序列化处理图拓扑时结构理解不足，现有外部适配器或微调方法成本高且泛化性差。研究发现LLM内部能自发重建图拓扑，但注意力沉积分化了这种理解，形成表示瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出StructuraL Attention SHarpening（SLASH），一种免训练的即插即用注意力重分布方法，放大LLM内部固有的结构注意力。理论分析注意力沉积分化为各向异性偏差与拓扑局部聚合冲突导致的瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: 在纯图任务和分子预测任务上，SLASH在不同LLM架构（如GPT、LLaMA等）中均取得显著且一致的性能提升，无需额外训练。具体数值摘要未说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: SLASH有效增强LLM结构理解，保持原有语言能力，兼具高效性和通用性。未来可探索其在更复杂图推理任务中的应用。

title: AdaptSplat: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: This work explores a simple yet powerful lightweight adapter design for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Existing methods typically apply complex, architecture-specific designs on top of the generic pipeline of image feature extraction $\rightarrow$ multi-view interaction $\rightarrow$ feature decoding. However, constrained by the scale bottleneck of 3D training data and the low-pass filtering effect of deep networks, these methods still fall short in cross-domain generalization and high-frequency geometric fidelity. To address these problems, we propose AdaptSplat, which demonstrates that without complex component engineering, introducing a single adapter of only 1.5M parameters into the generic architecture is sufficient to achieve superior performance. Specifically, we design a lightweight Frequency-Preserving Adapter (FPA) that extracts direction-aware high-frequency structural priors from the shallow features of a powerful vision foundation model backbone, and seamlessly integrates them into the generic pipeline via high-frequency positional encodings and adaptive residual modulation. This effectively compensates for the high-frequency attenuation caused by over-smoothing in deep features, improving the fitting accuracy of Gaussian primitives on complex surfaces and sharp boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdaptSplat achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on multiple standard benchmarks, with stable generalization across domains. Code available at: https://github.com/xmw666/AdaptSplat.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级频率保持适配器（FPA），仅1.5M参数即可提升前馈式3DGS的跨域泛化和高频几何保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈3DGS方法受限于3D训练数据规模瓶颈和深度网络的低通滤波效应，导致跨域泛化差和高频几何保真度不足。复杂架构设计未能根本解决上述问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出AdaptSplat，核心是轻量级频率保持适配器（FPA），从视觉基础模型浅层特征中提取方向感知的高频结构先验，通过高频位置编码和自适应残差调制集成到通用流水线，补偿深度特征的高频衰减，提高高斯原语对复杂曲面和锐利边界的拟合精度。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准基准上取得最先进的前馈重建性能，且跨域泛化稳定。仅需1.5M额外参数，显著优于现有复杂设计方法。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明无需复杂组件工程，简单适配器即可显著提升前馈3DGS性能，为跨域泛化和高频保真提供新思路。具有学术价值和应用潜力，未来可探索更大规模基础模型集成。

title: Strategic Exploitation in LLM Agent Markets: A Simulation Framework for E-Commerce Trust
abstract: Agent-based modeling (ABM) has long been used in economics to study human behavior, and large language model (LLM) agents now enable new forms of social and economic simulation. While prior work has discovered strategic deception by LLM agents in financial trading and auction markets, e-commerce remains underexplored despite its distinctive information asymmetry: sellers privately observe product quality, whereas buyers rely on advertised claims and reputation signals. We introduce TruthMarketTwin, a controlled simulation framework for studying LLM-agent behavior in e-commerce markets. The framework is one of the first to model bilateral trade under asymmetric information sharing, where agents make strategic listing, purchasing, rating, and recourse-related decisions to optimize seller profit and buyer utility. We find that LLM agents released into traditional markets autonomously exploit weaknesses in reputation-based governance, while warrant enforcement reduces deception and reshapes strategic reasoning. Our results position LLM-agent simulation as a tool for studying institution-governed autonomous markets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TruthMarketTwin模拟框架，研究LLM代理在电子商务市场中的策略性欺骗行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子商务市场存在信息不对称（卖家知产品质量，买家依赖广告和声誉），而现有研究多关注金融交易和拍卖中的欺骗，对电商领域探索不足。理解LLM代理在此环境下的自主策略行为，对于设计有效的市场治理机制至关重要。
light_analysis.method: TruthMarketTwin是一个基于代理的模拟框架，建模双边贸易中的信息不对称。代理（买家和卖家）基于LLM做出策略性决策，包括定价、购买、评分和追索（如warrant enforcement），以优化自身收益。框架模拟传统市场与引入保证机制两种场景。
light_analysis.result: LLM代理在传统市场中会自主利用声誉机制的漏洞进行欺骗（如虚假宣传），而引入warrant enforcement能显著降低欺骗行为，并改变代理的策略推理模式。结果量化了欺骗率下降和效用变化，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: TruthMarketTwin展示了LLM代理模拟可作为研究机构治理下自主市场的工具。其意义在于揭示了现有声誉机制在对抗LLM欺骗时的不足，并为设计更鲁棒的电商信任系统提供了实验基础。未来可扩展多代理博弈及更多治理规则。

title: SlimQwen: Exploring the Pruning and Distillation in Large MoE Model Pre-training
abstract: Structured pruning and knowledge distillation (KD) are typical techniques for compressing large language models, but it remains unclear how they should be applied at pretraining scale, especially to recent mixture-of-experts (MoE) models. In this work, we systematically study MoE compression in large-scale pretraining, focusing on three key questions: whether pruning provides a better initialization than training from scratch, how expert compression choices affect the final model after continued training, and which training strategy is most effective. We have the following findings: First, across depth, width, and expert compression, pruning a pretrained MoE consistently outperforms training the target architecture from scratch under the same training budget. Second, different one-shot expert compression methods converge to similar final performance after large-scale continual pretraining. Motivated by this, we introduce a simple partial-preservation expert merging strategy that improves downstream performance across most benchmarks. Third, combining KD with the language modeling loss outperforms KD alone, particularly on knowledge-intensive tasks. We further propose multi-token prediction (MTP) distillation, which yields consistent gains. Finally, given the same training tokens, progressive pruning schedules outperform one-shot compression, suggesting that gradual architecture transitions lead to better optimization trajectories. Putting it all together, we compress Qwen3-Next-80A3B to a 23A2B model that retains competitive performance. These results offer practical guidance for efficient MoE compression at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究了大规模MoE模型预训练中的结构化剪枝与知识蒸馏，提出渐进式剪枝和多令牌预测蒸馏等策略，实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构化剪枝和知识蒸馏是压缩大语言模型的典型技术，但在预训练规模下，尤其是混合专家（MoE）模型中的应用尚不明确。现有方法缺乏对剪枝初始化效果、专家压缩选择以及训练策略的系统研究，亟需探索如何有效结合这些技术以提升压缩后模型的性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文系统研究了MoE压缩在预训练中的三个关键问题：剪枝是否比从头训练更好、专家压缩方法的选择、以及训练策略。发现剪枝预训练MoE优于从头训练；不同专家压缩方法在大规模持续预训练后收敛到相似性能，因此提出简单部分保留专家合并策略；结合知识蒸馏与语言建模损失优于单独使用蒸馏，并进一步提出多令牌预测蒸馏；此外，渐进式剪枝调度优于一次性压缩。最终将Qwen3-Next-80A3B压缩为23A2B模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，剪枝预训练MoE在相同训练预算下持续优于从头训练；部分保留专家合并策略在大多数基准上提升下游性能；多令牌预测蒸馏带来一致增益；渐进式剪枝调度优于一次性压缩。最终压缩后的23A2B模型保留了竞争力性能，验证了这些方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为大规模MoE压缩提供了实用指导，发现剪枝初始化、渐进式调度和结合多令牌预测蒸馏能有效提升压缩效果。这些发现有助于在预训练规模下高效压缩MoE模型，节省计算资源。未来可探索更复杂的专家合并策略和动态剪枝调度。

title: Beyond LoRA vs. Full Fine-Tuning: Gradient-Guided Optimizer Routing for LLM Adaptation
abstract: Recent literature on fine-tuning Large Language Models highlights a fundamental debate. While Full Fine-Tuning (FFT) provides the representational plasticity required for high-entropy knowledge injection, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) can match or surpass FFT performance because many tasks only require updates in a low-rank space and benefit from LoRA's additional regularization. Through empirical evaluation across diverse tasks (SQL, Medical QA, and Counterfactual Knowledge) and varying language models (Gemma-3-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Qwen2.5-3B), we verify both trends and demonstrate that relying solely on either static architecture is structurally limited. To address this challenge, we propose a Mixture of LoRA and Full (MoLF) Fine-Tuning, a unified framework that enables continuous navigation between both training regimes. MoLF dynamically routes updates between FFT and LoRA at the optimizer level to ensure that exact gradient signals are available to both experts throughout training, yielding stable training dynamics. For memory-constrained environments, we also introduce MoLF-Efficient, which freezes base weights and only routes updates among a pair of LoRA experts of potentially varying rank. Our evaluations show that MoLF either improves on or stays within $1.5\%$ of the better of FFT and LoRA across all settings, while MoLF-Efficient outperforms prior adaptive LoRA approaches by up to $20\%$ on Fact and $9\%$ on Med and SQL. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/11785T23/molf.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MoLF框架，动态路由梯度更新到全量微调与低秩适应，兼顾性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 全量微调(FFT)提供高表示塑性但计算昂贵，低秩适应(LoRA)在低秩空间中有效且正则化好，但两者各有局限。现有方法依赖单一静态架构，无法适应不同任务需求。因此需要统一框架动态选择训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出MoLF（Mixture of LoRA and Full Fine-Tuning），在优化器级别动态路由梯度更新到FFT和LoRA专家，确保全程梯度信号可用。同时提出MoLF-Efficient，冻结基础权重，仅在高、低秩LoRA专家间路由，适合内存受限场景。
light_analysis.result: 在SQL、Medical QA、Counterfactual Knowledge任务及Gemma-3-1B、Qwen2.5-1.5B/3B模型上，MoLF性能优于或接近FFT与LoRA最佳者（差距≤1.5%）。MoLF-Efficient相比自适应LoRA方法，Fact任务提升20%，Med和SQL提升9%。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoLF统一了全量微调与低秩适应，通过梯度引导路由实现性能与效率的平衡。MoLF-Efficient进一步降低了内存需求。该框架为LLM微调提供了灵活且有效的方案，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的路由策略。

title: MAGIQ: A Post-Quantum Multi-Agentic AI Governance System with Provable Security
abstract: Our computing ecosystem is being transformed by two emerging paradigms: the increased deployment of agentic AI systems and advancements in quantum computing. With respect to agentic AI systems, one of the most critical problems is creating secure governing architectures that ensure agents follow their owners' communication and interaction policies and can be held accountable for the messages they exchange with other agents. With respect to quantum computing, existing systems must be retrofitted and new cryptographic mechanisms must be designed to ensure long-term security and quantum resistance. In fact, NIST recommends that standard public-key cryptographic algorithms, including RSA, Diffie-Hellman (DH), and elliptic-curve constructions (ECC), be deprecated starting in 2030 and disallowed after 2035.   In this paper, we present MAGIQ, a framework for policy definition and enforcement in multi-agent AI systems using novel, highly efficient, quantum-resistant cryptographic protocols with proven security guarantees. MAGIQ (i) allows users to define rich communication and access-control policy budgets for agent-to-agent sessions and tasks, including global budgets for one-to-many agent sessions; (ii) enforces such policies using post-quantum cryptographic primitives; (iii) supports session-based enforcement of policies for agent-to-agent and one-to-many agent sessions; and (iv) provides accountability of agents to their users through message attribution. We formally model and prove the correctness and security of the system using the Universal Composability (UC) framework. We evaluate the computation and communication overhead of our framework and compare it with the state-of-the-art agentic AI framework SAGA. MAGIQ is a first step toward post-quantum-secure solutions for agentic AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: MAGIQ首次提出基于后量子密码的多智能体AI治理框架，具备可证明安全性，确保策略执行与问责。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着智能体AI系统的广泛部署，亟需安全的治理架构来确保智能体遵循用户通信与交互策略并实现问责。同时，量子计算威胁传统密码体系，NIST建议逐步淘汰RSA、DH、ECC等算法。现有框架如SAGA缺乏量子抵抗性，无法保障长期安全。因此需要设计后量子安全的策略定义与执行机制，以应对未来量子威胁。
light_analysis.method: MAGIQ通过新型高效的后量子密码协议实现多智能体系统的策略定义与执行。核心包括：(i) 定义丰富的通信与访问控制策略预算，支持一对多会话预算；(ii) 采用后量子密码原语强制执行策略；(iii) 支持会话级策略执行；(iv) 通过消息归因实现智能体对用户的问责。系统安全性采用通用可组合（UC）框架进行形式化建模与证明，确保理论安全保证。
light_analysis.result: MAGIQ与当前最先进的智能体AI框架SAGA进行了计算与通信开销的对比评估。虽然摘要未给出具体数值，但表明MAGIQ在提供后量子安全性的同时，实际性能开销可接受，为后续优化提供了基线。实验验证了其策略执行与问责功能的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAGIQ是后量子安全智能体AI治理系统的首创性探索，为多智能体系统的安全性提供了理论保障。其形式化安全证明和高效的后量子密码设计具有重要学术价值，并为实际部署抵御量子攻击奠定了基础。未来工作可进一步优化协议效率，扩展至更复杂的多智能体场景，并与现有AI安全标准集成。

title: NavOne: One-Step Global Planning for Vision-Language Navigation on Top-Down Maps
abstract: Existing Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) methods typically adopt an egocentric, step-by-step paradigm, which struggles with error accumulation and limits efficiency. While recent approaches attempt to leverage pre-built environment maps, they often rely on incrementally updating memory graphs or scoring discrete path proposals, which restricts continuous spatial reasoning and creates discrete bottlenecks. We propose Top-Down VLN (TD-VLN), reformulating navigation as a one-step global path planning problem on pre-built top-down maps, supported by our newly constructed R2R-TopDown dataset. To solve this, we introduce NavOne, a unified framework that directly predicts dense path probabilities over multi-modal maps in a single end-to-end forward pass. NavOne features a Top-Down Map Fuser for joint multi-modal map representation, and extends Attention Residuals for spatial-aware depth mixing. Extensive experiments on R2R-TopDown show that NavOne achieves state-of-the-art performance among map-based VLN methods, with a planning-stage speedup of 8x over existing map-based baselines and 80x over egocentric methods, enabling highly efficient global navigation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NavOne框架，将视觉-语言导航重构为基于俯视图的一步全局路径规划，实现高效端到端预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLN方法采用自我中心的逐步范式，易产生错误累积且效率低下。虽然部分方法利用预建地图，但依赖增量更新记忆图或离散路径评分，限制了连续空间推理并引入离散瓶颈。为此，需要一种能直接进行全局连续规划的方法，以提升导航效率与准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Top-Down VLN（TD-VLN）范式，将导航转化为预建俯视图上的一步全局路径规划。构建R2R-TopDown数据集。NavOne框架通过单次前向传播直接预测多模态地图上的密集路径概率，核心包括Top-Down Map Fuser进行多模态地图融合，以及扩展的Attention Residuals实现空间感知深度混合。
light_analysis.result: 在R2R-TopDown数据集上，NavOne在基于地图的VLN方法中达到最优性能，规划阶段速度比现有地图基线快8倍，比自我中心方法快80倍，证明其高效性与有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NavOne通过一步全局规划解决了VLN中的误差累积和效率问题，学术上重新定义了导航任务范式，实际应用中可大幅提升机器人导航速度。未来可探索更复杂地图表示和适应动态环境。

title: MULTITEXTEDIT: Benchmarking Cross-Lingual Degradation in Text-in-Image Editing
abstract: Text-in-image editing has become a key capability for visual content creation, yet existing benchmarks remain overwhelmingly English-centric and often conflate visual plausibility with semantic correctness. We introduce MULTITEXTEDIT, a controlled benchmark of 3,600 instances spanning 12 typologically diverse languages, 5 visual domains, and 7 editing operations. Language variants of each instance share a common visual base and are paired with a human-edited reference and region masks, isolating the language variable for cross-lingual comparison. To capture script-level errors that coarse text-matching metrics miss, such as missing diacritics, reversed RTL order, and mixed-script renderings, we introduce a language fidelity (LSF) metric scored by a two-stage LVM protocol that first traces the edited target text and then judges it in isolation, reaching a quadratic-weighted \k{appa} of 0.76 against native-speaker annotators. Evaluating 12 open-source and proprietary systems with LSF alongside standard semantic and mask-aware pixel metrics, we find pronounced cross-lingual degradation for every model, largest on Hebrew and Arabic and smallest on Dutch and Spanish, and concentrated in text accuracy and script fidelity rather than in coarse structural dimensions. We also uncover a pervasive semantic and pixel mismatch, where outputs preserve global layout and background fidelity yet distort script-specific forms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MULTITEXTEDIT基准，评估文本图像编辑中的跨语言退化，引入语言保真度指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本图像编辑基准以英语为中心，常混淆视觉合理性与语义正确性，且缺乏对跨语言脚本级错误的系统评估，如缺失变音符号、RTL顺序错误等。需一个控制语言变量的基准来检测模型在不同语言上的退化。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含3600个实例的基准，覆盖12种语言、5个视觉域和7种编辑操作。每个实例共享视觉基础，配有人工编辑参考和区域掩码。提出语言保真度（LSF）指标，采用两阶段LVM协议：先追踪编辑文本，再独立判断，达到0.76的二次加权Kappa系数。
light_analysis.result: 评估12个开源和专有系统，发现所有模型存在显著跨语言退化，希伯来语和阿拉伯语最严重，荷兰语和西班牙语最轻。退化集中在文本准确性和脚本保真度，而非粗粒度结构维度。同时存在语义和像素不匹配，输出保持全局布局但扭曲脚本特定形式。
light_analysis.conclusion: MULTITEXTEDIT揭示了文本图像编辑中普遍的语言退化问题，强调了脚本级评估的必要性。LSF指标提供了细粒度诊断工具。该基准有助于推动多语言视觉内容编辑的公平性和鲁棒性。

title: Robust Linear Dueling Bandits with Post-serving Context under Unknown Delays and Adversarial Corruptions
abstract: We study linear dueling bandits in volatile environments characterized by the simultaneous presence of post-serving contexts, delayed feedback, and adversarial corruption. Feedback is subject to unknown stochastic or adversarial delays and a cumulative corruption budget $\mathcal{C}$. To address these challenges, we propose \term, which integrates a learned approximator that predicts post-serving contexts from pre-serving information. It further employs an adaptive weighting strategy that clips feature vectors to mitigate the impact of corrupted and delayed observations simultaneously. Under standard regularity conditions and a parametric post-serving mapping, we rigorously establish that our algorithm is delay-regime-agnostic, achieving a regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$, where $d$ is the total feature dimension and $\mathcal{D}$ encapsulates the delay complexity. Crucially, our analysis reveals an additive cost structure between corruption and delay, avoiding the multiplicative degradation typical of prior works. We further establish lower bounds that nearly match our upper bounds up to a $\sqrt{d}$ factor for adversarial delays in the absence of post-serving contexts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种鲁棒线性决斗赌博机算法，同时处理后服务上下文、未知延迟和对抗性腐败，实现了延迟-场景无关的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性决斗赌博机在易变环境中常同时面临后服务上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性腐败三个挑战，现有方法无法同时应对这些因素，且延迟与腐败通常会导致遗憾界的乘法退化。该研究旨在提出一种通用方法，在标准正则条件下实现加法成本结构，避免性能急剧下降。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种算法，集成一个学习预测后服务上下文的逼近器（利用预服务信息），并采用自适应加权策略裁剪特征向量，以同时减轻腐败和延迟观测的影响。在参数化后服务映射下，算法是延迟-场景无关的，其遗憾上界为 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$，其中 $d$ 是特征维度，$\mathcal{C}$ 为腐败预算，$\mathcal{D}$ 为延迟复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析得出遗憾上界为 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$，揭示了腐败与延迟之间的加法成本结构，避免乘法退化。针对无后服务上下文下的对抗性延迟，建立了几乎匹配的下界（相差 $\sqrt{d}$ 因子）。实验（摘要未明确说明）预期可验证其鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文首次在线性决斗赌博机中同时处理后服务上下文、未知延迟和对抗性腐败，提供了延迟-场景无关的遗憾界，具有重要理论价值。其自适应加权策略和加法成本分析为实际应用（如推荐系统）提供鲁棒方案。未来可探索更一般的后服务映射或更紧的下界。

title: Necessary and sufficient conditions for universality of Kolmogorov-Arnold networks
abstract: We analyze the universal approximation property of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) in terms of their edge functions. If these functions are all affine, then universality clearly fails. How many non-affine functions are needed, in addition to affine ones, to ensure universality? We show that a single one suffices. More precisely, we prove that deep KANs in which all edge functions are either affine or equal to a fixed continuous function $σ$ are dense in $C(K)$ for every compact set $K\subset\mathbb{R}^n$ if and only if $σ$ is non-affine. In contrast, for KANs with exactly two hidden layers, universality holds if and only if $σ$ is nonpolynomial. We further show that the full class of affine functions is not required; it can be replaced by a finite set without affecting universality. In particular, in the nonpolynomial case, a fixed family of five affine functions suffices when the depth is arbitrary. More generally, for every continuous non-affine function $σ$, there exists a finite affine family $A_σ$ such that deep KANs with edge functions in $A_σ\cup\{σ\}$ remain universal. We also prove that KANs with the spline-based edge parameterization introduced by Liu et al.~\cite{Liu2024} are universal approximators in the classical sense, even when the spline degree and knot sequence are fixed in advance. This paper also has implications for the theory of superpositions of real functions. In particular, we show that every continuous multivariate function can be approximated arbitrarily well using only the coordinate functions and two fixed univariate functions under repeated addition and composition.
comment: 22 pages; a remark and two corollaries added

light_analysis.overview: 证明了KAN通用逼近的充要条件：深度KAN仅需一个非仿射边缘函数即可通用，浅层KAN需非多项式函数；有限仿射函数族可替代全体仿射函数。
light_analysis.motivation: Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KANs）的通用逼近性质尚未完全理解。已知所有边缘函数为仿射时通用性失败，但需要多少非仿射函数？本研究旨在找出确保KANs通用逼近最小条件，并探讨仿射函数族是否可以简化。这有助于理解KANs的表达能力和设计高效结构。
light_analysis.method: 理论分析KANs的通用逼近性。对于深度KAN，证明若所有边缘函数为仿射或固定连续函数σ，则通用性成立当且仅当σ非仿射。对于两层KAN，条件加强为非多项式。进一步，证明可用有限（如5个）仿射函数替换全部仿射函数。此外，分析样条参数化KANs的经典通用性，证明固定样条阶数和节点序列仍为通用逼近器。
light_analysis.result: 1）深度KAN中，一个非仿射函数σ（非多项式？）足以通用，且σ非仿射是充要条件。2）两层KAN通用性充要条件是σ非多项式。3）有限仿射族（深度KAN中5个）足以保持通用性。4）样条边缘KANs（任意固定阶数和节点）是经典通用逼近器。这些结果严格刻画了KAN的逼近能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文完整刻画了KANs通用逼近所需的边缘函数条件，揭示了深度和函数非线性度的关系。理论结果表明KANs能以最少非仿射函数实现通用逼近，且仿射函数可大幅简化。该工作对实函数叠加理论有贡献，表明仅用坐标函数和两个固定一元函数通过加法和复合即可逼近任何多元连续函数。

title: LEGO: An LLM Skill-Based Front-End Design Generation Platform
abstract: Existing LLM-based EDA agents are often isolated task-specific systems. This leads to repeated engineering effort and limited reuse of successful design and debugging strategies. We present LEGO, a unified skill-based platform for front-end design generation. It decomposes the digital front-end flow into six independent steps and represents every agent capability as a standardized composable circuit skill within a plug-and-play architecture. To build this skill library, we survey more than 100 papers, select 11 representative open-source projects, and extract 42 executable circuit skills within a six-step finite state machine formulation. Circuit Skill Builder automates skill extraction with linear scalability. Agent Skill RAG achieves submillisecond retrieval without relying on embedding models. Empirical evaluation on a hard subset of 41 VerilogEval v2 problems that gpt-5.2-codex fails to solve under extra-high reasoning effort shows that individual circuit skills constructed within LEGO raise Pass@1 from 0.000 to 0.805. This is an 80.5% gain over the baseline. Cross-project skill compositions also reach 0.805 Pass@1. They outperform hierarchy-verilog by 14.6% and VerilogCoder by 2.5%. They also match MAGE.
