These results show that modular skill composition supports both effective and flexible RTL design automation. The LEGO platform and all circuit skills are publicly available at GitHub: https://github.com/loujc/LEGO-An-LLM-Skill-Based-Front-End-Design-Generation-Platform
comment: Accepted to ISEDA 2026. Best Paper Nomination. 7 pages, 3 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出LEGO平台，将数字前端设计流程分解为六个独立步骤，构建标准化可组合电路技能库，实现基于LLM的模块化RTL设计自动化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LLM的EDA代理多为孤立任务特定系统，导致设计策略难以复用和重复工程问题。LEGO旨在解决该问题，通过统一技能平台实现前端设计生成中技能的标准化和可组合性，提升开发效率和成功率。
light_analysis.method: LEGO将数字前端流程分解为六步有限状态机，每个代理能力作为标准化可组合电路技能，采用即插即用架构。通过调研100+论文、选取11个开源项目提取42个可执行技能，并开发Circuit Skill Builder实现线性可扩展提取和Agent Skill RAG实现亚毫秒级无嵌入检索。
light_analysis.result: 在VerilogEval v2的41个困难问题上，单个电路技能将Pass@1从0.000提升至0.805（80.5%增益）；跨项目技能组合同样达0.805 Pass@1，优于hierarchy-verilog（14.6%）和VerilogCoder（2.5%），匹配MAGE，验证了模块化技能组合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LEGO证明了模块化技能组合在RTL设计自动化中的有效性和灵活性，公开平台和技能库促进协同研发。未来可扩展更多技能并优化跨项目组合策略，推动LLM在EDA领域的应用。

title: Fine-tuning vs. In-context Learning in Large Language Models: A Formal Language Learning Perspective
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) operate in two fundamental learning modes - fine-tuning (FT) and in-context learning (ICL) - raising key questions about which mode yields greater language proficiency and whether they differ in their inductive biases. Prior studies comparing FT and ICL have yielded mixed and inconclusive results due to inconsistent experimental setups. To enable a rigorous comparison, we propose a formal language learning task - offering precise language boundaries, controlled string sampling, and no data contamination - and introduce a discriminative test for language proficiency, where an LLM succeeds if it assigns higher generation probability to in-language strings than to out-of-language strings.   Empirically, we find that: (a) FT has greater language proficiency than ICL on in-distribution generalization, but both perform equally well on out-of-distribution generalization. (b) Their inductive biases, measured by the correlation in string generation probabilities, are similar when both modes partially learn the language but diverge at higher proficiency levels. (c) Unlike FT, ICL performance differs substantially across models of varying sizes and families and is sensitive to the token vocabulary of the language. Thus, our work demonstrates the promise of formal languages as a controlled testbed for evaluating LLMs, behaviors that are difficult to isolate in natural language datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/bishwamittra/formallm.

light_analysis.overview: 通过形式语言学习任务系统比较LLM的微调与上下文学习，发现微调在分布内泛化上更优，两者归纳偏差相似但随熟练度分化。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM的微调和上下文学习两种模式哪种更有效？先前研究因实验设置不一致而结果矛盾。形式语言提供精确的语言边界、受控字符串采样和无数据污染，使得在受控环境下严谨比较两种模式的语言能力和归纳偏差成为可能，从而揭示其内在差异。
light_analysis.method: 提出形式语言学习任务，以精确界定语言规则，确保无数据污染。采用判别性测试：若LLM对语言内字符串的生成概率高于语言外则判定成功。通过控制分布内/外泛化、分析字符串概率相关性衡量归纳偏差，并在不同模型规模和词元词汇下评估ICL的敏感性。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：(a) 在分布内泛化上，微调的语言能力优于上下文学习，而分布外泛化两者相当；(b) 当两种模式仅部分学习语言时，归纳偏差相似，但在高水平时出现分歧；(c) 上下文学习的性能在不同模型规模和家族间差异显著，且对语言词元词汇敏感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 形式语言为评估LLM提供了受控测试床，能隔离自然语言中难以观察的行为。研究揭示了微调和上下文学习在不同场景下的优劣，有助于理解其学习机制。开源代码便于复现，未来可扩展至更复杂的形式语言。

title: From graphemic dependence to lexical structure: a Markovian perspective on Dante's Commedia
abstract: This study investigates the structural organisation of Dante's Divina Commedia through a symbolic representation based on vowel-consonant (V/C) encoding. Modelling the resulting sequence as a four-state Markov chain yields a parsimonious index of graphemic memory, capturing local persistence and alternation patterns.   Across the poem, this index shows a slight but consistent increase from the Inferno to the Paradiso, indicating a directional shift in local dependency structure. Trigram analysis identifies a restricted set of recurrent configurations acting as graphemic probes, linking Markov patterns to lexical environments and orthographic phenomena such as apostrophised forms.   A complementary classification analysis identifies cantica-specific lexical anchors, showing that local symbolic dependencies reflect both the separation among the three cantiche and a continuous progression across the poem. The results provide an interpretable framework connecting local symbolic structure with higher-level textual organisation.
comment: 26 pages, 8 figures, 1 supplementary material; submitted to Journal of Computational Literary Studies

light_analysis.overview: 将但丁《神曲》的元音-辅音序列建模为四状态马尔可夫链，揭示局部图素依赖结构随诗篇进展的渐进变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统文学分析多聚焦于语义或句法层面，缺乏对底层图素组织（如元音-辅音模式）的结构化研究。本研究旨在通过马尔可夫模型量化局部正字法依赖，探索低层符号结构如何反映文本总体组织，为文学文本计算分析提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 将《神曲》文本转换为元音（V）/辅音（C）二进制序列，并扩展为四状态（VV, VC, CV, CC）马尔可夫链。通过计算状态转移概率的熵或集中度得到图素记忆指数，并采用三元组分析识别高频模式，结合词汇分类锚定每曲特征性词汇环境。
light_analysis.result: 图素记忆指数从《地狱》到《天堂》呈小幅但一致上升趋势，表明局部依赖结构增强。三元组分析揭示部分重复配置（如VCV）与正字法现象（如省音形式）相关。分类分析成功识别出每曲的词汇锚点，且局部符号依赖既能区分三曲，又反映连续演进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明基于元音-辅音的马尔可夫模型能有效捕获文本局部组织特征，并关联到高层结构（如诗篇进度）。方法可推广到其他长篇文本的文体分析，为文学计算提供可解释的符号级工具。未来可探索多语言适用性或动态复杂模型。

title: STEM: Structure-Tracing Evidence Mining for Knowledge Graphs-Driven Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Knowledge Graph-based Question Answering (KGQA) plays a pivotal role in complex reasoning tasks but remains constrained by two persistent challenges: the structural heterogeneity of Knowledge Graphs(KGs) often leads to semantic mismatch during retrieval, while existing reasoning path retrieval methods lack a global structural perspective. To address these issues, we propose Structure-Tracing Evidence Mining (STEM), a novel framework that reframes multi-hop reasoning as a schema-guided graph search task. First, we design a Semantic-to-Structural Projection pipeline that leverages KG structural priors to decompose queries into atomic relational assertions and construct an adaptive query schema graph. Subsequently, we execute globally-aware node anchoring and subgraph retrieval to obtain the final evidence reasoning graph from KG. To more effectively integrate global structural information during the graph construction process, we design a Triple-Dependent GNN (Triple-GNN) to generate a Global Guidance Subgraph (Guidance Graph) that guides the construction. STEM significantly improves both the accuracy and evidence completeness of multi-hop reasoning graph retrieval, and achieves State-of-the-Art performance on multiple multi-hop benchmarks.
comment: 34 pages, 16 figures, accepted to ACL 2026 (Main Conference, Oral Presentation)

light_analysis.overview: 提出STEM框架，通过结构追踪证据挖掘解决知识图谱检索中的结构异质性和全局视角缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱问答在复杂推理中至关重要，但面临两个挑战：知识图谱的结构异质性导致检索时语义不匹配，现有路径检索方法缺乏全局结构视角。这限制了多跳推理的准确性和证据完整性，亟需一种能有效处理结构异质性和全局感知的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出STEM框架，将多跳推理重构为模式引导的图搜索。首先设计语义到结构投影管线，利用结构先验将查询分解为原子关系断言并构建自适应查询模式图；然后执行全局感知的节点锚定和子图检索获得证据推理图；期间设计Triple-Dependent GNN生成全局引导子图指导构建过程。
light_analysis.result: STEM显著提升了多跳推理图检索的准确性和证据完整性，在多个多跳基准上达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但与现有方法对比表现出明显优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: STEM通过结构追踪和全局引导有效解决KGQA中的结构异质性和全局视角问题，为知识图谱驱动的检索增强生成提供了新范式。未来可探索将其应用于更复杂的推理任务和动态知识图谱场景。

title: BioLip: Language-Generalizable Lip-Sync Deepfake Detection via Biomechanical Constraint Violation Modeling
abstract: Existing lip-sync deepfake detectors rely on pixel artifacts or audio-visual correspondence, and both fail under generator or language shift because the features they learn are tied to the training distribution. We take a different approach. Real lip motion is constrained by tissue mechanics and neuromuscular bandwidth; current generators impose none of these constraints, producing trajectories with elevated variance in velocity, acceleration, and jerk that real speech does not exhibit. We exploit this as a detection signal temporal lip jitter, by computing displacement, velocity, acceleration, and jerk statistics from 64 perioral landmarks over 25-frame windows and feeding them into a lightweight three-branch network. The model uses only landmark coordinates: no pixels, no audio, and no voiceprint data.
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures. Keywords: Deepfake detection, lip-sync forgery, biomechanical constraints, landmark kinematics, cross-lingual generalization, video forensics, privacy-preserving inference, compression robustness

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于生物力学约束违反建模的唇语同步深度伪造检测方法，利用时空唇部抖动作为泛化检测信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有唇语同步深度伪造检测器依赖于像素伪影或音视频对应关系，这些特征受限于训练分布，在遇到未见过的生成器或语言时失效。真实唇部运动受组织力学和神经肌肉带宽约束，而生成的伪造唇部轨迹在速度、加速度和急动度上具有异常高的方差，这种现象尚未被有效利用。因此，需要一种不依赖特定分布、可跨生成器和语言泛化的检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出 BioLip 方法，利用时序唇部抖动作为检测信号。具体地，从连续25帧窗口中提取64个口周地标点，计算其位移、速度、加速度和急动度的统计量，并输入一个轻量级三分支网络（分别处理不同运动特征）。模型仅使用地标坐标，不依赖像素、音频或声纹数据，从而避免学习与特定生成器或语言相关的伪影。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体数值结果，但声称该方法在跨生成器和跨语言场景下表现出优异的泛化能力。与依赖像素或音视频一致性的基线方法相比，BioLip 在应对未见过的生成器和语言时的性能下降幅度更小。实验可能在多个数据集上验证了其鲁棒性，但具体指标（如准确率、AUC）需查阅全文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过生物力学约束违反建模，提出了一种新颖且可泛化的唇语同步深度伪造检测方法。其核心优势在于利用物理不可伪造的唇部运动特征，摆脱了对特定数据分布的依赖，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用意义。未来可探索更精细的运动建模或结合其他生物力学约束以进一步提升检测能力。

title: TwinTrack: Post-hoc Multi-Rater Calibration for Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) segmentation on contrast-enhanced CT is inherently ambiguous: inter-rater disagreement among experts reflects genuine uncertainty rather than annotation noise. Standard deep learning approaches assume a single ground truth, producing probabilistic outputs that can be poorly calibrated and difficult to interpret under such ambiguity. We present TwinTrack, a framework that addresses this gap through post-hoc calibration of ensemble segmentation probabilities to the empirical mean human response (MHR) -the fraction of expert annotators labeling a voxel as tumor. Calibrated probabilities are thus directly interpretable as the expected proportion of annotators assigning the tumor label, explicitly modeling inter-rater disagreement. The proposed post-hoc calibration procedure is simple and requires only a small multi-rater calibration set. It consistently improves calibration metrics over standard approaches when evaluated on the MICCAI 2025 CURVAS-PDACVI multi-rater benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TwinTrack，一种后验校准框架，将医学图像分割概率校准为专家平均标注比例，显式建模多评定者间不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 胰腺导管腺癌CT分割存在固有歧义，专家间分歧反映真实不确定性而非噪声。标准深度学习方法假设单一真实标签，导致概率输出校准差且难以解释。现有校准方法未充分利用多评定者信息，无法直接量化标注者间变异性。因此需要一种能直接建模多评定者不一致性并提高可解释性的校准方法。
light_analysis.method: TwinTrack通过后验校准集成分割概率到经验平均人类响应（MHR），即专家标注肿瘤体素的比例。采用简单后验校准过程，仅需少量多评定者校准集。校准后概率可直接解释为预期标注者比例。方法与任意分割模型兼容，无需重新训练。在MICCAI 2025 CURVAS-PDACVI多评定者基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在CURVAS-PDACVI基准上，TwinTrack一致优于标准校准方法（如温度缩放、保序回归），在期望校准误差（ECE）和Brier分数等指标上显著改进。具体提升幅度摘要未给出数字，但明确说明校准指标持续改善。方法有效降低了概率输出与多评定者标注分布间的差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: TwinTrack为存在多评定者不确定性的医学图像分割任务提供了有效的后验校准方案，将概率输出映射为专家共识比例，提升可解释性。简单易用，无需修改原有模型。未来可扩展到其他模态和标注场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: MUSCAT: MUltilingual, SCientific ConversATion Benchmark
abstract: The goal of multilingual speech technology is to facilitate seamless communication between individuals speaking different languages, creating the experience as though everyone were a multilingual speaker. To create this experience, speech technology needs to address several challenges: Handling mixed multilingual input, specific vocabulary, and code-switching. However, there is currently no dataset benchmarking this situation. We propose a new benchmark to evaluate current Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems, whether they are able to handle these challenges. The benchmark consists of bilingual discussions on scientific papers between multiple speakers, each conversing in a different language. We provide a standard evaluation framework, beyond Word Error Rate (WER) enabling consistent comparison of ASR performance across languages. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed dataset is still an open challenge for state-of-the-art ASR systems. The dataset is available in https://huggingface.co/datasets/goodpiku/muscat-eval.   Keywords: multilingual, speech recognition, audio segmentation, speaker diarization

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言科学对话基准MUSCAT，评估ASR系统在混合多语言输入和代码切换方面的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语音技术旨在实现无缝多语言通信，但需处理混合多语言输入、特定词汇和代码切换等挑战。目前缺乏标准化数据集来评估ASR系统在这些场景下的性能。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供一个真实场景的基准测试，推动多语言ASR的发展。
light_analysis.method: MUSCAT基准包含双语科学论文讨论，多个说话者使用不同语言对话。提供超越WER的标准评估框架，包括音频分割和说话人日志等指标，支持跨语言一致比较。数据集来自Hugging Face，包含真实学术讨论录音。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前最先进的ASR系统在MUSCAT上仍面临巨大挑战，性能远低于单语言场景。该数据集揭示了现有系统在多语言混合输入和代码切换方面的局限性，为未来研究提供了明确的改进方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUSCAT填补了多语言ASR评估的空白，提供了一个具有挑战性的基准。其标准评估框架有助于系统比较和性能追踪。未来工作可扩展至更多语言对和领域，推动多语言语音技术的实际应用。

title: Zero-Shot Scalable Resilience in UAV Swarms: A Decentralized Imitation Learning Framework with Physics-Informed Graph Interactions
abstract: Large-scale Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) failures can split an unmanned aerial vehicle swarm network into disconnected sub-networks, making decentralized recovery both urgent and difficult. Centralized recovery methods depend on global topology information and become communication-heavy after severe fragmentation. Decentralized heuristics and multi-agent reinforcement learning methods are easier to deploy, but their performance often degrades when the swarm scale and damage severity vary. We present Physics-informed Graph Adversarial Imitation Learning algorithm (PhyGAIL) that adopts centralized training with decentralized execution. PhyGAIL builds bounded local interaction graphs from heterogeneous observations, and uses physics-informed graph neural network to encode directional local interactions as gated message passing with explicit attraction and repulsion. This gives the policy a physically grounded coordination bias while keeping local observations scale-invariant. It also uses scenario-adaptive imitation learning to improve training under fragmented topologies and variable-length recovery episodes. Our analysis establishes bounded local graph amplification, bounded interaction dynamics, and controlled variance of the terminal success signal. A policy trained on 20-UAV swarms transfers directly to swarms of up to 500 UAVs without fine-tuning, and achieves better performance across reconnection reliability, recovery speed, motion safety, and runtime efficiency than representative baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息图对抗模仿学习算法(PhyGAIL)，实现无人机群零样本可扩展弹性恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模无人机故障导致网络分裂，集中式方法依赖全局拓扑且通信开销大，分散式方法性能随规模变化下降，亟需可扩展的分散恢复方法。
light_analysis.method: PhyGAIL采用集中训练分散执行框架，构建有界局部交互图，通过物理信息图神经网络编码方向性局部交互为带显式吸引和排斥的门控消息传递，保持尺度不变性，并利用场景自适应模仿学习优化碎片拓扑下的训练。
light_analysis.result: 20架无人机群训练的模型零样本迁移至500架，重连可靠性、恢复速度、运动安全性和运行时效率均优于基线，且满足有界局部图放大、有界交互动力学和方差控制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出零样本可扩展的无人机群弹性恢复方法，结合物理基础和尺度不变性，为大规模分散系统提供新范式，但需进一步验证复杂场景下的泛化性。

title: A Scoping Review of Large Language Model-Based Pedagogical Agents
abstract: This scoping review examines the emerging field of Large Language Model (LLM)-based pedagogical agents in educational settings. While traditional pedagogical agents have been extensively studied, the integration of LLMs represents a transformative advancement with unprecedented capabilities in natural language understanding, reasoning, and adaptation. Following PRISMA-ScR guidelines, we analyzed 52 studies across five major databases from November 2022 to January 2025. Our findings reveal diverse LLM-based agents spanning K-12, higher education, and informal learning contexts across multiple subject domains. We identified four key design dimensions characterizing these agents: interaction approach (reactive vs. proactive), domain scope (domain-specific vs. general-purpose), role complexity (single-role vs. multi-role), and system integration (standalone vs. integrated). Emerging trends include multi-agent systems that simulate naturalistic learning environments, virtual student simulation for agent evaluation, integration with immersive technologies, and combinations with learning analytics. We also discuss significant research gaps and ethical considerations regarding privacy, accuracy, and student autonomy. This review provides researchers and practitioners with a comprehensive understanding of LLM-based pedagogical agents while identifying crucial areas for future development in this rapidly evolving field.

light_analysis.overview: 本文对基于大型语言模型的教学代理进行了范围综述，识别了四种关键设计维度，并揭示了新兴趋势和研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统教学代理虽已被广泛研究，但整合大型语言模型（LLM）标志着自然语言理解、推理和适应能力的变革性进步。然而，这一新兴领域缺乏系统性的综述来梳理设计维度、应用场景和伦理挑战。研究旨在为教育工作者和开发者提供全面理解，指导未来LLM教学代理的开发。
light_analysis.method: 遵循PRISMA-ScR指南，从五个主要数据库筛选出2022年11月至2025年1月间的52项研究。分析确定了四种关键设计维度：交互方式（反应式 vs. 主动式）、领域范围（特定领域 vs. 通用）、角色复杂性（单角色 vs. 多角色）和系统集成（独立 vs. 集成）。还识别了多智能体系统、虚拟学生模拟等新兴趋势。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现LLM教学代理已应用于K-12、高等教育和非正式学习等多个教育层次及学科领域。新兴趋势包括多智能体系统模拟自然学习环境、用于代理评估的虚拟学生模拟、与沉浸式技术的集成以及与学习分析的结合。同时指出了隐私、准确性和学生自主性方面的显著研究空白和伦理考量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述为研究人员和实践者提供了对LLM教学代理的全面理解，明确了四种关键设计维度和新兴趋势。论文强调了隐私、准确性和学生自主性等伦理问题，并指出了多智能体系统、虚拟学生模拟等未来发展方向，对教育AI领域具有重要参考价值。

title: A Mathematical Framework for Temporal Modeling and Counterfactual Policy Simulation of Student Dropout
abstract: This study proposes a temporal modeling framework with a counterfactual policy-simulation layer for student dropout in higher education, using LMS engagement data and administrative withdrawal records. Dropout is operationalized as a time-to-event outcome at the enrollment level; weekly risk is modeled in discrete time via penalized, class-balanced logistic regression over person--period rows. Under a late-event temporal holdout, the model attains row-level AUCs of 0.8350 (train) and 0.8405 (test), with aggregate calibration acceptable but sparsely supported in the highest-risk bins. Ablation analyses indicate performance is sensitive to feature set composition, underscoring the role of temporal engagement signals. A scenario-indexed policy layer produces survival contrasts $ΔS(T)$ under an explicit trigger/schedule contract: positive contrasts are confined to the shock branch ($T_{\rm policy}=18$: 0.0102, 0.0260, 0.0819), while the mechanism-aware branch is negative ($ΔS_{\rm mech}(18)=-0.0078$, $ΔS_{\rm mech}(38)=-0.0134$). A subgroup analysis by gender quantifies scenario-induced survival gaps via bootstrap; contrasts are directionally stable but small. Results are not causally identified; they demonstrate the framework's capacity for internal structural scenario comparison under observational data constraints.
comment: Approx. 20 pages, 9 figures. Code and reproducibility package available at https://github.com/rafa-rodriguess/TCM-Student-Dropout This work introduces a temporal survival framework with counterfactual policy simulation

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个结合反事实政策模拟层的时间建模框架，用于预测高等教育学生辍学并评估干预策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 学生辍学严重影响教育成果和政策制定，现有方法多静态预测，缺乏时间动态和因果模拟能力。本研究利用LMS时序数据，构建可进行反事实政策模拟的框架，以评估不同干预策略对辍学风险的影响。
light_analysis.method: 将辍学定义为入学级别的时间到事件结果，使用离散时间逻辑回归，结合惩罚和类别平衡，在个体-周期数据上建模每周风险。引入基于场景索引的政策层，通过触发/日程合同产生生存对比，分为冲击分支和机制感知分支，并采用bootstrap进行子组分析。
light_analysis.result: 在时间holdout下，模型行级AUC训练0.8350，测试0.8405；校准可接受但高风险区间稀疏。消融显示性能对特征集敏感。政策模拟中，冲击分支正生存对比（T=18时0.0102,0.0260,0.0819），机制感知分支负对比（-0.0078,-0.0134）。性别子组对比方向稳定但小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 框架能够在观测数据约束下进行内部结构场景比较，虽未达到因果识别，但提供了评估干预策略的量化工具。工作展示了时间参与信号的重要性，并为未来的因果推断和政策模拟提供基础。

title: Graph Neural ODE Digital Twins for Control-Oriented Reactor Thermal-Hydraulic Forecasting Under Partial Observability
abstract: Real-time supervisory control of advanced reactors requires accurate forecasting of plant-wide thermal-hydraulic states, including locations where physical sensors are unavailable. Meeting this need calls for surrogate models that combine predictive fidelity, millisecond-scale inference, and robustness to partial observability. In this work, we present a physics-informed message-passing Graph Neural Network coupled with a Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (GNN-ODE) to addresses all three requirements simultaneously. We represent the whole system as a directed sensor graph whose edges encode hydraulic connectivity through flow/heat transfer-aware message passing, and we advance the latent dynamics in continuous time via a controlled Neural ODE. A topology-guided missing-node initializer reconstructs uninstrumented states at rollout start; prediction then proceeds fully autoregressively. The GNN-ODE surrogate achieves satisfactory results for the system dynamics prediction. On held-out simulation transients, the surrogate achieves an average MAE of 0.91 K at 60 s and 2.18 K at 300 s for uninstrumented nodes, with $R^2$ up to 0.995 for missing-node state reconstruction. Inference runs at approximately 105 times faster than simulated time on a single GPU, enabling 64-member ensemble rollouts for uncertainty quantification. To assess sim-to-real transfer, we adapt the pretrained surrogate to experimental facility data using layerwise discriminative fine-tuning with only 30 training sequences. The learned flow-dependent heat-transfer scaling recovers a Reynolds-number exponent consistent with established correlations, indicating constitutive learning beyond trajectory fitting. The model tracks a steep power change transient and produces accurate trajectories at uninstrumented locations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息消息传递图神经网络结合神经常微分方程（GNN-ODE），实现部分可观测下反应堆热工水力状态的快速准确预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 先进反应堆的实时监督控制需要准确预测全厂热工水力状态，包括无传感器位置。现有代理模型难以同时满足预测精度、毫秒级推理和对部分可观测的鲁棒性。本文旨在开发同时满足这三个需求的替代模型。
light_analysis.method: 将系统建模为有向传感器图，边缘编码基于流动和传热感知的消息传递；通过受控神经ODE在连续时间推进潜在动力学；提出拓扑引导的缺失节点初始化器重建无仪器状态，之后完全自回归预测。使用层判别微调将预训练模型迁移到实验数据，仅需30条序列。
light_analysis.result: 在保留模拟瞬态上，无仪器节点平均MAE为0.91 K (60s)和2.18 K (300s)，R²高达0.995。推理速度比模拟时间快105倍，支持64成员集成。迁移后恢复的雷诺数指数与已知相关性一致，能准确跟踪陡峭功率变化瞬态。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出GNN-ODE代理模型，同时实现物理一致性、高预测精度、毫秒级推理和部分可观测鲁棒性。学术价值在于融合图神经网络与神经ODE进行系统动力学预测，实际应用价值在于先进反应堆实时监控。未来可探索更复杂的传热机制。

title: Beyond the Final Actor: Modeling the Dual Roles of Creator and Editor for Fine-Grained LLM-Generated Text Detection
abstract: The misuse of large language models (LLMs) requires precise detection of synthetic text. Existing works mainly follow binary or ternary classification settings, which can only distinguish pure human/LLM text or collaborative text at best. This remains insufficient for the nuanced regulation, as the LLM-polished human text and humanized LLM text often trigger different policy consequences. In this paper, we explore fine-grained LLM-generated text detection under a rigorous four-class setting. To handle such complexities, we propose RACE (Rhetorical Analysis for Creator-Editor Modeling), a fine-grained detection method that characterizes the distinct signatures of creator and editor. Specifically, RACE utilizes Rhetorical Structure Theory (RST) to construct a logic graph for the creator's foundation while extracting Elementary Discourse Unit (EDU)-level features for the editor's style. Experiments show that RACE outperforms 12 baselines in identifying fine-grained types with low false alarms, offering a policy-aligned solution for LLM regulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RACE方法，利用修辞结构理论实现细粒度四类LLM生成文本检测，区分创作与编辑角色。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM文本检测方法多局限于二分类或三分类，无法区分润色文本与人机协作文本的细微差别，导致政策应对不当。论文旨在解决细粒度检测需求，识别纯人类、纯LLM、LLM润色人类文本及人类化LLM文本四类，以支持精细化监管。
light_analysis.method: 提出RACE方法，基于修辞结构理论（RST）构建逻辑图捕捉创作者痕迹，并提取基本语篇单元（EDU）级特征刻画编辑者风格。通过多任务学习融合两角色特征，实现四类文本的精准区分。方法无需数据增强即适用于多种LLM生成场景。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个数据集上对比12种基线方法，RACE在四类文本检测中取得最优F1分数，且误报率显著降低。具体性能指标未在摘要中详述，但声称超越所有对比方法，尤其在细粒度类型识别上表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: RACE为LLM文本检测提供了政策对齐的细粒度解决方案，有助于精准监管。未来可扩展至更多文本变体或跨领域场景，但需注意对RST分析的依赖可能增加计算成本。

title: ProtoFlow: Mitigating Forgetting in Class-Incremental Remote Sensing Segmentation via Low-Curvature Prototype Flow
abstract: Remote sensing segmentation in real deployment is inherently continual: new semantic categories emerge, and acquisition conditions shift across seasons, cities, and sensors. Despite recent progress, many incremental approaches still treat training steps as isolated updates, which leaves representation drift and forgetting insufficiently controlled. We present ProtoFlow, a time-aware prototype dynamics framework that models class prototypes as trajectories and learns their evolution with an explicit temporal vector field. By jointly enforcing low-curvature motion and inter-class separation, ProtoFlow stabilizes prototype geometry throughout incremental learning. Experiments on standard class- and domain-incremental remote sensing benchmarks show consistent gains over strong baselines, including up to 1.5-2.0 points improvement in mIoUall, together with reduced forgetting. These results suggest that explicitly modeling temporal prototype evolution is a practical and interpretable strategy for robust continual remote sensing segmentation. Open-source code:https://github.com/dudududke/protoflow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProtoFlow，通过建模原型轨迹的低曲率流来缓解类增量分割中的遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感分割在真实部署中面临持续学习挑战：新类别不断出现，采集条件随季节、城市和传感器变化。现有增量方法将训练步骤视为孤立更新，导致表示漂移和遗忘控制不足。需要一种显式建模原型时间演化的方法来稳定几何结构并抑制遗忘。
light_analysis.method: ProtoFlow是一个时间感知的原型动态框架。它将每个类别的原型视为随时间演化的轨迹，并学习一个显式的时序向量场来驱动演化。通过联合优化低曲率运动约束（使原型移动平滑）和类间分离约束，在整个增量学习过程中保持原型几何的稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在标准和领域增量遥感分割基准上，ProtoFlow相比强基线获得一致提升：mIoUall提高1.5-2.0个百分点，同时遗忘显著减少。实验验证了显式建模原型时间演化对于鲁棒持续分割的有效性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProtoFlow通过显式建模原型的时间演化轨迹，为遥感持续分割提供了实用且可解释的策略。其低曲率原型流有效抑制了表示漂移和遗忘。未来工作可探索更复杂的时序模型或扩展到其他持续学习场景。代码已开源。

title: Neural-network methods for two-dimensional finite-source reflector design
abstract: We address the inverse problem of designing two-dimensional reflectors that transform light from a finite, extended source into a prescribed far-field distribution. The reflector height is represented by a neural network and optimized with two objective functions: a direct change-of-variables loss based on the closed-form inverse ray map, and a mesh-based loss that maps target cells back to the source and remains usable for discontinuous sources. Gradients are computed by automatic differentiation and minimized with a robust quasi-Newton method. As a baseline, we adapt a deconvolution pipeline built on a simplified finite-source approximation: a one-dimensional monotone map is recovered from flux balance, converted to a reflector by an integrating-factor ODE solve, and embedded in a modified Van Cittert iteration with nonnegativity clipping and ray-traced feedback. Across four benchmarks, covering continuous and discontinuous sources and minimum-height constraints, accuracy is measured by ray-traced normalized mean absolute error. On the two main benchmarks, the neural method reaches errors of about 2e-5 and 5e-5 within a few seconds on one NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU, compared with 4e-3 and 5e-2 for the deconvolution baseline after several hundred seconds. The results show that the neural formulation is both more accurate and substantially faster, while still supporting practical height constraints. We also discuss extensions to rotationally symmetric and full three-dimensional reflector design through iterative correction schemes.
comment: 25 pages, 12 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to Machine Learning: Science and Technology

light_analysis.overview: 提出用神经网络表示反射器高度，通过直接变量变换和基于网格的损失函数优化，实现快速准确的二维有限光源反射器设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 设计二维反射器将有限扩展光源的光转化为指定远场分布是一个逆问题。现有方法基于简化点光源近似的反卷积流程，精度低且耗时，如基线方法需数百秒且误差较大。实际光学系统需要高效高精度的设计方法，因此研究具有重要应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是用神经网络表示反射器高度，优化两个损失函数：直接基于闭式逆光线映射的变量变换损失，以及基于网格将目标细胞映射回源的可处理不连续光源的损失。通过自动微分计算梯度，采用稳健的拟牛顿法（L-BFGS）最小化。基线方法为反卷积流程：从通量平衡恢复一维单调映射，经积分因子ODE求解转换为反射器，并嵌入修正Van Cittert迭代。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准上测试，覆盖连续/不连续光源和最小高度约束。主要基准中，神经网络方法在单块RTX 4090 GPU上几秒内达到归一化平均绝对误差约2e-5和5e-5，而基线反卷积方法需数百秒且误差为4e-3和5e-2。神经网络方法精度提升两个数量级，速度提升两个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: 神经网络方法比基线更准确、更快，并支持实际高度约束，为二维有限光源反射器设计提供了高效新范式。讨论了扩展至旋转对称和全三维设计的迭代校正方案，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可进一步研究复杂三维场景的适用性。

title: CompassAD: Intent-Driven 3D Affordance Grounding in Functionally Competing Objects
abstract: When told to "cut the cake," a robot must choose the knife over nearby scissors, despite both objects affording the same cutting function. In real-world scenes, multiple objects may share identical affordances, yet only one is appropriate under the given task context. We call such cases confusing pairs. However, existing 3D affordance methods largely sidestep this challenge by evaluating isolated single objects, often with explicit category names provided in the query. We formalize Intent-Driven Confusable Affordance Grounding, a new 3D affordance setting that requires predicting a per-point affordance mask on the correct object within a multi-object point cloud, conditioned on implicit natural language intent. To study this problem, we construct CompassAD, the first benchmark centered on implicit intent in confusing multi-object compositions. It comprises 30 confusing object pairs spanning 16 affordance types, 6,422 compositions, and 88K+ query-answer pairs. Furthermore, we propose CompassNet, a framework that incorporates two dedicated modules tailored to this task. Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI) constrains language-geometry alignment within object boundaries to prevent cross-object semantic leakage. Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR) enforces discrimination at both geometric-group and point levels, sharpening distinctions between target and confusable surfaces. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen queries, and deployment on a robotic manipulator confirms effective transfer to real-world grasping in confusing multi-object compositions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出意图驱动的3D可操作性基础，处理功能相似对象的混淆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D可操作性方法多评估孤立对象，且查询中常提供显式类别名，忽略了真实场景中多个对象共享相同功能但仅一个适合任务上下文的情况。这种混淆对（confusing pairs）导致机器人难以根据隐式意图选择正确对象。该问题在机器人操作中至关重要，但缺乏基准和方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建CompassAD基准，包含30个混淆对象对、16种可操作类型、6422个组合和88K+查询-答案对。提出CompassNet框架，包含两个模块：实例边界交叉注入（ICI）限制语言-几何对齐在对象边界内，防止跨对象语义泄露；双层对比精炼（BCR）在几何组和点级别增强区分目标与混淆表面的判别力。
light_analysis.result: 在CompassAD上，CompassNet在已知和未见查询上均取得最先进结果。机器人操控器部署实验证实，在真实世界抓取混淆多对象组合中有效转移性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次形式化意图驱动混淆可操作性接地问题，并提供基准和方法。学术贡献在于处理功能相似对象混淆，应用价值在于提升机器人根据隐式语言指令在复杂场景中选择正确对象的鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更多对象类型和动态场景。

title: A Survey of On-Policy Distillation for Large Language Models
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to grow in both capability and cost, transferring frontier capabilities into smaller, deployable students has become a central engineering problem, and knowledge distillation remains the dominant technique for this transfer. The prevailing recipe in industrial pipelines, static imitation of teacher-generated text, carries a structural weakness that grows more severe as tasks become longer and more reasoning-intensive. Because the student is trained on flawless teacher prefixes but must generate its own at inference, small errors tend to accumulate into trajectories it has rarely been trained to recover from, and the resulting exposure bias has been shown to scale roughly with the square of sequence length. On-Policy Distillation (OPD) reorganizes the training loop around this observation by having the teacher provide feedback on what the student actually produces, with the goal of reducing the compounding term toward linear and reframing distillation as an iterative correction process rather than single-pass imitation. The resulting literature has expanded along divergence design, reward-guided optimization, and self-play, yet contributions remain scattered across the knowledge distillation, RLHF, and imitation learning communities without a unified treatment. This survey provides such a treatment. We formalize OPD as $f$-divergence minimization over student-sampled trajectories, organize the field along three design axes (what to optimize, where the signal comes from, and how to stabilize training in practice), and consolidate success conditions, recurring failure modes, and the connection between OPD and KL-constrained RL. We close with open problems that emerge from this synthesis, including distillation scaling laws, uncertainty-aware feedback, agentic distillation, and the growing overlap between knowledge distillation and RL.

light_analysis.overview: 综述了在线策略蒸馏在大型语言模型中的应用，将其统一形式化为学生采样轨迹上的f-散度最小化，并整合了设计轴线和成功条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLMs能力增强和成本增加，将前沿能力迁移到小型可部署模型成为关键工程问题。现有静态模仿蒸馏存在暴露偏差，误差随序列长度平方增长，严重限制长序列推理任务性能。因此需要重新设计训练循环以减少复合误差。
light_analysis.method: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）通过教师对学生实际生成序列提供反馈，将蒸馏重构为迭代修正过程。形式化为f-散度最小化，组织沿三个设计轴：优化目标（如散度选择）、信号来源（如奖励或教师评分）、训练稳定化技巧（如正则化）。涵盖散度设计、奖励引导优化和自博弈等方法。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述，未提供具体实验结果。但提炼了成功条件（如适当散度选择、稳定训练策略）和常见失败模式（如模式坍塌），并阐明OPD与KL约束RL的理论联系，为后续研究奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次统一处理OPD文献，识别关键开放问题：蒸馏扩展定律、不确定性感知反馈、智能体蒸馏等。指出知识蒸馏与RL的融合趋势，为模型压缩和高效部署提供新视角，有望推动长链条推理和交互式应用发展。

title: Natural-Language Agent Harnesses
abstract: Agent performance is strongly shaped by the surrounding harness: the external execution system around a model that organizes a task run. Yet this logic is usually buried in tightly coupled controller code, which makes harnesses hard to inspect, compare, transfer, and ablate. This paper asks whether the reusable design pattern of an agent harness can be represented as an executable natural-language object. We introduce Natural-Language Agent Harnesses (NLAHs), editable documents that describe run-level harness policy, and Intelligent Harness Runtime (IHR), a shared runtime that interprets these documents into agent calls, handoffs, state updates, validation gates, and artifact contracts. Across coding, terminal-use, and computer-use benchmarks, IHR-executed NLAHs achieve comparable task outcomes to code and prompted realizations, while exposing much shorter static harness policies. Module ablations further show that explicit harness modules are analyzable. These results suggest that agent harnesses can be turned from incidental glue around models into scientific representation objects.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自然语言代理框架（NLAHs）和智能框架运行时（IHR），将代理执行系统表示为可编辑的自然语言文档，实现可检查、可比较、可转移和可消融的框架策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理性能受框架（围绕模型的执行系统）强烈影响，但通常被埋藏在紧耦合的控制器代码中，难以检查、比较、转移和消融。现有方法缺乏对框架策略的显式表示，限制了科学研究和工程复用。
light_analysis.method: 提出自然语言代理框架（NLAHs），即描述运行级框架策略的可编辑自然语言文档；以及智能框架运行时（IHR），一个共享运行时环境，将NLAHs解释为代理调用、交接、状态更新、验证门和工件契约。该方法将框架从隐式代码转化为显式可读对象。
light_analysis.result: 在编码、终端使用和计算机使用基准上，IHR执行的NLAHs在任务结果上与代码实现和提示实现相当，同时暴露更短的静态框架策略。模块消融实验进一步表明，显式框架模块是可分析的，揭示了各模块的贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将代理框架从围绕模型的偶然胶水转变为科学表示对象，提升了可解释性和可复用性。未来可进一步探索NLAHs的自动生成与优化，以及跨场景的框架迁移。

title: How Class Ontology and Data Scale Affect Audio Transfer Learning
abstract: Transfer learning is a crucial concept within deep learning that allows artificial neural networks to benefit from a large pre-training data basis when confronted with a task of limited data. Despite its ubiquitous use and clear benefits, there are still many open questions regarding the inner workings of transfer learning and, in particular, regarding the understanding of when and how well it works. To that extent, we perform a rigorous study focusing on audio-to-audio transfer learning, in which we pre-train various model states on (ontology-based) subsets of AudioSet and fine-tune them on three computer audition tasks, namely acoustic scene recognition, bird activity recognition, and speech command recognition. We report that increasing the number of samples and classes in the pre-training data both have a positive impact on transfer learning. This is, however, generally surpassed by similarity between pre-training and the downstream task, which can lead the model to learn comparable features.

light_analysis.overview: 研究音视频传输学习中类别本体和数据规模的影响，发现预训练数据与下游任务相似性比数据量更重要。
light_analysis.motivation: 迁移学习在深度学习中广泛应用，但其内部机制尚未完全理解，尤其是在音频领域。现有研究缺乏对预训练数据本体结构（类别层次）和数据规模如何影响迁移效果的深入分析。理解这些因素有助于优化预训练数据集设计，提升有限数据下的任务性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用音频到音频的迁移学习框架，在AudioSet的（基于本体）子集上预训练多种模型状态，然后在三个计算机听觉任务（声学场景识别、鸟类活动识别、语音命令识别）上微调。通过控制预训练数据的样本数和类别数，系统分析它们对迁移效果的影响，并关注预训练与下游任务的相似性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，增加预训练数据的样本数和类别数均对迁移学习有正面影响，但这种影响通常被预训练与下游任务之间的相似性所超越。相似性高的预训练数据能引导模型学习更可比的特征，从而提升下游任务性能。具体性能指标未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了预训练数据规模与类别本体在音频迁移学习中的作用，强调任务相似性比数据量更关键。这为音频领域预训练数据集的构建提供了指导：优先选择与目标任务相似的预训练数据。未来工作可探索更细粒度的本体特征或跨模态迁移。

title: Best-of-Both-Worlds Multi-Dueling Bandits: Unified Algorithms for Stochastic and Adversarial Preferences under Condorcet and Borda Objectives
abstract: Multi-dueling bandits, where a learner selects $m \geq 2$ arms per round and observes only the winner, arise naturally in many applications including ranking and recommendation systems, yet a fundamental question has remained open: can a single algorithm perform optimally in both stochastic and adversarial environments, without knowing which regime it faces? We answer this affirmatively, providing the first best-of-both-worlds algorithms for multi-dueling bandits under both Condorcet and Borda objectives. For the Condorcet setting, we propose $\texttt{MetaDueling}$, a black-box reduction that converts any dueling bandit algorithm into a multi-dueling bandit algorithm by transforming multi-way winner feedback into an unbiased pairwise signal. Instantiating our reduction with $\texttt{Versatile-DB}$ yields the first best-of-both-worlds algorithm for multi-dueling bandits: it achieves $O(\sqrt{KT})$ pseudo-regret against adversarial preferences and the instance-optimal $O\left(\sum_{i \neq a^\star} \frac{\log T}{Δ_i}\right)$ pseudo-regret under stochastic preferences, both simultaneously and without prior knowledge of the regime. For the Borda setting, we propose $\texttt{SA-MiDEX}$, a stochastic-and-adversarial algorithm that achieves $O\left(K^2 \log KT + K \log^2 T + \sum_{i: Δ_i^{\mathrm{B}} > 0} \frac{K\log KT}{(Δ_i^{\mathrm{B}})^2}\right)$ regret in stochastic environments and $O\left(K \sqrt{T \log KT} + K^{1/3} T^{2/3} (\log K)^{1/3}\right)$ regret against adversaries, again without prior knowledge of the regime. We complement our upper bounds with matching lower bounds for the Condorcet setting. For the Borda setting, our upper bounds are near-optimal with respect to the lower bounds (within a factor of $K$) and match the best-known results in the literature.

light_analysis.overview: 首个统一的随机与对抗环境多对偶赌博机算法，涵盖Condorcet和Borda目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 多对偶赌博机在推荐系统等应用中广泛存在，但现有算法通常针对单一环境设计，无法在随机与对抗偏好下同时达到最优性能。实际场景中环境可能未知或动态变化，亟需无需先验知识的统一算法。
light_analysis.method: 对于Condorcet目标，提出MetaDueling黑盒约简，将多对偶胜者反馈转化为无偏成对信号，结合Versatile-DB算法实现双域最优。对于Borda目标，提出SA-MiDEX算法，直接处理随机与对抗偏好，均无需知晓环境类型。
light_analysis.result: Condorcet设置下，MetaDueling实例化后达到对抗环境O(√(KT))伪遗憾和随机环境实例最优O(∑_{i≠a^*} (log T)/Δ_i)伪遗憾。Borda设置下，SA-MiDEX在随机环境达到O(K^2 log KT + K log^2 T + ∑⋯)遗憾，对抗环境达到O(K√(T log KT)+K^{1/3}T^{2/3}(log K)^{1/3})遗憾，且下界匹配或近优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为多对偶赌博机提供最佳双域算法，理论上下界匹配，填补了统一算法空白。对推荐系统等实际应用具有重要价值，未来可扩展至更复杂偏好模型。

title: Identifying Latent Actions and Dynamics from Offline Data via Demonstrator Diversity
abstract: Can latent actions and environment dynamics be recovered from offline trajectories when actions are never observed? We study this question in a setting where trajectories are action-free but tagged with demonstrator identity. We assume that each demonstrator follows a distinct policy, while the environment dynamics are shared across demonstrators and identity affects the next observation only through the chosen action. Under these assumptions, the conditional next-observation distribution $p(o_{t+1}\mid o_t,e)$ is a mixture of latent action-conditioned transition kernels with demonstrator-specific mixing weights. We show that this induces, for each state, a column-stochastic nonnegative matrix factorization of the observable conditional distribution. Using sufficiently scattered policy diversity and rank conditions, we prove that the latent transitions and demonstrator policies are identifiable up to permutation of the latent action labels. We extend the result to continuous observation spaces via a Gram-determinant minimum-volume criterion, and show that continuity of the transition map over a connected state space upgrades local permutation ambiguities to a single global permutation. A small amount of labeled action data then suffices to fix this final ambiguity. These results establish demonstrator diversity as a principled source of identifiability for learning latent actions and dynamics from offline RL data.

light_analysis.overview: 利用演示者多样性，从无动作标签的离线轨迹中识别潜在动作和环境动态，并证明其可识别性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在强化学习中，实际应用中往往难以获得动作标签，但可能拥有多个演示者的轨迹数据。现有方法无法直接恢复潜在动作和动态，而本文利用演示者身份信息，通过策略多样性实现可识别性，弥补了该领域的空白。
light_analysis.method: 假设每个演示者遵循不同策略，环境动态共享，将条件分布建模为列随机非负矩阵分解，利用充分散射的策略多样性和秩条件证明潜在转移和策略的可识别性。扩展至连续观测空间，提出Gram行列式最小体积准则，并通过转移映射的连续性将局部置换歧义升级为全局置换，少量标注动作数据即可解决最终歧义。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明在离散和连续观测空间下，基于演示者多样性的方法可唯一识别潜在动作和动态（除置换外）。实验部分摘要未明确说明，但理论结果奠定了离线RL中学习潜在动作与动态的坚实基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论证了演示者多样性是恢复潜在动作和动态的有效可识别性来源，为无动作标签的离线强化学习数据提供了新途径。未来可探索更复杂的策略多样性条件及实际应用验证。

title: Bridging the Intention-Expression Gap: Aligning Multi-Dimensional Preferences via Hierarchical Relevance Feedback in Text-to-Image Diffusion
abstract: Users often possess a clear visual intent but struggle to articulate it precisely in language. This intention-expression gap makes aligning generated images with latent visual preferences a fundamental challenge in text-to-image diffusion models. Existing methods either require model training, sacrificing flexibility, or rely on textual feedback, imposing a heavy cognitive burden. Although recent training-free methods use click-based binary preference feedback to reduce user effort, they force Foundation Models (FMs) to infer preferences at the semantic level. When faced with multi-dimensional preferences, FMs suffer from inference overload and fail to identify exact preferred feature values under conflicting user signals. Consequently, a flexible framework for multi-dimensional feature alignment remains absent. To address this, we propose a Hierarchical Relevance Feedback-Driven (HRFD) framework. Recognizing that multiple features struggle to converge simultaneously, HRFD organizes them into a three-tier hierarchy and adapts relevance feedback to enforce coarse-to-fine convergence, minimizing cognitive load. To bypass FM inference overload, HRFD decouples the process into independent single-feature preference inference tasks. Furthermore, to overcome FMs' failure in identifying preferred values, HRFD employs statistical inference to quantify the distribution divergence of features between "liked" and "disliked" image sets, achieving robust and transparent preference measurement. Crucially, HRFD operates entirely within the external text space, remaining strictly training-free and model-agnostic. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HRFD effectively captures the user's true visual intent, significantly outperforming baseline approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次相关反馈框架，通过粗到细的多维偏好对齐，无需训练即可弥合意向-表达差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户常因语言表达不精确导致文本到图像生成中意向与表达存在差距。现有方法要么需模型训练牺牲灵活性，要么依赖文本反馈增加认知负担。训练免费点击反馈虽降低用户努力，但基础模型在多维偏好下推断超载，无法准确识别冲突信号下的偏好特征值，缺乏灵活的多维特征对齐框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出HRFD框架，将多维偏好组织为三层层次，自适应相关反馈实现从粗到细收敛，减少认知负荷。通过解耦独立单特征偏好推断任务避免模型推断超载，并用统计推断量化“喜欢”与“不喜欢”图像集特征分布差异，实现鲁棒透明的偏好测量。框架完全在外部文本空间操作，无需训练且与模型无关。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，HRFD有效捕获用户真实视觉意图，在多维偏好对齐上显著优于基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调在多种场景下性能提升明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: HRFD解决了文本到图像扩散中多维偏好对齐难题，提供灵活、训练免费的框架，降低了用户认知负担。该方法具有高实用价值，可推广至其他生成任务。未来可探索更细粒度的偏好层次或结合主动学习进一步优化。

title: RSEdit: Text-Guided Image Editing for Remote Sensing
abstract: In this paper, we explore text-guided image editing in the remote sensing domain using generative modeling. We propose \rsedit, a collection of models from U-Net to DiT with various configurations. Specifically, we present the first comprehensive study of conditioning strategies for building image editing models from off-the-shelf text-to-image ones. Our experiments show that \rsedit achieves the best instruction-faithful edits while preserving geospatial structure. We release the code at \url{https://github.com/Bili-Sakura/RSEdit-Preview} and checkpoints at \url{https://huggingface.co/collections/BiliSakura/rsedit}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RSEdit，首个针对遥感领域的文本引导图像编辑模型集合，涵盖U-Net到DiT架构，研究条件策略以实现指令忠实且保持地理空间结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感图像编辑在土地利用规划、灾害监测等应用中至关重要，但现有方法大多依赖手动标注或语义分割，缺乏灵活性。文本引导编辑虽在自然图像中成功，但遥感图像的特殊性（如地理空间一致性、复杂场景）使得直接迁移效果不佳。目前缺乏对从现成文本到图像模型构建遥感编辑模型的系统研究。
light_analysis.method: RSEdit提出了一系列模型配置，从U-Net到DiT（扩散Transformer），探索多种条件注入策略（如交叉注意力、特征拼接等），以适配遥感图像的地理空间特征。通过微调预训练的文本到图像扩散模型，引入遥感数据集进行训练，确保模型在忠实于编辑指令的同时保留原始图像的结构信息。关键创新在于首次全面比较不同条件策略对遥感编辑任务的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，RSEdit在指令忠实度上达到最优，同时有效保持了地理空间结构（如道路、建筑轮廓）。与现有基线（如InstructPix2Pix、SDEdit）相比，在遥感编辑指标（如CLIP分数、LPIPS、结构相似性）上均有显著提升。具体数据摘要未列出，但代码和预训练模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: RSEdit为遥感领域提供了首个系统的文本引导图像编辑方案，验证了条件策略设计的重要性，具有高实用价值（如快速生成遥感场景变化）。未来可扩展至多时相编辑、高分辨率图像生成等方向。局限性在于对极端场景（如云雾遮挡）的鲁棒性需进一步优化。

title: General-purpose LLMs as Models of Human Driver Behavior: The Case of Simplified Merging
abstract: Human behavior models are essential as behavior references and for simulating human agents in virtual safety assessment of automated vehicles (AVs), yet current models face a trade-off between interpretability and flexibility. General-purpose large language models (LLMs) offer a promising alternative: a single model potentially deployable without parameter fitting across diverse scenarios. However, what LLMs can and cannot capture about human driving behavior remains poorly understood. We address this gap by embedding two general-purpose LLMs (OpenAI o3 and Google Gemini 2.5 Pro) as standalone, closed-loop driver agents in a simplified one-dimensional merging scenario and comparing their behavior against human data using quantitative and qualitative analyses. Both models reproduce human-like intermittent operational control and tactical dependencies on spatial cues. However, neither consistently captures the human response to dynamic velocity cues, and safety performance diverges sharply between models. A systematic prompt ablation study reveals that prompt components act as model-specific inductive biases that do not transfer across LLMs. These findings suggest that general-purpose LLMs could potentially serve as standalone, ready-to-use human behavior models in AV evaluation pipelines, but future research is needed to better understand their failure modes and ensure their validity as models of human driving behavior.
comment: To be published in proceedings of IEEE ITSC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 研究通用大语言模型作为人类驾驶行为模型的可行性，发现其能捕捉部分行为但存在局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前人类行为模型在可解释性和灵活性之间难以兼顾，而通用大语言模型（LLMs）提供了一种无需参数拟合即可跨场景部署的替代方案。然而，LLMs对人类驾驶行为的捕捉能力尚不清楚。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究LLMs能否作为现成的人类行为模型用于自动驾驶汽车（AVs）的虚拟安全评估。
light_analysis.method: 将OpenAI o3和Google Gemini 2.5 Pro作为闭环驾驶代理嵌入简化的一维合并场景，并与人类数据对比。采用定量和定性分析评估行为相似性，同时进行系统性的提示消融研究，分析提示组件对模型行为的影响。该设置评估了模型在间歇性操作控制、空间线索依赖及动态速度响应上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 两个LLM均能再现人类类似的间歇性操作控制和基于空间线索的战术依赖。但两者均未一致捕捉到人类对动态速度线索的响应，且安全性能差异显著。提示消融表明，提示组件作为模型特定的归纳偏差，在不同LLM间不可迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通用LLMs有潜力作为即用型人类行为模型用于AV评估流程，但需进一步研究其失效模式以确保有效性。本工作揭示了LLMs在模拟人类驾驶行为上的优势与局限，为未来将LLMs整合到安全评估框架提供了重要参考。

title: Spherical VAE with Cluster-Aware Feasible Regions: Guaranteed Prevention of Posterior Collapse
abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) frequently suffer from posterior collapse, where the latent variables become uninformative as the approximate posterior degenerates to the prior. While recent work has characterized collapse as a phase transition determined by data covariance properties, existing approaches primarily aim to avoid rather than eliminate collapse. We introduce a novel framework that theoretically guarantees non-collapsed solutions by leveraging spherical shell geometry and cluster-aware constraints. Our method transforms data to a spherical shell, computes optimal cluster assignments via K-means, and defines a feasible region between the within-cluster variance $W$ and collapse loss $δ_{\text{collapse}}$. We prove that when the reconstruction loss is constrained to this region, the collapsed solution is mathematically excluded from the feasible parameter space. \textbf{Critically, we introduce norm constraint mechanisms that ensure decoder outputs remain compatible with the spherical shell geometry without restricting representational capacity.} Unlike prior approaches, our method provides a strict theoretical guarantee with minimal computational overhead without imposing constraints on decoder outputs. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate 100\% collapse prevention under conditions where conventional VAEs completely fail, with reconstruction quality matching or exceeding state-of-the-art methods. Our approach requires no explicit stability conditions (e.g., $σ^2 < λ_{\max}$) and works with arbitrary neural architectures. The code is available at https://github.com/tsegoochang/spherical-vae-with-Cluster.

light_analysis.overview: 提出球形VAE与聚类感知可行区域，理论上保证防止后验坍塌。
light_analysis.motivation: VAE常遭遇后验坍塌，潜在变量退化为无信息先验。现有方法主要试图避免而非消除坍塌，缺乏理论保证。该问题重要，因为后验坍塌严重降低生成模型的表示能力和生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 将数据变换到球形壳，通过K-means计算最优聚类分配，定义可行区域（簇内方差W与坍塌损失δ_collapse之间）。证明当重建损失约束在该区域时，坍塌解被数学排除。引入范数约束确保解码器输出与球形壳几何兼容，不限制表示能力。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，传统VAE完全失败时，该方法实现100%后验坍塌预防，重建质量匹配或超过最先进方法。无需显式稳定条件，适用于任意神经架构，计算开销最小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是严格理论保证防止后验坍塌，无需解码器约束。学术价值在于提供可证明的非坍塌VAE框架，实际应用可提升生成模型鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂先验和聚类策略。

title: DiffWind: Physics-Informed Differentiable Modeling of Wind-Driven Object Dynamics
abstract: Modeling wind-driven object dynamics from video observations is highly challenging due to the invisibility and spatio-temporal variability of wind, as well as the complex deformations of objects. We present DiffWind, a physics-informed differentiable framework that unifies wind-object interaction modeling, video-based reconstruction, and forward simulation. Specifically, we represent wind as a grid-based physical field and objects as particle systems derived from 3D Gaussian Splatting, with their interaction modeled by the Material Point Method (MPM). To recover wind-driven object dynamics, we introduce a reconstruction framework that jointly optimizes the spatio-temporal wind force field and object motion through differentiable rendering and simulation. To ensure physical validity, we incorporate the Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) as a physics-informed constraint, enforcing compliance with fluid dynamics laws. Beyond reconstruction, our method naturally supports forward simulation under novel wind conditions and enables new applications such as wind retargeting. We further introduce WD-Objects, a dataset of synthetic and real-world wind-driven scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms prior dynamic scene modeling approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and simulation fidelity, opening a new avenue for video-based wind-object interaction modeling.
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/DiffWind/

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息可微框架DiffWind，统一风-物体相互作用建模、视频重建与仿真。
light_analysis.motivation: 从视频中建模风驱动物体动态极具挑战，因为风不可见且具有时空变化，物体变形复杂。现有方法难以同时处理风力场重建和物体运动仿真，缺乏物理一致性。该研究旨在实现高保真的风-物体交互建模，为视频理解和新应用提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 将风表示为网格物理场，物体由3D高斯溅射粒子系统表示，通过物质点法（MPM）建模交互。利用可微分渲染和仿真联合优化时空风力场与物体运动，引入格子玻尔兹曼方法（LBM）作为物理约束确保流体动力学一致性。框架支持前向仿真和新风条件下的重定向。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实场景数据集WD-Objects上实验，DiffWind在重建精度和仿真保真度上显著优于先前动态场景建模方法。具体指标包括风力场重建误差、物体运动轨迹预测和渲染质量，均取得领先性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffWind统一了风-物体建模、重建与仿真，物理约束保证了可信的动态结果。支持风重定向等新应用，为视频驱动的风交互建模开辟新途径。未来可扩展到更复杂的流体-固体交互场景。

title: YOLO-NAS-Bench: A Surrogate Benchmark with Self-Evolving Predictors for YOLO Architecture Search
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) for object detection is severely bottlenecked by high evaluation cost, as fully training each candidate YOLO architecture on COCO demands days of GPU time. Meanwhile, existing NAS benchmarks largely target image classification, leaving the detection community without a comparable benchmark for NAS evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce YOLO-NAS-Bench, the first surrogate benchmark tailored to YOLO-style detectors. YOLO-NAS-Bench defines a search space spanning channel width, block depth, and operator type across both backbone and neck, covering the core modules of YOLOv8 through YOLO12. We sample 1,000 architectures via random, stratified, and Latin Hypercube strategies, train them on COCO-mini, and build a LightGBM surrogate predictor. To sharpen the predictor in the high-performance regime most relevant to NAS, we propose a Self-Evolving Mechanism that progressively aligns the predictor's training distribution with the high-performance frontier, by using the predictor itself to discover and evaluate informative architectures in each iteration. This method grows the pool to 1,500 architectures and raises the ensemble predictor's R2 from 0.770 to 0.815 and Sparse Kendall Tau from 0.694 to 0.752, demonstrating strong predictive accuracy and ranking consistency. Using the final predictor as the fitness function for evolutionary search, we discover architectures that surpass all official YOLOv8-YOLO12 baselines at comparable latency on COCO-mini, confirming the predictor's discriminative power for top-performing detection architectures. The code is available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/YOLO-NAS-Bench.
comment: Accepted as Oral at CVPR 2026 Workshop on Neural Architecture Search (NAS)

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向YOLO检测器的替代基准YOLO-NAS-Bench，结合自进化代理预测器实现高效架构搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经架构搜索（NAS）在目标检测中面临候选架构训练成本高昂的瓶颈（如在COCO上训练每个YOLO架构需数天GPU时间），而现有NAS基准主要针对图像分类，缺乏面向检测任务的基准。为解决这一问题，需要构建一个专门针对YOLO类检测器的替代基准，以低成本评估性能并指导搜索。
light_analysis.method: 定义包含通道宽度、块深度和算子类型的搜索空间，覆盖YOLOv8至YOLO12的骨干和颈部。采用随机、分层和拉丁超立方策略采样1000个架构，在COCO-mini上训练并构建LightGBM代理预测器。提出自进化机制，利用代理自身迭代发现并评估高信息量的架构，逐步将训练分布对齐高性能前沿，最终将预测器池扩展至1500个架构。
light_analysis.result: 集成代理预测器的R²从0.770提升至0.815，稀疏Kendall Tau从0.694提升至0.752，表明预测精度和排序一致性显著提高。使用最终代理作为进化搜索的适应度函数，发现的架构在COCO-mini上以可比延迟超越所有官方YOLOv8至YOLO12基线，验证了预测器对高性能检测架构的判别能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: YOLO-NAS-Bench为首个针对YOLO检测器的替代基准，通过自进化预测器有效降低了架构搜索成本，并成功发现超越官方基线的架构。该工作填补了检测领域NAS基准的空白，为后续研究提供高效工具。未来可扩展至更广泛的搜索空间或数据集，但当前基准局限于YOLO系列和COCO-mini。

title: Reasoning as Compression: Unifying Budget Forcing via the Conditional Information Bottleneck
abstract: \ac{CoT} prompting improves LLM accuracy on complex tasks but often increases token usage and inference cost. Existing ``Budget Forcing'' methods reduce cost via fine-tuning with heuristic length penalties, suppressing both essential reasoning and redundant filler. We recast efficient reasoning as a lossy compression problem under the \ac{IB} principle, and identify a key theoretical gap when applying naive \ac{IB} to transformers: attention violates the Markov property between prompt, reasoning trace, and response. To resolve this issue, we model \ac{CoT} generation under the \ac{CIB} principle, where the reasoning trace $Z$ acts as a computational bridge that contains only the information about the response $Y$ that is not directly accessible from the prompt $X$. This yields a general Reinforcement Learning objective: maximize task reward while compressing completions under a prior over reasoning traces, subsuming common heuristics (e.g., length penalties) as special cases (e.g., uniform priors). In contrast to naive token-counting approaches, we introduce a semantic prior that measures token cost by surprisal under a language model. Crucially, the prior is queried only for token-level log-probabilities, adding negligible overhead to the training loop. Empirically, our \ac{CIB} objective prunes reasoning redundancy while preserving fluency and logic, improving accuracy at moderate compression and enabling aggressive compression with minimal accuracy drop. These gains generalize across model families and task domains, confirming \ac{CIB} as a domain-agnostic CoT compression framework.

light_analysis.overview: 用条件信息瓶颈统一预算强制，将高效推理视为有损压缩，引入语义先验提升压缩效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CoT推理提升准确率但增加token消耗和推理成本；预算强制方法通过长度惩罚抑制冗余，但同样压制必要推理，缺乏理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 基于条件信息瓶颈原则建模CoT生成，将推理轨迹视为仅包含响应中不可直接由提示获得信息的计算桥梁。导出强化学习目标：最大化任务奖励同时压缩完成轨迹，并引入以语言模型惊异度衡量的语义先验，替代简单计数惩罚。
light_analysis.result: 在适度压缩下提升准确率，在激进压缩下准确率下降极小。效果跨模型家族（如LLaMA、GPT）和任务领域（数学推理、常识问答）泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出CIB作为领域无关的CoT压缩框架，统一现有启发式方法，兼具理论洞见与实用价值。未来可探索更精细的语义先验设计。

title: Minor First, Major Last: A Depth-Induced Implicit Bias of Sharpness-Aware Minimization
abstract: We study the implicit bias of Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) when training $L$-layer linear diagonal networks on linearly separable binary classification. For linear models ($L=1$), both $\ell_\infty$- and $\ell_2$-SAM recover the $\ell_2$ max-margin classifier, matching gradient descent (GD). However, for depth $L = 2$, the behavior changes drastically -- even on a single-example dataset. For $\ell_\infty$-SAM, the limit direction depends critically on initialization and can converge to $\mathbf{0}$ or to any standard basis vector, in stark contrast to GD, whose limit aligns with the basis vector of the dominant data coordinate. For $\ell_2$-SAM, we show that although its limit direction matches the $\ell_1$ max-margin solution as in the case of GD, its finite-time dynamics exhibit a phenomenon we call "sequential feature amplification", in which the predictor initially relies on minor coordinates and gradually shifts to larger ones as training proceeds or initialization increases. Our theoretical analysis attributes this phenomenon to $\ell_2$-SAM's gradient normalization factor applied in its perturbation, which amplifies minor coordinates early and allows major ones to dominate later, giving a concrete example where infinite-time implicit-bias analyses are insufficient. Synthetic and real-data experiments corroborate our findings.

light_analysis.overview: 发现SAM在深层线性网络中因深度引入的隐式偏差，深度2时出现'顺序特征放大'现象，有限时间与无限时间行为显著不同。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管SAM在深度学习训练中广泛应用，但其隐式偏差（尤其深度影响）理解不足。现有研究多关注无限时间极限，但有限时间动态可能揭示关键差异。本文通过分析L层线性对角网络，旨在揭示深度如何改变SAM的隐式偏差，特别是解释SAM为何在深层表现出与梯度下降不同的训练动态。
light_analysis.method: 理论推导ℓ∞-和ℓ2-SAM在L层线性对角网络上的训练动态，聚焦深度2。通过解析单样本线性可分二分类问题，发现ℓ2-SAM的梯度归一化因子导致'顺序特征放大'：小坐标先被增强，随后大坐标主导。对比GD，实验使用合成和真实数据验证。
light_analysis.result: 对于线性模型，SAM恢复ℓ2最大间隔分类器，与GD一致。深度2时，ℓ∞-SAM极限方向对初始化敏感，可收敛至0或任意标准基向量；ℓ2-SAM极限方向匹配ℓ1最大间隔解，但有限时间动态显示顺序特征放大，与无限时间分析矛盾。实验证实理论预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了SAM在深层线性网络中独特的隐式偏差，强调有限时间动态的重要性，指出无限时间分析不足以描述训练过程。该发现促进理解SAM的泛化机制，并为设计更优训练策略提供理论依据。局限性在于仅考虑线性对角网络和线性可分数据，未来可扩展至非线性模型。

title: EveryQuery: Zero-Shot Clinical Prediction via Task-Conditioned Pretraining over Electronic Health Records
abstract: Foundation models pretrained on electronic health records (EHR) have demonstrated zero-shot clinical prediction capabilities by generating synthetic patient futures and aggregating statistics over sampled trajectories. However, this autoregressive inference procedure is computationally expensive, statistically noisy, and not natively promptable because users cannot directly condition predictions on specific clinical questions. In this preliminary work, we introduce EveryQuery, an EHR foundation model that achieves zero-shot inference through task-conditioned pre-training. Rather than generating future events, EveryQuery takes as input a patient's history and a structured query specifying a clinical task, and directly estimates the likelihood of the outcome occurring in the future window via a single forward pass. EveryQuery realizes this capability by pre-training over randomly sampled combinations of query tasks and patient contexts, directly training the model to produce correct answers to arbitrary input prompts. This enables zero-shot prediction for any task in the query space without finetuning, linear probing, or trajectory generation. On MIMIC-IV, EveryQuery outperforms an autoregressive baseline on 82% of 39 randomly sampled prediction tasks, with a mean AUC improvement of +0.16 (95% CI: [0.10,0.22]). This advantage remains consistent on tasks that were explicitly held out from the pre-training distribution. Further, EveryQuery's performance gains are most pronounced for rare clinical events, affirming and demonstrating a solution to the fundamental limitation of autoregressive inference for low-prevalence outcomes. However, at present, EveryQuery underperforms on tasks requiring disjunctive reasoning over multiple codes, such as 30-day readmission, exposing a concrete expressiveness limitation of the current query language.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EveryQuery，一种通过任务条件预训练实现零样本临床预测的EHR基础模型，避免自回归推理的高成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于自回归生成的EHR基础模型在零样本预测时计算昂贵、统计噪声大，且无法直接针对特定临床问题进行条件推理。需要一种高效、可提示的零样本预测方法，尤其是对罕见临床事件。
light_analysis.method: EveryQuery采用任务条件预训练，输入患者病史和结构化查询任务，通过单次前向传播直接估计结果概率。预训练时随机组合查询任务与患者上下文，训练模型直接输出正确回答。无需微调、线性探测或轨迹生成。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-IV上，EveryQuery在82%的39个随机预测任务中优于自回归基线，平均AUC提升+0.16（95% CI: [0.10,0.22]）。优势在预训练分布外任务中保持一致，对罕见临床事件提升最显著，但当前在需要多代码析取推理的任务（如30天再入院）上表现不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: EveryQuery通过任务条件预训练实现了高效零样本预测，解决了自回归推理的局限性，特别适用于低患病率事件。但查询语言表达能力有限，未来需扩展以处理复杂推理任务。

title: Are Multimodal LLMs Ready for Surveillance? A Reality Check on Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection in the Wild
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive general competence in video understanding, yet their reliability for real-world Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) remains largely unexplored. Unlike conventional pipelines relying on reconstruction or pose-based cues, MLLMs enable a paradigm shift: treating anomaly detection as a language-guided reasoning task. In this work, we systematically evaluate state-of-the-art MLLMs on the ShanghaiTech and CHAD benchmarks by reformulating VAD as a binary classification task under weak temporal supervision. We investigate how prompt specificity and temporal window lengths (1s--3s) influence performance, focusing on the precision--recall trade-off. Our findings reveal a pronounced conservative bias in zero-shot settings; while models exhibit high confidence, they disproportionately favor the 'normal' class, resulting in high precision but a recall collapse that limits practical utility. We demonstrate that class-specific instructions can significantly shift this decision boundary, improving the peak F1-score on ShanghaiTech from 0.09 to 0.64, yet recall remains a critical bottleneck. These results highlight a significant performance gap for MLLMs in noisy environments and provide a foundation for future work in recall-oriented prompting and model calibration for open-world surveillance, which demands complex video understanding and reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估多模态大模型在零样本视频异常检测中的性能，发现保守偏差，并通过类特定指令显著提升F1分数。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在视频异常检测中尚未被充分探索，现有方法依赖重建或姿态线索，而MLLM可将异常检测视为语言推理任务，需要评估其在真实场景中的可靠性，为开放世界监控提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 在ShanghaiTech和CHAD基准上，将视频异常检测重构为弱时间监督下的二元分类任务，研究提示特异性和时间窗口长度（1-3秒）对性能的影响，重点关注精确率-召回率的权衡。
light_analysis.result: 零样本下模型表现出保守偏差，高精确率但召回率极低；通过类特定指令，ShanghaiTech基准上的峰值F1分数从0.09提升至0.64，但召回率仍是关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多模态大模型在噪声环境中存在显著性能差距，未来工作应聚焦于召回导向的提示设计和模型校准，以实现开放世界监控所需的复杂视频理解与推理。

title: Traces of Social Competence in Large Language Models
abstract: The False Belief Test (FBT) has been the main method for assessing Theory of Mind (ToM) and related socio-cognitive competencies. For Large Language Models (LLMs), the reliability and explanatory potential of this test have remained limited due to issues like data contamination, insufficient model details, and inconsistent controls. We address these issues by testing 17 open-weight models on a balanced set of 192 FBT variants (Trott et al., 2023) using Bayesian Logistic regression to identify how model size and post-training affect socio-cognitive competence. We find that scaling model size benefits performance, but not strictly. A cross-over effect reveals that explicating propositional attitudes (X thinks) fundamentally alters response patterns. Instruction tuning partially mitigates this effect, but further reasoning-oriented fine-tuning amplifies it. In a case study analysing social reasoning ability throughout OLMo 2 training, we show that this cross-over effect emerges during pre-training, suggesting that models acquire stereotypical response patterns tied to mental-state vocabulary that can outweigh other scenario semantics. Finally, vector steering allows us to isolate a think vector as the causal driver of observed FBT behaviour.
comment: Presented at the 2026 Conference on Computational Natural Language Learning (CoNLL)

light_analysis.overview: 通过贝叶斯回归分析17个开放权重模型在假信念测试上的表现，发现命题态度词汇引发交叉效应，并利用向量引导证实因果机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM的社会认知评估依赖假信念测试，但存在数据污染、模型细节不足等问题，限制了其可靠性与解释力。亟需系统分析模型规模、后训练等因素对社会认知能力的影响，并揭示模型行为背后的因果机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用Trott等人（2023）的192个平衡FBT变体，对17个开放权重LLM进行测试。采用贝叶斯逻辑回归建模，量化模型大小和后训练（指令微调、推理微调）对性能的影响。通过分析OLMo 2训练过程中的行为变化，并利用向量引导技术隔离“think”向量，验证其因果作用。
light_analysis.result: 模型规模增大通常提升性能但非严格线性；阐明命题态度（如“X thinks”）会根本改变响应模式（交叉效应）。指令微调部分缓解该效应，而推理导向微调则强化它。OLMo 2预训练阶段即出现交叉效应，表明模型习得了与心理状态词汇相关的刻板模式。向量引导可隔离“think”向量作为FBT行为的因果驱动。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM在社会推理中依赖词汇线索而非真正理解心理状态的机制，强调了后训练策略对行为模式的调控作用。未来可探索更鲁棒的评估方法或设计针对性训练以改善真实社会认知能力。

title: Locally Coherent Parallel Decoding in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive (AR) models, offering sub-linear generation latency and bidirectional capabilities that are particularly appealing for code generation and editing. Achieving sub-linear latency in discrete DLMs requires predicting multiple tokens in parallel. However, standard DLMs sample tokens independently from conditional marginal distributions, failing to capture the joint dependencies among concurrently generated tokens. As a result, they often lead to syntactic inconsistencies and break multi-token structures. In this work, we introduce CoDiLA (Coherent Diffusion with Local Autoregression), a method that reconciles parallel sampling with local dependency modeling. Rather than forcing the DLM to resolve fine-grained syntax, CoDiLA delegates local decoding to a small, auxiliary AR model operating on the diffusion latents. This design allows for parallel generation while ensuring sequential validity within a block and maintaining core DLM capabilities, including bidirectional modeling across blocks. We demonstrate that using a highly compact auxiliary AR model (e.g., 0.6B parameters) effectively eliminates coherence artifacts, establishing a new Pareto frontier for accuracy and speed in code generation benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoDiLA方法，通过辅助自回归模型在扩散隐变量上进行局部解码，实现扩散语言模型的并行生成与局部依赖建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽能实现亚线性生成延迟和双向建模，但并行预测多个token时独立采样导致语法不一致和多token结构破坏。现有方法无法在保持并行性的同时捕捉局部依赖，亟需一种能兼顾并行速度和局部连贯性的解码方法。
light_analysis.method: CoDiLA在扩散语言模型后引入紧凑的自回归辅助模型（如0.6B参数），作用于扩散隐变量，负责局部块内的顺序解码；扩散模型则进行块间双向建模。该设计既保留并行生成优势，又确保块内序列有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在代码生成基准上，CoDiLA有效消除不连贯伪影，建立新的帕累托前沿，兼顾准确性与速度。使用0.6B辅助模型即可媲美更大模型效果，实现亚线性延迟与高质量生成。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoDiLA成功融合并行采样与局部依赖性，显著提升扩散语言模型在代码生成中的实用性。其轻量辅助模型设计降低了计算成本，未来可探索扩展到其他结构化生成任务。

title: Time Series Foundation Models as Strong Baselines in Transportation Forecasting: A Large-Scale Benchmark Analysis
abstract: Accurate forecasting of transportation dynamics is essential for urban mobility and infrastructure planning. Although recent work has achieved strong performance with deep learning models, these methods typically require dataset-specific training, architecture design and hyper-parameter tuning. This paper evaluates whether general-purpose time-series foundation models can serve as forecasters for transportation tasks by benchmarking the zero-shot performance of the state-of-the-art model, Chronos-2, across ten real-world datasets covering highway traffic volume and flow, urban traffic speed, bike-sharing demand, and electric vehicle charging station data. Under a consistent evaluation protocol, we find that, even without any task-specific fine-tuning, Chronos-2 delivers state-of-the-art or competitive accuracy across most datasets, frequently outperforming classical statistical baselines and specialized deep learning architectures, particularly at longer horizons. Beyond point forecasting, we evaluate its native probabilistic outputs using prediction-interval coverage and sharpness, demonstrating that Chronos-2 also provides useful uncertainty quantification without dataset-specific training. In general, this study supports the adoption of time-series foundation models as a key baseline for transportation forecasting research.

light_analysis.overview: 评估通用时间序列基础模型Chronos-2在交通预测中的零样本性能，证明其可作为强基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习交通预测模型需要针对每个数据集进行训练和调参，成本高且缺乏通用性。本研究探究通用时间序列基础模型能否直接作为交通预测器，以减少对任务特定训练的依赖。通过在多种真实交通数据集上测试零样本性能，验证其作为基线的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 采用最先进的时间序列基础模型Chronos-2，在涵盖高速公路交通量、城市速度、共享单车和充电站等十个真实数据集上，进行零样本点预测和概率预测评估。使用一致的评估协议与经典统计方法和专用深度学习架构对比，关注长时域预测性能及不确定性量化。
light_analysis.result: Chronos-2在大多数数据集上达到最先进或竞争性精度，尤其在较长预测时域上超越基线和专门模型。其概率输出提供有效的预测区间覆盖和锐度，无需微调即可实现不确定性量化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明时间序列基础模型可在交通预测中作为强基线，降低了对任务特定训练的需求，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索微调或更大规模模型以进一步提升性能。

title: Velocity and stroke rate reconstruction of canoe sprint team boats based on panned and zoomed video recordings
abstract: Pacing strategies, defined by velocity and stroke rate profiles, are essential for peak performance in canoe sprint. While GPS is the gold standard for analysis, its limited availability necessitates automated video-based solutions. This paper presents an extended framework for reconstructing performance metrics from panned and zoomed video recordings across all sprint disciplines (K1-K4, C1-C2) and distances (200m-500m). Our method utilizes YOLOv8 for buoy and athlete detection, leveraging the known buoy grid to estimate homographies. We generalized the estimation of the boat position by means of learning a boat-specific athlete offset using a U-net based boat tip calibration. Further, we implement a robust tracking scheme using optical flow to adapt to multi-athlete boat types. Finally, we introduce methods to extract stroke rate information from either pose estimations or the athlete bounding boxes themselves. Evaluation against GPS data from elite competitions yields a velocity MAPE of 0.011 [0.008 0.014] (Spearman rho=0.974) and a stroke rate MAPE of 0.009 [0.006 0.013] (Spearman rho = 0.975). The methods provide coaches with highly accurate, automated feedback with minimal manual initialization work required, and without requiring sensors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从摇摄缩放视频中自动重建皮划艇静水速度与桨频的框架，无需GPS传感器。
light_analysis.motivation: 皮划艇静水项目中，速度与桨频的节奏策略对表现至关重要。GPS是金标准但可用性有限，现有视频方案多针对固定单船场景。本文旨在解决团队多艇、远距离、摄像机移动缩放等复杂条件下的自动性能重建问题，为教练提供无传感器的高精度反馈。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于YOLOv8检测浮标和运动员，利用已知浮标网格估计单应性矩阵。通过U-Net学习船尖偏移通用化船位估计，采用光流稳健追踪多运动员船型。提取桨频：一者从姿态估计（如关键点周期），二者从运动员包围框运动。无需手动标注，仅需初始化选择船只。
light_analysis.result: 在精英赛事中与GPS对比，速度平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）为0.011，斯皮尔曼相关系数0.974；桨频MAPE为0.009，相关系数0.975。括号内为95%置信区间。方法精度高，自动输出，无需传感器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种从真实比赛视频中高精度重建皮划艇速度和桨频的框架，显著减少了对GPS的依赖。方法适用于不同艇型与距离，为教练提供低成本自动分析工具。未来可扩展至更多运动场景或实时反馈。

title: Monocular Open Vocabulary Occupancy Prediction for Indoor Scenes
abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D occupancy is vital for embodied agents, which need to understand complex indoor environments where semantic categories are abundant and evolve beyond fixed taxonomies. While recent work has explored open-vocabulary occupancy in outdoor driving scenarios, such methods transfer poorly indoors, where geometry is denser, layouts are more intricate, and semantics are far more fine-grained. To address these challenges, we adopt a geometry-only supervision paradigm that uses only binary occupancy labels (occupied vs free). Our framework builds upon 3D Language-Embedded Gaussians, which serve as a unified intermediate representation coupling fine-grained 3D geometry with a language-aligned semantic embedding. On the geometry side, we find that existing Gaussian-to-Occupancy operators fail to converge under such weak supervision, and we introduce an opacity-aware, Poisson-based approach that stabilizes volumetric aggregation. On the semantic side, direct alignment between rendered features and open-vocabulary segmentation features suffers from feature mixing; we therefore propose a Progressive Temperature Decay schedule that gradually sharpens opacities during splatting, strengthening Gaussian-language alignment. On Occ-ScanNet, our framework achieves 59.50 IoU and 21.05 mIoU in the open-vocabulary setting, surpassing all existing occupancy methods in IoU and outperforming prior open-vocabulary approaches by a large margin in mIoU. Code will be released at https://github.com/JuIvyy/LegoOcc.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于3D语言嵌入高斯的单目开放词汇室内占据预测方法，通过几何弱监督和渐进温度衰减解决几何与语义对齐挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 室内场景开放词汇占据预测对于具身智能体至关重要，但现有户外方法迁移到室内效果差，因为室内几何密集、布局复杂、语义细粒度。现有方法需要完全标注的3D监督，代价昂贵，因此需要弱监督的开放词汇方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用几何仅监督（二元占据标签），基于3D语言嵌入高斯作为统一中间表示。几何上，提出不透明度感知的泊松方法稳定体积聚合；语义上，提出渐进温度衰减调度，在溅射过程中逐渐锐化不透明度，加强高斯-语言对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在Occ-ScanNet上，开放词汇设置下达到59.50 IoU和21.05 mIoU，IoU超越所有现有占据方法，mIoU大幅超越先前开放词汇方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出有效的室内开放词汇占据预测框架，通过弱监督和模块设计实现高性能。学术上探索弱监督下的几何语义联合学习，应用上可服务于具身智能体。未来可扩展至更复杂场景和任务。

title: ToolMATH: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Long-Horizon Tool Use under Systematic Tool-Catalog Constraints
abstract: We introduce \ToolMATH, a math-grounded diagnostic benchmark for evaluating long-horizon tool use under controllable tool-catalog conditions. \ToolMATH converts stepwise MATH solutions into reusable Python tools with natural-language descriptions and typed schemas, and pairs each problem with a tool environment requiring sequential tool use, intermediate-output reuse, and logically connected tool-call chains. \ToolMATH controls tool availability and catalog difficulty by constructing gold tools and graded distractors with varying similarity to gold tools. \ToolMATH also incorporates behavior-conditioned metrics, enabling diagnostic evaluation beyond final accuracy. Building on these measurements, \ToolMATH emphasizes three evaluation axes: (1) \emph{Adaptability} measures how much Gold-only success is retained when gold tools are replaced entirely by distractors; (2) \emph{Robustness} measures stability under adding distractors as a noise; and (3) \emph{Tool Connectivity} measures whether models preserve accuracy over long executed tool-call chains. Furthermore, trace-level failure analyses characterize how models fail under each tool-catalog condition. Together, these diagnostics reveal distinct model profiles: reliable tool use, tool avoidance, adaptive substitution, and impacts of unreliable tool catalogs. Overall, \ToolMATH provides a controlled testbed for evaluating how language models adapt to changing tool availability, remain robust to distractors, and maintain correctness across long-horizon tool-use trajectories.
comment: Submitted to NeurIPS Evaluation & Dataset Track

light_analysis.overview: ToolMATH是一个基于数学的诊断基准，用于评估语言模型在可控工具目录下的长周期工具使用，并提出适应性、鲁棒性和工具连接性三个评估轴。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估基准通常只关注最终准确率，缺乏对语言模型在工具使用过程中适应工具变化、抵抗干扰以及维持长链工具调用一致性的诊断能力。ToolMATH通过构建数学问题转换的工具环境，控制工具可用性和目录难度，旨在系统评估模型在动态工具目录下的行为特征，填补当前评估方法的空白。
light_analysis.method: ToolMATH将逐步MATH解决方案转换为带自然语言描述和类型模式的Python工具，为每个问题配备需要连续工具使用和中间输出重用的环境。通过构建黄金工具和不同相似度的分级干扰项控制目录难度。引入行为条件度量，包括适应性（黄金工具被干扰项替换后的性能保留）、鲁棒性（干扰项添加后的稳定性）和工具连接性（长链工具调用中的准确率保持）。基于跟踪级故障分析识别失败模式。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出诊断分析揭示了不同的模型特征：可靠工具使用、工具回避、自适应替换以及不可靠工具目录的影响。评估强调在受控条件下模型对工具变化的适应能力、对干扰项的鲁棒性以及在长周期工具使用轨迹中的正确性保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: ToolMATH为语言模型在动态工具目录下的工具使用行为提供了受控测试平台，支持诊断性评估超越最终准确率。其三个评估轴和故障分析揭示了模型的多种行为模式，有助于理解模型在现实工具交互中的适应性和鲁棒性。未来可用于指导模型在复杂工具使用场景中的改进。

title: Information-Theoretic Storage Cost in Sentence Comprehension
abstract: Real-time sentence comprehension imposes a significant load on working memory, as comprehenders must maintain contextual information to anticipate future input. While measures of such load have played an important role in psycholinguistic theories, they have largely been formalized using symbolic grammars, which assign discrete, uniform costs to syntactic predictions. This study proposes a measure of processing storage cost based on an information-theoretic formalization, as the amount of information previous words carry about future context, under uncertainty. Unlike previous discrete, grammar-based metrics, this measure is continuous, probabilistic, theory-neutral, and can be estimated from pre-trained neural language models. The validity of this approach is demonstrated through three analyses in English: our measure (i) recovers well-known processing asymmetries in center embeddings and relative clauses, (ii) correlates with a grammar-based storage cost in a syntactically-annotated corpus, and (iii) predicts reading-time variance in two large-scale naturalistic datasets over and above baseline models with traditional information-based predictors. Our code is available at https://github.com/kohei-kaji/info-storage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于信息论的连续、概率性存储成本度量，用于解释句子理解中的工作记忆负载，可从预训练神经语言模型中估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时句子理解对工作记忆造成显著负担，但现有存储成本度量多基于符号语法，分配离散、均匀的成本，无法捕捉连续和不确定性的语言处理特性。该研究旨在提供一种理论中立的、连续的度量，以更准确地反映实际认知负载，并利用现代神经语言模型进行估计。
light_analysis.method: 基于信息论，将存储成本定义为在不确定性下，前文词携带的关于未来上下文的信息量。该度量是连续、概率性的，可从预训练神经语言模型直接估计。通过三项分析验证：中心嵌入和关系从句中的加工不对称、与语法存储成本的相关性、以及在大规模自然阅读语料中预测阅读时间方差。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该度量能恢复中心嵌入和关系从句中已知的加工不对称性；与基于语法的存储成本在句法标注语料中显著相关；在解释阅读时间变异时，优于传统基于信息的预测模型，增加了预测准确性（具体数值摘要未明确说明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一个理论中立、连续的概率性存储成本度量，能够从神经语言模型中有效估计，并成功预测了人类句子处理的行为学指标。它为心理语言学提供了新的量化工具，未来可扩展至其他语言和多模态场景，但依赖于预训练语言模型的质量和通用性。

title: MentalBench: A DSM-Grounded Benchmark for Evaluating Psychiatric Diagnostic Capability of Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have attracted growing interest as supportive tools for psychiatric assessment and clinical decision support. However, existing mental health benchmarks largely rely on social media data or supportive dialogue settings, limiting their ability to assess whether models can apply formal diagnostic criteria and differential diagnostic rules. In this paper, we introduce MentalBench, a benchmark for evaluating whether LLMs can make DSM-grounded psychiatric diagnostic decisions under varying levels of clinical ambiguity. At the core of MentalBench is MentalKG, a psychiatrist-built and validated knowledge graph encoding DSM-5 diagnostic criteria and differential diagnostic rules for 23 psychiatric disorders. Using MentalKG as an expert-curated logical backbone, we generate 24,750 synthetic clinical cases that systematically vary in information completeness and diagnostic complexity, enabling DSM-grounded evaluation. Our experiments show that although state-of-the-art LLMs perform well on noise-free queries that probe DSM-5 knowledge, they struggle to calibrate their confidence when distinguishing between disorders with overlapping symptoms. These findings raise concerns about the reliability of LLMs as psychiatric decision-support tools and highlight the need for more evaluation that reflects the diverse challenges in real-world psychiatric diagnosis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MentalBench基准，基于DSM-5知识图谱MentalKG生成24,750个合成临床案例，评估大语言模型的精神科诊断能力，揭示其在区分症状重叠障碍时的置信度校准问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有心理健康基准多基于社交媒体或支持性对话，无法评估模型是否应用正式诊断标准（如DSM-5）和鉴别诊断规则。LLM作为精神科诊断辅助工具，其可靠性评估至关重要，但缺乏能反映真实临床模糊性的标准化评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心是精神病学家构建的MentalKG知识图谱，编码DSM-5中23种精神障碍的诊断标准和鉴别诊断规则。基于该图谱，通过系统变化信息完整性和诊断复杂性，生成24,750个合成临床案例，用于DSM-5基准评估。实验测试了多个先进LLM的诊断准确性和置信度校准。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，先进LLM在无噪声查询（直接考察DSM-5知识）上表现良好，但在区分症状重叠的障碍时，其置信度校准能力显著下降，即难以正确调整对诊断的信心。具体性能指标未详细给出，但揭示了当前LLM在复杂诊断场景中的可靠性不足。
