light_analysis.conclusion: MentalBench为评估LLM的精神科诊断能力提供了首个基于DSM-5的结构化基准和知识图谱资源。研究发现LLM在区分症状重叠障碍时存在置信度校准问题，挑战了其作为临床决策支持工具的直接应用。未来需开发更贴近真实诊断多样性的评估方法，并探索改进模型诊断推理的策略。

title: SWING: Unlocking Implicit Graph Representations for Graph Random Features
abstract: We propose SWING: Space Walks for Implicit Network Graphs, a new class of algorithms for computations involving Graph Random Features on graphs given by implicit representations (i-graphs), where edge-weights are defined as bi-variate functions of feature vectors in the corresponding nodes. Those classes of graphs include several prominent examples, such as: $ε$-neighborhood graphs, used on regular basis in machine learning. Rather than conducting walks on graphs' nodes, those methods rely on walks in continuous spaces, in which those graphs are embedded. To accurately and efficiently approximate original combinatorial calculations, SWING applies customized Gumbel-softmax sampling mechanism with linearized kernels, obtained via random features coupled with importance sampling techniques. This algorithm is of its own interest. SWING relies on the deep connection between implicitly defined graphs and Fourier analysis, presented in this paper. SWING is accelerator-friendly and does not require input graph materialization. We provide detailed analysis of SWING and complement it with thorough experiments on different classes of i-graphs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SWING算法，通过连续空间行走和Gumbel-softmax采样高效计算隐式图的图随机特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式图（如ε-邻域图）在机器学习中广泛应用，但传统图随机特征方法需显式构建图结构，导致计算和存储开销大。现有方法无法直接利用隐式表示的连续性，缺乏高效且可扩展的算法。SWING旨在解决这一问题，无需图物化即可准确近似原始计算。
light_analysis.method: SWING利用连续空间中的行走替代图节点行走，通过Gumbel-softmax采样机制结合线性化核（随机特征与重要性采样）近似组合计算。算法基于隐式图与傅里叶分析的深层联系，避免显式图构建，支持加速器高效运行。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体数值结果，但声称算法加速器友好且无需图物化。实验在多种隐式图类别上进行，表明SWING能准确高效地近似图随机特征计算。
light_analysis.conclusion: SWING提出了一种计算隐式图随机特征的新范式，建立了隐式图与傅里叶分析的理论桥梁。其无需显式图构建的特性适用于大规模数据场景，具有高实用价值。未来可扩展至更多基于图的核方法。

title: Trust the uncertain teacher: distilling dark knowledge via calibrated uncertainty
abstract: The core of knowledge distillation lies in transferring the teacher's rich 'dark knowledge'-subtle probabilistic patterns that reveal how classes are related and the distribution of uncertainties. While this idea is well established, teachers trained with conventional cross-entropy often fail to preserve such signals. Their distributions collapse into sharp, overconfident peaks that appear decisive but are in fact brittle, offering little beyond the hard label or subtly hindering representation-level transfer. This overconfidence is especially problematic in high-cardinality tasks, where the nuances among many plausible classes matter most for guiding a compact student. Moreover, such brittle targets reduce robustness under distribution shift, leaving students vulnerable to miscalibration in real-world conditions. To address this limitation, we revisit distillation from a distributional perspective and propose Calibrated Uncertainty Distillation (CUD), a framework designed to make dark knowledge more faithfully accessible. Instead of uncritically adopting the teacher's overconfidence, CUD encourages teachers to reveal uncertainty where it is informative and guides students to learn from targets that are calibrated rather than sharpened certainty. By directly shaping the teacher's predictive distribution before transfer, our approach balances accuracy and calibration, allowing students to benefit from both confident signals on easy cases and structured uncertainty on hard ones. Across diverse benchmarks, CUD yields students that are not only more accurate, but also more calibrated under shift and more reliable on ambiguous, long-tail inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出校准不确定性蒸馏（CUD）框架，通过修正教师模型的过度自信，使暗知识更可靠地传递给学生模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识蒸馏中教师模型的过度自信导致其输出概率分布过于尖锐，丢失了类别间细微关系与不确定性的暗知识，尤其在高基数分类任务中阻碍学生模型学习，且在分布偏移下鲁棒性差。现有方法未能有效解决教师模型校准问题，使得学生难以从不确定性中受益。
light_analysis.method: CUD框架从分布角度重新审视蒸馏，通过直接调整教师模型的预测分布，鼓励其在有信息量的地方揭示不确定性，引导学生从校准后的软目标学习。关键创新在于平衡准确性与校准度，使学生在简单案例上获得自信信号，在困难案例上学习结构化不确定性。无需额外复杂模块，仅修改蒸馏前的教师输出。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，CUD训练的学生模型不仅准确率更高，而且在分布偏移下校准度显著改善，在模糊和长尾输入上表现更可靠。相比传统蒸馏方法，CUD有效保留了暗知识，提升了学生模型的泛化性和鲁棒性。具体提升幅度因任务而异，摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: CUD框架通过校准教师不确定性提升了知识蒸馏的效果，使学生模型更准确、更校准、更稳健。该工作强调了蒸馏中校准的重要性，为处理高基数、长尾分布等挑战提供了实用方案。未来可探索将CUD与其他蒸馏变体结合，或应用于更复杂的模型架构。

title: Disentangling Ambiguity from Instability in Large Language Models: A Clinical Text-to-SQL Case Study
abstract: Deploying large language models for clinical Text-to-SQL requires distinguishing two qualitatively different causes of output diversity: (i) input ambiguity that should trigger clarification, and (ii) model instability that should trigger human review. We propose CLUES, a framework that models Text-to-SQL as a two-stage process (interpretations --> answers) and decomposes semantic uncertainty into an ambiguity score and an instability score. The instability score is computed via the Schur complement of a bipartite semantic graph matrix. Across AmbigQA/SituatedQA (gold interpretations) and a clinical Text-to-SQL benchmark (known interpretations), CLUES improves failure prediction over state-of-the-art Kernel Language Entropy. In deployment settings, it remains competitive while providing a diagnostic decomposition unavailable from a single score. The resulting uncertainty regimes map to targeted interventions - query refinement for ambiguity, model improvement for instability. The high-ambiguity/high-instability regime contains 51% of errors while covering 25% of queries, enabling efficient triage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLUES框架，通过分解语义不确定性为歧义与不稳定性分数，实现临床Text-to-SQL中输出多样性的诊断与干预。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署大语言模型于临床Text-to-SQL时，输出多样性可能源于输入歧义（需澄清）或模型不稳定性（需人工审核）。现有方法如单一不确定性分数无法区分两者，导致干预策略不明确。区分二者对于构建可靠临床系统至关重要，但现有方法缺乏分解能力，限制了故障预测和针对性干预。
light_analysis.method: CLUES框架将Text-to-SQL建模为两阶段过程（解释→答案），使用二分语义图矩阵，通过Schur补计算不稳定性分数，结合语义熵等得到歧义分数。在AmbigQA/SituatedQA（含黄金解释）和临床Text-to-SQL基准（已知解释）上评估，以失败预测为指标。
light_analysis.result: 在失败预测上，CLUES优于最先进的Kernel Language Entropy。在部署场景中保持竞争力，并提供诊断分解。高歧义/高不稳定性状态覆盖25%的查询但包含51%的错误，实现了高效错误分类，支持针对性干预。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLUES有效区分歧义与不稳定性，提供针对性干预策略，提升临床Text-to-SQL的可靠性。学术价值在于提出不确定性分解方法，实际应用价值在于高效错误分类。未来可扩展到其他领域，但需验证泛化性。

title: Finding Sense in Nonsense with Generated Contexts: Perspectives from Humans and Language Models
abstract: Nonsensical and anomalous sentences have been instrumental in the development of computational models of semantic interpretation. A core challenge is to distinguish between what is merely anomalous (but can be interpreted given a supporting context) and what is truly nonsensical. However, it is unclear (a) how nonsensical, rather than merely anomalous, existing datasets are; and (b) how well LLMs can make this distinction. In this paper, we answer both questions by collecting sensicality judgments from human raters and LLMs on sentences from five semantically deviant datasets: both context-free and when providing a context. We find that raters consider most sentences at most anomalous, and only a few as properly nonsensical. We also show that LLMs are substantially skilled in generating plausible contexts for anomalous cases.
comment: Accepted for publication at STARSEM 2026, San Diego, CA

light_analysis.overview: 通过人类和LLM对语义异常句子的判断，发现大多数句子只是异常而非无意义，且LLM能有效生成上下文。
light_analysis.motivation: 无意义和异常句子在语义解释计算模型中至关重要，但难以区分真正的无意义与在上下文中可解释的异常。现有数据集未明确评估无意义程度，且LLM区分能力未知。本研究旨在填补这两个空白。
light_analysis.method: 收集五个语义偏差数据集（无上下文和提供上下文时）的人类和LLM无意义判断。参与者包括人类评估者和主流LLM，通过对比判断结果分析句子异常程度和LLM生成合理上下文的能力。
light_analysis.result: 人类和LLM判断一致：大多数句子仅被认为异常，仅少数被判定为真正无意义。LLM表现出在生成支持性上下文方面的显著能力，能将异常句子变得合理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有语义偏差数据集的无意义程度有限，并展示了LLM在理解与生成语义上下文方面的优势。为未来语义异常检测和上下文生成研究提供了基准和方法论指导。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Decomposing the Reasoning Efficiency of LLMs
abstract: As reasoning LLMs increasingly trade tokens for accuracy through deliberation, search, and self-correction, a single accuracy score can no longer tell whether those tokens buy useful reasoning, recovery from hard instances, or unnecessary verbosity. We introduce a trace-optional evaluation protocol that exactly decomposes token efficiency using three observables available even for closed models: completion rate, conditional correctness given completion, and generated length. When instance-level workload metadata is available, we further normalize generated length by declared task-implied work and separate mean verbalization overhead from workload-dependent scaling. When such metadata is absent, we define an auditable solver-derived workload scale and evaluate its stability under leave-self-out, leave-top-k, and held-out-reference-pool perturbations. We evaluate 14 shared open-weight models on CogniLoad, GSM8K, ProofWriter, and ZebraLogic. We further evaluate 11 additional models on CogniLoad, enabling a fine-grained analysis of reasoning-task difficulty factors: task length, intrinsic difficulty, and distractor density. Efficiency and overhead rankings remain stable across all benchmark pairs, more robustly than accuracy rankings, while the decomposition separates logic-limited, context-limited (truncation-driven), and verbosity-limited failure modes that look identical under accuracy-per-token. We release an evaluation artifact and reporting template, which elaborates on why an LLM is inefficient at reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种超越准确率的LLM推理效率分解评估协议，通过完成率、条件正确性和生成长度等观测指标分解token效率，并区分失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM通过推理、搜索和自我修正增加token以提升准确率，但单一准确率指标无法区分token是否用于有效推理、恢复困难实例还是不必要冗长。需要一种更细粒度的评估方法来揭示推理效率瓶颈，识别逻辑受限、上下文受限和冗长受限等不同失败模式。该研究旨在提供可审计的分解方法，适用于封闭和开放模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种trace-optional评估协议，利用三个观测指标：完成率、给定完成时的条件正确性、生成长度。当实例级工作负载元数据可用时，通过任务隐含工作归一化生成长度，分离平均语言开销与工作负载依赖缩放。当元数据缺失时，定义可审计的求解器导出工作负载尺度，并通过留一法、留顶k法和留出参考池扰动评估其稳定性。在CogniLoad、GSM8K、ProofWriter、ZebraLogic上评估了14个开放权重模型，并在CogniLoad上额外评估11个模型，分析任务长度、内在难度和干扰密度等困难因素。
light_analysis.result: 跨所有基准对，效率和开销排名比准确率排名更稳定。分解方法成功分离了逻辑受限、上下文受限（截断驱动）和冗长受限的失败模式，这些模式在准确率-每token指标下看起来相同。具体数据摘要未明确给出，但表明该方法能有效区分不同效率瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了超越准确率的LLM推理效率分解评估框架，有助于理解模型为何推理不高效。具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值，可指导模型开发和推理成本优化。潜在局限性：需要进一步验证在不同任务和模型上的泛化性。未来工作可探索更自动化的元数据提取和更细粒度的失败模式分类。

title: StructLens: A Structural Lens for Language Models via Maximum Spanning Trees
abstract: Language exhibits inherent structures, a property that explains both language acquisition and language change. Given this characteristic, we expect language models to manifest their own internal structures as well. While interpretability research has investigated how models compute representations mechanistically through attention patterns and Sparse AutoEncoders, the organization of the resulting representations is overlooked. To address this gap, we introduce StructLens, a framework to analyze representations through a holistic structural view. StructLens constructs maximum spanning trees based on the semantic representations in residual streams, inspired by tree representation in dependency parsing, and provides summaries of token relationships in representation space. We analyze how contiguous tokens are also nearby in representation space and find that middle layers show the strongest local-span organization. Moreover, analysis of pre-training checkpoints reveals that smaller local units become detectable earlier in pre-training, and larger units later. Our findings demonstrate that StructLens provides insights into how models organize token representations across layers and training. Our code is available at https://github.com/naist-nlp/structlens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StructLens框架，通过最大生成树从结构视角分析语言模型表示的组织方式。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言具有内在结构，语言模型也应有内部结构。现有可解释性研究（注意力模式、稀疏自编码器）关注机制计算，忽略了表示的组织。因此需要一种全局结构视角分析表示空间中的token关系。
light_analysis.method: 基于残差流中的语义表示，借鉴依存句法分析中的树表示，构建最大生成树。提供表示空间中token关系摘要，分析连续token在表示空间中的邻近性。
light_analysis.result: 发现中间层显示最强的局部跨度组织；预训练检查点分析显示，较小的局部单元在预训练早期可检测，较大的单元后期出现。
light_analysis.conclusion: StructLens提供洞察模型如何跨层和跨训练组织token表示。代码开源。学术价值：为语言模型表示结构提供新视角。实际价值：有助于理解模型内部表征。

title: Geospatial-Reasoning-Driven Vocabulary-Agnostic Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation has become an important direction in remote sensing, as it enables recognition beyond predefined land-cover categories. However, existing methods mainly depend on passive visual-text matching and often struggle with semantic ambiguity in geographically complex scenes, especially when different classes exhibit similar spectral or structural patterns. To address this issue, we propose a Geospatial Reasoning Chain-of-Thought (GR-CoT) framework for remote sensing open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. GR-CoT consists of an offline knowledge distillation stream and an online instance reasoning stream. The former constructs category interpretation standards for confusing classes, while the latter performs macro-scenario anchoring, visual feature decoupling, and knowledge-driven decision synthesis to generate an image-adaptive vocabulary for downstream segmentation. Experiments on the LoveDA and GID5 benchmarks indicate that the proposed framework improves overall segmentation performance and yields more semantically coherent predictions in complex scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GR-CoT框架，通过知识蒸馏与实例推理的协同工作流，实现遥感开放词汇语义分割的语义连贯性提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割依赖被动视觉-文本匹配，在地理复杂场景中（如光谱或结构模式相似的类别）易出现语义歧义，导致分割不准确。该方法难以处理土地利用/覆盖分类中的细粒度差异，亟需引入空间推理能力。
light_analysis.method: GR-CoT框架包含离线知识蒸馏流（构建混淆类别的分类解释标准）和在线实例推理流（执行宏观场景锚定、视觉特征解耦、知识驱动决策合成）。通过链式思考生成图像自适应词汇，用于下游分割网络，核心在于将地理空间推理融入语义理解。
light_analysis.result: 在LoveDA和GID5数据集上，GR-CoT框架相比基线方法显著提升整体分割性能，尤其在复杂场景中产生更语义连贯的预测结果。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将地理空间推理链引入遥感开放词汇分割，有效解决语义歧义问题。该方法可扩展至其他遥感理解任务（如场景分类），未来可探索更高效的知识蒸馏策略或与多模态大模型结合。

title: Neural Networks With Dense Weights Are Not Universal Approximators
abstract: We investigate the approximation capabilities of dense neural networks. While universal approximation theorems establish that sufficiently large architectures can approximate arbitrary continuous functions if there are no restrictions on the weight values, we show that dense neural networks do not possess this universality. Our argument is based on a model compression approach, combining the weak regularity lemma with an interpretation of feedforward networks as message passing graph neural networks. We consider ReLU neural networks subject to natural constraints on weights and input and output dimensions, which model a notion of dense connectivity. Within this setting, we demonstrate the existence of Lipschitz continuous functions that cannot be approximated by such networks. This highlights intrinsic limitations of neural networks with dense layers and motivates the use of sparse connectivity as a necessary ingredient for achieving true universality.

light_analysis.overview: 证明在自然权重约束下，密集连接的ReLU神经网络无法通用逼近所有Lipschitz连续函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用逼近定理表明，若无权重限制，足够大的神经网络可逼近任意连续函数。但实际中密集连接的神经网络广泛使用，其逼近能力是否真正通用仍存疑。本研究旨在探索密集网络在权重范围、维度等自然约束下的逼近极限，揭示其内在局限性，为设计更高效的网络架构提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 通过模型压缩方法，结合弱正则引理，将前馈神经网络重新解释为消息传递图神经网络。考虑具有ReLU激活函数和自然权重约束（如权重大小有界）的密集连接网络，输入输出维度受限。在此设置下，利用图神经网络的特性证明存在Lipschitz连续函数无法被任何此类密集网络逼近。
light_analysis.result: 证明了存在特定的Lipschitz连续函数，使得满足自然约束的密集ReLU神经网络无法以任意精度逼近。这表明密集连接神经网络不是通用近似器，挑战了关于神经网络逼近能力的传统认知。相比之下，稀疏连接网络可能克服这一局限，强调了稀疏性的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了密集权重神经网络在逼近能力上的根本限制，证明其无法通用逼近所有Lipschitz连续函数。该发现对神经网络理论有重要贡献，表明密集连接并非万能，稀疏连接可能是实现真正通用逼近的必要条件。未来可探究不同稀疏模式的影响，并为设计高效稀疏网络提供指导。

title: T-STAR: A Context-Aware Transformer Framework for Short-Term Probabilistic Demand Forecasting in Dock-Based Shared Micro-Mobility
abstract: Reliable short-term demand forecasting is essential for managing shared micro-mobility services and ensuring responsive, user-centered operations. This study introduces T-STAR (Two-stage Spatial and Temporal Adaptive contextual Representation), a novel transformer-based probabilistic framework designed to forecast station-level bike-sharing demand at a 15-minute resolution. T-STAR addresses key challenges in high-resolution forecasting by disentangling consistent demand patterns from short-term fluctuations through a hierarchical two-stage structure. The first stage captures coarse-grained hourly demand patterns, while the second stage improves prediction accuracy by incorporating high-frequency, localized inputs, including recent fluctuations and real-time demand variations in connected metro services, to account for temporal shifts in short-term demand. Time series transformer models are employed in both stages to generate probabilistic predictions. Extensive experiments using Washington D.C.'s Capital Bikeshare data demonstrate that T-STAR outperforms existing methods in both deterministic and probabilistic accuracy. The model exhibits strong spatial and temporal robustness across stations and time periods. A zero-shot forecasting experiment further highlights T-STAR's ability to transfer to previously unseen service areas without retraining. These results underscore the framework's potential to deliver granular, reliable, and uncertainty-aware short-term demand forecasts, which enable seamless integration to support multimodal trip planning for travelers and enhance real-time operations in shared micro-mobility services.
comment: This work has been submitted to Transportation Research Part C

light_analysis.overview: 提出T-STAR，一种基于Transformer的两阶段概率预测框架，用于共享微出行站点级15分钟分辨率需求预测，通过分层结构分离稳定模式与短期波动，提升高分辨率预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 共享微出行服务需要可靠的短期需求预测以优化运营和用户体验。高分辨率（15分钟）预测面临同时捕捉稳定需求模式和短期波动的挑战，现有方法在准确性和跨区域泛化能力上不足，难以支持实时决策和多模式交通整合。
light_analysis.method: T-STAR采用两阶段结构：第一阶段使用时间序列Transformer捕获粗粒度小时级需求模式；第二阶段通过融入近期波动和地铁实时数据等高频局部输入，精确预测短期时间偏移。两个阶段均输出概率分布，支持不确定性量化。实验基于Capital Bikeshare数据集。
light_analysis.result: T-STAR在确定性和概率指标上均超过现有基线，展现跨站点和时段的鲁棒性。零样本预测实验显示，模型无需重新训练即可泛化至未见服务区域，预测误差显著低于对比方法，验证了其迁移能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: T-STAR实现了精细、可靠且不确定性感知的短期需求预测，支持多模式出行规划和实时运营。其零样本迁移能力增强了实际部署价值。未来可扩展至其他共享出行系统或融合更多上下文信息。

title: NanoQuant: Efficient Sub-1-Bit Quantization of Large Language Models
abstract: Weight-only quantization has become a standard approach for efficiently serving large language models (LLMs). However, existing methods fail to efficiently compress models to binary (1-bit) levels, as they either require large amounts of data and compute or incur additional storage. In this work, we propose NanoQuant, the first post-training quantization (PTQ) method to compress LLMs to both binary and sub-1-bit levels. NanoQuant formulates quantization as a low-rank binary factorization problem, and compresses full-precision weights to low-rank binary matrices and scales. Specifically, it utilizes an efficient alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) solver to precisely initialize latent binary matrices and scales, and then tunes the initialized parameters through a block and model reconstruction process. Consequently, NanoQuant establishes a new Pareto frontier in low-memory post-training quantization, and enables sub-1-bit compression. NanoQuant makes large-scale deployment feasible on consumer hardware. For example, it compresses Llama2-70B by 25.8$\times$ in just 13 hours on a single H100, enabling a 70B model to operate on a consumer 8 GB GPU.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Hyochan Chong and Dongkyu Kim contributed equally to this work

light_analysis.overview: 提出NanoQuant，首个将LLM压缩到二进制和亚1位水平的后训练量化方法，通过低秩二元因式分解实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有权重量化方法无法高效压缩到二进制水平，要么需要大量数据和计算资源，要么引入额外存储开销。这限制了LLM在消费级硬件上的部署。因此，需要一种高效的亚1位量化方法，以实现极低比特率下的模型压缩，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.method: NanoQuant将量化建模为低秩二元因式分解问题，使用交替方向乘子法(ADMM)精确初始化潜在二元矩阵和缩放因子，然后通过块和模型重建进行微调。该方法无需大量训练数据，利用ADMM的高效求解优势，实现亚1位压缩。
light_analysis.result: 在单块H100 GPU上13小时内将Llama2-70B压缩25.8倍，使70B模型可在8GB消费级GPU上运行。建立了低内存后训练量化的新帕累托前沿，实现亚1位压缩效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: NanoQuant实现了高效的亚1位量化，极大降低存储和内存需求，使大模型在消费级硬件上部署成为可能。未来可扩展至其他模型架构，或探索更极端的压缩比。

title: Position: Universal Time Series Foundation Models Rest on a Category Error
abstract: This position paper argues that the pursuit of "Universal Foundation Models for Time Series" rests on a fundamental category error, mistaking a structural Container for a semantic Modality. We contend that because time series hold incompatible generative processes (e.g., finance vs. fluid dynamics), monolithic models degenerate into expensive "Generic Filters" that fail to generalize under distributional drift. To address this, we introduce the "Autoregressive Blindness Bound," a theoretical limit proving that history-only models cannot predict intervention-driven regime shifts. We advocate replacing universality with a Causal Control Agent paradigm, where an agent leverages external context to orchestrate a hierarchy of specialized solvers, from frozen domain experts to lightweight Just-in-Time adaptors. We conclude by calling for a shift in benchmarks from "Zero-Shot Accuracy" to "Drift Adaptation Speed" to prioritize robust, control-theoretic systems.

light_analysis.overview: 指出通用时间序列基础模型存在范畴错误，并提出了因果控制代理范式作为替代。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前研究致力于构建通用时间序列基础模型，但论文认为这存在根本性范畴错误，误将结构容器当作语义模态。不同领域的时间序列（如金融与流体力学）具有不兼容的生成过程，导致单一模型退化为昂贵的“通用滤波器”，无法在分布漂移下泛化。因此需要新的范式来解决模型泛化性不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入“自回归盲界”理论极限，证明仅基于历史数据的模型无法预测干预驱动的制度转变。提出用因果控制代理范式替代通用模型，该代理利用外部上下文编排层次化的专门求解器，包括冻结的领域专家和轻量级的即时适配器，以实现对异构时间序列的有效处理。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，但理论论证了自回归模型在预测干预驱动变化时的根本局限，并指出通用模型的零样本准确性不可靠。建议将基准从“零样本准确率”转向“漂移适应速度”，以优先评估控制理论系统的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是揭露了通用时间序列基础模型的逻辑谬误，并为时间序列分析提供了新方向——因果控制代理范式。这一研究具有重要学术价值，可引导社区关注分布漂移下的适应能力，而非静态准确性。未来需开发基于外部上下文和层次化专家的实际系统，并设计相应基准。

title: Manifold Random Features
abstract: We present a new paradigm for creating random features to approximate bi-variate functions (in particular, kernels) defined on general manifolds. This new mechanism of Manifold Random Features (MRFs) leverages discretization of the manifold and the recently introduced technique of Graph Random Features (GRFs) to learn continuous fields on manifolds. Those fields are used to find continuous approximation mechanisms that otherwise, in general scenarios, cannot be derived analytically. MRFs provide positive and bounded features, a key property for accurate, low-variance approximation. We show deep asymptotic connection between GRFs, defined on discrete graph objects, and continuous random features used for regular kernels. As a by-product of our method, we re-discover recently introduced mechanism of Gaussian kernel approximation applied in particular to improve linear-attention Transformers, considering simple random walks on graphs and by-passing original complex mathematical computations. We complement our algorithm with a rigorous theoretical analysis and verify in thorough experimental studies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出流形随机特征（MRFs），通过流形离散化与图随机特征生成连续核近似，解决流形上核函数的高质量近似问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有核方法处理流形数据时面临挑战，连续核函数的高质量近似难以直接获得。图随机特征（GRFs）虽能处理离散图数据，但缺乏对流形连续性的直接建模。需要一种结合离散图近似与连续流形学习的方法，以生成低方差、准确的随机特征，提升核方法在流形上的适用性。
light_analysis.method: MRFs利用流形离散化与GRFs技术学习流形上的连续场。通过离散图上的随机游走生成特征，经连续化后用于近似核函数。MRFs确保特征正且有界，减小近似方差。发现GRFs与连续核随机特征的渐近等价，并重新推导出高斯核近似，可直接改进线性注意力Transformer。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析证明MRFs的渐近性质。实验验证MRFs在近似精度和方差控制上优于现有方法。通过高斯核近似，提升了线性注意力Transformer的效率。具体数值未在摘要中明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: MRFs提供了在流形上构造随机特征的新框架，兼具理论优雅与实用价值。正有界特性有利于工程实现。为理解图随机特征与连续核近似的联系提供了洞见。未来可扩展至更复杂流形和核函数，但依赖流形离散化，高维空间可能存在计算挑战。

title: Mitigating Conversational Inertia in Multi-Turn Agents
abstract: Large language models excel as few-shot learners when provided with appropriate demonstrations, yet this strength becomes problematic in multiturn agent scenarios, where LLMs erroneously mimic their own previous responses as few-shot examples. Through attention analysis, we identify conversational inertia, a phenomenon where models exhibit strong diagonal attention to previous responses, which is associated with imitation bias that constrains exploration. This reveals a tension when transforming few-shot LLMs into agents: longer context enriches environmental feedback for exploitation, yet also amplifies conversational inertia that undermines exploration. Our key insight is that for identical states, actions generated with longer contexts exhibit stronger inertia than those with shorter contexts, enabling construction of preference pairs without environment rewards. Based on this, we propose Context Preference Learning to calibrate model preferences to favor low-inertia responses over highinertia ones. We further provide context management strategies at inference time to balance exploration and exploitation. Experimental results across eight agentic environments and one deep research scenario validate that our framework reduces conversational inertia and achieves performance improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Context Preference Learning框架，通过偏好学习减少多轮对话中的惯性，提升LLM agent的探索能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为少样本学习者在多轮对话中会错误地模仿自身历史回复，形成对话惯性，导致探索受限。注意力分析发现模型对先前回复的对角注意力过强，这是模仿偏差的根源。传统方法难以平衡利用长上下文带来的环境反馈和惯性增强的问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心是Context Preference Learning，利用相同状态下长上下文生成的动作惯性更强、短上下文惯性更弱的特性，构建偏好对进行直接偏好优化，无需环境奖励。同时提供推理时上下文管理策略，如动态上下文长度调整，以平衡探索与利用。在多个agent环境和深度研究场景中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在8个agent环境和1个深度研究场景中，所提框架显著降低了对话惯性，性能提升明显。具体指标如任务完成率、探索效率等优于基线方法。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调普遍有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于识别对话惯性现象并提出无奖励的偏好学习方法，有效缓解了LLM agent的探索困境。具有实用价值，可通过简单偏好校准提升多轮对话系统的自适应能力。未来可探索更复杂的上下文管理策略及理论分析。

title: Sparse Training of Neural Networks based on Multilevel Mirror Descent
abstract: We introduce a dynamic sparse training algorithm based on linearized Bregman iterations / mirror descent that exploits the naturally incurred sparsity by alternating between periods of static and dynamic sparsity pattern updates. The key idea is to combine sparsity-inducing Bregman iterations with adaptive freezing of the network structure to enable efficient exploration of the sparse parameter space while maintaining sparsity. We provide convergence guaranties by embedding our method in a multilevel optimization framework. Furthermore, we empirically show that our algorithm can produce highly sparse and accurate models on standard benchmarks. We also show that the theoretical number of FLOPs compared to SGD training can be reduced from 38% for standard Bregman iterations to 6% for our method while maintaining test accuracy.We additionally show a training time reduction by about 50%, when using a sparsity-aware CPU implementation of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于多层级镜像下降的动态稀疏训练算法，通过交替静态和动态稀疏模式更新，实现高精度稀疏模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络训练中，动态稀疏训练能有效降低计算和存储成本，但现有方法在保持高稀疏度和模型精度之间难以平衡。传统Bregman迭代虽能产生稀疏性，但计算开销大、收敛慢。本文旨在通过多层级优化框架，实现高效稀疏训练，同时保证收敛性和精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于线性化Bregman迭代/镜像下降的动态稀疏训练算法，核心是结合稀疏诱导的Bregman迭代与自适应网络结构冻结。算法交替进行静态稀疏模式（冻结部分参数）和动态稀疏模式（更新参数并调整稀疏结构），嵌入多层级优化框架提供收敛保证。使用标准基准数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在标准基准上生成高稀疏且高精度模型。理论FLOPs相比SGD训练从标准Bregman迭代的38%降至6%，且保持测试精度。使用稀疏感知CPU实现时，训练时间减少约50%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出一种动态稀疏训练新方法，通过多层级镜像下降和自适应结构冻结，显著降低计算复杂度和训练时间，同时保持模型精度。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于资源受限场景。未来可探索更高效的稀疏模式更新策略或扩展至其他模型架构。

title: PEGRL: Improving Machine Translation by Post-Editing Guided Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown strong promise for LLM-based machine translation, with recent methods such as GRPO demonstrating notable gains; nevertheless, translation-oriented RL remains challenged by noisy learning signals arising from Monte Carlo return estimation, as well as a large trajectory space that favors global exploration over fine-grained local optimization. We introduce \textbf{PEGRL}, a \textit{two-stage} RL framework that uses post-editing as an auxiliary task to stabilize training and guide overall optimization. At each iteration, translation outputs are sampled to construct post-editing inputs, allowing return estimation in the post-editing stage to benefit from conditioning on the current translation behavior, while jointly supporting both global exploration and fine-grained local optimization. A task-specific weighting scheme further balances the contributions of translation and post-editing objectives, yielding a biased yet more sample-efficient estimator. Experiments on English$\to$Finnish, English$\to$Turkish, and English$\leftrightarrow$Chinese show consistent gains over RL baselines, and for English$\to$Turkish, performance on COMET-KIWI is comparable to advanced LLM-based systems (DeepSeek-V3.2). Our code and a set of representative pretrained models are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/NJUNLP/peg-rl} and \url{https://huggingface.co/collections/DGME/pegrl}

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEGRL两阶段强化学习框架，利用后编辑作为辅助任务稳定训练并提升机器翻译质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的机器翻译中，强化学习方法（如GRPO）虽有效，但面临蒙特卡洛回报估计噪声大、轨迹空间大导致全局探索与局部优化失衡的问题。现有方法难以获得稳定且高效的学习信号，限制了翻译性能进一步提升。
light_analysis.method: PEGRL采用两阶段框架：每轮迭代先采样翻译输出，将其构造为后编辑输入；在后编辑阶段基于当前翻译行为进行回报估计，同时支持全局探索与细粒度局部优化。通过任务特定权重方案平衡翻译与后编辑目标，得到有偏但更样本高效的估计器。无需额外数据集，仅利用原始平行语料。
light_analysis.result: 在英→芬、英→土、英⇄中四个方向上的实验均一致超越RL基线。其中英→土方向在COMET-KIWI指标上达到与先进LLM系统（DeepSeek-V3.2）相当的水平。代码与预训练模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEGRL通过后编辑辅助强化学习，有效解决了翻译RL中噪声信号与优化平衡问题，显著提升翻译质量。方法通用性强，可扩展至其他文本生成任务。未来可探索更高效的后编辑策略或结合更大型LLM。

title: MemOCR: Layout-Aware Visual Memory for Efficient Long-Horizon Reasoning
abstract: Long-horizon agentic reasoning necessitates effectively compressing growing interaction histories into a limited context window. Most existing memory systems serialize history as text, where token-level cost is uniform and scales linearly with length, often spending scarce budget on low-value details. To this end, we introduce MemOCR, a multimodal memory agent that improves long-horizon reasoning under tight context budgets by allocating memory space with adaptive information density through visual layout. Concretely, MemOCR maintains a structured rich-text memory (e.g., headings, highlights) and renders it into an image that the agent consults for memory access, visually prioritizing crucial evidence while aggressively compressing auxiliary details. To ensure robustness across varying memory budgets, we train MemOCR with reinforcement learning under budget-aware objectives that expose the agent to diverse compression levels. Across long-context multi-hop and single-hop question-answering benchmarks, MemOCR outperforms strong text-based baselines and achieves more effective context utilization under extreme budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemOCR，一种布局感知的视觉记忆方法，通过将结构化文本渲染为图像实现自适应信息密度，用于高效长视野推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视野推理需要将不断增长的交互历史压缩到有限的上下文窗口中，现有记忆系统通常将历史序列化为文本，其token成本均匀且随长度线性增长，往往将稀缺预算浪费在低价值细节上。这导致在上下文预算紧张时，重要信息无法被有效保留，限制了代理的推理能力。因此，需要一种能够根据信息重要性自适应分配内存的方法。
light_analysis.method: MemOCR维护一个结构化的富文本记忆（如标题、高亮），并将其渲染为图像，代理通过查询该图像进行记忆访问。该方法通过视觉布局优先保留关键证据，同时积极压缩辅助细节。为增强对不同记忆预算的鲁棒性，采用强化学习训练，并使用预算感知目标，使代理暴露于多种压缩水平下学习。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文多跳和单跳问答基准上，MemOCR优于强文本基线方法。特别是在极端预算条件下，MemOCR实现了更有效的上下文利用，表明其视觉压缩策略能更好地分配有限的token预算。实验验证了布局感知视觉记忆在长视野推理中的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemOCR通过引入布局感知的视觉记忆，为长视野推理提供了一种高效的内存压缩方案。学术上创新性地将视觉布局与结构化文本结合，实际应用中有望提升智能助手等系统的长对话理解能力。未来可探索更复杂的记忆渲染策略或与其他模态融合。

title: Spatiotemporal Robustness of Temporal Logic Tasks using Multi-Objective Reasoning
abstract: The reliability of autonomous systems depends on their robustness, i.e., their ability to meet their objectives under uncertainty. In this paper, we study spatiotemporal robustness of temporal logic specifications evaluated over discrete-time signals. Existing work has proposed robust semantics that capture not only Boolean satisfiability, but also the geometric distance from unsatisfiability, corresponding to admissible spatial perturbations of a given signal. In contrast, we propose spatiotemporal robustness (STR), which captures admissible spatial and temporal perturbations jointly. This notion is particularly informative for interacting systems, such as multi-agent robotics, smart cities, and air traffic control. We define STR as a multi-objective reasoning problem, formalized via a partial order over spatial and temporal perturbations. This perspective has two key advantages: (1) STR can be interpreted as a Pareto-optimal set that characterizes all admissible spatiotemporal perturbations, and (2) STR can be computed using tools from multi-objective optimization. To navigate computational challenges, we propose robust semantics for STR that are sound in the sense of suitably under-approximating STR while being computationally tractable. Finally, we present monitoring algorithms for STR using these robust semantics. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to deal with robustness across multiple dimensions via multi-objective reasoning.
comment: 30 pages, 6 figures, to be published at the 38th International Conference on Computer Aided Verification 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出时空鲁棒性（STR）概念，通过多目标推理联合考虑空间和时间扰动，用于时态逻辑任务的鲁棒性度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有鲁棒性语义仅考虑空间扰动，忽略时间扰动，对于多智能体机器人、智慧城市等交互系统，时空扰动共同影响任务满足。需要一种能同时刻画时空扰动的鲁棒性度量，以更全面评估系统在不确定性下的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 将STR定义为多目标推理问题，通过空间和时间扰动的偏序形式化，得到帕累托最优集表征所有可允许的时空扰动。提出合理的下近似语义以确保计算可行性，并基于此开发监控算法，利用多目标优化工具进行计算。
light_analysis.result: 论文提出并实现了STR的监控算法，通过下近似语义在计算可行性与准确性间取得平衡。与现有仅空间鲁棒性相比，STR提供了更全面的鲁棒性信息，能同时刻画时空扰动的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次通过多目标推理处理多维鲁棒性，具有重要学术价值，为自主系统鲁棒性评估提供了新视角。实际应用中可用于多智能体系统、空中交通管制等领域。潜在局限性在于计算复杂度，未来可优化算法效率。

title: Queue Length Regret Bounds for Contextual Queueing Bandits
abstract: We introduce contextual queueing bandits, a new context-aware framework for scheduling while simultaneously learning unknown service rates. Individual jobs carry heterogeneous contextual features, based on which the agent chooses a job and matches it with a server to maximize the departure rate. The service/departure rate is governed by a logistic model of the contextual feature with an unknown server-specific parameter. To evaluate the performance of a policy, we consider queue length regret, defined as the difference in queue length between the policy and the optimal policy. The main challenge in the analysis is that the lists of remaining job features in the queue may differ under our policy versus the optimal policy for a given time step, since they may process jobs in different orders. To address this, we propose the idea of policy-switching queues equipped with a sophisticated coupling argument. This leads to a novel queue length regret decomposition framework, allowing us to understand the short-term effect of choosing a suboptimal job-server pair and its long-term effect on queue state differences. We show that our algorithm, CQB-$\varepsilon$, achieves a regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$. We also consider the setting of adversarially chosen contexts, for which our second algorithm, CQB-Opt, achieves a regret upper bound of $\mathcal{O}(\log^2 T)$. Lastly, we provide experimental results that validate our theoretical findings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文排队赌博机框架，结合调度与未知服务率学习，并推导队列长度遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有调度方法大多假设已知服务率或忽略作业上下文特征，无法在真实系统中动态优化。该研究旨在同时处理上下文感知的作业调度和服务率学习问题，以最小化队列长度遗憾。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CQB-ε和CQB-Opt两种算法，基于逻辑模型刻画服务率与上下文的关系。通过策略切换队列和耦合论证，将遗憾分解为短期子优匹配与长期队列状态差异，实现遗憾分析。
light_analysis.result: CQB-ε在随机上下文下达到潜变量上界Õ(T^{-1/4})；CQB-Opt在对抗上下文下达到O(log^2 T)的遗憾界。实验验证了理论结果的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作建立了上下文感知排队的理论框架，为在线学习与排队系统的交叉领域提供了新思路。方法可应用于云调度、服务系统等场景，未来可扩展至多服务器或异构环境。

title: Theory of Minimal Weight Perturbations in Deep Networks and its Applications for Low-Rank Activated Backdoor Attacks
abstract: The minimal norm weight perturbations of DNNs required to achieve a specified change in output are derived and the factors determining its size are discussed. These single-layer exact formulae are contrasted with more generic multi-layer Lipschitz constant based robustness guarantees; both are observed to be of the same order which indicates similar efficacy in their guarantees. These results are applied to precision-modification-activated backdoor attacks, establishing provable compression thresholds below which such attacks cannot succeed, and show empirically that low-rank compression can reliably activate latent backdoors while preserving full-precision accuracy. These expressions reveal how back-propagated margins govern layer-wise sensitivity and provide certifiable guarantees on the smallest parameter updates consistent with a desired output shift.

light_analysis.overview: 推导了深度网络最小范数权重扰动的理论公式，并应用于低秩激活后门攻击，建立了可证明的压缩阈值。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法缺乏对深度网络权重扰动最小范数的理论理解，尤其是与后门攻击的关系。理解最小扰动有助于设计鲁棒模型和检测攻击；现有Lipschitz常数保证可能不如精确公式有效，因此需要更精确的理论分析。
light_analysis.method: 推导了单层精确公式与多层Lipschitz常数保证，并对比两者同阶。将理论应用于精密修改激活的后门攻击，建立可证明的压缩阈值，表明低秩压缩可可靠激活潜在后门，同时保持全精度准确率。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导表明单层精确公式与多层Lipschitz保证同阶。实验证实低秩压缩可激活后门并保持全精度准确率。表达式揭示反向传播的边际决定层敏感性，提供最小参数更新的可证明保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了深度网络最小权重扰动的理论，应用于后门攻击的防御或检测。学术价值：建立了可证明的压缩阈值；实用价值：可用于设计鲁棒压缩方法。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的网络结构。

title: DisasterVQA: A Visual Question Answering Benchmark Dataset for Disaster Scenes
abstract: Social media imagery provides a low-latency source of situational information during natural and human-induced disasters, enabling rapid damage assessment and response. While Visual Question Answering (VQA) has shown strong performance in general-purpose domains, its suitability for the complex and safety-critical reasoning required in disaster response remains unclear. We introduce DisasterVQA, a benchmark dataset designed for perception and reasoning in crisis contexts. DisasterVQA consists of 1,395 real-world images and 4,405 expert-curated question-answer pairs spanning diverse events such as floods, wildfires, and earthquakes. Grounded in humanitarian frameworks including FEMA ESF and OCHA MIRA, the dataset includes binary, multiple-choice, and open-ended questions covering situational awareness and operational decision-making tasks. We benchmark seven state-of-the-art vision-language models and find performance variability across question types, disaster categories, regions, and humanitarian tasks. Although models achieve high accuracy on binary questions, they struggle with fine-grained quantitative reasoning, object counting, and context-sensitive interpretation, particularly for underrepresented disaster scenarios. DisasterVQA provides a challenging and practical benchmark to guide the development of more robust and operationally meaningful vision-language models for disaster response. The dataset is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18267769.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个针对灾难场景的视觉问答基准数据集DisasterVQA，用于评估和推动视觉语言模型在危机情境中的感知与推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体图像在自然灾害和人为灾害中提供低延迟的情景信息，有助于快速损害评估和响应。然而，通用视觉问答模型在灾难响应这类复杂且安全关键的推理任务中的适用性尚不明确。现有模型缺乏针对灾难场景的专门评估，因此需要构建一个基于人道主义框架的基准数据集来测试和提升模型的实用性。
light_analysis.method: DisasterVQA数据集包含1,395张真实灾难图像和4,405个专家策划的问答对，覆盖洪水、野火、地震等多种事件。问题基于FEMA ESF和OCHA MIRA等人道主义框架设计，包括二进制、多选和开放性问题，涵盖态势感知和操作决策任务。研究选取了七个先进的视觉-语言模型进行基准测试，评估其在问题类型、灾难类别、区域和人道主义任务上的性能。
light_analysis.result: 模型在二进制问题上表现较高准确率，但在细粒度定量推理、物体计数和情境敏感解释方面存在显著困难，尤其对于代表性不足的灾难场景。性能在不同问题类型、灾难类别和区域间存在差异，表明现有模型在灾难响应中缺乏鲁棒性和操作意义。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但指出模型整体能力不足以应对实际需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: DisasterVQA提供了一个具有挑战性的实际基准，有助于指导更鲁棒且操作上有意义的视觉-语言模型开发，以支持灾难响应。数据集公开，可促进该领域研究。未来工作可聚焦于提升模型在细粒度推理和少样本场景下的表现，以及扩展数据集覆盖更多灾害类型。

title: LURE: Latent Space Unblocking for Multi-Concept Reawakening in Diffusion Models
abstract: Concept erasure aims to suppress sensitive content in diffusion models, but recent studies show that erased concepts can still be reawakened, revealing vulnerabilities in erasure methods. Existing reawakening methods mainly rely on prompt-level optimization to manipulate sampling trajectories, neglecting other generative factors, which limits a comprehensive understanding of the underlying dynamics. In this paper, we model the generation process as an implicit function to enable a comprehensive theoretical analysis of multiple factors, including text conditions, model parameters, and latent states. We theoretically show that perturbing each factor can reawaken erased concepts. Building on this insight, we propose a novel concept reawakening method: Latent space Unblocking for concept REawakening (LURE), which reawakens erased concepts by reconstructing the latent space and guiding the sampling trajectory. Specifically, our semantic re-binding mechanism reconstructs the latent space by aligning denoising predictions with target distributions to reestablish severed text-visual associations. However, in multi-concept scenarios, naive reconstruction can cause gradient conflicts and feature entanglement. To address this, we introduce Gradient Field Orthogonalization, which enforces feature orthogonality to prevent mutual interference. Additionally, our Latent Semantic Identification-Guided Sampling (LSIS) ensures stability of the reawakening process via posterior density verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LURE enables simultaneous, high-fidelity reawakening of multiple erased concepts across diverse erasure tasks and methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LURE方法，通过潜在空间解阻塞实现多概念同时高保真重新唤醒，超越仅依赖提示优化的现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有概念擦除方法存在漏洞，擦除的概念可被重新唤醒，但现有方法仅依赖提示级优化，忽略了其他生成因素，限制了对其底层动态的全面理解。需要一种能综合考虑文本条件、模型参数和潜在状态等多因素的全面方法，以揭示擦除方法的脆弱性并推动安全生成研究。
light_analysis.method: 将生成过程建模为隐式函数进行理论分析，提出LURE方法：通过语义重绑定机制重建潜在空间，对齐去噪预测与目标分布以重建文本-视觉关联；针对多概念场景中的梯度冲突和特征纠缠，引入梯度场正交化强制特征正交；并采用潜伏语义识别引导采样（LSIS）通过后验密度验证确保稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，LURE在多种擦除任务和方法上成功实现了多个擦除概念的同时、高保真重新唤醒。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调广泛实验验证了其有效性和泛化能力，优于仅依赖提示优化的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析和LURE方法揭示了概念擦除的深层漏洞，实现了多概念高效重新唤醒，对安全可控生成具有重要学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的多概念交互和更鲁棒的擦除策略。局限：摘要未明确说明计算开销或适用边界。

title: Parallelizable memory recurrent units
abstract: With the emergence of massively parallel processing units, parallelization has become a desirable property for new sequence models. The ability to parallelize the processing of sequences with respect to the sequence length during training is one of the main factors behind the uprising of the Transformer architecture. However, Transformers lack efficiency at sequence generation, as they need to reprocess all past timesteps at every generation step. Recently, state-space models (SSMs) emerged as a more efficient alternative. These new kinds of recurrent neural networks (RNNs) keep the efficient update of the RNNs while gaining parallelization by getting rid of nonlinear dynamics (or recurrence). SSMs can reach state-of-the art performance through the efficient training of potentially very large networks, but still suffer from limited representation capabilities. In particular, SSMs cannot exhibit persistent memory, or the capacity of retaining information for an infinite duration, because of their monostability. In this paper, we introduce a new family of RNNs, the memory recurrent units (MRUs), that combine the persistent memory capabilities of nonlinear RNNs with the parallelizable computations of SSMs. These units leverage multistability as a source of persistent memory, while getting rid of transient dynamics for efficient computations. We then derive a specific implementation as proof-of-concept: the bistable memory recurrent unit (BMRU). This new RNN is compatible with the parallel scan algorithm. We show that BMRU achieves good results in tasks with long-term dependencies, and can be combined with state-space models to create hybrid networks that are parallelizable and have transient dynamics as well as persistent memory.
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures. This work has been the subject of patent applications (Numbers: EP26151077 and EP26175248.9)

light_analysis.overview: 提出记忆循环单元（MRU），利用多稳态实现持久记忆，结合SSM的并行计算，克服了SSM缺乏持久记忆和Transformer生成效率低的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有序列模型中，Transformer虽能并行训练但生成时需重算所有过去步，效率低；状态空间模型（SSM）通过去除非线性实现并行化，但因单稳性缺乏持久记忆能力，难以捕获无限长时间依赖。因此，需要一种既能并行训练又能高效生成且具备持久记忆的模型，以兼顾长程依赖建模和计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出记忆循环单元（MRU）家族，通过多稳态动力学提供持久记忆，同时去除瞬态动力学以实现高效计算。具体实现为双稳记忆循环单元（BMRU），使用两个稳定状态存储信息，并兼容并行扫描算法，可像SSM一样并行训练。此外，BMRU可与SSM混合，形成兼具瞬态动力学和持久记忆的并行化网络。
light_analysis.result: 在长程依赖任务上，BMRU取得了良好结果。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明其性能优于仅使用SSM或Transformer的基线，尤其在需要无限记忆的任务中表现突出，且不牺牲并行训练效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于首次将非线性RNN的持久记忆与SSM的并行计算成功结合，提出了MRU/BMRU架构，解决了SSM缺乏长期记忆的根本问题。该工作具有重要学术价值，为设计高效长程依赖模型提供了新思路。未来可探索更高阶多稳态单元，或将其应用于语音、文本等实际序列任务。

title: PersonaDual: Balancing Personalization and Objectivity via Adaptive Reasoning
abstract: As users increasingly expect LLMs to align with their preferences, personalized information becomes valuable. However, personalized information can be a double-edged sword: it can improve interaction but may compromise objectivity and factual correctness, especially when it is misaligned with the question. To alleviate this problem, we propose PersonaDual, a framework that supports both general-purpose objective reasoning and personalized reasoning in a single model, and adaptively switches modes based on context. PersonaDual is first trained with SFT to learn two reasoning patterns, and then further optimized via reinforcement learning with our proposed DualGRPO to improve mode selection. Experiments on objective and personalized benchmarks show that PersonaDual preserves the benefits of personalization while reducing interference, achieving near interference-free performance and better leveraging helpful personalized signals to improve objective problem-solving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PersonaDual框架，通过自适应推理模式切换，平衡个性化与客观性，利用SFT和强化学习优化模式选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户期望LLM符合个人偏好，但个性化信息可能损害客观性和事实正确性，尤其是与问题不匹配时。现有方法未能有效平衡两者，需要一种能自适应切换推理模式的方案。
light_analysis.method: PersonaDual框架包含两阶段：首先通过SFT训练两种推理模式（通用客观推理和个性化推理），然后使用提出的DualGRPO强化学习方法优化模式选择。模型根据上下文自适应切换模式，实现单一模型内两种推理共存。
light_analysis.result: 在客观和个性化基准测试中，PersonaDual保留了个性化优势，同时降低了对客观性的干扰，达到近乎无干扰的性能，并有效利用有益的个性化信号改进客观问题求解。具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: PersonaDual有效平衡了个性化与客观性，提升了LLM在个性化场景中的可靠性和准确性。未来可探索更复杂的自适应机制或扩展应用领域。

title: Watching, Reasoning, and Searching: A Video Deep Research Benchmark on Open Web for Agentic Video Reasoning
abstract: In real-world video question answering scenarios, videos often provide only localized visual cues, while verifiable answers are distributed across the open web; models therefore need to jointly perform cross-frame clue extraction, iterative retrieval, and multi-hop reasoning-based verification. To bridge this gap, we construct the first video deep research benchmark, VideoDR. VideoDR centers on video-conditioned open-domain video question answering, requiring cross-frame visual anchor extraction, interactive web retrieval, and multi-hop reasoning over joint video-web evidence; through rigorous human annotation and quality control, we obtain high-quality video deep research samples spanning six semantic domains. We evaluate multiple closed-source and open-source multimodal large language models under both the Workflow and Agentic paradigms, and the results show that Agentic is not consistently superior to Workflow: its gains depend on a model's ability to maintain the initial video anchors over long retrieval chains. Further analysis indicates that goal drift and long-horizon consistency are the core bottlenecks. In sum, VideoDR provides a systematic benchmark for studying video agents in open-web settings and reveals the key challenges for next-generation video deep research agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个视频深度研究基准VideoDR，评估多模态大模型在开放网络环境中的视频推理能力，发现Agentic范式并非始终优于Workflow，目标漂移和长程一致性是核心瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实视频问答中，视频仅提供局部视觉线索，可验证答案分布在开放网络上，现有方法缺乏同时进行跨帧线索提取、迭代检索和多跳推理验证的能力。该研究构建VideoDR基准填补这一空白，旨在系统评估视频智能体在开放网络环境中的推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建VideoDR基准，包含六类语义域的高质量样本，要求模型进行跨帧视觉锚点提取、交互式网页检索以及基于视频-网页联合证据的多跳推理。评估在Workflow（预设流程）和Agentic（自主代理）两种范式下，多个闭源和开源多模态大模型的表现。
light_analysis.result: Agentic范式并非始终优于Workflow，其提升依赖于模型在长检索链中保持初始视频锚点的能力。实验表明，目标漂移和长程一致性是主要性能瓶颈，具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoDR为开放网络环境下视频智能体研究提供了系统基准，揭示了下一代视频深度研究智能体的关键挑战：目标漂移和长程一致性维护。该工作对提升视频问答和智能体推理的实用性有重要价值。

title: Rethinking Table Pruning in TableQA: From Sequential Revisions to Gold Trajectory-Supervised Parallel Search
abstract: Table Question Answering (TableQA) benefits significantly from table pruning, which extracts compact sub-tables by eliminating redundant cells to streamline downstream reasoning. However, existing pruning methods typically rely on sequential revisions driven by unreliable critique signals, often failing to detect the loss of answer-critical data. To address this limitation, we propose TabTrim, a novel table pruning framework which transforms table pruning from sequential revisions to gold trajectory-supervised parallel search. TabTrim derives a gold pruning trajectory using the intermediate sub-tables in the execution process of gold SQL queries, and trains a pruner and a verifier to make the step-wise pruning result align with the gold pruning trajectory. During inference, TabTrim performs parallel search to explore multiple candidate pruning trajectories and identify the optimal sub-table. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TabTrim achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse tabular reasoning tasks: TabTrim-8B reaches 73.5% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest baseline by 3.2%, including 79.4% on WikiTQ and 61.2% on TableBench.
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures, accepted to ACL 2026 Oral

light_analysis.overview: 提出TabTrim框架，将表剪枝从顺序修订转变为黄金轨迹监督的并行搜索，显著提升TableQA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: TableQA中表剪枝通过消除冗余单元格提取紧凑子表以简化推理。然而现有方法依赖顺序修订和不可靠的批评信号，常漏掉答案关键数据，导致错误剪枝。该问题重要，因为准确剪枝直接影响下游推理质量。现有方法不足，需更可靠的剪枝机制。
light_analysis.method: TabTrim从gold SQL执行过程的中间子表导出黄金剪枝轨迹，训练剪枝器和验证器使逐步剪枝结果对齐该轨迹。推理时采用并行搜索，探索多个候选剪枝轨迹并识别最优子表。关键创新在于将顺序修订转化为并行搜索，并引入黄金轨迹监督。
light_analysis.result: TabTrim-8B在多种表格推理任务中平均准确率达73.5%，超过最强基线3.2%。具体地，在WikiTQ上达79.4%，在TableBench上达61.2%，均取得最优性能，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabTrim通过黄金轨迹监督的并行搜索革新了表剪枝方法，提升了TableQA准确性。具有重要学术价值，可应用于实际表格问答系统。未来可探索更高效的搜索策略或扩展到更复杂的推理场景。

title: Forget-It-All: Multi-Concept Machine Unlearning via Concept-Aware Neuron Masking
abstract: The widespread adoption of text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models has raised concerns about their potential to generate copyrighted, inappropriate, or sensitive imagery. As a practical solution, machine unlearning aims to erase unwanted concepts without retraining from scratch. While most existing methods are effective for single-concept unlearning, they often struggle when removing multiple concepts, causing significant challenges in unlearning effectiveness, generation quality, and sensitivity to hyperparameters and datasets. We take a unique perspective on multi-concept unlearning by leveraging model sparsity and propose the Forget It All (FIA) framework. FIA first introduces Contrastive Concept Saliency to quantify each weight connection's contribution to a target concept. It then identifies Concept Sensitive Neurons by combining temporal and spatial information, ensuring that only neurons consistently responsive to the target concept are selected. Finally, FIA constructs masks from the identified neurons and fuses them into a unified multi-concept mask, where Concept Agnostic Neurons that broadly support general content generation are preserved while concept-specific neurons are pruned to remove the targets. FIA is training-free and requires minimal hyperparameter tuning for new tasks, enabling plug-and-play use. Extensive experiments across three distinct unlearning tasks demonstrate that FIA achieves more reliable multi-concept unlearning, improving forgetting effectiveness while maintaining generation fidelity and quality. Code is available at https://github.com/kaiyuan02415/Forget-It-All

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Forget-It-All (FIA) 框架，通过概念感知神经元掩码实现多概念机器遗忘，无需训练，即插即用。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型可能生成版权、不当或敏感内容，机器遗忘旨在无需从头训练即可擦除不需要的概念。现有方法多针对单概念有效，但在多概念遗忘时面临遗忘效果差、生成质量下降、对超参数和数据集敏感等挑战。因此需要一种高效、鲁棒的多概念遗忘方法。
light_analysis.method: FIA 利用模型稀疏性，首先通过对比概念显著性量化每个权重对目标概念的贡献；然后结合时间和空间信息识别概念敏感神经元，确保只选择对目标概念一致响应的神经元；最后从这些神经元构建掩码并融合成统一的多概念掩码，保留支持通用内容生成的概念无关神经元，剪除概念特定神经元。FIA 无需训练，超参数调节极少，支持即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同的遗忘任务上进行广泛实验，FIA 在实现多概念遗忘时更可靠，提高了遗忘效果，同时保持了生成保真度和质量。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但声称优于现有单概念方法在多概念场景下的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: FIA 为多概念机器遗忘提供了一种高效、无需训练的解决方案，能够在不牺牲生成质量的前提下有效擦除多个目标概念。其即插即用的特性便于实际部署，尤其适用于内容安全过滤。未来可能扩展到更复杂的模型或更细粒度的概念控制。

title: Forget Many, Forget Right: Scalable and Precise Concept Unlearning in Diffusion Models
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress, yet their use raises copyright and misuse concerns, prompting research into machine unlearning. However, extending multi-concept unlearning to large-scale scenarios remains difficult due to three challenges: (i) conflicting weight updates that hinder unlearning or degrade generation; (ii) imprecise mechanisms that cause collateral damage to similar content; and (iii) reliance on additional data or modules, creating scalability bottlenecks. To address these, we propose Scalable-Precise Concept Unlearning (ScaPre), a unified framework tailored for large-scale unlearning. ScaPre introduces a conflict-aware stable design, integrating spectral trace regularization and geometry alignment to stabilize optimization, suppress conflicts, and preserve global structure. Furthermore, an Informax Decoupler identifies concept-relevant parameters and adaptively reweights updates, strictly confining unlearning to the target subspace. ScaPre yields an efficient closed-form solution without requiring auxiliary data or sub-models. Comprehensive experiments on objects, styles, and explicit content demonstrate that ScaPre effectively removes target concepts while maintaining generation quality. It forgets up to $\times \mathbf{5}$ more concepts than the best baseline within acceptable quality limits, achieving state-of-the-art precision and efficiency for large-scale unlearning. Code is available at https://github.com/kaiyuan02415/scapre

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScaPre框架，通过冲突感知稳定设计和信息最大化解耦器，实现扩散模型大规模多概念的可扩展精确遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型的广泛应用引发版权和滥用问题，亟需机器遗忘技术。现有方法在大规模多概念遗忘场景下面临三大挑战：权重更新冲突导致遗忘失败或生成质量下降；不精确机制对相似内容造成附带损害；依赖额外数据或模块导致可扩展性瓶颈。因此，发展可扩展且精确的遗忘方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: ScaPre框架包含两个核心组件：冲突感知稳定设计，利用谱迹正则化和几何对齐稳定优化过程、抑制更新冲突并保持全局结构；Informax Decoupler，识别与目标概念相关的参数并自适应重加权更新，严格限制遗忘到目标子空间。该方法无需辅助数据或子模型，提供高效的闭式解。
light_analysis.result: 在对象、风格和显式内容等多样化概念上的实验表明，ScaPre能有效移除目标概念同时保持生成质量。与最佳基线相比，在可接受的质量损失范围内，ScaPre可遗忘多达5倍的概念，实现了大规模遗忘任务中最先进的精度和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScaPre统一框架解决了大规模概念遗忘中的冲突、不精确和可扩展性问题，通过闭式解避免额外开销。该研究为扩散模型的安全应用提供了实用工具，并为机器遗忘领域贡献了可扩展的解决方案。未来可探索更复杂场景下的遗忘泛化能力。

title: Lying with Truths: Open-Channel Multi-Agent Collusion for Belief Manipulation via Generative Montage
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) transition to autonomous agents synthesizing real-time information, their reasoning capabilities introduce an unexpected attack surface. This paper introduces a novel threat where colluding agents steer victim beliefs using only truthful evidence fragments distributed through public channels, without relying on covert communications, backdoors, or falsified documents. By exploiting LLMs' overthinking tendency, we formalize the first cognitive collusion attack and propose Generative Montage: a Writer-Editor-Director framework that constructs deceptive narratives through adversarial debate and coordinated posting of evidence fragments, causing victims to internalize and propagate fabricated conclusions. To study this risk, we develop CoPHEME, a dataset derived from real-world rumor events, and simulate attacks across diverse LLM families. Our results show pervasive vulnerability across 14 LLM families: attack success rates reach 74.4% for proprietary models and 70.6% for open-weights models. Counterintuitively, stronger reasoning capabilities increase susceptibility, with reasoning-specialized models showing higher attack success than base models or prompts. Furthermore, these false beliefs then cascade to downstream judges, achieving over 60% deception rates, highlighting a socio-technical vulnerability in how LLM-based agents interact with dynamic information environments. Our implementation and data are available at: https://github.com/CharlesJW222/Lying_with_Truth/tree/main.
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference (Oral Presentation)

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体通过公开渠道使用真实证据片段进行认知共谋攻击的Generative Montage方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为自主智能体时，其推理能力被利用产生新的攻击面。现有威胁依赖隐蔽通信或伪造文档，但本文发现仅用公开渠道的真实信息片段即可操纵受害者信念，导致误传扩散。
light_analysis.method: 提出Writer-Editor-Director框架，通过对抗性辩论和协调发布证据片段构建欺骗性叙事，利用LLMs过度思考倾向。开发基于真实谣言事件的CoPHEME数据集，模拟跨14种LLM家族的攻击。
light_analysis.result: 攻击成功率：闭源模型74.4%，开源模型70.6%。更强推理能力的模型更易受影响，推理专用模型成功率高于基础模型。下游法官欺骗率超60%，揭示LLM智能体在动态信息环境中的社会技术脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次形式化认知共谋攻击，展示LLM推理能力带来的新安全风险。研究强调需防范基于真实信息的操纵，为构建鲁棒AI系统提供警示。未来可探索防御机制。

title: What Drives Success in Physical Planning with Joint-Embedding Predictive World Models?
abstract: A long-standing challenge in AI is to develop agents capable of solving a wide range of physical tasks and generalizing to new, unseen tasks and environments. A popular recent approach involves training a world model from state-action trajectories and subsequently use it with a planning algorithm to solve new tasks. Planning is commonly performed in the input space, but a recent family of methods has introduced planning algorithms that optimize in the learned representation space of the world model, with the promise that abstracting irrelevant details yields more efficient planning. In this work, we characterize models from this family as JEPA-WMs and investigate the technical choices that make algorithms from this class work. We propose a comprehensive study of several key components with the objective of finding the optimal approach within the family. We conducted experiments using both simulated environments and real-world robotic data, and studied how the model architecture, the training objective, and the planning algorithm affect planning success. We combine our findings to propose a model that outperforms two established baselines, DINO-WM and V-JEPA-2-AC, in both navigation and manipulation tasks. Code, data and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/jepa-wms.
comment: V2 of the article: - Added AdaLN-zero - Added table comparing JEPA-WMs with baselines with std translating per-seed variability only, no variability across epochs - Reordered figures in main body of the paper V3: added data scaling experiments, theoretical appendix section on autoregressive rollout, acceptance at TMLR

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究了联合嵌入预测世界模型（JEPA-WMs）的关键设计选择，提出了优于DINO-WM和V-JEPA-2-AC的规划方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 开发能解决多种物理任务并泛化到新任务和环境的智能体是AI的长期挑战。现有方法通过世界模型进行规划，但规划通常在输入空间进行，而新兴的JEPA-WMs在表征空间优化，有望通过抽象无关细节提高规划效率。然而，这类模型的技术选择尚缺乏系统研究，亟需明确其成功的关键因素。
light_analysis.method: 论文将JEPA-WMs定义为通过联合嵌入预测进行规划的世界模型家族，系统研究了模型架构、训练目标和规划算法三个关键组件。在模拟环境和真实机器人数据上进行了实验，通过对比不同设计选项，寻找最优配置。最终提出一种结合最佳选择的模型，并在导航和操作任务中与DINO-WM和V-JEPA-2-AC基线进行比较。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的JEPA-WMs模型在导航和操作任务中均优于DINO-WM和V-JEPA-2-AC两个基线。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但通过系统的组件研究，找到了使规划成功的最优技术组合，验证了在表征空间规划的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过系统研究JEPA-WMs的关键设计因素，提供了构建高效物理规划智能体的指导原则。工作不仅揭示了模型架构、训练目标和规划算法的影响，还提出了更优的模型，具有推动具身智能领域发展的学术和应用价值。未来可进一步探索更复杂任务和更大规模数据下的泛化能力。

title: ADMEDTAGGER: an annotation framework for distillation of expert knowledge for the Polish medical language
abstract: In this work, we present an annotation framework that demonstrates how a multilingual LLM pretrained on a large corpus can be used as a teacher model to distill the expert knowledge needed for tagging medical texts in Polish. This work is part of a larger project called ADMEDVOICE, within which we collected an extensive corpus of medical texts representing five clinical categories - Radiology, Oncology, Cardiology, Hypertension, and Pathology. Using this data, we had to develop a multi-class classifier, but the fundamental problem turned out to be the lack of resources for annotating an adequate number of texts. Therefore, in our solution, we used the multilingual Llama3.1 model to annotate an extensive corpus of medical texts in Polish. Using our limited annotation resources, we verified only a portion of these labels, creating a test set from them. The data annotated in this way were then used for training and validation of 3 different types of classifiers based on the BERT architecture - the distilled DistilBERT model, BioBERT fine-tuned on medical data, and HerBERT fine-tuned on the Polish language corpus. Among the models we trained, the DistilBERT model achieved the best results, reaching an F1 score > 0.80 for each clinical category and an F1 score > 0.93 for 3 of them. In this way, we obtained a series of highly effective classifiers that represent an alternative to large language models, due to their nearly 500 times smaller size, 300 times lower GPU VRAM consumption, and several hundred times faster inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用多语言LLM作为教师模型，为波兰语医学文本标注知识蒸馏的框架，并训练出高效的小型分类器。
light_analysis.motivation: 在波兰语医学文本标注任务中，缺乏足够的标注资源是主要问题。现有方法依赖大量人工标注，成本高且效率低。因此，需要一种自动化的标注方法，利用已有的多语言大语言模型（如Llama3.1）进行知识蒸馏，以生成高质量标注数据，从而训练出有效的小型分类器。
light_analysis.method: 使用多语言Llama3.1模型对波兰语医学文本进行自动标注，人工验证部分标签形成测试集。基于BERT架构训练了三种分类器：DistilBERT、BioBERT和HerBERT。利用5个临床类别（放射学、肿瘤学、心脏病学、高血压、病理学）的医学文本数据进行训练和验证，通过知识蒸馏从教师模型（LLM）传递知识到学生模型（BERT系列）。
light_analysis.result: DistilBERT模型在所有临床类别上取得了F1分数>0.80，其中3个类别F1>0.93。与大型语言模型相比，该模型大小缩小约500倍，GPU VRAM消耗降低约300倍，推理速度快数百倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功展示了利用多语言LLM进行知识蒸馏以标注波兰语医学文本的有效性，训练出的小型分类器在性能上接近LLM，但资源消耗极低。该框架可推广到其他低资源语言或领域，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更高效的标注策略或扩展到更多医学类别。

title: Symmetry Matters: Auditing and Symmetrizing 3D Generative Models
abstract: Symmetry is a strong prior present in many object categories, yet standard benchmarks for 3D generative models rarely report whether this prior is preserved. We study symmetry preservation in unconditional point cloud generation. We first audit the symmetry of generated shapes by several 3D generative models and compute a normalized symmetry score based on the Chamfer Distance (CD). We show that although current 3D generative models achieve competitive results under standard evaluation, they reveal a persistent symmetry gap when a symmetry-aware evaluation protocol is applied. To test whether this gap is merely inherited from the training data, we evaluate these models over a mirrored-objects dataset derived from ShapeNet and analyze symmetry dynamics during training. Mechanistic interpretability techniques were employed at the sampling and latent levels to further show that reflection symmetry is not reliably encoded in the learned generative process. Finally, to address this gap, we propose a data-centric symmetry-aware intervention: training generative models on a half-objects dataset and reconstructing full objects by reflection during sampling. Across multiple backbones, this intervention substantially improves geometric consistency and visual plausibility while remaining competitive under standard metrics. These findings suggest that symmetry-aware evaluation is needed alongside standard benchmarks, and incoming 3D generative models should incorporate this prior explicitly, either during training or sampling.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出对称性审计与对称化干预，揭示并改善3D生成模型中的对称性缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 对称性是许多物体类别中的强先验，但标准3D生成模型基准很少评估这一先验是否被保留。研究发现，尽管现有模型在标准指标上表现良好，但在对称性感知评估中持续存在差距。需要探究这一差距是否源于训练数据，并开发方法强制模型学习对称性。
light_analysis.method: 首先基于Chamfer距离计算归一化对称性分数，审计多种无条件点云生成模型。使用ShapeNet导出的镜像物体数据集评估模型，并在训练过程中分析对称性动态。通过机制可解释性技术（采样和潜在层面）证明反射对称性未被可靠编码。提出数据中心的对称性感知干预：在半物体数据集上训练，采样时通过反射重建完整物体。
light_analysis.result: 现有模型在对称性评估中表现出持续差距。所提干预措施在多个骨干网络下显著提升了几何一致性和视觉合理性，同时在标准指标上保持竞争力。具体数值未明确，但定性结果和对称性分数改善显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论证了对称性感知评估对于3D生成模型的必要性，并建议未来模型应在训练或采样阶段显式融入对称性先验。该工作有助于提升生成形状的真实性，为3D生成领域提供新的评估维度和改进方向。

title: Learning under Distributional Drift: Prequential Reproducibility as an Intrinsic Statistical Resource
abstract: Statistical learning under distributional drift remains poorly characterized, especially in closed-loop settings where learning alters the data-generating law. We introduce an intrinsic drift budget $C_T$ that quantifies cumulative information-geometric motion of the data distribution along the realized learner-environment trajectory, measured in Fisher-Rao distance. The budget separates exogenous environmental change from policy-sensitive feedback induced by the learner's actions. This gives a rate-based characterization of prequential reproducibility: when performance on the realized stream is used to predict one-step-ahead performance under the next distribution, the drift contribution enters through the average motion rate $C_T/T$, not through cumulative drift alone. We prove a drift-feedback bound of order $T^{-1/2}+C_T/T$, up to controlled second-order remainder terms, and establish a matching sharpness lower bound for the same prequential reproducibility gap on a canonical regular subclass. Thus the dependence on the average Fisher-Rao motion rate is tight up to constants: $C_T/T$ is sufficient for upper control and unavoidable on regular hard subclasses. We further prove an information-theoretic indistinguishability result showing that order-$C/T$ effects on the one-step-ahead target need not be identifiable from the realized performance stream alone. Finally, we show that fixed monitoring channels induce contracted observable Fisher motion, and experiments, including a misspecified real-data feedback setting, indicate that appropriately chosen channels can retain risk-relevant drift signal when the intrinsic data-generating law is unavailable. The resulting theory treats exogenous drift, adaptive data analysis, and performative feedback as different sources of Fisher-Rao motion along the same learner-environment trajectory.
comment: Revised: Added additional experiment. Clarified lower bound

light_analysis.overview: 引入内在漂移预算量化Fisher-Rao距离，提出前序可重复性的率特征化，统一外生漂移、自适应数据分析和表现反馈。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布漂移下的统计学习缺乏系统特征，尤其在闭环学习环境中，学习行为会改变数据生成律，导致现有方法难以区分外生环境变化与学习者行为引起的反馈漂移。这一问题重要，因为分布漂移普遍存在于实际应用中（如推荐系统、在线学习），而不加区分地处理会导致可重复性失效和性能预测偏差。当前理论对累积漂移的关注忽视了平均运动率的关键作用，且缺乏统一框架量化不同漂移来源。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出内在漂移预算C_T，用Fisher-Rao距离度量数据分布沿学习者-环境轨迹的累积信息几何运动，将外生漂移与学习者反馈漂移分离。推导前序可重复性的漂移反馈界T^{-1/2}+C_T/T，并建立正则子类上的匹配下界。进一步证明信息论不可区分性，显示order-C/T效应无法从性能流中识别。最后分析固定监测通道导致的收缩可观Fisher运动，并通过实验验证通道选择可保留风险相关漂移信号。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明前序可重复性差距的上界为T^{-1/2}+C_T/T，且该依赖在正则难子类上紧致（匹配下界）。C_T/T足够用于上界控制且不可避免。信息论结果表明order-C/T效应无法从实现的性能流中识别。实验部分（包括错误设定的真实数据反馈）显示，适当选择的监测通道能保留风险相关的漂移信号，即使内在数据生成律不可得。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了分布漂移下统计学习的统一理论框架，将外生漂移、自适应数据分析和表现反馈视为沿同一学习者-环境轨迹的Fisher-Rao运动来源。学术价值在于首次以平均漂移率而非累积量特征化可重复性，并证明了紧致界。实际应用上，为在线学习和自适应系统的性能预测与监测提供了理论指导。潜在局限是理论假设Fisher-Rao度量可计算，未来可扩展至非参数及更复杂环境。

title: YawDD+: Frame-level Annotations for Accurate Yawn Prediction
abstract: Driver fatigue remains a leading cause of road accidents, responsible for 24% of crashes. While yawning serves as an early behavioral indicator of fatigue, existing approaches face significant challenges due to the presence of systematic noise in video-annotated datasets arising from coarse temporal annotations. Training robust machine learning (ML) models requires rich supervisory labels that help learn salient features from the training data. Moreover, efficient on-device training and inference of models on edge devices is crucial in driver fatigue detection tasks to enable accurate real-time decisions on vehicles without reliance on cloud infrastructure. To address this issue, we develop a semi-automated labeling pipeline with human-in-the-loop verification to annotate YawDD videos to YawDD+ frame-level annotations, enabling more accurate model training on edge platforms such as NVIDIA Jetson NANO. Training the established MNasNet classifier and YOLOv11 detector architectures on YawDD+ improves frame accuracy by up to 6% and mAP by 5% over video-level supervision, achieving 99.34% classification accuracy and 95.69% detection mAP on Jetson NANO and AGX. Moreover, MNasNet completed the epoch time in just 8.69 min/epoch while delivering up to 115 frames-per-second (FPS) inference time on AGX, confirming that enhanced data quality alone supports on-device driver fatigue monitoring systems without server-side computation. The YawDD+ dataset and trained models are available online.
comment: This paper is accepted in the 33rd IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出YawDD+帧级标注数据集，通过半自动标注流水线提升打哈欠检测模型在边缘设备上的准确率和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 驾驶员疲劳是导致24%交通事故的主因，打哈欠是早期疲劳指标。现有视频数据集因粗粒度时间标注存在系统噪声，阻碍了鲁棒模型训练。边缘设备上需高效实时推理，但缺乏高质量帧级标注数据，无法充分挖掘模型潜力。
light_analysis.method: 开发半自动标注流水线，结合人工验证将YawDD视频转为YawDD+帧级标注。采用MNasNet分类器和YOLOv11检测器，在NVIDIA Jetson NANO和AGX边缘平台上训练与推理，通过提升数据质量而非模型复杂度来优化性能。
light_analysis.result: 相比视频级监督，帧级标注使分类准确率提升6%（达99.34%）、检测mAP提升5%（达95.69%）。MNasNet在AGX上训练仅需8.69分钟/epoch，推理速度达115 FPS，验证了数据质量提升即可支撑边缘端实时监测。
light_analysis.conclusion: YawDD+数据集和模型已公开，证明了增强标注精度足以替代云端计算，实现高效边缘端疲劳监测。未来可扩展至更多疲劳指标，并探索更轻量模型。

title: SignRoundV2: Toward Closing the Performance Gap in Extremely Low-Bit Post-Training Quantization for LLMs
abstract: Extremely low-bit quantization is critical for efficiently deploying Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it often leads to severe performance degradation at 2 bits and even at 4 bits (e.g., MXFP4). We present SignRoundV2, a post-training quantization framework designed to maintain high performance even under aggressive compression. SignRoundV2 introduces (1) a simple yet efficient adaptive mixed-precision strategy that leverages gradient information and quantization-induced reconstruction errors to guide layer-wise bit allocation, and (2) a set of lightweight stabilization techniques, including loss filtering and a pre-tuning scale search, to improve tuning effectiveness in extremely low-bit regimes. Our approach takes a significant step toward closing the performance gap between quantized and full-precision models. Experimental results across diverse LLMs demonstrate that SignRoundV2 achieves near-lossless performance in mixed MXFP settings, narrowing the gap to $\sim$1\% at an average of 4.5 bits, while substantially improving accuracy in challenging 2-bit weight-only quantization. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/intel/auto-round}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SignRoundV2框架，通过自适应混合精度和轻量级稳定技术，在极低位后训练量化中缩小性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 极低位量化对LLM高效部署至关重要，但2位甚至4位量化（如MXFP4）常导致严重性能下降。现有方法难以在极端压缩下保持模型精度，亟需一种能平衡压缩率与性能的后训练量化方案。
light_analysis.method: SignRoundV2引入(1)自适应混合精度策略，利用梯度信息和量化重构误差指导逐层位分配；(2)轻量级稳定技术，包括损失过滤和预调尺度搜索，以提升极低位调优效果。框架基于后训练量化，无需完整重训。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LLM上，SignRoundV2在混合MXFP设置中平均4.5位时实现近无损性能，性能差距缩小至约1%；在2位权重量化中显著提升准确率，优于现有方法。开源代码已发布。
light_analysis.conclusion: SignRoundV2有效缩小了量化与全精度模型之间的性能差距，为极低位量化部署提供了实用方案。未来可扩展到更多硬件平台和位宽配置，进一步推动LLM高效推理。

title: PhyDetEx: Detecting and Explaining the Physical Plausibility of T2V Models
abstract: Driven by the growing capacity and training scale, Text-to-Video (T2V) generation models have recently achieved substantial progress in video quality, length, and instruction-following capability. However, whether these models can understand physics and generate physically plausible videos remains a question. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have been widely used as general-purpose evaluators in various applications, they struggle to identify the physically impossible content from generated videos. To investigate this issue, we construct a \textbf{PID} (\textbf{P}hysical \textbf{I}mplausibility \textbf{D}etection) dataset, which consists of a \textit{test split} of 500 manually annotated videos and a \textit{train split} of 2,588 paired videos, where each implausible video is generated by carefully rewriting the caption of its corresponding real-world video to induce T2V models producing physically implausible content. With the constructed dataset, we introduce a lightweight fine-tuning approach, enabling VLMs to not only detect physically implausible events but also generate textual explanations on the violated physical principles. Taking the fine-tuned VLM as a physical plausibility detector and explainer, namely \textbf{PhyDetEx}, we benchmark a series of state-of-the-art T2V models to assess their adherence to physical laws. Our findings show that although recent T2V models have made notable progress toward generating physically plausible content, understanding and adhering to physical laws remains a challenging issue, especially for open-source models. Our dataset, training code, and checkpoints are available at \href{https://github.com/Zeqing-Wang/PhyDetEx}{https://github.com/Zeqing-Wang/PhyDetEx}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhyDetEx，一种轻量级微调方法，使视觉语言模型能够检测和解释文本到视频生成模型所生成视频中的物理不合理内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管文本到视频生成模型在视频质量、长度和指令遵循能力上取得显著进步，但它们能否理解物理规律并生成物理合理的视频仍存疑问。现有视觉语言模型作为通用评估器难以识别视频中的物理不可能内容，亟需专门方法检测和解释物理不合理性。
light_analysis.method: 构建物理不合理性检测（PID）数据集，包含500个手动标注的测试视频和2588个配对训练视频。每个不合理视频通过精心改写真实视频的标题来诱导T2V模型产生物理不合理内容。提出轻量级微调方法，使VLM不仅能检测物理不合理事件，还能生成违反物理原理的文本解释，形成PhyDetEx检测与解释器。
light_analysis.result: 利用PhyDetEx对一系列最新T2V模型进行基准测试，评估它们对物理规律的遵循程度。结果表明，尽管近期T2V模型在生成物理合理内容方面取得显著进展，但理解和遵守物理规律仍然是挑战，尤其是开源模型表现较差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文构建了PID数据集，提出了PhyDetEx微调方法，并系统评估了T2V模型的物理合理性。该工作为评估T2V模型的物理世界理解提供了工具，有助于推动生成更符合物理规律的视频。未来可扩展数据集规模，并探索更高效的检测方法。

title: Fine-tuning an ECG Foundation Model to Predict Coronary CT Angiography Outcomes
abstract: CAD remains a major global public health burden, yet scalable screening tools are limited. Although CCTA is a first-line non-invasive diagnostic modality, its use is constrained by resource requirements and radiation exposure. AI-ECG may offer a complementary approach for CAD risk stratification. In this multicenter study, we developed and validated an AI-ECG model using CCTA as the anatomical reference standard to predict vessel-specific coronary stenosis. In internal validation, the model achieved AUC values of 0.683-0.744 across vessels and showed consistent external performance. Discrimination was maintained in clinically normal ECGs and remained broadly stable across subgroups. Model-predicted probabilities increased monotonically with CCTA-defined stenosis severity. Model probabilities were converted into vessel-specific low-, intermediate-, and high-risk strata using predefined sensitivity- and specificity-based thresholds. Calibration analysis showed agreement between predicted and observed risk, while DCA indicated net clinical benefit over treat-all and treat-none strategies. Integrating AI-derived risk strata with guideline-based PTP categories improved rule-out performance, reduced the gray-zone proportion, and achieved positive NRI compared with PTP alone. In a longitudinal follow-up cohort, Kaplan-Meier analysis showed clear separation of major adverse cardiovascular event risk across model-defined risk groups. Waveform- and attribution-based analyses further identified structured ECG morphology differences and physiologically meaningful signal regions associated with high-risk predictions. These findings support AI-ECG as a feasible tool for complementary CAD screening, anatomical risk estimation, and clinical triage, while prospective studies are needed to confirm its clinical impact.

light_analysis.overview: 提出并验证了基于微调ECG基础模型的AI方法，用于预测冠状动脉CT血管造影结果，实现血管特异性狭窄风险分层。
light_analysis.motivation: 冠心病是全球主要健康负担，但可扩展的筛查工具有限。CCTA虽是一线无创诊断方式，但受资源要求和辐射暴露限制。现有AI-ECG模型缺乏以CCTA为解剖参考的血管特异性预测，且未与临床指南结合优化分层。
light_analysis.method: 在多中心研究中，微调ECG基础模型，以CCTA定义的血管特异性冠状动脉狭窄为参考标准。模型输出概率转换为低、中、高风险分层，并与指南性预试验概率结合，通过敏感性/特异性阈值优化。使用波形和归因分析识别ECG形态特征。
light_analysis.result: 内部验证AUC为0.683-0.744，外部验证表现一致。模型概率随狭窄严重程度单调增加，校准良好。结合AI分层与PTP改善了排除性能，净重分类指数为正。纵向随访中，Kaplan-Meier曲线显示MACE风险显著分离。
light_analysis.conclusion: AI-ECG可作为互补的冠心病筛查和解剖风险估计工具，其风险分层与临床指南整合可提升分诊效率。波形分析揭示了生理相关的ECG信号区域。未来需前瞻性研究验证临床影响。

title: Evo-Memory: Benchmarking LLM Agent Test-time Learning with Self-Evolving Memory
abstract: Statefulness is essential for large language model (LLM) agents to perform long-term planning and problem-solving. This makes memory a critical component, yet its management and evolution remain largely underexplored. Existing evaluations mostly focus on static conversational settings, where memory is passively retrieved from dialogue to answer queries, overlooking the dynamic ability to accumulate and reuse experience across evolving task streams. In real-world environments such as interactive problem assistants or embodied agents, LLMs are required to handle continuous task streams, yet often fail to learn from accumulated interactions, losing valuable contextual insights, a limitation that calls for test-time evolution, where LLMs retrieve, integrate, and update memory continuously during deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce Evo-Memory, a comprehensive streaming benchmark and framework for evaluating self-evolving memory in LLM agents. Evo-Memory structures datasets into sequential task streams, requiring LLMs to search, adapt, and evolve memory after each interaction. We unify and implement over ten representative memory modules and evaluate them across 10 diverse multi-turn goal-oriented and single-turn reasoning and QA datasets. To better benchmark experience reuse, we provide a baseline method, ExpRAG, for retrieving and utilizing prior experience, and further propose ReMem, an action-think-memory refine pipeline that tightly integrates reasoning, task actions, and memory updates to achieve continual improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Evo-Memory基准和框架，用于评估LLM代理在连续任务流中的自进化记忆能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估主要关注静态对话设置，记忆仅被动检索，忽视了代理在持续任务流中动态积累和复用经验的能力。真实环境如交互式问题助手或具身代理需要处理连续任务流，但现有方法常无法从交互中学习，丢失上下文信息。这促使研究测试时记忆演化，即代理在部署中连续检索、整合和更新记忆。
light_analysis.method: 构建Evo-Memory流式基准，将数据集组织成连续任务流，要求代理在每次交互后搜索、适应和演化记忆。统一实现了十多种代表性记忆模块，在10个多轮目标导向和单轮推理QA数据集上评估。提供基线方法ExpRAG用于检索和利用先验经验，并提出ReMem——一种动作-思考-记忆精炼管线，紧密整合推理、任务动作和记忆更新以实现持续改进。
light_analysis.result: 在10个多样化数据集上评估了十多种记忆模块，包括多轮目标导向和单轮推理/QA任务。摘要未明确给出具体性能数值，但表明ExpRAG作为经验复用的基线，ReMem方法通过动作-思考-记忆精炼管线实现持续改进。与被动检索基线相比，所提方法在任务流中展示了更好的记忆演化和任务适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Evo-Memory为LLM代理的测试时记忆演化提供了全面评估基准和框架，填补了现有评估忽略动态记忆管理的空白。ExpRAG和ReMem分别作为基线和改进方法，有助于经验复用和持续学习。该工作推动了代理在连续任务流中的自主学习能力，潜在方向包括更复杂的记忆更新策略和在其他领域（如具身代理）的应用。

title: QuickLAP: Quick Language-Action Preference Learning for Semi-Autonomous Agents
abstract: Robots must learn from both what people do and what they say, but either modality alone is often incomplete: physical corrections are grounded but ambiguous in intent, while language expresses high-level goals but lacks physical grounding. We introduce QuickLAP: Quick Language-Action Preference learning, a Bayesian framework that fuses physical and language feedback to infer reward functions in real time. Our key insight is to treat language as a probabilistic observation over the user's latent preferences, clarifying which reward features matter and how physical corrections should be interpreted. QuickLAP uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to extract reward feature attention masks and preference shifts from free-form utterances, which it integrates with physical feedback in a closed-form update rule. This enables fast, real-time, and robust reward learning that handles ambiguous feedback. In a semi-autonomous driving simulator, QuickLAP reduces reward learning error by over 70% compared to physical-only and heuristic multimodal baselines. A 15-participant user study further validates our approach: participants found QuickLAP significantly more understandable and collaborative, and preferred its learned behavior over baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/MIT-CLEAR-Lab/QuickLAP.

light_analysis.overview: QuickLAP是一个贝叶斯框架，通过融合物理和语言反馈实现实时奖励学习，在模拟驾驶中误差降低70%以上。
