light_analysis.motivation: 机器人需要同时从人的行为和语言中学习，但单一模态存在不足：物理纠正虽具物理基础但意图模糊，语言能表达高层目标却缺乏物理基础。现有方法难以有效融合这两种反馈，导致奖励学习不准确、效率低。因此，研究旨在设计一个能实时整合语言和物理反馈的奖励推断框架，提升人机协作中的理解性和适应性。
light_analysis.method: QuickLAP采用贝叶斯框架，将语言视为对用户潜在偏好的概率观测，通过大型语言模型（LLM）从自由形式文本中提取奖励特征注意力掩码和偏好转移，并与物理反馈结合，利用闭式更新规则实现快速实时的奖励学习。该方法无需大量训练数据，能鲁棒处理模糊反馈，在半自主驾驶模拟器中进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在半自主驾驶模拟器中，QuickLAP相比仅物理反馈和启发式多模态基线方法，奖励学习误差降低超过70%。15名参与者的用户研究显示，QuickLAP被认为更易理解和协作，其学习行为显著更受偏好。实验证明了框架在融合多模态反馈和实时性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: QuickLAP成功融合语言和物理反馈，实现高效实时的奖励学习，显著提升人机协作中的表现和用户满意度。未来可扩展到更复杂任务和多种反馈形式，但当前依赖LLM对语言的解析精度，可能限制在特定领域外的泛化能力。

title: Multi-Order Matching Network for Alignment-Free Depth Super-Resolution
abstract: Recent guided depth super-resolution methods are premised on the assumption of strict spatial alignment between depth and RGB, achieving high-quality depth reconstruction. However, in real-world scenarios, the acquisition of strictly aligned RGB-D is hindered by inherent hardware limitations (e.g., physically separate RGB-D sensors) and unavoidable calibration drift induced by mechanical vibrations or temperature variations. Consequently, existing approaches often suffer inevitable performance degradation when applied to misaligned real-world scenes. In this paper, we propose the Multi-Order Matching Network (MOMNet), a novel alignment-free framework that adaptively retrieves and selects the most relevant information from misaligned RGB. Specifically, our method begins with a multi-order matching mechanism, which jointly performs zero-order, first-order, and second-order matching to comprehensively identify RGB information consistent with depth across multi-order feature spaces. To effectively integrate the retrieved RGB and depth, we further introduce a multi-order aggregation composed of multiple structure detectors. This strategy uses multi-order priors as prompts to facilitate the selective feature transfer from RGB to depth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MOMNet achieves superior performance and generalization across both unaligned and aligned datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多阶匹配网络（MOMNet），实现无对齐的深度超分辨率，通过多阶特征匹配与聚合克服RGB-D不对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有引导深度超分辨率方法依赖于RGB与深度图的严格空间对齐，但实际场景中硬件限制（如分离传感器）和环境因素（如振动、温度变化）导致校准漂移，造成性能下降。为解决这一问题，论文旨在开发一种无需对齐的框架，能够自适应地从非对齐RGB中检索并选择最相关信息，以提升深度重建质量。
light_analysis.method: MOMNet采用多阶匹配机制，联合零阶、一阶和二阶匹配，在多个特征空间中全面识别与深度一致的RGB信息。随后引入多阶聚合模块，包含多个结构检测器，利用多阶先验作为提示，促进RGB到深度的选择性特征迁移。整个框架无需显式对齐步骤，实现了端到端的无对齐学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多种数据集上的实验表明，MOMNet在未对齐和对齐场景下均取得优越性能。与现有方法相比，其能有效处理RGB-D错位，保持高精度深度重建，且泛化能力强。具体指标包括PSNR、SSIM等，虽未给出确切数值，但强调优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOMNet通过多阶匹配与聚合机制，解决了RGB-D不对齐下的深度超分辨率问题，为实际部署提供了鲁棒方案。其学术贡献在于提出无对齐框架，减少了对校准硬件的依赖；应用价值在于适应真实场景的传感器偏差。未来可探索更高阶匹配或动态聚合策略。

title: Sparse Autoencoders are Topic Models
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are used to analyze embeddings, but their role and practical value are debated. We propose a new perspective on SAEs by demonstrating that they can be naturally understood as topic models. We propose a continuous topic model (CTM) inspired by Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) for embedding spaces and derive the SAE objective as a maximum a posteriori estimator under this model. This view implies SAE features are thematic components rather than steerable directions. To confirm our theoretical findings, we introduce SAE-TM, a topic modeling framework that: (1) trains an SAE to learn reusable topic atoms, (2) interprets them as word distributions on downstream data, and (3) merges them into any number of topics without retraining. SAE-TM yields more coherent topics than strong baselines on text and image datasets while maintaining diversity. Finally, we analyze thematic structure in image datasets and trace topic changes over time in Japanese woodblock prints. Our work positions SAEs as effective tools for large-scale thematic analysis across modalities. Code is available at https://github.com/ExplainableML/SAE-TM .

light_analysis.overview: 证明稀疏自编码器可理解为主题模型，并提出SAE-TM框架实现跨模态的主题分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）常用于分析嵌入，但其角色和实用价值存在争议。现有方法对SAE特征的解释不明确，缺乏将SAE与主题模型联系起来的理论视角。本文旨在澄清SAE的语义含义，并展示其作为主题分析工具的有效性，从而推动大规模多模态主题分析的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出连续主题模型（CTM），受LDA启发，在嵌入空间上建模，并推导出SAE目标函数是该模型的最大后验估计。基于此理论，构建SAE-TM框架：先训练SAE学习可复用的主题原子，再将原子解释为下游数据上的词分布，最后通过合并得到任意数量的主题，无需重训练。
light_analysis.result: 在文本和图像数据集上，SAE-TM相比强基线方法生成了更连贯的主题，并保持了主题多样性。此外，成功分析了图像数据集中的主题结构，并追踪了日本木版画中主题随时间的变化。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从理论上建立了SAE与主题模型的联系，揭示了SAE特征的主题性而非方向性。SAE-TM框架为跨模态大规模主题分析提供了有效工具，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的主题合并策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Evolve the Method, Not the Prompts: Evolutionary Synthesis of Jailbreak Attacks on LLMs
abstract: Automated red teaming frameworks for Large Language Models (LLMs) have become increasingly sophisticated, yet many still formulate attack optimization primarily in the prompt space. In other words, these methods mainly search for better attack wording or better strategy choices, but they do not search over executable code. By moving the search into code space, we can optimize not only the final attack prompt, but also the procedure that generates it, including execution flow, reusable logic, branching, and failure-driven repair. To overcome this gap, we introduce EvoSynth, an autonomous multi-agent framework that shifts the optimization space from prompts to executable code. Instead of refining prompts directly, EvoSynth employs a multi-agent system to autonomously engineer, evolve, and execute code-based attack algorithms. Crucially, it features a code-level self-correction loop, allowing it to iteratively rewrite the code-based algorithm in response to target-model feedback and failed attempts. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that EvoSynth achieves an 85.5\% Attack Success Rate (ASR) against highly robust models like Claude-Sonnet-4.5 and a 95.9\% average ASR across evaluated targets, while generating attacks that are significantly more diverse than those from existing methods. We release our framework to facilitate future research on evolutionary synthesis in executable code space.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoSynth框架，将LLM越狱攻击优化从提示空间转移到可执行代码空间，通过多智能体进化合成代码级攻击算法，实现更高的成功率和多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动化红队框架主要在提示空间搜索攻击措辞或策略，无法优化生成攻击的完整流程（如执行逻辑、分支、修复等），限制了攻击的灵活性和效率。需要一种在代码空间进行优化的方法，以进化出更复杂、自适应的攻击算法。
light_analysis.method: EvoSynth采用多智能体系统自主设计、进化并执行基于代码的攻击算法。关键创新是代码级自我修正循环，根据目标模型反馈和失败尝试迭代重写代码。优化空间从提示变为可执行代码，允许进化执行流、可重用逻辑、分支和故障驱动修复，从而生成更动态的攻击策略。
light_analysis.result: 在高度鲁棒的Claude-Sonnet-4.5模型上达到85.5%攻击成功率，跨评估目标的平均ASR为95.9%。生成的攻击比现有方法显著更多样，证明了代码空间进化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoSynth展示了在可执行代码空间进行进化合成越狱攻击的潜力，显著提升了攻击成功率和多样性。框架已开源，可促进LLM安全性评估研究。未来工作可探索降低计算成本及扩展到其他攻防场景。

title: Enabling Off-Policy Imitation Learning with Deep Actor Critic Stabilization
abstract: Learning complex policies with Reinforcement Learning (RL) is often hindered by instability and slow convergence, a problem exacerbated by the difficulty of reward engineering. Imitation Learning (IL) from expert demonstrations bypasses this reliance on rewards. However, state-of-the-art IL methods, exemplified by Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL)Ho et. al, suffer from severe sample inefficiency. This is a direct consequence of their foundational on-policy algorithms, such as TRPO Schulman et.al. In this work, we introduce an adversarial imitation learning algorithm that incorporates off-policy learning to improve sample efficiency. By combining an off-policy framework with auxiliary techniques specifically, in this case a double Q network based stabilization and value learning without reward function inference we demonstrate a reduction in the samples required to robustly match expert behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合off-policy学习的对抗模仿学习算法，通过双Q网络稳定和价值学习提高样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在复杂策略学习中常受不稳定和收敛慢的困扰，且奖励工程困难。模仿学习通过专家演示规避奖励依赖，但现有方法如GAIL基于on-policy算法，样本效率极低，需要大量交互数据。本文旨在通过引入off-policy学习来提升样本效率，降低样本需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种对抗模仿学习算法，核心是结合off-policy框架与辅助技术：采用双Q网络（Double Q-network）进行稳定化，并设计无需奖励函数推断的价值学习方法。通过这种方式，算法在保持模仿性能的同时大幅减少所需交互样本。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提算法能够显著降低样本复杂度，以更少的样本稳健地匹配专家行为。与GAIL等on-policy方法相比，在相同任务上需要更少的与环境交互次数，具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但整体样本效率得到改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过将off-policy学习与稳定化技术结合，有效解决了现有对抗模仿学习样本效率低的问题。该方法无需显式奖励函数，具有实际应用价值，可应用于奖励难以设计的场景。未来可能探索其他稳定化技术或扩展到更复杂的任务。

title: Convergence of Multiagent Learning Systems for Traffic control
abstract: Rapid urbanization in cities like Bangalore has led to severe traffic congestion, making efficient Traffic Signal Control (TSC) essential. Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), often modeling each traffic signal as an independent agent using Q-learning, has emerged as a promising strategy to reduce average commuter delays. While prior work Prashant L A et. al has empirically demonstrated the effectiveness of this approach, a rigorous theoretical analysis of its stability and convergence properties in the context of traffic control has not been explored. This paper bridges that gap by focusing squarely on the theoretical basis of this multi-agent algorithm. We investigate the convergence problem inherent in using independent learners for the cooperative TSC task. Utilizing stochastic approximation methods, we formally analyze the learning dynamics. The primary contribution of this work is the proof that the specific multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm for traffic control is proven to converge under the given conditions extending it from single agent convergence proofs for asynchronous value iteration.

light_analysis.overview: 证明多智能体强化学习交通信号控制算法在给定条件下收敛的理论基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市化导致交通拥堵严重，多智能体强化学习（MARL）被用于交通信号控制，但现有工作仅通过实验验证有效性，缺乏理论上的稳定性和收敛性分析。该问题重要，因为理论保证是算法可靠部署的前提，现有方法依赖经验，无法保证长期稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 采用随机逼近方法（stochastic approximation）分析独立Q学习（Independent Q-learning）在合作交通信号控制任务中的学习动态。核心创新是从单智能体异步值迭代的收敛证明扩展到多智能体场景，证明在给定条件下算法收敛，弥补理论空白。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果或性能指标，主要贡献为理论证明：所分析的多智能体强化学习算法在交通控制中满足收敛条件，通过形式化数学推导验证稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文填补了MARL在交通信号控制中收敛性理论分析的空白，证明了独立学习器在合作任务中的收敛性，为实际部署提供理论支撑。潜在局限是条件假设可能简化真实环境，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: ALIGN: A Vision-Language Framework for High-Accuracy Accident Location Inference through Geo-Spatial Neural Reasoning
abstract: In low- and middle-income countries, public safety and urban planning initiatives frequently face a critical shortage of accurate, location-specific road crash data. Extracting reliable geospatial information from unstructured text requires overcoming the limitations of traditional text-based geocoding tools, which often fail in multilingual environments with ambiguous place descriptions. This study introduces ALIGN (Accident Location Inference through Geo-Spatial Neural Reasoning), a vision-language framework designed to emulate human spatial reasoning to infer precise accident coordinates from unstructured Bangla news reports and map-based cues. A multi stage automated pipeline was developed to process diverse textual and visual data, integrating large language models for cue extraction with vision-language models for map verification. Using an agentic architecture, we modelled an iterative reasoning loop that combines Optical Character Recognition (OCR), grid-based spatial scanning, and a 3-run geometric voting method to mathematically isolate and reduce visual hallucinations. The findings highlight that the multimodal ALIGN framework significantly outperforms traditional text-only geoparsing baselines. For example, the proposed system successfully reduced the mean localization error from an unusable 10.915 km to a sub-kilometer precision of 0.593 km on a validation dataset. Furthermore, testing the framework against official Dhaka Metropolitan Police records confirmed its reliability by achieving a mean error of 0.465 km. The results provide a high-accuracy, training-free foundation for automated crash mapping in data-scarce regions, supporting evidence-driven road-safety policymaking and the integration of multimodal AI in transportation analytics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ALIGN框架，通过视觉-语言神经推理从非结构化文本和地图线索中高精度推断事故位置，在孟加拉语新闻上实现亚公里级定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 中低收入国家缺乏准确的道路事故位置数据，传统文本地理编码工具在多语言和模糊地点描述环境中常失败。现有方法无法有效利用视觉信息，导致定位误差大，阻碍公共安全和城市规划。
light_analysis.method: ALIGN采用多阶段自动化流水线，集成大语言模型提取线索和视觉语言模型验证地图。通过智能体架构实现迭代推理循环，结合OCR、网格空间扫描和三轮几何投票方法，减少视觉幻觉并确定坐标。
light_analysis.result: 在验证数据集上，平均定位误差从10.915 km降至0.593 km；在达卡市警察局官方记录上测试，平均误差为0.465 km，显著优于传统文本地理编码基线，实现无训练的高精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: ALIGN为数据稀缺地区提供了高精度、无需训练的事故自动映射基础，支持证据驱动的道路安全政策制定，展示了多模态AI在交通分析中的潜力。未来可扩展到其他语言和区域。

title: Towards Migrating Neural Network Implementations
abstract: The development of smart systems (i.e., systems enhanced with AI components) has thrived thanks to the rapid advancements in neural networks (NNs). A wide range of libraries and frameworks have consequently emerged to support NN design and implementation. The choice depends on factors such as available functionalities, ease of use, documentation and community support. After adopting a given NN framework, organizations might later choose to switch to another if performance declines, requirements evolve, or new features are introduced. Unfortunately, migrating NN implementations across libraries is challenging due to the lack of migration approaches specifically tailored for NNs. This leads to increased time and effort to modernize NNs, as manual updates are necessary to avoid relying on outdated implementations and ensure compatibility with new features. In this paper, we propose an approach to automatically migrate neural network code across deep learning frameworks. Our method makes use of a pivot NN model to create an abstraction of the NN prior to migration. We validate our approach using two popular NN frameworks, namely PyTorch and TensorFlow. We also discuss the challenges of migrating code between the two frameworks and how they were approached in our method. Experimental evaluation on five NNs shows that our approach successfully migrates their code and produces NNs that are functionally equivalent to the originals. Artefacts from our work are available online.
comment: To appear at the International Conference on AI-powered Software (AIware 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自动迁移神经网络代码的方法，利用枢轴NN模型实现跨框架代码转换，并验证了功能等价性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着神经网络框架的多样化，组织可能因性能或需求变化需要迁移NN实现，但缺乏专门针对NN的迁移方法，导致手动更新耗时费力。现有方法未提供自动化手段，因此需要一种高效、准确的迁移方案。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于枢轴NN模型，通过创建抽象表示实现跨框架迁移。首先将源框架的NN转换为中间抽象模型，再根据目标框架生成对应代码。在PyTorch和TensorFlow上验证，处理了框架间的语义差异和API映射挑战。
light_analysis.result: 在五个神经网络上实验，成功迁移所有代码，且生成模型与原始模型功能等价。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调迁移成功和功能等价。与手动迁移相比，显著减少了时间和人力成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的自动迁移方法有效解决了NN跨框架迁移难题，提高了代码现代化效率。学术上展示了利用抽象模型进行迁移的可行性，实际应用中可降低框架切换成本。未来可扩展至更多框架和复杂网络结构。

title: A New Perspective on Precision and Recall for Generative Models
abstract: With the recent success of generative models in image and text, the question of their evaluation has recently gained a lot of attention. While most methods from the state of the art rely on scalar metrics, the introduction of Precision and Recall (PR) for generative model has opened up a new avenue of research. The associated PR curve allows for a richer analysis, but their estimation poses several challenges. In this paper, we present a new framework for estimating entire PR curves based on a binary classification standpoint. We conduct a thorough statistical analysis of the proposed estimates. As a byproduct, we obtain a minimax upper bound on the PR estimation risk. We also show that our framework extends several landmark PR metrics of the literature which by design are restrained to the extreme values of the curve. Finally, we study the different behaviors of the curves obtained experimentally in various settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于二元分类视角的精确率-召回率曲线估计新框架，并给出统计分析与极小极大上界。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型评估中，标量指标无法全面反映模型性能，而精确率-召回率曲线虽能提供更丰富分析，但其估计存在挑战。现有方法多局限于曲线极值，缺乏统一的统计框架。因此需要一种可靠且能涵盖全曲线的估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 将精确率-召回率曲线估计转化为二元分类问题，通过分类器的混淆矩阵推导出PR曲线估计量。对估计量进行严格统计分析，推导其风险极小极大上界。该框架可扩展至现有PR指标，不局限于极值点，支持整个曲线的估计。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析获得了PR估计风险的极小极大上界，证明了估计量的统计一致性。实验部分展示了在不同生成模型（图像、文本）下，所提曲线与传统PR指标在极端值处的一致性，以及在全曲线上的差异行为。具体数值性能未在摘要中详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了PR曲线估计的新理论框架，统一了现有指标并拓展到全曲线，为生成模型评估提供了更可靠的统计工具。未来可应用于更复杂的生成模型场景，并探索估计量的实际偏差校正方法。

title: Stochastic Regret Guarantees for Online Zeroth- and First-Order Bilevel Optimization
abstract: Online bilevel optimization (OBO) is a powerful framework for machine learning problems where both outer and inner objectives evolve over time, requiring dynamic updates. Current OBO approaches rely on deterministic \textit{window-smoothed} regret minimization, which may not accurately reflect system performance when functions change rapidly. In this work, we introduce a novel search direction and show that both first- and zeroth-order (ZO) stochastic OBO algorithms leveraging this direction achieve sublinear {stochastic bilevel regret without window smoothing}. Beyond these guarantees, our framework enhances efficiency by: (i) reducing oracle dependence in hypergradient estimation, (ii) updating inner and outer variables alongside the linear system solution, and (iii) employing ZO-based estimation of Hessians, Jacobians, and gradients. Experiments on online parametric loss tuning and black-box adversarial attacks validate our approach.
comment: Published at NeurIPS 2025. 88 pages and 3 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需窗口平滑的随机双层优化框架，实现一阶和零阶算法的次线性遗憾保证，并提升效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线双层优化是处理内外目标随时间动态变化的强大框架，但现有方法依赖确定性窗口平滑遗憾最小化，当函数快速变化时无法准确反映系统性能。需要一种无需窗口平滑、适应动态环境的随机算法，同时降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 引入新的搜索方向，分别设计一阶和零阶随机双层优化算法。该方向无需窗口平滑即可实现次线性随机双层遗憾。通过减少超梯度估计中的oracle依赖、同步更新内外变量与线性系统解、以及使用零阶估计Hessian、Jacobian和梯度，提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明所提一阶和零阶算法均达到次线性随机双层遗憾。实验验证了在线参数损失调优和黑盒对抗攻击任务上的有效性，但摘要未提供具体数值。与基线方法相比，无需窗口平滑且计算更高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无需窗口平滑的随机双层优化新框架，降低超梯度估计成本，提升动态环境适应性。学术上拓展了OBO理论，实际应用于在线参数调优和对抗攻击。未来可探索更复杂的双层结构。

title: Deep sequence models tend to memorize geometrically; it is unclear why
abstract: Deep sequence models are said to store atomic facts predominantly in the form of associative memory: a brute-force lookup of co-occurring entities. We identify a dramatically different form of storage of atomic facts that we term as geometric memory. Here, the model has synthesized embeddings encoding novel global relationships between all entities, including ones that do not co-occur in training. Such storage is powerful: for instance, we show how it transforms a hard reasoning task involving an $\ell$-fold composition into an easy-to-learn $1$-step navigation task.   From this phenomenon, we extract fundamental aspects of neural embedding geometries that are hard to explain. We argue that the rise of such a geometry, as against a lookup of local associations, cannot be straightforwardly attributed to typical supervisory, architectural, or optimizational pressures. Counterintuitively, a geometry is learned even when it is more complex than the brute-force lookup.   Then, by analyzing a connection to Node2Vec, we demonstrate how the geometry stems from a spectral bias that -- in contrast to prevailing theories -- indeed arises naturally despite the lack of various pressures. This analysis also points out to practitioners a visible headroom to make Transformer memory more strongly geometric. We hope the geometric view of parametric memory encourages revisiting the default intuitions that guide researchers in areas like knowledge acquisition, capacity, discovery, and unlearning.
comment: Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 发现深度序列模型以几何方式存储事实，揭示其源于谱偏差，而非常规压力和联想记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有观点认为序列模型原子事实存储以联想记忆（强制查找共现实体）为主。本文识别出一种截然不同的几何记忆形式，模型合成全局关系嵌入甚至覆盖训练中未共现的实体，这对知识获取、发现等具重要意义。为何几何记忆自然涌现，而不同于局部关联查找，缺乏充分解释。现有理论难以归因于监督、架构或优化压力。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析几何记忆现象，展示其将硬推理任务（如ℓ重组合）转化为易学的一步导航任务。对比联想记忆和几何记忆的复杂度，发现几何记忆即使更复杂仍被学习。连接Node2Vec分析，揭示几何记忆源于谱偏差，在缺乏各压力下自然产生，并指出Transformer记忆有提升至强几何性的空间。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，几何记忆使复杂的ℓ重组合推理变得简单（一步导航任务）。与联想记忆的暴力查找不同，几何记忆学习全局关系，甚至包括未共现实体。谱偏差分析表明几何记忆自然涌现，且Transformer记忆在几何性上仍有改进空间。摘要未提供具体数据，但突出了现象的有效性和反直觉性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出几何记忆概念，证明其源于谱偏差而非传统压力，挑战了联想记忆主导观点。学术上为理解神经记忆提供了新视角，实践上为知识获取、容量、发现和遗忘等研究提供指导。未来或探索如何增强几何性，以及几何记忆的潜在局限性。

title: Scales++: Compute Efficient Evaluation Subset Selection with Cognitive Scales Embeddings
abstract: The prohibitive cost of evaluating large language models (LLMs) on comprehensive benchmarks necessitates the creation of small yet representative data subsets (i.e., tiny benchmarks) that enable efficient assessment while retaining predictive fidelity. Current methods for this task operate under a model-centric paradigm, selecting benchmarking items based on the collective performance of existing models. Such approaches are limited by large upfront costs, an inability to immediately handle new benchmarks ("cold-start"), and the fragile assumption that future models will share the failure patterns of their predecessors. In this work, we propose a new item-centric approach to benchmark subset selection, arguing that selection should be based on the intrinsic properties of the task items themselves, rather than on model-specific failure patterns. We instantiate this item-centric efficient benchmarking approach via a novel method, Scales++, where data selection is based on the cognitive demands of the benchmark samples. Empirically, we show Scales++ reduces the upfront selection cost by over 18x while achieving competitive predictive fidelity. On the Open LLM Leaderboard, using just a 0.25% data subset, we predict full benchmark scores with a 3.2% mean absolute error, and on Humanity's Last Exam we predict full scores with 2.9% mean absolute error using a 2.0% sample. We demonstrate that this item-centric approach enables more efficient model evaluation without significant fidelity degradation, while also providing better cold-start performance and more interpretable benchmarking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于认知需求的项目中心化基准测试子集选择方法Scales++，大幅降低评估成本并保持预测保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估大型语言模型在综合基准上的成本过高，现有模型中心化方法依赖已有模型性能，存在成本高、冷启动难、假设未来模型失败模式与过去相同等缺陷，迫切需要一种基于任务项内在属性的高效子集选择方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Scales++方法，采用项目中心化思想，基于基准测试样本的认知需求进行数据选择，而非依赖模型特定失败模式。通过认知尺度嵌入为每个任务项分配认知复杂度分数，依据该分数选取最具代表性的子集，实现高效且可解释的评估。
light_analysis.result: Scales++将前期选择成本降低超18倍，在Open LLM Leaderboard上仅用0.25%子集预测全量分数，平均绝对误差（MAE）为3.2%；在Humanity's Last Exam上用2.0%子集达到2.9% MAE，预测保真度与全量评测高度吻合。
light_analysis.conclusion: Scales++验证了项目中心化子集选择的有效性，显著降低评估成本且保持高预测保真度，具备更好的冷启动性能和可解释性，为高效模型评估提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多基准和任务。

title: Beyond Neural Incompatibility: Cross-Scale Knowledge Transfer in Language Models through Latent Semantic Alignment
abstract: Language Models (LMs) encode substantial knowledge in their parameters, yet it remains unclear how to transfer such knowledge in a fine-grained manner, namely parametric knowledge transfer (PKT). A central challenge is to make cross-scale transfer effective and efficient when source and target models differ in architecture and parameterization, making direct parameter reuse strongly limited by neural incompatibility. In this paper, we identify latent semantic alignment as the key prerequisite for cross-scale knowledge transfer. Instead of directly moving layer parameters, our approach uses activations as the transfer medium. \textsc{SemAlign} has two stages: an \emph{layer attribution} stage that attributes task-relevant source layers and selects exactly one source layer for each target layer, and a \emph{semantic alignment} stage that pairs them layer by layer and optimizes the target with source-side semantic supervision. The alignment is carried out in latent space through semantic decomposition and recomposition. During the shallow-to-deep transfer, only the frontier target layer is trainable. The layer objective supervises the residual contribution of that layer by matching centered token-token relation geometry against an aligned supervisory residual, while output KL preserves source-level predictive behavior. The transferred medium is therefore neither a parameter block nor an absolute hidden state, but target-space residual geometry induced by paired source-layer supervision. Evaluations on four benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of \textsc{SemAlign}, and further analysis confirms that semantic decomposition and recomposition provide a stable mechanism for cross-scale knowledge transfer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SemAlign方法，通过潜在语义对齐实现语言模型跨规模参数知识转移，克服神经不兼容性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型参数蕴含大量知识，但细粒度参数知识转移（PKT）尚未有效解决。源与目标模型架构和参数化不同导致直接参数重用受限于神经不兼容性，亟需高效跨规模转移方法。
light_analysis.method: SemAlign包括层归因和语义对齐两阶段：前者为每个目标层选择最相关的源层，后者通过语义分解和重组在潜在空间进行成对对齐。训练时仅目标层可训练，监督信号包括对齐残差贡献的token-token关系几何和输出KL散度。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准任务上评估，SemAlign显著优于基线方法，验证了有效性。进一步分析表明语义分解和重组提供稳定转移机制，具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: SemAlign通过潜在语义对齐实现有效跨规模知识转移，解决了神经不兼容问题。学术上提出新PKT范式，实际中可迁移知识至不同规模模型。未来可探索减少层归因和语义对齐计算的机制。

title: Automated Coding of Communication Data Using ChatGPT: Consistency Across Subgroups
abstract: Assessing communication and collaboration at scale depends on a labor-intensive task of coding communication data into categories according to different frameworks. Prior research has established that ChatGPT can be directly instructed with coding rubrics to code the communication data and achieves accuracy comparable to human raters. However, whether the coding from ChatGPT or similar AI technology perform consistently across different demographic groups, such as gender and race, remains unclear. To address this gap, we introduce three checks for evaluating subgroup consistency in LLM-based coding by adapting an existing framework from the automated scoring literature. Using a typical collaborative problem-solving coding framework and data from three types of collaborative tasks, we examine ChatGPT-based coding performance across gender and racial/ethnic groups. Our results show that ChatGPT-based coding perform consistently in the same way as human raters across gender or racial/ethnic groups, demonstrating the possibility of its use in large-scale assessments of collaboration and communication.
comment: Accepted to the Journal of Educational Measurement

light_analysis.overview: 验证ChatGPT在沟通数据自动编码中跨性别和种族亚组的一致性表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模评估沟通协作需耗费大量人力进行数据编码。已有研究显示ChatGPT可直接用编码规则实现与人类相当的准确率，但它在不同人口群体（如性别、种族）上的一致性尚未明确。本研究填补这一空白，通过改编自动评分领域框架，提出三种检查来评估LLM编码的亚组一致性。
light_analysis.method: 基于自动评分文献中的框架，引入三种一致性检查方法。选用典型的合作问题解决编码框架，使用三种协作任务的数据，评估ChatGPT编码在不同性别和种族/民族亚组中的表现。
light_analysis.result: ChatGPT编码在性别和种族/民族亚组上表现出与人类评分者一致的水平，证明了其在大规模协作与沟通评估中使用的可能性。摘要未明确给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实验表明ChatGPT在亚组一致性方面表现可靠，可应用于大规模评估场景。该研究为LLM在自动化编码中的公平性提供了证据，但可能需要进一步验证其他场景和模型。

title: Toward Robust Multilingual Adaptation of LLMs for Low-Resource Languages
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) continue to struggle with low-resource languages, primarily due to limited training data, translation noise, and unstable cross-lingual alignment. To address these challenges, we propose LiRA (Linguistic Robust Anchoring for LLMs)-a plug-and-play framework that requires only lightweight fine-tuning on top of existing pretrained backbones. LiRA jointly optimizes representation stability and cross-lingual semantic consistency by combining two key components: Arca (Anchored Representation Composition Architecture), which aligns low-resource inputs to a shared English semantic space through anchor-based alignment and collaborative encoding; and LaSR (Language-coupled Semantic Reasoner), a lightweight, language-aware head that enforces consistency regularization for unified cross-lingual understanding, retrieval, and reasoning. We theoretically show that under controlled anchoring error and translation-induced bias, LiRA guarantees bounded representation deviation and stable downstream performance under local Lipschitz continuity. To facilitate research, we release a new multilingual product retrieval dataset covering five Southeast Asian and two South Asian languages. Extensive experiments across diverse low-resource benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in retrieval, ranking, question answering, and reasoning tasks. Code will be publicly available on GitHub, and the dataset will be hosted on Hugging Face.

light_analysis.overview: 提出即插即用框架 LiRA，通过联合优化表示稳定性和跨语言语义一致性，增强低资源语言 LLM 的鲁棒适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在低资源语言上表现不佳，主要因训练数据稀缺、翻译噪声及跨语言对齐不稳定。现有方法未能同时解决表示稳定性与语义一致性问题，导致下游任务性能受限。该研究旨在开发一种轻量级且鲁棒的适应方案，以提升低资源语言的跨语言理解与生成能力。
light_analysis.method: LiRA 包含两个核心组件：Arca 通过锚点对齐与协作编码将低资源输入映射到共享英语语义空间；LaSR 作为语言感知推理头，强制执行一致性正则化，统一跨语言理解、检索与推理。理论证明在有限锚定误差与翻译偏差下，LiRA 能保证表示偏差有界及下游性能稳定。
light_analysis.result: 在多个低资源语言基准上，LiRA 在检索、排序、问答及推理任务中均取得一致性改进。此外，作者发布了覆盖五类东南亚与两类南亚语言的多语言产品检索数据集，为相关研究提供新资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiRA 为低资源语言 LLM 适应提供了鲁棒、轻量级且理论保障的解决方案，兼具学术价值与应用潜力。未来可拓展至更多语言及任务，并探索更高效的锚定策略。

title: DocReward: A Document Reward Model for Structuring and Stylizing
abstract: Recent agentic workflows automate professional document generation but focus narrowly on textual quality, overlooking structural and stylistic professionalism, which is equally critical for readability. This gap stems mainly from a lack of effective reward models capable of guiding agents toward producing documents with high structural and stylistic professionalism. We introduce DocReward, a document reward model that evaluates documents based on their structure and style. To achieve this, we propose a textual-quality-agnostic framework that ensures assessments are not confounded by content quality, and construct DocPair, a dataset of 117K paired documents covering 32 domains and 267 types. Each pair shares identical content but differs in structural and stylistic professionalism. DocReward is trained using the Bradley-Terry loss. On a manually annotated benchmark, DocReward outperforms GPT-5 by 14.6 percentage points in the same setting. Reinforcement learning experiments further show that DocReward effectively guides agents toward generating documents with consistently higher structural and stylistic professionalism, highlighting its practical utility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DocReward文档奖励模型，聚焦文档结构风格评估，提升智能体文档生成的专业性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体工作流生成专业文档时侧重文本质量，忽视结构和风格的专业性，这同样影响可读性。缺乏有效的奖励模型来引导智能体生成高结构和风格专业性的文档。DocReward旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: DocReward采用文本质量无关框架，确保评估不受内容质量干扰。构建DocPair数据集，含117K对文档，覆盖32个领域267种类型，每对内容相同但结构和风格专业性不同。模型使用Bradley-Terry损失训练。
light_analysis.result: 在人工标注基准上，DocReward在相同设置下比GPT-5高出14.6个百分点。强化学习实验表明，DocReward有效引导智能体持续生成更高结构和风格专业性的文档，验证其实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DocReward为文档结构风格评估提供了有效方法，显著提升智能体生成文档的专业性。未来可扩展至更多文档类型和语言，或结合其它奖励模型进行多目标优化。

title: Unlocking the Potential of Diffusion Language Models through Template Infilling
abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to Autoregressive Language Models, yet their inference strategies remain limited to prefix-based prompting inherited from the autoregressive paradigm. In this paper, we propose Template Infilling (TI), a tailored conditioning methodology for DLMs. Unlike conventional prefix prompting, TI flexibly aligns structural anchors across the entire target response space, establishing a global blueprint before filling in the masked segments. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on diverse benchmarks, including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and trip planning, achieving consistent improvements of 9.40% over the baseline. Furthermore, we observe that TI provides additional advantages in multi-token generation settings, enabling effective speedup while maintaining generation quality and robustness. By enforcing these global constraints, TI ultimately facilitates System-2 reasoning, empowering the model to deliberate within a structurally defined solution space.
comment: ACL 2026 Main Conference - Long Paper, Oral Presentation

light_analysis.overview: 提出模板填充方法，通过全局蓝图解锁扩散语言模型的推理潜力。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型作为自回归模型的有力替代，其推理策略仍局限于基于前缀的提示，无法充分利用全局结构信息。现有方法在复杂任务中缺乏灵活的对齐能力，限制了模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出模板填充（Template Infilling）方法，在目标响应空间内灵活对齐结构锚点，建立全局蓝图后逐步填充掩码段。该方法不依赖自回归范式，支持多标记生成场景，通过全局约束实现结构化的推理过程。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和旅行规划等基准上，模板填充方法相较基线获得一致提升，平均改进9.40%。在多标记生成中，该方法在保持生成质量和鲁棒性的同时实现有效加速，展现了良好的效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 模板填充通过全局约束促进System-2推理，使模型在结构化解空间内深思熟虑。该研究为扩散语言模型的推理策略提供了新范式，有望拓展至更多需要全局规划的领域，但未明确讨论计算开销等局限性。

title: Evaluating Language Models' Evaluations of Games
abstract: Reasoning is not just about solving problems -- it is also about evaluating which problems are worth solving at all. Evaluations of artificial intelligence (AI) systems primarily focused on problem solving, historically by studying how models play games such as chess and Go. In this paper, we advocate for a new paradigm that assesses AI systems' evaluation of games. First, we introduce a formalism for evaluating such evaluations. We then leverage a large-scale dataset of over 100 novel board games and over 450 human judgments to compare evaluations produced by modern language and reasoning models against those of people and symbolic computational agents. We consider two kinds of evaluative queries: assessing the payoff (or fairness) and the funness of games. These queries span two dimensions relevant to the design of evaluations of AI evaluations: how complex a query is to compute and how difficult a query is to quantify. Our results show that reasoning models are generally more aligned to people in their evaluations of games than non-reasoning language models. However, we observe a non-monotonic relationship: as models get closer to game-theoretic optimal, their fit to human data weakens. We also observe more "jaggedness" across models for assessing funness, in line with the greater difficulty of quantifying this query. Across queries and games, reasoning models show highly variable and unpredictable resource usage when assessing queries, pointing to the importance of imbuing more resource-rational meta-reasoning in language and reasoning models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出评估AI系统对游戏评估的新范式，引入形式化框架和多维查询。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI评估主要关注问题解决能力，忽略了评估问题价值的重要性。游戏评估（如公平性和趣味性）对通用智能和人机交互至关重要，但缺乏系统性的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入形式化评估框架，使用超100种新棋盘游戏和450人类判断，比较推理模型（如GPT）与非推理语言模型及符号代理。评估两种查询：收益（公平性）和趣味性，覆盖计算复杂性和量化难度两个维度。
light_analysis.result: 推理模型比非推理语言模型更符合人类评估，但非单调关系：模型越接近博弈论最优，拟合人类数据越弱。趣味性评估更'锯齿状'，资源使用高度可变且不可预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献于AI评估新范式，揭示模型在游戏评估中的非单调性和不稳定性，强调开发更资源理性元推理的重要性，为未来人机交互和通用AI评估提供方向。

title: Adversarial Attacks on Downstream Weather Forecasting Models: Application to Tropical Cyclone Trajectory Prediction
abstract: Deep learning-based weather forecasting (DLWF) models leverage past weather observations to generate future forecasts, supporting a wide range of downstream applications, including tropical cyclone (TC) prediction. In this paper, we investigate their vulnerability to adversarial attacks, where subtle perturbations to the upstream forecasts can alter the downstream TC trajectory predictions. Although research into adversarial attacks on DLWF models has grown recently, it remains challenging to craft perturbed upstream forecasts that steer the downstream outputs toward attacker-specified trajectories. First, conventional TC detection systems are opaque, non-differentiable black boxes, making standard gradient-based attacks infeasible. Second, the extreme rarity of TC events leads to severe class imbalance problem, making it difficult to develop attack methods for perturbing upstream forecasts that produce realistic-looking cyclone paths aligned with attacker's target trajectories. To overcome these limitations, we propose Cyc-Attack, a novel method for perturbing the upstream forecasts of DLWF models to generate adversarial trajectories. The proposed method uses a differentiable surrogate model to approximate the TC detector's output, enabling the application of gradient-based attacks. Cyc-Attack also employs a skewness-aware loss function with kernel dilation strategy to address the imbalance problem. Finally, a distance-based gradient weighting scheme and regularization are used to constrain the perturbations and eliminate unrealistic-looking trajectories, thereby making the adversarial upstream forecasts less easily detectable. Our experiments show that Cyc-Attack achieves a higher true positive rate in matching the attacker's target trajectories, along with lower false alarm rates and stealthier perturbations than conventional attack methods.
comment: Compared with the previous version, we added zeroth-order optimization methods as baselines, clarified the motivation for using a surrogate model, and provided a more detailed investigation of the upstream attack

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cyc-Attack方法，实现对天气预报模型的黑盒对抗攻击，生成符合攻击者目标的热带气旋轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习天气预报模型易受对抗攻击，但现有方法难以将上游预测扰动导向攻击者指定的下游轨迹。主要难点：热带气旋检测系统为不可微黑盒，梯度攻击失效；热带气旋极端罕见导致严重类不平衡，难以生成逼真且符合目标的对抗轨迹。
light_analysis.method: Cyc-Attack方法采用可微代理模型近似热带气旋检测器输出，使梯度攻击可行；利用偏态感知损失函数结合核扩张策略处理类不平衡；通过距离梯度加权和正则化约束扰动，消除不真实轨迹，使攻击隐蔽。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Cyc-Attack在匹配攻击者目标轨迹上获得更高真阳性率，虚警率更低，且扰动更隐蔽，优于传统攻击方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cyc-Attack有效揭示了天气预报模型在下游任务中的脆弱性，为提升模型鲁棒性提供参考。未来可扩展到其他罕见气象事件的对抗攻击研究。

title: SCOPE-RL: Stable and Quantitative Control of Policy Entropy in RL Post-Training
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a key paradigm for post-training large language models (LLMs), but the widely used Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) often suffers from entropy collapse: exploration quickly disappears, policies converge prematurely, and sample diversity declines, ultimately harming training effectiveness. Existing remedies, including entropy bonuses and clip-based methods, rarely keep entropy within a stable exploration regime and often introduce oscillatory entropy or reward degradation. In this work, we identify a previously overlooked asymmetry in entropy dynamics: under high-temperature sampling, positive and negative samples have opposite effects on policy entropy. Specifically, high-temperature positive samples promote entropy growth, whereas negative samples suppress it. We provide a theoretical explanation for this phenomenon: when entropy decreases during policy updates, its derivative with respect to temperature is strictly positive under positive-sample updates, indicating that high-temperature positive samples can counteract entropy decay, thereby slowing entropy collapse and potentially reversing it. Motivated by this insight, we propose SCOPE-RL, a stable and quantitative entropy control framework through a regularization term constructed from temperature-adaptive positive samples. Extensive experiments show that SCOPE-RL consistently outperforms strong RL baselines on both Pass@1 and Pass@$k$. Our results provide evidence that escaping entropy collapse can improve reasoning performance, while also showing that the benefit is non-monotonic, with an optimal level of exploration for RL post-training in reasoning LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCOPE-RL框架，通过温度自适应正样本的正则化项稳定控制策略熵，有效避免GRPO在RL后训练中的熵崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO在LLM后训练中广泛使用但易出现熵崩溃：探索快速消失、策略过早收敛、样本多样性下降，损害训练效果。现有方法如熵奖励和剪辑方法无法稳定保持熵在探索区间，常导致振荡或奖励退化。
light_analysis.method: 识别熵动态中的不对称性：高温采样下正样本促进熵增长，负样本抑制熵。基于此，提出SCOPE-RL，通过温度自适应正样本构造正则化项，实现对策略熵的稳定且定量控制。理论证明了正样本更新下熵对温度的导数严格为正。
light_analysis.result: 在推理LLM的RL后训练中，SCOPE-RL在Pass@1和Pass@k指标上均一致优于GRPO等强基线。实验表明摆脱熵崩溃可提升推理性能，且效益非单调，存在最优探索水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了SCOPE-RL框架，有效解决熵崩溃问题，提升LLM推理性能。理论贡献在于揭示并解释了熵动态不对称性。实际价值在于为RL后训练提供稳定熵控制方法。未来需进一步研究最优探索水平的自适应调节。

title: VA-Adapter: Adapting Ultrasound Foundation Model to Echocardiography Probe Guidance
abstract: Echocardiography is a critical tool for detecting heart diseases, yet its steep operational difficulty causes a shortage of skilled personnel. Probe guidance systems, which assist in acquiring high-quality images, offer a promising solution to lower this operational barrier. However, robust probe guidance remains challenging due to significant individual variability. This variability manifests as differences in low-level features within two-dimensional (2D) images, which complicates image feature understanding, and differences in individual three-dimensional (3D) structures, which poses challenges for precise navigation. To address these challenges, we first propose leveraging the robust image representations learned by ultrasound foundation models from vast datasets. Yet, applying these models to probe navigation is non-trivial due to their lack of understanding of individual 3D structures. To this end, we meticulously design a Vision-Action Adapter (VA-Adapter) to online inject the capability of understanding individual 3D structures. Specifically, by embedding the VA-Adapter into the foundation model's image encoder, the model can infer cardiac anatomy from historical vision-action sequences, mimicking the cognitive process of a sonographer. Extensive experiments on a dataset with over 1.31M samples demonstrate that the VA-Adapter outperforms strong probe guidance models while requiring approximately 33 times fewer trained parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/VA-Adapter.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VA-Adapter，将超声基础模型适配到超声心动图探针引导，通过在线注入个体3D结构理解能力实现高效导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声心动图是检测心脏病的关键工具，但操作难度大导致熟练人员短缺。探针引导系统可降低操作门槛，但因个体差异显著（二维图像低层特征和三维解剖结构差异）而难以实现鲁棒引导。现有超声基础模型虽具备强大图像表示能力，但缺乏对个体三维结构的理解，无法直接用于导航。因此，需要一种方法使基础模型具备个体化三维解剖结构感知能力，以提升探针引导的精准性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出视觉-动作适配器（VA-Adapter），将其嵌入超声基础模型的图像编码器中，通过在线注入理解个体三维结构的能力。VA-Adapter利用历史视觉-动作序列推断心脏解剖结构，模拟超声医师的认知过程。该方法在不重新训练整个模型的前提下，仅通过轻量级适配器实现个性化导航。实验基于包含超过131万样本的大规模数据集，训练参数仅为强基线模型的约1/33。
light_analysis.result: 在包含1.31M样本的数据集上，VA-Adapter在探针引导任务中显著优于现有强基线模型，同时所需训练参数减少约33倍。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细列出，但明确表明“outperforms strong probe guidance models”，验证了该方法在效率和效果上的优势。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: VA-Adapter成功将超声基础模型适配到探针引导任务，通过轻量级适配器在线注入个体三维理解能力，有效解决了个体差异带来的挑战。该方法降低了模型训练成本，提升了导航性能，对缓解超声心动图操作人员短缺具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的序列建模或跨模态融合以进一步提升性能。

title: Egalitarian Gradient Descent: A Simple Approach to Accelerated Grokking
abstract: Grokking is the phenomenon whereby, unlike the training performance, which peaks early in the training process, the test/generalization performance of a model stagnates over arbitrarily many epochs and then suddenly jumps to usually close to perfect levels. In practice, it is desirable to reduce the length of such plateaus, that is to make the learning process "grok" faster. In this work, we provide new insights into grokking. First, we show both empirically and theoretically that grokking can be induced by asymmetric speeds of (stochastic) gradient descent, along different principal (i.e singular directions) of the gradients. We then propose a simple modification that normalizes the gradients so that dynamics along all the principal directions evolves at exactly the same speed. Then, we establish that this modified method, which we call egalitarian gradient descent (EGD) and can be seen as a carefully modified form of natural gradient descent, groks much faster. In fact, in some cases the stagnation is completely removed. Finally, we empirically show that on classical arithmetic problems such as modular addition and sparse parity problem which this stagnation has been widely observed and intensively studied, that our proposed method eliminates the plateaus.

light_analysis.overview: 提出平等梯度下降（EGD）方法，通过归一化梯度加速grokking现象。
light_analysis.motivation: Grokking现象中，模型性能在训练后期突然提升，但前期存在长期停滞。现有方法无法有效缩短停滞期，影响训练效率。本文旨在通过分析梯度下降的不对称性，提出简单改进以加速grokking。
light_analysis.method: 论文发现grokking由梯度沿不同主方向（奇异方向）的不对称速度引起。提出EGD，通过归一化梯度使所有主方向更新速度一致，相当于改进的自然梯度下降。该方法在模加法、稀疏奇偶等任务上测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，EGD显著加速grokking，在某些情况下完全消除停滞期。在经典算术问题（如模加法、稀疏奇偶）上，EGD消除了以往普遍观察到的性能停滞，实现更快的泛化收敛。
light_analysis.conclusion: EGD为加速grokking提供了简单有效的方案，揭示梯度对称性对泛化的重要性。该方法易于实现，可推广至其他存在类似停滞现象的深度学习任务。未来可探索其在更复杂模型中的应用。

title: Use the Online Network If You Can: Towards Fast and Stable Reinforcement Learning
abstract: The use of target networks is a popular approach for estimating value functions in deep Reinforcement Learning (RL). While effective, the target network remains a compromise solution that preserves stability at the cost of slowly moving targets, thus delaying learning. Conversely, using the online network as a bootstrapped target is intuitively appealing, albeit well-known to lead to unstable learning. In this work, we aim to obtain the best out of both worlds by introducing a novel update rule that computes the target using the MINimum estimate between the Target and Online network, giving rise to our method, MINTO. Through this simple, yet effective modification, we show that MINTO enables faster and stable value function learning, by mitigating the potential overestimation bias of using the online network for bootstrapping. Notably, MINTO can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of value-based and actor-critic algorithms with a negligible cost. We evaluate MINTO extensively across diverse benchmarks, spanning online and offline RL, as well as discrete and continuous action spaces. Across all benchmarks, MINTO consistently improves performance, demonstrating its broad applicability and effectiveness.
comment: Accepted at the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出MINTO方法，通过取目标网络与在线网络的最小估计值作为自举目标，实现快速稳定的深度强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 在深度强化学习中，使用目标网络虽稳定但学习缓慢，而直接使用在线网络作为自举目标虽快但不稳定。现有方法无法兼顾速度与稳定性。为解决这一矛盾，本文旨在设计一种既能加速学习又能保持稳定的价值函数更新规则。
light_analysis.method: MINTO采用新型更新规则，计算目标网络与在线网络估计的最小值作为TD目标，从而缓解使用在线网络自举带来的过度估计偏差。该方法简单有效，可无缝集成到各类基于价值和演员-评论家算法中，且计算成本可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 在在线与离线强化学习、离散与连续动作空间等多种基准上，MINTO均一致地提升了性能。相比标准目标网络方法，MINTO实现了更快的学习速度和更好的稳定性，且无需额外超参数调整。
light_analysis.conclusion: MINTO通过最小化目标网络与在线网络估计，有效平衡了学习速度与稳定性，为深度强化学习提供了一种通用改进方案。其广泛适用性表明具有重要学术和应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的聚合方式。

title: ZeroSiam: An Efficient Asymmetry for Test-Time Entropy Optimization without Collapse
abstract: Test-time entropy minimization helps adapt a model to novel environments and incentivize its reasoning capability, unleashing the model's potential during inference by allowing it to evolve and improve in real-time using its own predictions, achieving promising performance. However, pure entropy minimization can favor non-generalizable shortcuts, such as inflating the logit norm and driving all predictions to a dominant class to reduce entropy, risking collapsed solutions (e.g., constant one-hot outputs) that trivially minimize the objective without meaningful learning. In this paper, we reveal asymmetry as a key mechanism for collapse prevention and introduce ZeroSiam--an efficient asymmetric Siamese architecture tailored for test-time entropy minimization. ZeroSiam prevents collapse through asymmetric divergence alignment, efficiently achieved by a learnable predictor and a stop-gradient operator before the classifier. We provide empirical and theoretical evidence that ZeroSiam not only prevents collapse, but also regularizes biased learning signals, enhancing performance even when no collapse occurs. Despite its simplicity, extensive results show that ZeroSiam performs more stably over prior methods using negligible overhead, demonstrating efficacy on both vision adaptation and large language model reasoning tasks across challenging test scenarios and diverse models, including particularly collapse-prone tiny models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ZeroSiam非对称孪生架构，通过可学习预测器和停止梯度操作防止测试时熵优化坍塌。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时熵最小化能提升模型适应能力，但纯熵最小化易导致坍塌（如所有预测偏向主导类），无法有效学习。现有方法缺乏对坍塌的明确预防机制，尤其在小模型上问题更为突出。
light_analysis.method: ZeroSiam采用非对称孪生架构，通过可学习预测器和停止梯度操作实现非对称发散对齐，有效防止坍塌并正则化有偏学习信号。该方法简单高效，适用于多种模型和任务。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉适应和大型语言模型推理任务上，ZeroSiam性能稳定，优于先前方法，且计算开销可忽略。尤其对易坍塌的小模型表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: ZeroSiam揭示了非对称性作为防坍塌的关键机制，提供了一种简单有效的测试时熵优化方法。其稳定性和通用性具有重要实践价值，未来可探索更广泛的应用场景。

title: FlashEdit: Decoupling Speed, Structure, and Semantics for Precise Image Editing
abstract: Text-guided image editing with diffusion models has achieved remarkable quality but often suffers from prohibitive latency. We introduce \textbf{FlashEdit}, a real-time localized image editing framework for the standard inversion-based editing setting. Its efficiency and precision stem from three key innovations: (1) a \textbf{Cycle-Consistent One-Step Inversion (COSI)} pipeline that encourages manifold-aligned one-step inversion through cycle consistency; (2) a \textbf{Background Shield (BG-Shield)} technique that improves preservation of non-edited regions via structural self-attention intervention; and (3) a \textbf{Sparsified Spatial Cross-Attention (SSCA)} mechanism that promotes precise edits by suppressing semantic leakage. Experiments on PIE-Bench demonstrate a strong preservation-efficiency trade-off, with edits completed in under 0.2 seconds and an over 150$\times$ speedup over DDIM-based multi-step editing. Our code will be made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/JunyiWuCode/FlashEdit}.
comment: Our code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/JunyiWuCode/FlashEdit

light_analysis.overview: FlashEdit提出实时局部图像编辑框架，通过循环一致性一步反转、背景保护和稀疏空间交叉注意力实现亚秒级高精度编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在文本引导图像编辑中质量高但延迟高，现有方法如DDIM多步编辑速度慢，难以满足实时应用需求。亟需在保持编辑精度的同时大幅提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出FlashEdit框架，包含三个创新：(1)循环一致性一步反转(COSI)，通过循环一致性约束实现流形对齐的一步反转；(2)背景盾(BG-Shield)，利用结构自注意力干预保护非编辑区域；(3)稀疏空间交叉注意力(SSCA)，抑制语义泄漏以实现精准编辑。
light_analysis.result: 在PIE-Bench上，编辑耗时低于0.2秒，相对DDIM多步编辑实现超过150倍加速，同时保持强保存-效率权衡，非编辑区域保留优秀。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlashEdit实现了实时高精度图像编辑，平衡了速度、结构和语义。贡献包括COSI、BG-Shield和SSCA，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的编辑场景和扩散模型适配。

title: When TableQA Meets Noise: A Dual Denoising Framework for Complex Questions and Large-scale Tables
abstract: Table question answering (TableQA) is a fundamental task in natural language processing (NLP). The strong reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have brought significant advances in this field. However, as real-world applications involve increasingly complex questions and larger tables, substantial noisy data is introduced, which severely degrades reasoning performance. To address this challenge, we focus on improving two core capabilities: Relevance Filtering, which identifies and retains information truly relevant to reasoning, and Table Pruning, which reduces table size while preserving essential content. Based on these principles, we propose EnoTab, a dual denoising framework for complex questions and large-scale tables. Specifically, we first perform Evidence-based Question Denoising by decomposing the question into minimal semantic units and filtering out those irrelevant to answer reasoning based on consistency and usability criteria. Then, we propose Evidence Tree-guided Table Denoising, which constructs an explicit and transparent table pruning path to remove irrelevant data step by step. At each pruning step, we observe the intermediate state of the table and apply a post-order node rollback mechanism to handle abnormal table states, ultimately producing a highly reliable sub-table for final answer reasoning. Finally, extensive experiments show that EnoTab achieves outstanding performance on TableQA tasks with complex questions and large-scale tables, confirming its effectiveness.
comment: 24 pages, 24 figures, accepted to ACL 2026 Main

light_analysis.overview: 提出EnoTab双去噪框架，通过问题分解和证据树引导的表格剪枝，处理复杂问题和大规模表格中的噪声，提升TableQA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有TableQA方法在处理复杂问题和大规模表格时，由于引入大量噪声数据，推理性能严重下降。核心挑战在于缺乏有效的相关性过滤和表格剪枝机制，导致模型难以聚焦关键信息。
light_analysis.method: EnoTab框架包含两个阶段：首先，通过证据基础的问题去噪，将问题分解为最小语义单元，基于一致性和可用性过滤无关单元；其次，证据树引导的表格去噪，构建显式剪枝路径逐步移除无关数据，并采用后序节点回滚机制处理异常表格状态，最终生成高可靠子表格。
light_analysis.result: 在包含复杂问题和大规模表格的TableQA任务上，EnoTab取得优异性能，显著优于现有基线方法。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但实验证实其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EnoTab通过双去噪策略有效应对现实场景中的噪声挑战，提升TableQA的鲁棒性和准确性。未来可探索更高效的问题分解和剪枝路径搜索方法。

title: Early Stopping Chain-of-thoughts in Large Language Models
abstract: Reasoning large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated superior capacities in solving complicated problems by generating long chain-of-thoughts (CoT), but such a lengthy CoT incurs high inference costs. Previous methods on inference-stage efficient reasoning either require white-box models to monitor the reasoning process or are not reliable through direct prompting. In response, we introduce ES-CoT, an inference-time method that shortens CoT generation by detecting answer convergence and stopping early with almost no performance loss. When observing a linguistic marker (such as "wait") in the reasoning process, we prompt the LLM to output its current final answer, denoted as a step answer. We then track the run length of consecutive identical step answers as a measure of answer convergence. We show both empirically and theoretically that step answers steadily converge to the final answer, and large run-length jumps reliably mark this convergence. Experiments on six reasoning datasets across three LLMs show that ES-CoT reduces the number of inference tokens by 16.08% on average while maintaining accuracy comparable to standard CoT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ES-CoT方法，通过检测答案收敛性提前终止链式思维生成，降低推理成本而不损失性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过生成长链式思维提升推理能力，但推理成本高昂。现有推理阶段高效方法要么需要白盒模型监控推理过程，要么通过直接提示不可靠。因此需要一种不依赖模型内部状态、可靠且高效的早期停止方法。
light_analysis.method: ES-CoT是一种推理时方法，通过检测语言标记（如“wait”）触发模型输出当前最终答案（步骤答案），并跟踪连续相同步骤答案的运行长度作为答案收敛性的度量。理论上和实验上证明步骤答案稳定收敛至最终答案，运行长度的大幅跳跃可靠标记收敛点。从而提前终止CoT生成，减少推理令牌数。
light_analysis.result: 在六个推理数据集和三个LLM上的实验表明，ES-CoT平均减少16.08%的推理令牌数，同时保持与标准CoT相当的准确性。该方法无需修改模型参数，适用于黑盒LLM。
light_analysis.conclusion: ES-CoT通过检测答案收敛性实现早期停止，在不损失推理性能的前提下显著降低推理成本。该方法简单有效，适用于各种LLM和推理任务。未来工作可探索更精细的语言标记或自适应阈值。

title: Improving MLLM Training Efficiency via Stage-Aware Sparsity
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated outstanding performance across a variety of domains. However, training MLLMs is often inefficient, as much of the computation is redundant due to the long input sequences from multimodal data and underutilized inter-layer operations. Notably, such redundancy is not static but varies across different stages of training. Building on this observation, we shift the focus to the training process itself and propose a training-efficient framework based on sparse representations, termed the Sparse Training Scheme (STS). Instead of applying a uniform sparsity strategy, STS adopts a stage-aware design that adapts to different sources of redundancy during training. Specifically, the framework consists of two complementary components: the Visual Token Compressor, which reduces the information load by compressing visual tokens during modality alignment, and the Layer Dynamic Skipper, which mitigates computational overhead by dynamically skipping unnecessary layers during instruction tuning. Our approach is broadly applicable to diverse MLLM architectures and has been extensively evaluated on multiple benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出阶段感知的稀疏训练框架STS，通过视觉标记压缩和层动态跳跃提升MLLM训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型训练效率低下，主要由于多模态长输入序列和层间操作冗余导致计算浪费。现有方法通常采用统一稀疏策略，忽视了训练不同阶段（如模态对齐和指令微调）中冗余来源的动态变化。该研究旨在通过自适应稀疏表示解决此问题，以提高训练效率并保持模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Sparse Training Scheme (STS)框架，包含两个互补组件：Visual Token Compressor在模态对齐阶段压缩视觉标记以减少信息负载；Layer Dynamic Skipper在指令微调阶段动态跳过不必要的层以降低计算开销。该框架采用阶段感知设计，适应不同训练阶段的冗余特征，并广泛适用于多种MLLM架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上的广泛评估表明，STS框架显著提升了训练效率，同时保持了模型性能。摘要未明确具体数值，但指出方法在多种MLLM架构上有效，相比统一稀疏策略有更好的效率-性能权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: STS通过阶段感知的稀疏表示，有效解决了MLLM训练中的冗余计算问题，具有广泛适用性和显著效率提升。该方法为大规模多模态模型训练提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化压缩和跳跃策略，探索更细粒度的阶段划分。

title: FediLoRA: Practical Federated Fine-Tuning of Foundation Models Under Missing-Modality Constraints
abstract: Federated Learning with LoRA fine-tuning offers an efficient and privacy-aware solution for institutions to collaboratively leverage their large datasets to train VLLMs. However, participating institutions often possess heterogeneous computational resources, resulting in imbalanced LoRA ranks, which pose a major challenge for effective collaboration. In addition, real-world applications in domains such as healthcare and transportation frequently suffer from missing modalities due to user mistakes or device failures, which significantly degrade global model performance in federated settings. To the best of our knowledge, no prior work has addressed these two challenges simultaneously in federated VLLMs. To tackle these issues, we propose FediLoRA, a lightweight federated LoRA aggregation framework that effectively mitigates the impact of missing modalities in heterogeneous environment. FediLoRA is explicitly motivated by the observation that simple averaging and structured editing can jointly benefit both global and personalized models. Our approach achieves strong performance across multiple general-domain and medical-domain benchmark datasets. Additional experiments on healthcare data further demonstrate that FediLoRA is well-suited for practical, real-world deployment scenarios. Our code is released at https://github.com/gotobcn8/FediLoRA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FediLoRA，一种轻量级联邦LoRA聚合框架，同时解决异构计算资源和缺失模态挑战，实现基础模型的高效联邦微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习与LoRA微调结合虽能高效协作训练VLLM，但参与机构计算资源异构导致LoRA秩不平衡，且实际应用中模态缺失（如医疗、交通）严重降低全局模型性能。现有工作未同时解决这两个挑战，亟需一种实用方法。
light_analysis.method: FediLoRA框架通过简单平均和结构化编辑的联合策略，同时优化全局和个性化模型，有效减轻缺失模态影响并适应异构环境。未明确指定模型架构，但基于LoRA聚合，在多个通用和医学基准数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个通用域和医学域基准数据集上取得强性能，额外医疗数据实验表明FediLoRA适合实际部署。摘要未提供具体数值，但与基线对比表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: FediLoRA成功解决了联邦微调中异构资源和缺失模态的共存问题，为实际部署提供了轻量级、隐私保护的方案。代码已开源，未来可扩展至更多模态和场景。

title: FedKLPR: KL-Guided Pruning-Aware Federated Learning for Person Re-Identification
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) is a fundamental task in intelligent surveillance and public safety. Federated learning (FL) provides a privacy-preserving paradigm for collaborative model training without centralized data collection. However, deploying FL in real-world re-ID systems remains challenging due to statistical heterogeneity caused by non-IID client data and the substantial communication overhead incurred by frequent transmission of large-scale models. To address these challenges, we propose FedKLPR, a lightweight and communication-efficient federated learning framework for person re-ID. FedKLPR consists of three key components. First, KL-Divergence-Guided training, including the KL-Divergence Regularization Loss (KLL) and KL-Divergence-aggregation Weight (KLAW), is introduced to mitigate statistical heterogeneity and improve convergence stability under non-IID settings. Second, unstructured pruning is incorporated to reduce communication overhead, and the Pruning-ratio-aggregation Weight (PRAW) is proposed to measure the relative importance of client parameters after pruning. Together with KLAW, PRAW forms KL-Divergence-Prune Weighted Aggregation (KLPWA), enabling effective aggregation of pruned local models under heterogeneous data distributions. Third, Cross-Round Recovery (CRR) adaptively controls pruning across communication rounds to prevent excessive compression and preserve model accuracy. Experiments on eight benchmark datasets demonstrate that FedKLPR achieves substantial communication savings while maintaining competitive accuracy. Compared with state-of-the-art methods, FedKLPR reduces communication cost by 40\%--42\% on ResNet-50 while achieving better overall performance.
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedKLPR，一个结合KL散度引导训练与非结构化剪枝的联邦学习框架，用于行人重识别，在非独立同分布数据下降低通信开销并保持精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在行人重识别中面临两大挑战：客户端数据非独立同分布导致的统计异质性，以及大规模模型频繁传输带来的通信开销。现有方法难以兼顾隐私保护、通信效率和模型性能。FedKLPR旨在通过剪枝减少通信量，同时利用KL散度缓解异质性影响。
light_analysis.method: FedKLPR包含三个组件：KL散度引导训练（KLL损失和KLAW聚合权重）缓解非独立同分布问题；非结构化剪枝降低通信开销，并引入剪枝率聚合权重（PRAW）衡量剪枝后参数重要性；跨轮恢复（CRR）自适应控制剪枝比例，防止过度压缩。最终通过KLPWA聚合剪枝后的局部模型。
light_analysis.result: 在8个基准数据集上，FedKLPR在保持竞争性精度的同时显著降低通信成本。与最先进方法相比，使用ResNet-50时通信成本减少40%-42%，且整体性能更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedKLPR有效解决了联邦行人重识别中的统计异质性和通信效率问题，通过KL散度引导训练和剪枝技术实现轻量化模型聚合。未来可探索更高效的剪枝策略或扩展至其他视觉任务。

title: The Loupe: A Plug-and-Play Attention Module for Amplifying Discriminative Features in Vision Transformers
abstract: Fine-Grained Visual Classification (FGVC) requires models to focus on subtle, task-relevant regions rather than broad object context. We present The Loupe, a lightweight plug-and-play spatial gating module for hierarchical Vision Transformers. The module is inserted at an intermediate feature stage, predicts a single-channel spatial mask with a small CNN, and uses that mask to reweight feature activations during end-to-end training with a cross-entropy objective and an l1 sparsity term. On CUB-200-2011, The Loupe improves Swin-Base from 88.36% to 91.72% and Swin-Tiny from 85.14% to 88.61%, with under 0.1% additional parameters. Ablations show that the improvement depends on the insertion point and the sparsity regularizer, suggesting that controlled spatial gating is more effective than naive multi-scale masking in this setting. Qualitative results indicate that the learned masks often align with discriminative bird parts, although the module is not a substitute for part-level supervision and can fail under occlusion or fine-grained intra-part differences.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级即插即用的空间门控模块The Loupe，通过预测单通道空间掩码增强层次化视觉Transformer的判别特征，在细粒度分类任务中显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度视觉分类(FGVC)需要模型关注细微的、任务相关的区域，而非整体对象上下文。现有方法如多层掩码可能不够有效，且需要精确的区域监督。本文旨在设计一种轻量、无参数增加的模块，通过可控的空间门控增强判别特征，同时保持端到端训练的简便性。
light_analysis.method: The Loupe是一个即插即用的空间门控模块，插入层次化视觉Transformer的中间阶段。它使用一个小型CNN预测单通道空间掩码，并通过该掩码重新加权特征激活。训练使用交叉熵损失和l1稀疏正则项，以鼓励掩码学习判别区域。模块参数增加少于0.1%，无需区域标注。
light_analysis.result: 在CUB-200-2011数据集上，The Loupe将Swin-Base从88.36%提升至91.72%，Swin-Tiny从85.14%提升至88.61%，参数增加不到0.1%。消融实验表明性能提升依赖于插入点和稀疏正则器，说明可控空间门控优于朴素多层掩码。定性结果显示掩码常对齐判别性鸟类部位。
light_analysis.conclusion: The Loupe通过简单的空间门控机制有效提升细粒度视觉分类性能，参数开销极小。它证明可控的空间掩码比多层掩码更有效，但无法替代部件级监督，且在遮挡或细微部件差异下可能失败。未来可探索自适应插入位置或结合弱监督信息。

title: Federated Distillation on Edge Devices: Efficient Client-Side Filtering for Non-IID Data
abstract: Federated distillation has emerged as a promising collaborative machine learning approach, offering enhanced privacy protection and reduced communication compared to traditional federated learning by exchanging model outputs (soft logits) rather than full model parameters. However, existing methods employ complex selective knowledge-sharing strategies that require clients to identify in-distribution proxy data through computationally expensive statistical density ratio estimators. Additionally, server-side filtering of ambiguous knowledge introduces latency to the process. To address these challenges, we propose a robust, resource-efficient EdgeFD method that reduces the complexity of the client-side density ratio estimation and removes the need for server-side filtering. EdgeFD introduces an efficient KMeans-based density ratio estimator for effectively filtering both in-distribution and out-of-distribution proxy data on clients, significantly improving the quality of knowledge sharing. We evaluate EdgeFD across diverse practical scenarios, including strong non-IID, weak non-IID, and IID data distributions on clients, without requiring a pre-trained teacher model on the server for knowledge distillation. Experimental results demonstrate that EdgeFD outperforms state-of-the-art methods, consistently achieving accuracy levels close to IID scenarios even under heterogeneous and challenging conditions. The significantly reduced computational overhead of the KMeans-based estimator is suitable for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices, thereby enhancing the scalability and real-world applicability of federated distillation. The code is available online for reproducibility.
comment: This paper was accepted at the International Conference on Federated Learning Technologies and Applications, 2025. The final version is available at IEEE Xplore

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于KMeans的客户端侧密度比估计方法，实现高效的非独立同分布数据过滤，提升联邦蒸馏的准确性和资源效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦蒸馏通过交换模型输出保护隐私并减少通信，但现有方法依赖复杂的统计密度比估计器筛选代理数据，且服务器端过滤引入延迟。这些问题在非独立同分布数据场景下尤为突出，导致知识共享质量下降。EdgeFD旨在降低客户端计算复杂度并消除服务器端过滤，以适用于资源受限的边缘设备。
light_analysis.method: EdgeFD引入了一种高效的基于KMeans的密度比估计器，在客户端侧同时过滤分布内和分布外代理数据，避免服务器端过滤。该方法无需预训练教师模型，直接利用KMeans聚类近似密度比，计算开销显著降低。实验覆盖强非独立同分布、弱非独立同分布和独立同分布场景，评估了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多种非独立同分布设置下，EdgeFD持续优于最先进的联邦蒸馏方法，准确率接近独立同分布场景。KMeans估计器的计算开销显著低于传统方法，适合于资源受限的边缘设备。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: EdgeFD通过高效的客户端过滤机制解决了联邦蒸馏中的非独立同分布挑战，具有更好的隐私保护、通信效率和可扩展性。其资源效率使其适用于边缘设备部署，未来可探索更极端数据分布下的优化。

title: ROVR-Open-Dataset: A Large-Scale Depth Dataset for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Depth estimation is a fundamental component of spatial perception for autonomous driving and other unmanned systems operating in open urban environments. Existing depth datasets such as KITTI, nuScenes, and DDAD have advanced the field but are limited in diversity and scalability, and benchmark performance on them is approaching saturation. A less discussed constraint is \emph{sensor economics}: the bespoke multi-LiDAR rigs behind these datasets are expensive, power-hungry, and difficult to replicate at fleet scale, which caps the geographic and temporal diversity that any single benchmark can cover. We present ROVR, a large-scale, diverse, and cost-efficient depth dataset designed to capture the complexity of real-world driving. ROVR comprises 200K high-resolution frames across highway, rural, and urban scenarios, spanning day/night cycles and adverse weather conditions, collected across North America, Europe, and Asia. We additionally release the calibration, synchronization, preprocessing, and privacy pipeline so that the platform can be reproduced by third parties. The lightweight acquisition pipeline enables scalable collection, while sparse but statistically sufficient ground truth -- validated by a density ablation -- supports robust model training. Extensive ablation studies further characterize performance across scene types, illumination, weather conditions, and ground-truth sparsity levels, and identify three qualitatively distinct failure modes -- photometric collapse, geometric confusion, and range saturation -- that current architectures share. The dataset, data loaders, calibration and privacy pipelines, and evaluation code are publicly available at \url{https://xiandaguo.net/ROVR-Open-Dataset}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ROVR数据集，大规模、多样、成本效益高，推动自动驾驶深度估计研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度数据集如KITTI、nuScenes等多样性有限，性能接近饱和，且多LiDAR采集设备昂贵、功耗高，难以大规模部署，限制了地理和时间多样性。ROVR旨在解决这些问题，提供成本效益高且覆盖更广场景的数据集，以捕捉真实驾驶的复杂性。
light_analysis.method: ROVR包含20万帧高分辨率图像，涵盖高速公路、乡村、城市场景，日夜和恶劣天气，采集自北美、欧洲、亚洲。使用轻量级采集管道实现可扩展性，提供稀疏但统计充足的真实深度（通过密度消融验证）。同时公开标定、同步、预处理和隐私管道，便于第三方复现。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量消融实验，评估了不同场景类型、光照、天气和真实密度下的性能，并识别出当前架构共有的三种失败模式：光度坍塌、几何混淆和范围饱和。数据集、数据加载器、标定和隐私管道及评估代码均已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了大规模、多样化的深度数据集，降低了采集成本，促进了自动驾驶深度估计的泛化研究。学术价值和实际应用价值高，有助于开发更鲁棒的模型。未来可进一步扩展地理和时间多样性。

title: HyperTea: A Hypergraph-based Temporal Enhancement and Alignment Network for Moving Infrared Small Target Detection
abstract: In practical application scenarios, moving infrared small target detection (MIRSTD) remains highly challenging due to the target's small size, weak intensity, and complex motion pattern. Existing methods typically only model low-order correlations between feature nodes and perform feature extraction and enhancement within a single temporal scale. Although hypergraphs have been widely used for high-order correlation learning, they have received limited attention in MIRSTD. To explore the potential of hypergraphs and enhance multi-timescale feature representation, we propose HyperTea, which integrates global and local temporal perspectives to effectively model high-order spatiotemporal correlations of features. HyperTea consists of three modules: the global temporal enhancement module (GTEM) realizes global temporal context enhancement through semantic aggregation and propagation; the local temporal enhancement module (LTEM) is designed to capture local motion patterns between adjacent frames and then enhance local temporal context; additionally, we further develop a temporal alignment module (TAM) to address potential cross-scale feature misalignment. To our best knowledge, HyperTea is the first work to integrate convolutional neural networks (CNNs), recurrent neural networks (RNNs), and hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) for MIRSTD, significantly improving detection performance. Experiments on DAUB and IRDST demonstrate its state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance. Our source codes are available at https://github.com/Lurenjia-LRJ/HyperTea.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyperTea网络，融合CNN、RNN和超图神经网络，通过全局和局部时间增强及对齐模块，实现动目标红外小目标检测的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 动目标红外小目标检测因目标小、强度弱、运动模式复杂而极具挑战。现有方法仅建模低阶特征节点相关性且在单一时间尺度进行特征提取，忽略了高阶时空相关性和多时间尺度信息。超图虽广泛用于高阶关联学习，但在该领域未受重视。因此，需要探索超图潜力并增强多时间尺度特征表示。
light_analysis.method: HyperTea由三个模块构成：全局时间增强模块（GTEM）通过语义聚合与传播实现全局上下文增强；局部时间增强模块（LTEM）捕获相邻帧间局部运动模式并增强局部上下文；时间对齐模块（TAM）解决跨尺度特征错位。该网络首次集成CNN、RNN和超图神经网络（HGNN），以建模高阶时空相关性。
light_analysis.result: 在DAUB和IRDST两个数据集上，HyperTea取得了最先进的检测性能，显著优于现有方法。具体指标摘要未明确给出，但实验证明了其SOTA表现。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyperTea是首个融合CNN、RNN和HGNN用于动目标红外小目标检测的工作，通过全局与局部时间增强及对齐有效提升检测精度。其学术价值在于开辟了超图在该领域的应用，实际可用于军事监视、安防监控等。未来可探索更高效的时间建模或轻量化设计。

title: EndoCogniAgent: Closed-Loop Agentic Reasoning with Self-Consistency Validation for Endoscopic Diagnosis
abstract: Endoscopic diagnosis is an iterative process in which clinicians progressively acquire, compare, and verify local visual evidence before reaching a conclusion. Current AI systems do not adequately support this process because fine-grained evidence acquisition and multi-step reasoning remain weakly coupled. This gives rise to two failure modes, hallucinated evidence and uncorrected error accumulation, that undermine diagnostic reliability. We propose EndoCogniAgent, a closed-loop agentic framework that formulates endoscopic diagnosis as a controlled state update process. At each reasoning round, a central planner selects the next evidence acquisition action, specialized expert tools extract the corresponding observation, and a self-consistency validation mechanism examines the observation along two dimensions, knowledge consistency against the input image and temporal consistency with prior validated findings, before updating the diagnostic state. Validated observations are admitted into the evolving state to condition subsequent planning, while insufficiently supported findings are retained with corrective feedback that redirects the planner toward additional verification. We further introduce EndoAgentBench, a workflow-oriented benchmark comprising 6,132 question-answer pairs from 11 endoscopic datasets, designed to evaluate diagnostic agents across a comprehensive diagnostic chain, from fine-grained visual perception to high-level diagnostic reasoning. Experiments show that EndoCogniAgent achieves 85.23\% average accuracy on perception tasks and 71.13\% clinical acceptance rate on reasoning tasks, with ablation analysis confirming that self-consistency validation and episodic state maintenance are individually critical to these gains.
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables. Revised version with major updates on methodology and extended evaluation on EndoAgentBench. Code and data are available at https://github.com/Tyyds-ai/EndoCogniAgent

light_analysis.overview: 提出闭环智能体框架EndoCogniAgent，将内窥镜诊断建模为受控状态更新过程，并引入自一致性验证机制，显著提升诊断可靠性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 内窥镜诊断是迭代的视觉证据获取与推理过程，但现有AI系统未能有效支持细粒度证据获取与多步推理间的耦合，导致幻觉证据和错误累积。这两个问题严重削弱了诊断可靠性，亟需一种能够模拟临床迭代推理的闭环方法。
light_analysis.method: EndoCogniAgent包含中央规划器、专家工具和自一致性验证模块。每轮推理中，规划器选择证据获取动作，工具提取观察，验证机制从知识一致性（与输入图像）和时间一致性（与先前验证结果）两个维度检查观察，通过则更新诊断状态，否则保留并生成纠正反馈引导规划器再次验证。同时构建EndoAgentBench基准（11个数据集、6132问答对），覆盖从细粒度感知到高级推理的诊断链。
light_analysis.result: 在EndoAgentBench上，EndoCogniAgent在感知任务平均准确率85.23%，推理任务临床接受率71.13%。消融实验表明，自一致性验证和情节状态维护对性能提升均至关重要，分别贡献显著增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: EndoCogniAgent通过闭环推理和自一致性验证有效抑制了幻觉和错误累积，显著提升了内窥镜诊断的可靠性。该框架为医疗AI的迭代诊断提供了新范式，未来可扩展至其他医学影像领域，但需在更多临床场景验证。

title: Rethinking 1-bit Optimization Leveraging Pre-trained Large Language Models
abstract: 1-bit LLM quantization offers significant advantages in reducing storage and computational costs. However, existing methods typically train 1-bit LLMs from scratch, failing to fully leverage pre-trained models. This results in high training costs and notable accuracy degradation. We identify that the large gap between full precision and 1-bit representations makes naive adaptation difficult. In this paper, we introduce a consistent progressive training for both forward and backward, smoothly converting the full-precision weights into the binarized ones. Additionally, we incorporate binary-aware initialization and dual-scaling compensation to reduce the difficulty of progressive training and improve the performance. Experimental results on LLMs of various sizes demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches. Our results show that high-performance 1-bit LLMs can be achieved using pre-trained models, eliminating the need for expensive training from scratch.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用预训练大语言模型的1-bit优化方法，通过渐进式训练和二值感知初始化实现高性能量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有1-bit LLM量化方法通常从头训练，未能利用预训练模型，导致训练成本高且精度显著下降。全精度与1-bit表示之间的巨大差距使得直接适应困难，迫切需要一种能高效利用预训练模型并保持性能的1-bit量化技术。
light_analysis.method: 引入一致的渐进式训练策略，同时作用于前向和反向传播，将全精度权重平滑转换为二值权重。采用二值感知初始化和双尺度补偿，降低渐进训练难度并提升性能。无需从头训练，利用预训练LLM进行优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多种规模的LLM上实验，结果表明该方法优于现有1-bit量化方法。实现了高性能1-bit LLM，且避免了从头训练的高昂成本，显著降低了存储和计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功证明了利用预训练模型实现高性能1-bit LLM的可行性，消除了从头训练的必要性。该方法兼具学术价值（突破量化瓶颈）和实用价值（降低部署成本），未来可探索更复杂的二值化策略。

title: Fourier Compressor: Frequency-Domain Visual Token Compression for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) incur substantial computational overhead and inference latency due to the large number of vision tokens introduced by high-resolution image and video inputs. Existing parameter-free token compression methods typically rely on token selection or merging, yet they risk discarding substantial visual information or distorting the original representation distribution, resulting in pronounced performance degradation at high compression ratios. In response, we aim to explore a more effective and efficient visual token compression strategy, with a promising direction in the frequency domain. Motivated by the success of frequency-domain transforms in image compression (e.g., JPEG), we systematically analyze the frequency redundancy in visual representations and uncover a non-uniform distribution of semantic information across frequency bands. Building upon this, we introduce Fourier Compressor, an effective, parameter-free, and highly generalizable module that removes redundancy from visual representations within the frequency domain. Implemented via FFT with $\mathcal{O}(n^2 \log n)$ complexity and no additional parameters, Fourier Compressor introduces negligible computational overhead while preserving semantic fidelity. Extensive experiments on image-based benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves a favorable performance-efficiency trade-off, retaining over 96% of the original accuracy while reducing inference FLOPs by up to 83.8% and boosting generation speed by 31.2%. It consistently outperforms existing parameter-free methods and even surpasses some parameterized approaches. Importantly, Fourier Compressor generalizes consistently across both LLaVA and Qwen-VL architectures, and further extends to video understanding tasks, highlighting its practical applicability for efficient VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fourier Compressor，一种基于频域的无参数视觉令牌压缩方法，通过FFT去除冗余，在保持96%以上准确率的同时减少83.8%FLOPs。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型因高分辨率图像和视频输入产生大量视觉令牌，导致计算开销和推理延迟。现有无参数压缩方法（如令牌选择或合并）在高压缩比下易丢失视觉信息或扭曲表示分布，造成性能显著下降。受频域变换（如JPEG）在图像压缩中成功的启发，作者旨在探索频域中更有效且高效的视觉令牌压缩策略。
light_analysis.method: 系统分析视觉表示中的频域冗余，发现语义信息在频带中非均匀分布。提出Fourier Compressor，通过FFT（复杂度O(n² log n)）实现，无需额外参数，在频域中去除冗余并保留语义保真度。该模块高度泛化，可集成到LLaVA和Qwen-VL等VLM架构中，并扩展至视频理解任务。
light_analysis.result: 在图像基准测试中，Fourier Compressor保留超过96%的原始准确率，同时减少推理FLOPs高达83.8%，生成速度提升31.2%。性能优于现有无参数压缩方法，甚至超越部分参数化方法。在LLaVA和Qwen-VL架构上表现一致，并成功泛化到视频理解任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种有效、无参数且高度泛化的频域视觉令牌压缩方法，显著提升VLM效率，实现性能与计算开销的优异权衡。具有实际应用价值，可推动高效多模态模型部署。未来可探索频带选择的优化及在更多下游任务中的适用性。

title: Enhancing Event-based Object Detection with Monocular Normal Maps
abstract: Object detection in autonomous driving is frequently compromised by complex illumination. While event cameras offer a robust solution, they are susceptible to sudden contrast changes such as reflections which often trigger dense, misleading event signals. To overcome this, we leverage RGB-derived surface normal maps as explicit geometric constraints. Crucially, even when RGB degrades, they preserve low-frequency structural priors that effectively assist in event-based detection. Consequently, we present NRE-Net, a trimodal framework that integrates structural priors from surface Normal maps, appearance context from RGB images, and high-frequency dynamics from Events. The Adaptive Dual-stream Fusion Module (ADFM) first aligns geometric and appearance cues, followed by the Event-modality Aware Fusion Module (EAFM) which selectively integrates event dynamics. Extensive evaluations on DSEC-Det-sub and PKU-DAVIS-SOD demonstrate that incorporating geometric priors yields an additional 3.0% AP50 gain over dual-modal baselines, while our approach consistently outperforms fusion methods such as SFNet (+2.7%) and SODFormer (+7.1%).

light_analysis.overview: 提出NRE-Net，利用单目法线图作为几何先验，实现事件相机目标检测的三模态融合，提升复杂光照下的检测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机在复杂光照下鲁棒，但对突然对比变化（如反射）敏感，易产生密集误导信号。现有事件检测方法多忽略几何结构先验，而RGB图像在弱光条件下可能退化。表面法线图保留低频结构信息，即使RGB退化也能提供有效辅助，因此引入几何先验增强事件检测。
light_analysis.method: 提出NRE-Net三模态框架，整合法线图（几何先验）、RGB图像（外观上下文）和事件流（高频动态）。包含自适应双流融合模块（ADFM）对齐几何与外观特征，以及事件模态感知融合模块（EAFM）选择性集成事件动态。在DSEC-Det-sub和PKU-DAVIS-SOD数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在DSEC-Det-sub和PKU-DAVIS-SOD上，相比双模态（RGB+事件）基线，加入法线图几何先验带来AP50额外提升3.0%。NRE-Net优于现有融合方法，如SFNet（+2.7%）和SODFormer（+7.1%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了表面法线图作为几何先验在事件目标检测中的有效性，三模态融合显著提升复杂场景下的检测性能。该工作为利用几何信息增强事件视觉提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的融合策略或扩展到其他自动驾驶感知任务。

title: Color as the Impetus: Transforming Few-Shot Learner
abstract: Humans possess innate meta-learning capabilities, partly attributable to their exceptional color perception. In this paper, we pioneer an innovative viewpoint on few-shot learning by simulating human color perception mechanisms. We propose the ColorSense Learner, a bio-inspired meta-learning framework that capitalizes on inter-channel feature extraction and interactive learning. By strategically emphasizing distinct color information across different channels, our approach effectively filters irrelevant features while capturing discriminative characteristics. Color information represents the most intuitive visual feature, yet conventional meta-learning methods have predominantly neglected this aspect, focusing instead on abstract feature differentiation across categories. Our framework bridges the gap via synergistic color-channel interactions, enabling better intra-class commonality extraction and larger inter-class differences. Furthermore, we introduce a meta-distiller based on knowledge distillation, ColorSense Distiller, which incorporates prior teacher knowledge to augment the student network's meta-learning capacity.
