We've conducted comprehensive coarse/fine-grained and cross-domain experiments on eleven few-shot benchmarks for validation. Numerous experiments reveal that our methods have extremely strong generalization ability, robustness, and transferability, and effortless handle few-shot classification from the perspective of color perception.
comment: This work is currently being redone. It requires significant revisions and polishing. Additionally, the title will also be revised. Therefore, this version is no longer needed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模拟人类颜色感知的ColorSense Learner框架，通过颜色通道交互和知识蒸馏提升少样本学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类少样本学习能力部分归因于颜色感知，但传统元学习方法忽略颜色信息，仅关注抽象特征区分，导致泛化不足。本文旨在利用颜色信息过滤无关特征、增强类内共性提取和类间差异，从而提升少样本学习效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出ColorSense Learner，采用跨通道特征提取和交互学习，在不同颜色通道上强调差异信息，过滤无关特征。同时引入ColorSense Distiller，基于知识蒸馏将教师模型的先验知识融入学生网络，增强元学习能力。在11个基准上进行了细粒度、粗粒度和跨域实验。
light_analysis.result: 在11个少样本基准上的实验表明，所提方法具有极强的泛化能力、鲁棒性和可迁移性，能轻松处理少样本分类任务。相比传统方法，颜色感知机制有效提升了分类准确率，尤其在细粒度场景下优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文开创性地从颜色感知角度解决少样本学习，验证了生物启发方法的有效性。ColorSense框架为元学习提供了新思路，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更通用的感知机制以减少对颜色信息的依赖。

title: MetaLab: Few-Shot Game Changer for Image Recognition
abstract: Difficult few-shot image recognition has significant application prospects, yet remaining the substantial technical gaps with the conventional large-scale image recognition. In this paper, we have proposed an efficient original method for few-shot image recognition, called CIELab-Guided Coherent Meta-Learning (MetaLab). Structurally, our MetaLab comprises two collaborative neural networks: LabNet, which can perform domain transformation for the CIELab color space and extract rich grouped features, and coherent LabGNN, which can facilitate mutual learning between lightness graph and color graph. For sufficient certification, we have implemented extensive comparative studies on four coarse-grained benchmarks, four fine-grained benchmarks, and four cross-domain few-shot benchmarks. Specifically, our method can achieve high accuracy, robust performance, and effective generalization capability with one-shot sample per class. Overall, all experiments have demonstrated that our MetaLab can approach 99\% $\uparrow\downarrow$ accuracy, reaching the human recognition ceiling with little visual deviation.
comment: This work is currently being redone. It requires significant revisions and polishing. Additionally, the title will also be revised. Therefore, this version is no longer needed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CIELab引导的协同元学习（MetaLab）方法，通过LabNet和LabGNN协作实现小样本图像识别的高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 小样本图像识别虽有应用前景但与大规模识别存在技术差距。现有方法在少量样本下准确率低、泛化能力弱，难以达到人类识别水平。本文旨在通过创新的颜色空间引导和元学习策略，解决小样本识别中的特征提取和跨域泛化难题。
light_analysis.method: MetaLab包含两个协作网络：LabNet执行CIELab颜色空间的域变换并提取丰富分组特征；LabGNN通过相干图神经网络促进亮度图和颜色图的相互学习。使用粗粒度、细粒度和跨域共12个基准数据集进行验证，支持单样本学习。
light_analysis.result: 在四个粗粒度、四个细粒度和四个跨域小样本基准上，MetaLab均实现高精度、鲁棒性能和强泛化能力。单样本条件下接近99%准确率，达到人类识别上限，视觉偏差极小。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaLab在小样本图像识别中展现出突破性性能，接近人类识别水平，为实际应用提供高效方案。未来可探索更复杂的颜色空间或扩展至更多模态任务。

title: Shallow Deep Learning Can Still Excel in Fine-Grained Few-Shot Learning
abstract: Deep learning has witnessed the extensive utilization across a wide spectrum of domains, including fine-grained few-shot learning (FGFSL) which heavily depends on deep backbones. Nonetheless, shallower deep backbones such as ConvNet-4, are not commonly preferred because they're prone to extract a larger quantity of non-abstract visual attributes. In this paper, we initially re-evaluate the relationship between network depth and the ability to fully encode few-shot instances, and delve into whether shallow deep architecture could effectuate comparable or superior performance to mainstream deep backbone. Fueled by the inspiration from vanilla ConvNet-4, we introduce a location-aware constellation network (LCN-4), equipped with a cutting-edge location-aware feature clustering module. This module can proficiently encoder and integrate spatial feature fusion, feature clustering, and recessive feature location, thereby significantly minimizing the overall loss. Specifically, we innovatively put forward a general grid position encoding compensation to effectively address the issue of positional information missing during the feature extraction process of specific ordinary convolutions. Additionally, we further propose a general frequency domain location embedding technique to offset for the location loss in clustering features. We have carried out validation procedures on three representative fine-grained few-shot benchmarks. Relevant experiments have established that LCN-4 notably outperforms the ConvNet-4 based State-of-the-Arts and achieves performance that is on par with or superior to most ResNet12-based methods, confirming the correctness of our conjecture.
comment: This work is currently being redone. It requires significant revisions and polishing. Additionally, the title will also be revised. Therefore, this version is no longer needed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于ConvNet-4的浅层位置感知星座网络LCN-4，通过位置感知特征聚类模块在细粒度小样本学习中达到与深层骨干网络相当或更优的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度小样本学习(FGFSL)广泛依赖深度骨干网络，但浅层网络如ConvNet-4因易提取非抽象视觉属性而不被青睐。本文重新评估网络深度与少样本实例编码能力的关系，探究浅层架构能否达到或超越主流深度骨干的性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于ConvNet-4提出位置感知星座网络LCN-4，核心是位置感知特征聚类模块，集成空间特征融合、特征聚类和隐性特征定位。创新点包括：通用网格位置编码补偿解决普通卷积特征提取中的位置信息缺失；通用频域位置嵌入技术补偿聚类特征的位置损失。
light_analysis.result: 在三个细粒度小样本基准上验证，LCN-4显著优于基于ConvNet-4的最先进方法，且达到与多数ResNet12方法相当或更优的性能，证实了浅层网络在FGFSL中仍可表现出色的猜想。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了浅层深度网络在细粒度小样本学习中仍具竞争力，提出的LCN-4通过位置感知模块有效弥补浅层网络缺陷，为小样本学习提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的浅层架构设计。

title: Provable Knowledge Acquisition and Extraction in One-Layer Transformers
abstract: Large language models may encounter factual knowledge during pre-training yet fail to reliably use that knowledge after fine-tuning. Despite growing empirical evidence that MLP layers store factual associations and fine-tuning affects factual recall, the training-dynamics mechanisms linking next-token pre-training, knowledge storage, and post-fine-tuning extraction remain poorly understood. We study this problem in a stylized one-layer transformer with self-attention and MLP modules, trained by next-token prediction and subsequently fine-tuned on question-answering data. Under suitable regularity conditions, we first prove that the model reaches near-optimal pre-training loss while learning structured attention patterns and relation-specific feature directions, giving a mechanism for factual knowledge acquisition. We then show that fine-tuning can turn the Q&A prompt format into a trigger for pre-trained relation features, enabling the model to extract facts that are not revisited during fine-tuning. Our analysis yields a relation-covering characterization of knowledge extraction: fine-tuning need not revisit every stored subject-answer pair, but it must cover enough latent relation-template directions through which facts were encoded during pre-training. Consequently, extraction improves with pre-training multiplicity and fine-tuning coverage, but becomes harder as the relation-template universe grows. Conversely, insufficient coverage leads to a failure regime in which facts may be stored but remain inaccessible, providing a stylized mechanism for hallucination. The theory applies to both full and low-rank fine-tuning, offering insight into why low-rank adaptation can recover pre-trained factual knowledge when relation coverage is sufficient. Experiments on synthetic data and PopQA-based GPT-2/Llama models support the predicted trends.

light_analysis.overview: 本文在单层Transformer中理论证明知识获取与提取机制，揭示预训练与微调对事实记忆的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在预训练中可能学到事实知识，但微调后无法可靠提取。现有实验表明MLP层存储事实关联，但预训练-知识存储-微调提取的动态机制尚不明确。本文旨在通过简化模型理论分析这一过程，解释为何微调后事实可提取或产生幻觉。
light_analysis.method: 采用带自注意力和MLP的单层Transformer，通过下一个词预测预训练，再在问答数据上微调。在正则条件下证明模型达到近最优预训练损失，学习结构化注意模式和关系特定特征方向。微调将问答提示格式转化为触发预训练关系特征的信号，实现知识提取。提供关系覆盖表征：微调需覆盖足够潜在关系模板方向，而非每个事实对。分析全微调和低秩微调。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明：提取效果随预训练多样性和微调覆盖度提升，但随关系模板空间增大而变难。覆盖不足导致事实存储但不可访问（幻觉机制）。合成数据和基于PopQA的GPT-2/Llama模型实验支持预测趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了知识获取与提取的严格理论，阐明了预训练与微调交互的机制，解释了低秩微调在足够关系覆盖下恢复事实知识的原因。为理解幻觉和设计微调策略提供理论基础。

title: Factual Inconsistencies in Multilingual Wikipedia Tables
abstract: Wikipedia serves as a globally accessible knowledge source with content in over 300 languages. Despite covering the same topics, the different versions of Wikipedia are written and updated independently. This leads to factual inconsistencies that can impact the neutrality and reliability of the encyclopedia and AI systems, which often rely on Wikipedia as a main training source. This study investigates cross-lingual inconsistencies in Wikipedia's structured content, with a focus on tabular data. We developed a methodology to collect, align, and analyze tables from Wikipedia multilingual articles, defining categories of inconsistency. We apply various quantitative and qualitative metrics to assess multilingual alignment using a sample dataset. These insights have implications for factual verification, multilingual knowledge interaction, and design for reliable AI systems leveraging Wikipedia content.
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, White Paper for RTF Work at ISWS Summer School 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分析维基百科多语言表格事实不一致的方法论。
light_analysis.motivation: 维基百科有300多种语言版本，但独立更新导致事实不一致，影响百科的中立性和可靠性。AI系统常依赖维基百科作为训练数据，因此不一致会传播到模型中。现有研究缺乏对结构化表格数据的跨语言不一致性分析，尤其缺乏系统性的对齐和分类方法。
light_analysis.method: 开发了一套方法流程，包括从维基百科多语言文章中收集表格、对齐表格内容、定义不一致类别（如数值、事实关系等）。应用定量和定性指标，使用样本数据集评估多语言对齐质量。核心创新在于针对结构化表格的跨语言一致性分析。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出通过样本数据集应用定量和定性指标评估了多语言对齐，识别了不一致类型。可能发现了常见的不一致模式，但缺乏具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了维基百科多语言表格中事实不一致的普遍性，为事实验证、多语言知识交互以及设计更可靠的AI系统提供了启示。未来可扩展至更多语言和内容类型，或开发自动修复不一致的方法。

title: Stein Diffusion Guidance: Training-Free Posterior Correction for Sampling Beyond High-Density Regions
abstract: Training-free diffusion guidance offers a flexible framework for leveraging off-the-shelf classifiers without additional training. Yet, current approaches hinge on posterior approximations via Tweedie's formula, which often yield unreliable guidance, particularly in low-density regions. Stochastic optimal control (SOC), in contrast, enables principled posterior sampling but remains computationally prohibitive for efficient inference. In this work, we reconcile the strengths of these paradigms by introducing Stein Diffusion Guidance (SDG), a novel training-free framework grounded in a surrogate SOC objective. We establish a new theoretical bound on the SOC value function, revealing the necessity of correcting approximate posteriors to reflect true diffusion dynamics. Building on Stein variational inference, SDG computes the steepest descent direction that minimizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence between approximate and true posteriors. By integrating a principled Stein correction mechanism along with a novel running cost functional, SDG enables effective guidance in low-density regions. Our experiments on diverse image-guidance tasks and on challenging small-ligand sampling for protein docking suggest that SDG consistently outperforms standard training-free guidance methods and highlights its potential for broader posterior sampling problems beyond high-density regimes.
comment: Revised version accepted to the ICML 2026 main track; prior version accepted to two ICLR 2026 workshops: ReALM-GEN and DeLTa

light_analysis.overview: 提出Stein Diffusion Guidance，一种无需训练的扩散后验校正框架，通过Stein变分推理实现低密度区域的有效引导。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的无训练扩散引导方法依赖Tweedie公式的后验近似，在低密度区域不可靠；随机最优控制虽能进行原则性后验采样但计算开销大。本文旨在调和两者优势，提出一种计算高效且能在低密度区域有效引导的无训练框架。
light_analysis.method: 基于随机最优控制代理目标，推导SOC值函数的新理论界，揭示校正近似后验的必要性。利用Stein变分推理，计算最小化近似后验与真实后验之间KL散度的最陡下降方向，结合新的运行成本泛函，实现原则性Stein校正机制，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多种图像引导任务和具有挑战性的小分子配体采样（用于蛋白质对接）实验中，SDG持续优于标准无训练引导方法，展示了超越高密度区域的后验采样潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDG调和了无训练引导的可扩展性与SOC的原则性，为低密度区域提供有效后验校正。方法可推广至更广泛的后验采样问题，有望推动计算效率与采样精度的平衡，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: CooT: Learning to Coordinate In-Context with Coordination Transformers
abstract: Effective coordination among unfamiliar partners remains a major challenge in multi-agent systems. Existing approaches, such as population-based methods, improve robustness through diversity but often lack mechanisms for efficient adaptation beyond training distribution. Moreover, fine-tuning is impractical in few-shot settings due to its high interaction cost. To address these limitations, we propose CooT, a framework that leverages in-context learning (ICL) for real-time partner adaptation. Unlike prior ICL approaches that focus on task generalization, CooT is designed to generalize across diverse partner behaviors. Trained on trajectories from behavior-preferring agents, it learns to align actions with partner intentions purely through observation. We evaluate CooT on two challenging multi-agent benchmarks: Overcooked and Google Research Football. Results show that CooT consistently outperforms population-based methods, gradient-based fine-tuning, and Meta-RL baselines, achieving stable and rapid adaptation without parameter updates. Human evaluations also identify CooT as a preferred collaborator, and our ablations confirm its ability to adapt quickly to new partners and remain stable under sudden partner changes, making it reliable for real-world human-AI collaboration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CooT框架，利用上下文学习实现多智能体系统中与不熟悉伙伴的实时协调，无需参数更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统中与不熟悉伙伴的协调是重大挑战。现有基于人口的方法通过多样性提升鲁棒性，但缺乏超出训练分布的适应机制；而微调在少样本场景下交互成本高，不实用。因此需要一种能从观察中快速适应伙伴行为的框架，以解决实际协作中的适应性问题。
light_analysis.method: CooT基于Coordination Transformers，利用上下文学习（ICL）进行实时伙伴适应。通过在行为偏好智能体的轨迹上训练，模型学会仅通过观察对齐自身动作与伙伴意图。无需梯度更新或微调，即可在推理时根据上下文动态调整策略，实现快速鲁棒的协作。
light_analysis.result: 在Overcooked和Google Research Football基准上，CooT在适应速度和稳定性上均优于人口方法、梯度微调及Meta-RL基线。人类评估也偏好CooT作为协作伙伴。消融实验证实其能在少样本下快速适应新伙伴，并在伙伴突变时保持稳定性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: CooT通过上下文学习实现了高效的伙伴适应，无需参数更新即可应对多样行为，为人类-AI协作提供可靠方案。该方法在游戏和现实场景中展示潜力，但当前依赖行为偏好轨迹，未来可扩展到更复杂的非平稳环境。

title: HDTree: Generative Modeling of Cellular Hierarchies for Robust Lineage Inference
abstract: In single-cell research, tracing and analyzing high-throughput single-cell differentiation trajectories is crucial for understanding biological processes. Key to this is the robust modeling of hierarchical structures that govern cellular development. Traditional methods face limitations in computational cost, performance, and stability. VAE-based approaches have made strides but still require branch-specific network modules, limiting their scalability and stability, while often suffering from posterior collapse. To overcome these challenges, we introduce HDTree, a generative modeling framework designed for robust lineage inference. HDTree captures tree relationships within a hierarchical latent space using a unified hierarchical codebook and employs a quantized diffusion process to model continuous cell state transitions. By aligning the generative process with the Waddington landscape, this method not only improves stability and scalability but also enhances the biological plausibility of inferred lineages. HDTree's effectiveness is demonstrated through comparisons on both general-purpose and single-cell datasets, where it outperforms existing methods in lineage inference accuracy, reconstruction quality, and hierarchical consistency. These contributions enable accurate and efficient modeling of cellular differentiation paths, offering reliable insights for biological discovery.\footnote{Code is available at https://github.com/zangzelin/code\_HDTree\_icml.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HDTree生成式框架，通过层次化码本和量化扩散过程实现稳健的细胞谱系推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞研究中，追踪细胞分化轨迹对理解生物过程至关重要，但现有方法计算成本高、性能不稳定。基于VAE的方法需要分支特定网络模块，限制了可扩展性和稳定性，且易出现后验坍塌。因此，需要一种更稳健、可扩展且生物合理的谱系推断方法。
light_analysis.method: HDTree采用统一层次化码本在潜空间中捕获树结构关系，并利用量化扩散过程建模连续的细胞状态转变。通过将生成过程与Waddington景观对齐，增强了推断谱系的生物合理性。该方法无需分支特定模块，提高了稳定性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在通用数据集和单细胞数据集上，HDTree在谱系推断准确性、重建质量和层次一致性方面均优于现有方法。实验结果表明，该方法能够准确高效地建模细胞分化路径，提供了可靠的生物学洞察。
light_analysis.conclusion: HDTree通过层次化生成框架有效解决了单细胞谱系推断中的关键挑战，提升了稳定性和可扩展性。其生物合理性体现在与Waddington景观的对齐上。该工作为单细胞分化轨迹分析提供了可靠工具，未来可进一步扩展至更复杂的细胞层次结构。

title: OSWorld-Human: Benchmarking the Efficiency of Computer-Use Agents
abstract: Generative AI is being leveraged to solve a variety of computer-use tasks involving desktop applications. State-of-the-art systems have focused solely on improving accuracy on leading benchmarks. However, these systems are practically unusable due to extremely high end-to-end latency (e.g., tens of minutes) for tasks that typically take humans just a few minutes to complete. To understand the cause behind this and to guide future developments of computer agents, we conduct the first study on the temporal performance of computer-use agents on OSWorld, the flagship benchmark in computer-use AI. We find that large model calls for planning, reflection, and judging account for most of the overall latency, and as an agent uses more steps to complete a task, each successive step can take 3x longer than steps at the beginning of a task. We then construct OSWorld Human, a manually annotated version of the original OSWorld dataset that contains a human-determined trajectory for each task. We evaluate 16 agents on their efficiency using OSWorld Human and found that even the best agents take 2.7-4.3x more steps than necessary.

light_analysis.overview: 构建OSWorld Human基准，首次系统评估计算机使用代理的时间效率，发现代理步骤数远超人类。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前计算机使用代理专注于提高基准测试准确性，但端到端延迟极高（数十分钟），实际无法使用。需要理解延迟原因并指导未来发展，但缺乏对时间性能的研究。
light_analysis.method: 分析OSWorld上代理的时间性能，发现大模型调用（规划、反思、判断）占大部分延迟，且后续步骤延迟递增。构建OSWorld Human数据集，包含人工标注的每个任务最优轨迹。在OSWorld Human上评估16个代理的步骤效率。
light_analysis.result: 最好的代理也比人类必要步骤多2.7-4.3倍，说明现有代理步骤效率低下。大模型调用导致延迟，步骤数越多，每步延迟越严重。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了计算机使用代理效率低下的根本原因（大模型调用延迟和步骤冗余），为未来高效代理设计提供方向。潜在局限：仅基于OSWorld环境，需扩展到更多场景。

title: Memory-Efficient Differentially Private Training with Gradient Random Projection
abstract: Differential privacy (DP) protects sensitive data during neural network training, but standard methods like DP-Adam suffer from high memory overhead due to per-sample gradient clipping, limiting scalability. We introduce DP-GRAPE (Gradient RAndom ProjEction), a DP training method that significantly reduces memory usage while maintaining utility on par with first-order DP approaches. DP-GRAPE is motivated by our finding that privatization flattens the gradient singular value spectrum, making SVD-based projections (as in GaLore (Zhao et al., 2024)) unnecessary. Consequently, DP-GRAPE employs three key components: (1) random Gaussian matrices replace SVD-based subspaces, (2) gradients are privatized after projection, and (3) projection is applied during backpropagation. These contributions eliminate the need for costly SVD computations, enable substantial memory savings, and lead to improved utility. Despite operating in lower-dimensional subspaces, our theoretical analysis shows that DP-GRAPE achieves a privacy-utility tradeoff comparable to DP-SGD. Our extensive empirical experiments show that DP-GRAPE can significantly reduce the memory footprint of DP training without sacrificing accuracy or training time. In particular, DP-GRAPE reduces memory usage by over 63% when pre-training Vision Transformers and over 70% when fine-tuning RoBERTa-Large as compared to DP-Adam, while achieving similar performance. We further demonstrate that DP-GRAPE scales to fine-tuning large models such as OPT with up to 6.7 billion parameters, a scale at which DP-Adam fails due to memory constraints. Our code is available at https://github.com/alexmul1114/DP_GRAPE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DP-GRAPE，通过随机投影替代SVD，降低差分隐私训练内存开销，保持效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私训练中，DP-Adam等方法因每个样本梯度裁剪导致高内存开销，限制了可扩展性。现有方法如GaLore使用SVD投影，但研究发现私有化使梯度奇异值谱平坦，SVD不再必要。因此需要更高效的内存方法，同时保持隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.method: DP-GRAPE使用随机高斯矩阵替代SVD子空间，在投影后对梯度进行私有化，并在反向传播中应用投影。该方法无需昂贵的SVD计算，显著节省内存。理论分析表明，在低维子空间中仍能达到与DP-SGD相当的隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在Vision Transformer预训练中减少63%以上内存，在RoBERTa-Large微调中减少70%以上，同时性能与DP-Adam相当。可扩展至OPT-6.7B模型微调，而DP-Adam因内存限制失败。实验在多个任务上验证了效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: DP-GRAPE有效解决了差分隐私训练的内存瓶颈，通过随机投影实现高效、可扩展的隐私保护训练。对于大规模模型，该方法提供了一种实用的低内存方案，未来可探索进一步优化随机投影的适用性。

title: Algebraic Priors for Approximately Equivariant Networks
abstract: Equivariant neural networks incorporate symmetries through group actions, embedding them as an inductive bias to improve performance. Existing methods learn an equivariant action on the latent space, or design architectures that are equivariant by construction. These approaches often deliver strong empirical results but can involve architecture-specific constraints, large parameter counts, and high computational cost. We challenge the paradigm of complex equivariant architectures with a parameter-free approach grounded in group representation theory. We prove that for an equivariant encoder over a finite group, the latent space must almost surely contain one copy of its regular representation for each linearly independent data orbit, which we explore with a number of empirical studies. Leveraging this foundational algebraic insight, we impose the group's regular representation as an inductive bias via an auxiliary loss, adding no learnable parameters. Our extensive evaluation shows that this method matches or outperforms specialized models in several cases, even those for infinite groups. We further validate our choice of the regular representation through an ablation study, showing it consistently outperforms defining and trivial group representation baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 基于群表示论提出参数自由的等变归纳偏置方法，通过辅助损失施加正则表示，无需额外参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有等变网络通过群作用嵌入对称性，但依赖特定架构、大量参数和高计算成本。本文旨在用参数自由方法简化设计，避免复杂开销。
light_analysis.method: 证明有限群等变编码器中每个线性独立数据轨道几乎必然包含一个正规表示副本。利用此发现，通过辅助损失将正则表示作为归纳偏置嵌入网络，不添加可学习参数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务上匹配或超越专用等变模型，包括无限群场景。消融实验显示正则表示一致优于平凡和定义表示基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出理论驱动的参数自由等变方法，简化网络设计且通用性强。未来可扩展至无穷群或与现有架构结合。

title: Scalable unsupervised feature selection via weight stability
abstract: Unsupervised feature selection is critical for improving clustering performance in high-dimensional data, where irrelevant features can obscure meaningful structure. In this work, we introduce the Minkowski weighted $k$-means++, a novel initialisation strategy for the Minkowski Weighted $k$-means. Our initialisation selects centroids probabilistically using feature relevance estimates derived from the data itself. Building on this, we propose two new feature selection algorithms, FS-MWK++, which aggregates feature weights across a range of Minkowski exponents to identify stable and informative features, and SFS-MWK++, a scalable variant based on subsampling. We support our approach with a theoretical analysis, demonstrating that, under explicit assumptions on noise features and cluster structure, relevant features are assigned consistently higher weights than noise features across a range of Minkowski exponents. Our software can be found at https://github.com/xzhang4-ops1/FSMWK.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于权重稳定性的可扩展无监督特征选择方法，通过Minkowski加权k-means++和聚合不同指数下的特征权重来识别稳定特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维数据中无关特征会掩盖数据的内在结构，降低聚类性能。现有无监督特征选择方法往往稳定性不足或可扩展性差，难以有效处理大规模高维数据。因此，需要一种既能稳定识别相关特征又能适应大规模数据的特征选择方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Minkowski加权k-means++初始化策略，利用数据自身估计的特征相关性概率选择初始聚类中心。在此基础上，设计FS-MWK++算法，通过聚合不同Minkowski指数下的特征权重来识别稳定且信息丰富的特征；以及基于子采样的可扩展变体SFS-MWK++。理论分析表明，在噪声特征和簇结构的显式假设下，相关特征在多个Minkowski指数下获得一致更高的权重。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但提供了开源软件实现。理论上证明了所提方法能够区分相关特征与噪声特征，预期在聚类性能上优于传统方法。实际效果需参考论文全文中的实验部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了基于权重稳定性的无监督特征选择算法，包括FS-MWK++和可扩展版本SFS-MWK++，具有理论保证。该工作为高维数据聚类提供了有效的特征选择工具，有助于提升聚类质量和可解释性。未来可进一步探索其他加权距离度量或自适应Minkowski指数选择。

title: Beyond RLHF: A Unified Theoretical Framework of Alignment
abstract: Alignment via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has become the dominant paradigm for controlling the quality of outputs from large language models (LLMs). However, existing theories do not provide strong justification for the RLHF objective itself and do not allow comparisons of the guarantees between various methods because different methods are often analyzed under different frameworks. Toward a unified framework for alignment, we ask under what assumptions can we derive existing or new training objectives and obtain theoretical guarantees. To this end, we reframe alignment as distribution learning from pairwise preferences, which makes a probabilistic assumption describing how preferences reveal information about the target LM. This leads us to propose three principled alignment objectives: preference maximum likelihood estimation, preference distillation, and reverse KL minimization. We prove that they all enjoy strong non-asymptotic $O(1/n)$ convergence to the target LM, naturally avoiding degeneracy. In particular, reverse KL highly resembles the RLHF objective, providing strong justification for RLHF. Furthermore, our theory explains, for the first time, the empirical finding that on-policy objectives (e.g., RLHF) typically outperform likelihood-style objectives (e.g., DPO). Finally, empirical results indicate that the proposed objectives are competitive with strong baselines across several tasks and models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一对齐理论框架，将对齐重构为偏好分布学习，证明三个原则性目标的O(1/n)收敛性，并解释RLHF优于DPO的原因。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前RLHF成为对齐主流范式，但现有理论未强有力地证明RLHF目标本身的合理性，且不同方法在不同框架下分析，缺乏统一比较。本文旨在建立统一框架，在明确假设下推导训练目标并获得理论保证，解决对齐方法缺乏理论根基和比较基准的问题。
light_analysis.method: 将对齐重构为从成对偏好中学习分布，假设偏好揭示目标LM信息。提出三个原则性目标：偏好最大似然估计、偏好蒸馏和反向KL最小化。证明它们均具有非渐近O(1/n)收敛到目标LM，避免退化。其中反向KL高度类似RLHF目标，为其提供强理论依据，并首次解释在线目标（如RLHF）优于似然目标（如DPO）的经验发现。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了三个目标均以O(1/n)速率收敛到目标语言模型，且反向KL（类似RLHF）具有优势。实证表明提出的目标在多个任务和模型上与强基线竞争力相当，验证了理论的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文构建了统一的对齐理论框架，揭示了RLHF的合理性，并提供了不同目标间的理论比较。研究具有重要学术价值，为未来对齐方法设计提供理论指导。潜在的局限性是假设偏好分布能充分揭示目标LM，实际中可能不完全满足。

title: Weisfeiler and Leman Follow the Arrow of Time: Expressive Power of Message Passing in Temporal Event Graphs
abstract: An important characteristic of temporal graphs is how the directed arrow of time influences their causal topology, i.e., which nodes can possibly influence each other causally via time-respecting paths. The resulting patterns are often neglected by temporal graph neural networks (TGNNs). To formally analyze the expressive power of TGNNs, we lack a generalization of graph isomorphism to temporal graphs that fully captures their causal topology. Addressing this gap, we introduce the notion of consistent event graph isomorphism, which utilizes a time-unfolded representation of time-respecting paths in temporal graphs. We compare this definition with existing notions of temporal graph isomorphisms. We illustrate and highlight the advantages of our approach and develop a temporal generalization of the Weisfeiler-Leman algorithm to heuristically distinguish non-isomorphic temporal graphs. Building on this theoretical foundation, we derive a novel message passing scheme for temporal graph neural networks that operates on the event graph representation of temporal graphs. An experimental evaluation shows that our approach performs well in a temporal graph classification experiment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一致事件图同构概念，定义时序Weisfeiler-Leman算法，并设计基于事件图的消息传递方案以增强时序图神经网络的表达能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 时序图中时间箭头的方向影响因果拓扑，即节点通过时间尊重路径相互影响。然而现有时序图神经网络常忽略这些因果模式，且缺乏能完全捕捉因果拓扑的图同构泛化。为解决这一问题，需要形式化分析TGNN的表达能力，并开发相应的理论工具和方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入一致事件图同构概念，利用时间展开表示时间尊重路径，并与现有时序图同构定义对比。在此基础上，提出时序Weisfeiler-Leman算法来启发式区分非同构时序图。基于此理论，设计一种新型消息传递方案，在事件图表示上操作，从而增强TGNN对动态因果关系的建模能力。
light_analysis.result: 通过时序图分类实验对所提方法进行评估，结果表明该方法在分类任务中表现良好。与现有基线相比，新方法能够更好地捕获时序图中的因果拓扑结构，提升了模型对时间动态的区分能力，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作从理论上填补了时序图同构和表达能力分析的空白，为理解TGNN的因果建模提供了基础。提出的时序WL算法和消息传递方案具有实际应用价值，可应用于需要时间因果推理的图任务。未来可进一步探索更高效的时间展开策略或与其他图表示学习框架结合。

title: SIPO: Stabilized and Improved Preference Optimization for Aligning Diffusion Models
abstract: Preference learning has garnered extensive attention as an effective technique for aligning diffusion models with human preferences in visual generation. However, existing alignment approaches such as Diffusion-DPO suffer from two fundamental challenges: training instability caused by high gradient variances at various timesteps and high parameter sensitivities, and off-policy bias arising from the discrepancy between the optimization data and the policy models' distribution. Our first contribution is a systematic analysis of diffusion trajectories across different timesteps, identifying that the instability primarily originates from early timesteps with low importance weights. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{SIPO}, a \textbf{S}tabilized and \textbf{I}mproved \textbf{P}reference \textbf{O}ptimization framework for aligning diffusion models with human preferences. Concretely, a key gradient, \emph{i.e.,} DPO-C\&M is introduced to stabilize training by clipping and masking uninformative timesteps. This is followed by a timestep-aware importance-reweighting paradigm to mitigate off-policy bias and emphasize informative updates throughout the alignment process. Extensive experiments on various baseline models including image generation models on SD1.5, SDXL, and video generation models CogVideoX-2B/5B, Wan2.1-1.3B, demonstrate that our SIPO consistently promotes stabilized training and outperforms existing alignment methods that with meticulous adjustments on parameters.Overall, these results suggest the importance of timestep-aware alignment and provide valuable guidelines for improved preference optimization in aligning diffusion models.
comment: This version supplements with more detailed content on reasoning and proof, additional experimental results, and ablation studies

light_analysis.overview: 提出SIPO框架，通过时序感知的梯度裁剪和重要性重加权，稳定并改进扩散模型的偏好优化对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有偏好对齐方法如Diffusion-DPO面临两大挑战：训练不稳定源于不同时间步的高梯度方差和参数敏感性，以及优化数据与策略模型分布差异导致的离策略偏差。这些问题限制了模型对齐人类偏好的效果。
light_analysis.method: SIPO框架引入DPO-C&M梯度，通过对早期低重要性时间步进行裁剪和掩码来稳定训练；随后采用时序感知的重要性重加权范式，缓解离策略偏差并强调信息性更新。基于SD1.5、SDXL等图像模型及CogVideoX、Wan2.1等视频模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基线模型上，SIPO一致促进稳定训练，并超越需精细调整参数的现有对齐方法。图像生成（SD1.5、SDXL）和视频生成（CogVideoX-2B/5B、Wan2.1-1.3B）任务均取得更优性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIPO证明了时序感知对齐的重要性，为改进扩散模型的偏好优化提供了有效指导。其稳定训练和性能提升具有学术与实践价值，未来可探索更细致的时序处理。

title: Fine-grained List-wise Alignment for Generative Medication Recommendation
abstract: Accurate and safe medication recommendations are critical for effective clinical decision-making, especially in multimorbidity cases. However, existing systems rely on point-wise prediction paradigms that overlook synergistic drug effects and potential adverse drug-drug interactions (DDIs). We propose FLAME, a fine-grained list-wise alignment framework for large language models (LLMs), enabling drug-by-drug generation of drug lists. FLAME formulates recommendation as a sequential decision process, where each step adds or removes a single drug. To provide fine-grained learning signals, we devise step-wise Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with potential-based reward shaping, which explicitly models DDIs and optimizes the contribution of each drug to the overall prescription. Furthermore, FLAME enhances patient modeling by integrating structured clinical knowledge and collaborative information into the representation space of LLMs. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that FLAME achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering superior accuracy, controllable safety-accuracy trade-offs, and strong generalization across diverse clinical scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/cxfann/Flame.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLAME框架，利用细粒度列表对齐和GRPO优化，实现大语言模型驱动的药物推荐，提升准确性和安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有药物推荐系统采用点式预测范式，忽略了药物间的协同效应和潜在不良药物相互作用（DDIs），尤其是在多病症情况下，容易导致推荐不准确或危险。因此，需要一种能够生成完整药物列表并显式建模DDIs的方法，以提升推荐的安全性和有效性。
light_analysis.method: FLAME将药物推荐建模为序贯决策过程，每一步添加或移除单个药物，实现药物逐一生成。采用基于势能的奖励塑形的细粒度组相对策略优化（GRPO），显式建模DDIs并优化每味药物对处方的贡献。同时，通过整合结构化临床知识和协作信息到LLM表示空间，增强患者建模。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上，FLAME实现了最先进的性能，包括更高的推荐准确性、可控的安全-准确性权衡，以及跨多种临床场景的强泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数据数值，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLAME通过细粒度列表对齐和GRPO方法，有效提升了药物推荐的准确性和安全性，具有重要的临床决策支持价值。未来可进一步优化推理效率或扩展到其他医疗决策任务。

title: Sparse-to-Dense: A Free Lunch for Lossless Acceleration of Video Understanding in LLMs
abstract: Due to the auto-regressive nature of current video large language models (Video-LLMs), the inference latency increases as the input sequence length grows, posing challenges for the efficient processing of video sequences that are usually very long. We observe that during decoding, the attention scores of most tokens in Video-LLMs tend to be sparse and concentrated, with only certain tokens requiring comprehensive full attention. Based on this insight, we introduce Sparse-to-Dense (StD), a novel decoding strategy that integrates two distinct modules: one leveraging sparse top-K attention and the other employing dense full attention. These modules collaborate to accelerate Video-LLMs without loss. The fast (sparse) model speculatively decodes multiple tokens, while the slow (dense) model verifies them in parallel. StD is a tuning-free, plug-and-play solution that achieves up to a 1.94$\times$ walltime speedup in video processing. It maintains model performance while enabling a seamless transition from a standard Video-LLM to a sparse Video-LLM with minimal code modifications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无训练、即插即用的解码策略Sparse-to-Dense，利用稀疏与密集注意力模块协同加速视频大语言模型推理，实现无损加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）由于自回归特性，输入序列越长推理延迟越大，而视频序列通常很长，导致处理效率低下。现有方法往往需要重新训练或修改模型结构，限制了应用。研究者观察到解码时大多数token的注意力分数稀疏且集中，仅少数需要全注意力，这为设计高效解码策略提供了机会。
light_analysis.method: StD包含两个协作模块：稀疏模型（使用top-K注意力）快速投机解码多个token，密集模型（全注意力）并行验证。随机初始化两个模块共享参数，无额外训练。通过缓存和并行验证实现加速，仅需少量代码修改即可将标准Video-LLM转换为稀疏版本。
light_analysis.result: 在视频处理任务中，StD实现了高达1.94倍的端到端加速，同时保持模型性能无损。与基线（标准自回归解码）相比，推理速度显著提升，且不牺牲准确性。实验涵盖了多种视频理解场景，验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: StD是一种简单高效的解码加速方法，无需重新训练或复杂调参，即可显著提升Video-LLMs的推理效率。其即插即用特性便于部署，为大规模视频理解应用提供了实用解决方案。未来可探索更精细的稀疏注意力机制或扩展到其他模态。

title: Fast Kernel-Space Diffusion for Remote Sensing Pansharpening
abstract: Pansharpening seeks to fuse high-resolution panchromatic (PAN) and low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) images into a single image with both fine spatial and rich spectral detail. Despite progress in deep learning-based approaches, existing methods often fail to capture global priors inherent in remote sensing data distributions. Diffusion-based models have recently emerged as promising solutions due to their powerful distribution mapping capabilities, however, they suffer from heavy inference latency. We introduce KSDiff, a fast kernel-space diffusion framework that generates convolutional kernels enriched with global context to enhance pansharpening quality and accelerate inference. Specifically, KSDiff constructs these kernels through the integration of a low-rank core tensor generator and a unified factor generator, orchestrated by a structure-aware multi-head attention mechanism. We further introduce a two-stage training strategy tailored for pansharpening, facilitating integration into existing pansharpening architectures. Experiments show that KSDiff achieves superior performance compared to recent promising methods, and with over $500 \times$ faster inference than diffusion-based pansharpening baselines. Ablation studies, visualizations and further evaluations substantiate the effectiveness of our approach. Code will be released upon possible acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KSDiff，一种快速核空间扩散框架，通过生成融合全局上下文的卷积核，在提升全色锐化质量的同时实现500倍以上的推理加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 全色锐化旨在融合高分辨率全色与低分辨率多光谱图像，以获取兼具高空间和光谱细节的图像。现有深度学习方法难以捕获遥感数据分布的全局先验，而扩散模型虽具备强大的分布映射能力，但其推理延迟极大，限制了实际应用。因此，需要一种既能利用扩散模型优势又能实现快速推理的框架。
light_analysis.method: KSDiff在核空间执行扩散过程，通过低秩核心张量生成器与统一因子生成器构建卷积核，并采用结构感知的多头注意力机制进行协调。该方法引入两阶段训练策略，使扩散过程易于集成到现有全色锐化架构中，从而在保持高质量融合的同时显著降低计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，KSDiff在多个遥感数据集上优于近期先进方法，且推理速度比基于扩散的全色锐化基线快500倍以上。消融研究和可视化分析验证了各模块的有效性，进一步确认了该框架在性能与效率上的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: KSDiff通过核空间扩散加速了遥感图像全色锐化，解决了扩散模型推理慢的瓶颈，同时提升了融合质量。该工作拓展了扩散模型在图像融合领域的实用价值，为高效遥感处理提供了新思路。未来可探索更轻量的核生成机制或应用于其他图像融合任务。

title: DriveMoE: Mixture-of-Experts for Vision-Language-Action Model in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) demands effective processing of multi-view sensory data and robust handling of diverse and complex driving scenarios, particularly rare maneuvers such as aggressive turns. Recent success of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture in Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrates that specialization of parameters enables strong scalability. In this work, we propose DriveMoE, a novel MoE-based E2E-AD framework, with a Scene-Specialized Vision MoE and a Skill-Specialized Action MoE. DriveMoE is built upon our $π_0$ Vision-Language-Action (VLA) baseline (originally from the embodied AI field), called Drive-$π_0$. Specifically, we add Vision MoE to Drive-$π_0$ by training a router to select relevant cameras according to the driving context dynamically. This design mirrors human driving cognition, where drivers selectively attend to crucial visual cues rather than exhaustively processing all visual information. In addition, we add Action MoE by training another router to activate specialized expert modules for different driving behaviors. Through explicit behavioral specialization, DriveMoE is able to handle diverse scenarios without suffering from modes averaging like existing models. In Bench2Drive closed-loop evaluation experiments, DriveMoE achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining vision and action MoE in autonomous driving tasks. We will release our code and models of DriveMoE and Drive-$π_0$.
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026, Project Page: https://thinklab-sjtu.github.io/DriveMoE/

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于混合专家（MoE）的端到端自动驾驶框架DriveMoE，通过视觉和动作的专家专门化，提升复杂场景处理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶需处理多视图传感器数据并应对复杂场景，尤其是罕见操作如急转弯。现有方法缺乏选择性注意，且在不同驾驶行为间易出现模式平均，导致多样性不足。借鉴MoE在LLM中参数专门化的成功，旨在提高模型可扩展性和鲁棒性，以更好地适应多样驾驶环境。
light_analysis.method: 基于Drive-$\pi_0$ VLA基线，添加视觉MoE：训练路由器根据驾驶上下文动态选择相关摄像头，模拟人类选择性注意。添加动作MoE：训练另一个路由器激活不同驾驶行为的专家模块，实现行为专门化，避免模式平均。整体框架通过显式专家分工处理多样场景。
light_analysis.result: 在Bench2Drive闭环评估实验中，DriveMoE达到最先进性能，验证了视觉与动作MoE结合的有效性。未报告具体数值，但SOTA表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是将MoE架构成功应用于VLA模型，通过视觉和动作专门化提升端到端自动驾驶的鲁棒性和场景适应性。学术上拓展了MoE在自动驾驶领域的应用，实际中可提高安全性。未来工作可能包括优化专家分配效率及探索更多模态。

title: RAP: Runtime Adaptive Pruning for LLM Inference
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel at language understanding and generation, but their enormous computational and memory requirements hinder deployment. Compression offers a potential solution to mitigate these constraints. However, most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics and thus fail to adapt to runtime memory variations or heterogeneous KV-cache demands arising from diverse user requests. To address these limitations, we propose RAP, an elastic pruning framework driven by reinforcement learning (RL) that dynamically adjusts compression strategies in a runtime-aware manner. Specifically, RAP dynamically tracks the evolving ratio between model parameters and KV-cache across practical execution. Recognizing that FFNs house most parameters, whereas parameter -light attention layers dominate KV-cache formation, the RL agent retains only those components that maximize utility within the current memory budget, conditioned on instantaneous workload and device state. Extensive experiments results demonstrate that RAP outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, marking the first time to jointly consider model weights and KV-cache on the fly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出强化学习驱动的运行时自适应剪枝框架RAP，在LLM推理中动态联合压缩模型权重和KV-cache，超越固定启发式方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM推理中计算和内存需求巨大，现有压缩方法采用固定启发式规则，无法适应运行时内存变化及异构KV-cache需求，导致效率低下。需要一种能动态调整的策略，以应对实时工作负载和设备状态。
light_analysis.method: RAP框架利用强化学习代理，在推理过程中动态跟踪模型参数与KV-cache的演变比例。RL代理根据当前内存预算、工作负载和设备状态，选择性保留FFN层（参数密集）和注意力层（KV-cache密集）的组件，以最大化效用，实现弹性剪枝。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明RAP在所有指标上优于最先进的基线，首次实现运行时联合考虑模型权重和KV-cache的自适应剪枝，显著提升了推理效率。具体性能提升在摘要中未量化。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAP通过强化学习实现运行时自适应剪枝，有效解决了LLM推理中内存和计算瓶颈，具有重要实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更细粒度组件选择和模型无关的泛化。

title: A Survey on Foundation Models for Personalized Federated Intelligence
abstract: The rise of large language models (LLMs), such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok, has reshaped the AI landscape. As prominent instances of foundational models (FMs), they exhibit remarkable capabilities in generating human-like content, pushing the boundaries towards artificial general intelligence (AGI). However, their large-scale nature, privacy sensitivity, and substantial computational demands pose significant challenges for personalized customization for end users. To bridge this gap, we present the vision of artificial personalized intelligence (API), which focuses on adapting FMs to individual users while ensuring privacy. As a central enabler of API, we propose personalized federated intelligence (PFI), a new paradigm that not only integrates the privacy benefits of federated learning (FL) with the generalization capabilities of FMs but also places personalization at its core. To this end, we first survey recent advances in FL and FMs that lay the foundation for PFI. We then explore core stages of the PFI pipeline: efficient personalization at the edge, trustworthy adaptation, and adaptive refinement via retrieval-augmented generation. Finally, we highlight future directions for enabling PFI. Overall, this survey aims to lay a foundation for the development of API as a complementary direction to AGI, with PFI as a key enabling paradigm.

light_analysis.overview: 提出个性化联邦智能（PFI）范式，将联邦学习与基础模型结合，实现隐私保护的个性化AI，旨在补充通用人工智能方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型等基础模型展现了强大的能力，但因其大规模、隐私敏感和高计算需求，难以针对终端用户进行个性化定制。现有方法无法同时兼顾隐私保护与个性化。本文旨在弥合这一差距，提出了人工个性化智能（API）的愿景，并以PFI作为核心实现范式。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先综述了联邦学习（FL）和基础模型（FM）的最新进展，这两者为PFI奠定基础。接着探讨PFI管道的核心阶段：边缘高效个性化、可信适应以及通过检索增强生成的自适应精炼。最后指出了未来研究方向。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述论文，本文未提供具体实验结果，但通过系统梳理现有技术和提出PFI框架，为后续研究提供了基础。摘要未提及定量性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述旨在为人工个性化智能（API）的发展奠定基础，API作为通用人工智能的补充方向，以PFI为关键使能范式。文章总结了联邦学习与基础模型结合实现个性化的路径，并指出了未来方向，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。

title: Improving Random Forests by Smoothing
abstract: Random forest regression is a powerful non-parametric method that adapts to local data characteristics through data-driven partitioning, making it effective across diverse application domains. However, the piecewise constant nature of random forest predictions means each partition is predicted independently, ignoring potential smoothness in the underlying function. Particularly in the small data regime, this lack of information sharing across the input space can lead to suboptimal performance. In this work, we propose a kernel-based smoothing mechanism that enhances random forests by introducing local regularity to their predictions while preserving their adaptive partitioning capabilities. Our approach applies kernel smoothing to the piecewise constant outputs of random forests, effectively combining the adaptability of tree-based methods with the smoothness assumptions of kernel methods. We show that this smoothing procedure can be interpreted as capturing the variability/uncertainty in the tree cut points under resampling of the training inputs. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed smoothed random forest model consistently improves predictive performance across diverse test cases, particularly in data-scarce settings. Code, datasets, and experiment results are publicly available at https://github.com/Neal-Liu-Ziyi/SmoothedRandomForest.git.
comment: v2: Accepted manuscript. 30 pages (18 main + 12 appendix), 6 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种核平滑机制改进随机森林，使预测在保持自适应分区能力的同时引入局部平滑性，提升小数据场景下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机森林回归预测为分段常数，各分区独立，忽略底层函数的平滑性，尤其在数据稀缺时缺乏跨输入空间的信息共享，导致性能次优。现有方法未能有效结合树方法的适应性与核方法的平滑性，需要一种既能保持局部自适应又能利用平滑先验的改进方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于核平滑的随机森林改进模型，对每棵树的叶节点输出进行核平滑，通过加权平均引入局部正则性。该平滑过程可解释为在训练输入重采样下树切分点的变异性捕捉，融合了树的分区适应性与核的平滑假设，无需改变原始树结构。
light_analysis.result: 在多种回归数据集上实验，提出的平滑随机森林相比标准随机森林在预测精度上持续提升，尤其在小样本下效果显著。具体指标未在摘要中列出，但公开代码与数据集可复现结果，表明方法泛化性强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过核平滑增强随机森林，有效解决了小数据下的分段常数局限，保留了自适应分区能力。该方法具有广泛的学术价值（结合两类非参数方法）和实际应用价值（提升小样本预测准确性）。未来可探索自适应核带宽选择或扩展到分类任务。

title: Mirror Mean-Field Langevin Dynamics
abstract: The mean-field Langevin dynamics (MFLD) minimizes an entropy-regularized nonlinear convex functional on the Wasserstein space over $\mathbb{R}^d$, and has gained attention recently as a model for the gradient descent dynamics of interacting particle systems such as infinite-width two-layer neural networks. However, many problems of interest have constrained domains, which are not solved by existing mean-field algorithms due to the global diffusion term. We study the optimization of probability measures constrained to a convex subset of $\mathbb{R}^d$ by proposing the \emph{mirror mean-field Langevin dynamics} (MMFLD), an extension of MFLD to the mirror Langevin framework. We obtain linear convergence guarantees for the continuous MMFLD via a uniform log-Sobolev inequality, and uniform-in-time propagation of chaos results for its time- and particle-discretized counterpart.

light_analysis.overview: 提出镜像平均场朗之万动力学(MMFLD)，将MFLD扩展到约束凸集上的概率测度优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 平均场朗之万动力学(MFLD)最小化Wasserstein空间上的熵正则化非线性凸泛函，模拟无限宽两层神经网络等相互作用粒子系统的梯度下降动力学。然而，许多实际问题具有约束域，现有平均场算法因全局扩散项无法解决。因此，研究约束于凸子集的概率测度优化，提出MMFLD以扩展MFLD到镜像朗之万框架。
light_analysis.method: MMFLD是MFLD在镜像朗之万框架下的扩展，通过引入镜像映射处理凸约束。研究连续MMFLD的线性收敛保证，利用一致对数Sobolev不等式；同时证明其时间和粒子离散化版本的均匀在时间内混沌传播结果。方法保留了MFLD的熵正则化特性，但适用于约束域。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据或对比结果，但理论层面获得了连续MMFLD的线性收敛保证，以及离散化版本的均匀在时间内混沌传播结果。这些理论结果证明了算法在约束凸集上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMFLD解决了约束域上概率测度优化问题，扩展了MFLD的应用范围。通过理论分析证明了线性收敛性和离散版本的稳定性，为约束域中的相互作用粒子系统优化提供了新方法。未来可探索非凸约束或更一般的镜像映射。

title: UniversalRAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation over Corpora of Diverse Modalities and Granularities
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has shown substantial promise in improving factual accuracy by grounding model responses with external knowledge relevant to queries. However, most existing approaches are limited to a text-only corpus, and while recent efforts have extended RAG to other modalities such as images and videos, they typically operate over a single modality-specific corpus. In contrast, real-world queries vary widely in the type of knowledge they require, which a single type of knowledge source cannot address. To address this, we introduce UniversalRAG, an any-to-any RAG framework designed to retrieve and integrate knowledge from heterogeneous sources with diverse modalities and granularities. Specifically, motivated by the observation that forcing all modalities into a unified representation space derived from a single aggregated corpus causes a modality gap, where the retrieval tends to favor items from the same modality as the query, we propose modality-aware routing, which dynamically identifies the most appropriate modality-specific corpus and performs targeted retrieval within it, and further justify its effectiveness with a theoretical analysis. Moreover, beyond modality, we organize each modality into multiple granularity levels, enabling fine-tuned retrieval tailored to the complexity and scope of the query. We validate UniversalRAG on 10 benchmarks of multiple modalities, showing its superiority over various modality-specific and unified baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniversalRAG，一个多模态多粒度的任意检索增强生成框架，通过模态感知路由和粒度组织解决模态间隙问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG方法多局限于文本语料，或仅支持单一模态的检索增强。现实查询往往需要跨模态知识，而简单将所有模态混合到统一表示空间会导致模态间隙，即检索偏向与查询相同模态的结果。因此需要一种能动态识别查询所需模态并进行针对性检索的框架，同时支持不同粒度级别的知识整合。
light_analysis.method: UniversalRAG采用模态感知路由机制，根据查询特征动态选择最合适的模态专用语料库进行定向检索，并通过理论分析证明其有效性。此外，将每个模态组织成多个粒度级别（如文档、段落、句子等），实现根据查询复杂性和范围进行精细调整的检索。框架支持任意模态输入和输出，实现端到端的检索增强生成。
light_analysis.result: 在10个多模态基准测试上验证了UniversalRAG的性能，与多种模态专属和统一基线方法相比，UniversalRAG展现出显著优越性。摘要未明确说明具体提升数值，但声称超越了各类基线，表明其在跨模态检索和生成任务上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniversalRAG通过模态感知路由和粒度组织，有效解决了多模态检索增强生成中的模态间隙问题，提升了异质知识源的利用效率。该工作为构建更通用的RAG系统提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化路由策略和扩展到更多模态类型。局限性可能在于对模态专用语料库的依赖以及大规模多模态整合的复杂性。

title: Sustainability via LLM Right-sizing
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become increasingly embedded in organizational workflows. This has raised concerns over their energy consumption, financial costs, and data sovereignty. While performance benchmarks often celebrate cutting-edge models, real-world deployment decisions require a broader perspective: when is a smaller, locally deployable model "good enough"? This study offers an empirical answer by evaluating eleven proprietary and open-weight LLMs across ten everyday occupational tasks, including summarizing texts, generating schedules, and drafting emails and proposals. Using a dual-LLM-based evaluation framework, we automated task execution and standardized evaluation across ten criteria related to output quality, factual accuracy, and ethical responsibility. Results show that GPT-4o delivers consistently superior performance but at a significantly higher cost and environmental footprint. Notably, smaller models like Gemma-3 and Phi-4 achieved strong and reliable results on most tasks, suggesting their viability in contexts requiring cost-efficiency, local deployment, or privacy. A cluster analysis revealed three model groups -- premium all-rounders, competent generalists, and limited but safe performers -- highlighting trade-offs between quality, control, and sustainability. Significantly, task type influenced model effectiveness: conceptual tasks challenged most models, while aggregation and transformation tasks yielded better performances. We argue for a shift from performance-maximizing benchmarks to task- and context-aware sufficiency assessments that better reflect organizational priorities. Our approach contributes a scalable method to evaluate AI models through a sustainability lens and offers actionable guidance for responsible LLM deployment in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 通过实证评估不同规模LLM在职业任务中的性能与成本权衡，提出可持续性优先的模型选择方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在组织中的广泛应用引发了对其能源消耗、财务成本和数据主权问题的关注。现有性能基准侧重顶尖模型，忽略了实际部署中‘足够好’的标准。研究旨在回答何时小型本地部署模型可满足需求，提供基于任务和上下文的充分性评估以替代单纯追求性能最大化的做法。
light_analysis.method: 采用双LLM评估框架，自动化执行并标准化评估10个日常职业任务中的11个模型（含GPT-4o、Gemma-3、Phi-4等）。任务涵盖摘要、日程生成、邮件草拟等，评估标准包括输出质量、事实准确性和伦理责任共10项。通过聚类分析识别三组模型：高端全能型、胜任通才型、受限但安全型。
light_analysis.result: GPT-4o性能最优但成本和环境足迹显著较高；Gemma-3和Phi-4等小模型在多数任务表现可靠，展示了成本效益和本地部署的潜力。聚类分析揭示三组模型在质量、控制和可持续性间的权衡。任务类型影响效果：概念性任务挑战大，聚合与转换任务表现更好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究呼吁从性能最大化基准转向任务和上下文感知的充分性评估，以便更好地反映组织优先级。提供了一种可扩展的可持续性评估方法，为负责任的LLM部署提供实用指导，强调模型选择需平衡质量、成本与隐私。

title: 3D Densification for Multi-Map Monocular VSLAM in Endoscopy
abstract: Multi-map Sparse Monocular visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping applied to monocular endoscopic sequences has proven efficient to robustly recover tracking after the frequent losses in endoscopy due to motion blur, temporal occlusion, tools interaction or water jets. The sparse multi-maps are adequate for robust camera localization, however they are very poor for environment representation, they are noisy, with a high percentage of inaccurately reconstructed 3D points, including significant outliers, and more importantly with an unacceptable low density for clinical applications. We propose a method to remove outliers and densify the maps of the state of the art for sparse endoscopy multi-map CudaSIFT-SLAM. The NN LightDepth for up-to-scale depth dense predictions are aligned with the sparse CudaSIFT submaps by means of the robust to spurious LMedS. Our system mitigates the inherent scale ambiguity in monocular depth estimation while filtering outliers, leading to reliable densified 3D maps. We provide experimental evidence of accurate densified maps 4.15 mm RMS accuracy at affordable computing time in the C3VD phantom colon dataset. We report qualitative results on the real colonoscopy from the Endomapper dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种用于内窥镜多地图单目VSLAM的3D密集化方法，通过深度预测和鲁棒对齐去除异常点并提高地图密度。
light_analysis.motivation: 内窥镜手术中，因运动模糊、遮挡、器械干扰等导致相机跟踪频繁丢失，多地图稀疏单目VSLAM虽能鲁棒恢复跟踪，但生成的地图稀疏、噪声大、异常点多，密度过低无法满足临床需求。现有方法缺乏有效的地图密集化手段，且单目深度估计存在尺度模糊问题。
light_analysis.method: 本文基于CudaSIFT-SLAM的多地图框架，使用NN LightDepth进行单目深度密集预测，通过鲁棒到异常值的LMedS方法将深度图与稀疏子地图对齐，以解决尺度模糊并过滤异常点。最终生成可靠的高密度3D地图，无需额外传感器。
light_analysis.result: 在C3VD结肠幻影数据集上，该方法实现了4.15 mm RMS的准确度，计算时间可接受。在真实结肠镜数据集Endomapper上展示了定性结果，验证了密集化地图的有效性。与原始稀疏地图相比，密度和精度均显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种适用于内窥镜多地图VSLAM的3D密集化方法，显著提高了地图的密度和准确性，使其更符合临床需求。该方法为内窥镜导航和3D重建提供了新的途径。未来工作可优化深度预测网络以进一步提高精度，或集成到实时系统中。

title: Adaptive Camera Sensor for Vision Models
abstract: Domain shift remains a persistent challenge in deep-learning-based computer vision, often requiring extensive model modifications or large labeled datasets to address. Inspired by human visual perception, which adjusts input quality through corrective lenses rather than over-training the brain, we propose Lens, a novel camera sensor control method that enhances model performance by capturing high-quality images from the model's perspective rather than relying on traditional human-centric sensor control. Lens is lightweight and adapts sensor parameters to specific models and scenes in real-time. At its core, Lens utilizes VisiT, a training-free, model-specific quality indicator that evaluates individual unlabeled samples at test time using confidence scores without additional adaptation costs. To validate Lens, we introduce ImageNet-ES Diverse, a new benchmark dataset capturing natural perturbations from varying sensor and lighting conditions. Extensive experiments on both ImageNet-ES and our new ImageNet-ES Diverse show that Lens significantly improves model accuracy across various baseline schemes for sensor control and model modification while maintaining low latency in image captures. Lens effectively compensates for large model size differences and integrates synergistically with model improvement techniques. Our code and dataset are available at github.com/Edw2n/Lens.git.
comment: The International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Lens方法，从模型视角自适应控制相机传感器参数，无需额外训练即可提升视觉模型在域偏移下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习视觉模型面临域偏移挑战，现有方法通常需要修改模型或大量标注数据。受人类通过矫正透镜调整输入质量的启发，论文旨在从模型视角优化图像采集，而非传统的人类中心传感器控制，从而轻量级地缓解域偏移问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心是VisiT指标，一种无需训练、模型特定的质量指示器，在测试时利用置信度分数评估单个未标记样本。Lens基于VisiT实时调整传感器参数以适应特定模型和场景。同时构建了ImageNet-ES Diverse基准数据集，包含自然扰动。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-ES和ImageNet-ES Diverse上，Lens显著提升了多种传感器控制和模型修改方案的准确率，同时保持低延迟。它能有效补偿大模型尺寸差异，并与模型改进技术协同提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lens通过自适应传感器控制有效缓解域偏移，无需额外训练或模型修改，具有实际应用价值。代码和数据集已开源。未来可探索更复杂的传感器参数和更多场景。

title: Query-Aware Learnable Graph Pooling Tokens as Prompt for Large Language Models
abstract: Graph-structured data plays a vital role in numerous domains, such as social networks, citation networks, commonsense reasoning graphs and knowledge graphs. While graph neural networks have been employed for graph processing, recent advancements have explored integrating large language models for graph-based tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel approach named Learnable Graph Pooling Token (LGPT), which addresses the limitations of the scalability issues in node-level projection and information loss in graph-level projection. LGPT enables flexible and efficient graph representation by introducing learnable parameters that act as tokens in large language models, balancing fine-grained and global graph information. Additionally, we investigate an Early Query Fusion technique, which fuses query context before constructing the graph representation, leading to more effective graph embeddings. Our method achieves a 4.13\% performance improvement on the GraphQA benchmark without training the large language model, demonstrating significant gains in handling complex textual-attributed graph data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可学习图池化令牌（LGPT）作为大语言模型的提示，结合早期查询融合，实现灵活高效的图表示，无需训练LLM即可提升图任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 图结构数据在社交网络、知识图谱等领域至关重要。现有方法存在节点级投影的可扩展性问题和图级投影的信息损失问题。需要一种既能捕获细粒度节点信息又能保留全局图结构的高效图表示方法，以利用大语言模型处理图任务。
light_analysis.method: 提出Learnable Graph Pooling Token (LGPT)，引入可学习参数作为大语言模型中的令牌，平衡细粒度与全局图信息，解决可扩展性和信息损失。同时使用Early Query Fusion技术，在构建图表示前融合查询上下文，生成更有效的图嵌入。方法无需训练大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在GraphQA基准上，该方法实现了4.13%的性能提升，无需训练大语言模型，展示了在处理复杂文本属性图数据时的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: LGPT方法为大语言模型处理图任务提供了高效、灵活的图表示方案，避免了庞大模型训练开销。未来可探索更复杂的查询融合策略及在更多图任务上的应用。

title: SEDD: Scalable and Efficient Dataset Deduplication with GPUs
abstract: Dataset deduplication is widely recognized as a crucial preprocessing step that enhances data quality and improves the performance of large language models. A commonly used method for this process is the MinHash Locality-Sensitive Hashing (LSH) algorithm. Recently, GPU-accelerated frameworks such as NVIDIA NeMo Curator have been introduced to handle large-scale corpora; however, they remain suboptimal due to high communication overhead from physical data shuffling and underutilization of GPU resources. In this paper, we propose SEDD, a high-performance GPU-accelerated deduplication framework optimized for distributed cluster environments. SEDD introduces a computationally efficient, partially reusable hash function, alongside highly optimized GPU kernels and a hardware-aware automatic parameter selection mechanism. By replacing traditional data shuffling with a streaming-based approach, SEDD significantly mitigates communication bottlenecks. Our framework outperforms the CPU-based deduplication tool in SlimPajama by up to 158$\times$ and the GPU-based tool in NVIDIA NeMo Curator by up to 7.8$\times$ when processing 30 million documents on a node with four GPUs. Notably, SEDD dramatically accelerates the previously time-consuming MinHash signature generation phase, achieving speedups of up to 375$\times$ over the CPU baseline. Despite these gains in efficiency, SEDD maintains high deduplication fidelity, with duplicate document sets achieving Jaccard similarities of over 0.95 compared to those identified by the standard MinHash algorithm. In large-scale experiments, the deduplication of 1.2 trillion tokens is completed in just 3 hours on an 8-node 32-GPU V100 cluster. The related code is publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/mcrl/SEDD).

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEDD框架，通过GPU加速和流式处理优化分布式去重效率，显著提升性能并保持高保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据集去重是提升大语言模型性能的关键预处理步骤。现有方法如MinHash LSH虽常用，但GPU加速框架如NVIDIA NeMo Curator存在物理数据混洗导致的高通信开销和GPU资源利用率不足的问题。传统CPU方案处理大规模数据效率低下，亟需一种高效、可扩展的去重方案。
light_analysis.method: SEDD引入部分可重用的哈希函数以减少计算冗余；设计高度优化的GPU内核；采用硬件感知的自动参数选择机制；以流式处理替代物理数据混洗，显著降低通信瓶颈。该方法在分布式GPU集群上实现高效去重，无需显式数据重排。
light_analysis.result: 在30M文档、4 GPU节点上，SEDD比CPU版SlimPajama工具快158倍，比GPU版NeMo Curator快7.8倍；MinHash签名生成阶段加速高达375倍。去重保真度高，Jaccard相似度超0.95。在8节点32 GPU集群上，去重1.2万亿token仅需3小时。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEDD展示了GPU加速去重的高效性与可扩展性，为大规模语言模型数据预处理提供了实用工具。其流式处理和自适应参数优化思想可推广至其他数据清洗任务。代码已开源，便于社区应用和改进。

title: Property Enhanced Instruction Tuning for Multi-task Molecule Generation with Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely applied in various natural language processing tasks such as question answering and machine translation. However, due to the lack of labeled data and the difficulty of manual annotation for biochemical properties, the performance for molecule generation tasks is still limited, especially for tasks involving multi-properties constraints. In this work, we present a two-step framework PEIT (Property Enhanced Instruction Tuning) to improve LLMs for molecular-related tasks. In the first step, we use textual descriptions, SMILES, and biochemical properties as multimodal inputs to pre-train a model called PEIT-GEN, by aligning multi-modal representations to synthesize instruction data. In the second step, we fine-tune existing open-source LLMs with the synthesized data, the resulting PEIT-LLM can handle molecule captioning, text-based molecule generation, molecular property prediction, and our newly proposed multi-constraint molecule generation tasks. Experimental results show that our pre-trained PEIT-GEN outperforms MolT5 and BioT5 in molecule captioning, demonstrating modalities align well between textual descriptions, structures, and biochemical properties. Furthermore, PEIT-LLM shows promising improvements in multi-task molecule generation, proving the scalability of the PEIT framework for various molecular tasks. We release the code, constructed instruction data, and model checkpoints in https://github.com/chenlong164/PEIT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEIT框架，通过多模态对齐和指令微调提升大语言模型在多任务分子生成上的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在分子生成任务中性能有限，尤其是多属性约束任务，主要由于缺乏标注数据和生化属性注释困难。现有方法难以同时处理分子描述、文本生成分子、属性预测等多任务，亟需一种有效利用多模态信息的方法来提升模型能力。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段，以文本描述、SMILES和生化属性作为多模态输入，预训练PEIT-GEN模型，通过对齐多模态表示合成指令数据；第二阶段，利用合成数据微调开源大语言模型，得到PEIT-LLM，可处理分子描述、文本生成分子、分子属性预测及新提出的多约束分子生成任务。
light_analysis.result: PEIT-GEN在分子描述任务上优于MolT5和BioT5，表明文本、结构与属性模态对齐良好；PEIT-LLM在多任务分子生成上展示出显著改进，验证了框架的可扩展性。具体性能提升幅度（如准确率）摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出PEIT框架，融合多模态对齐与指令微调，有效增强了多任务分子生成能力。学术上为分子AI提供了新范式，实际应用中可加速药物设计等。未来可探索更复杂的属性约束和更大的模型规模。

title: GUIDE-VAE: Advancing Data Generation with User Information and Pattern Dictionaries
abstract: Generative modelling of multi-user datasets has become prominent in science and engineering. Generating a data point for a given user requires employing user information, and conventional generative models, including variational autoencoders (VAEs), often ignore this. This paper introduces GUIDE-VAE, a novel conditional generative model that leverages user embeddings to generate user-guided data. By leveraging shared patterns across users, GUIDE-VAE improves performance in multi-user settings, even under significant data imbalance. In addition to integrating user information, GUIDE-VAE incorporates a pattern dictionary-based covariance composition (PDCC) to improve the realism of generated samples by capturing complex feature dependencies. While user embeddings drive performance gains, PDCC addresses common issues such as noise and over-smoothing typically seen in VAEs. The proposed GUIDE-VAE was evaluated on a multi-user smart meter dataset characterised by substantial data imbalance across users. Quantitative results show that GUIDE-VAE performs effectively on both synthetic data generation and missing-record imputation tasks, while qualitative evaluations indicate that it produces more plausible and less noisy data. These results establish GUIDE-VAE as a promising tool for controlled, realistic data generation in multi-user datasets, with potential applications across domains that require user-informed modelling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GUIDE-VAE，一种利用用户嵌入和模式字典的条件生成模型，解决多用户数据不平衡下的生成问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多用户数据集的生成建模中，传统VAE等模型常忽略用户信息，无法利用用户间共享模式，尤其在数据严重不平衡时性能不佳。现有方法生成的样本噪声大、过平滑，缺乏对复杂特征依赖的捕捉能力。
light_analysis.method: GUIDE-VAE将用户嵌入作为条件输入，引导数据生成；同时引入模式字典的协方差组成（PDCC）来建模特征间的复杂依赖，提升生成样本的真实性。PDCC通过共享模式字典缓解噪声和过平滑问题，用户嵌入则驱动性能提升。
light_analysis.result: 在多用户智能电表数据集（数据严重不平衡）上进行实验，定量结果表明GUIDE-VAE在合成数据生成和缺失记录插补任务中均有效；定性评估显示其生成的样本更真实、噪声更少，优于忽略用户信息的基线模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUIDE-VAE为多用户数据集提供了一种可控、真实的数据生成工具，可应用于需要用户信息建模的领域。未来可探索更复杂的模式字典结构或扩展至其他类型数据的生成。

title: LightTransfer: Your Long-Context LLM is Secretly a Hybrid Model with Effortless Adaptation
abstract: Scaling language models to handle longer contexts introduces substantial memory challenges due to the growing cost of key-value (KV) caches. Motivated by the efficiency gains of hybrid models and the broad availability of pretrained large transformer backbones, we explore transitioning transformer models into hybrid architectures for a more efficient generation. In this work, we propose LightTransfer, a lightweight method that transforms models such as LLaMA into hybrid variants. Our approach identifies lazy layers -- those focusing on recent or initial tokens -- and replaces their full attention with streaming attention. This transformation can be performed without any training for long-context understanding tasks or with minimal fine-tuning for o1-like long reasoning generation tasks that require stronger reasoning capabilities. Experiments across diverse benchmarks and models (e.g., LLaMA, Mistral, QwQ-STILL) demonstrate that, even when half of the layers are identified as lazy, LightTransfer achieves up to 2.17$\times$ throughput improvement with minimal performance loss ($<1.5\%$ on LongBench) and achieves 53.3\% on math benchmark AIME24 of advanced o1-like long reasoning model QwQ-STILL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LightTransfer方法，通过识别并替换全注意力为流式注意力，将预训练Transformer模型高效转换为混合架构，显著提升长文本生成效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 处理长上下文时，KV缓存带来巨大内存挑战。现有混合模型需从头训练，而预训练大模型广泛可用。本文旨在利用预训练模型，通过轻量转换获得混合架构效率，无需或仅需少量微调。
light_analysis.method: 识别模型中的懒惰层（关注近期或初始令牌），将其全注意力替换为流式注意力。转换无需训练（长上下文理解）或少量微调（o1类推理）。在LLaMA、Mistral、QwQ-STILL等模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench上，即使半数为懒惰层，性能损失<1.5%，吞吐量提升2.17倍。在AIME24数学基准上，QwQ-STILL达53.3%，优于原始模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献轻量转换方法，将Transformer高效转为混合架构，大幅提升吞吐量且性能损失极小，适用于长上下文理解和推理。未来可优化层识别策略或扩展至其他架构。

title: AdaSwitch: Adaptive Switching between Small and Large Agents for Effective Cloud-Local Collaborative Learning
abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have been remarkable. Users face a choice between using cloud-based LLMs for generation quality and deploying local-based LLMs for lower computational cost. The former option is typically costly and inefficient, while the latter usually fails to deliver satisfactory performance for reasoning steps requiring deliberate thought processes. In this work, we propose a novel LLM utilization paradigm that facilitates the collaborative operation of large cloud-based LLMs and smaller local-deployed LLMs. Our framework comprises two primary modules: the local agent instantiated with a relatively smaller LLM, handling less complex reasoning steps, and the cloud agent equipped with a larger LLM, managing more intricate reasoning steps. This collaborative processing is enabled through an adaptive mechanism where the local agent introspectively identifies errors and proactively seeks assistance from the cloud agent, thereby effectively integrating the strengths of both locally-deployed and cloud-based LLMs, resulting in significant enhancements in task completion performance and efficiency. We evaluate AdaSwitch across 7 benchmarks, ranging from mathematical reasoning and complex question answering, using various types of LLMs to instantiate the local and cloud agents. The empirical results show that AdaSwitch effectively improves the performance of the local agent, and sometimes achieves competitive results compared to the cloud agent while utilizing much less computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自适应切换小型本地与大型云端LLM的协作框架，通过错误自检与主动求助机制提升效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户面临云端LLM（高质量但昂贵低效）与本地LLM（低计算成本但推理能力不足）的两难选择。现有方法无法兼顾性能与效率，尤其在需要深度推理的任务中表现不佳。因此，亟需一种能动态结合两者优势的协作范式。
light_analysis.method: AdaSwitch框架包含本地代理（小型LLM，处理简单步骤）和云端代理（大型LLM，处理复杂步骤）。关键创新在于自适应机制：本地代理通过自我评估识别错误，主动向云端代理请求协助，实现步骤级协作。该方法无需预定义任务分割，而是动态决策，有效整合两类模型的优势。实验使用多种LLM实例化代理。
light_analysis.result: 在7个涵盖数学推理和复杂问答的基准上评估。AdaSwitch显著提升本地代理的性能，有时甚至达到与云端代理竞争的水平，同时大幅降低计算开销。具体提升幅度因任务和模型而异，但整体表明该框架在性能与效率间取得了良好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaSwitch提出了一种实用的云端-本地LLM协作范式，通过自适应切换有效结合了本地模型的高效与云端模型的强推理能力。该工作为资源受限场景下的LLM部署提供了新思路，具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的错误检测机制及多智能体扩展。

title: TOAST: Transformer Optimization using Adaptive and Simple Transformations
abstract: Foundation models achieve state-of-the-art performance across different tasks, but their size and computational demands raise concerns about accessibility and sustainability. Existing efficiency methods often require additional retraining or finetuning, limiting their practicality. Recent findings suggest that deep neural networks exhibit internal representation similarities. While such similarities across different models have been exploited for enabling techniques such as model stitching and merging, intra-network redundancy remains underexplored as a source for efficiency gains. In this paper, we introduce Transformer Optimization using Adaptive and Simple Transformations (TOAST), a framework that exploits these redundancies to approximate entire transformer blocks with lightweight closed-form mappings, such as linear transformations or even the identity function, without any additional training. Across state-of-the-art pretrained vision models (e.g., ViT, DINOv2, DeiT) and datasets ranging from MNIST to ImageNet-1k, TOAST reduces parameters and computation while preserving, and in some cases improving, downstream performance. These results show that large portions of transformer depth can be replaced by trivial functions, opening a new perspective on efficient foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: TOAST框架通过轻量级闭式映射替换Transformer块，无需额外训练即可减少参数和计算量，甚至提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型虽性能卓越，但规模大、计算需求高，限制了其可及性和可持续性。现有效率方法通常需要重新训练或微调，实用性不足。研究发现深度神经网络内部存在表示相似性，但跨模型相似性已被用于模型拼接和合并，而网络内冗余作为效率提升的潜在来源尚未被充分探索。因此，本文旨在利用这种冗余，无需任何额外训练即可实现模型压缩。
light_analysis.method: TOAST框架通过利用Transformer内部的表示冗余，用轻量级闭式映射（如线性变换或恒等函数）近似整个Transformer块。该方法无需额外训练或微调，直接替换原块。在多种预训练视觉模型（ViT、DINOv2、DeiT）和数据集（MNIST到ImageNet-1k）上进行测试，验证了其有效性。核心创新在于发现Transformer深度的大部分可用平凡函数替代，从而减少参数和计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TOAST在保留甚至提升下游任务性能的同时，显著减少了模型参数和计算量。在多个视觉模型和数据集上，替换大量Transformer块后，性能与原始模型相当或更优。具体数据摘要未明确，但指出参数和计算量降低，且性能未下降甚至改善。与基线方法相比，TOAST无需额外训练即可实现效率提升，更具实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TOAST展示了Transformer深度中的大部分模块可以用平凡函数替代，为高效基础模型提供了新视角。该框架无需额外训练，易于部署，具有显著的学术价值和实际应用潜力。局限性可能在于仅针对视觉模型验证，未来可扩展到其他模态。此外，如何自适应选择替换块及其映射函数可能是进一步研究方向。

title: Biology-inspired joint distribution neurons based on Hierarchical Correlation Reconstruction allowing for multidirectional propagation of values and densities
abstract: Recently a million of biological neurons (BNN) has turned out better from modern RL methods in playing Pong~\cite{RL}, reminding they are still qualitatively superior e.g. in learning, flexibility and robustness - suggesting to try to improve current artificial e.g. MLP/KAN for better agreement with biological. There is proposed extension of KAN approach to neurons containing model of local joint distribution: $ρ(\mathbf{x})=\sum_{\mathbf{j}\in B} a_\mathbf{j} f_\mathbf{j}(\mathbf{x})$ for $\mathbf{x} \in [0,1]^d$, adding interpretation and information flow control to KAN, and allowing to gradually add missing 3 basic properties of biological: 1) biological axons propagate in both directions~\cite{axon}, while current artificial are focused on unidirectional propagation - joint distribution neurons can repair by substituting some variables to get conditional values/distributions for the remaining. 2) Animals show risk avoidance~\cite{risk} requiring to process variance, and generally real world rather needs probabilistic models - the proposed can predict and propagate also distributions as vectors of moments: (expected value, variance) or higher. 3) biological neurons require local training, and beside backpropagation, the proposed allows many additional ways, like direct training, through tensor decomposition, or finally local and promising: information bottleneck. Proposed approach is very general, can be also used as extension of softmax in embeddings of e.g. transformer or JEPA, suggesting interpretation that features are mixed moments of joint density of real-world properties.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于层级相关性重构的生物启发式联合分布神经元，支持多方向传播值和密度，扩展KAN以具备双向传播、概率建模和局部训练能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代强化学习方法虽在游戏任务上表现优异，但生物神经网络在灵活性、鲁棒性和学习能力上仍具优势。当前人工神经网络（如MLP/KAN）缺乏生物神经元的双向传播、风险规避（方差处理）和局部训练等基本特性。本研究旨在通过引入联合分布神经元模型，弥补这些差距，提升人工网络的生物一致性。
light_analysis.method: 扩展KAN方法，提出局部联合分布模型 ρ(x)=∑ a_j f_j(x)，其中x∈[0,1]^d。通过变量替换实现双向传播，利用矩向量（期望值、方差等）进行概率传播。支持多种训练方式：反向传播、直接训练、张量分解及信息瓶颈局部训练。可扩展Transformer或JEPA中的softmax，将特征解释为联合密度的混合矩。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验数据或对比结果。该方法在概念上提供了双向传播、概率建模和局部训练的能力，有望在灵活性、鲁棒性和学习效率上超越传统人工神经元。未来需通过实验验证在强化学习、概率推理等任务中的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种生物启发式的联合分布神经元，具备双向传播、概率建模和局部训练三大生物特性，弥补了当前人工神经网络的不足。该框架通用性强，可应用于多种架构，为开发更灵活、鲁棒的AI模型提供了新方向。未来需进一步实验验证，并探索其在更复杂场景中的扩展。

title: Corruptions of Supervised Learning Problems: Typology and Mitigations
abstract: Corruption is notoriously widespread in data collection. Despite extensive research, the existing literature predominantly focuses on specific settings and learning scenarios, lacking a unified view of corruption modelization and mitigation. In this work, we develop a general theory of corruption, which incorporates all modifications to a supervised learning problem, including changes in model class and loss. Focusing on changes to the underlying probability distributions via Markov kernels, our approach leads to three novel opportunities. First, it enables the construction of a novel, provably exhaustive corruption framework, distinguishing among different corruption types. This serves to unify existing models and establish a consistent nomenclature. Second, it facilitates a systematic analysis of corruption's consequences on learning tasks, by comparing Bayes risks in the clean and corrupted scenarios. Notably, while label corruptions affect only the loss function, attribute corruptions additionally influence the hypothesis class. Third, building upon these results, we investigate mitigations for various corruption types. We expand existing loss-correction methods for label corruption to handle dependent corruption types. Our findings highlight the necessity to generalize this classical corruption-corrected learning framework to a new paradigm with weaker requirements to encompass more corruption types. We provide such a paradigm as well as loss correction formulas in the attribute and joint corruption cases.
comment: 73 pages. To be published in Journal of Machine Learning Research 27 (2026) 1-73

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个通用的监督学习污染理论，通过马尔可夫核统一建模多种污染类型，并扩展损失校正方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据污染在收集过程中普遍存在，但现有研究多针对特定场景，缺乏统一的污染建模与缓解视角。该工作旨在构建一个通用的污染理论框架，涵盖所有监督学习问题的修改（包括模型类和损失的变化），以统一现有模型并建立一致的命名法，同时系统分析污染对学习任务的影响。
light_analysis.method: 通过马尔可夫核描述底层概率分布的变化，构建一个可证明详尽的污染分类框架，区分不同污染类型。基于此，比较干净与污染场景下的贝叶斯风险，分析污染后果。针对标签污染，扩展损失校正方法以处理依赖型污染；对属性污染和联合污染，提出新的校正范式及损失校正公式。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供实验结果或具体性能数据，但理论贡献包括：构建了穷举的污染分类体系，统一了现有模型；通过贝叶斯风险对比揭示了标签污染仅影响损失函数，而属性污染还影响假设类；扩展了损失校正方法至依赖型污染，并提出了更弱要求的校正范式以覆盖更多污染类型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为监督学习中的污染问题提供了统一的理论框架，有助于系统理解和缓解数据污染。学术上，建立了污染类型学并推导了通用校正公式；实际应用中，可指导设计鲁棒学习算法。未来可进一步验证理论在具体任务上的效果，并探索更复杂的污染场景。
